papers.title: Covering Human Action Space for Computer Use: Data Synthesis and Benchmark
papers.abstract: Computer-use agents (CUAs) automate on-screen work, as illustrated by GPT-5.4 and Claude. Yet their reliability on complex, low-frequency interactions is still poor, limiting user trust. Our analysis of failure cases from advanced models suggests a long-tail pattern in GUI operations, where a relatively small fraction of complex and diverse interactions accounts for a disproportionate share of task failures. We hypothesize that this issue largely stems from the scarcity of data for complex interactions. To address this problem, we propose a new benchmark CUActSpot for evaluating models' capabilities on complex interactions across five modalities: GUI, text, table, canvas, and natural image, as well as a variety of actions (click, drag, draw, etc.), covering a broader range of interaction types than prior click-centric benchmarks that focus mainly on GUI widgets. We also design a renderer-based data-synthesis pipeline: scenes are automatically generated for each modality, screenshots and element coordinates are recorded, and an LLM produces matching instructions and action traces. After training on this corpus, our Phi-Ground-Any-4B outperforms open-source models with fewer than 32B parameters. We will release our benchmark, data, code, and models at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出覆盖多模态交互的计算机使用基准CUActSpot与合成数据管线，训练出4B模型超越32B以下开源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体在复杂低频交互上可靠性差，主要由于复杂交互数据稀缺，限制了用户信任。
analysis.problem: 解决GUI操作中长尾复杂交互（如跨模态、多动作类型）的数据稀缺和评估不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析高级模型失败案例发现长尾模式：少量复杂多样交互导致不成比例的任务失败。
analysis.method: 提出渲染器驱动的数据合成管线，自动生成多模态场景、截图、坐标，并由LLM生成指令和动作轨迹；同时构建覆盖GUI、文本、表格、画布、自然图像五种模态及多种动作类型的基准CUActSpot。
contributions: 提出覆盖五种模态和多种动作类型的计算机使用基准CUActSpot，超越传统点击中心基准。
设计渲染器驱动的数据合成管线，自动生成复杂交互训练数据。
训练Phi-Ground-Any-4B模型，在复杂交互任务上超越32B以下开源模型。
analysis.experiments: 在CUActSpot基准上评估，Phi-Ground-Any-4B优于32B以下开源模型。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 合成数据与真实场景可能存在分布差异。
仅评估了4B模型，更大模型效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出覆盖多模态交互的计算机使用基准CUActSpot与合成数据管线，训练出4B模型超越32B以下开源模型。

papers.title: SenseNova-U1: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with NEO-unify Architecture
papers.abstract: Recent large vision-language models (VLMs) remain fundamentally constrained by a persistent dichotomy: understanding and generation are treated as distinct problems, leading to fragmented architectures, cascaded pipelines, and misaligned representation spaces. We argue that this divide is not merely an engineering artifact, but a structural limitation that hinders the emergence of native multimodal intelligence. Hence, we introduce SenseNova-U1, a native unified multimodal paradigm built upon NEO-unify, in which understanding and generation evolve as synergistic views of a single underlying process. We launch two native unified variants, SenseNova-U1-8B-MoT and SenseNova-U1-A3B-MoT, built on dense (8B) and mixture-of-experts (30B-A3B) understanding baselines, respectively. Designed from first principles, they rival top-tier understanding-only VLMs across text understanding, vision-language perception, knowledge reasoning, agentic decision-making, and spatial intelligence. Meanwhile, they deliver strong semantic consistency and visual fidelity, excelling in conventional or knowledge-intensive any-to-image (X2I) synthesis, complex text-rich infographic generation, and interleaved vision-language generation, with or without think patterns. Beyond performance, we show detailed model design, data preprocessing, pre-/post-training, and inference strategies to support community research. Last but not least, preliminary evidence demonstrates that our models extend beyond perception and generation, performing strongly in vision-language-action (VLA) and world model (WM) scenarios. This points toward a broader roadmap where models do not translate between modalities, but think and act across them in a native manner. Multimodal AI is no longer about connecting separate systems, but about building a unified one and trusting the necessary capabilities to emerge from within.

analysis.tldr: 提出NEO-unify架构统一多模态理解与生成，SenseNova-U1模型在多项任务上达到顶尖水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大视觉语言模型将理解与生成视为分离问题，导致架构碎片化、流水线级联和表征空间错位，阻碍原生多模态智能的出现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个原生统一的多模态范式，使理解与生成作为单一底层过程的协同视图，而非分离的子系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NEO-unify架构，基于密集（8B）和混合专家（30B-A3B）理解基线构建两个统一变体，通过统一模型设计、数据预处理、预/后训练和推理策略实现理解与生成的协同。
contributions: 提出NEO-unify架构，原生统一多模态理解与生成，消除架构碎片化。
发布SenseNova-U1-8B-MoT和SenseNova-U1-A3B-MoT两个变体，在理解、生成、VLA和世界模型场景中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型规模较大，部署成本可能较高。
在极端复杂或未见过的多模态任务上泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NEO-unify架构统一多模态理解与生成，SenseNova-U1模型在多项任务上达到顶尖水平。

papers.title: EgoForce: Forearm-Guided Camera-Space 3D Hand Pose from a Monocular Egocentric Camera
papers.abstract: Reconstructing the absolute 3D pose and shape of the hands from the user's viewpoint using a single head-mounted camera is crucial for practical egocentric interaction in AR/VR, telepresence, and hand-centric manipulation tasks, where sensing must remain compact and unobtrusive. While monocular RGB methods have made progress, they remain constrained by depth-scale ambiguity and struggle to generalize across the diverse optical configurations of head-mounted devices. As a result, models typically require extensive training on device-specific datasets, which are costly and laborious to acquire. This paper addresses these challenges by introducing EgoForce, a monocular 3D hand reconstruction framework that recovers robust, absolute 3D hand pose and its position from the user's (camera-space) viewpoint. EgoForce operates across fisheye, perspective, and distorted wide-FOV camera models using a single unified network. Our approach combines a differentiable forearm representation that stabilizes hand pose, a unified arm-hand transformer that predicts both hand and forearm geometry from a single egocentric view, mitigating depth-scale ambiguity, and a ray space closed-form solver that enables absolute 3D pose recovery across diverse head-mounted camera models. Experiments on three egocentric benchmarks show that EgoForce achieves state-of-the-art 3D accuracy, reducing camera-space MPJPE by up to 28% on the HOT3D dataset compared to prior methods and maintaining consistent performance across camera configurations. For more details, visit the project page at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: EgoForce 通过前臂引导和统一网络，从单目头戴相机恢复绝对3D手部姿态，跨相机模型泛化且精度提升。
analysis.research_motivation: AR/VR、远程临场和手部操作任务需要紧凑无干扰的传感，但单目RGB方法受深度-尺度模糊限制，且难以泛化到不同头戴设备的光学配置，导致需要昂贵且费力的设备特定数据集训练。
analysis.problem: 从单目头戴相机恢复绝对3D手部姿态和位置，并跨鱼眼、透视和畸变广角相机模型泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合可微分前臂表示以稳定手部姿态、统一臂-手Transformer预测手和前臂几何、以及射线空间闭式求解器实现绝对3D姿态恢复。
contributions: 提出EgoForce框架，实现跨多种头戴相机模型的绝对3D手部姿态重建。
引入可微分前臂表示和统一臂-手Transformer，缓解深度-尺度模糊。
在三个基准上达到SOTA，HOT3D数据集上相机空间MPJPE降低28%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个egocentric基准上评估，HOT3D数据集上相机空间MPJPE降低28%，且跨相机配置性能一致。
limitations: 可能依赖前臂可见性，遮挡时性能下降。
未在真实AR/VR设备上验证实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EgoForce 通过前臂引导和统一网络，从单目头戴相机恢复绝对3D手部姿态，跨相机模型泛化且精度提升。

papers.title: From Web to Pixels: Bringing Agentic Search into Visual Perception
papers.abstract: Visual perception connects high-level semantic understanding to pixel-level perception, but most existing settings assume that the decisive evidence for identifying a target is already in the image or frozen model knowledge. We study a more practical yet harder open-world case where a visible object must first be resolved from external facts, recent events, long-tail entities, or multi-hop relations before it can be localized. We formalize this challenge as Perception Deep Research and introduce WebEye, an object-anchored benchmark with verifiable evidence, knowledge-intensive queries, precise box/mask annotations, and three task views: Search-based Grounding, Search-based Segmentation, and Search-based VQA. WebEyes contains 120 images, 473 annotated object instances, 645 unique QA pairs, and 1,927 task samples. We further propose Pixel-Searcher, an agentic search-to-pixel workflow that resolves hidden target identities and binds them to boxes, masks, or grounded answers. Experiments show that Pixel-Searcher achieves the strongest open-source performance across all three task views, while failures mainly arise from evidence acquisition, identity resolution, and visual instance binding.

analysis.tldr: 提出感知深度研究挑战，构建WebEye基准并设计Pixel-Searcher智能搜索到像素的工作流，以解决需要外部知识才能定位的开放世界视觉感知问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉感知假设目标识别的决定性证据已在图像或模型知识中，但实际开放世界中，可见物体需先通过外部事实、近期事件、长尾实体或多跳关系解析才能定位，现有方法无法应对此挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决开放世界中需要外部知识才能定位可见物体的视觉感知问题，即感知深度研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出失败主要源于证据获取、身份解析和视觉实例绑定。
analysis.method: 提出Pixel-Searcher，一种智能搜索到像素的工作流，先通过搜索解析隐藏目标身份，再将其绑定到边界框、掩码或基于证据的答案。
contributions: 形式化定义了感知深度研究挑战，并构建了WebEye基准，包含可验证证据、知识密集型查询、精确框/掩码标注及三种任务视图。
提出Pixel-Searcher工作流，在三种任务视图上取得开源最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WebEye基准上评估Pixel-Searcher，在搜索基础定位、搜索基础分割和搜索基础VQA三种任务视图上均取得最强开源性能。
limitations: 失败主要源于证据获取、身份解析和视觉实例绑定。
基准规模较小（120张图像），可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知深度研究挑战，构建WebEye基准并设计Pixel-Searcher智能搜索到像素的工作流，以解决需要外部知识才能定位的开放世界视觉感知问题。

papers.title: CausalCine: Real-Time Autoregressive Generation for Multi-Shot Video Narratives
papers.abstract: Autoregressive video generation aims at real-time, open-ended synthesis. Yet, cinematic storytelling is not merely the endless extension of a single scene; it requires progressing through evolving events, viewpoint shifts, and discrete shot boundaries. Existing autoregressive models often struggle in this setting. Trained primarily for short-horizon continuation, they treat long sequences as extended single shots, inevitably suffering from motion stagnation and semantic drift during long rollouts. To bridge this gap, we introduce CausalCine, an interactive autoregressive framework that transforms multi-shot video generation into an online directing process. CausalCine generates causally across shot changes, accepts dynamic prompts on the fly, and reuses context without regenerating previous shots. To achieve this, we first train a causal base model on native multi-shot sequences to learn complex shot transitions prior to acceleration. We then propose Content-Aware Memory Routing (CAMR), which dynamically retrieves historical KV entries according to attention-based relevance scores rather than temporal proximity, preserving cross-shot coherence under bounded active memory. Finally, we distill the causal base model into a few-step generator for real-time interactive generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalCine significantly outperforms autoregressive baselines and approaches the capability of bidirectional models while unlocking the streaming interactivity of causal generation. Demo available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: CausalCine 提出因果自回归框架，实现多镜头视频叙事的高效实时生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归视频生成模型主要针对单镜头短程延续，处理多镜头叙事时会出现运动停滞和语义漂移，无法满足电影叙事中镜头切换、视角变化等需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多镜头视频叙事的高效实时自回归生成，同时保持跨镜头连贯性和交互性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有自回归模型将长序列视为扩展的单镜头，导致运动停滞和语义漂移。
analysis.method: 提出 CausalCine 框架，包括：1) 在多镜头序列上训练因果基础模型；2) 内容感知记忆路由 (CAMR) 基于注意力相关性动态检索历史 KV 条目；3) 蒸馏为少步生成器实现实时交互。
contributions: 提出首个面向多镜头视频叙事的因果自回归生成框架 CausalCine。
设计内容感知记忆路由 (CAMR) 实现跨镜头连贯性。
通过蒸馏实现实时交互生成，性能优于自回归基线，接近双向模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量多镜头训练数据。
CAMR 的注意力计算可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CausalCine 提出因果自回归框架，实现多镜头视频叙事的高效实时生成。

papers.title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to perform advanced reasoning tasks: Reasoning Text-to-Image Generation, where the model actively infers implicit user intents, and Self-Reflective Refinement, where it autonomously diagnoses and corrects misalignments in generated outputs. To address the challenge of providing stable supervision for real-world multimodal generation, we introduce the Decompositional Verifiable Reward (DVReward). Unlike holistic scalar rewards, DVReward utilizes an LLM to decompose complex user requests into atomic, verifiable semantic and quality questions, which are then evaluated by a general MLLM to provide reliable and interpretable feedback. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AlphaGRPO yields robust improvements across multimodal generation benchmarks, including GenEval, TIIF-Bench, DPG-Bench and WISE, while also achieving significant gains in editing tasks on GEdit without training on editing tasks. These results validate that our self-reflective reinforcement approach effectively leverages inherent understanding to guide high-fidelity generation. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: AlphaGRPO 通过分解式可验证奖励将 GRPO 应用于统一多模态模型，实现自反思多模态生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型（UMMs）在生成任务中缺乏自我反思和推理能力，且难以提供稳定的监督信号来指导复杂多模态生成。
analysis.problem: 如何让 UMMs 具备自我反思和推理能力，并在无冷启动阶段下提升多模态生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AlphaGRPO 框架，将 GRPO 应用于 AR-Diffusion UMMs；并设计分解式可验证奖励（DVReward），利用 LLM 将复杂请求分解为原子可验证问题，再由 MLLM 评估提供反馈。
contributions: 首次将 GRPO 应用于 UMMs 实现自反思多模态生成，无需冷启动阶段。
提出 DVReward，提供稳定、可解释的奖励信号用于复杂多模态生成。
analysis.experiments: 在 GenEval、TIIF-Bench、DPG-Bench、WISE 等基准上取得鲁棒改进，并在编辑任务 GEdit 上无需训练即获得显著提升。
limitations: 依赖 LLM 和 MLLM 的分解与评估能力，可能受限于模型性能。
未讨论在更广泛多模态任务上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AlphaGRPO 通过分解式可验证奖励将 GRPO 应用于统一多模态模型，实现自反思多模态生成。

papers.title: Revisiting Photometric Ambiguity for Accurate Gaussian-Splatting Surface Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Surface reconstruction with differentiable rendering has achieved impressive performance in recent years, yet the pervasive photometric ambiguities have strictly bottlenecked existing approaches. This paper presents AmbiSuR, a framework that explores an intrinsic solution upon Gaussian Splatting for the photometric ambiguity-robust surface 3D reconstruction with high performance. Starting by revisiting the foundation, our investigation uncovers two built-in primitive-wise ambiguities in representation, while revealing an intrinsic potential for ambiguity self-indication in Gaussian Splatting. Stemming from these, a photometric disambiguation is first introduced, constraining ill-posed geometry solution for definite surface formation. Then, we propose an ambiguity indication module that unleashes the self-indication potential to identify and further guide correcting underconstrained reconstructions. Extensive experiments demonstrate our superior surface reconstructions compared to existing methods across various challenging scenarios, excelling in broad compatibility. Project: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过解决高斯溅射中的光度歧义，实现高精度表面重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于可微渲染的表面重建方法受光度歧义严重制约，导致几何解不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何在高斯溅射框架中消除光度歧义以实现鲁棒的表面3D重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现高斯溅射表示中存在固有的逐原语光度歧义，但同时也具有内在的歧义自指示潜力。
analysis.method: 提出AmbiSuR框架，包括光度去歧义模块（约束病态几何解）和歧义指示模块（利用自指示潜力识别并引导修正欠约束重建）。
contributions: 揭示了高斯溅射中两种内置的逐原语光度歧义及其自指示潜力
提出光度去歧义和歧义指示模块，有效解决歧义问题
在多种挑战性场景下实现优于现有方法的表面重建性能
analysis.experiments: 在多种挑战性场景下进行实验，与现有方法比较，展示了优越的表面重建质量和广泛兼容性。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或纹理缺失场景仍存在局限
计算开销可能高于简单方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过解决高斯溅射中的光度歧义，实现高精度表面重建。

papers.title: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pairwise token interactions are necessary for learning rich visual-semantic representations. In this work, we challenge this assumption, demonstrating that effective visual representations can be learned without any direct patch-to-patch interaction. We propose VECA (Visual Elastic Core Attention), a vision transformer architecture that uses efficient linear-time core-periphery structured attention enabled by a small set of learned cores. In VECA, these cores act as a communication interface: patch tokens exchange information exclusively through the core tokens, which are initialized from scratch and propagated across layers. Because the $N$ image patches only directly interact with a resolution invariant set of $C$ learned "core" embeddings, this yields linear complexity $O(N)$ for predetermined $C$, which bypasses quadratic scaling. Compared to prior cross-attention architectures, VECA maintains and iteratively updates the full set of $N$ input tokens, avoiding a small $C$-way bottleneck. Combined with nested training along the core axis, our model can elastically trade off compute and accuracy during inference. Across classification and dense tasks, VECA achieves performance competitive with the latest vision foundation models while reducing computational cost. Our results establish elastic core-periphery attention as a scalable alternative building block for Vision Transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性核心-外围注意力机制VECA，用线性复杂度替代ViT的二次复杂度，性能与最新基础模型相当。
analysis.research_motivation: ViT的全对全自注意力计算量随分辨率二次增长，限制了高分辨率应用；现有交叉注意力架构存在信息瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种线性复杂度的注意力机制，同时保持视觉表征的丰富性和可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VECA架构，使用少量可学习核心token作为通信接口，图像patch仅与核心token交互，实现线性复杂度O(N)；结合核心轴嵌套训练，支持推理时弹性计算-精度权衡。
contributions: 挑战了ViT中成对token交互的必要性，证明无需直接patch交互即可学习有效视觉表征。
提出VECA架构，实现线性时间核心-外围注意力，性能与最新基础模型竞争且计算成本更低。
analysis.experiments: 在分类和密集任务上，VECA性能与最新视觉基础模型竞争，同时降低计算成本。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 核心token数量C的选择可能影响性能与效率平衡。
在极端高分辨率场景下的表现尚未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弹性核心-外围注意力机制VECA，用线性复杂度替代ViT的二次复杂度，性能与最新基础模型相当。

papers.title: OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-modal joint audio-video generation remains unexplored. Notably, our in-depth analysis first reveals that the primary obstacles to applying RL in this stem from: (i) multi-objective advantages inconsistency, where the advantages of multimodal outputs are not always consistent within a group; (ii) multi-modal gradients imbalance, where video-branch gradients leak into shallow audio layers responsible for intra-modal generation; (iii) uniform credit assignment, where fine-grained cross-modal alignment regions fail to get efficient exploration. These shortcomings suggest that vanilla RL fine-tuning strategy with a single global advantage often leads to suboptimal results. To address these challenges, we propose OmniNFT, a novel modality-aware online diffusion RL framework with three key innovations: (1) Modality-wise advantage routing, which routes independent per-reward advantages to their respective modality generation branches. (2) Layer-wise gradient surgery, which selectively detaches video-branch gradients on shallow audio layers while retaining those for cross-modal interaction layers. (3) Region-wise loss reweighting, which modulates policy optimization toward critical regions related to audio-video synchronization and fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on JavisBench and VBench with the LTX-2 backbone demonstrate that OmniNFT achieves comprehensive improvements in audio and video perceptual quality, cross-modal alignment, and audio-video synchronization.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniNFT框架，通过模态感知的在线扩散强化学习解决联合音视频生成中的多目标不一致、梯度不平衡和信用分配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联合音视频生成方法在模态保真度、跨模态对齐和细粒度同步方面仍有不足，强化学习虽具潜力但尚未有效应用于多目标多模态联合生成场景。
analysis.problem: 联合音视频生成中应用强化学习面临三个主要障碍：多目标优势不一致、多模态梯度不平衡以及均匀信用分配导致细粒度对齐区域探索不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现：多模态输出的优势在组内不一致；视频分支梯度泄漏到负责模态内生成的浅层音频层；细粒度跨模态对齐区域无法获得有效探索。
analysis.method: 提出OmniNFT框架，包含三个关键创新：模态感知优势路由（将独立奖励优势路由到对应模态生成分支）、分层梯度手术（选择性分离浅层音频层的视频分支梯度）、区域损失重加权（针对音视频同步和细粒度对齐的关键区域调整策略优化）。
contributions: 首次系统分析强化学习在联合音视频生成中的三大障碍：多目标优势不一致、多模态梯度不平衡和均匀信用分配。
提出OmniNFT框架，通过模态感知优势路由、分层梯度手术和区域损失重加权实现模态感知的在线扩散强化学习。
在JavisBench和VBench上基于LTX-2骨干网络取得音视频感知质量、跨模态对齐和同步的全面改进。
analysis.experiments: 在JavisBench和VBench上使用LTX-2骨干网络进行实验，结果表明OmniNFT在音视频感知质量、跨模态对齐和同步方面取得全面改进。
limitations: 摘要未提及对更复杂场景或多模态扩展的讨论。
可能依赖特定骨干网络（LTX-2），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniNFT框架，通过模态感知的在线扩散强化学习解决联合音视频生成中的多目标不一致、梯度不平衡和信用分配问题。

papers.title: FuTCR: Future-Targeted Contrast and Repulsion for Continual Panoptic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Continual Panoptic Segmentation (CPS) requires methods that can quickly adapt to new categories over time. The nature of this dense prediction task means that training images may contain a mix of labeled and unlabeled objects. As nothing is known about these unlabeled objects a priori, existing methods often simply group any unlabeled pixel into a single "background" class during training. In effect, during training, they repeatedly tell the model that all the different background categories are the same (even when they aren't). This makes learning to identify different background categories as they are added challenging since these new categories may require using information the model was previously told was unimportant and ignored. Thus, we propose a Future-Targeted Contrastive and Repulsive (FuTCR) framework that addresses this limitation by restructuring representations before new classes are introduced. FuTCR first discovers confident future-like regions by grouping model-predicted masks whose pixels are consistently classified as background but exhibit non-background logits. Next, FuTCR applies pixel-to-region contrast to build coherent prototypes from these unlabeled regions, while simultaneously repelling background features away from known-class prototypes to explicitly reserve representational space for future categories. Experiments across six CPS settings and a range of dataset sizes show FuTCR improves relative new-class panoptic quality over the state-of-the-art by up to 28%, while preserving or improving base-class performance with gains up to 4%.

analysis.tldr: 通过未来目标对比与排斥机制，为持续全景分割中的新类别预留表征空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续全景分割中，现有方法将未标注对象统一归为背景类，导致模型忽略其差异，后续学习新类别时难以利用被忽略的信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在学习新类别前重构特征表示，避免背景类中未标注对象的信息被丢弃，从而提升新类别分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练时将所有未标注像素归为同一背景类，使模型认为不同背景类别相同，阻碍后续新类别的学习。
analysis.method: FuTCR框架：先通过分组模型预测掩码发现置信的未来相似区域（像素背景logits高但非背景），再应用像素到区域对比构建原型，同时将背景特征排斥远离已知类原型，为新类别预留表征空间。
contributions: 提出FuTCR框架，通过未来目标对比与排斥机制解决持续全景分割中背景类混淆问题。
在六种CPS设置和多种数据集规模上，新类别全景质量相对SOTA提升高达28%，基类性能保持或提升达4%。
analysis.experiments: 在六种CPS设置和多种数据集规模上进行实验，新类别全景质量相对SOTA提升高达28%，基类性能保持或提升达4%。
limitations: 依赖模型预测掩码的置信度，可能受预测质量影响。
未讨论对极端类别不平衡或小样本场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过未来目标对比与排斥机制，为持续全景分割中的新类别预留表征空间。

papers.title: LychSim: A Controllable and Interactive Simulation Framework for Vision Research
papers.abstract: While self-supervised pretraining has reduced vision systems' reliance on synthetic data, simulation remains an indispensable tool for closed-loop optimization and rigorous out-of-distribution (OOD) evaluation. However, modern simulation platforms often present steep technical barriers, requiring extensive expertise in computer graphics and game development. In this work, we present LychSim, a highly controllable and interactive simulation framework built upon Unreal Engine 5 to bridge this gap. LychSim is built around three key designs: (1) a streamlined Python API that abstracts away underlying engine complexities; (2) a procedural data pipeline capable of generating diverse, high-fidelity environments with varying out-of-distribution (OOD) visual challenges, paired with rich 2D and 3D ground truths; and (3) a native integration of the Model Context Protocol (MCP) that transforms the simulator into a dynamic, closed-loop playground for reasoning agentic LLMs. We further annotate scene-level procedural rules and object-level pose alignments to enable semantically aligned 3D ground truths and automated scene modification. We demonstrate LychSim's capability across multiple downstream applications, including serving as a synthetic data engine, powering reinforcement learning-based adversarial examiners, and facilitating interactive, language-driven scene layout generation. To benefit the broader vision community, LychSim will be made publicly available, including full source code and various data annotations.

analysis.tldr: LychSim 是一个基于 Unreal Engine 5 的可控交互式仿真框架，提供 Python API、程序化数据流水线和 MCP 集成，用于视觉研究中的闭环优化和 OOD 评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有仿真平台技术门槛高，需要计算机图形学和游戏开发专业知识，限制了其在视觉研究中的广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个易于使用、可控且交互的仿真框架，以支持视觉系统的闭环优化和分布外评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Unreal Engine 5 构建，包含三个关键设计：简化的 Python API、程序化数据流水线（生成多样高保真环境及丰富2D/3D真值）、集成模型上下文协议（MCP）使模拟器成为推理型LLM的动态闭环游乐场。
contributions: 提出 LychSim 仿真框架，降低使用门槛，支持 Python API 和程序化数据生成。
集成 MCP 协议，实现与推理型LLM的交互式闭环场景生成。
提供场景级程序化规则和物体级姿态对齐，支持语义对齐的3D真值和自动场景修改。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在多个下游应用（合成数据引擎、强化学习对抗测试、语言驱动场景布局生成）中展示了能力。
limitations: 可能依赖 Unreal Engine 5，对硬件要求较高。
程序化生成场景的多样性和真实感可能仍有局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LychSim 是一个基于 Unreal Engine 5 的可控交互式仿真框架，提供 Python API、程序化数据流水线和 MCP 集成，用于视觉研究中的闭环优化和 OOD 评估。

papers.title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Efficient Retrospective Dynamic Scene Novel View Synthesis with a Standardized Benchmark
papers.abstract: Retrospective novel view synthesis (NVS) of dynamic scenes is fundamental to applications such as sports. Recent dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) approaches introduce temporally coupled formulations to enforce motion coherence across time. In this paper, we argue that, in a synchronized multi-view (MV) setting typical of sports, the dynamic scene at each time step is already strongly geometrically constrained. We posit that the availability of calibrated, synchronized viewpoints provides sufficient spatial consistency, and therefore, explicit temporal coupling, or complex multi-body constraints seems unnecessary for retrospective NVS. To this end, we propose an approach tailored for synchronized MV dynamic scene. By initializing the SfM-derived point cloud at the start time and propagating optimized Gaussians over time, we show that efficient retrospective NVS can be achieved without imposing a temporal deformation constraint. Complementing our methodological contribution, we introduce a Dynamic MV dataset framework built on Blender for reproducible NeRF and 3DGS research. The framework generates high-quality, synchronized camera rigs and exports training-ready datasets in standard formats, eliminating inconsistencies in coordinate conventions and data pipelines. Using the framework, we construct a dynamic benchmark suite and evaluate representative NeRF and 3DGS approaches under controlled conditions. Together, we show that, under a synchronized MV setup, efficient retrospective dynamic scene NVS can be achieved using 3DGS. At the same time, the dataset-generation framework enables reproducible and principled benchmarking of dynamic NVS methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需时间约束的3DGS方法，用于同步多视角动态场景的高效回顾性新视角合成，并构建标准化基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景回顾性新视角合成在体育等应用中至关重要，但现有动态3DGS方法引入复杂的时间耦合约束，计算成本高且依赖复杂多体约束。
analysis.problem: 在同步多视角设置下，如何高效实现动态场景的回顾性新视角合成，同时避免显式时间耦合或复杂多体约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在同步多视角设置中，每个时间步的动态场景已受到强几何约束，因此显式时间耦合并非必要。
analysis.method: 在起始时间初始化SfM点云，然后随时间传播优化后的高斯体，无需施加时间变形约束。
contributions: 提出一种针对同步多视角动态场景的高效3DGS方法，无需显式时间耦合。
构建基于Blender的动态多视角数据集框架，支持可复现的NeRF和3DGS研究，并生成标准化基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能仅适用于同步多视角设置，对非同步或稀疏视角场景效果未知。
数据集框架依赖Blender合成数据，真实场景泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需时间约束的3DGS方法，用于同步多视角动态场景的高效回顾性新视角合成，并构建标准化基准。

papers.title: GaitProtector: Impersonation-Driven Gait De-Identification via Training-Free Diffusion Latent Optimization
papers.abstract: Conventional gait de-identification methods often encounter an inherent trade-off: they either provide insufficient identity suppression or introduce spatiotemporal distortions that impede structure-sensitive downstream applications. We propose GaitProtector, an impersonation-driven gait de-identification framework that formulates privacy protection as a unified objective with two tightly coupled components: (i) obfuscation, which repels the protected gait from the source identity, and (ii) impersonation, which attracts it toward a selected target identity. The target identity serves as a semantic anchor that biases optimization toward structurally plausible gait patterns under the pretrained diffusion prior, helping preserve dominant body shape and motion dynamics. We instantiate this idea through a training-free diffusion latent optimization pipeline. Instead of retraining a generator for each dataset, we invert each input silhouette sequence into the latent trajectory of a pretrained 3D video diffusion model and iteratively optimize latent codes with a differentiable adversarial objective to synthesize protected gaits. Experiments on the CASIA-B dataset show that GaitProtector achieves a 56.7% impersonation success rate under black-box gait recognition and reduces Rank-1 identification accuracy from 89.6% to 15.0%, while maintaining favorable visual and temporal quality. We further evaluate downstream utility on the Scoliosis1K dataset, where diagnostic accuracy decreases only from 91.4% to 74.2%. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to leverage pretrained 3D diffusion priors in a training-free manner for silhouette-based gait de-identification.

analysis.tldr: 提出GaitProtector，通过免训练扩散潜变量优化实现步态去识别，兼顾隐私保护与结构保真。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统步态去识别方法在身份抑制和时空结构保持之间存在固有权衡，要么抑制不足，要么引入畸变影响下游应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护步态隐私的同时，保持身体形状和运动动态的结构合理性，避免对结构敏感的下游任务造成过大影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于免训练的扩散潜变量优化：将输入轮廓序列反演到预训练3D视频扩散模型的潜轨迹中，通过可微对抗目标迭代优化潜码，实现混淆（远离源身份）和冒充（靠近目标身份）的统一优化。
contributions: 首次以免训练方式利用预训练3D扩散先验进行基于轮廓的步态去识别。
提出冒充驱动的去识别框架，将隐私保护建模为混淆和冒充的联合目标，利用目标身份作为语义锚点保持结构合理性。
analysis.experiments: 在CASIA-B数据集上，黑盒步态识别下冒充成功率达56.7%，Rank-1识别准确率从89.6%降至15.0%；在Scoliosis1K数据集上，诊断准确率仅从91.4%降至74.2%。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和多样性。
冒充成功率仍有提升空间，且对目标身份的选择敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GaitProtector，通过免训练扩散潜变量优化实现步态去识别，兼顾隐私保护与结构保真。

papers.title: AOI-SSL: Self-Supervised Framework for Efficient Segmentation of Wire-bonded Semiconductors In Optical Inspection
papers.abstract: Segmentation models in automated optical inspection of wire-bonded semiconductors are typically device-specific and must be re-trained when new devices or distribution shifts appear. We introduce AOI-SSL, a training-efficient framework for semantic segmentation of wire-bonded semiconductors by combining small-domain self-supervised pre-training of vision transformers with in-context inference that minimizes the need of labeled examples. We pre-train SOTA self-supervised algorithms in a small industrial inspection dataset and find that Masked Autoencoders are the most effective in this small-data setting, improving downstream segmentation while reducing the labeled fine-tuning effort. We further introduce in-context, patch-level retrieval methods that predict masks directly from dense encoder embeddings with negligible additional training. We show that, in this setting, simple similarity-based retrieval performs on par with more complex attention-based aggregation used currently in the literature. Furthermore, our experiments demonstrate that self-supervised pre-training significantly improves segmentation quality compared to training from scratch and to ImageNet pre-trained backbones under a fixed fine-tuning computational budget. Finally, the results reveal that retrieval based segmentation outperforms fine-tuning when targeting single device images, allowing for near-instant adaptation to difficult samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出AOI-SSL框架，结合小域自监督预训练和上下文检索，高效分割键合半导体，减少标注需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统半导体光学检测中的分割模型需针对新设备或分布偏移重新训练，成本高且效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用少量标注数据实现键合半导体的高效语义分割，并快速适应新设备或困难样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在小数据集上，Masked Autoencoders比其它自监督方法更有效；简单相似度检索与复杂注意力聚合性能相当；自监督预训练显著优于从头训练或ImageNet预训练。
analysis.method: 结合小域自监督预训练（Vision Transformer）与上下文补丁级检索方法，直接基于密集编码器嵌入预测掩码。
contributions: 提出AOI-SSL框架，通过小域自监督预训练和上下文检索减少标注需求。
发现Masked Autoencoders在小数据场景下最有效，且简单相似度检索与复杂注意力聚合性能相当。
证明自监督预训练在固定微调预算下优于从头训练和ImageNet预训练，且检索分割在单设备图像上优于微调。
analysis.experiments: 在小型工业检测数据集上评估，对比多种自监督算法、训练策略和检索方法，显示分割质量提升和快速适应能力。
limitations: 方法仅在特定半导体检测场景验证，泛化性未知。
检索分割可能依赖特征质量，对极端分布偏移的鲁棒性待研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AOI-SSL框架，结合小域自监督预训练和上下文检索，高效分割键合半导体，减少标注需求。

papers.title: Beyond Localization: A Comprehensive Diagnosis of Perspective-Conditioned Spatial Reasoning in MLLMs from Omnidirectional Images
authors: Xu Zheng (3 and 4) ((1) The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show strong visual perception, yet remain limited in reasoning about space under changing viewpoints. We study this challenge as Perspective-Conditioned Spatial Reasoning (PCSR) in 360-degree omnidirectional images, where broad scene coverage reduces ambiguity from partial observations without eliminating the need for viewpoint-dependent inference. To assess this capability, we introduce PCSR-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark of 84,373 question-answer pairs from 2,600 omnidirectional images across 26 indoor environments. PCSR-Bench contains eight tasks spanning foundational perception (e.g., object counting, relative distance, and relative direction) and advanced PCSR, including compositional chains, egocentric rotation, perspective re-anchoring, ego-distortion, and limited-FOV visibility. We evaluate 14 representative MLLMs and observe a substantial perception-reasoning gap: accuracy reaches 57.59% on foundational relative direction, but drops to 13.49% on egocentric rotation, 7.13% on egocentric distortion, and 0.64% on open-ended compositional reasoning. To probe the plasticity of this gap, we conduct an RL-based diagnostic study on a 7B-scale model. Reward shaping improves a matched 7B baseline from 31.10% to 60.06% under a controlled setting, suggesting that PCSR is partial plasticity rather than being fully immutable. Still, the gains are task-selective, sensitive to reward design including both weight allocation and reward formulation, and partially dependent on the evaluation protocol. These results position PCSR as a key bottleneck in current MLLMs and highlight limited but meaningful room for recovery under targeted optimization.

analysis.tldr: MLLM在全向图像中的视角条件空间推理存在显著感知-推理差距，但通过RL奖励塑造可部分提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在静态图像中表现良好，但在视角变化下的空间推理能力不足，而全向图像虽减少歧义但仍需视角依赖推理，这一能力瓶颈尚未被系统诊断。
analysis.problem: 评估和诊断MLLM在全向图像中的视角条件空间推理（PCSR）能力，并探究其可塑性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM在基础感知任务（如相对方向）上准确率57.59%，但在高级推理任务（如自我中心旋转13.49%、自我中心扭曲7.13%、开放组合推理0.64%）上急剧下降，存在感知-推理差距。
analysis.method: 构建PCSR-Bench基准（84,373个QA对，来自2,600张全向图像，8个任务），评估14个MLLM，并对7B模型进行基于RL的奖励塑造诊断研究。
contributions: 提出PCSR-Bench，首个系统诊断MLLM视角条件空间推理能力的基准。
揭示MLLM在PCSR中存在显著感知-推理差距，且该差距具有部分可塑性。
analysis.experiments: 在PCSR-Bench上评估14个代表性MLLM，并对7B模型进行RL奖励塑造实验，结果显示在受控设置下准确率从31.10%提升至60.06%。
limitations: RL提升具有任务选择性，对奖励设计敏感。
仅对7B规模模型进行诊断，更大模型的可塑性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MLLM在全向图像中的视角条件空间推理存在显著感知-推理差距，但通过RL奖励塑造可部分提升。

papers.title: GeoQuery: Geometry-Query Diffusion for Sparse-View Reconstruction
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a prominent paradigm for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. However, it remains vulnerable to severe artifacts when trained under sparse-view constraints. While recent methods attempt to rectify artifacts in rendered views using image diffusion models, they typically rely on multi-view self-attention to retrieve information from reference images. We observe that this mechanism often fails when the rendered novel views output by 3DGS are heavily corrupted: damaged query features lead to erroneous cross-view retrieval, resulting in inconsistent rendering refinement. To address this, we propose GeoQuery, a geometry-guided diffusion framework that integrates generative priors with explicit geometric cues via a novel Geometry-guided Cross-view Attention (GCA) mechanism. First, by leveraging predicted depth maps and camera poses, we construct a geometry-induced correspondence field to sample reference features, forming a geometry-aligned proxy query that replaces the corrupted rendering features. Furthermore, we design a new cross-view feature aggregation pipeline, in which we restrict the cross-view attention to a local window around each proxy query to effectively retrieve useful features while suppressing spurious matches. GeoQuery can be seamlessly integrated into existing diffusion-based pipelines, enabling robust reconstruction even under extreme view sparsity. Extensive experiments on sparse-view novel view synthesis and rendering artifact removal demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoQuery，用几何引导的扩散模型解决稀疏视角下3DGS渲染的伪影问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS在稀疏视角下易产生严重伪影，现有扩散方法依赖多视角自注意力，但受损的渲染特征会导致错误的跨视角检索，影响一致性。
analysis.problem: 稀疏视角下3DGS渲染视图严重损坏时，扩散模型中的多视角自注意力机制因查询特征受损而失效，导致渲染修复不一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到当3DGS输出的渲染视图严重损坏时，损坏的查询特征会导致错误的跨视角检索，进而产生不一致的渲染修复。
analysis.method: 提出GeoQuery，包含几何引导的跨视角注意力（GCA）机制：利用预测深度和相机位姿构建几何诱导的对应场，采样参考特征形成几何对齐的代理查询，替代损坏的渲染特征；并在代理查询周围局部窗口内进行跨视角注意力聚合。
contributions: 提出GeoQuery，一种几何引导的扩散框架，通过几何引导的跨视角注意力机制整合生成先验与显式几何线索。
设计了几何诱导的对应场和代理查询，有效解决稀疏视角下渲染特征损坏导致的错误检索问题。
在稀疏视角新视图合成和渲染伪影去除任务上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏视角新视图合成和渲染伪影去除任务上进行实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖深度预测的准确性，深度估计误差可能影响代理查询质量。
局部窗口大小可能需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoQuery，用几何引导的扩散模型解决稀疏视角下3DGS渲染的伪影问题。

papers.title: SEMIR: Semantic Minor-Induced Representation Learning on Graphs for Visual Segmentation
papers.abstract: Segmenting small and sparse structures in large-scale images is fundamentally constrained by voxel-level, lattice-bound computation and extreme class imbalance -- dense, full-resolution inference scales poorly and forces most pipelines to rely on fixed regionization or downsampling, coupling computational cost to image resolution and attenuating boundary evidence precisely where minority structures are most informative. We introduce SEMIR (Semantic Minor-Induced Representation Learning), a representation framework that decouples inference from the native grid by learning a task-adapted, topology-preserving latent graph representation with exact decoding. SEMIR transforms the underlying grid graph into a compact, boundary-aligned graph minor through parameterized edge contraction, node deletion, and edge deletion, while preserving an exact lifting map from minor predictions to lattice labels. Minor construction is formalized as a few-shot structure learning problem that replaces hand-tuned preprocessing with a boundary-alignment objective: minor parameters are learned by maximizing agreement between predicted boundary elements and target-specific semantic edges under a boundary Dice criterion, and the induced minor is annotated with scale- and rotation-robust geometric and intensity descriptors and supports efficient region-level inference via message passing on a graph neural network (GNN) with relational edge features. We benchmark SEMIR on three tumor segmentation datasets -- BraTS 2021, KiTS23, and LiTS -- where targets exhibit high structural variability and distributional uncertainty. SEMIR yields consistent improvements in minority-structure Dice at practical runtime. More broadly, SEMIR establishes a framework for learning task-adapted, topology-preserving latent representations with exact decoding for high-resolution structured visual data.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEMIR框架，通过图论中的图小构造将高分辨率图像分割从体素网格解耦为紧凑的拓扑保持潜在图表示，提升小目标分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像中分割小且稀疏的结构受限于体素级计算和极端类别不平衡，传统方法依赖固定区域化或下采样，计算成本与分辨率耦合，且在小目标区域边界证据衰减。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖固定网格的情况下，高效且精确地分割大规模图像中的小目标和稀疏结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SEMIR将原始网格图通过参数化的边收缩、节点删除和边删除转换为紧凑的边界对齐图小，并保持从图小预测到网格标签的精确提升映射；图小构造作为少样本结构学习问题，通过边界Dice准则优化边界对齐；图小节点使用尺度与旋转鲁棒的几何和强度描述符，通过带关系边特征的GNN进行区域级推理。
contributions: 提出SEMIR框架，将图像分割从体素网格解耦为拓扑保持的潜在图表示，支持精确解码。
将图小构造形式化为少样本结构学习问题，用边界对齐目标替代手工预处理。
在三个肿瘤分割数据集上验证了SEMIR在少数结构Dice和实际运行时间上的改进。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2021、KiTS23和LiTS三个肿瘤分割数据集上评估，SEMIR在少数结构Dice上取得一致改进，且运行时间实用。
limitations: 可能对高度不规则或噪声边界敏感。
图小构造的优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SEMIR框架，通过图论中的图小构造将高分辨率图像分割从体素网格解耦为紧凑的拓扑保持潜在图表示，提升小目标分割性能。

papers.title: Fast Image Super-Resolution via Consistency Rectified Flow
papers.abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in real-world image super-resolution (SR), yet their reliance on time-consuming multi-step sampling largely hinders their practical applications. While recent efforts have introduced few- or single-step solutions, existing methods either inefficiently model the process from noisy input or fail to fully exploit iterative generative priors, compromising the fidelity and quality of the reconstructed images. To address this issue, we propose FlowSR, a novel approach that reformulates the SR problem as a rectified flow from low-resolution (LR) to high-resolution (HR) images. Our method leverages an improved consistency learning strategy to enable high-quality SR in a single step. Specifically, we refine the original consistency distillation process by incorporating HR regularization, ensuring that the learned SR flow not only enforces self-consistency but also converges precisely to the ground-truth HR target. Furthermore, we introduce a fast-slow scheduling strategy, where adjacent timesteps for consistency learning are sampled from two distinct schedulers: a fast scheduler with fewer timesteps to improve efficiency, and a slow scheduler with more timesteps to capture fine-grained texture details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FlowSR achieves outstanding performance in both efficiency and image quality.

analysis.tldr: FlowSR通过一致性修正流实现单步超分辨率，兼顾效率与图像质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在超分辨率中效果优异，但多步采样耗时，现有少步方法存在建模效率低或生成保真度不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个单步超分辨率方法，在保持高效的同时确保重建图像的保真度和质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将超分辨率重构为从低分辨率到高分辨率的修正流，通过改进的一致性蒸馏（加入HR正则化）实现单步生成，并采用快慢调度策略平衡效率与细节。
contributions: 提出FlowSR，将超分辨率建模为修正流，实现单步高质量重建。
引入HR正则化改进一致性蒸馏，确保流收敛到真实HR目标。
设计快慢调度策略，同时提升效率和纹理细节捕获。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端低分辨率或复杂退化场景的泛化能力有限。
单步生成可能仍存在细节损失，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowSR通过一致性修正流实现单步超分辨率，兼顾效率与图像质量。

papers.title: Fill the GAP: A Granular Alignment Paradigm for Visual Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Visual latent reasoning lets a multimodal large language model (MLLM) create intermediate visual evidence as continuous tokens, avoiding external tools or image generators. However, existing methods usually follow an output-as-input latent paradigm and yield unstable gains. We identify evidence for a feature-space mismatch that can contribute to this instability: dominant visual-latent models build on pre-norm MLLMs and reuse decoder hidden states as predicted latent inputs, even though these states occupy a substantially different norm regime from the input embeddings the model was trained to consume~\citep{xie2025mhc,li2026siamesenorm,team2026attention}. This mismatch can make direct latent feedback unreliable. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose \textbf{GAP}, a \textbf{G}ranular \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{P}aradigm for visual latent modeling. GAP aligns visual latent reasoning at three levels: feature-level alignment maps decoder outputs into input-compatible visual latents through a lightweight PCA-aligned latent head; context-level alignment grounds latent targets with inspectable auxiliary visual supervision; and capacity-guided alignment assigns latent supervision selectively to examples where the base MLLM struggles. On Qwen2.5-VL 7B, the resulting model achieves the best mean aggregate perception and reasoning performance among our supervised variants. Inference-time intervention probing further suggests that generated latents provide task-relevant visual signal beyond merely adding token slots.

analysis.tldr: 提出GAP范式，通过三级对齐解决MLLM视觉潜在推理中特征空间不匹配导致的性能不稳定问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉潜在推理方法通常采用输出即输入的潜在范式，但性能提升不稳定，原因在于特征空间不匹配：预归一化MLLM中解码器隐藏状态与输入嵌入的范数分布不同，导致直接潜在反馈不可靠。
analysis.problem: 解决MLLM视觉潜在推理中因特征空间不匹配导致的性能不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出特征空间不匹配是导致现有视觉潜在推理方法性能不稳定的关键因素：预归一化MLLM中解码器隐藏状态与输入嵌入的范数分布存在显著差异。
analysis.method: 提出GAP（粒度对齐范式），包含三级对齐：特征级对齐（轻量PCA对齐潜在头将解码器输出映射为输入兼容的视觉潜在）、上下文级对齐（可检查的辅助视觉监督）、能力引导对齐（选择性对基础MLLM困难的样本施加潜在监督）。
contributions: 识别并验证了MLLM视觉潜在推理中特征空间不匹配导致性能不稳定的现象。
提出GAP三级对齐范式，有效缓解特征空间不匹配问题。
在Qwen2.5-VL 7B上实现监督变体中最优的平均聚合感知和推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL 7B上进行实验，达到监督变体中最优的平均聚合感知和推理性能；推理时干预探针表明生成的潜在提供了任务相关视觉信号，而不仅仅是增加token槽。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（预归一化MLLM），泛化性需进一步验证。
轻量PCA对齐潜在头的设计可能在大规模场景下存在扩展性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GAP范式，通过三级对齐解决MLLM视觉潜在推理中特征空间不匹配导致的性能不稳定问题。

papers.title: VIP: Visual-guided Prompt Evolution for Efficient Dense Vision-Language Inference
papers.abstract: Pursuing training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in an efficient and generalizable manner remains challenging due to the deep-seated spatial bias in CLIP. To overcome the limitations of existing solutions, this work moves beyond the CLIP-based paradigm and harnesses the recent spatially-aware this http URL framework to facilitate more efficient and high-quality dense prediction. While this http URL exhibits robust spatial awareness, we find that the semantic ambiguity of text queries gives rise to severe mismatch within its dense cross-modal interactions. To address this, we introduce \textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{VI}}sual-guided \textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{P}}rompt evolution (\textcolor{oursblue}{\textbf{\textit{VIP}}}) to rectify the semantic expressiveness of text queries in this http URL , unleashing its potential for fine-grained object perception. Towards this end, \VIP integrates alias expansion with a visual-guided distillation mechanism to mine valuable semantic cues, which are robustly aggregated in a saliency-aware manner to yield a high-fidelity prediction. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that \VIP: \ding{182} surpasses the top-leading methods by $1.4\% \sim 8.4\%$ average mIoU, \ding{183} generalizes well to diverse challenging domains, and \ding{184} requires marginal inference time and memory overhead. \href{ this https URL }{Our code is publicly available at GitHub \faGithub}.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉引导的提示进化方法，无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割的效率和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法受限于CLIP的空间偏差，且训练成本高、泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，利用空间感知模型解决文本查询语义模糊导致的密集跨模态交互不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 空间感知模型虽具有鲁棒的空间感知能力，但文本查询的语义模糊性会导致密集跨模态交互中的严重不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出视觉引导的提示进化（VIP），结合别名扩展和视觉引导蒸馏机制挖掘语义线索，并以显著性感知方式聚合生成高保真预测。
contributions: 提出VIP方法，无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割性能。
在多个基准上超越现有方法，平均mIoU提升1.4%~8.4%，且泛化性强、计算开销低。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，VIP在平均mIoU上超越顶尖方法1.4%~8.4%，并展现出良好的跨域泛化能力，推理时间和内存开销小。
limitations: 依赖空间感知模型的质量，可能受限于其固有缺陷。
别名扩展和蒸馏机制可能引入额外超参数，需要调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉引导的提示进化方法，无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割的效率和泛化性。

papers.title: Contrastive Learning under Noisy Temporal Self-Supervision for Colonoscopy Videos
papers.abstract: Learning robust representations of polyp tracklets is key to enabling multiple AI-assisted colonoscopy applications, from polyp characterization to automated reporting and retrieval. Supervised contrastive learning is an effective approach for learning such representations, but it typically relies on correct positive and negative definitions. Collecting these labels requires linking tracklets that depict the same underlying polyp entity throughout the video, which is costly and demands specialized clinical expertise. In this work, we leverage the sequential workflow of colonoscopy procedures to derive self-supervised associations from temporal structure. Since temporally derived associations are not guaranteed to be correct, we introduce a noise-aware contrastive loss to account for noisy associations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the learned representations across multiple downstream tasks, including polyp retrieval and re-identification, size estimation, and histology classification. Our method outperforms prior self-supervised and supervised baselines, and matches or exceeds recent foundation models across all tasks, using a lightweight encoder trained on only 27 videos. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 利用结肠镜视频的时间结构进行噪声感知对比学习，以学习息肉轨迹的鲁棒表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 监督对比学习需要正确的正负样本定义，但为结肠镜视频中的息肉轨迹标注标签成本高且需要专业知识，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在缺乏精确标签的情况下，利用结肠镜视频的时间结构学习鲁棒的息肉轨迹表示，并处理时间自监督中的噪声关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间结构衍生的关联可能包含噪声，即不同轨迹可能被错误关联，需要噪声感知机制。
analysis.method: 提出噪声感知对比损失，利用结肠镜视频的时间顺序生成自监督关联，并在损失中考虑关联的不确定性。
contributions: 提出一种利用结肠镜视频时间结构进行自监督对比学习的方法，无需昂贵标注。
引入噪声感知对比损失，处理时间自监督中的错误关联。
在息肉检索、重识别、尺寸估计和组织学分类等多个下游任务上超越先前自监督和监督基线，匹配或超越基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个下游任务（息肉检索、重识别、尺寸估计、组织学分类）上评估，使用仅27个视频训练的轻量编码器，结果优于先前自监督和监督基线，匹配或超越基础模型。
limitations: 方法依赖结肠镜视频的特定工作流，可能不适用于其他医学视频。
仅在27个视频上训练，规模较小，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用结肠镜视频的时间结构进行噪声感知对比学习，以学习息肉轨迹的鲁棒表示。

papers.title: G$^2$TR: Generation-Guided Visual Token Reduction for Separate-Encoder Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: The development of separate-encoder Unified multimodal models (UMMs) comes with a rapidly growing inference cost due to dense visual token processing. In this paper, we focus on understanding-side visual token reduction for improving the efficiency of separate-encoder UMMs. While this topic has been widely studied for MLLMs, existing methods typically rely on attention scores, text-image similarity and so on, implicitly assuming that the final objective is discriminative reasoning. This assumption does not hold for UMMs, where understanding-side visual tokens must also preserve the model's capabilities for editing images. We propose G$^2$TR, a generation-guided visual token reduction framework for separate-encoder UMMs. Our key insight is that the generation branch provides a task-agnostic signal for identifying understanding-side visual tokens that are not only semantically relevant but also important for latent-space image reconstruction and generation. G$^2$TR estimates token importance from consistency with VAE latent, performs balanced token selection, and merges redundant tokens into retained representatives to reduce information loss. The method is training-free, plug-and-play, and applied only after the understanding encoding stage, making it compatible with existing UMM inference pipelines. Experiments on image understanding and editing benchmarks show that G$^2$TR substantially reduces visual tokens and prefill computation by 1.94x while maintaining both reasoning accuracy and editing quality, outperforming baselines on almost all benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成引导的视觉令牌缩减框架G²TR，在分离编码器统一多模态模型中实现1.94倍预填充计算加速，同时保持推理准确性和编辑质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 分离编码器统一多模态模型（UMMs）因密集视觉令牌处理导致推理成本快速增长，现有视觉令牌缩减方法多针对判别式推理，不适用于需要同时支持图像编辑的UMMs。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲UMMs图像理解与编辑能力的前提下，高效减少理解侧视觉令牌数量以降低推理开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出G²TR框架，利用生成分支的VAE潜在一致性估计令牌重要性，进行平衡令牌选择，并将冗余令牌合并到保留代表中，无需训练即可即插即用。
contributions: 提出首个面向分离编码器UMMs的生成引导视觉令牌缩减方法，兼顾理解与编辑能力。
设计训练无关、即插即用的令牌重要性估计与合并策略，实现1.94倍预填充计算加速。
analysis.experiments: 在图像理解和编辑基准上，G²TR显著减少视觉令牌和预填充计算1.94倍，同时保持推理准确性和编辑质量，在几乎所有基准上优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分离编码器架构的UMMs，对端到端模型不直接适用。
令牌合并策略可能引入额外延迟，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成引导的视觉令牌缩减框架G²TR，在分离编码器统一多模态模型中实现1.94倍预填充计算加速，同时保持推理准确性和编辑质量。

papers.title: Images in Sentences: Scaling Interleaved Instructions for Unified Visual Generation
papers.abstract: While recent advancements in multimodal language models have enabled image generation from expressive multi-image instructions, existing methods struggle to maintain performance under complex interleaved instructions. This limitation stems from the structural separation of images and text in current paradigms, which forces models to bridge difficult long-range dependencies to match descriptions with visual targets. To address these challenges, we propose \texttt{I}mages i\texttt{N} \texttt{SE}n\texttt{T}ences (\textit{a.k.a}, INSET), a unified generation model that seamlessly embeds images as native vocabulary within textual instructions. By positioning visual features directly at their corresponding semantic slots, INSET leverages the contextual locality of transformers for precise object binding, effectively treating images as dense, expressive language tokens. Furthermore, we introduce a scalable data engine that synthesizes 15M high-quality interleaved samples from standard image and video datasets, utilizing VLMs and LLMs to construct rich, long-horizon sequences. Evaluation results on InterleaveBench demonstrate that INSET significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in multi-image consistency and text alignment, with performance gaps widening as input complexity increases. Beyond standard generation, our approach inherently extends to multimodal image editing, integrating visual content as part of the instruction to facilitate highly expressive and creative visual manipulations.

analysis.tldr: INSET将图像作为原生词汇嵌入文本指令，利用Transformer的上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定，在复杂交错指令下显著提升多图像一致性和文本对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态语言模型在处理复杂交错指令时性能下降，因为图像和文本的结构分离迫使模型建立困难的长距离依赖来匹配描述与视觉目标。
analysis.problem: 解决现有方法在复杂交错指令下多图像生成中图像-文本对齐和一致性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前范式将图像和文本结构分离，导致模型需要桥接困难的长距离依赖，从而在复杂交错指令下性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出INSET，将图像作为原生词汇嵌入文本指令，利用Transformer的上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定；并引入可扩展数据引擎，从标准图像和视频数据集合成1500万高质量交错样本。
contributions: 提出INSET，一种将图像作为原生词汇嵌入文本指令的统一生成模型，利用上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定。
引入可扩展数据引擎，从标准数据集合成1500万高质量交错样本，支持长序列训练。
在InterleaveBench上显著超越现有方法，尤其在输入复杂度增加时性能差距扩大，并自然扩展到多模态图像编辑。
analysis.experiments: 在InterleaveBench上评估，INSET在多图像一致性和文本对齐方面显著优于现有方法，且性能差距随输入复杂度增加而扩大。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，真实场景泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销或推理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: INSET将图像作为原生词汇嵌入文本指令，利用Transformer的上下文局部性实现精确对象绑定，在复杂交错指令下显著提升多图像一致性和文本对齐。

papers.title: EgoEV-HandPose: Egocentric 3D Hand Pose Estimation and Gesture Recognition with Stereo Event Cameras
papers.abstract: Egocentric 3D hand pose estimation and gesture recognition are essential for immersive augmented/virtual reality, human-computer interaction, and robotics. However, conventional frame-based cameras suffer from motion blur and limited dynamic range, while existing event-based methods are hindered by ego-motion interference, monocular depth ambiguity, and the lack of large-scale real-world stereo datasets. To overcome these limitations, we propose EgoEV-HandPose, an end-to-end framework for joint 3D bimanual pose estimation and gesture recognition from stereo event streams. Central to our approach is KeypointBEV, a flexible stereo fusion module that lifts features into a canonical bird's-eye-view space and employs an iterative reprojection-guided refinement loop to progressively resolve depth uncertainty and enforce kinematic consistency. In addition, we introduce EgoEVHands, the first large-scale real-world stereo event-camera dataset for egocentric hand perception, containing 5,419 annotated sequences with dense 3D/2D keypoints across 38 gesture classes under varying illumination. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EgoEV-HandPose achieves state-of-the-art performance with an MPJPE of 30.54mm and 86.87% Top-1 gesture recognition accuracy, significantly outperforming RGB-based stereo and prior event-camera methods, particularly in low-light and bimanual occlusion scenarios, thereby setting a new benchmark for event-based egocentric perception. The established dataset and source code will be publicly released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于立体事件相机的端到端框架EgoEV-HandPose，联合估计3D双手姿态与手势识别，并发布首个大规模真实世界立体事件相机数据集EgoEVHands。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统帧相机在增强现实、人机交互等应用中存在运动模糊和动态范围有限的问题，而现有事件相机方法受自运动干扰、单目深度模糊和缺乏大规模真实世界立体数据集的限制。
analysis.problem: 解决从立体事件流中联合估计3D双手姿态和手势识别的问题，克服运动模糊、深度不确定性和遮挡等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EgoEV-HandPose框架，核心是KeypointBEV立体融合模块，将特征提升到规范鸟瞰空间，并通过迭代重投影引导的细化循环逐步解决深度不确定性并强制执行运动学一致性。
contributions: 提出EgoEV-HandPose，首个用于立体事件流的端到端3D双手姿态估计与手势识别框架。
发布EgoEVHands数据集，首个大规模真实世界立体事件相机数据集，包含5419个标注序列、38个手势类别，覆盖不同光照条件。
analysis.experiments: 在EgoEVHands数据集上，EgoEV-HandPose达到MPJPE 30.54mm和86.87% Top-1手势识别准确率，显著优于RGB立体和先前事件相机方法，尤其在低光和双手遮挡场景下。
limitations: 可能对快速运动或极端遮挡的鲁棒性有限。
数据集仅包含特定手势类别，泛化到其他手势需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于立体事件相机的端到端框架EgoEV-HandPose，联合估计3D双手姿态与手势识别，并发布首个大规模真实世界立体事件相机数据集EgoEVHands。

papers.title: Large-Small Model Collaboration for Farmland Semantic Change Detection
papers.abstract: Farmland Semantic Change Detection (SCD) is essential for cultivated land protection, yet existing benchmarks and models remain insufficient for fine-grained farmland conversion monitoring. Current datasets often lack dedicated "from-to" annotations, while visual change detection models are easily disturbed by phenology-induced pseudo-changes caused by crop rotation, seasonal variation, and illumination differences. To address these challenges, we construct HZNU-FCD, a large-scale fine-grained farmland SCD benchmark with a unified five-class farmland-to-non-farmland annotation protocol. It contains 4,588 bitemporal image pairs with pixel-level labels for practical farmland protection. Based on this benchmark, we propose a large-small collaborative SCD framework that integrates a task-driven small visual model with a frozen large vision-language model. The small model, Fine-grained Difference-aware Mamba (FD-Mamba), learns dense change representations for boundary preservation and small-region localization. The large-model pathway, Cross-modal Logical Arbitration (CMLA), introduces CLIP-based textual priors for prompt-guided semantic arbitration and pseudo-change suppression. To enable effective collaboration, we design a hard-region co-training strategy that supervises the CMLA semantic score map only on low-confidence pixels. Experiments show that our method achieves 97.63% F1, 96.32% IoU, and 96.35% SCD_IoU_mean on HZNU-FCD with only 6.65M trainable parameters. Compared with the multimodal ChangeCLIP-ViT, which leverages vision-language information for change detection, our method improves F1 by 10.19 percentage points on HZNU-FCD. It also achieves 91.43% F1 and 84.21% IoU on LEVIR-CD, and 93.85% F1 and 88.41% IoU on WHU-CD, demonstrating strong robustness and generalization. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模细粒度农田语义变化检测基准HZNU-FCD及大-小模型协作框架，有效抑制物候伪变化并提升检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 农田语义变化检测对耕地保护至关重要，但现有基准缺乏细粒度‘从-到’标注，且视觉变化检测模型易受作物轮作、季节变化等物候伪变化干扰。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集和模型无法有效支持细粒度农田转换监测，且难以区分真实变化与物候伪变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出物候引起的伪变化（如作物轮作、季节变化、光照差异）是视觉变化检测模型的主要干扰源。
analysis.method: 构建大规模细粒度农田SCD基准HZNU-FCD，并提出大-小模型协作框架：小模型FD-Mamba学习密集变化表征，大模型CMLA利用CLIP文本先验进行语义仲裁和伪变化抑制，并通过硬区域协同训练策略监督低置信度像素。
contributions: 构建了HZNU-FCD，一个大规模、细粒度、统一五类农田到非农田标注协议的农田语义变化检测基准。
提出大-小模型协作框架，结合任务驱动小模型和冻结大视觉语言模型，有效抑制物候伪变化。
在多个基准上取得SOTA性能，且参数量仅6.65M。
analysis.experiments: 在HZNU-FCD上达到97.63% F1、96.32% IoU、96.35% SCD_IoU_mean；在LEVIR-CD上达到91.43% F1、84.21% IoU；在WHU-CD上达到93.85% F1、88.41% IoU。与ChangeCLIP-ViT相比，F1提升10.19个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP模型的领域适应性，在非农业场景下泛化性待验证。
硬区域协同训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模细粒度农田语义变化检测基准HZNU-FCD及大-小模型协作框架，有效抑制物候伪变化并提升检测精度。

papers.title: Beyond Text Prompts: Visual-to-Visual Generation as A Unified Paradigm
papers.abstract: Humans often specify and create through visual artifacts: typography sheets, sketches, reference images, and annotated scenes. Yet modern visual generators still ask users to serialize this intent into text, a bottleneck that compresses signals like spatial structure, exact appearance, and glyph shape. We propose \textbf{\emph{visual-to-visual} (V2V)} generation, in which the user conditions a generative model with a visual specification page rather than a text prompt. The page is not an edit target, but a visual document that specifies the desired output. We introduce \textbf{V2V-Zero}, a training-free framework that exposes this interface in existing vision-language model (VLM) conditioned generators by replacing text-only conditioning with final-layer hidden states extracted from visual pages, exploiting the fact that the frozen VLM already maps both text and images into the generator's conditioning space. On GenEval, V2V-Zero reaches 0.85 with a frozen Qwen-Image backbone, closely matching its optimized text-to-image performance without fine-tuning. To evaluate the broader V2V space, we introduce \textbf{Simple-V2V Bench}, spanning seven visual-conditioning tasks and seven models, including GPT Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedream 5.0 Lite, open-weight baselines, and a video extension. V2V-Zero scores 32.7/100, outperforming evaluated open-weight image baselines and revealing a clear capability hierarchy: attribute binding is strong, content generation is unreliable, and structural control remains hard even for commercial systems. A HunyuanVideo-1.5 extension scores 20.2/100, showing the interface transfers beyond images. Mechanistic analysis shows the default reasoning path is primarily visually routed, with 95.0\% of conditioning-token attention mass on visual-page hidden states.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉到视觉（V2V）生成范式，用视觉页面替代文本提示，并推出无需训练的V2V-Zero框架，在GenEval上达到0.85。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成器要求用户将意图序列化为文本，导致空间结构、精确外观等信号被压缩，成为瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何让用户通过视觉页面（而非文本提示）直接指定生成目标，并实现无需额外训练的通用框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: V2V-Zero利用冻结VLM将文本和图像映射到同一条件空间，95%的注意力集中在视觉页面隐藏状态上，表明默认推理路径以视觉为主。
analysis.method: V2V-Zero：在现有VLM条件生成器中，用视觉页面的最终层隐藏状态替换纯文本条件，无需训练。
contributions: 提出视觉到视觉（V2V）生成范式，以视觉页面作为条件。
推出V2V-Zero，无需训练的框架，在GenEval上达到0.85。
构建Simple-V2V Bench，覆盖7个视觉条件任务和7个模型，揭示能力层次。
analysis.experiments: 在GenEval上V2V-Zero达到0.85；Simple-V2V Bench上V2V-Zero得分32.7/100，优于开源图像基线；HunyuanVideo-1.5扩展得分20.2/100。
limitations: 内容生成不可靠，结构控制仍困难。
仅基于冻结VLM，可能受限于预训练模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉到视觉（V2V）生成范式，用视觉页面替代文本提示，并推出无需训练的V2V-Zero框架，在GenEval上达到0.85。

papers.title: CAD-feature enhanced machine learning for manufacturing effort estimation on sheet metal bending parts
papers.abstract: Graph-based machine learning has emerged as a promising approach for manufacturability analysis by learning directly from CAD models represented as Boundary Representations (B-reps), exploiting both surface geometry and topological connectivity. However, purely geometric representations often lack the process-specific semantics required for accurate manufacturability prediction: many manufacturing factors, such as surface roles or bend intent, are not explicitly encoded in shape alone and are difficult for data-driven models to infer reliably. We propose a hybrid approach that addresses this challenge by enriching B-rep attributed adjacency graphs with manufacturing features recognized through a rule-based module. Applied to sheet metal bending, recognized features, such as bend characteristics, flange lengths, and surface roles are integrated as node attributes, concentrating the learning signal on process-relevant geometric patterns. Experiments on both a large-scale synthetic manufacturability benchmark and a real-world industrial dataset with measured bending times, one of the first such validations on genuine production data, demonstrate that combining domain knowledge with graph-based learning improves prediction accuracy across both tasks. The results demonstrate that hybrid modeling offers a feasible and effective path toward deployable tools for manufacturability assessment and effort estimation in industrial CAD environments.

analysis.tldr: 通过规则模块提取制造特征并注入B-rep图神经网络，提升钣金弯曲件制造工时预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯几何表示的CAD模型缺乏工艺语义（如表面角色、折弯意图），导致可制造性预测不准确，而数据驱动模型难以可靠推断这些信息。
analysis.problem: 如何将制造领域知识显式融入基于图的机器学习模型，以提升钣金弯曲件制造工时估计的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合方法：先用规则模块从B-rep中识别制造特征（如折弯特性、法兰长度、表面角色），再将这些特征作为节点属性注入属性邻接图，最后用图神经网络进行预测。
contributions: 提出一种将规则识别的制造特征与B-rep图表示结合的混合方法，用于可制造性分析。
在合成基准和真实工业数据集上验证了该方法在制造工时估计上的有效性，其中真实数据集为首次公开验证。
analysis.experiments: 在大型合成可制造性基准和一个包含实测折弯时间的真实工业数据集上进行了实验，结果显示混合方法提升了预测精度。
limitations: 方法依赖规则模块的完备性，可能无法覆盖所有制造特征。
仅针对钣金弯曲件，泛化到其他制造工艺需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过规则模块提取制造特征并注入B-rep图神经网络，提升钣金弯曲件制造工时预测精度。

papers.title: From Image Hashing to Scene Change Detection
papers.abstract: Image hashing provides compact representations for efficient storage and retrieval but is inherently limited to global comparison and cannot reason about where changes occur. This limitation prevents hashing from being directly applicable to scene change detection, where spatial localization is essential. In this work, we revisit hashing from a scene change detection perspective and propose HashSCD, a patch-wise hashing framework that enables both efficient global change detection and localized change identification. HashSCD encodes spatially aligned patches into compact hash codes and aggregates them through an XOR-like operation, allowing change detection and localization to be performed directly in the Hamming space without repeated inference on previous images. The model is trained in an unsupervised manner using contrastive learning at both patch and global levels. Experiments demonstrate that HashSCD achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art unsupervised hashing and scene change detection methods, while significantly reducing computational cost and storage requirements.

analysis.tldr: 提出HashSCD框架，将图像哈希扩展到场景变化检测，实现高效全局检测与局部定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统图像哈希仅支持全局比较，无法定位变化区域，限制了其在场景变化检测中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将图像哈希方法扩展到能够同时进行全局变化检测和局部变化定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HashSCD，一种基于补丁的哈希框架，通过编码空间对齐的补丁为紧凑哈希码，并利用类XOR操作在汉明空间中直接进行变化检测与定位，无需对先前图像重复推理。模型以无监督方式训练，使用对比学习在补丁和全局两个层面进行。
contributions: 提出HashSCD，首个将图像哈希应用于场景变化检测的补丁级哈希框架。
实现高效的变化检测与定位，显著降低计算成本和存储需求。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，HashSCD在无监督哈希和场景变化检测方法中达到竞争性能，同时大幅降低计算和存储开销。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或大尺度变化定位精度有限。
无监督训练可能依赖数据分布，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HashSCD框架，将图像哈希扩展到场景变化检测，实现高效全局检测与局部定位。

papers.title: H3D-MarNet: Wavelet-Guided Dual-Path Learning for Metal Artifact Suppression and CT Modality Transformation for Radiotherapy Workflows
papers.abstract: Metal artifacts in computed tomography (CT) severely degrade image quality, compromising diagnostic accuracy and radiotherapy planning, especially in cancer patients with high-density implants. We propose H3D-MarNet, a two-stage framework for artifact-aware CT domain transformation from kilo-voltage CT (kVCT) to mega-voltage CT (MVCT). In the first stage, a wavelet-based preprocessing module suppresses metal-induced artifacts through frequency-aware denoising while preserving anatomical structures. In second stage, Domain-TransNet performs kVCT-to-MVCT domain transformation using a hybrid volumetric learning architecture. Domain-TransNet integrates a CNN-based encoder to capture fine-grained local anatomical details and a transformer-based encoder to model long-range volumetric dependencies. The complementary representations are fused through an attention-based feature fusion mechanism to ensure spatial and contextual coherence across slices. A multi-stage, attention-guided decoder, supported by deep supervision, progressively reconstructs artifact-suppressed MVCT volumes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that H3D-MarNet achieves 28.14 dB PSNR and 0.717 SSIM on artifact-affected slices from full dataset, indicating effective metal artifact suppression and anatomical preservation, highlighting its potential for reliable CT modality transformation in clinical radiotherapy workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出H3D-MarNet两阶段框架，通过小波预处理和混合CNN-Transformer架构抑制CT金属伪影并实现kVCT到MVCT的模态转换。
analysis.research_motivation: CT金属伪影严重降低图像质量，影响癌症患者放疗计划的诊断准确性和规划可靠性，现有方法难以同时有效抑制伪影并保留解剖结构。
analysis.problem: 解决CT图像中金属伪影抑制和kVCT到MVCT域转换问题，实现高质量、伪影感知的CT模态变换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 金属伪影导致图像质量退化，影响诊断和放疗规划；传统方法在伪影抑制和结构保留之间难以平衡。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用小波预处理模块进行频率感知去噪抑制伪影；第二阶段用Domain-TransNet进行域转换，集成CNN编码器捕捉局部细节和Transformer编码器建模长程依赖，通过注意力融合机制结合，多阶段注意力引导解码器逐步重建伪影抑制的MVCT体积。
contributions: 提出H3D-MarNet两阶段框架，结合小波预处理和混合CNN-Transformer架构用于CT金属伪影抑制和模态转换。
设计Domain-TransNet，通过注意力融合机制整合局部和全局特征，实现空间和上下文一致性。
在真实数据集上验证了方法在伪影抑制和解剖结构保留方面的有效性，PSNR达28.14 dB，SSIM达0.717。
analysis.experiments: 在包含金属伪影的CT数据集上评估，全数据集伪影影响切片上PSNR 28.14 dB，SSIM 0.717。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能对极端金属伪影或复杂解剖区域效果有限。
两阶段框架计算开销较大，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出H3D-MarNet两阶段框架，通过小波预处理和混合CNN-Transformer架构抑制CT金属伪影并实现kVCT到MVCT的模态转换。

papers.title: UHR-Micro: Diagnosing and Mitigating the Resolution Illusion in Earth Observation VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) increasingly operate on ultra-high-resolution (UHR) Earth observation imagery, yet they remain vulnerable to a severe scale mismatch between large-scale scene context and micro-scale targets. We refer to this empirical gap as a "resolution illusion": higher input resolution provides the appearance of richer visual detail, but does not necessarily yield reliable perception of spatially small, task-relevant evidence. To benchmark this challenge, we introduce UHR-Micro, a benchmark comprising 11,253 instructions grounded in 1,212 UHR images, designed to evaluate VLMs at the spatial limits of native Earth observation imagery. UHR-Micro spans diverse micro-target scales, context requirements, task families, and visual conditions, and provides diagnostic annotations that support controlled evaluation and fine-grained error attribution. Experiments with representative high-resolution VLMs show substantial failures in spatial grounding and evidence parsing, despite access to high-resolution inputs. Further analysis suggests that these failures are not fully resolved by increasing model capacity, but are closely tied to insufficient guidance in locating and using task-relevant micro-evidence. Motivated by this finding, we propose Micro-evidence Active Perception (MAP), a reference agent that decomposes queries into evidence-seeking steps, actively inspects candidate regions, and grounds its answers in localized observations. MAP-Agent improves micro-level perception by making high-resolution reasoning evidence-centered rather than image-centered. Together, UHR-Micro and MAP-Agent provide a diagnostic platform for evaluating, understanding, and advancing high-resolution reasoning in Earth observation VLMs. Datasets and source code were released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出UHR-Micro基准和MAP-Agent，诊断并缓解地球观测VLM中的分辨率错觉问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测VLM处理超高分辨率图像时，高分辨率并未带来对微小目标的可靠感知，存在严重的尺度不匹配问题，即分辨率错觉。
analysis.problem: VLM在超高分辨率地球观测图像中对微小目标的感知失败，空间定位和证据解析能力不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，即使增加模型容量，高分辨率输入下的空间定位和证据解析失败仍然存在，失败与缺乏定位和使用任务相关微证据的指导密切相关。
analysis.method: 提出Micro-evidence Active Perception (MAP)参考智能体，将查询分解为证据搜索步骤，主动检查候选区域，基于局部观察进行回答，使推理以证据为中心而非图像为中心。
contributions: 构建UHR-Micro基准，包含11,253条指令和1,212张UHR图像，用于评估VLM在微小目标感知上的表现。
提出MAP-Agent方法，通过主动感知微证据提升高分辨率推理的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性高分辨率VLM上实验，显示空间定位和证据解析的显著失败，MAP-Agent改善了微级感知。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖地球观测领域，可能不适用于其他超高分辨率场景。
MAP-Agent的分解步骤可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UHR-Micro基准和MAP-Agent，诊断并缓解地球观测VLM中的分辨率错觉问题。

papers.title: TriBand-BEV: Real-Time LiDAR-Only 3D Pedestrian Detection via Height-Aware BEV and High-Resolution Feature Fusion
papers.abstract: Safe autonomous agents and mobile robots need fast real time 3D perception, especially for vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as pedestrians. We introduce a new bird's eye view (BEV) encoding, which maps the full 3D LiDAR point cloud into a light-weight 2D BEV tensor with three height bands. We explicitly reformulate 3D detection as a 2D detection problem and then reconstruct 3D boxes from the BEV outputs. A single network detects cars, pedestrians, and cyclists in one pass. The backbone uses area attention at deep stages, a hierarchical bidirectional neck over P1 to P4 fuses context and detail, and the head predicts oriented boxes with distribution focal learning for side offsets and a rotated IoU loss. Training applies a small vertical re bin and a mild reflectance jitter in channel space to resist memorization. We use an interquartile range (IQR) filter to remove noisy and outlier LiDAR points during 3D reconstruction. On KITTI dataset, TriBand-BEV attains 58.7/52.6/47.2 pedestrian BEV AP(%) for easy, moderate, and hard at 49 FPS on a single consumer GPU, surpassing Complex-YOLO, with gains of +12.6%, +7.5%, and +3.1%. Qualitative scenes show stable detection under occlusion. The pipeline is compact and ready for real time robotic deployment. Our source code is publicly available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出三高度带BEV编码的实时3D行人检测方法，在KITTI上达到49 FPS并提升检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶和移动机器人需要快速实时的3D感知，尤其是对行人等弱势道路使用者，现有方法在速度和精度上难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何利用纯LiDAR点云实现实时且高精度的3D行人检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TriBand-BEV，将3D点云映射为三个高度带的轻量2D BEV张量，将3D检测转化为2D检测问题；使用区域注意力、层次化双向颈部融合特征，并采用分布焦点学习和旋转IoU损失；训练中应用垂直重分箱和反射率抖动，3D重建时使用IQR滤波去除噪声。
contributions: 提出三高度带BEV编码，高效将3D点云转化为2D BEV表示。
设计紧凑的检测网络，实现单次检测汽车、行人和骑行者，在KITTI上达到49 FPS并显著提升行人检测精度。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI数据集上，TriBand-BEV在行人BEV AP（%）上达到58.7/52.6/47.2（简单/中等/困难），以49 FPS运行，优于Complex-YOLO，分别提升+12.6%、+7.5%和+3.1%。
limitations: 仅在KITTI数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他最新方法（如PointPillars）进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三高度带BEV编码的实时3D行人检测方法，在KITTI上达到49 FPS并提升检测精度。

papers.title: Learning Ego-Centric BEV Representations from a Perspective-Privileged View: Cross-View Supervision for Online HD Map Construction
papers.abstract: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) representations derived from multi-camera input have become a central interface for online high-definition (HD) map construction. However, most approaches rely solely on ego-centric supervision, requiring large-scale scene structure to be inferred from incomplete observations, occlusions, and diminishing information density at long range, where perspective effects and spatial sparsity hinder consistent structural reasoning. We introduce Cross-View Supervision (CVS), a representation learning paradigm that transfers geometric and topological priors from an ego-aligned overhead perspective into camera-based BEV encoders. Rather than adding auxiliary semantic losses, CVS aligns representations in a shared BEV feature space and distills globally consistent structural knowledge from a perspective-privileged teacher into the ego-centric backbone. This supervision enhances structural coherence without modifying the inference architecture or requiring overhead input at test time. Experiments on nuScenes using ego-aligned aerial imagery from the AID4AD cross-view extension demonstrate consistent improvements over StreamMapNet while maintaining identical camera-only inference. CVS yields +3.9\,mAP in the standard $60\times30\,\mathrm{m}$ region and +9.9\,mAP in the extended $100\times50\,\mathrm{m}$ setting, corresponding to a 44\% relative gain at long range. These results highlight perspective-privileged structural supervision as a promising training principle for improving BEV representation learning in HD map construction.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨视角监督（CVS）方法，利用俯视视角的几何先验提升BEV地图构建的结构一致性，在长距离场景下mAP提升44%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有BEV地图构建方法仅依赖自车视角监督，受限于遮挡、透视效应和远距离信息稀疏，难以保持全局结构一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变推理架构或引入额外输入的前提下，提升相机BEV编码器对全局结构知识的表征能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出透视效应和空间稀疏性导致远距离结构推理不一致，而俯视视角具有全局几何先验优势。
analysis.method: CVS：训练一个基于俯视图像的教师模型，将其BEV特征空间中的全局结构知识蒸馏到仅使用相机输入的骨干网络中，通过特征对齐实现跨视角监督。
contributions: 提出跨视角监督（CVS）范式，利用俯视视角先验提升BEV表征学习。
在nuScenes数据集上，CVS在标准区域和扩展区域分别提升mAP 3.9和9.9，长距离相对增益44%。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上使用AID4AD扩展的俯视图像进行实验，与StreamMapNet对比，报告了mAP指标。
limitations: 依赖训练时俯视图像，可能限制在无俯视数据场景的应用。
教师模型需要额外训练，计算开销可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨视角监督（CVS）方法，利用俯视视角的几何先验提升BEV地图构建的结构一致性，在长距离场景下mAP提升44%。

papers.title: Enhancing Domain Generalization in 3D Human Pose Estimation through Controllable Generative Augmentation
papers.abstract: Pedestrian motion, due to its causal nature, is strongly influenced by domain gaps arising from discrepancies between training and testing data distributions. Focusing on 3D human pose estimation, this work presents a controllable human pose generation framework that synthesizes diverse video data by systematically varying poses, backgrounds, and camera viewpoints.
