This generative augmentation enriches training datasets, enhances model generalization, and alleviates the limitations of existing methods in handling domain discrepancies. By leveraging both indoor/real-world and outdoor/virtual datasets, we perform cross-domain data fusion and controllable video generation to construct enriched training data, tailored to realistic deployment settings. Extensive experiments show that the augmented datasets significantly improve model performance on unseen scenarios and datasets, validating the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 通过可控生成式数据增强提升3D人体姿态估计的域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 行人运动具有因果性，训练与测试数据分布差异导致的域间隙严重影响3D人体姿态估计的泛化性能，现有方法难以有效处理域差异。
analysis.problem: 3D人体姿态估计中因域间隙导致的泛化能力不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出可控人体姿态生成框架，通过系统变化姿态、背景和相机视角合成多样化视频数据，融合室内/真实世界和室外/虚拟数据集进行跨域数据融合与可控视频生成。
contributions: 提出一种可控生成式数据增强框架，用于合成多样化训练数据。
通过跨域数据融合和可控视频生成，显著提升模型在未见场景和数据集上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个室内/真实世界和室外/虚拟数据集上进行实验，结果表明增强数据集显著提升了模型在未见场景和数据集上的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖生成数据的质量，若生成数据与真实分布偏差较大可能引入噪声。
框架的计算开销可能较大，影响实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可控生成式数据增强提升3D人体姿态估计的域泛化能力。

papers.title: SyncDPO: Enhancing Temporal Synchronization in Video-Audio Joint Generation via Preference Learning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in video-audio joint generation have achieved remarkable success in semantic correspondence. However, achieving precise temporal synchronization, which requires fine-grained alignment between audio events and their visual triggers, remains a challenging problem. The post-training method for joint generation is largely dominated by Supervised Fine-Tuning, but the commonly used Mean Squared Error loss provides insufficient penalties for subtle temporal misalignments. Direct Preference Optimization offers an alternative by introducing explicit misaligned counterparts to better improve temporal sensitivity. In this paper we propose a post-training framework SyncDPO, leveraging DPO to improve the temporal sensitivity of V-A joint generation. Conventional DPO pipelines typically depend on costly sampling-and-ranking procedures to construct preference pairs, resulting in substantial computational cost. To improve efficiency, we introduce a suite of on-the-fly rule-based negative construction strategies that distort temporal structures without incurring additional annotation or sampling. We demonstrate that the temporal alignment capability can be effectively reinforced by providing explicit negative supervision through temporally distorted V-A pairs. Accordingly, we implement a curriculum learning strategy that progressively increases the difficulty of negative samples, transitioning from coarse misalignment to subtle inconsistencies. Extensive objective and subjective experiments across four diverse benchmarks, ranging from ambient sound videos to human speech videos, demonstrate that SyncDPO significantly outperforms other methods in improving model's temporal alignment capability. It also demonstrates superior generalization on out-of-distribution benchmark by capturing intrinsic motion-sound dynamics. Demo and code is available in this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出 SyncDPO 框架，通过偏好学习提升视频-音频联合生成中的时间同步精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频-音频联合生成方法在语义对应上表现良好，但难以实现精确的时间同步，即音频事件与视觉触发之间的细粒度对齐。后训练方法主要依赖监督微调，但均方误差损失对微小时间错位惩罚不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效提升视频-音频联合生成模型的时间对齐能力，同时避免传统偏好优化中昂贵的采样-排序过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接偏好优化通过引入显式的错位样本可以改善时间敏感性，但传统DPO依赖昂贵的采样-排序构建偏好对，计算成本高。
analysis.method: 提出 SyncDPO 框架，采用基于规则的即时负样本构建策略，通过时间扭曲生成负样本，无需额外标注或采样；并引入课程学习策略，逐步增加负样本难度，从粗错位到细微不一致。
contributions: 提出 SyncDPO，一种利用偏好学习提升视频-音频联合生成时间同步的后训练框架。
设计基于规则的即时负样本构建策略，高效生成时间扭曲的负样本，避免传统DPO的高成本。
引入课程学习策略，逐步增加负样本难度，有效提升模型时间对齐能力。
analysis.experiments: 在四个不同基准（包括环境音视频和人语音视频）上进行主客观实验，SyncDPO 显著优于其他方法，并在分布外基准上展现出更好的泛化能力。
limitations: 负样本构建策略依赖手工规则，可能无法覆盖所有时间错位类型。
课程学习的难度递增策略可能需要针对不同数据分布进行调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SyncDPO 框架，通过偏好学习提升视频-音频联合生成中的时间同步精度。

papers.title: UniFixer: A Universal Reference-Guided Fixer for Diffusion-Based View Synthesis
papers.abstract: With the recent surge of generative models, diffusion-based approaches have become mainstream for view synthesis tasks, either in an explicit depth-warp-inpaint or in an implicit end-to-end manner. Despite their success, both paradigms often suffer from noticeable quality degradation, e.g., blurred details and distorted structures, caused by pixel-to-latent compression and diffusion hallucination. In this paper, we investigate diffusion degradation from three key dimensions (i.e., spatial, temporal, and backbone-related) and propose UniFixer, a universal reference-guided framework that fixes diverse degradation artifacts via a coarse-to-fine strategy. Specifically, a reference pre-alignment module is first designed to perform coarse alignment between the reference view and the degraded novel view. A global structure anchoring mechanism then rectifies geometric distortions to ensure structural fidelity, followed by a local detail injection module that recovers fine-grained texture details for high-quality view synthesis. Our UniFixer serves as a plug-and-play refiner that achieves zero-shot fixing across different types of diffusion degradation, and extensive experiments verify our state-of-the-art performance on novel view synthesis and stereo conversion.

analysis.tldr: 提出 UniFixer，一种通用参考引导的扩散视图合成修复框架，通过粗到细策略修复空间、时间和骨干相关退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在视图合成中常出现模糊细节和结构扭曲等质量退化，现有方法缺乏通用修复框架。
analysis.problem: 扩散视图合成中的多种退化（空间、时间、骨干相关）导致质量下降，需要通用修复方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 退化源于像素到潜空间的压缩和扩散幻觉，表现为模糊细节和扭曲结构。
analysis.method: UniFixer：参考预对齐模块进行粗对齐，全局结构锚定机制纠正几何扭曲，局部细节注入模块恢复纹理细节，作为即插即用修复器。
contributions: 首次从空间、时间、骨干三个维度系统分析扩散退化
提出通用参考引导修复框架，实现零样本修复多种退化
analysis.experiments: 在新视图合成和立体转换任务上验证了最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖参考视图质量
粗到细策略可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 UniFixer，一种通用参考引导的扩散视图合成修复框架，通过粗到细策略修复空间、时间和骨干相关退化。

papers.title: Self-Consistent Latent Reasoning: Long Latent Sequence Reasoning for Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: In language reasoning, longer chains of thought consistently yield better performance, which naturally suggests that visual latent reasoning may likewise benefit from longer latent sequences. However, we discover a counterintuitive phenomenon: the performance of existing latent visual reasoning methods systematically degrades as the latent sequence grows longer. We reveal the root cause: Information Gain Collapse -- autoregressive generation makes each step highly dependent on prior outputs, so subsequent tokens can barely introduce new information. We further identify that heavily pooled ($\geq 128\times$) image embeddings used as supervision targets provide no more signal than meaningless placeholders. Motivated by these insights, we propose SCOLAR (Self-COnsistent LAtent Reasoning), which introduces a lightweight detransformer that leverages the LLM's full-sequence hidden states to generate auxiliary visual tokens in a single shot, with each token independently anchored to the original visual space. Combined with three-stage SFT and ALPO reinforcement learning, SCOLAR extends acceptable latent CoT length by over $30\times$, achieves state-of-the-art among open-source models on real-world reasoning benchmarks (+14.12% over backbone), and demonstrates strong out-of-distribution generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCOLAR方法，通过自一致潜在推理解决视觉语言模型中长序列推理性能退化问题，实现超30倍有效推理长度扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言推理中更长的思维链能提升性能，但视觉潜在推理中现有方法随序列增长性能反而下降，这一矛盾亟需解决。
analysis.problem: 现有视觉潜在推理方法在长序列下性能退化，根源是信息增益崩溃——自回归生成导致后续token信息量不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现信息增益崩溃现象：自回归生成使每一步高度依赖前序输出，后续token几乎不引入新信息；同时高度池化的图像嵌入作为监督目标仅提供无意义信号。
analysis.method: 提出SCOLAR，包含轻量级解变换器，利用LLM全序列隐藏状态一次性生成辅助视觉token，每个token独立锚定到原始视觉空间；结合三阶段SFT和ALPO强化学习。
contributions: 揭示视觉潜在推理中长序列性能退化的根本原因——信息增益崩溃
提出SCOLAR方法，通过自一致潜在推理将有效推理长度扩展30倍以上
在真实推理基准上达到开源模型最优，并展示强分布外泛化能力
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界推理基准上，SCOLAR相比骨干模型提升14.12%，达到开源模型最优，并展示强分布外泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构
三阶段训练流程复杂度较高
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCOLAR方法，通过自一致潜在推理解决视觉语言模型中长序列推理性能退化问题，实现超30倍有效推理长度扩展。

papers.title: Cross-Modal-Domain Generalization Through Semantically Aligned Discrete Representations
papers.abstract: Multimodal learning seeks to integrate information across diverse sensory sources, yet current approaches struggle to balance cross-modal generalizability with modality-specific structure. Continuous (implicit) methods preserve fine-grained priors but render generalization challenging, while discrete (explicit) approaches enforce shared prototypes at the expense of modality specificity. We introduce CoDAAR (Cross-modal Discrete Alignment And Reconstruction), a novel framework that resolves this long-standing trade-off by establishing semantic consensus across modality-specific codebooks through index-level alignment. This design uniquely allows CoDAAR to preserve modality-unique structures while achieving generalizable cross-modal representations within a unified discrete space. CoDAAR combines two complementary mechanisms: Discrete Temporal Alignment (DTA), which enables fine-grained temporal quantization, and Cascading Semantic Alignment (CSA), which promotes progressive cross-modal semantic agreement. Together, they establish a competition-free unified representation space. Trained with self-supervised reconstruction objectives on paired multimodal sequences, CoDAAR demonstrates robust cross-modal and cross-domain generalization. Across Cross-Modal Generalization benchmarks, including event classification, localization, video segmentation, and cross-dataset transfer, CoDAAR achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing a new paradigm for discrete and generalizable multimodal representation learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoDAAR框架，通过索引级对齐实现跨模态离散表示，兼顾模态特异性和跨模态泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态学习方法在跨模态泛化与模态特异性之间存在权衡：连续方法保留细粒度先验但泛化困难，离散方法强制共享原型但损失模态特异性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲模态特异性的前提下，实现可泛化的跨模态表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CoDAAR框架，包含离散时间对齐（DTA）和级联语义对齐（CSA），通过索引级对齐建立模态间语义共识，在统一离散空间中保留模态独特结构。
contributions: 提出CoDAAR框架，解决跨模态泛化与模态特异性的权衡问题。
设计离散时间对齐和级联语义对齐机制，实现无竞争的跨模态表示空间。
analysis.experiments: 在事件分类、定位、视频分割和跨数据集迁移等跨模态泛化基准上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖配对多模态序列数据，对未配对数据适用性未知。
离散表示可能在高精度任务中丢失细节信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoDAAR框架，通过索引级对齐实现跨模态离散表示，兼顾模态特异性和跨模态泛化。

papers.title: PoseCompass: Intelligent Synthetic Pose Selection for Visual Localization
papers.abstract: In visual localization, Absolute Pose Regression (APR) enables real-time 6-DoF camera pose inference from single images, yet critically depends on fine-tuning data quality and coverage. While recent methods leverage 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for novel view synthesis-based data augmentation, random sampling generates redundant views and noisy samples from poorly reconstructed regions. To mitigate this research gap, we propose PoseCompass, an intelligent pose selection pipeline for 3DGS-based APR. PoseCompass formulates synthetic pose selection and derives a value-based pose ranking mechanism to identify informative poses. The ranking integrates three dimensions: Localization Difficulty, favoring challenging regions; Coverage Novelty, exploring under-sampled areas; and Rendering Observability, filtering artifacts and noise. PoseCompass then generates trajectory-constrained candidates, selects the top-K ranked poses, and synthesizes views using 3DGS with lightweight diffusion-based alignment. Finally, the pose regressor is fine-tuned on mixed real and synthetic data. We evaluate PoseCompass on 7-Scenes, where it reduces adaptation time from 15.2 to 5.1 minutes, a 3x speedup, while cutting median pose errors by 53.8 percent and significantly outperforming random baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出智能合成位姿选择方法PoseCompass，通过价值排序筛选高质量合成视图，加速APR微调并提升定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: APR依赖数据质量与覆盖度，现有3DGS数据增强随机采样产生冗余和噪声视图，影响微调效率与精度。
analysis.problem: 如何从3DGS合成视图中智能选择信息量高、质量好的位姿用于APR微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机采样生成冗余视图和来自重建不良区域的噪声样本，导致微调效率低、精度差。
analysis.method: 提出PoseCompass，包含价值排序机制（综合定位难度、覆盖新颖性、渲染可观测性），生成轨迹约束候选，选择Top-K位姿，结合轻量扩散对齐合成视图，混合真实与合成数据微调位姿回归器。
contributions: 提出智能合成位姿选择框架PoseCompass，通过三维价值排序筛选信息丰富的位姿。
在7-Scenes数据集上实现3倍加速（15.2→5.1分钟），中位位姿误差降低53.8%，显著优于随机基线。
analysis.experiments: 在7-Scenes数据集上评估，适应时间从15.2分钟降至5.1分钟（3倍加速），中位位姿误差降低53.8%，显著优于随机基线。
limitations: 可能依赖3DGS重建质量，在重建不佳场景中效果受限。
仅评估单一数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出智能合成位姿选择方法PoseCompass，通过价值排序筛选高质量合成视图，加速APR微调并提升定位精度。

papers.title: EchoTracker2: Enhancing Myocardial Point Tracking by Modeling Local Motion
papers.abstract: Myocardial point tracking (MPT) has recently emerged as a promising direction for motion estimation in echocardiography, driven by advances in general-purpose point tracking methods. However, myocardial motion fundamentally differs from motion encountered in natural videos, as it arises from physiologically constrained deformation that is spatially and temporally continuous throughout the cardiac cycle. Consequently, motion trajectories typically remain locally confined despite substantial tissue deformation. Motivated by these properties, we revisit the architectural design for MPT and find that coarse initialization in commonly used two-stage coarse-to-fine architectures may be unnecessary in this domain. In this work, we propose a fine-stage-only architecture, \textbf{EchoTracker2}, which enriches pixel-precise features with local spatiotemporal context and integrates them with long-range joint temporal reasoning for robust tracking. Experimental results across in-distribution, out-of-distribution (OOD), and public synthetic datasets show that our model improves position accuracy by $6.5\%$ and reduces median trajectory error by $12.2\%$ relative to a domain-specific state-of-the-art (SOTA) model. Compared to the best general-purpose point tracking method, the improvements are $2.0\%$ and $5.3\%$, respectively. Moreover, EchoTracker2 shows better agreement with expert-derived global longitudinal strain (GLS) and enhances test-rest reproducibility. Source code will be available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出仅用精细阶段架构的超声心肌点追踪方法，通过局部运动建模提升精度与可重复性。
analysis.research_motivation: 心肌运动与自然视频运动不同，具有生理约束的局部形变特性，现有通用点追踪方法未充分利用该特性，导致追踪精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计针对心肌点追踪的专用架构，以利用局部时空连续性和长程时序推理提升追踪性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 粗到细架构中的粗初始化在心肌点追踪中可能不必要，因为心肌运动轨迹局部受限。
analysis.method: 提出仅含精细阶段的架构EchoTracker2，通过局部时空上下文增强像素级特征，并结合长程联合时序推理实现鲁棒追踪。
contributions: 提出仅精细阶段的点追踪架构，避免不必要的粗初始化。
在多个数据集上实现SOTA性能，并提升临床指标GLS一致性和测试-重测可重复性。
analysis.experiments: 在分布内、分布外和公共合成数据集上评估，位置精度提升6.5%，中位轨迹误差降低12.2%（与领域SOTA相比），且与专家GLS一致性更好。
limitations: 可能仅适用于超声心肌点追踪，泛化到其他医学图像或自然视频需验证。
未讨论计算开销与实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仅用精细阶段架构的超声心肌点追踪方法，通过局部运动建模提升精度与可重复性。

papers.title: Design Your Ad: Personalized Advertising Image and Text Generation with Unified Autoregressive Models
papers.abstract: Generating realistic and user-preferred advertisements is a key challenge in e-commerce. Existing approaches utilize multiple independent models driven by click-through-rate (CTR) to controllably create attractive image or text advertisements. However, their pipelines lack cross-modal perception and rely on CTR that only reflects average preferences. Therefore, we explore jointly generating personalized image-text advertisements from historical click behaviors. We first design a Unified Advertisement Generative model (Uni-AdGen) that employs a single autoregressive framework to produce both advertising images and texts. By incorporating a foreground perception module and instruction tuning, Uni-AdGen enhances the realism of the generated content. To further personalize advertisements, we equip Uni-AdGen with a coarse-to-fine preference understanding module that effectively captures user interests from noisy multimodal historical behaviors to drive personalized generation. Additionally, we construct the first large-scale Personalized Advertising image-text dataset (PAd1M) and introduce a Product Background Similarity (PBS) metric to facilitate training and evaluation. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms baselines in general and personalized advertisement generation. Our project is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出统一自回归模型Uni-AdGen，联合生成个性化广告图文，并构建首个大规模数据集PAd1M。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有广告生成方法依赖多个独立模型和仅反映平均偏好的CTR，缺乏跨模态感知，无法生成个性化广告。
analysis.problem: 如何从用户历史点击行为中联合生成个性化的广告图像和文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计Uni-AdGen，采用单一自回归框架同时生成广告图像和文本，通过前景感知模块和指令调优增强真实性，并引入粗到细的偏好理解模块从多模态历史行为中捕捉用户兴趣。
contributions: 提出Uni-AdGen，首个统一自回归框架用于联合生成个性化广告图文。
构建PAd1M，首个大规模个性化广告图文数据集，并引入PBS指标。
analysis.experiments: 在通用和个性化广告生成任务上，Uni-AdGen优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模高质量历史行为数据。
自回归生成效率可能较低。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一自回归模型Uni-AdGen，联合生成个性化广告图文，并构建首个大规模数据集PAd1M。

papers.title: MULTI: Disentangling Camera Lens, Sensor, View, and Domain for Novel Image Generation
papers.abstract: Recent text-to-image models produce high-quality images, yet text ambiguity hinders precise control when specific styles or objects are required. There have been a number of recent works dealing with learning and composing multiple objects and patterns. However, current work focuses almost entirely on image content, overlooking imaging factors such as camera lens, sensor types, imaging viewpoints, and scenes' domain characteristics. We introduce this new challenge as Imaging Factor Disentanglement and show limitations of current approaches in the regime. We, therefore, propose the new method Multi-factor disentanglement through Textual Inversion (MULTI). It consists of two stages: in the first stage, we learn general factors, and in the second stage, we extract dataset-specific ones. This setup enables the extension of existing datasets and novel factor combinations, thereby reducing distribution gaps. It further supports modifications of specific factors and image-to-image generation via ControlNets. The evaluation on our new DF-RICO benchmark demonstrates the effectiveness of MULTI and highlights the importance of Factor Disentanglement as a new direction of research.

analysis.tldr: 提出MULTI方法，通过两阶段文本反转解耦相机镜头、传感器、视角和域等成像因子，实现可控图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像模型虽能生成高质量图像，但文本歧义导致难以精确控制特定风格或对象；现有工作主要关注图像内容，忽略了相机镜头、传感器类型、成像视角和场景域特征等成像因子。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦并组合多个成像因子（如镜头、传感器、视角、域），以实现对生成图像的精细控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前方法在成像因子解耦任务上表现有限，无法有效分离和组合这些因子。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段文本反转方法MULTI：第一阶段学习通用因子，第二阶段提取数据集特定因子；支持因子修改和通过ControlNets进行图像到图像生成。
contributions: 提出成像因子解耦这一新挑战，并指出现有方法的局限性。
提出MULTI方法，通过两阶段文本反转实现多因子解耦，支持因子组合和修改。
构建DF-RICO基准并验证MULTI的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在DF-RICO基准上评估，展示了MULTI的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MULTI方法，通过两阶段文本反转解耦相机镜头、传感器、视角和域等成像因子，实现可控图像生成。

papers.title: MoCam: Unified Novel View Synthesis via Structured Denoising Dynamics
papers.abstract: Generative novel view synthesis faces a fundamental dilemma: geometric priors provide spatial alignment but become sparse and inaccurate under view changes, while appearance priors offer visual fidelity but lack geometric correspondence. Existing methods either propagate geometric errors throughout generation or suffer from signal conflicts when fusing both statically. We introduce MoCam, which employs structured denoising dynamics to orchestrate a coordinated progression from geometry to appearance within the diffusion this http URL first leverages geometric priors in early stages to anchor coarse structures and tolerate their incompleteness, then switches to appearance priors in later stages to actively correct geometric errors and refine details. This design naturally unifies static and dynamic view synthesis by temporally decoupling geometric alignment and appearance refinement within the diffusion this http URL demonstrate that MoCam significantly outperforms prior methods, particularly when point clouds contain severe holes or distortions, achieving robust geometry-appearance disentanglement.

analysis.tldr: MoCam通过结构化去噪动态在扩散过程中协调几何先验与外观先验，实现统一的新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式新视角合成面临几何先验在视角变化下稀疏不准确、外观先验缺乏几何对应的问题，现有方法要么传播几何误差，要么静态融合导致信号冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何在新视角合成中有效融合几何先验与外观先验，避免误差传播和信号冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出几何先验在早期阶段可锚定粗略结构但容忍不完整性，外观先验在后期阶段能主动纠正几何错误并细化细节。
analysis.method: 提出结构化去噪动态，在扩散过程早期利用几何先验锚定结构，后期切换至外观先验纠正几何误差并细化细节，实现几何与外观的时间解耦。
contributions: 提出结构化去噪动态方法，统一静态和动态新视角合成。
通过时间解耦几何对齐与外观细化，实现鲁棒的几何-外观解耦。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖点云质量，严重空洞或畸变下性能可能受限。
未提及对动态场景中运动模糊或遮挡的处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoCam通过结构化去噪动态在扩散过程中协调几何先验与外观先验，实现统一的新视角合成。

papers.title: When Policy Entropy Constraint Fails: Preserving Diversity in Flow-based RLHF via Perceptual Entropy
papers.abstract: RLHF is widely used to align flow-matching text-to-image models with human preferences, but often leads to severe diversity collapse after fine-tuning. In RL, diversity is often assumed to correlate with policy entropy, motivating entropy regularization. However, we show this intuition breaks in flow models: policy entropy remains constant, even while perceptual diversity collapses. We explain this mismatch both theoretically and empirically: the constant entropy arises from the fixed, pre-defined noise schedule, while the diversity collapse is driven by the mode-seeking nature of policy gradients. As a result, policy entropy fails to prevent the model from converging to a narrow high-reward region in the perceptual space. To this end, we introduce perceptual entropy that captures diversity in a perceptual space and maintains the property of standard entropy. Building upon this insight, we propose two entropy-regularized strategies, Perceptual Entropy Constraint and Perceptual Constraints on Generation Space, to preserve perceptual diversity and improve the quality. Experiments across two base models, neural and rule-based rewards, and three perceptual spaces demonstrate consistent gains in the quality-diversity trade-off; PEC achieves the best overall score of 0.734 (vs. baseline's 0.366); a complementary setting of PEC further reaches a diversity average of 0.989 (vs. baseline's 0.047). Our project page ( this https URL ) is publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 发现流模型RLHF中策略熵无法保持多样性，提出感知熵约束来缓解多样性崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: RLHF在文本到图像生成中广泛应用，但微调后常导致严重的多样性崩溃，而传统策略熵约束在此场景下失效，亟需新的多样性保持方法。
analysis.problem: 流模型RLHF中策略熵恒定不变，无法反映感知多样性的崩溃，导致模型收敛到高奖励但狭窄的区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 策略熵在流模型中保持恒定，因为噪声调度是固定的；而多样性崩溃源于策略梯度的模式寻求特性，两者脱节。
analysis.method: 提出感知熵（Perceptual Entropy）来捕捉感知空间的多样性，并设计两种正则化策略：感知熵约束（PEC）和生成空间感知约束（PCGS）。
contributions: 理论分析和实验证明流模型RLHF中策略熵恒定而感知多样性崩溃的现象。
提出感知熵概念及其两种正则化策略，有效保持多样性并提升质量。
analysis.experiments: 在两种基础模型、神经和规则奖励、三种感知空间上实验，PEC总体得分0.734（基线0.366），PCGS多样性平均0.989（基线0.047）。
limitations: 感知空间的选择可能影响效果。
额外计算开销可能增加训练成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现流模型RLHF中策略熵无法保持多样性，提出感知熵约束来缓解多样性崩溃。

papers.title: UniCustom: Unified Visual Conditioning for Multi-Reference Image Generation
papers.abstract: Multi-reference image generation aims to synthesize images from textual instructions while faithfully preserving subject identities from multiple reference images. Existing VLM-enhanced diffusion models commonly rely on decoupled visual conditioning: semantic ViT features are processed by the VLM for instruction understanding, whereas appearance-rich VAE features are injected later into the diffusion backbone. Despite its intuitive design, this separation makes it difficult for the model to associate each semantically grounded subject with visual details from the correct reference image. As a result, the model may recognize which subject is being referred to, but fail to preserve its identity and fine-grained appearance, leading to attribute leakage and cross-reference confusion in complex multi-reference settings. To address this issue, we propose UniCustom, a unified visual conditioning framework that fuses ViT and VAE features before VLM encoding. This early fusion exposes the VLM to both semantic cues and appearance-rich details, enabling its hidden states to jointly encode the referred subject and corresponding visual appearance with only a lightweight linear fusion layer. To learn such unified representations, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: reconstruction-oriented pretraining that preserves reference-specific appearance details in the fused hidden states, followed by supervised finetuning on single- and multi-reference generation tasks. We further introduce a slot-wise binding regularization that encourages each image slot to preserve low-level details of its corresponding reference, thereby reducing cross-reference entanglement. Experiments on two multi-reference generation benchmarks demonstrate that UniCustom consistently improves subject consistency, instruction following, and compositional fidelity over strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: UniCustom通过早期融合ViT和VAE特征实现统一视觉条件编码，解决多参考图像生成中的属性泄露和交叉参考混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM增强扩散模型采用解耦视觉条件编码（ViT语义特征+VAE外观特征），导致模型难以将语义主体与正确参考图像的视觉细节关联，在复杂多参考场景中出现属性泄露和交叉参考混淆。
analysis.problem: 多参考图像生成中，解耦视觉条件编码导致主体身份保持失败和跨参考混淆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出解耦设计使模型能识别被引用的主体，但无法保持其身份和细粒度外观，导致属性泄露和交叉参考混淆。
analysis.method: 提出UniCustom统一视觉条件框架，在VLM编码前融合ViT和VAE特征，采用两阶段训练（重建预训练+监督微调）和槽位绑定正则化。
contributions: 提出统一视觉条件框架，早期融合ViT和VAE特征，使VLM联合编码语义和外观信息。
设计两阶段训练策略和槽位绑定正则化，减少交叉参考纠缠，提升主体一致性和组合保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在两个多参考图像生成基准上，UniCustom在主体一致性、指令遵循和组合保真度方面持续优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖轻量线性融合层，对复杂场景的泛化能力需进一步验证。
两阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniCustom通过早期融合ViT和VAE特征实现统一视觉条件编码，解决多参考图像生成中的属性泄露和交叉参考混淆问题。

papers.title: The Missing GAP: From Solving Square Jigsaw Puzzles to Handling Real World Archaeological Fragments
papers.abstract: Jigsaw puzzle solving has been an increasingly popular task in the computer vision research community. Recent works have utilized cutting-edge architectures and computational approaches to reassemble groups of pieces into a coherent image, while achieving increasingly good results on well established datasets. However, most of these approaches share a common, restricting setting: operating solely on strictly square puzzle pieces. In this work, we introduce GAP, a set of novel jigsaw puzzles datasets containing synthetic, heavily eroded pieces of unrestricted shapes, generated by a learned distribution of real-world archaeological fragments. We also introduce PuzzleFlow, a novel ViT and Flow-Matching based framework for jigsaw puzzle solving, capable of handling complex puzzle pieces and demonstrating superior performance on GAP when compared to both classic and recent prominent works in this domain.

analysis.tldr: 提出GAP数据集和PuzzleFlow框架，将拼图求解从方形碎片扩展到真实考古碎片。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有拼图求解方法大多局限于严格方形的拼图碎片，无法处理真实世界中形状不规则的碎片（如考古碎片），限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将拼图求解方法从方形碎片扩展到任意形状的碎片，并处理真实考古碎片的侵蚀和形状不规则性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GAP数据集（包含合成侵蚀的任意形状碎片）和PuzzleFlow框架（基于ViT和Flow-Matching），用于处理复杂形状的拼图碎片。
contributions: 引入GAP数据集，包含由真实考古碎片分布学习的合成侵蚀碎片，形状不受限制。
提出PuzzleFlow框架，基于ViT和Flow-Matching，在GAP上优于经典和近期方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于二维拼图，未扩展到三维碎片。
合成数据与真实考古碎片之间可能存在域差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GAP数据集和PuzzleFlow框架，将拼图求解从方形碎片扩展到真实考古碎片。

papers.title: BARISTA: A Multi-Task Egocentric Benchmark for Compositional Visual Understanding
papers.abstract: Scene understanding is central to general physical intelligence, and video is a primary modality for capturing both state and temporal dynamics of a scene. Yet understanding physical processes remains difficult, as models must combine object localization, hand-object interactions, relational parsing, temporal reasoning, and step-level procedural inference. Existing benchmarks usually evaluate these capabilities separately, limiting diagnosis of why models fail on procedural tasks. We introduce BARISTA, a densely annotated egocentric dataset and benchmark of 185 real-world coffee-preparation videos covering fully automatic, portafilter-based, and capsule-based workflows. BARISTA provides verified per-frame scene graphs linking persistent object identities to masks, tracks, boxes, attributes, typed relations, hand-object interactions, activities, and process steps. From these graphs, we derive zero-shot language-based tasks spanning phrase grounding, hand-object interaction recognition, referring, activity recognition, relation extraction, and temporal visual question answering. Experiments reveal strong variation across task families and no consistently dominant model family, positioning BARISTA as a challenging diagnostic benchmark for procedural video understanding. Code and dataset available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: BARISTA 是一个多任务自我中心视频基准，用于评估组合视觉理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准通常分别评估物体定位、手物交互、关系解析、时间推理和步骤级过程推理，限制了诊断模型在过程性任务上失败原因的能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、密集标注的自我中心视频基准来同时评估多种视觉理解任务，特别是过程性场景理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验显示不同任务族之间表现差异大，且没有一致占主导的模型族，表明该基准具有挑战性。
analysis.method: 构建了包含185个真实世界咖啡制作视频的密集标注数据集，提供逐帧场景图，并从中派生出零样本语言任务。
contributions: 提出了BARISTA，一个密集标注的自我中心数据集和基准，覆盖多种咖啡制作流程。
提供了逐帧场景图，链接对象身份与掩码、轨迹、框、属性、关系、手物交互、活动和过程步骤。
从场景图中派生出多种零样本语言任务，包括短语定位、手物交互识别、指代、活动识别、关系抽取和时间视觉问答。
analysis.experiments: 在多种任务上进行了实验，揭示了不同任务族之间的表现差异，且没有模型族一致占优。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖咖啡制作场景，可能泛化到其他过程性任务有限。
零样本任务设置可能无法完全反映模型在微调后的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BARISTA 是一个多任务自我中心视频基准，用于评估组合视觉理解能力。

papers.title: PairDropGS: Paired Dropout-Induced Consistency Regularization for Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Dropout-based sparse-view 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods alleviate overfitting by randomly suppressing Gaussian primitives during training. Existing methods mainly focus on designing increasingly sophisticated dropout strategies, while they overlook the resulting inconsistencies among different dropped Gaussian subsets. This oversight often leads to unstable reconstruction and suboptimal Gaussian representation this http URL this paper, we revisit dropout-based sparse-view 3DGS from a consistency regularization perspective and propose PairDropGS, a Paired Dropout-induced Consistency Regularization framework for sparse-view Gaussian splatting. Specifically, PairDropGS first constructs a pair of the dropped Gaussian subsets from a shared Gaussian field and designs a low-frequency consistency regularization to constrain their low-frequency rendered structures. This design encourages the shared Gaussian field to preserve stable scene layout and coarse geometry under different random dropouts, while avoiding excessive constraints on ambiguous high-frequency details. Moreover, we introduce a progressive consistency scheduling strategy to gradually strengthen the consistency regularization during training for stability and robustness of reconstruction. Extensive experiments on widely-used sparse-view benchmarks demonstrate that PairDropGS achieves superior training stability, significantly outperforms existing dropout-based 3DGS methods in reconstruction quality, while exhibiting the simplicity and plug-and-play nature for improving dropout-based optimization.

analysis.tldr: 从一致性正则化视角改进稀疏视角3D高斯泼溅，通过配对丢弃子集约束低频渲染结构，提升重建质量与训练稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于丢弃的稀疏视角3DGS方法过度关注设计复杂丢弃策略，忽视了不同丢弃子集间的不一致性，导致重建不稳定和次优的高斯表示。
analysis.problem: 解决稀疏视角3DGS中因丢弃子集不一致导致的训练不稳定和重建质量差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有丢弃方法忽略不同丢弃高斯子集间的结果不一致性，导致不稳定重建和次优表示。
analysis.method: 提出PairDropGS框架，从共享高斯场构建一对丢弃子集，设计低频一致性正则化约束其低频渲染结构，并引入渐进一致性调度策略逐步增强正则化。
contributions: 从一致性正则化视角重新审视基于丢弃的稀疏视角3DGS，提出PairDropGS框架。
设计低频一致性正则化，仅约束低频渲染结构，避免对高频细节的过度约束。
提出渐进一致性调度策略，逐步增强正则化以提升训练稳定性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的稀疏视角基准上，PairDropGS在重建质量上显著优于现有基于丢弃的3DGS方法，并展现出简单性和即插即用特性。
limitations: 可能对高频细节的保留能力有限，因为正则化主要约束低频结构。
渐进调度策略可能需要针对不同场景调整超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从一致性正则化视角改进稀疏视角3D高斯泼溅，通过配对丢弃子集约束低频渲染结构，提升重建质量与训练稳定性。

papers.title: Anomaly-Aware Vision-Language Adapters for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Zero-shot anomaly detection aims to identify defects in unseen categories without target-specific training. Existing methods usually apply the same feature transformation to all samples, treating normal and anomalous data uniformly despite their fundamentally asymmetric distributions, compact normals versus diverse anomalies. We instead exploit this natural asymmetry by proposing AVA-DINO, an anomaly-aware vision-language adaptation framework with dual specialized branches for normal and anomalous patterns that adapt frozen DINOv3 visual features. During training on auxiliary data, the two branches are learned jointly with a text-guided routing mechanism and explicit routing regularization that encourages branch specialization. At test time, only the input image and fixed, predefined language descriptions are used to dynamically combine the two branches, enabling an asymmetric activation. This design prevents degenerate uniform routing and allows context-specific feature transformations. Experiments across nine industrial and medical benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, achieving 93.5% image-AUROC on MVTec-AD and strong cross-domain generalization to medical imaging without domain-specific fine-tuning. this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出异常感知视觉-语言适配器AVA-DINO，利用正常与异常数据的非对称分布实现零样本异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本异常检测中，现有方法对所有样本使用相同特征变换，忽略了正常数据紧凑而异常数据多样的非对称分布，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用正常与异常数据的天然非对称性，设计针对性的特征变换以提升零样本异常检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正常数据分布紧凑，异常数据分布多样，两者具有非对称性，现有统一变换无法有效区分。
analysis.method: 提出AVA-DINO框架，包含两个专门分支（正常和异常），通过文本引导路由机制和显式路由正则化联合训练，测试时动态组合分支实现非对称激活。
contributions: 提出异常感知的视觉-语言适配框架，利用正常与异常的非对称分布。
设计双分支结构和路由正则化，防止退化路由并实现上下文特定变换。
在工业与医学基准上达到SOTA，无需领域微调即可跨域泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在9个工业与医学基准上评估，MVTec-AD上图像AUROC达93.5%，并展示强跨域泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖预定义的文本描述，可能无法覆盖所有异常类型。
双分支结构增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异常感知视觉-语言适配器AVA-DINO，利用正常与异常数据的非对称分布实现零样本异常检测。

papers.title: TAR: Text Semantic Assisted Cross-modal Image Registration Framework for Optical and SAR Images
papers.abstract: Existing deep learning-based methods can capture shared features from optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images for spatial alignment. However, optical-SAR registration remains challenging under large geometric deformations, because the model needs to simultaneously handle cross-modal appearance discrepancies and complex spatial transformations. To address this issue, this paper proposes a text semantic-assisted cross-modal image registration framework, named TAR, for optical and SAR images. TAR exploits text semantic priors from remote sensing scenes and land-cover categories to alleviate the modality gap and enhance cross-modal feature learning. TAR consists of three components: a multi-scale visual feature learning (MSFL) module, a text-assisted feature enhancement (TAFE) module, and a coarse-to-fine dense matching (CFDM) module. MSFL extracts multi-scale visual features from optical and SAR images. TAFE constructs text descriptors related to remote sensing scenes and land-cover objects, and uses a frozen RemoteCLIP text encoder to extract text features. These text features are introduced through visual-text interaction to enhance high-level visual features for more reliable coarse matching. CFDM then establishes coarse correspondences based on the enhanced high-level features and refines the matched locations using low-level features. Experimental results on cross-modal remote sensing images demonstrate the effectiveness of TAR, which achieves stronger matching performance than several state-of-the-art methods and yields significant gains under large geometric deformations.

analysis.tldr: 提出文本语义辅助的跨模态图像配准框架TAR，利用遥感场景和地物文本先验增强光学与SAR图像配准。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学与SAR图像配准在几何大变形下仍具挑战，现有深度学习方法需同时处理跨模态外观差异和复杂空间变换，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 解决光学与SAR图像在大几何变形下的跨模态配准问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TAR框架，包含多尺度视觉特征学习模块、文本辅助特征增强模块和由粗到精的密集匹配模块，利用冻结的RemoteCLIP文本编码器提取遥感场景和地物文本特征，通过视觉-文本交互增强高层视觉特征，实现更可靠的粗匹配。
contributions: 提出文本语义辅助的跨模态图像配准框架TAR，利用遥感场景和地物文本先验缓解模态差异。
设计文本辅助特征增强模块，通过视觉-文本交互提升跨模态特征学习。
在跨模态遥感图像上取得优于多种SOTA方法的配准性能，尤其在大几何变形下显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在跨模态遥感图像上实验，TAR优于多种SOTA方法，并在大几何变形下取得显著增益。
limitations: 依赖RemoteCLIP文本编码器，可能受限于预训练模型覆盖的遥感场景和地物类别。
文本描述构建需要人工先验，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本语义辅助的跨模态图像配准框架TAR，利用遥感场景和地物文本先验增强光学与SAR图像配准。

papers.title: OmniHumanoid: Streaming Cross-Embodiment Video Generation with Paired-Free Adaptation
papers.abstract: Cross-embodiment video generation aims to transfer motions across different humanoid embodiments, such as human-to-robot and robot-to-robot, enabling scalable data generation for embodied intelligence. A major challenge in this setting is that motion dynamics are partly transferable across embodiments, whereas appearance and morphology remain embodiment-specific. Existing approaches often entangle these factors, and many require paired data for every target embodiment, which limits scalability to new robots. We present OmniHumanoid, a framework that factorizes transferable motion learning and embodiment-specific adaptation. Our method learns a shared motion transfer model from motion-aligned paired videos spanning multiple embodiments, while adapting to a new embodiment using only unpaired videos through lightweight embodiment-specific adapters. To reduce interference between motion transfer and embodiment adaptation, we further introduce a branch-isolated attention design that separates motion conditioning from embodiment-specific modulation. In addition, we construct a synthetic cross-embodiment dataset with motion-aligned paired videos rendered across diverse humanoid assets, scenes, and viewpoints. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that OmniHumanoid achieves strong motion fidelity and embodiment consistency, while enabling scalable adaptation to unseen humanoid embodiments without retraining the shared motion model.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniHumanoid框架，通过解耦运动迁移与本体适应实现跨本体视频生成，无需配对数据即可适应新机器人。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨本体视频生成对于具身智能的可扩展数据生成至关重要，但现有方法常纠缠运动与外观，且需要配对数据，限制了向新机器人的扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖配对数据的情况下，实现跨不同人形本体的运动迁移视频生成，同时保持运动保真度和本体一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 运动动力学在不同本体间部分可迁移，而外观和形态是本体特有的；现有方法纠缠这些因素，且需要每个目标本体的配对数据。
analysis.method: OmniHumanoid框架：学习共享运动迁移模型（从运动对齐的配对视频），通过轻量级本体特定适配器（仅需未配对视频）适应新本体，并采用分支隔离注意力设计减少运动迁移与本体适应之间的干扰。
contributions: 提出解耦运动迁移和本体适应的框架，实现可扩展的跨本体视频生成
引入分支隔离注意力设计，减少运动条件与本体调制之间的干扰
构建合成跨本体数据集，包含多种人形资产、场景和视角的运动对齐配对视频
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实世界基准上实验，OmniHumanoid实现了强运动保真度和本体一致性，且无需重新训练共享运动模型即可适应未见人形本体。
limitations: 依赖合成数据集，真实场景泛化性可能受限
轻量级适配器可能无法处理外观差异极大的本体
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniHumanoid框架，通过解耦运动迁移与本体适应实现跨本体视频生成，无需配对数据即可适应新机器人。

papers.title: 4DVGGT-D: 4D Visual Geometry Transformer with Improved Dynamic Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic 4D scenes from monocular videos is a fundamental yet challenging task. While recent 3D foundation models provide strong geometric priors, their performance significantly degrades in dynamic environments. This degradation stems from a fundamental tension: the inherent coupling of camera ego-motion and object motion within global attention mechanisms. In this paper, we propose a novel, training-free progressive decoupling framework that disentangles dynamics from statics in a principled, coarse-to-fine manner. Our core insight is to resolve the tension by first stabilizing the camera pose, followed by geometric refinement. Specifically, our approach consists of three synergistic components: (1) a Dynamic-Mask-Guided Pose Decoupling module that isolates pose estimation from dynamic interference, yielding a stable motion-free reference frame; (2) a Topological Subspace Surgery mechanism that orthogonally decomposes the depth manifold, safely preserving dynamic objects while injecting refined, mask-aware geometry into static regions; and (3) an Information-Theoretic Confidence-Aware Fusion strategy that formulates depth integration as a heteroscedastic Bayesian inference problem, adaptively blending multi-pass predictions via inverse-variance weighting. Extensive experiments on standard 4D reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves consistent and substantial improvements across principal point-cloud metrics. Notably, our approach shows competitive performance in robust 4D scene reconstruction without requiring fine-tuning, suggesting the potential of mathematically grounded dynamic-static disentanglement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的动态-静态渐进解耦框架，通过解耦相机运动与物体运动提升单目视频4D重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D基础模型在动态场景中性能显著下降，原因是全局注意力机制中相机自运动与物体运动耦合，导致几何先验失效。
analysis.problem: 从单目视频中重建动态4D场景时，如何有效解耦相机运动与物体运动以提升几何重建精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，全局注意力机制中相机自运动与物体运动的固有耦合是导致动态场景重建性能下降的根本原因。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的渐进式解耦框架，包含三个组件：动态掩码引导的位姿解耦模块、拓扑子空间手术机制、信息论置信度感知融合策略。
contributions: 提出一种无需微调的动态-静态渐进解耦框架，通过数学上严谨的方式分离动态与静态成分。
设计拓扑子空间手术机制，正交分解深度流形，安全保留动态物体并注入掩码感知几何信息。
提出信息论置信度感知融合策略，将深度集成建模为异方差贝叶斯推断问题，自适应融合多遍预测。
analysis.experiments: 在标准4D重建基准上，方法在主要点云指标上取得一致且显著的改进，且无需微调。
limitations: 可能对极端动态场景或大范围遮挡鲁棒性有限。
依赖单目视频输入，多视图信息未充分利用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的动态-静态渐进解耦框架，通过解耦相机运动与物体运动提升单目视频4D重建质量。

papers.title: Spectral Vision Transformer for Efficient Tokenization with Limited Data
papers.abstract: We propose a novel spectral vision transformer architecture for efficient tokenization in limited data, with an emphasis on medical imaging. We outline convenient theoretical properties arising from the choice of basis including spatial invariance and optimal signal-to-noise ratio. We show reduced complexity arising from the spectral projection compared to spatial vision transformers. We show equitable or superior performance with a reduced number of parameters as compared to a variety of models including compact and standard vision transformers, convolutional neural networks with attention, shifted window transformers, multi-layer perceptrons, and logistic regression. We include simulated, public, and clinical data in our analysis and release our code at: \verb+ this http URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出光谱视觉Transformer，通过谱域投影实现有限数据下的高效token化，在医学图像上性能相当或更优且参数更少。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉Transformer在数据有限时性能受限，且空间域token化计算复杂度高，医学图像等小样本场景亟需高效架构。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限数据下实现视觉Transformer的高效token化，同时降低计算复杂度并保持性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出光谱视觉Transformer，利用谱域投影（如傅里叶基）进行token化，利用空间不变性和最优信噪比等理论性质，降低复杂度。
contributions: 提出光谱视觉Transformer架构，实现有限数据下的高效token化。
理论证明谱投影的空间不变性和最优信噪比性质，并展示复杂度降低。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟、公开和临床医学图像数据上评估，与紧凑/标准视觉Transformer、CNN+注意力、移位窗口Transformer、MLP和逻辑回归对比，性能相当或更优且参数更少。
limitations: 可能仅在医学图像等特定领域验证，通用性待考。
谱投影可能引入特定领域假设，泛化能力需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出光谱视觉Transformer，通过谱域投影实现有限数据下的高效token化，在医学图像上性能相当或更优且参数更少。

papers.title: What-Where Transformer: A Slot-Centric Visual Backbone for Concurrent Representation and Localization
papers.abstract: Many image understanding tasks involve identifying what is present and where it appears. However, tasks that address where, such as object discovery, detection, and segmentation, are often considerably more complex than image classification, which primarily focuses on what. One possible reason is that classification-oriented backbones tend to emphasize semantic information about what, while implicitly entangling or suppressing information about where. In this work, we focus on an inductive bias termed what-where separation, which encourages models to represent object appearance and spatial location in a decomposed manner. To incorporate this bias throughout an attentive backbone in the style of Vision Transformer (ViT), we propose the What-Where Transformer (WWT). Our method introduces two key novel designs: (1) it treats tokens as representations of what and attention maps as representations of where, and processes them in concurrent feed-forward modules via a multi-stream, slot-based architecture; (2) it reuses both the final-layer tokens and attention maps for downstream tasks, and directly exposes them to gradients derived from task losses, thereby facilitating more effective and explicit learning of localization. We demonstrate that even under standard single-label classification-based supervision on ImageNet, WWT exhibits emergent multiple object discovery directly from raw attention maps, rather than via additional postprocessing such as token clustering. Furthermore, WWT achieves superior performance compared to ViT-based methods on zero-shot object discovery and weakly supervised semantic segmentation, and it is transferable to various localization setups with minimal modifications. Code will be published after acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出What-Where Transformer，通过解耦物体外观与空间位置的归纳偏置，在分类监督下实现零样本目标发现与弱监督语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分类导向的骨干网络（如ViT）倾向于强调语义信息（what），却隐式纠缠或抑制位置信息（where），导致目标发现、检测、分割等定位任务复杂度远高于分类。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种视觉骨干网络，使其在分类训练的同时显式解耦物体外观与空间位置表征，从而提升定位能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分类骨干网络隐式纠缠what与where信息，抑制了定位能力；ViT的注意力图天然包含位置信息但未被有效利用。
analysis.method: 提出What-Where Transformer (WWT)，核心设计：(1) 将token视为what表征，注意力图视为where表征，通过多流槽位架构并行处理；(2) 复用最终层token和注意力图用于下游任务，并直接暴露于任务损失梯度，促进定位学习。
contributions: 提出what-where分离的归纳偏置，并融入ViT风格的注意力骨干中。
设计多流槽位架构，将token和注意力图分别作为what和where表征并行处理。
在ImageNet分类监督下，WWT直接从原始注意力图展现多目标发现能力，无需后处理。
在零样本目标发现和弱监督语义分割上超越ViT方法，且易于迁移到多种定位任务。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet分类、零样本目标发现、弱监督语义分割等任务上评估，并与ViT基线对比，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景中密集小目标的定位效果有限。
多流架构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出What-Where Transformer，通过解耦物体外观与空间位置的归纳偏置，在分类监督下实现零样本目标发现与弱监督语义分割。

papers.title: FAME: Feature Activation Map Explanation on Image Classification and Face Recognition
papers.abstract: Deep Learning has revolutionized machine learning, reaching unprecedented levels of accuracy, but at the cost of reduced interpretability. Especially in image processing systems, deep networks transform local pixel information into more global concepts in a highly obscured manner. Explainable AI methods for image processing try to shed light on this issue by highlighting the regions of the image that are important for the prediction task. Among these, Class Activation Mapping (CAM) and its gradient-based variants compute attributions based on the feature map and upscale them to the image resolution, assuming that feature map locations are influenced only by underlying regions. Perturbation-based methods, such as CorrRISE, on the other hand, try to provide pixel-level attributions by perturbing the input with fixed patches and checking how the output of the network changes. In this work, we propose Feature Activation Map Explanation (FAME), which combines both worlds by using network gradients to compute changes to the input image, manipulating it in a gradient-driven way rather than using fixed patches. We apply this technique on two common tasks, image classification and face recognition, and show that CAM's above-mentioned assumption does not hold for deeper networks. We qualitatively and quantitively show that FAME produces attribution maps that are competitive state-of-the-art systems. Our code is available: {\footnotesize this https URL .}

analysis.tldr: 提出FAME方法，结合梯度与扰动生成特征激活图解释，用于图像分类和人脸识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型可解释性差，现有CAM方法假设特征图位置仅受底层区域影响，该假设在深层网络中不成立。
analysis.problem: 如何生成更准确的像素级归因图，克服CAM在深层网络中的假设缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CAM假设特征图位置仅受底层区域影响，但该假设在深层网络中不成立。
analysis.method: FAME：利用网络梯度计算输入图像的梯度驱动变化，替代固定块扰动，结合CAM和扰动方法的优势。
contributions: 提出FAME方法，结合梯度与扰动生成特征激活图解释
在图像分类和人脸识别任务上验证有效性，达到与SOTA竞争的性能
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类和人脸识别任务上进行了定性和定量评估，与现有方法比较，结果具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖梯度质量，对梯度不稳定模型效果有限
计算开销可能高于纯CAM方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FAME方法，结合梯度与扰动生成特征激活图解释，用于图像分类和人脸识别。

papers.title: L2P: Unlocking Latent Potential for Pixel Generation
papers.abstract: Pixel diffusion models have recently regained attention for visual generation. However, training advanced pixel-space models from scratch demands prohibitive computational and data resources. To address this, we propose the Latent-to-Pixel (L2P) transfer paradigm, an efficient framework that directly harnesses the rich knowledge of pre-trained LDMs to build powerful pixel-space models. Specifically, L2P discards the VAE in favor of large-patch tokenization and freezes the source LDM's intermediate layers, exclusively training shallow layers to learn the latent-to-pixel transformation. By utilizing LDM-generated synthetic images as the sole training corpus, L2P fits an already smooth data manifold, enabling rapid convergence with zero real-data collection. This strategy allows L2P to seamlessly migrate massive latent priors to the pixel space using only 8 GPUs. Furthermore, eliminating the VAE memory bottleneck unlocks native 4K ultra-high resolution generation. Extensive experiments across mainstream LDM architectures show that L2P incurs negligible training overhead, yet performs on par with the source LDM on DPG-Bench and reaches 93% performance on GenEval.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Latent-to-Pixel (L2P) 迁移范式，利用预训练 LDM 知识高效构建像素级扩散模型，实现零真实数据训练和 4K 超高清生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 从头训练像素级扩散模型需要巨大的计算和数据资源，而现有方法难以高效利用预训练潜空间模型的知识。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将预训练潜空间扩散模型（LDM）的知识迁移到像素空间，避免从头训练的高昂成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: L2P 范式：丢弃 VAE，采用大块 tokenization；冻结源 LDM 中间层，仅训练浅层学习潜到像素的变换；使用 LDM 生成的合成图像作为唯一训练数据。
contributions: 提出 L2P 迁移范式，利用预训练 LDM 知识高效构建像素级扩散模型。
实现零真实数据训练和 4K 超高清生成，仅需 8 块 GPU。
analysis.experiments: 在主流 LDM 架构上实验，L2P 训练开销可忽略，在 DPG-Bench 上与源 LDM 性能相当，在 GenEval 上达到 93% 性能。
limitations: 依赖预训练 LDM 的质量和多样性。
可能受限于合成数据分布与真实数据分布的差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Latent-to-Pixel (L2P) 迁移范式，利用预训练 LDM 知识高效构建像素级扩散模型，实现零真实数据训练和 4K 超高清生成。

papers.title: Robust Promptable Video Object Segmentation
papers.abstract: The performance of promptable video object segmentation (PVOS) models substantially degrades under input corruptions, which prevents PVOS deployment in safety-critical domains. This paper offers the first comprehensive study on robust PVOS (RobustPVOS). We first construct a new, comprehensive benchmark with two real-world evaluation datasets of 351 video clips and more than 2,500 object masks under real-world adverse conditions. At the same time, we generate synthetic training data by applying diverse and temporally varying corruptions to existing VOS datasets. Moreover, we present a new RobustPVOS method, dubbed Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA). The key to successfully performing RobustPVOS is two-fold: effectively handling object-specific degradation and ensuring temporal consistency in predictions. MoGA leverages object-specific representations maintained in memory across frames to condition the robustification process, which allows the model to handle each tracked object differently in a temporally consistent way. Extensive experiments on our benchmark validate MoGA's efficacy, showing consistent and significant improvements across diverse corruption types on both synthetic and real-world datasets, establishing a strong baseline for future RobustPVOS research. Our benchmark is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 首个针对提示性视频目标分割的鲁棒性研究，提出MoGA方法在多种输入损坏下显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: PVOS模型在输入损坏下性能严重下降，阻碍其在安全关键领域的部署，现有研究缺乏鲁棒性评估和解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决PVOS模型在真实世界恶劣条件下的鲁棒性问题，包括处理目标特定退化并保持时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Memory-object-conditioned Gated-rank Adaptation (MoGA)，利用跨帧记忆中的目标特定表示来条件化鲁棒化过程，实现时间一致的目标处理。
contributions: 首次对PVOS进行鲁棒性综合研究，构建包含真实世界和合成损坏数据的基准。
提出MoGA方法，在多种损坏类型上取得一致且显著的改进，为未来研究建立强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在构建的基准上进行了大量实验，包括两个真实世界评估数据集（351个视频片段，超过2500个目标掩码）和合成数据，验证了MoGA的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的损坏有效，未覆盖所有可能的真实世界退化。
方法依赖记忆机制，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对提示性视频目标分割的鲁棒性研究，提出MoGA方法在多种输入损坏下显著提升性能。

papers.title: EDGER: EDge-Guided with HEatmap Refinement for Generalizable Image Forgery Localization
papers.abstract: Text-guided inpainting has made image forgery increasingly realistic, challenging both SID and IFL. However, existing methods often struggle to point out suspicious signals across domains. To address this problem, we propose EDGER, a patch-based, dual-branch framework that localizes manipulated regions in arbitrary resolution images without sacrificing native resolution. The first branch, Edge-Guided Segmentation, introduces a Frequency-based Edge Detector to emphasize high-frequency inconsistencies at manipulation boundaries, and fine-tunes a SegFormer to fuse RGB and edge features for pixel-level masks. Since edge evidence is most informative only when patches contain both authentic and manipulated pixels, we complement Edge-Guided Segmentation with a Synthetic Heatmapping branch, a classification-based localizer that fine-tunes a CLIP-ViT image encoder with LoRA to flag fully synthetic patches. Together, Synthetic Heatmapping provides coarse, patch-level synthetic priors, while Edge-Guided Segmentation sharpens boundaries within partially manipulated patches, yielding comprehensive localization. Evaluated in the MediaEval 2025, SynthIM challenge, Manipulated Region Localization Task's setting, our approach scales to multi-megapixel imagery and exhibits strong cross-domain generalization. Extensive ablations highlight the complementary roles of frequency-based edge cues and patch-level synthetic priors in driving accurate, resolution-agnostic localization.

analysis.tldr: 提出EDGER双分支框架，结合边缘引导分割与合成热图，实现跨域图像伪造定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本引导修复使图像伪造更逼真，现有方法难以跨域检测伪造信号。
analysis.problem: 实现任意分辨率图像中伪造区域的通用定位，克服域间泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 边缘证据仅在部分伪造的图块中有效，全合成图块需分类先验。
analysis.method: 双分支框架：边缘引导分割分支使用频率边缘检测器增强边界高频不一致性，微调SegFormer融合RGB与边缘特征；合成热图分支微调CLIP-ViT+LoRA分类全合成图块，提供粗粒度先验。
contributions: 提出EDGER双分支框架，结合边缘引导分割与合成热图实现通用伪造定位。
引入频率边缘检测器强调操纵边界的高频不一致性。
在MediaEval 2025 SynthIM挑战中展示跨域泛化能力，支持多兆像素图像。
analysis.experiments: 在MediaEval 2025 SynthIM挑战的操纵区域定位任务上评估，展示跨域泛化能力，消融实验验证频率边缘线索与合成先验的互补作用。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型（SegFormer、CLIP-ViT），可能受限于其领域覆盖。
双分支设计增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EDGER双分支框架，结合边缘引导分割与合成热图，实现跨域图像伪造定位。

papers.title: A Transfer Learning Evaluation of Deep Neural Networks for Image Classification
papers.abstract: Transfer learning is a machine learning technique that uses previously acquired knowledge from a source domain to enhance learning in a target domain by reusing learned weights. This technique is ubiquitous because of its great advantages in achieving high performance while saving training time, memory, and effort in network design. In this paper, we investigate how to select the best pre-trained model that meets the target domain requirements for image classification tasks. In our study, we refined the output layers and general network parameters to apply the knowledge of eleven image processing models, pre-trained on ImageNet, to five different target domain datasets. We measured the accuracy, accuracy density, training time, and model size to evaluate the pre-trained models both in training sessions in one episode and with ten episodes.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估11种预训练模型在5个目标域上的迁移学习效果，比较精度、训练时间和模型大小。
analysis.research_motivation: 迁移学习能节省训练时间和资源，但如何为特定图像分类任务选择最佳预训练模型仍缺乏系统指导。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和选择适合目标域的预训练模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对11种ImageNet预训练模型进行输出层和参数微调，在5个目标域数据集上测量精度、精度密度、训练时间和模型大小，并比较单次和十次训练的结果。
contributions: 系统比较了11种预训练模型在5个目标域上的迁移学习性能。
提出了精度密度等评估指标，综合考量精度与模型效率。
analysis.experiments: 在5个目标域数据集上评估11种预训练模型，测量精度、精度密度、训练时间和模型大小，并进行了单次和十次训练的比较。
limitations: 仅针对图像分类任务，未涉及其他视觉任务。
预训练模型仅限于ImageNet，未考虑其他源域。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估11种预训练模型在5个目标域上的迁移学习效果，比较精度、训练时间和模型大小。

papers.title: Optimizing 4D Wires for Sparse 3D Abstraction
papers.abstract: We present a unified framework for 3D geometric abstraction using a single continuous 4D wire, parameterized as a B-spline with spatial coordinates and variable width $(x,y,z,w)$. Existing approaches typically represent shapes as collections of many independent curve segments, which often leads to fragmented structures and limited physical realizability. In contrast, we show that a single continuous spline is sufficiently expressive to capture complex volumetric forms while enforcing global topological coherence. By imposing continuity, our method transforms 3D sketching from a local density-accumulation process into a global routing problem, providing a strong inductive bias toward cleaner aesthetics and improved structural coherence. To enable gradient-based optimization, we introduce a differentiable rendering pipeline that efficiently rasterizes variable-width curves with bounded projection error. This formulation supports robust optimization using modern guidance signals such as Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) or CLIP. We demonstrate applications including image-to-3D abstraction, multi-view wire art generation, and differentiable stylized surface filling. Experiments show that our unified representation produces structures with higher semantic fidelity and improved structural coherence compared to approaches based on collections of discrete curves.

analysis.tldr: 提出用单条连续4D B样条曲线实现稀疏3D几何抽象，支持可微渲染和梯度优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D抽象方法通常使用多条独立曲线段，导致结构碎片化且物理可实现性有限，缺乏全局拓扑连贯性。
analysis.problem: 如何用单一连续曲线实现复杂3D形状的稀疏抽象，同时保持全局拓扑连贯性和可优化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将3D形状表示为单条4D B样条曲线（空间坐标+宽度），通过可微渲染管线实现梯度优化，支持SDS或CLIP等引导信号。
contributions: 提出单条连续4D曲线作为3D几何抽象的通用表示，保证全局拓扑连贯性。
引入可微渲染管线，支持基于梯度的优化和现代引导信号。
在图像到3D抽象、多视图线艺术生成等任务上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高度复杂或精细细节的形状表达能力有限。
优化过程可能对初始化敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用单条连续4D B样条曲线实现稀疏3D几何抽象，支持可微渲染和梯度优化。

papers.title: H2G: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Grouping for 3D Scenes
papers.abstract: Hierarchical 3D grouping aims to recover scene groups across multiple granularities, from fine object parts to complete objects, without relying on semantic labels or a fixed vocabulary. The main challenge is to transform 2D foundation-model cues into coherent hierarchy supervision and embed that hierarchy in a 3D representation. We propose H2G, a hyperbolic affinity field for hierarchical 3D grouping. Our method derives semantically organized tree supervision by interpreting foundation-model affinities through Dasgupta's objective for similarity-based hierarchical clustering. This supervision is distilled into a single Lorentz hyperbolic feature field, whose geometry is well suited for tree-like branching structures. A hierarchy-aware objective aligns the field with fine-level assignments, coarse object structure, compact feature clusters, and LCA (Lowest Common Ancestor) ordering. This formulation represents multiple grouping levels in one feature space, enabling semantic hierarchical grouping grounded in 2D foundation-model knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出H2G，利用双曲空间和基础模型亲和力实现3D场景的层次化分组。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D分组方法依赖语义标签或固定词汇，难以恢复多粒度层次结构；2D基础模型线索难以直接转化为3D层次监督。
analysis.problem: 如何从2D基础模型线索中提取层次化监督，并将其嵌入3D表示，实现无标签的多粒度场景分组。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建双曲亲和场，通过Dasgupta目标函数从基础模型亲和力推导树状监督，并蒸馏到Lorentz双曲特征场中，结合层次感知目标（细粒度分配、粗粒度结构、紧凑聚类、LCA排序）进行训练。
contributions: 提出H2G，一种基于双曲空间的层次化3D分组方法。
利用Dasgupta目标从2D基础模型亲和力生成语义树监督。
在单一双曲特征场中编码多个分组层次，实现语义层次分组。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖2D基础模型的质量。
双曲空间训练可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出H2G，利用双曲空间和基础模型亲和力实现3D场景的层次化分组。

papers.title: What Does It Mean for a Medical AI System to Be Right?
papers.abstract: This paper examines what it means for a medical AI system to be right by grounding the question in a specific clinical context: the automatic classification of plasma cells in digitized bone marrow smears for the diagnosis of multiple myeloma. Drawing on philosophy of science and research ethics, the paper argues that correctness in medical AI is not a singular property reducible to benchmark performance, but a multi-dimensional concept involving the availability of expertly labeled medical datasets, the explainability and interpretability of model outputs, the clinical meaningfulness of evaluation metrics, and the distribution of accountability in human-AI workflows. As such, the paper develops this argument through four interrelated themes: the instability of ground truth labels, the opacity of overconfident AI, the inadequacy of standard clinical metrics, and the risk of automation bias in time-pressured clinical settings.

analysis.tldr: 医学AI的正确性是多维概念，不能简化为基准性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前医学AI系统常以基准性能衡量正确性，但忽略了临床实际中的复杂性，可能导致误导性结论和伦理风险。
analysis.problem: 探讨医学AI系统在临床语境下“正确”的真正含义，并揭示其多维性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出四个关键现象：真实标签的不稳定性、过度自信AI的不透明性、标准临床指标的不足、以及时间压力下自动化偏差的风险。
analysis.method: 基于科学哲学和研究伦理，通过多发性骨髓瘤诊断中浆细胞自动分类的具体案例，从四个主题（标签稳定性、可解释性、评估指标意义、责任分配）进行论证。
contributions: 提出医学AI正确性是多维概念，不能仅由基准性能定义。
识别并分析了四个关键维度：标签稳定性、可解释性、评估指标临床意义、人机协作中的责任分配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论证基于单一临床案例，可能不适用于其他医学领域。
未提供实证数据支持所提出的多维框架。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医学AI的正确性是多维概念，不能简化为基准性能。

papers.title: Chronicles-OCR: A Cross-Temporal Perception Benchmark for the Evolutionary Trajectory of Chinese Characters
papers.abstract: Vision Large Language Models (VLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in modern text-rich visual understanding. However, their perceptual robustness in the face of the continuous morphological evolution of historical writing systems remains largely unexplored. Existing ancient text datasets typically focus on isolated historical periods, failing to capture the systematic visual distribution shifts spanning thousands of years. To bridge this gap and empower Digital Humanities, we introduce Chronicles-OCR, the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the cross-temporal visual perception capabilities of VLLMs across the complete evolutionary trajectory of Chinese characters, known as the Seven Chinese Scripts. Curated in collaboration with top-tier institutional domain experts, the dataset comprises 2,800 strictly balanced images encompassing highly diverse physical media, ranging from tortoise shells to paper-based calligraphy. To accommodate the drastic morphological and topological variations across different historical stages, we propose a novel Stage-Adaptive Annotation Paradigm. Based on this, Chronicles-OCR formulates four rigorous quantitative tasks: cross-period character spotting, fine-grained archaic character recognition via visual referring, ancient text parsing, and script classification. By isolating visual perception from semantic reasoning, Chronicles-OCR provides an authoritative platform to expose the limitations of current VLLMs, paving the way for robust, evolution-aware historical text perception. Chronicles-OCR is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 首个跨时间汉字视觉感知基准Chronicles-OCR，揭示VLLM在汉字演化轨迹上的感知局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLLM在现代文本视觉理解中表现优异，但面对历史文字形态的持续演化时，其感知鲁棒性尚未被探索；现有古文字数据集仅覆盖孤立历史时期，无法捕捉跨越数千年的系统性视觉分布偏移。
analysis.problem: 评估VLLM在汉字完整演化轨迹（七种书体）上的跨时间视觉感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含2800张严格平衡图像的数据集，覆盖从龟甲到纸本书法的多样物理介质；提出阶段自适应标注范式；设计四项定量任务：跨时期文字检测、细粒度古文字识别（视觉指代）、古文字解析、书体分类。
contributions: 首个跨时间汉字视觉感知基准Chronicles-OCR，覆盖七种书体的完整演化轨迹。
提出阶段自适应标注范式，适应不同历史阶段的形态和拓扑变化。
通过隔离视觉感知与语义推理，提供权威平台暴露当前VLLM的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（2800张），可能不足以覆盖所有汉字变体。
仅关注汉字，未涉及其他文字系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个跨时间汉字视觉感知基准Chronicles-OCR，揭示VLLM在汉字演化轨迹上的感知局限。

papers.title: Multimodal Abstractive Summarization of Instructional Videos with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal video summarization requires visual features that align semantically with language generation. Traditional approaches rely on CNN features trained for object classification, which represent visual concepts as discrete categories not aligned with natural language. We propose ClipSum, a framework that leverages frozen CLIP vision-language features with explicit temporal modeling and dimension-adaptive fusion for instructional video summarization. CLIP's contrastive pre-training on 400M image-text pairs yields visual features semantically aligned with the linguistic concepts that text decoders generate, bridging the vision-language gap at the representation level. On YouCook2, ClipSum achieves 33.0% ROUGE-1 versus 30.5% for ResNet-152 with 4x lower dimensionality (512 vs. 2048), demonstrating that semantic alignment matters more than feature capacity. Frozen CLIP (33.0%) surpasses fine-tuned CLIP (32.3%), showing that preserving pre-trained alignment is more valuable than task-specific adaptation. this https URL

analysis.tldr: 利用冻结CLIP视觉-语言特征，通过时间建模和维度自适应融合提升教学视频多模态摘要。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统视频摘要依赖CNN特征，其视觉概念与自然语言不对齐，导致语义鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何利用与语言语义对齐的视觉特征提升教学视频的多模态抽象摘要。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 冻结CLIP特征（33.0% ROUGE-1）优于微调CLIP（32.3%），表明保持预训练对齐比任务特定适应更重要。
analysis.method: 提出ClipSum框架，使用冻结CLIP视觉-语言特征，结合显式时间建模和维度自适应融合。
contributions: 提出ClipSum框架，利用CLIP特征实现视觉-语言语义对齐。
在YouCook2上达到33.0% ROUGE-1，超越ResNet-152的30.5%，且维度降低4倍。
analysis.experiments: 在YouCook2数据集上评估，报告ROUGE-1分数。
limitations: 仅针对教学视频，泛化性未知。
未提供其他数据集或指标结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用冻结CLIP视觉-语言特征，通过时间建模和维度自适应融合提升教学视频多模态摘要。

papers.title: Cluster-Aware Neural Collapse Prompt Tuning for Long-Tailed Generalization of Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Prompt learning has emerged as an efficient alternative to fine-tuning pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs). Despite its promise, current methods still struggle to maintain tail-class discriminability when adapting to class-imbalanced datasets. In this work, we propose cluster-aware neural collapse prompt tuning (CPT), which enhances the discriminability of tail classes in prompt-tuned VLMs without sacrificing their overall generalization. First, we design a cluster-invariant space by mining semantic assignments from the pre-trained VLM and mapping them to prompt-tuned features. This computes cluster-level boundaries and restricts the constraints to local neighborhoods, which reduces interference with the global semantic structure of the pre-trained VLM. Second, we introduce neural-collapse-driven discriminability optimization with three losses: textual Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) separation loss, class-wise convergence loss, and rotation stabilization loss. These losses work together to shape intra-cluster geometry for better inter-class separation and intra-class alignment. Extensive experiments on 11 diverse datasets demonstrate that CPT outperforms SOTA methods, with stronger performance on long-tail classes and good generalization to unseen classes.

analysis.tldr: 提出聚类感知神经坍缩提示微调（CPT），在不牺牲整体泛化能力的前提下增强视觉-语言模型在长尾类别上的判别性。
analysis.research_motivation: 提示学习是微调预训练视觉-语言模型的高效方法，但现有方法在适应类别不平衡数据集时难以保持尾部类别的判别性。
analysis.problem: 解决提示微调视觉-语言模型在长尾类别上判别性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计聚类不变空间，从预训练VLM挖掘语义分配并映射到提示微调特征，计算聚类级边界并限制约束到局部邻域；引入神经坍缩驱动的判别性优化，包括文本等角紧框架分离损失、类内收敛损失和旋转稳定损失。
contributions: 提出聚类感知神经坍缩提示微调（CPT），增强尾部类别判别性而不牺牲整体泛化。
设计聚类不变空间和三种损失函数，共同优化类间分离和类内对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在11个不同数据集上实验，CPT优于SOTA方法，在长尾类别上表现更强，且对未见类别有良好泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练VLM的语义分配质量。
额外损失可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出聚类感知神经坍缩提示微调（CPT），在不牺牲整体泛化能力的前提下增强视觉-语言模型在长尾类别上的判别性。

papers.title: Interactive State Space Model with Cross-Modal Local Scanning for Depth Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Guided depth super-resolution (GDSR) reconstructs HR depth maps from LR inputs with HR RGB guidance. Existing methods either model each modality independently or rely on computationally expensive attention mechanisms with quadratic complexity, hindering the establishment of efficient and semantically interactive joint representations. In this paper, we observe that feature maps from different modalities exhibit semantic-level correlations during feature extraction. This motivates us to develop a more flexible approach enabling dense, semantically-aware deep interactions between modalities. To this end, we propose a novel GDSR framework centered around the Interactive State Space Model. Specifically, we design a cross-modal local scanning mechanism that enables fine-grained semantic interactions between RGB and depth features. Leveraging the Mamba architecture, our framework achieves global modeling with linear complexity. Furthermore, a cross-modal matching transform module is introduced to enhance interactive modeling quality by utilizing representative features from both modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate competitive performance against state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于交互式状态空间模型的跨模态局部扫描机制，实现高效深度超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有引导深度超分辨率方法要么独立建模各模态，要么依赖二次复杂度的注意力机制，难以建立高效且语义交互的联合表示。
analysis.problem: 如何高效实现RGB与深度模态间的密集语义交互，以提升深度超分辨率性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到不同模态的特征图在提取过程中存在语义级相关性。
analysis.method: 提出交互式状态空间模型框架，包含跨模态局部扫描机制和跨模态匹配变换模块，利用Mamba架构实现线性复杂度的全局建模。
contributions: 提出交互式状态空间模型用于引导深度超分辨率，实现线性复杂度的全局建模。
设计跨模态局部扫描机制，实现RGB与深度特征的细粒度语义交互。
引入跨模态匹配变换模块，利用代表性特征增强交互建模质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上与最先进方法对比，展示了竞争性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扫描策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及对极端低分辨率或噪声场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于交互式状态空间模型的跨模态局部扫描机制，实现高效深度超分辨率。

papers.title: Learn to Think: Improving Multimodal Reasoning through Vision-Aware Self-Improvement Training
papers.abstract: Post-training with explicit reasoning traces is common to improve the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, acquiring high-quality reasoning traces is often costly and time-consuming. Hence, the self-improvement paradigm has emerged, enabling MLLMs to self-generate reasoning traces for training without external supervision. Despite its effectiveness, we reveal two shortcomings in the self-improvement training of MLLMs: 1) data imbalance, where simple samples are over-trained, but the challenging yet crucial samples are under-trained; 2) language prior bias, where MLLMs overly rely on linguistic priors while neglecting the visual cues. To this end, we propose VISTA, a vision-aware self-improvement training framework for enhancing the multimodal reasoning of MLLMs. Specifically, VISTA first introduces a prefix resampling strategy to reuse the partial correct reasoning traces for efficient data collection, and then designs a vision-aware attention score to quantify the model's focus on visual information. Extensive experiments show that VISTA can be applied to various post-training scenarios, i.e., supervised fine-tuning and preference learning, and effectively enhances the multimodal reasoning performance across various MLLMs and tasks, e.g., bringing up to +13.66% average performance gains for Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct.

analysis.tldr: 提出VISTA框架，通过前缀重采样和视觉感知注意力分数解决多模态推理自改进训练中的数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型的后训练依赖高质量推理轨迹，但获取成本高；自改进范式虽无需外部监督，但存在数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题，限制了推理能力提升。
analysis.problem: 多模态大语言模型自改进训练中简单样本过训练而困难样本欠训练，以及模型过度依赖语言先验而忽视视觉信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了两个现象：1) 数据不平衡，简单样本被过度训练，困难样本训练不足；2) 语言先验偏差，模型过度依赖语言线索而忽略视觉信息。
analysis.method: 提出VISTA框架，包含前缀重采样策略（利用部分正确推理轨迹高效收集数据）和视觉感知注意力分数（量化模型对视觉信息的关注度）。
contributions: 揭示了多模态自改进训练中的数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题
提出VISTA框架，通过前缀重采样和视觉感知注意力分数增强多模态推理
在多种后训练场景（SFT和偏好学习）及多个MLLM上验证有效性，最高提升13.66%
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct等模型上实验，VISTA在多种后训练场景下提升多模态推理性能，平均性能增益最高达+13.66%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证
前缀重采样策略可能引入噪声，影响训练稳定性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VISTA框架，通过前缀重采样和视觉感知注意力分数解决多模态推理自改进训练中的数据不平衡和语言先验偏差问题。

papers.title: RealDiffusion: Physics-informed Attention for Multi-character Storybook Generation
papers.abstract: While modern diffusion models excel at generating diverse single images, extending this to sequential generation reveals a fundamental challenge: balancing narrative dynamism with multi-character coherence. Existing methods often falter at this trade-off, leading to artifacts where characters lose their identity or the story stagnates. To resolve this critical tension, we introduce RealDiffusion, a unified framework designed to reconcile robust coherence with narrative dynamism. Heat diffusion serves as a dissipative prior that averages neighboring features along the sequence and removes high-frequency noise within the subject region. This suppresses attribute drift and stabilizes identity across frames. A region-aware stochastic process then introduces small perturbations that explore nearby modes and prevent collapse so the story maintains pose change and scene evolution. We thus introduce a lightweight, training-free Physics-informed Attention mechanism that injects controllable physical priors into the self-attention layers during inference. By modeling feature evolution as a configurable physical system, our method regularizes spatio-temporal relationships without suppressing intentional, prompt-driven changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RealDiffusion achieves substantial gains in character coherence while preserving narrative dynamism, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过物理启发的注意力机制，在无需训练的情况下实现多角色故事书生成中的角色一致性与叙事动态性的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在生成序列图像时难以兼顾角色身份保持与故事动态变化，导致角色身份丢失或故事停滞。
analysis.problem: 多角色故事书生成中角色一致性与叙事动态性之间的权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在序列生成中常出现角色属性漂移或故事缺乏变化的现象。
analysis.method: 提出RealDiffusion框架，包含热扩散先验（抑制属性漂移）和区域感知随机过程（引入扰动保持动态），通过物理启发的注意力机制在推理时注入可控物理先验。
contributions: 提出训练免费的物理启发注意力机制，平衡角色一致性与叙事动态性。
通过热扩散和区域感知随机过程实现稳定的多角色序列生成。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上相比现有方法在角色一致性上取得显著提升，同时保持叙事动态性。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或长序列的泛化能力有限。
物理先验的参数调节可能需要人工干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过物理启发的注意力机制，在无需训练的情况下实现多角色故事书生成中的角色一致性与叙事动态性的平衡。

papers.title: Vector Scaffolding: Inter-Scale Orchestration for Differentiable Image Vectorization
papers.abstract: Differentiable vector graphics have enabled powerful gradient-based optimization of vector primitives directly from raster images. However, existing frameworks formulate this as a flat optimization problem, forcing hundreds to thousands of randomly initialized curves to blindly compete for pixel-level error reduction. This disordered optimization leads to topology collapse, where macroscopic structures are distorted by internal high-frequency noise, resulting in a redundant and uneditable "polygon soup" that limits practical editability. To address this limitation, we propose Vector Scaffolding, a novel hierarchical optimization framework that shifts from flat pixel-matching to structured topological construction tailored for vector graphics. By identifying a key cause of topology collapse as the mathematical imbalance between area and boundary gradients, we introduce Interior Gradient Aggregation to stabilize the learning dynamics of multi-scale curve mixtures. Upon this stabilized landscape, we employ Progressive Stratification and Rapid Inflation Scheduling to progressively densify vector primitives with extremely high learning rates ($\times 50$). Experiments demonstrate that our approach accelerates optimization by $2.5\times$ while simultaneously improving PSNR by up to 1.4 dB over the previous state of the art.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层优化框架Vector Scaffolding，通过内梯度聚合和渐进分层策略解决可微矢量化的拓扑崩溃问题，加速2.5倍并提升PSNR 1.4 dB。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可微矢量图优化将问题视为扁平优化，导致大量随机初始曲线无序竞争像素级误差，产生拓扑崩溃和不可编辑的‘多边形汤’，限制了实际可编辑性。
analysis.problem: 解决可微矢量图中因扁平优化导致的拓扑崩溃问题，实现结构化拓扑构建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 拓扑崩溃的关键原因是面积梯度与边界梯度之间的数学不平衡，导致宏观结构被内部高频噪声扭曲。
analysis.method: 提出Vector Scaffolding分层优化框架，包括内梯度聚合（稳定多尺度曲线混合的学习动态）、渐进分层和快速膨胀调度（以极高学习率逐步稠密化矢量基元）。
contributions: 识别了可微矢量图中拓扑崩溃的根本原因——面积与边界梯度的不平衡。
提出内梯度聚合、渐进分层和快速膨胀调度，实现结构化拓扑构建。
在优化速度和重建质量上超越现有方法，加速2.5倍，PSNR提升1.4 dB。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果细节，但提及加速2.5倍和PSNR提升1.4 dB。
limitations: 可能对复杂纹理或高噪声图像效果有限。
分层策略的层数选择可能需要手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层优化框架Vector Scaffolding，通过内梯度聚合和渐进分层策略解决可微矢量化的拓扑崩溃问题，加速2.5倍并提升PSNR 1.4 dB。

papers.title: Beyond Point-wise Neural Collapse: A Topology-Aware Hierarchical Classifier for Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: The Nearest Class Mean (NCM) classifier is widely favored in Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) for its superior resistance to catastrophic forgetting compared to Fully Connected layers. While Neural Collapse (NC) theory supports NCM's optimality by assuming features collapse into single points, non-linear feature drift and insufficient training in CIL often prevent this ideal state. Consequently, classes manifest as complex manifolds rather than collapsed points, rendering the single-point NCM suboptimal. To address this, we propose Hierarchical-Cluster SOINN (HC-SOINN), a novel classifier that captures the topological structure of these manifolds via a ``local-to-global'' representation.
