Our method eliminates the need for separate models across exposure regimes and produces HDR reconstructions with high input fidelity. On quantitative benchmarks, we outperform state-of-the-art generative baselines with comparable model capacity on several reconstruction metrics. Human evaluators further prefer our results in 72% of pairwise comparisons against existing methods. Finally, we show that this input-conditioned sequence generation and fusion framework extends beyond HDR to other image reconstruction tasks, such as all-in-focus image recovery from a single defocus-blurred input.

analysis.tldr: 将单次HDR重建转化为条件视频生成，利用视频扩散先验生成曝光序列并融合，实现高保真HDR恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单次HDR重建方法在保持输入图像保真度方面存在困难，通常需要独立模型处理高光和阴影，或直接预测HDR图像导致可解释性差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视频扩散先验，通过生成曝光序列并融合的方式，实现单次LDR到HDR的高保真重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 微调视频扩散模型以生成曝光序列（exposure bracket），条件为LDR输入；使用轻量级UNet预测逐像素权重融合序列得到HDR图像。
contributions: 将单次HDR重建重新定义为条件视频生成问题，提出简单、可解释且有效的框架。
无需跨曝光区域的独立模型，在定量指标上超越现有生成式基线，人类评估中72%偏好本方法。
框架可扩展到其他图像重建任务，如从单张散焦模糊输入恢复全聚焦图像。
analysis.experiments: 在多个重建指标上优于具有可比模型容量的最先进生成基线，人类评估中72%偏好本方法。
limitations: 可能依赖视频扩散模型的预训练质量。
融合权重预测的UNet可能在高动态范围极端场景下存在局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将单次HDR重建转化为条件视频生成，利用视频扩散先验生成曝光序列并融合，实现高保真HDR恢复。

papers.title: RNA-FM: Flow-Matching Generative Model for Genome-wide RNA-Seq Prediction
papers.abstract: Histopathology whole-slide images (WSIs) are routinely acquired in clinical practice and contain rich tissue morphology but lack direct molecular architecture and functional programs defining pathological states, whereas RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) provides genome-wide transcriptional profiles at substantial cost, thereby motivating WSI-based genome-wide transcriptomic prediction. Existing approaches for predicting gene expression from WSIs predominantly rely on deterministic regression with one-to-one mapping, limiting their ability to capture biological heterogeneity and predictive uncertainty. We propose RNA-FM, a flow-matching generative framework for genome-wide bulk RNA-seq prediction from WSIs. RNA-FM formulates transcriptomic prediction as a continuous-time conditional transport problem, learning a velocity field that maps a simple prior to the target gene expression distribution conditioned on morphologies. By integrating pathway-level structure, RNA-FM enables scalable and biologically interpretable genome-wide gene expression imputation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RNA-FM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches while maintaining biological meaningfulness. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: RNA-FM 利用流匹配生成模型从病理全切片图像预测全基因组 RNA-seq 表达，优于现有确定性方法。
analysis.research_motivation: RNA-seq 成本高昂，而病理 WSI 易获取但缺乏分子信息，因此需要从 WSI 预测转录组；现有确定性回归方法无法捕捉生物异质性和预测不确定性。
analysis.problem: 从病理全切片图像预测全基因组 RNA-seq 表达，并解决现有方法无法建模分布多样性和不确定性的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RNA-FM，一种基于流匹配的生成框架，将转录组预测建模为连续时间条件传输问题，学习从简单先验到目标基因表达分布的 velocity field，并整合通路级结构实现可解释的基因表达插补。
contributions: 首次将流匹配生成模型应用于 WSI 到 RNA-seq 的预测，实现分布建模和不确定性量化。
引入通路级结构约束，提升模型的可扩展性和生物学可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，RNA-FM 一致优于现有方法，并保持生物学意义。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量 WSI 和 RNA-seq 配对数据。
流匹配模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RNA-FM 利用流匹配生成模型从病理全切片图像预测全基因组 RNA-seq 表达，优于现有确定性方法。

papers.title: Grounding by Remembering: Cross-Scene and In-Scene Memory for 3D Functional Affordances
papers.abstract: Functional affordance grounding requires more than recognizing an object: an agent must localize the specific region that supports an interaction, such as the handle to pull or the button to press. This is difficult for training-free vision-language pipelines because actionable regions are often small, visually ambiguous, and repeated across multiple same-category instances in a scene. We propose AFFORDMEM, a framework that grounds 3D functional affordances by remembering geometry at two levels. The first is cross-scene affordance memory: the agent maintains a category-level memory bank of RGB images with affordance regions rendered as overlays, and recalls the most informative examples at query time to guide a frozen VLM toward small operable subregions that text-only prompting consistently misses. The second is in-scene spatial memory: as the agent processes the scene, it organizes candidate instances and their 3D spatial relations into a structured scene graph, enabling the language model to resolve references over distant or currently unobserved candidates such as "the second handle from the top." AFFORDMEM requires no model fine-tuning and no target-scene annotation, using a reusable memory bank built from source scenes. On SceneFun3D, our method improves AP50 over the prior training-free state of the art by 3.23 on Split 0 and 3.7 on Split 1. Ablation studies support complementary benefits: cross-scene affordance memory improves fine-grained localization, while in-scene spatial memory provides the larger gain on spatially qualified queries. The project homepage is available at the project page.

analysis.tldr: 提出AFFORDMEM框架，通过跨场景和场景内记忆实现3D功能可供性定位，无需微调或目标场景标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有训练无关的视觉-语言管线难以定位小而模糊的可操作区域，且场景中同类实例重复导致参考模糊。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调模型且无目标场景标注的情况下，准确接地3D功能可供性区域，并处理跨实例的引用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯文本提示无法定位小可操作子区域；场景内同类实例重复导致空间引用困难。
analysis.method: 构建跨场景类别级记忆库（RGB图像+可供性区域覆盖）和场景内空间记忆（场景图），引导冻结VLM定位。
contributions: 提出跨场景可供性记忆，通过检索最相关示例引导VLM定位小区域。
提出场景内空间记忆，利用场景图解决远距离或未观察候选的引用。
在SceneFun3D上实现无需微调或目标标注的SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在SceneFun3D上，Split 0 AP50提升3.23，Split 1提升3.7；消融实验验证两种记忆互补。
limitations: 依赖源场景构建记忆库，可能受源场景多样性影响。
场景图构建可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AFFORDMEM框架，通过跨场景和场景内记忆实现3D功能可供性定位，无需微调或目标场景标注。

papers.title: Keep What Audio Cannot Say: Context-Preserving Token Pruning for Omni-LLMs
papers.abstract: Omnimodal Large Language Models (Omni-LLMs) incur substantial computational overhead due to the large number of multimodal input tokens they process, making token reduction essential for real-world deployment. Existing Omni-LLM pruning methods typically reduce this cost by selecting tokens that are important for the current query or strongly aligned with cross-modal cues. However, such strategies can discard evidence that falls outside these criteria, even when needed for different questions or for understanding context beyond aligned audio-visual cues. To address this limitation, we reframe Omni-LLM token reduction as preserving broad audio-visual context while removing cross-modal redundancy. We propose ContextGuard, an inference-time token pruning framework built on this principle. ContextGuard predicts coarse visual semantics from audio and prunes video tokens whose coarse semantics are likely recoverable from audio, while retaining additional video tokens to preserve localized visual details that audio alone cannot specify. For further compression, our method merges temporally similar video tokens. The framework requires no downstream LLM fine-tuning and uses only an independently trained lightweight predictor. On Qwen2.5-Omni and Video-SALMONN2+ at 3B and 7B scales across six audio-visual benchmarks, ContextGuard outperforms prior inference-time pruning methods while pruning more tokens. Notably, on Qwen2.5-Omni 7B, ContextGuard achieves full-token-level performance on five of six benchmarks while pruning 55% of input tokens.

analysis.tldr: 提出ContextGuard，通过音频预测视觉语义来剪枝视频冗余令牌，在保持全量性能的同时减少55%输入令牌。
analysis.research_motivation: 全模态大模型（Omni-LLMs）处理大量多模态输入令牌导致计算开销巨大，现有剪枝方法可能丢弃跨模态线索之外的证据，影响上下文理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在Omni-LLM中剪枝视频令牌时保留音频无法提供的视觉上下文，同时去除跨模态冗余。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有剪枝策略倾向于选择与当前查询或跨模态线索强对齐的令牌，但可能丢弃其他问题所需或超出对齐线索的上下文证据。
analysis.method: ContextGuard：在推理时，用轻量级独立预测器从音频预测粗粒度视觉语义，据此剪枝语义可恢复的视频令牌，保留音频无法指定的局部细节令牌，并合并时间相似令牌。
contributions: 提出上下文保留的令牌剪枝原则，将Omni-LLM令牌减少重新定义为保留广泛音视频上下文同时去除跨模态冗余。
实现ContextGuard框架，无需微调LLM，仅用轻量级预测器，在多个基准上超越先前剪枝方法并剪除更多令牌。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-Omni和Video-SALMONN2+的3B和7B规模上，使用六个音视频基准评估，ContextGuard在剪除更多令牌的同时优于先前推理时剪枝方法；在Qwen2.5-Omni 7B上，剪除55%输入令牌时在六个基准中的五个上达到全令牌性能。
limitations: 依赖音频预测视觉语义的准确性，可能受音频质量影响。
仅适用于音视频输入场景，不适用于纯视觉或纯音频任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ContextGuard，通过音频预测视觉语义来剪枝视频冗余令牌，在保持全量性能的同时减少55%输入令牌。

papers.title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation
papers.abstract: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. Existing AR distillation approaches typically rely on frame sinks or student-side degradation training. The former transfers poorly to driving due to fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes, while the latter remains bounded by the teacher's single-pass output length and thus provides only a limited supervision horizon. A natural question is: can the teacher itself be extended via AR rollout to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost? The key difficulty is that a standard teacher drifts under its own predictions, contaminating the supervision it provides. Our key insight is to make the teacher rollout-capable, ensuring reliable supervision from its own AR rollouts. This is instantiated as HorizonDrive, an anti-drifting training-and-distillation framework for AR driving simulation. First, scheduled rollout recovery (SRR) trains the base model to reconstruct ground-truth future clips from prediction-corrupted histories, yielding a teacher that remains stable across long AR rollouts. Second, the rollout-capable teacher is extended via AR rollout, providing long-horizon distribution-matching supervision under bounded memory, while a short-window student aligns to it with teacher rollout DMD (TRD) for efficient real-time deployment. HorizonDrive natively supports minute-scale AR rollout under bounded memory; on nuScenes, HorizonDrive reduces FID by 52% and FVD by 37%, and lowers ARE and DTW by 21% and 9% relative to the strongest long-horizon streaming baselines, while remaining competitive with single-pass driving video generators.

analysis.tldr: 提出自纠错自回归世界模型，通过教师模型自身长程自回归展开提供无界监督，实现分钟级驾驶仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 闭环驾驶仿真需要实时交互，现有自回归蒸馏方法受限于教师单次输出长度或帧沉问题，无法提供长程监督。
analysis.problem: 如何让教师模型在自回归展开中保持稳定，从而提供无界时域监督以训练高效学生模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准教师模型在自身预测下会漂移，污染监督信号。
analysis.method: 提出HorizonDrive框架，包含调度式展开恢复训练（SRR）使教师模型抗漂移，以及教师展开DMD（TRD）让学生模型对齐教师的长程分布。
contributions: 提出SRR训练策略，使教师模型在长程自回归展开中保持稳定。
提出TRD蒸馏方法，利用教师展开提供无界监督，实现高效实时部署。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上，FID降低52%，FVD降低37%，ARE和DTW分别降低21%和9%，优于现有长程流式基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定驾驶场景数据集。
长程展开的计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自纠错自回归世界模型，通过教师模型自身长程自回归展开提供无界监督，实现分钟级驾驶仿真。

papers.title: PointForward: Feedforward Driving Reconstruction through Point-Aligned Representations
papers.abstract: High-fidelity reconstruction of driving scenes is crucial for autonomous driving. While recent feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods enable fast reconstruction, their per-pixel Gaussian prediction paradigm often suffers from multi-view inconsistency and layering artifacts. Moreover, existing methods often model dynamic instances via dense flow prediction, which lacks explicit cross-view correspondence and instance-level consistency. In this paper, we propose PointForward, a feedforward driving reconstruction framework through point-aligned representations. Unlike pixel-aligned methods, we initialize sparse 3D queries in world space and aggregate multi-view image information via spatial-temporal fusion onto these queries, enforcing explicit cross-view consistency in a single feedforward pass. To handle scene dynamics, we introduce scene graphs that explicitly organize moving instances during reconstruction. By leveraging 3D bounding boxes, our method enables instance-level motion propagation and temporally consistent dynamic representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PointForward achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale driving benchmarks. The code will be available upon the publication of the paper.

analysis.tldr: PointForward 通过点对齐表示和场景图实现前馈驾驶场景重建，解决多视图不一致和动态实例建模问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈 3DGS 方法基于像素对齐预测高斯，导致多视图不一致和分层伪影；动态实例建模依赖密集光流，缺乏显式跨视图对应和实例级一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、多视图一致且实例级一致的驾驶场景前馈重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出像素对齐方法存在多视图不一致和分层伪影，密集光流方法缺乏跨视图对应和实例级一致性。
analysis.method: 提出 PointForward 框架：在世界空间初始化稀疏 3D 查询，通过时空融合聚合多视图图像信息，实现单次前馈中的显式跨视图一致性；引入场景图利用 3D 边界框组织动态实例，实现实例级运动传播和时序一致动态表示。
contributions: 提出点对齐表示替代像素对齐，实现前馈重建中的显式跨视图一致性。
引入场景图结构，利用 3D 边界框显式建模动态实例，实现实例级运动传播和时序一致动态表示。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模驾驶基准上达到最先进性能，代码将在论文发表后公开。
limitations: 依赖 3D 边界框标注，可能限制在无标注场景的泛化。
稀疏查询可能丢失部分细节，极端复杂场景下重建质量有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PointForward 通过点对齐表示和场景图实现前馈驾驶场景重建，解决多视图不一致和动态实例建模问题。

papers.title: Logit-Attention Divergence: Mitigating Position Bias in Multi-Image Retrieval via Attention-Guided Calibration
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance in multi-image cross-modal retrieval, yet suffer from severe position bias, where predictions are dominated by input order rather than semantic relevance. Through empirical analysis, we identify a phenomenon termed Logit-Attention Divergence, in which output logits are heavily biased while internal attention maps remain well-aligned with relevant visual evidence. This observation reveals a fundamental limitation of existing logit-level calibration methods such as PriDe. Based on this insight, we propose a training-free, attention-guided debiasing framework that leverages intrinsic attention signals for instance-level correction at inference time, requiring only a minimal calibration set with negligible computational overhead. Experiments on MS-COCO-based benchmarks show that our method substantially improves permutation invariance and achieves state-of-the-art performance, enhancing accuracy by over 40\% compared to baselines. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的注意力引导去偏框架，通过修正logit-注意力分歧来缓解多图像检索中的位置偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在多图像跨模态检索中表现出严重的位置偏差，即预测结果受输入顺序主导而非语义相关性，现有logit级校准方法（如PriDe）效果有限。
analysis.problem: 解决多图像检索中由位置偏差导致的预测顺序依赖问题，提升模型的排列不变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现Logit-Attention Divergence现象：输出logits严重偏向输入顺序，而内部注意力图仍与相关视觉证据对齐，表明现有logit级校准方法存在根本局限。
analysis.method: 提出一种训练无关的注意力引导去偏框架，利用内在注意力信号在推理时进行实例级校正，仅需极小的校准集且计算开销可忽略。
contributions: 识别并定义了Logit-Attention Divergence现象，揭示了位置偏差的根源。
提出一种无需训练的注意力引导校准方法，显著提升多图像检索的排列不变性。
analysis.experiments: 在基于MS-COCO的基准测试上，该方法相比基线准确率提升超过40%，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 方法依赖注意力图的质量，在注意力不准确的场景下可能效果有限。
仅针对多图像检索任务验证，泛化到其他多模态任务需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的注意力引导去偏框架，通过修正logit-注意力分歧来缓解多图像检索中的位置偏差。

papers.title: A Mixture Autoregressive Image Generative Model on Quadtree Regions for Gaussian Noise Removal via Variational Bayes and Gradient Methods
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the problem of image denoising for grayscale images. We propose a probabilistic image generative model that combines a quadtree region-partitioning model with a mixture autoregressive model, and propose a framework that reduces MAP (maximum a posteriori)-estimation-based denoising to the maximization of a variational lower bound. To maximize this lower bound, we develop an algorithm that alternately applies variational Bayes and gradient methods. We particularly demonstrate that the gradient-based update rule can be computed analytically without numerical computation or approximation. We carried out some experiments to verify that the proposed algorithm actually removes image noise and to identify directions for future improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于四叉树区域划分的混合自回归图像生成模型，通过变分贝叶斯和梯度方法交替优化实现灰度图像去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像去噪是经典问题，现有概率生成模型在MAP估计中计算复杂或依赖数值近似，需要更高效且解析可解的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个概率图像生成模型，使得MAP估计去噪可以转化为变分下界最大化，并通过解析梯度更新规则高效求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合四叉树区域划分模型与混合自回归模型构建生成模型，将MAP去噪转化为变分下界最大化，交替使用变分贝叶斯和梯度方法优化，其中梯度更新规则可解析计算。
contributions: 提出一种结合四叉树区域划分和混合自回归的图像生成模型用于去噪。
将MAP估计去噪转化为变分下界最大化，并设计交替变分贝叶斯与梯度方法的算法。
证明梯度更新规则可解析计算，无需数值近似。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了一些实验验证去噪效果并指出改进方向，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对灰度图像，未扩展到彩色图像。
实验规模较小，缺乏与SOTA方法的定量比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于四叉树区域划分的混合自回归图像生成模型，通过变分贝叶斯和梯度方法交替优化实现灰度图像去噪。

papers.title: The Midas Touch for Metric Depth
papers.abstract: Recent advances have markedly improved the cross-scene generalization of relative depth estimation, yet its practical applicability remains limited by the absence of metric scale, local inconsistencies, and low computational efficiency. To address these issues, we present \emph{\textbf{M}idas \textbf{T}ouch for \textbf{D}epth} (MTD), a mathematically interpretable approach that converts relative depth into metric depth using only extremely sparse 3D data. To eliminate local scale inconsistencies, it applies a segment-wise recovery strategy via sparse graph optimization, followed by a pixel-wise refinement strategy using a discontinuity-aware geodesic cost. MTD exhibits strong generalization and achieves substantial accuracy improvements over previous depth completion and depth estimation methods. Moreover, its lightweight, plug-and-play design facilitates deployment and integration on diverse downstream 3D tasks. Project page is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出MTD方法，利用极稀疏3D数据将相对深度转换为度量深度，消除局部不一致性，提升泛化性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 相对深度估计的跨场景泛化虽有进步，但缺乏度量尺度、存在局部不一致且计算效率低，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将相对深度准确、高效地转换为度量深度，同时消除局部尺度不一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MTD：先通过稀疏图优化进行分段恢复，再使用不连续感知测地代价进行像素级细化。
contributions: 提出一种数学可解释的MTD方法，仅需极稀疏3D数据即可将相对深度转换为度量深度。
通过分段恢复和像素级细化策略消除局部尺度不一致性，提升精度和泛化性。
轻量级即插即用设计，便于部署到多种下游3D任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖极稀疏3D数据，在无任何3D信息场景下可能受限。
未提及在复杂动态场景或大尺度场景中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MTD方法，利用极稀疏3D数据将相对深度转换为度量深度，消除局部不一致性，提升泛化性和效率。

papers.title: TB-AVA: Text as a Semantic Bridge for Audio-Visual Parameter Efficient Finetuning
papers.abstract: Audio-visual understanding requires effective alignment between heterogeneous modalities, yet cross-modal correspondence remains challenging when temporally aligned audio and visual signals lack clear semantic this http URL propose to use text as a semantic anchor for audio-visual representation this http URL this end, we introduce a parameter-efficient adaptation frameworkbuilt on frozen audio and visual encoders, centered on Text-Bridged Audio-Visual Adapter (TB-AVA), which enables text-mediated interaction between audio and visual streams. At the core of TB-AVA, Gated Semantic Modulation (GSM) selectively modulates feature channels based on text-inferred semantic relevance. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple benchmarks, including AVE, AVS, and AVVP, where the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating text as an effective semantic anchor for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in audio-visual learning.

analysis.tldr: 利用文本作为语义锚点，通过参数高效微调实现音频-视觉对齐，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频-视觉理解需要跨模态对齐，但时间对齐的音频和视觉信号缺乏清晰语义对应，现有方法难以有效融合。
analysis.problem: 如何利用文本作为语义桥梁，在参数高效微调框架下实现音频与视觉表征的有效对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Text-Bridged Audio-Visual Adapter (TB-AVA)，基于冻结的音频和视觉编码器，通过门控语义调制（GSM）根据文本推断的语义相关性选择性调制特征通道。
contributions: 提出以文本为语义锚点的参数高效微调框架TB-AVA，实现音频-视觉交互。
设计门控语义调制（GSM）模块，根据文本语义选择性调制特征通道。
analysis.experiments: 在AVE、AVS、AVVP等多个基准上评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 依赖文本作为锚点，可能受限于文本质量或缺失文本的场景。
仅在特定音频-视觉任务上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用文本作为语义锚点，通过参数高效微调实现音频-视觉对齐，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Dynamic Execution Commitment of Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly adopt action chunking, i.e., predicting and committing to a short horizon of consecutive low-level actions in a single forward pass, to amortize the inference cost of large-scale backbones and reduce per-step latency. However, committing these multi-step predictions to real-world execution requires balancing success rate against inference efficiency, a decision typically governed by fixed execution horizons tuned per task. Such heuristics ignore the state-dependent nature of predictive reliability, leading to brittle performance in dynamic or out-of-distribution settings. In this paper, we introduce A3, an Adaptive Action Acceptance mechanism that reframes dynamic execution commitment as a self-speculative prefix verification problem. A3 first computes a trajectory-wise consensus score of actions via group sampling, then selects a representative draft and prioritizes downstream verification. Specifically, it enforces: (1) consensus-ordered conditional invariance, which validates low-consensus actions by judging whether they remain consistent when re-decoded conditioned on high-consensus actions; and (2) prefix-closed sequential consistency, which guarantees physical rollout integrity by accepting only the longest continuous sequence of verified actions starting from the beginning. Consequently, the execution horizon emerges as the longest verifiable prefix satisfying both internal model logic and sequential execution constraints. Experiments across diverse VLA models and benchmarks demonstrate that A3 eliminates the need for manual horizon tuning while achieving a superior trade-off between execution robustness and inference throughput.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应动作接受机制A3，将VLA模型的动态执行承诺重构为自推测前缀验证问题，无需手动调参即可平衡鲁棒性与推理效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型采用固定动作分块策略，但手动调优的执行步长忽略了状态依赖的预测可靠性，导致在动态或分布外场景中性能脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖手动调参的前提下，根据状态自适应地确定VLA模型多步动作预测的可执行长度，以同时保证执行鲁棒性和推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定执行步长无法适应状态依赖的预测可靠性变化，导致在动态或分布外场景中性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出A3机制，通过组采样计算轨迹级共识分数，选择代表性草案并优先下游验证；强制执行共识排序条件不变性和前缀封闭顺序一致性，将执行步长确定为最长可验证前缀。
contributions: 将动态执行承诺形式化为自推测前缀验证问题，提出A3机制。
引入共识排序条件不变性和前缀封闭顺序一致性两个约束，确保动作验证的合理性和物理执行完整性。
实验表明A3消除了手动调参需求，并在执行鲁棒性和推理吞吐量之间取得更优权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在多种VLA模型和基准上验证，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能增加推理时的采样和验证计算开销。
对共识分数计算和验证策略的敏感性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应动作接受机制A3，将VLA模型的动态执行承诺重构为自推测前缀验证问题，无需手动调参即可平衡鲁棒性与推理效率。

papers.title: TCP-SSM: Efficient Vision State Space Models with Token-Conditioned Poles
papers.abstract: State Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as a compelling alternative to attention models for long-range vision tasks, offering input-dependent recurrence with linear complexity. However, most efficient SSM variants reduce computation cost by modifying scan routes, resolutions, or traversal patterns, while largely leaving the recurrent dynamics implicit. Consequently, the model's state-dependent memory behavior is difficult to control, particularly in compact backbones where long scan paths can exceed the effective memory horizon. We propose Token-Conditioned Poles SSM (TCP-SSM), a structured selective SSM framework that improves efficiency while making recurrence dynamics explicit and interpretable through stable poles. TCP-SSM builds each scan operator with 1) real poles that model monotone or sign-alternating decay, and 2) complex-conjugate poles that capture damped oscillatory responses. Using bounded radius and angle modulation, TCP-SSM converts shared base poles into token-dependent poles, allowing each scan step to adapt its memory behavior to the current visual token while preserving pole stability. For practical scalability, we integrate grouped pole sharing with a lightweight low-rank input pathway, yielding an efficient scan operator that preserves linear-time scan complexity. Across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection, TCP-SSM reduces SSM computation complexity up to 44% in Vision Mamba-style models while maintaining or surpassing baseline accuracy.

analysis.tldr: TCP-SSM通过可解释的稳定极点实现高效视觉状态空间模型，在保持线性复杂度的同时降低计算量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高效SSM变体主要通过修改扫描路径或分辨率来降低计算成本，但忽略了循环动态的可控性，导致紧凑骨干网络中长扫描路径可能超出有效记忆范围。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既高效又具有显式可解释循环动态的视觉状态空间模型，以在紧凑骨干网络中控制记忆行为并降低计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有SSM变体在降低计算时通常保持循环动态隐式，导致模型的状态依赖记忆行为难以控制，尤其在长扫描路径下有效记忆范围受限。
analysis.method: 提出Token-Conditioned Poles SSM (TCP-SSM)，通过实极点（建模单调或符号交替衰减）和复共轭极点（捕获阻尼振荡响应）构建显式可解释的循环动态，利用有界半径和角度调制将共享基极点转换为令牌依赖极点，并集成分组极点共享与轻量低秩输入通路以保持线性复杂度。
contributions: 提出TCP-SSM框架，通过结构化可解释极点使循环动态显式化，同时保持输入依赖的递归特性。
在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测任务上，将SSM计算复杂度降低高达44%，同时维持或超越基线精度。
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测任务上评估，与Vision Mamba风格模型对比，显示计算复杂度降低44%且精度持平或提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于视觉任务，未验证在其他模态（如语言）上的有效性。
极点调制机制可能增加超参数调优难度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TCP-SSM通过可解释的稳定极点实现高效视觉状态空间模型，在保持线性复杂度的同时降低计算量。

papers.title: When Looking Is Not Enough: Visual Attention Structure Reveals Hallucination in MLLMs
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have become a key interface for visual reasoning and grounded question answering, yet they remain vulnerable to visual hallucinations, where generated responses contradict image content or mention nonexistent objects. A central challenge is that hallucination is not always caused by a simple lack of visual attention: the model may still assign substantial attention mass to image tokens while internally drifting toward an incorrect answer. In this paper, we show that the high-frequency structure of visual attention, measured by layer-wise Laplacian energy, reveals both the layer where hallucinated preferences emerge and the layer where the ground-truth answer transiently recovers. Building on this finding, we propose LaSCD (Laplacian-Spectral Contrastive Decoding), a training-free decoding strategy that selects informative layers via Laplacian energy and remaps next-token logits in closed form. Experiments on hallucination and general multimodal benchmarks show that LaSCD consistently reduces hallucination while preserving general capabilities, highlighting its potential as a faithful decoding paradigm. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过视觉注意力高频结构（拉普拉斯能量）检测并缓解MLLM幻觉，提出无需训练的LaSCD解码策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型（MLLM）在视觉推理中易产生幻觉，且幻觉并非总因视觉注意力不足，现有方法难以定位和纠正内部错误偏好。
analysis.problem: 如何从视觉注意力结构中检测MLLM的幻觉偏好，并设计无需训练的解码策略来减少幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉注意力的高频结构（层间拉普拉斯能量）能揭示幻觉偏好出现的层以及正确答案短暂恢复的层。
analysis.method: 提出LaSCD（拉普拉斯-谱对比解码），通过拉普拉斯能量选择信息层，并以闭式形式重新映射下一token的logits。
contributions: 发现视觉注意力高频结构可揭示MLLM幻觉偏好的层位置和正确答案恢复的层。
提出无需训练的LaSCD解码策略，通过拉普拉斯能量选择层并重映射logits，减少幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在幻觉和通用多模态基准上，LaSCD一致减少幻觉同时保持通用能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需验证。
未讨论计算开销与实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过视觉注意力高频结构（拉普拉斯能量）检测并缓解MLLM幻觉，提出无需训练的LaSCD解码策略。

papers.title: ScribbleDose: Scribble-Guided Dose Prediction in Radiotherapy
papers.abstract: Anatomical structure masks are widely adopted in radiotherapy dose prediction, as they provide explicit geometric constraints that facilitate structure-dose coupling. However, conventional manual delineation of these masks requires precise annotation of structure boundaries relevant to radiotherapy, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. To address these limitations, we propose a scribble-guided dose prediction framework that relies solely on anatomical structures annotated with sparse scribbles. Specifically, we design a Scribble Completion Module (SCM) to generate dense anatomical masks by propagating sparse scribble labels to semantically similar voxels. During the propagation process, a supervoxel-based regularization is introduced to preserve geometric boundary consistency to ensure anatomical plausibility. Furthermore, we propose a Structure-Guided Dose Generation Module (SGDGM) to strengthen the correspondence between sparse structural cues and dose distribution. The completed dense masks derived from scribbles serve as structural guidance to condition dose prediction, forming a scribble-mask-dose learning pipeline under sparse annotation. Experiments on the GDP-HMM dataset demonstrate that ScribbleDose achieves competitive dose prediction performance using only sparse structural annotations. The source code and reannotated scribble annotations are publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出仅需稀疏涂鸦标注的放疗剂量预测框架，通过涂鸦补全模块生成密集解剖掩膜并引导剂量预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统放疗剂量预测依赖精确的解剖结构掩膜，但手动标注边界耗时耗力，亟需降低标注成本的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用稀疏涂鸦标注实现高精度放疗剂量预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计涂鸦补全模块（SCM）通过超体素正则化传播稀疏标签生成密集掩膜，再通过结构引导剂量生成模块（SGDGM）强化结构-剂量对应关系。
contributions: 提出首个仅需稀疏涂鸦标注的放疗剂量预测框架
设计涂鸦补全模块和结构引导剂量生成模块，实现涂鸦-掩膜-剂量学习流水线
analysis.experiments: 在GDP-HMM数据集上验证，使用稀疏结构标注取得有竞争力的剂量预测性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解剖结构类型
涂鸦标注质量可能影响性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仅需稀疏涂鸦标注的放疗剂量预测框架，通过涂鸦补全模块生成密集解剖掩膜并引导剂量预测。

papers.title: The DAWN of World-Action Interactive Models
papers.abstract: A plausible scene evolution depends on the maneuver being considered, while a good maneuver depends on how the scene may evolve. Existing World Action Models (WAMs) largely miss this reciprocity, treating world prediction and action generation as either isolated parallel branches or rigid predict-then-plan pipelines. We formalize this perspective as World-Action Interactive Models (WAIMs), and instantiate it in autonomous driving with \textbf{DAWN} (\textbf{D}enoising \textbf{A}ctions and \textbf{W}orld i\textbf{N}teractive model), a simple yet strong latent generative baseline. DAWN operates in a compact semantic latent space and couples a \emph{World Predictor} with a \emph{World-Conditioned Action Denoiser}: the predicted world hypothesis conditions action denoising, while the denoised action hypothesis is fed back to update the world prediction, so that both are recursively refined during inference. Rather than eliminating test-time world evolution altogether or rolling out the full future in pixel space, DAWN performs a short explicit latent rollout that is sufficient to support long-horizon trajectory generation in complex interactive scenes. Experiments show that DAWN achieves strong planning performance and favorable safety-related results across multiple autonomous driving benchmarks. More broadly, our results suggest that interactive world-action generation is a principled path toward truly actionable world models.

analysis.tldr: 提出世界-动作交互模型（WAIM），通过递归交互细化实现自动驾驶中的联合场景预测与动作生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAMs）将世界预测与动作生成视为孤立分支或刚性流水线，忽略了二者之间的双向交互，导致场景演化与动作决策的耦合不足。
analysis.problem: 如何建模世界预测与动作生成之间的双向交互，以提升自动驾驶中长时域轨迹生成的合理性与安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DAWN模型，在紧凑语义潜空间中耦合世界预测器与世界条件动作去噪器：预测的世界假设条件化动作去噪，去噪后的动作假设反馈更新世界预测，推理时递归细化；执行短显式潜空间展开以支持长时域轨迹生成。
contributions: 形式化世界-动作交互模型（WAIM）视角，强调世界预测与动作生成的双向交互。
提出DAWN，一个简单但强大的潜空间生成基线，通过递归交互细化实现联合预测与规划。
analysis.experiments: 在多个自动驾驶基准上，DAWN实现了强规划性能和有利的安全相关结果。
limitations: 潜空间展开长度有限，可能无法处理极长时域或极端复杂场景。
依赖紧凑语义潜空间，可能丢失像素级细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出世界-动作交互模型（WAIM），通过递归交互细化实现自动驾驶中的联合场景预测与动作生成。

papers.title: GeoR-Bench: Evaluating Geoscience Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Geoscience intelligence is expected to understand, reason about, and predict earth system changes to support human decision-making in critical domains such as disaster response, climate adaptation and environmental protection. Although current research has shown promising progress on specific geoscience tasks, such as remote sensing interpretation, geographic question-answering, existing benchmarks remain largely task-specific which failing to capture the open-ended real world geoscience problems. As a result, it remains unclear how far current AI systems are from achieving genuine geoscience intelligence. To address this gap, we present \textbf{GeoR-Bench}, a \underline{Bench}mark for evaluating \underline{Geo}science visual \underline{R}easoning through reasoning informed visual editing tasks. GeoR-Bench contains 440 curated samples spanning 6 geoscience categories and 24 task types, covering earth observation imagery and structured scientific representations such as maps and diagrams. We evaluate outputs along three dimensions, including reasoning, consistency, and quality. Benchmark results of 21 closed- and open-source multimodal models reveal that geoscience reasoning remains a critical bottleneck. The highest-performing model achieves 42.7\% overall strict accuracy, while the best open-source models only get 10.3\%. Notably, the visual consistency and image quality of the outputs frequently surpass their scientific accuracy. Ultimately, these findings indicate that current models generate superficially plausible results but fail to capture underlying earth science processes.

analysis.tldr: GeoR-Bench 通过视觉编辑任务评估多模态模型的地学推理能力，发现当前模型准确率低且缺乏科学一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地学基准多为任务特定，无法捕捉开放的真实世界地学问题，难以评估 AI 系统是否具备真正的地学智能。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面评估多模态模型地学视觉推理能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最高性能模型严格准确率仅 42.7%，开源模型仅 10.3%；输出视觉一致性和图像质量常优于科学准确性，表明模型生成表面合理但缺乏深层科学理解。
analysis.method: 构建包含 440 个样本、覆盖 6 个地学类别和 24 种任务类型的基准，通过推理驱动的视觉编辑任务评估，从推理、一致性和质量三个维度打分。
contributions: 提出 GeoR-Bench，首个通过视觉编辑任务评估地学推理的基准。
系统评估 21 个多模态模型，揭示地学推理瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在 21 个闭源和开源多模态模型上评估，最高严格准确率 42.7%，最佳开源模型 10.3%。
limitations: 样本量较小（440 个），可能不足以覆盖所有地学推理场景。
仅评估视觉编辑任务，可能无法完全反映其他推理形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoR-Bench 通过视觉编辑任务评估多模态模型的地学推理能力，发现当前模型准确率低且缺乏科学一致性。

papers.title: XWOD: A Real-World Benchmark for Object Detection under Extreme Weather Conditions
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems remain vulnerable under extreme weather. The U.S. Federal Highway Administration reports that roughly 745,000 crashes and 3,800 fatalities per year are weather-related, and recent regulatory investigations have examined failures of Level-2/3 driving systems under reduced-visibility conditions. However, datasets commonly used to evaluate weather robustness remain limited in scale, diversity, and realism. In this paper, we introduce XWOD (Extreme Weather Object Detection), a large-scale real-world traffic-object detection benchmark containing 10,010 images and 42,924 bounding boxes across seven extreme weather conditions: rain, snow, fog, haze/sand/dust, flooding, tornado, and wildfire. The dataset covers six traffic-object categories, including car, person, truck, motorcycle, bicycle, and bus. XWOD extends the weather taxonomy from one to seven conditions, and is the first to cover the emerging class of climate-amplified hazards, such as flooding, tornado, and wildfire. To evaluate the quality of our data, we train standard YOLO-family detectors on XWOD and test them zero-shot on external weather benchmarks, achieving mAP$_{50}$ scores of 63.00% on RTTS, 59.94% on DAWN, and 61.12% on WEDGE, compared with the corresponding published YOLO-based baselines of 40.37%, 32.75%, and 45.41%, respectively, representing relative improvements of 56%, 83%, and 35%. These cross-dataset results show that XWOD provides a strong source domain for learning weather-robust traffic perception. We release the dataset, splits, baseline weights, and reproducible evaluation code under a research-use license.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个覆盖7种极端天气的大规模真实交通目标检测基准XWOD，显著提升跨数据集鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 极端天气导致自动驾驶事故频发，现有天气鲁棒性数据集规模小、多样性不足且缺乏真实感，亟需大规模真实世界基准来推动研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏覆盖多种极端天气（如洪水、龙卷风、野火）的大规模真实交通目标检测数据集，现有基准无法充分评估和提升模型在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含10,010张图像和42,924个边界框的XWOD数据集，覆盖7种极端天气（雨、雪、雾、霾/沙尘、洪水、龙卷风、野火）和6类交通目标，并基于YOLO系列检测器进行零样本跨数据集评估。
contributions: 提出XWOD，首个覆盖7种极端天气（包括洪水、龙卷风、野火等气候放大灾害）的大规模真实交通目标检测基准。
在三个外部天气基准（RTTS、DAWN、WEDGE）上零样本测试，mAP50分别提升56%、83%和35%，证明XWOD作为强源域的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在XWOD上训练标准YOLO系列检测器，零样本测试于RTTS、DAWN、WEDGE，mAP50分别为63.00%、59.94%、61.12%，相比已发表基线（40.37%、32.75%、45.41%）显著提升。
limitations: 仅评估了YOLO系列检测器，其他架构（如Transformer-based）的泛化性未知。
数据集仅包含6类交通目标，可能无法覆盖所有自动驾驶相关类别。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个覆盖7种极端天气的大规模真实交通目标检测基准XWOD，显著提升跨数据集鲁棒性。

papers.title: PointGS: Semantic-Consistent Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Segmentation with 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Unsupervised point cloud segmentation is critical for embodied artificial intelligence and autonomous driving, as it mitigates the prohibitive cost of dense point-level annotations required by fully supervised methods. While integrating 2D pre-trained models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to supplement semantic information is a natural choice, this approach faces a fundamental mismatch between discrete 3D points and continuous 2D images. This mismatch leads to inevitable projection overlap and complex modality alignment, resulting in compromised semantic consistency across 2D-3D transfer. To address these limitations, this paper proposes PointGS, a simple yet effective pipeline for unsupervised 3D point cloud segmentation. PointGS leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting as a unified intermediate representation to bridge the discrete-continuous domain gap. Input sparse point clouds are first reconstructed into dense 3D Gaussian spaces via multi-view observations, filling spatial gaps and encoding occlusion relationships to eliminate projection-induced semantic conflation. Multi-view dense images are rendered from the Gaussian space, with 2D semantic masks extracted via SAM, and semantics are distilled to 3D Gaussian primitives through contrastive learning to ensure consistent semantic assignments across different views. The Gaussian space is aligned with the original point cloud via two-step registration, and point semantics are assigned through nearest-neighbor search on labeled Gaussians. Experiments demonstrate that PointGS outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods, achieving +0.9% mIoU on ScanNet-V2 and +2.8% mIoU on S3DIS.

analysis.tldr: PointGS利用3D高斯泼溅作为统一中间表示，实现无监督3D点云语义分割，缓解2D-3D模态差异导致的语义不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督点云分割对具身智能和自动驾驶至关重要，但现有方法依赖2D预训练模型（如SAM）时面临离散3D点与连续2D图像之间的投影重叠和模态对齐困难，导致语义一致性受损。
analysis.problem: 解决2D-3D语义迁移中因投影重叠和模态差异导致的语义不一致问题，实现无监督3D点云语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出离散3D点与连续2D图像之间存在根本性不匹配，导致投影重叠和复杂的模态对齐，进而损害2D-3D语义迁移的一致性。
analysis.method: 提出PointGS，以3D高斯泼溅为统一中间表示：先通过多视图观测将稀疏点云重建为密集3D高斯空间，渲染多视图密集图像并用SAM提取2D语义掩码，通过对比学习将语义蒸馏到3D高斯原语，再通过两步配准对齐高斯空间与原始点云，最后用最近邻搜索分配点语义。
contributions: 提出PointGS，一种简单有效的无监督3D点云分割流水线，利用3D高斯泼溅弥合离散-连续域差距。
通过对比学习从多视图2D语义掩码蒸馏语义到3D高斯，确保跨视图语义一致性。
在ScanNet-V2和S3DIS上超越现有无监督方法，分别提升+0.9%和+2.8% mIoU。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet-V2和S3DIS数据集上评估，PointGS在mIoU上分别超越现有无监督方法+0.9%和+2.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图观测的可用性和质量。
两步配准和最近邻搜索可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PointGS利用3D高斯泼溅作为统一中间表示，实现无监督3D点云语义分割，缓解2D-3D模态差异导致的语义不一致问题。

papers.title: LiBrA-Net: Lie-Algebraic Bilateral Affine Fields for Real-Time 4K Video Dehazing
papers.abstract: Currently, there is a gap in the field of ultra-high-definition (UHD) video dehazing due to the lack of a benchmark for evaluation. Furthermore, existing video dehazing methods cannot run on consumer-grade GPUs when processing continuous UHD sequences of 3--5 frames at a time. In this paper, we address both issues with a new benchmark and an efficient method. Our key observation is that atmospheric dehazing reduces to a per-pixel affine transform governed by the low-frequency depth field, which can be compactly encoded in bilateral grids whose prediction cost is decoupled from the output resolution. Building on this, we propose LiBrA-Net, which factorizes the spatiotemporal affine field into a spatial--color and a temporal bilateral sub-grid predicted at a fixed low resolution, fuses their coefficients in the $\mathfrak{gl}(3)$ Lie algebra under group-theoretic regularization, maps the result to invertible GL(3) transforms via a Cayley parameterization, and restores high-frequency detail through a lightweight input-guided branch. We further release UHV-4K, the first paired 4K video dehazing benchmark with depth, transmission, and optical-flow annotations on every frame. Across UHV-4K, REVIDE, and HazeWorld, LiBrA-Net sets a new state of the art among compared video dehazing methods while running native 4K at 25 FPS on a single GPU with only 6.12 M parameters. Code and data are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出首个4K视频去雾基准UHV-4K和轻量级实时去雾网络LiBrA-Net，利用李代数双线性仿射场实现25 FPS的4K去雾。
analysis.research_motivation: 超高清视频去雾领域缺乏评估基准，且现有方法无法在消费级GPU上实时处理连续UHD序列。
analysis.problem: 解决UHD视频去雾的基准缺失和实时处理效率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大气去雾可简化为由低频深度场控制的逐像素仿射变换，该变换可紧凑编码于双边网格中，其预测成本与输出分辨率解耦。
analysis.method: LiBrA-Net将时空仿射场分解为空间-颜色和时间双边子网格，在gl(3)李代数中融合系数并利用Cayley参数化映射为可逆GL(3)变换，通过轻量级输入引导分支恢复高频细节。
contributions: 提出首个带深度、透射率和光流标注的配对4K视频去雾基准UHV-4K
设计LiBrA-Net，实现6.12M参数下25 FPS的4K实时去雾，在多个基准上达到SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在UHV-4K、REVIDE和HazeWorld上评估，LiBrA-Net在视频去雾方法中达到新SOTA，且仅用6.12M参数即可在单GPU上以25 FPS处理原生4K视频。
limitations: 可能对极端浓雾场景效果有限
依赖低频深度场假设，可能不适用于深度变化剧烈的场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个4K视频去雾基准UHV-4K和轻量级实时去雾网络LiBrA-Net，利用李代数双线性仿射场实现25 FPS的4K去雾。

papers.title: Principled Design of Diffusion-based Optimizers for Inverse Problems
papers.abstract: Score-based diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art performance for inverse problems, but their practical deployment is hindered by long inference times and cumbersome hyperparameter tuning. While pretrained diffusion models can be reused across tasks without retraining, inference-time hyperparameters such as the noise schedule and posterior sampling weights typically require ad-hoc adjustment for each problem setup. We propose principled reparameterizations that induce invariances, allowing the same hyperparameters to be reused across multiple problems without re-tuning. In addition, building on the RED-diff framework, which reformulates posterior sampling as an optimization problem, we further develop the OptDiff pipeline. OptDiff provides a simplified tuning framework that facilitates the integration of convex optimization tools to accelerate inference. Experiments on image reconstruction, deblurring, and super-resolution show substantial speedups and improved image quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散优化器的原则性设计，通过重参数化实现超参数跨问题复用，并基于RED-diff框架加速逆问题求解。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题中性能优异，但推理时间长且超参数调优繁琐，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计原则性的扩散优化器，使得超参数可跨问题复用并加速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出原则性重参数化引入不变性，使超参数可复用；基于RED-diff框架开发OptDiff管道，集成凸优化工具加速推理。
contributions: 提出原则性重参数化，使噪声调度和后验采样权重等超参数可跨问题复用。
开发OptDiff管道，简化调优框架并集成凸优化工具以加速推理。
analysis.experiments: 在图像重建、去模糊和超分辨率任务上实验，显示显著加速和图像质量提升。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量。
OptDiff管道对特定凸优化工具的集成可能有限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散优化器的原则性设计，通过重参数化实现超参数跨问题复用，并基于RED-diff框架加速逆问题求解。

papers.title: PoseBridge: Bridging the Skeletonization Gap for Zero-Shot Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition (ZSSAR) is typically treated as a skeleton-text alignment problem: encode joint-coordinate sequences, align them with language, and classify unseen actions. We argue that this alignment is often too late. Skeletons are not complete action observations, but compressed outputs of human pose estimation (HPE); by the time alignment begins, human-object interactions and pose-relative visual cues may no longer be explicit. We call this upstream semantic loss. To address it, we propose PoseBridge, an HPE-aware ZSSAR framework that bridges intermediate HPE representations to skeleton-text alignment. Rather than adding an RGB action branch or object detector, PoseBridge extracts pose-anchored semantic cues from the same HPE process that produces skeletons, then transfers them through skeleton-conditioned bridging and semantic prototype adaptation. Across NTU-RGB+D 60/120, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics-200/400, PoseBridge improves ZSSAR performance under the evaluated protocols. On the Kinetics-200/400 PURLS benchmark, which contains in-the-wild videos with diverse scenes and action contexts, PoseBridge shows the clearest separation, improving the strongest compared baseline by 13.3-17.4 points across all eight splits. Our code will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: PoseBridge通过桥接人体姿态估计的中间表示，在零样本骨架动作识别中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零样本骨架动作识别（ZSSAR）方法直接将骨架序列与文本对齐，但骨架是人体姿态估计（HPE）的压缩输出，丢失了人-物交互和姿态相关的视觉线索，导致上游语义损失。
analysis.problem: 解决骨架表示中因HPE压缩导致的上游语义损失问题，提升零样本骨架动作识别的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出骨架并非完整的动作观测，而是HPE的压缩输出，在骨架-文本对齐之前，人-物交互和姿态相关的视觉线索可能已不明确，即上游语义损失。
analysis.method: 提出PoseBridge框架，从同一HPE过程中提取姿态锚定的语义线索，通过骨架条件桥接和语义原型适应，将中间HPE表示转移到骨架-文本对齐中。
contributions: 首次指出ZSSAR中因HPE压缩导致的上游语义损失问题。
提出PoseBridge框架，利用HPE中间表示桥接骨架-文本对齐，无需额外RGB分支或目标检测器。
在多个基准上取得显著性能提升，尤其在Kinetics-200/400 PURLS上提升13.3-17.4个点。
analysis.experiments: 在NTU-RGB+D 60/120、PKU-MMD和Kinetics-200/400上评估，Kinetics-200/400 PURLS上所有八个split均提升13.3-17.4个点。
limitations: 依赖HPE过程的中间表示，可能受HPE质量影响。
未在更多样化的场景或长尾动作上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PoseBridge通过桥接人体姿态估计的中间表示，在零样本骨架动作识别中显著提升性能。

papers.title: STRIDE: Training-Free Diversity Guidance via PCA-Directed Feature Perturbation in Single-Step Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Distilled one-step (T=1) or few-step (T$\leq$4) diffusion models enable real-time image generation but often exhibit reduced sample diversity compared to their multi-step counterparts. In multi-step diffusion, diversity can be introduced through schedules, trajectories, or iterative optimization; however, these mechanisms are unavailable in the few-step or single-step setting, limiting the effectiveness of existing diversity-enhancing methods. A natural alternative is to perturb intermediate features, but naive feature perturbation is often ineffective, either yielding limited diversity gains or degrading generation quality. We argue that effective diversity injection in few-step models requires perturbations that respect the model's learned feature geometry. Based on this insight, we propose STRIDE, a training-free and optimization-free method that operates in a single forward pass. STRIDE injects spatially coherent (pink) noise into intermediate transformer features, projected onto the principal components of the model's own activations, ensuring that perturbations lie on the learned feature manifold. This design enables controlled variation along meaningful directions in the representation space. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-schnell and SD3.5 Turbo across COCO, DrawBench, PartiPrompts, and GenEval show that STRIDE consistently improves diversity while maintaining strong text alignment. In particular, STRIDE reduces intra-batch similarity with minimal impact on CLIP score, and Pareto-dominates existing training-free baselines on the diversity-fidelity frontier. These results highlight that, in the absence of iterative refinement, improving diversity in few-step and one-step diffusion depends not on increasing perturbation strength, but on aligning perturbations with the model's internal representation structure.

analysis.tldr: 通过PCA引导的特征扰动，在单步扩散模型中无需训练即可提升生成多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 蒸馏后的少步扩散模型生成速度快但多样性不足，现有方法因缺乏迭代机制而效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在单步/少步扩散模型中有效提升生成多样性而不损害质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，少步模型中缺乏多步扩散的调度和迭代机制，导致多样性增强方法受限；简单特征扰动要么多样性增益有限，要么降低生成质量。
analysis.method: STRIDE：在单次前向传播中，向中间Transformer特征注入空间相干（粉红）噪声，并投影到模型自身激活的主成分上，使扰动位于学习到的特征流形内。
contributions: 提出训练无关、优化无关的STRIDE方法，通过PCA引导的特征扰动提升单步扩散模型多样性。
实验表明STRIDE在多个基准上一致改善多样性，同时保持文本对齐，且在多样性-保真度前沿上帕累托优于现有无训练基线。
analysis.experiments: 在FLUX.1-schnell和SD3.5 Turbo上，使用COCO、DrawBench、PartiPrompts和GenEval评估，显示STRIDE降低批内相似度且对CLIP分数影响小。
limitations: 仅适用于基于Transformer的扩散模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
依赖PCA投影，计算开销可能随特征维度增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过PCA引导的特征扰动，在单步扩散模型中无需训练即可提升生成多样性。

papers.title: A Mimetic Detector for Adversarial Image Perturbations
papers.abstract: Adversarial attacks fool deep image classifiers by adding tiny, almost invisible noise patterns to a clean image. The standard $\ell^\infty$-bounded attacks (FGSM, PGD, and the $\ell^\infty$ variant of Carlini--Wagner) produce high-frequency, near-random sign patterns at the pixel level: nearly invisible in $\ell^2$, but carrying disproportionate gradient energy. We exploit this with a single-shot, training-free detector using the high-order Corbino--Castillo mimetic operators from the open-source MOLE library. No retraining, no surrogate classifier, no access to the network under attack: the verdict is a property of the input alone, computed in $O(HW)$ time. We validate the detector on the standard \texttt{peppers} test image at the canonical $\ell^\infty$ budget $\varepsilon = 16/255$ and observe a clean-vs-adversarial separation that grows monotonically from $3.55\times$ at order $k=2$ to $4.19\times$ at $k=6$.

analysis.tldr: 利用高阶Corbino-Castillo拟微分算子，无需训练即可单次检测ℓ∞对抗扰动。
analysis.research_motivation: 对抗攻击通过在图像上添加微小噪声欺骗深度分类器，现有检测方法通常需要重训练或访问被攻击网络，计算成本高且依赖性强。
analysis.problem: 设计一种无需训练、无需访问目标网络的单次检测器，仅从输入图像本身判断是否包含ℓ∞对抗扰动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ℓ∞对抗扰动（如FGSM、PGD）在像素级呈现高频、近随机符号模式，在ℓ²范数下几乎不可见，但携带不成比例的梯度能量。
analysis.method: 利用开源MOLE库中的高阶Corbino-Castillo拟微分算子，对输入图像进行单次、无需训练的检测，计算复杂度为O(HW)。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、无需重训练或替代分类器的对抗图像检测方法。
利用高阶拟微分算子有效分离干净图像与ℓ∞对抗扰动图像，分离比随算子阶数单调增长。
analysis.experiments: 在标准peppers测试图像上，以ℓ∞预算ε=16/255验证，干净与对抗样本的分离比从k=2时的3.55倍增长到k=6时的4.19倍。
limitations: 仅针对ℓ∞攻击验证，对其他类型攻击（如ℓ₂、空间变换）的泛化性未知。
仅在单张测试图像上评估，缺乏大规模数据集上的统计结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用高阶Corbino-Castillo拟微分算子，无需训练即可单次检测ℓ∞对抗扰动。

papers.title: LDDR: Linear-DPP-Based Dynamic-Resolution Frame Sampling for Video MLLMs
papers.abstract: Video understanding in multimodal large language models requires selecting informative frames from long, redundant videos under limited visual-token budgets. Existing methods often rely on uniform sampling, point-wise relevance scoring, chunk-wise selection, or agentic exploration, which either miss global dependencies or introduce substantial overhead. We propose LDDR (Linear DPP-Based Dynamic Resolution), a training-free, plug-and-play, and budget-aware video frame sampling framework. LDDR performs query-aware Determinantal Point Process (DPP) frame selection in a task-conditioned feature space, achieving a 3x runtime speedup over standard DPP baselines. It further introduces a Group DPP importance metric to guide frame retention and dynamic resolution allocation, assigning more tokens to informative, non-redundant frames while downscaling or pruning less useful ones. Across four video benchmarks spanning short-, medium-, and long-range videos, LDDR consistently outperforms the next-best baselines, achieving gains of 2.5 points under budget-constrained settings and 1.6 points in high-budget scenarios. These improvements are consistently observed across multiple MLLM backbones, including both open- and closed-source models. Qualitative analysis confirms that relevant frames are selected and allocated a higher budget, facilitating improved video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于线性DPP的动态分辨率帧采样方法，在预算约束下高效选择视频关键帧并分配更多视觉Token。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频多模态大模型在有限视觉Token预算下，需要从长视频中选取信息丰富的帧，现有均匀采样或逐点相关性评分等方法要么忽略全局依赖，要么引入大量开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在视频MLLM中实现预算感知、高效且保持全局依赖的帧采样与动态分辨率分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LDDR框架，采用查询感知的线性DPP进行帧选择，并引入Group DPP重要性指标指导帧保留和动态分辨率分配。
contributions: 提出训练无关、即插即用的预算感知视频帧采样框架LDDR。
通过线性DPP实现3倍加速，并在多个视频基准上取得一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在四个视频基准（短、中、长视频）上评估，预算受限设置下提升2.5点，高预算场景提升1.6点，跨多个MLLM骨干（开源和闭源）一致有效。
limitations: 可能依赖任务条件特征空间的质量。
未在极长视频或实时场景中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于线性DPP的动态分辨率帧采样方法，在预算约束下高效选择视频关键帧并分配更多视觉Token。

papers.title: Deep Probabilistic Unfolding for Quantized Compressive Sensing
papers.abstract: We propose a deep probabilistic unfolding model to address the classical quantized compressive sensing problem that leverages an unfolding framework to enhance the reconstruction accuracy and efficiency. Unlike previous unfolding methods that apply L2 projection to measurements, we derive a closed-form, numerically stable likelihood gradient projection, which allows the model to respect the true quantization physics, turning the hard quantization constraint into a soft probabilistic guidance. Furthermore, an efficient, dual-domain Mamba module is specifically designed to dynamically capture and fuse the multi-scale local and global features, ensuring the interactions between the distant but correlated regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed method over previous works, which is capable of promoting the application of quantized compressive sensing in real life.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度概率展开模型，通过闭式似然梯度投影和双域Mamba模块提升量化压缩感知重建精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 量化压缩感知在真实场景中受限于硬量化约束，传统展开方法使用L2投影忽略量化物理过程，导致重建精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能尊重量化物理过程、高效融合多尺度特征的深度展开网络，以提升量化压缩感知的重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出深度概率展开模型：1) 推导闭式、数值稳定的似然梯度投影，将硬量化约束转化为软概率引导；2) 设计双域Mamba模块，动态捕获并融合多尺度局部和全局特征。
contributions: 提出闭式似然梯度投影，替代传统L2投影，更准确建模量化物理过程。
设计双域Mamba模块，有效融合多尺度特征，增强远距离相关区域交互。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定量化假设，泛化性需验证。
双域Mamba模块计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度概率展开模型，通过闭式似然梯度投影和双域Mamba模块提升量化压缩感知重建精度。

papers.title: Encore: Conditioning Trajectory Forecasting via Biased Ego Rehearsals
papers.abstract: Learning and representing the subjectivities of agents has become a challenging but crucial problem in the trajectory prediction task. Such subjectivities not only present specific spatial or temporal structures, but also are anisotropic for all interaction participants. Despite great efforts, it remains difficult to explicitly learn and forecast these subjectivities, let alone further modulate models' predictions through a specific ego's subjectivity. Inspired by prefactual thoughts in psychology and relevant theatrical concepts, we interpret such subjectivities in future trajectories as the continuous process from rehearsal to encore. In the rehearsal phase, the proposed ego predictor focuses on how each ego agent learns to derive and direct a set of explicitly biased rehearsal trajectories for all participants in the scene from the short-term observations. Then, these rehearsal trajectories serve as immediate controls to condition final predictions, providing direct yet distinct ego biases for the prediction network to simulate agents' various subjectivities. Experiments across datasets not only demonstrate a consistent improvement in the performance of the proposed \emph{Encore} trajectory prediction model but also provide clear interpretability regarding subjectivities as biased ego rehearsals.

analysis.tldr: 通过偏置自我排练来显式建模和调节轨迹预测中的主体性。
analysis.research_motivation: 轨迹预测中智能体的主体性（如意图、偏好）难以显式学习和建模，现有方法无法有效利用特定自我（ego）的主体性来调节预测。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地学习并利用智能体的主体性来条件化轨迹预测，使预测结果能够反映不同自我视角的偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主体性具有空间/时间结构且对各交互参与者是各向异性的，现有方法难以显式学习。
analysis.method: 提出Encore模型，包含排练阶段（ego predictor从短期观测中为所有参与者生成显式偏置的排练轨迹）和加演阶段（排练轨迹作为条件控制最终预测）。
contributions: 提出了一种通过偏置自我排练来显式建模轨迹预测中主体性的新框架。
在多个数据集上验证了模型性能的一致提升，并提供了关于主体性的可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖于短期观测的质量，对长时依赖建模不足。
排练轨迹的生成方式可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过偏置自我排练来显式建模和调节轨迹预测中的主体性。

papers.title: SpatialForge: Bootstrapping 3D-Aware Spatial Reasoning from Open-World 2D Images
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional semantic understanding, yet these models consistently struggle with spatial reasoning, often failing at fundamental geometric tasks such as depth ordering and precise coordinate grounding. Recent efforts introduce spatial supervision from scene-centric datasets (e.g., multi-view scans or indoor video), but are constrained by the limited number of underlying scenes. As a result, the scale and diversity of such data remain significantly smaller than those of web-scale 2D image collections. To address this limitation, we propose SpatialForge, a scalable data synthesis pipeline that transforms in-the-wild 2D images into spatial reasoning supervision. Our approach decomposes spatial reasoning into perception and relation, and constructs structured supervision signals covering depth, layout, and viewpoint-dependent reasoning, with automatic verification to ensure data quality. Based on this pipeline, we build SpatialForge-10M, a large-scale dataset containing 10 million spatial QA pairs. Extensive experiments across multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that training on SpatialForge-10M significantly improves the spatial reasoning ability of standard VLMs, highlighting the effectiveness of scaling 2D data for 3D-aware spatial reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 通过从开放世界2D图像中引导生成3D空间推理数据，显著提升VLM的空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在空间推理任务（如深度排序、坐标定位）上表现不佳，而基于场景中心数据集（如多视角扫描或室内视频）的空间监督方法受限于底层场景数量，数据规模和多样性远不及网络级2D图像集合。
analysis.problem: 如何从大规模开放世界2D图像中生成高质量、多样化的3D空间推理监督数据，以提升VLM的空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpatialForge数据合成流水线，将空间推理分解为感知和关系两个子任务，构建覆盖深度、布局和视角依赖推理的结构化监督信号，并引入自动验证机制保证数据质量。基于该流水线构建了包含1000万空间QA对的SpatialForge-10M数据集。
contributions: 提出SpatialForge，一种可扩展的数据合成流水线，将开放世界2D图像转化为3D空间推理监督数据。
构建SpatialForge-10M，一个包含1000万空间QA对的大规模数据集。
实验证明在SpatialForge-10M上训练能显著提升标准VLM的空间推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个空间推理基准上进行实验，结果表明训练SpatialForge-10M显著提升了VLM的空间推理能力。
limitations: 数据质量依赖自动验证机制，可能存在误判。
方法可能对特定类型的空间推理任务（如动态场景）泛化能力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过从开放世界2D图像中引导生成3D空间推理数据，显著提升VLM的空间推理能力。

papers.title: Leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models for All-in-One Image Restoration via a Mixture of Frequency Experts
papers.abstract: All-in-one image restoration seeks to recover clean images from inputs affected by diverse and unknown degradations using a unified framework. Recent methods have shown strong performance by identifying degradation characteristics to guide the restoration process. However, many of them treat degradations as discrete categories, which limits their ability to model the continuous relational structure that arises in composite degradations. To address this issue, we propose a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-guided image restoration framework that exploits multimodal embeddings as guidance for low-level restoration. Specifically, MLLM-derived features are injected into an encoder-decoder architecture through an MLLM-guided fusion block (MGFB) to enhance degradation-aware representations. In addition, we incorporate a mixture-of-frequency-experts (MoFE) module that adaptively combines frequency experts using MLLM-guided contextual cues. To further improve expert routing, we design an MLLM-guided router with a relational alignment loss that encourages routing patterns consistent with the embedding-space relationships of degraded inputs. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that the proposed method achieves strong performance across diverse restoration settings and establishes a new state of the art on the challenging CDD11 dataset, outperforming previous methods by up to 1.35 dB.

analysis.tldr: 提出MLLM引导的全能图像恢复框架，通过混合频率专家模块实现多种退化类型的统一恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全能图像恢复方法将退化视为离散类别，难以建模复合退化中的连续关系结构，限制了恢复性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的嵌入特征作为引导，实现统一框架下对多种未知退化的有效恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MLLM引导的图像恢复框架，包括MLLM引导融合块（MGFB）注入特征到编码器-解码器架构，以及混合频率专家（MoFE）模块自适应组合频率专家，并设计MLLM引导路由器与关系对齐损失优化路由。
contributions: 提出MLLM引导的全能图像恢复框架，利用多模态嵌入作为低级恢复的引导。
设计混合频率专家模块，结合MLLM引导的上下文线索自适应组合频率专家。
提出MLLM引导路由器与关系对齐损失，鼓励路由模式与退化输入的嵌入空间关系一致。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了广泛实验，在CDD11数据集上达到新SOTA，比先前方法提升高达1.35 dB。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLM的预训练质量，对未见退化泛化能力未知。
计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MLLM引导的全能图像恢复框架，通过混合频率专家模块实现多种退化类型的统一恢复。

papers.title: Instruct-ICL: Instruction-Guided In-Context Learning for Post-Disaster Damage Assessment
papers.abstract: Rapid and accurate situational awareness is essential for effective response during natural disasters, where delays in analysis can significantly hinder decision-making. Training task-specific models for post-disaster assessment is often time-consuming and computationally expensive, making such approaches impractical in time-critical scenarios. Consequently, pretrained multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative for post-disaster visual question answering (VQA), a task that aims to answer structured questions about visual scenes by jointly reasoning over images and text. While these models demonstrate strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, their responses can be sensitive to prompt formulation, which can limit their reliability in real-world disaster assessment scenarios. In this paper, we investigate whether structured reasoning strategies can improve the reliability of pretrained MLLMs for post-disaster VQA. Specifically, we explore multiple prompting paradigms in which one MLLM is used to generate task-specific instructions that serve as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) guidance for a second MLLM. These instructions are incorporated during answer generation with varying degrees of in-context learning (ICL), enabling the model to leverage both explicit reasoning guidance and contextual examples. We conduct our evaluation on the FloodNet dataset and compare these approaches against a zero-shot baseline. Our results demonstrate that integrating instruction-driven CoT reasoning consistently improves answer accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出指令引导的上下文学习（Instruct-ICL）方法，通过结构化推理策略提升预训练多模态大模型在灾后VQA任务中的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 灾后快速态势感知对决策至关重要，但训练专用模型耗时且计算成本高，而预训练MLLM对提示敏感，可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何提升预训练MLLM在灾后视觉问答中的响应准确性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用一个MLLM生成任务特定指令作为CoT引导，结合不同程度的上下文学习（ICL）指导第二个MLLM生成答案。
contributions: 提出Instruct-ICL框架，将指令驱动的CoT推理与ICL结合用于灾后VQA。
在FloodNet数据集上验证了该方法相比零样本基线能持续提升答案准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在FloodNet数据集上评估，对比零样本基线，结果显示指令驱动的CoT推理持续提升准确率。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖两个MLLM的协同，计算开销可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出指令引导的上下文学习（Instruct-ICL）方法，通过结构化推理策略提升预训练多模态大模型在灾后VQA任务中的可靠性。

papers.title: Beyond Masks: The Case for Medical Image Parsing
papers.abstract: Medical imaging research has spent a decade getting very good at one thing: producing per-voxel masks. Masks tell us size, volume, and location, and a decade of clinical infrastructure rests on those outputs. Yet the report a radiologist writes contains almost nothing a mask can express. We argue that medical imaging research should adopt medical image parsing as its central output: a structured representation in which entities, attributes, and relationships are emitted together and mutually consistent. Entities are the named structures and findings, present or absent. Attributes describe those entities, capturing things like margin regularity, enhancement pattern, or severity grade. Relationships connect them, naming where one structure sits relative to another, what abuts what, and what has changed since the prior scan. A good parse satisfies three properties, in order: (1) decision (the parse names the right things in the current image), (2) reconstruction (its content is rich enough to regenerate that image), and (3) prediction (its content is rich enough to forecast how the patient state will evolve). Quantitative measurements are derived from this content; they are not predicted alongside it. To test how close the field is to producing such an output, we audit eleven representative systems against the three parsing primitives plus closure. None emits a well-formed parse. Entities are largely solved. Attributes, relationships, and closure remain near-empty. The path forward is not a new architecture. It is a commitment to a richer output, and to training signals that reward it. Segmentation taught models to measure. Parsing asks them to explain.

analysis.tldr: 呼吁医学影像研究从分割掩码转向结构化图像解析，以生成包含实体、属性和关系的统一输出。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前医学影像研究主要输出逐体素掩码，但放射科报告几乎不包含掩码能表达的内容，存在输出与临床需求之间的鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 医学影像研究需要一种更丰富的输出表示，即医学图像解析，以生成包含实体、属性和关系的结构化、自洽表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审计11个代表性系统发现，实体基本解决，但属性、关系和闭合性几乎空白，没有系统能生成格式良好的解析。
analysis.method: 提出医学图像解析作为核心输出，定义三个属性：决策、重建和预测，并强调定量测量应从解析内容中推导而非并行预测。
contributions: 提出医学图像解析作为医学影像研究的新输出范式，包含实体、属性和关系。
定义解析的三个属性：决策、重建和预测，并审计现有系统揭示差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供具体实验验证或新架构。
可能缺乏对现有分割基础设施的兼容性考虑。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 呼吁医学影像研究从分割掩码转向结构化图像解析，以生成包含实体、属性和关系的统一输出。

papers.title: ZeroIDIR: Zero-Reference Illumination Degradation Image Restoration with Perturbed Consistency Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose a zero-reference diffusion-based framework, named ZeroIDIR, for illumination degradation image restoration, which decouples the restoration process into adaptive illumination correction and diffusion-based reconstruction while being trained solely on low-quality degraded images. Specifically, we design an adaptive gamma correction module that performs spatially varying exposure correction to generate illumination-corrected only representations to mitigate exposure bias and serve as reliable inputs for subsequent diffusion processes, where a histogram-guided illumination correction loss is introduced to regularize the corrected illumination distribution toward that of natural scenes. Subsequently, the illumination-corrected image is treated as an intermediate noisy state for the proposed perturbed consistency diffusion model to reconstruct details and suppress noise. Moreover, a perturbed diffusion consistency loss is proposed to constrain the forward diffusion trajectory of the final restored image to remain consistent with the perturbed state, thus improving restoration fidelity and stability in the absence of supervision. Extensive experiments on publicly available benchmarks show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised competitors and is comparable to supervised methods while being more generalizable to various scenes. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出零参考扩散框架ZeroIDIR，仅用低质图像训练实现光照退化恢复，性能超越无监督方法，接近有监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有光照退化恢复方法依赖成对数据或参考图像，泛化性差，且监督方法难以获取真实配对数据。
analysis.problem: 在无参考图像和无配对数据条件下，实现光照退化图像的恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计自适应伽马校正模块进行空间变化曝光校正，结合直方图引导损失；将校正图像作为中间噪声状态，通过扰动一致性扩散模型重建细节并抑制噪声，使用扰动扩散一致性损失约束前向轨迹。
contributions: 提出零参考扩散框架ZeroIDIR，仅用低质图像训练。
设计自适应伽马校正模块和直方图引导损失实现无监督光照校正。
提出扰动一致性扩散模型和损失函数，提升无监督恢复的保真度和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上实验，方法优于最先进的无监督方法，与有监督方法相当，且泛化性更强。
limitations: 可能对极端光照退化场景效果有限。
扩散模型推理速度可能较慢。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零参考扩散框架ZeroIDIR，仅用低质图像训练实现光照退化恢复，性能超越无监督方法，接近有监督方法。

papers.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Classification using Downscaling Algorithms and Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is an art and science of recording and classifying the retinal images of a diabetic patient. DR classification deals with classifying retinal fundus image into five stages on the basis of severity of diabetes. One of the major issue faced while dealing with DR classification problem is the large and varying size of images. In this paper we propose and explore the use of several downscaling algorithms before feeding the image data to a Deep Learning Network for classification. For improving training and testing; we amalgamate two datasets: Kaggle and Indian Diabetic Retinopathy Image Dataset. Our experiments have been performed on a novel Multi Channel Inception V3 architecture with a unique self crafted preprocessing phase. We report results of proposed approach using accuracy, specificity and sensitivity, which outperform the previous state of the art methods. Index Terms: Diabetic Retinopathy, Downscaling Algorithms, Multichannel CNN Architecture, Deep Learning

analysis.tldr: 提出使用下采样算法预处理眼底图像，结合多通道Inception V3架构提升糖尿病视网膜病变分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变分类中图像尺寸大且不一，影响深度学习模型训练效率与性能。
analysis.problem: 如何通过下采样算法预处理图像，提高DR分类的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 融合Kaggle和印度糖尿病视网膜病变数据集，设计独特预处理阶段，采用多通道Inception V3架构，结合下采样算法进行图像缩放。
contributions: 探索多种下采样算法在DR分类中的应用效果
提出多通道Inception V3架构并融合两个数据集，实现优于现有方法的分类性能
analysis.experiments: 在Kaggle和印度糖尿病视网膜病变图像数据集上实验，报告了准确率、特异性和灵敏度，结果优于先前最优方法。
limitations: 未提及下采样算法对细微病变特征的可能损失
数据集融合可能引入域偏移问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出使用下采样算法预处理眼底图像，结合多通道Inception V3架构提升糖尿病视网膜病变分类性能。

papers.title: PD-4DGS:Progressive Decomposition of 4D Gaussian Splatting for Bandwidth-Adaptive Dynamic Scene Streaming
papers.abstract: 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) enables high-quality dynamic novel view synthesis, yet current models remain monolithic bitstreams that clients must download in full before any frame can be rendered, causing black-screen waits of tens to hundreds of seconds on mobile bandwidth and leaving 4DGS incompatible with modern adaptive-bitrate delivery. Progressive 3DGS compression alleviates this for static scenes, but it acts only on spatial anchors and cannot partition the temporal deformation networks that dominate dynamic-scene size. We present PD-4DGS, the first framework for progressive compression and on-demand transmission of 4DGS. Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition (HDD) externalises the coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy already latent in 4DGS into three independently transmittable layers -- a static scaffold, a global deformation, and a local refinement -- so that any prefix of the bitstream is already renderable, turning a single training run into a scalable, DASH/HLS-compatible bitstream. A Gaussian-entropy attribute rate-distortion loss together with a temporal mask consistency regulariser shrink the base layer while suppressing low-bitrate flicker; a capacity-weighted rollout schedule, gated online by a learnt activation rate rho, then prevents deformation-network under-training without any per-scene hyperparameter. On the Dycheck iPhone benchmark, PD-4DGS cuts the streamed bitstream by >60% at matched rendering fidelity and reduces first-frame latency from 73--930 s to ~1.7 s on a 2 Mbps link, uniquely enabling true on-demand progressive streaming for 4DGS.

analysis.tldr: PD-4DGS 通过渐进式分解 4D 高斯泼溅，实现带宽自适应的动态场景流式传输，首帧延迟从 73-930 秒降至约 1.7 秒。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 4DGS 模型是整体比特流，客户端必须完整下载后才能渲染，导致在移动带宽下出现数十至数百秒的黑屏等待，且无法与现代自适应比特率传输兼容。
analysis.problem: 如何实现 4DGS 的渐进式压缩和按需传输，使得比特流的任意前缀即可渲染，并支持带宽自适应流式传输。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 渐进式 3DGS 压缩仅作用于空间锚点，无法分割主导动态场景大小的时域形变网络。
analysis.method: 提出层次形变分解（HDD），将 4DGS 中隐含的由粗到细运动层次外部化为三个独立可传输层（静态骨架、全局形变、局部细化），结合高斯熵属性率失真损失和时域掩码一致性正则化，以及容量加权 rollout 调度。
contributions: 首个 4DGS 渐进式压缩与按需传输框架，支持 DASH/HLS 兼容的流式传输。
层次形变分解（HDD）将运动层次分解为三个独立层，实现任意前缀可渲染。
高斯熵率失真损失和时域掩码一致性正则化减小基础层并抑制低比特率闪烁。
容量加权 rollout 调度避免形变网络欠训练，无需逐场景超参数。
analysis.experiments: 在 Dycheck iPhone 基准上，PD-4DGS 在匹配渲染保真度下将流式比特流减少超过 60%，在 2 Mbps 链路上将首帧延迟从 73-930 秒降至约 1.7 秒。
limitations: 可能对极端动态场景的分解效果有限。
需要进一步验证在不同网络条件下的自适应性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PD-4DGS 通过渐进式分解 4D 高斯泼溅，实现带宽自适应的动态场景流式传输，首帧延迟从 73-930 秒降至约 1.7 秒。

papers.title: VidSplat: Gaussian Splatting Reconstruction with Geometry-Guided Video Diffusion Priors
papers.abstract: Gaussian Splatting has achieved remarkable progress in multi-view surface reconstruction, yet it exhibits notable degradation when only few views are available. Although recent efforts alleviate this issue by enhancing multi-view consistency to produce plausible surfaces, they struggle to infer unseen, occluded, or weakly constrained regions beyond the input coverage. To address this limitation, we present VidSplat, a training-free generative reconstruction framework that leverages powerful video diffusion priors to iteratively synthesize novel views that compensate for missing input coverage, and thereby recover complete 3D scenes from sparse inputs. Specifically, we tackle two key challenges that enable the effective integration of generation and reconstruction. First, for 3D consistent generation, we elaborate a training-free, stage-wise denoising strategy that adaptively guides the denoising direction toward the underlying geometry using the rendered RGB and mask images. Second, to enhance the reconstruction, we develop an iterative mechanism that samples camera trajectories, explores unobserved regions, synthesizes novel views, and supplements training through confidence weighted refinement. VidSplat performs robustly to sparse input and even a single image. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate our superior performance in sparse-view scene reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: VidSplat利用视频扩散先验，通过无训练迭代生成新视角，实现稀疏输入下的高质量3D场景重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 高斯泼溅在多视角表面重建中表现优异，但在仅有少量视角时性能显著下降，现有方法难以推断输入覆盖范围之外的不可见、遮挡或弱约束区域。
analysis.problem: 从稀疏输入（如少量视角甚至单张图像）中恢复完整的3D场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VidSplat，一个无训练的生成式重建框架，利用视频扩散先验迭代合成新视角以补偿缺失的输入覆盖。具体包括：1）无训练的分阶段去噪策略，利用渲染的RGB和掩码图像自适应引导去噪方向朝向底层几何；2）迭代机制，采样相机轨迹、探索未观测区域、合成新视角并通过置信度加权细化补充训练。
contributions: 提出VidSplat，首个将视频扩散先验与高斯泼溅结合的无训练生成式重建框架，实现稀疏输入下的完整3D场景重建。
设计无训练的分阶段去噪策略，确保生成的新视角与底层几何一致。
开发迭代探索与补充机制，通过置信度加权细化逐步提升重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的基准上进行了大量实验，结果表明在稀疏视角场景重建中性能优越。
limitations: 依赖视频扩散模型的质量和多样性，可能受限于预训练模型的泛化能力。
迭代过程可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VidSplat利用视频扩散先验，通过无训练迭代生成新视角，实现稀疏输入下的高质量3D场景重建。

papers.title: JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction
papers.abstract: Stochastic Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) using generative modeling has emerged as a significant area of research. Although state-of-the-art models excel in optimizing the accuracy of individual agents, they often struggle to generate predictions that are collectively compliant, leading to output trajectories marred by social collisions and environmental violations, thus rendering them impractical for real-world applications. To bridge this gap, we present JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction, an innovative multi-stage framework that ensures scene-level plausibility. JACoP incorporates an Anchor-Based Agent-Centric Profiler for effective initial compliance filtering and employs a Markov Random Field (MRF) based aligner to formalize the joint selection for scene predictions. By representing inter-agent spatial and social costs as MRF energy potentials, we successfully infer and sample from the joint trajectory distribution, achieving prediction with optimal scene compliance. Comprehensive experiments show that JACoP not only achieves competitive accuracy, but also sets a new standard in reducing both environmental violations and social collisions, thereby confirming its ability to produce collectively feasible and practically applicable trajectory predictions.

analysis.tldr: JACoP通过多阶段框架联合对齐多智能体轨迹预测，显著减少社会碰撞和环境违规。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有随机人类轨迹预测模型虽优化个体精度，但生成轨迹常出现社会碰撞和环境违规，缺乏场景级合理性，难以实际应用。
analysis.problem: 多智能体轨迹预测中个体精度高但集体合规性差，导致输出轨迹不切实际。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有模型在优化个体精度时，忽略了智能体间的空间和社会交互，导致预测轨迹存在社会碰撞和环境违规。
analysis.method: 提出JACoP多阶段框架：首先使用基于锚点的智能体中心分析器进行初始合规过滤，然后采用马尔可夫随机场对齐器，将智能体间空间和社会成本表示为MRF能量势，联合推断并采样场景级轨迹分布。
contributions: 提出JACoP框架，实现多智能体轨迹预测的联合对齐，确保场景级合理性。
引入Anchor-Based Agent-Centric Profiler和MRF-based aligner，有效减少社会碰撞和环境违规。
analysis.experiments: 综合实验表明，JACoP在保持竞争性精度的同时，在减少环境违规和社会碰撞方面设立了新标准。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量锚点设计，泛化性需验证。
MRF能量势的设计可能针对特定场景，迁移性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JACoP通过多阶段框架联合对齐多智能体轨迹预测，显著减少社会碰撞和环境违规。

papers.title: HamBR: Active Decision Boundary Restoration Based on Hamiltonian Dynamics for Learning with Noisy Labels
papers.abstract: In large-scale visual recognition and data mining tasks, the presence of noisy labels severely undermines the generalization capability of deep neural networks (DNNs). Prevalent sample selection methods rely primarily on training loss or prediction confidence for passive screening. However, within a feature space degraded by noise, decision boundaries undergo systematic boundary collapse. This phenomenon hinders the ability of the model to distinguish between hard clean samples and noisy samples at the decision margins, thereby creating a significant performance bottleneck. This study is the first to emphasize the pivotal importance of active boundary restoration for noise-robust learning. We propose HamBR, a novel paradigm based on Hamiltonian dynamics. The core approach leverages the Spherical Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (Spherical HMC) mechanism to actively probe inter-class ambiguous regions within the representation space and synthesize high-quality virtual outliers. By imposing explicit repulsion constraints via energy-based modeling, these synthesized samples establish robust energy barriers at the decision boundaries. This mechanism forces real samples to move from dispersed overlapping regions toward their respective class centers, thereby restoring the discriminative sharpness of the decision boundaries. HamBR demonstrates exceptional versatility and can be integrated as a plug-and-play defense module into existing semi-supervised noisy label learning frameworks.
