Empirical evaluations show that the proposed paradigm significantly enhances the discriminative accuracy of hard boundary samples, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on CIFAR-10/100 and real-world noise benchmarks. Furthermore, it exhibits superior convergence efficiency and reliable robustness, while improving significantly the capability of the model for Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于哈密顿动力学的主动决策边界恢复方法，用于噪声标签学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 噪声标签严重损害深度神经网络的泛化能力，现有样本选择方法依赖被动筛选，在退化特征空间中决策边界坍塌，难以区分难干净样本和噪声样本。
analysis.problem: 解决噪声标签学习中决策边界坍塌导致的难样本区分瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在噪声退化的特征空间中，决策边界发生系统性坍塌，模型无法有效区分边界附近的难干净样本和噪声样本。
analysis.method: 利用球面哈密顿蒙特卡洛机制主动探测类间模糊区域并合成高质量虚拟异常点，通过能量模型施加显式排斥约束，建立鲁棒能量屏障，迫使真实样本向类中心移动，恢复决策边界的判别锐度。
contributions: 首次强调主动边界恢复对噪声鲁棒学习的关键重要性。
提出基于哈密顿动力学的HamBR范式，可作为即插即用模块集成到现有半监督噪声标签学习框架。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10/100和真实噪声基准上达到SOTA性能，显著提升边界样本判别精度、收敛效率和鲁棒性，并改善OOD检测能力。
limitations: 可能依赖Spherical HMC的采样效率。
在极端噪声比例下的表现未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于哈密顿动力学的主动决策边界恢复方法，用于噪声标签学习。

papers.title: Dynamic Full-body Motion Agent with Object Interaction via Blending Pre-trained Modular Controllers
papers.abstract: Generating physically plausible dynamic motions of human-object interaction (HOI) remains challenging, mainly due to existing HOI datasets limited to static interactions, and pretrained agents capable of either dynamic full-body motions without objects or static HOI motions. Recent works such as InsActor and CLoSD generate HOI motions in planning and execution stages, are yet limited to either static or short-term contacts e.g. striking. In this work, we propose a framework that fulfills dynamic and long-term interaction motions such as running while holding a table, by combining pretrained motion priors and imitation agents in planning and execution stages. In the planning stage, we augment HOI datasets with dynamic priors from a pretrained human motion diffusion model, followed by object trajectory generation. This plans dynamic HOI sequences. In the execution stage, a composer network blends actions of pretrained imitation agents specialized either for dynamic human motions or static HOI motions, enabling spatio-temporal composition of their complementary skills. Our method over relevant prior-arts consistently improves success rates while maintaining interaction for dynamic HOI tasks. Furthermore, blending pretrained experts with our composer achieves competitive performance in significantly reduced training time. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our augmentation and composer blending.

analysis.tldr: 通过融合预训练模块化控制器，实现动态全身人体-物体交互运动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HOI数据集局限于静态交互，预训练智能体要么能生成动态全身运动但不涉及物体，要么只能处理静态HOI运动，缺乏动态长时交互能力。
analysis.problem: 如何生成物理合理的动态长时人体-物体交互运动（如跑步时举着桌子）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法如InsActor和CLoSD仅能处理静态或短时接触（如击打），无法实现动态长时交互。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：规划阶段利用预训练人体运动扩散模型增强HOI数据集并生成物体轨迹；执行阶段通过组合器网络混合预训练模仿智能体的动作（分别擅长动态人体运动或静态HOI运动），实现时空组合。
contributions: 提出动态长时HOI运动生成框架，结合预训练运动先验和模仿智能体。
通过组合器网络混合预训练专家，实现技能互补，提升成功率并减少训练时间。
analysis.experiments: 在动态HOI任务上，方法相比相关先验方法持续提高成功率，同时保持交互。消融实验验证了数据增强和组合器混合的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的质量和多样性。
组合器网络可能无法处理极端复杂的交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过融合预训练模块化控制器，实现动态全身人体-物体交互运动生成。

papers.title: 3D-Belief: Embodied Belief Inference via Generative 3D World Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in visual generative models have highlighted the promise of learning generative world models. However, most existing approaches frame world modeling as novel-view synthesis or future-frame prediction, emphasizing visual realism rather than the structured uncertainty required by embodied agents acting under partial observability. In this work, we propose a different perspective: world modeling as embodied belief inference in 3D space. From this view, a world model should not merely render what may be seen, but maintain and update an agent's belief about the unobserved 3D world as new observations are acquired. We identify several key capabilities for such models, including spatially consistent scene memory, multi-hypothesis belief sampling, sequential belief updating, and semantically informed prediction of unseen regions. We instantiate these ideas in 3D-Belief, a generative 3D world model that infers explicit, actionable 3D beliefs from partial observations and updates them online over time. Unlike prior visual prediction models, 3D-Belief represents uncertainty directly in 3D, enabling embodied agents to imagine plausible scene completions and reason over partially observed environments. We evaluate 3D-Belief on 2D visual quality for scene memory and unobserved-scene imagination, object- and scene-level 3D imagination using our proposed 3D-CORE benchmark, and challenging object navigation tasks in both simulation and the real world. Experiments show that 3D-Belief improves 2D and 3D imagination quality and downstream embodied task performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出3D-Belief，一种生成式3D世界模型，用于具身智能体的信念推断，在3D空间中维护和更新对未观测世界的信念。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成模型将世界建模视为新视角合成或未来帧预测，强调视觉真实感而非部分可观测环境下具身智能体所需的结构化不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够维护和更新智能体关于未观测3D世界的信念，并支持多假设采样、顺序信念更新和语义感知预测的生成式世界模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出3D-Belief，一种生成式3D世界模型，从部分观测推断显式、可操作的3D信念，并随时间在线更新。
contributions: 提出将世界建模视为具身信念推断的新视角，并识别关键能力：空间一致场景记忆、多假设信念采样、顺序信念更新、语义感知未观测区域预测。
实现3D-Belief模型，在2D视觉质量、3D想象（基于3D-CORE基准）和具身物体导航任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在2D视觉质量、3D想象（使用提出的3D-CORE基准）以及仿真和真实世界的物体导航任务上评估，结果显示3D-Belief在2D和3D想象质量及下游具身任务性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D训练数据，泛化到新场景有限。
在线信念更新的计算效率可能成为实时应用的瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3D-Belief，一种生成式3D世界模型，用于具身智能体的信念推断，在3D空间中维护和更新对未观测世界的信念。

papers.title: PresentAgent-2: Towards Generalist Multimodal Presentation Agents
papers.abstract: Presentation generation is moving beyond static slide creation toward end-to-end presentation video generation with research grounding, multimodal media, and interactive delivery. We introduce PresentAgent-2, an agentic framework for generating presentation videos from user queries. Given an open-ended user query and a selected presentation mode, PresentAgent-2 first summarizes the query into a focused topic and performs deep research over presentation-friendly sources to collect multimodal resources, including relevant text, images, GIFs, and videos. It then constructs presentation slides, generates mode-specific scripts, and composes slides, audio, and dynamic media into a complete presentation video. PresentAgent-2 supports three independent presentation modes within a unified framework: Single Presentation, which generates a single-speaker narrated presentation video; Discussion, which creates a multi-speaker presentation with structured speaker roles, such as for asking guiding questions, explaining concepts, clarifying details, and summarizing key points; and Interaction, which independently supports answering audience questions grounded in the generated slides, scripts, retrieved evidence, and presentation context. To evaluate these capabilities, we build a multimodal presentation benchmark covering single presentation, discussion, and interaction scenarios, with task-specific evaluation criteria for content quality, media relevance, dynamic media use, dialogue naturalness, and interaction grounding. Overall, PresentAgent-2 extends presentation generation from document-dependent slide creation to query-driven, research-grounded presentation video generation with multimodal media, dialogue, and interaction. Code: this https URL . Website: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: PresentAgent-2 是一个从用户查询生成带研究支撑、多模态媒体和交互式演讲视频的通用智能体框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有演示生成局限于静态幻灯片创建，缺乏端到端的视频生成、研究支撑、多模态媒体和交互能力，无法满足用户从开放查询到完整演讲视频的自动化需求。
analysis.problem: 如何从用户开放查询出发，自动进行深度研究、收集多模态资源、生成幻灯片和脚本，并合成带音频和动态媒体的完整演讲视频，同时支持单人、多人讨论和交互问答三种模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个智能体框架，包含研究模块（收集文本、图像、GIF、视频）、幻灯片构建、模式特定脚本生成、以及音视频合成；统一支持单人演讲、多人讨论和交互问答三种模式。

papers.title: Lite3R: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Efficient Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Transformer-based 3D reconstruction has emerged as a powerful paradigm for recovering geometry and appearance from multi-view observations, offering strong performance across challenging visual conditions. As these models scale to larger backbones and higher-resolution inputs, improving their efficiency becomes increasingly important for practical deployment. However, modern 3D transformer pipelines face two coupled challenges: dense multi-view attention creates substantial token-mixing overhead, and low-precision execution can destabilize geometry-sensitive representations and degrade depth, pose, and 3D consistency. To address the first challenge, we propose Lite3R, a model-agnostic teacher-student framework that replaces dense attention with Sparse Linear Attention to preserve important geometric interactions while reducing attention cost. To address the second challenge, we introduce a parameter-efficient FP8-aware quantization-aware training (FP8-aware QAT) strategy with partial attention distillation, which freezes the vast majority of pretrained backbone parameters and trains only lightweight linear-branch projection layers, enabling stable low-precision deployment while retaining pretrained geometric priors. We further evaluate Lite3R on two representative backbones, VGGT and DA3-Large, over BlendedMVS and DTU64, showing that it substantially reduces latency (1.7-2.0x) and memory usage (1.9-2.4x) while preserving competitive reconstruction quality overall. These results demonstrate that Lite3R provides an effective algorithm-system co-design approach for practical transformer-based 3D reconstruction. Code: this https URL . Website: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: Lite3R 提出模型无关的教师-学生框架，用稀疏线性注意力和 FP8 量化感知训练加速 Transformer 3D 重建。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer 3D 重建模型随骨干网络增大和输入分辨率提高，计算开销和内存占用剧增，低精度部署又易破坏几何敏感表征，亟需高效部署方案。
analysis.problem: 解决 Transformer 3D 重建中密集多视图注意力带来的高计算开销以及低精度执行导致的几何表征不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 密集多视图注意力产生大量 token 混合开销；低精度执行会破坏深度、位姿和 3D 一致性等几何敏感表征。
analysis.method: 提出模型无关的教师-学生框架，用稀疏线性注意力替换密集注意力；引入参数高效的 FP8 量化感知训练（FP8-aware QAT）和部分注意力蒸馏，冻结预训练骨干参数，仅训练轻量线性分支投影层。
contributions: 提出 Lite3R，一个模型无关的教师-学生框架，通过稀疏线性注意力降低注意力成本。
提出 FP8 量化感知训练策略，结合部分注意力蒸馏，实现稳定低精度部署并保留几何先验。
在 VGGT 和 DA3-Large 骨干上验证，延迟降低 1.7-2.0 倍，内存降低 1.9-2.4 倍，重建质量保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在 BlendedMVS 和 DTU64 数据集上，使用 VGGT 和 DA3-Large 骨干评估，显示延迟和内存显著降低，重建质量总体保持竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅在特定骨干和数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
稀疏线性注意力可能在某些极端场景下丢失关键几何交互。

papers.title: Quantifying Rodda and Graham Gait Classification from 3D Makerless Kinematics derived from a Single-view Video in a Heterogeneous Pediatric Clinical Cohort
papers.abstract: Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a neurological disorder of movement and the most common cause of lifelong physical disability in childhood. Approximately 75% of children with CP are ambulatory, and accurate gait assessment is central to preserving walking function, which deteriorates by mid-adulthood in a quarter to half of adults with CP. The Rodda and Graham classification system quantifies sagittal-plane gait deviations using ankle and knee z-scores derived from 3D Instrumented Gait Analysis (3D-IGA), but 3D-IGA is expensive and limited to specialized centers, while observational assessment shows only moderate inter-rater agreement. We developed a markerless gait analysis pipeline that quantifies Rodda and Graham knee and ankle z-scores directly from single-view clinical gait videos. Across 1,058 bilateral limb samples from 529 trials of 152 children (88 male, 63 female; age 12.1 $\pm$ 4.0 years; 60 distinct primary diagnoses, cerebral palsy the most common at $n=54$), the sagittal-view model achieved $R^2 = 0.80 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.89 \pm 0.02$ for knee z-scores and $R^2 = 0.57 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.72 \pm 0.02$ for ankle z-scores against 3D-IGA. Binary screening for excess knee flexion achieves AUROC $= 0.88$, correctly identifying 83% of affected children, and applying Rodda and Graham rules yields $43 \pm 1$% 7-class accuracy with macro-AUROC $= 0.78 \pm 0.01$, ankle prediction error remaining the primary bottleneck. Beyond cross-sectional screening, continuous z-scores support longitudinal trajectory tracking across visits, providing a quantitative substrate for monitoring disease progression and treatment response unavailable from observational scales. These results demonstrate the feasibility of video-based z-score estimation, excess-flexion screening, and longitudinal trajectory tracking as a path toward scalable, objective gait assessment in low-resource clinical settings.

analysis.tldr: 从单视角视频中提取3D无标记运动学数据，量化脑瘫患儿Rodda & Graham步态分类，实现可扩展的客观步态评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑瘫是儿童期最常见的终身运动障碍，约75%患儿可行走，但步态评估依赖昂贵且受限的3D仪器步态分析（3D-IGA），而观察性评估信度中等，亟需低成本、可扩展的客观评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从单视角临床视频中直接量化Rodda & Graham步态分类所需的膝关节和踝关节z分数，以替代昂贵的3D-IGA。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发无标记步态分析流程，从单视角视频中提取3D运动学数据，计算膝关节和踝关节z分数，并应用Rodda & Graham规则进行7类步态分类。
contributions: 首次从单视角视频中量化Rodda & Graham膝关节和踝关节z分数，并在大规模儿科临床队列中验证。
展示了视频基z分数估计、过度屈曲筛查和纵向轨迹追踪的可行性，为低资源临床环境提供可扩展的客观步态评估路径。
analysis.experiments: 在152名儿童（529次试验，1058个双侧肢体样本）中，与3D-IGA对比：膝关节z分数R²=0.80，CCC=0.89；踝关节z分数R²=0.57，CCC=0.72；过度屈曲筛查AUROC=0.88；7类分类准确率43±1%，宏AUROC=0.78±0.01。
limitations: 踝关节预测误差是主要瓶颈，导致7类分类准确率较低。
单视角视频可能受遮挡或视角限制影响精度。

papers.title: Vision2Code: A Multi-Domain Benchmark for Evaluating Image-to-Code Generation
papers.abstract: Image-to-code generation tests whether a vision-language model (VLM) can recover the structure of an image enough to express it as executable code. Existing benchmarks either focus on narrow visual domains, depend on paired executable reference code, or rely on generic rubrics that miss domain-specific reconstruction errors. We introduce Vision2Code, a reference-code-free benchmark and evaluation framework for multi-domain image-to-code generation. Vision2Code contains 2,169 test examples from 15 source datasets that span charts and plots, geometry, graphs, scientific imagery, documents, and 3D spatial scenes. Models generate executable programs, which we render and score against the source image using a VLM rater with dataset-specific rubrics and deterministic guardrails for severe semantic failures. We report render-success diagnostics that separate code execution failures from reconstruction quality. Human validation shows that this evaluation protocol aligns better with human judgments than either a generic visual rubric or embedding-similarity baselines. Across nine open-weight and proprietary models, we find that image-to-code performance is domain-dependent: leading models perform well on regular chart- and graph-like visuals but remain weak on spatial scenes, chemistry, documents, and circuit-style diagrams. Finally, we show that evaluator-filtered model outputs can serve as training data to improve image-to-code capability, with Qwen3.5-9B improving from 1.60 to 1.86 on the benchmark without paired source programs. Vision2Code provides a reproducible testbed for measuring, diagnosing, and improving image-to-code generation. Our code and data are publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出多领域图像到代码生成基准 Vision2Code，无需参考代码，通过 VLM 评分器评估，发现模型性能依赖领域。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到代码生成基准局限于窄领域、依赖配对参考代码或通用评分标准，无法捕捉领域特定的重建错误，缺乏可复现的评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个无需参考代码、覆盖多领域、能准确评估图像到代码生成质量的基准和评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能高度依赖领域：在规则图表和图形上表现好，但在空间场景、化学、文档和电路图等弱。
analysis.method: 构建包含 2,169 个测试样本、覆盖 15 个源数据集的基准；使用 VLM 评分器结合领域特定评分标准和确定性护栏评估生成代码的渲染结果。
contributions: 提出 Vision2Code，首个无需参考代码的多领域图像到代码生成基准。
设计基于 VLM 评分器和领域特定标准的评估框架，与人类判断更一致。
发现模型性能的领域依赖性，并展示评估器过滤的输出可用于提升模型能力。
analysis.experiments: 在 9 个开源和闭源模型上评估，Qwen3.5-9B 通过过滤训练数据从 1.60 提升至 1.86。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有视觉领域。
VLM 评分器可能仍存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多领域图像到代码生成基准 Vision2Code，无需参考代码，通过 VLM 评分器评估，发现模型性能依赖领域。

papers.title: CheXTemporal: A Dataset for Temporally-Grounded Reasoning in Chest Radiography
papers.abstract: Chest radiograph interpretation requires temporal reasoning over prior and current studies, yet most vision-language models are trained on static image-report pairs and lack explicit supervision for modeling longitudinal change. We introduce CheXTemporal, a dataset for temporally grounded reasoning in chest radiography consisting of paired prior-current chest X-rays (CXR) with finding-level temporal and spatial annotations. The dataset includes a five-class progression taxonomy (new, worse, stable, improved, resolved), localized spatial supervision of pathology, explicit spatial-temporal alignment across paired studies, and multi-source coverage for cross-domain evaluation. We additionally construct a 280K-pair silver dataset with automatically derived temporal and anatomical supervision for large-scale evaluation under weaker supervision. Using these resources, we evaluate multiple state-of-the-art vision-language CXR models on grounding and progression-classification tasks in a zero-shot setting. Across both gold and silver evaluations, current models exhibit consistent limitations in spatial grounding, fine-grained temporal reasoning, and robustness under distribution shift. In particular, models perform substantially better on salient progression categories such as worse than on temporally subtle states such as stable and resolved, suggesting limited modeling of longitudinal disease evolution in chest radiography.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CheXTemporal 数据集，用于胸部 X 光片的时间推理，并揭示当前 VLM 在空间定位和细粒度时间推理上的局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 胸部 X 光片解读需要跨时间推理，但现有视觉-语言模型仅在静态图像-报告对上训练，缺乏对纵向变化建模的显式监督。
analysis.problem: 缺乏支持时间推理的胸部 X 光数据集，导致模型无法有效进行纵向疾病演变分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前模型在空间定位、细粒度时间推理和分布偏移鲁棒性上存在一致局限；对显著进展类别（如恶化）表现远好于时间细微状态（如稳定、消退）。
analysis.method: 构建 CheXTemporal 数据集，包含配对前后胸部 X 光片、五类进展分类、空间标注、时空对齐及多源覆盖；另构建 28 万对银标准数据集用于大规模评估。
contributions: 提出 CheXTemporal 数据集，提供细粒度时间与空间标注，支持胸部 X 光片的时间推理。
构建大规模银标准数据集，用于弱监督下的评估。
系统评估多个 SOTA VLM 模型，揭示其在时间推理和空间定位上的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本设置下评估多个 SOTA 视觉-语言胸部 X 光模型在定位和进展分类任务上的表现，使用金标准和银标准数据集。
limitations: 数据集规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有罕见病变。
银标准数据集的自动标注可能存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Can Graphs Help Vision SSMs See Better?
papers.abstract: Vision state space models inherit the efficiency and long-range modeling ability of Mamba-style selective scans. However, their performance depends critically on the representation of two-dimensional visual features as one-dimensional token sequences. Existing scan operators range from predefined geometric traversals to dynamic coordinate-based samplers that reroute tokens through predicted offsets and interpolation. While effective, these mechanisms primarily adapt paths or sampling locations, rather than explicitly modeling which local patches should exchange information before global state-space mixing. This motivates a simple question: \emph{can graphs help vision state space models see better?} We introduce \textbf{GraphScan}, a graph-induced dynamic scanning operator for Vision SSMs. For each token, GraphScan constructs a spatially bounded local graph, learns feature-conditioned affinities with relative positional bias, and produces the output token by one-step message passing over its semantic neighborhood. The resulting tokens are locally grounded before being processed by the selective SSM for global aggregation. GraphScan preserves token count and linear scaling in image size, while replacing coordinate-conditioned interpolation with feature-conditioned semantic routing. Integrated into a hierarchical backbone, \textbf{GraphScan-Mamba} achieves state-of-the-art performance among Vision SSMs across image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, with modest computational overhead. Our analysis further shows that GraphScan induces interpretable displacement fields over the token lattice, providing a semantic and spatially grounded view of dynamic scanning. These results suggest that future Vision SSMs should treat scanning not merely as geometric serialization, but as learned local semantic routing before global state-space modeling.

analysis.tldr: GraphScan 通过图诱导的动态扫描算子，在 Vision SSM 中实现局部语义路由，显著提升视觉任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 Vision SSM 的扫描算子主要依赖几何遍历或坐标插值，缺乏对局部语义信息交换的显式建模，限制了模型对二维视觉特征的表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种扫描算子，使其能够基于特征条件进行局部语义路由，从而提升 Vision SSM 在视觉任务中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有扫描算子主要调整路径或采样位置，而非显式建模哪些局部块应在全局状态空间混合前交换信息。
analysis.method: 提出 GraphScan，为每个 token 构建空间受限的局部图，学习特征条件亲和度并加入相对位置偏置，通过一步消息传递在语义邻域上生成输出 token，再经选择性 SSM 进行全局聚合。
contributions: 提出 GraphScan，一种图诱导的动态扫描算子，用特征条件语义路由替代坐标条件插值。
集成到层次化骨干网络 GraphScan-Mamba，在图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割上达到 Vision SSM 的 SOTA 性能。
分析表明 GraphScan 在 token 格点上产生可解释的位移场，提供语义和空间视角的动态扫描理解。
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割任务上进行了实验，达到 Vision SSM 的 SOTA 性能，计算开销适中。
limitations: 局部图构建和消息传递可能引入额外计算开销，尽管摘要称开销适中。
方法依赖于局部图结构，可能对全局长距离依赖建模有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GraphScan 通过图诱导的动态扫描算子，在 Vision SSM 中实现局部语义路由，显著提升视觉任务性能。

papers.title: Generative AI for Visualizing Highway Construction Hazards Through Synthetic Images and Temporal Sequences
papers.abstract: Highway construction workers face a high risk of serious injury or death. Image-based training materials depicting hazardous scenarios are essential for engaging safety instruction but remain scarce due to ethical and logistical barriers. This study develops and evaluates a generative AI methodology for producing synthetic visualizations of highway construction hazards from OSHA Severe Injury Report narratives. Two modes were developed: a single-pass approach yielding one image per incident, and a temporal approach producing a four-stage sequence. A sample of 75 incident records yielded 750 images, evaluated using CLIP-based semantic retrieval and expert assessment across dimensions such as educational utility, fidelity, and alignment. Single-pass images achieved 81.1% educational acceptability with fidelity and alignment scores of 4.14/5 and 4.07/5, respectively, while temporal sequences achieved 60.9% acceptability with comparable alignment (3.94/5) but lower fidelity (3.51/5). CLIP-based retrieval revealed that both modes produce images with statistically significant retrieval capabilities. This is among the first studies to leverage modern autoregressive image generation models for visualizing construction hazards from reported severe injuries and to generate temporally sequenced hazard imagery, and a new multi-dimensional evaluation framework was developed to support future research in this domain. The work enables safety trainers to pair narrative storytelling with visual learning material without photographing real-world hazards, and the framework could be applied to datasets across diverse domains, enabling synthetic image generation tailored to new application areas.

analysis.tldr: 利用生成式AI从事故报告文本合成高速公路施工危险场景图像，包括单张和时序序列，并构建多维评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 高速公路施工工人面临高伤亡风险，基于图像的安全培训材料因伦理和后勤障碍而稀缺，亟需一种无需拍摄真实危险场景即可生成可视化训练素材的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本事故报告自动生成高质量、教育可用的施工危险场景图像及时间序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次生成图像在教育可接受性（81.1%）和保真度（4.14/5）上优于时序序列（60.9%，3.51/5），但两者对齐分数相近（4.07 vs 3.94），表明时序生成在保持一致性方面更具挑战。
analysis.method: 提出两种生成模式：单次生成（每起事故一张图像）和时序生成（四阶段序列），基于OSHA严重伤害报告文本，利用现代自回归图像生成模型，并构建CLIP语义检索与专家评估的多维评价框架。
contributions: 首次利用现代自回归图像生成模型从严重伤害报告可视化施工危险，并生成时序危险图像序列。
开发了包含教育效用、保真度、对齐等多维度的评估框架，支持该领域未来研究。
analysis.experiments: 基于75起事故记录生成750张图像，通过CLIP语义检索和专家评估（教育可接受性、保真度、对齐）进行评价。单次生成图像教育可接受性81.1%，保真度4.14/5，对齐4.07/5；时序序列可接受性60.9%，对齐3.94/5，保真度3.51/5。CLIP检索显示两种模式均具有统计显著的检索能力。
limitations: 时序序列的保真度较低，可能影响实际培训效果。
评估依赖专家主观判断，样本量有限（75条记录），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用生成式AI从事故报告文本合成高速公路施工危险场景图像，包括单张和时序序列，并构建多维评估框架。

papers.title: Real-Scale Island Area and Coastline Estimation using Only its Place Name or Coordinates
papers.abstract: Accurate measurement of island area and coastline length is crucial for coastal zone monitoring and oceanographic analysis. However, traditional measurement and mapping methods usually rely heavily on orthophotos, expensive airborne depth sensors, or dense ground control points, which face serious limitations of high labor costs, time-consuming efforts, and low operational efficiency in vast and inaccessible open sea environments. To overcome these challenges and break away from the reliance on manual field exploration, this paper proposes a geometrically consistent, real-scale island measurement framework based on pure monocular vision. This project significantly reduces the mapping cost through a fully automated process and achieves high-efficiency measurement without prior GIS data. In our system pipeline, only the geographical coordinates or names of the target area need to be input to obtain a low-altitude surrounding image sequence. After obtaining the point clouds, a lightweight trajectory alignment algorithm (Umeyama) is used to restore the global physical scale, and the scaled model is orthorectified, enabling high-precision area and perimeter extraction directly on the 2D rasterized plane. We have fully verified this pipeline on four islands with different terrain features (covering natural landform islands and islands with complex artificial facilities). The experimental results show that the final measurement error of the system is stable at around 10\%, demonstrating excellent accuracy and robustness. Moreover, this framework has outstanding inference speed, requiring only 70 ms to process a single high-resolution image and generate point clouds, providing a highly practical new paradigm for large-scale marine and coastline

analysis.tldr: 提出仅需地名或坐标即可实现岛屿面积与海岸线高精度测量的单目视觉框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统岛屿测量依赖正射影像、昂贵传感器或密集地面控制点，在偏远海域成本高、效率低，亟需自动化、低成本的测量方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅通过地名或坐标输入，实现无先验GIS数据的实时尺度岛屿面积与海岸线测量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 输入地名/坐标获取低空环绕图像序列，通过单目视觉生成点云，利用Umeyama算法进行轻量轨迹对齐恢复全局物理尺度，再经正射校正后在二维栅格平面上提取面积和周长。
contributions: 提出一种仅需地名或坐标的全自动岛屿测量框架，摆脱对人工勘探和GIS数据的依赖。
通过Umeyama轨迹对齐实现几何一致的尺度恢复，在四种不同地形岛屿上验证误差稳定在10%左右，且单张图像处理仅需70毫秒。
analysis.experiments: 在四个不同地形特征的岛屿（包括自然地貌和复杂人工设施岛屿）上验证，测量误差稳定在10%左右，单张图像处理速度70毫秒。
limitations: 可能依赖低空图像质量，恶劣天气或光照条件下性能未知。
仅验证了岛屿场景，对其他海岸线地形的泛化性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出仅需地名或坐标即可实现岛屿面积与海岸线高精度测量的单目视觉框架。

papers.title: PG-3DGS: Optimizing 3D Gaussian Splatting to Satisfy Physics Objectives
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Gaussian Splatting have enabled fast, high-fidelity 3D scene generation, yet these methods remain purely visual and lack an understanding of how shapes behave in the physical world. We introduce Physics-Guided 3D Gaussian Splatting (PG-3DGS), a framework that couples differentiable physics simulation with 3D Gaussian representations to generate 3D structures satisfying physics functionalities. By allowing physical objectives to guide the shape optimization process alongside visual losses, our approach produces geometries that are not only photometrically accurate but also physically functional. The model learns to adjust shapes so that the generated objects exhibit physically meaningful behaviors, for example, teapots that can pour and airplanes that can generate lift, without sacrificing visual quality. Experiments on pouring and aerodynamic lift tasks show that PG-3DGS improves physical functionality while preserving visual quality. In addition to simulation gains, bench-top physical lift tests with 3D-printed aircraft (Cessna, B-2 Spirit, and paper plane) under identical airflow conditions show higher scale-measured lift for PG-3DGS, generated structures than an appearance-matching baseline in all three cases. Our unified framework connects appearance-based reconstruction with physics-based reasoning, enabling end-to-end generation of 3D structures that both look realistic and function correctly.

analysis.tldr: 将可微物理模拟与3D高斯泼溅结合，生成既视觉逼真又满足物理功能（如倒水、产生升力）的3D结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高斯泼溅方法仅关注视觉质量，缺乏对物体物理行为的理解，生成的3D结构在真实世界中可能无法正常工作。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既具有高视觉保真度又能满足特定物理功能（如倒水、产生升力）的3D结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将可微物理模拟器与3D高斯泼溅表示耦合，在视觉损失之外加入物理目标引导形状优化，使生成物体同时具备视觉准确性和物理功能性。
contributions: 提出PG-3DGS框架，首次将可微物理模拟与3D高斯泼溅结合，实现物理引导的3D结构生成。
在倒水和气动升力任务上验证了方法在保持视觉质量的同时提升物理功能性，并通过3D打印实物测试证明了实际效果。
analysis.experiments: 在倒水和气动升力任务上进行实验，包括仿真测试和3D打印飞机（Cessna、B-2 Spirit、纸飞机）的台架物理升力测试，PG-3DGS在所有三种情况下均比外观匹配基线产生更高的升力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可模拟的物理功能，复杂物理交互可能难以建模。
物理模拟的计算开销可能较大，影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将可微物理模拟与3D高斯泼溅结合，生成既视觉逼真又满足物理功能（如倒水、产生升力）的3D结构。

papers.title: DenseTRF: Texture-Aware Unsupervised Representation Adaptation for Surgical Scene Dense Prediction
papers.abstract: Dense prediction tasks in surgical computer vision, such as segmentation and surgical zone prediction, can provide valuable guidance for laparoscopic and robotic surgery. However, these models often suffer from distribution shifts, as training datasets rarely cover the variability encountered during deployment, leading to poor generalization. We propose DenseTRF, a self-supervised representation adaptation framework based on texture-centric attention. Our method leverages slot attention to learn texture-aware representations that capture invariant visual structures. By adapting these representations to the target distribution without supervision, DenseTRF significantly improves robustness to domain shifts. The framework is implemented through conditioning dense prediction on slot attention and model merging strategies. Experiments across multiple surgical procedures demonstrate improved cross-distribution generalization in comparison to state-of-the-art segmentation models and test-distribution adaptation methods for dense prediction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于纹理注意力与槽注意力的无监督表示适应框架，提升手术场景密集预测的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 手术视觉中的密集预测模型因训练数据分布与部署环境差异大，泛化能力差，亟需无需标注的域适应方法。
analysis.problem: 解决手术场景密集预测中因分布偏移导致的模型泛化性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于纹理注意力（texture-centric attention）的槽注意力（slot attention）学习纹理感知表示，并通过模型合并策略实现无监督表示适应。
contributions: 提出DenseTRF框架，利用槽注意力学习纹理不变表示以增强域鲁棒性。
在多种手术流程上验证了跨分布泛化优于现有分割模型和测试分布适应方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种手术流程上进行了实验，与最先进的分割模型和测试分布适应方法比较，展示了改进的跨分布泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖手术场景中纹理特征的稳定性，对纹理变化不明显的场景效果有限。
未在真实临床部署中验证，实际效果可能受硬件或实时性限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于纹理注意力与槽注意力的无监督表示适应框架，提升手术场景密集预测的跨域泛化能力。

papers.title: ABRA: Agent Benchmark for Radiology Applications
papers.abstract: Existing medical-agent benchmarks deliver imaging as pre-selected samples, never as an environment the agent must navigate. We introduce ABRA, a radiology-agent benchmark in which the agent operates an OHIF viewer and an Orthanc DICOM server through twenty-one function-calling tools that span slice navigation, windowing, series selection, pixel-coordinate annotation, and structured reporting. ABRA contains 655 programmatically generated tasks across three difficulty tiers and eight types (viewer control, metadata QA, vision probe, annotation, longitudinal comparison, BI-RADS reporting, and oracle variants of annotation and BI-RADS reporting), drawn from LIDC-IDRI, Duke Breast Cancer MRI, and NLST New-Lesion LongCT. Each episode is scored along Planning, Execution, and Outcome (Bluethgen et al., 2025) by task-type-specific automatic scorers. Ten current models, five closed-weight and five open-weight, reach at least 89% Execution on real annotation but only 0-25% Outcome; on the paired oracle variant where a simulated detector supplies the finding, Outcome on the same task reaches 69-100% across the models evaluated, localising the bottleneck to perception rather than tool orchestration. Code, task generators, and scorers are released at this https URL

analysis.tldr: ABRA 是一个放射学智能体基准，通过模拟 DICOM 查看器环境评估模型在真实影像任务上的规划、执行与结果能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医疗智能体基准仅提供预选样本，无法模拟智能体需要自主导航的影像环境，缺乏对真实临床工作流的评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个让智能体通过工具操作真实 DICOM 查看器完成放射学任务的基准，并系统评估其规划、执行与结果表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在真实标注任务上执行得分高（≥89%）但结果得分低（0-25%），而在提供模拟检测器的 oracle 变体中结果得分大幅提升（69-100%），表明瓶颈在于感知而非工具编排。
analysis.method: ABRA 基准包含 655 个程序化生成的任务，覆盖 3 个难度等级和 8 种任务类型，智能体通过 21 个函数调用工具操作 OHIF 查看器和 Orthanc DICOM 服务器，并使用任务类型特定的自动评分器按规划、执行和结果三个维度评分。
contributions: 首个要求智能体自主导航真实 DICOM 查看器环境的放射学智能体基准
通过 oracle 变体实验定位了感知瓶颈，为后续改进提供方向
analysis.experiments: 在 10 个模型（5 个闭源、5 个开源）上进行了评估，报告了执行和结果得分，并对比了 oracle 变体结果。
limitations: 任务生成基于特定数据集，可能无法覆盖所有临床场景
自动评分器可能无法完全捕捉临床决策的细微差别
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ABRA 是一个放射学智能体基准，通过模拟 DICOM 查看器环境评估模型在真实影像任务上的规划、执行与结果能力。

papers.title: Hi-GaTA: Hierarchical Gated Temporal Aggregation Adapter for Surgical Video Report Generation
papers.abstract: Automated, clinician-grade assessment reports for surgical procedures could reduce documentation burden and provide objective feedback, yet remain challenging due to the difficulty of aligning dense spatio-temporal video representations with language-based reasoning and the scarcity of high-quality, privacy-preserving datasets. To address this gap, we establish a benchmark comprising 214 high-quality simulated surgical videos paired with surgeon-authored evaluation reports. Building on this resource, we propose a Perception-Alignment-Reasoning framework for surgical video report generation, featuring Hi-GaTA, a novel lightweight temporal adapter that efficiently compresses long video sequences into compact, LLM-compatible visual prefix tokens through short-to-long-range temporal aggregation. For robust visual perception, we pretrain Sur40k, a surgical-specific ViViT-style video encoder on 40,000 minutes of public surgical videos to capture fine-grained spatio-temporal procedural priors. Hi-GaTA employs a temporal pyramid with text-conditioned dual cross-attention, and improves multi-scale consistency through cross-level gated fusion and an increasing-depth strategy. Finally, we fine-tune the LLM backbone using LoRA to enable coherent and stylistically consistent surgical report generation under limited supervision. Experiments show our approach achieves the best overall performance, with consistent gains over strong Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) baselines. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each proposed component.

analysis.tldr: 提出Hi-GaTA时序适配器，结合手术视频编码器与LLM，实现高质量手术视频报告生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 手术视频自动生成评估报告可减轻医生文书负担并提供客观反馈，但面临视频-语言对齐困难、高质量隐私保护数据集稀缺的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将长手术视频序列压缩为LLM兼容的视觉前缀，并生成风格一致、细粒度的评估报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含214个模拟手术视频的基准数据集；提出Perception-Alignment-Reasoning框架，包含手术专用视频编码器Sur40k（在4万分钟公开手术视频上预训练）、Hi-GaTA时序适配器（短到长范围时序聚合、文本条件双交叉注意力、跨层级门控融合与递增深度策略），以及基于LoRA微调的LLM。
contributions: 建立了包含214个高质量模拟手术视频及医生撰写评估报告的基准数据集。
提出了Hi-GaTA轻量级时序适配器，通过层级门控时序聚合高效压缩长视频。
预训练了手术专用视频编码器Sur40k，捕获细粒度时空过程先验。
在手术视频报告生成任务上取得最佳整体性能，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上评估，与强MLLM基线对比取得最佳性能，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
limitations: 数据集为模拟手术视频，真实手术场景泛化性待验证。
依赖预训练编码器和LLM，计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Hi-GaTA时序适配器，结合手术视频编码器与LLM，实现高质量手术视频报告生成。

papers.title: Unpacking the Eye of the Beholder: Social Location, Identity, and the Moving Target of Political Perspectives
papers.abstract: Political and social identities structure how people evaluate political information, a finding decades deep in political science and routinely discarded by computational tools that often produce single scores that treat a piece of text, an image, or a video as if it means the same thing to everyone. This paper shows that it does not, and that the difference is consequential. To address this problem, I develop the Perspectivist Visual Political Sentiment (PVPS) classifier, which learns from approximately 82,000 evaluations by 5,575 U.S. adults to predict how audiences defined by political and social identities will evaluate the same image. Unlike standard tools that average systematic disagreement away, PVPS preserves it, returning an evaluative profile that records who agrees, who diverges, and along which identity lines. Applied to several influential studies of visual sentiment, PVPS shows that perceived violence in protest imagery and the emotional mechanisms behind protest image engagement both change substantively once audience identity is taken into account. It follows that what a political image conveys is a moving target, and measuring it requires knowing whom it is moving.

analysis.tldr: 提出视角主义视觉政治情感分类器，揭示图像政治含义因受众身份而异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算工具通常为文本、图像或视频分配单一分数，忽略政治和社会身份如何影响信息评价，导致系统性分歧被平均化。
analysis.problem: 预测不同政治和社会身份定义的受众如何评价同一图像的政治情感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发PVPS分类器，基于约82,000次评估（来自5,575名美国成年人）学习，输出记录谁同意、谁分歧及沿哪些身份线的评价档案。
contributions: 提出PVPS分类器，保留而非平均化受众间的系统性分歧。
通过应用于抗议图像情感研究，证明考虑受众身份后感知暴力和情感机制发生实质性变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于美国成年人样本，可能不适用于其他文化或政治背景。
依赖自我报告的政治和社会身份，可能存在测量误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视角主义视觉政治情感分类器，揭示图像政治含义因受众身份而异。

papers.title: USEMA: a Scalable Efficient Mamba Like Attention for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate medical image segmentation is an integral part of the medical image analysis pipeline that requires the ability to merge local and global information. While vision transformers are able to capture global interactions using vanilla self-attention, their quadratic computational complexity in the input size remains a struggle for medical image segmentation tasks. Motivated by the dispersion property of vanilla self-attention and recent development of Mamba form of attention, Scalable and Efficient Mamba like Attention (SEMA) utilizes token localization via local window attention to avoid dispersion and maintain focusing, complemented by theoretically consistent arithmetic averaging to capture global aspect of attention. In this work, we present USEMA, a hybrid UNet architecture that merges the local feature extraction ability of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with SEMA attention. We conduct experiments with USEMA across a variety of modalities and image sizes, demonstrating improved computational efficiency compared to transformer based models using full self-attention, and superior segmentation performance relative to purely convolution and Mamba-based models.

analysis.tldr: 提出USEMA，一种结合CNN局部特征提取与高效Mamba式注意力（SEMA）的混合UNet架构，用于医学图像分割，在效率和性能上优于纯卷积、纯Mamba及全自注意力Transformer模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割需要融合局部和全局信息，但Vision Transformer的二次计算复杂度在医学图像任务中成为瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种计算高效且能同时捕获局部和全局信息的注意力机制，用于医学图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SEMA（Scalable and Efficient Mamba like Attention），通过局部窗口注意力实现token定位以避免注意力分散，并用理论一致的算术平均捕获全局注意力；将其与CNN结合形成混合UNet架构USEMA。
contributions: 提出SEMA注意力机制，兼具线性计算复杂度和全局信息捕获能力。
设计USEMA混合架构，融合CNN局部特征提取与SEMA全局注意力。
在多种模态和图像尺寸上验证了USEMA相比全自注意力Transformer、纯卷积和纯Mamba模型的效率与性能优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在医学图像分割任务上验证，泛化性未知。
算术平均聚合全局信息的方式可能在某些场景下不如自注意力灵活。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出USEMA，一种结合CNN局部特征提取与高效Mamba式注意力（SEMA）的混合UNet架构，用于医学图像分割，在效率和性能上优于纯卷积、纯Mamba及全自注意力Transformer模型。

papers.title: LatentHDR: Decoupling Exposure from Diffusion via Conditional Latent-to-Latent Mapping for Text/Image-to-Panoramic HDR
papers.abstract: High Dynamic Range (HDR) generation remains challenging for generative models, which are largely limited to low dynamic range outputs. Recent diffusionbased approaches approximate HDR by generating multiple exposure-conditioned samples, incurring high computational cost and structural inconsistencies across exposures. We propose LatentHDR, a framework that decouples scene generation from exposure modeling in latent space. A pretrained diffusion backbone produces a single coherent scene representation, while a lightweight conditional latent to-latent head deterministically maps it to exposure-specific representations. This enables the generation of a dense, structurally consistent exposure stack in a single pass. This design eliminates multi-pass diffusion, ensures cross-exposure alignment, and enables scalable HDR synthesis. LatentHDR supports both textand image-conditioned HDR generation for perspective and panoramic scenes. Experiments on synthetic data and the SI-HDR benchmark show that LatentHDR achieves state-of-the-art dynamic range with competitive perceptual quality, while reducing computation by an order of magnitude. Our results demonstrate that high-quality HDR generation can be achieved through structured latent modeling, challenging the need for stochastic multi-exposure generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出LatentHDR框架，通过解耦场景生成与曝光建模，实现单次前向生成结构一致的高动态范围图像堆，计算量降低一个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型主要输出低动态范围图像，而基于扩散的HDR方法需多次采样不同曝光条件，计算成本高且跨曝光结构不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成结构一致的高动态范围图像堆，避免多遍扩散带来的计算开销和结构不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在潜在空间中解耦场景生成与曝光建模：预训练扩散骨干生成单一场景表示，轻量条件潜在到潜在映射头将其确定性映射到特定曝光表示，单次前向生成密集、结构一致的曝光堆。
contributions: 提出LatentHDR框架，通过条件潜在到潜在映射解耦曝光与场景生成，实现单次前向HDR合成。
在合成数据和SI-HDR基准上达到最先进动态范围，计算量降低一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和SI-HDR基准上评估，达到最先进动态范围，计算量降低一个数量级。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和泛化能力。
仅支持透视和全景场景，其他场景类型未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LatentHDR框架，通过解耦场景生成与曝光建模，实现单次前向生成结构一致的高动态范围图像堆，计算量降低一个数量级。

papers.title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together: Background-Invariant Representations via Linear Structure in VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs), such as CLIP and SigLIP 2, are widely used for image classification, yet their vision encoders remain vulnerable to systematic biases that undermine robustness. In particular, correlations between foreground objects and their backgrounds constitute a salient and practically important class of spurious dependencies. In this work, we revisit the well-known property of high linear additivity in VLM embedding spaces and show that it enables a decomposition of scene representations into foreground and background components. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a pre-training approach that exploits this property to construct background-invariant representations using synthetic data. Our method achieves, to our knowledge, the first worst-group accuracy exceeding $90\%$ on Waterbirds under perfect ($100\%$) spurious correlation (i.e., no minority-group examples in the training data). Furthermore, it demonstrates strong sim-to-real transfer and requires no access to real-world debiased data, making it practical for real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 利用VLM嵌入空间的线性可加性，通过合成数据实现背景不变表示，在Waterbirds上首次达到90%+最差组准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM视觉编码器易受背景等虚假相关影响，现有方法依赖真实去偏数据或难以处理完全虚假相关场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实去偏数据的情况下，消除VLM中前景与背景的虚假相关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM嵌入空间具有高线性可加性，可分解为前景和背景成分。
analysis.method: 利用合成数据，通过线性结构分解场景表示，构建背景不变表示。
contributions: 首次在完全虚假相关（无少数类样本）的Waterbirds上实现超过90%的最差组准确率。
方法无需真实去偏数据，且具有强模拟到真实迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Waterbirds数据集上评估最差组准确率，并验证模拟到真实迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据的质量。
线性可加性假设在复杂场景中可能不完全成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用VLM嵌入空间的线性可加性，通过合成数据实现背景不变表示，在Waterbirds上首次达到90%+最差组准确率。

papers.title: HiDream-O1-Image: A Natively Unified Image Generative Foundation Model with Pixel-level Unified Transformer
papers.abstract: The evolution of visual generative models has long been constrained by fragmented architectures relying on disjoint text encoders and external VAEs. In this report, we present HiDream-O1-Image, a natively unified generative foundation model via pixel-space Diffusion Transformer, that pioneers a paradigm shift from modular architectures to an end-to-end in-context visual generation engine. By mapping raw image pixels, text tokens, and task-specific conditions into a single shared token space, HiDream-O1-Image achieves a structural unification of multimodal inputs within an Unified Transformer (UiT) architecture. This native encoding paradigm eliminates the need for separate VAEs or disjoint pre-trained text encoders, allowing the model to treat diverse generation and editing tasks as a consistent in-context reasoning process. Extensive experiments show that HiDream-O1-Image excels across various generation tasks, including text-to-image generation, instruction-based editing, and subject-driven personalization. Notably, with only 8B parameters, HiDream-O1-Image (8B) achieves performance parity with or even surpasses established state-of-the-art models with significantly larger parameters (e.g., 27B Qwen-Image). Crucially, to validate the immense scalability of this paradigm, we successfully scale the architecture up to over 200B parameters. Experimental results demonstrate that this massive-scale version HiDream-O1-Image-Pro (200B+) unlocks unprecedented generative capabilities and superior performance, establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks. Ultimately, HiDream-O1-Image highlights the immense potential of natively unified architectures and charts a highly scalable path toward next-generation multimodal AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出原生统一的像素空间扩散Transformer，无需独立VAE/文本编码器，实现多模态输入统一处理，8B参数即超越27B模型，并成功扩展到200B+参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成模型依赖碎片化的模块化架构（如分离的文本编码器和VAE），导致结构复杂且难以统一处理多种生成任务。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种原生统一的架构，消除对独立VAE和文本编码器的依赖，实现多模态输入的统一表示和端到端上下文视觉生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiDream-O1-Image，基于像素空间扩散Transformer，通过统一Transformer（UiT）架构将原始图像像素、文本token和任务条件映射到共享token空间，实现原生多模态统一。
contributions: 提出原生统一的像素空间扩散Transformer架构，消除对独立VAE和文本编码器的依赖。
8B参数模型性能超越27B的Qwen-Image，并成功扩展到200B+参数，展现强可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成、指令编辑、主体驱动个性化等任务上进行了实验，8B模型达到或超越更大参数SOTA，200B+模型刷新基准。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算资源需求或推理效率。
可能对特定任务（如视频生成）的适用性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原生统一的像素空间扩散Transformer，无需独立VAE/文本编码器，实现多模态输入统一处理，8B参数即超越27B模型，并成功扩展到200B+参数。

papers.title: The first global agricultural field boundary map at 10m resolution
papers.abstract: The agricultural field is the natural unit at which crops are planted, managed, regulated, and reported, yet most global remote-sensing products for agriculture are only available at the pixel level. While some high-quality field-level data products exist, they come from parcel registries covering only parts of Europe or from ML-derived products for individual countries. No openly available, globally consistent map of agricultural field boundaries exists to date. Here we present the first global field boundary dataset at 10\,m resolution for the years 2024 and 2025, comprising 3.17 billion remote-sensing field polygons (1.62 B in 2024 and 1.55 B in 2025) across 241 countries and territories, produced by applying a U-Net segmentation model trained on the Fields of The World dataset to cloud-free Sentinel-2 mosaics. Validated against ground-truth field boundaries in 24 countries, the map achieved a mean pixel-level recall of 0.85 with 14 countries exceeding 0.90. Evaluation against full-country ground-truth datasets in Austria, Latvia, and Finland yielded F1 scores of 0.89, 0.88, and 0.74, respectively. Because reference data for global validation is inherently incomplete, we accompanied the map with a 500 m confidence layer that identifies regions where predictions are reliable. We release the dataset openly as three global maps: the confidence-thresholded default field boundary dataset, the full unfiltered dataset, and the continuous-valued confidence raster. These maps provide the first globally consistent field-level unit of analysis for crop monitoring, food security, and downstream agricultural science.

analysis.tldr: 首个全球10米分辨率农田边界地图，基于U-Net和Sentinel-2影像生成，覆盖241个国家。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有农业遥感产品多为像素级，缺乏全球一致的田块级边界数据，阻碍了精准农业和粮食安全监测。
analysis.problem: 构建首个全球公开、一致的10米分辨率农田边界地图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用U-Net分割模型，基于Fields of The World数据集训练，对无云Sentinel-2镶嵌影像进行推理，生成2024和2025年全球田块多边形。
contributions: 发布了首个全球10米分辨率农田边界数据集，包含31.7亿个多边形。
提供了置信度图层和多种版本（默认阈值过滤、未过滤、连续置信度栅格），便于不同应用。
analysis.experiments: 在24个国家进行地面验证，平均像素级召回率0.85；在奥地利、拉脱维亚和芬兰的全国家数据集上F1分数分别为0.89、0.88和0.74。
limitations: 全球验证参考数据不完整，仅覆盖24个国家。
10米分辨率可能无法捕捉小田块或复杂边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个全球10米分辨率农田边界地图，基于U-Net和Sentinel-2影像生成，覆盖241个国家。

papers.title: Principle-Guided Supervision for Interpretable Uncertainty in Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification complements model predictions by characterizing their reliability, which is essential for high-stakes decision making such as medical image segmentation. However, most existing methods reduce uncertainty to a scalar confidence estimate, leaving its spatial distribution semantically underconstrained. In this work, we focus on uncertainty interpretability, namely, whether estimated uncertainty behaves in a human-understandable manner with respect to sources of ambiguity. We identify three perception-aligned principles requiring the spatial distribution of uncertainty to reflect: (1) image contrast between structures, (2) severity of image corruption, and (3) geometric complexity in anatomical structures. Accordingly, we develop a principle-guided uncertainty supervision framework (PriUS) based on evidential learning, in which the corresponding supervision objectives are explicitly enforced during training. We further introduce quantitative metrics to measure the consistency between predicted uncertainty and image attributes that induce ambiguity. Experiments on ACDC, ISIC, and WHS datasets showed that, compared with state-of-the-art methods, PriUS produced more consistent uncertainty estimates while maintaining competitive segmentation performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出原则引导的监督框架 PriUS，使医学图像分割的不确定性估计在空间分布上符合人类感知的三种原则。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法大多将不确定性简化为标量置信度，缺乏对空间分布的语义约束，导致不确定性估计难以被人类理解，在高风险医学决策中不够可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何使医学图像分割中的不确定性估计在空间分布上具有可解释性，即与图像对比度、图像损坏程度和解剖结构几何复杂度这三种感知对齐的原则一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于证据学习（evidential learning）构建原则引导的不确定性监督框架（PriUS），在训练中显式施加三种与人类感知对齐的监督目标，使不确定性空间分布反映图像对比度、图像损坏严重性和解剖结构几何复杂度。
contributions: 识别出三种感知对齐的不确定性原则：图像对比度、图像损坏程度和解剖结构几何复杂度。
提出原则引导的不确定性监督框架 PriUS，通过显式监督目标实现可解释的不确定性估计。
引入定量指标衡量预测不确定性与诱导模糊的图像属性之间的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在 ACDC、ISIC 和 WHS 三个医学图像分割数据集上，与现有最先进方法相比，PriUS 产生更一致的不确定性估计，同时保持有竞争力的分割性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于医学图像分割任务，泛化到其他领域需验证。
三种原则的权重或组合方式可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出原则引导的监督框架 PriUS，使医学图像分割的不确定性估计在空间分布上符合人类感知的三种原则。

papers.title: KAN-CL: Per-Knot Importance Regularization for Continual Learning with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains the central obstacle in continual learning (CL): parameters shared across tasks interfere with one another, and existing regularization methods such as EWC and SI apply uniform penalties without awareness of which input region a parameter serves. We propose KAN-CL, a continual learning framework that exploits the compact-support spline parameterization of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) to perform importance-weighted anchoring at per-knot granularity. Deployed as a classification head on a convolutional backbone with standard EWC regularization on the backbone (bbEWC) KAN-CL achieves forgetting reductions of 88% and 93% over a head-only KAN baseline on Split-CIFAR-10/5T and Split-CIFAR-100/10T respectively, while matching or exceeding the accuracy of all baselines on both benchmarks. We further provide a Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) analysis showing that KAN's spline locality induces a structural rank deficit in the cross-task NTK, yielding a forgetting bound that holds even in the feature-learning regime. These results establish that combining an architecture with natural parameter locality (KAN head) with a complementary backbone regularizer (bbEWC) yields a compositional and principled approach to catastrophic forgetting.

analysis.tldr: 利用KAN的局部样条参数化实现细粒度重要性加权，显著缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 灾难性遗忘是持续学习的核心障碍，现有正则化方法（如EWC、SI）对参数施加统一惩罚，未考虑参数服务的输入区域，导致任务间参数干扰。
analysis.problem: 如何利用KAN的紧凑支撑样条参数化，实现细粒度（per-knot）重要性加权锚定，以缓解持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: KAN的样条局部性导致跨任务神经正切核（NTK）存在结构秩亏，从而在特征学习机制下也能获得遗忘界。
analysis.method: 提出KAN-CL框架，在卷积骨干上使用KAN分类头，对KAN的每个knot进行重要性加权锚定，同时对骨干施加标准EWC正则化（bbEWC）。
contributions: 提出KAN-CL，利用KAN的紧凑支撑样条实现per-knot重要性加权，显著降低遗忘。
通过NTK分析证明KAN的样条局部性导致跨任务NTK秩亏，提供遗忘的理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 在Split-CIFAR-10/5T和Split-CIFAR-100/10T上，KAN-CL相比仅使用KAN头的基线分别减少88%和93%的遗忘，且准确率匹配或超越所有基线。
limitations: 仅验证了分类头为KAN的场景，骨干网络仍使用标准CNN。
实验仅在CIFAR数据集上进行，未在更大规模或更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用KAN的局部样条参数化实现细粒度重要性加权，显著缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: From Model Uncertainty to Human Attention: Localization-Aware Visual Cues for Scalable Annotation Review
papers.abstract: High-quality labeled data is essential for training robust machine learning models, yet obtaining annotations at scale remains expensive. AI-assisted annotation has therefore become standard in large-scale labeling workflows. However, in tasks where model predictions carry two independent components, a class label and spatial boundaries, a model may classify an object with high confidence while mislocalizing it. Existing AI-assisted workflows offer annotators no signal about where spatial errors are most likely. Without such guidance, humans may systematically underinspect subtly misplaced boxes. We address this by studying the effect of visualizing spatial uncertainty via a purpose-built interface. In a controlled study with 120 participants, those receiving uncertainty cues achieve higher label quality while being faster overall. A box-level analysis confirms that the cues redirect annotator effort toward high-uncertainty predictions and away from well-localized boxes. These findings establish localization uncertainty as a lever to improve human-in-the-loop annotation. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过可视化空间不确定性提示，引导标注者关注高不确定性的预测框，提升标注质量与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模标注成本高，AI辅助标注虽已普及，但现有工具无法提示空间定位错误，导致标注者可能忽略边界偏差。
analysis.problem: 在分类与定位双任务中，模型高置信度但定位错误时，如何引导人工标注者高效发现并修正空间误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标注者缺乏空间不确定性信号时，会系统性地忽略轻微错位的边界框。
analysis.method: 设计可视化空间不确定性的标注界面，在预测框上叠加不确定性提示（如热力图或透明度），引导标注者优先检查高不确定性区域。
contributions: 首次研究空间不确定性可视化对人工标注质量与效率的影响
通过120人受控实验证明不确定性提示能提升标注质量并缩短时间
提供开源代码和界面设计
analysis.experiments: 120名参与者的受控实验，对比有无不确定性提示的标注效果，测量标注质量、速度及框级注意力分布。
limitations: 实验仅模拟单一标注场景，未验证其他任务或真实生产环境
不确定性可视化方式可能需针对不同模型调整
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可视化空间不确定性提示，引导标注者关注高不确定性的预测框，提升标注质量与效率。

papers.title: From Imagined Futures to Executable Actions: Mixture of Latent Actions for Robot Manipulation
papers.abstract: Video generation models offer a promising imagination mechanism for robot manipulation by predicting long-horizon future observations, but effectively exploiting these imagined futures for action execution remains challenging. Existing approaches either condition policies on predicted frames or directly decode generated videos into actions, both suffering from a mismatch between visual realism and control relevance. As a result, predicted observations emphasize perceptual fidelity rather than action-centric causes of state transitions, leading to indirect and unstable control. To address this gap, we propose MoLA (Mixture of Latent Actions), a control-oriented interface that transforms imagined future videos into executable representations. Instead of passing predicted frames directly to the policy, MoLA leverages a mixture of pretrained inverse dynamics models to infer a mixture of latent actions implied by generated visual transitions. These modality-aware inverse dynamics models capture complementary semantic, depth, and flow cues, providing a structured and physically grounded action representation that bridges video imagination and policy execution. We evaluate our approach on simulated benchmarks (LIBERO, CALVIN, and LIBERO-Plus) and real-world robot manipulation tasks, achieving consistent gains in task success, temporal consistency, and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoLA，通过混合逆动力学模型将视频生成模型的想象未来转化为可执行动作，提升机器人操作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频生成模型能预测长期未来观测，为机器人操作提供想象机制，但现有方法存在视觉真实性与控制相关性不匹配的问题，导致控制不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何将视频生成模型预测的未来帧有效转化为机器人可执行的动作表示，避免视觉真实性与控制相关性之间的鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法直接使用预测帧或解码视频为动作，导致预测观测强调感知保真度而非以动作为中心的因果状态转换，造成间接和不稳定的控制。
analysis.method: 提出MoLA，利用混合预训练逆动力学模型从生成的视觉转换中推断潜在动作，这些模型捕捉语义、深度和光流等互补线索，形成结构化且物理基础的动作表示。
contributions: 提出控制导向接口MoLA，弥合视频想象与策略执行之间的差距
利用混合逆动力学模型从生成视频中提取多模态潜在动作，提升控制相关性和物理基础
在模拟基准和真实机器人任务上验证了任务成功率、时间一致性和泛化能力的提升
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO、CALVIN、LIBERO-Plus模拟基准和真实机器人操作任务上评估，取得一致改进。
limitations: 依赖预训练逆动力学模型的质量和多样性
可能对视频生成模型的精度敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoLA，通过混合逆动力学模型将视频生成模型的想象未来转化为可执行动作，提升机器人操作性能。

papers.title: Disentangled Sparse Representations for Concept-Separated Diffusion Unlearning
papers.abstract: Unlearning specific concepts in text-to-image diffusion models has become increasingly important for preventing undesirable content generation. Among prior approaches, sparse autoencoder (SAE)-based methods have attracted attention due to their ability to suppress target concepts through lightweight manipulation of latent features, without modifying model parameters. However, SAEs trained with sparse reconstruction objectives do not explicitly enforce concept-wise separation, resulting in shared latent features across concepts. To address this, we propose SAEParate, which organizes latent representations into concept-specific clusters via a concept-aware contrastive objective, enabling more precise concept suppression while reducing unintended interference during unlearning. In addition, we enhance the encoder with a GeLU-based nonlinear transformation to increase its expressive capacity under this separation objective, enabling a more discriminative and disentangled latent space. Experiments on UnlearnCanvas demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong gains in joint style-object unlearning, a challenging setting where existing methods suffer from severe interference between target and non-target concepts.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAEParate，通过概念感知对比学习实现扩散模型解耦稀疏表示，提升概念擦除精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型中，基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的概念擦除方法因轻量级潜特征操作而受关注，但现有SAE训练缺乏概念分离约束，导致不同概念共享潜特征，擦除时产生意外干扰。
analysis.problem: SAE训练中潜特征未显式分离，导致概念擦除时目标与非目标概念间存在干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，稀疏重建目标训练的SAE不强制概念级分离，导致共享潜特征，在联合风格-对象擦除等挑战场景中干扰严重。
analysis.method: 提出SAEParate，通过概念感知对比目标将潜表示组织成概念特定簇，并增强编码器（GeLU非线性变换）以提升分离目标下的表达能力。
contributions: 提出概念感知对比目标，实现潜特征的概念级分离，减少擦除时的意外干扰。
引入GeLU非线性变换增强编码器，提升分离目标下的判别性和解耦能力。
在UnlearnCanvas上实现最先进性能，尤其在联合风格-对象擦除中显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在UnlearnCanvas数据集上评估，摘要报告了最先进性能，尤其在联合风格-对象擦除中表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖概念标签的可用性。
对比学习目标可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAEParate，通过概念感知对比学习实现扩散模型解耦稀疏表示，提升概念擦除精度。

papers.title: World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have achieved strong semantic generalization for embodied policy learning, yet they learn reactive observation-to-action mappings without explicitly modeling how the physical world evolves under intervention. A growing body of work addresses this limitation by integrating world models, predictive models of environment dynamics, into the action generation pipeline. We term this emerging paradigm World Action Models (WAMs): embodied foundation models that unify predictive state modeling with action generation, targeting a joint distribution over future states and actions rather than actions alone. However, the literature remains fragmented across architectures, learning objectives, and application scenarios, lacking a unified conceptual framework. We formally define WAMs and disambiguate them from related concepts, and trace the foundations and early integration of VLA and world model research that gave rise to this paradigm. We organize existing methods into a structured taxonomy of Cascaded and Joint WAMs, with further subdivision by generation modality, conditioning mechanism, and action decoding strategy. We systematically analyze the data ecosystem fueling WAMs development, spanning robot teleoperation, portable human demonstrations, simulation, and internet-scale egocentric video, and synthesize emerging evaluation protocols organized around visual fidelity, physical commonsense, and action plausibility. Overall, this survey provides the first systematic account of the WAMs landscape, clarifies key architectural paradigms and their trade-offs, and identifies open challenges and future opportunities for this rapidly evolving field.

analysis.tldr: 综述世界动作模型（WAMs），统一预测状态建模与动作生成，提出分类体系并分析数据与评估协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型仅学习反应式映射，缺乏对物理世界演化的显式建模，而世界模型与动作生成的融合研究分散，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理和分类将世界模型与动作生成统一的世界动作模型（WAMs）方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文献碎片化，缺乏统一概念框架；方法在架构、学习目标和应用场景上差异大。
analysis.method: 提出WAMs正式定义，构建级联与联合WAMs分类法，分析数据生态（遥操作、人类演示、仿真、互联网视频）和评估协议（视觉保真度、物理常识、动作合理性）。
contributions: 首次系统综述WAMs领域，提供统一概念框架和分类法。
分析数据生态和评估协议，指出开放挑战与未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
分类可能无法覆盖所有新兴方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述世界动作模型（WAMs），统一预测状态建模与动作生成，提出分类体系并分析数据与评估协议。

papers.title: Boosting Omni-Modal Language Models: Staged Post-Training with Visually Debiased Evaluation
papers.abstract: Omni-modal language models are intended to jointly understand audio, visual inputs, and language, but benchmark gains can be inflated when visual evidence alone is enough to answer a query. We study whether current omni-modal benchmarks separate visual shortcuts from genuine audio-visual-language evidence integration, and how post-training behaves under a visually debiased evaluation setting. We audit nine omni-modal benchmarks with visual-only probing, remove visually solvable queries, and retain full subsets when filtering is undefined or would make comparisons unstable. This yields OmniClean, a cleaned evaluation view with 8,551 retained queries from 16,968 audited queries. On OmniClean, we evaluate OmniBoost, a three-stage post-training recipe based on Qwen2.5-Omni-3B: mixed bi-modal SFT, mixed-modality RLVR, and SFT on self-distilled data. Balanced bi-modal SFT gives limited and uneven gains, RLVR provides the first broad improvement, and self-distillation reshapes the benchmark profile. After SFT on self-distilled data, the 3B model reaches performance comparable to, and in aggregate slightly above, Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Instruct without using a stronger omni-modal teacher. These results show that omni-modal progress is easier to interpret when evaluation controls visual leakage, and that small omni-modal models can benefit from staged post-training with self-distilled omni-query supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniClean去偏评测集和OmniBoost三阶段后训练方法，使3B全模态模型性能接近30B模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前全模态基准评测中视觉捷径可能夸大模型能力，且后训练策略在去偏设置下的行为尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何构建视觉去偏的全模态评测集，并设计有效的后训练方法提升小模型的全模态理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉捷径导致基准分数虚高；平衡双模态SFT提升有限且不均衡；RLVR首次带来广泛提升；自蒸馏重塑基准表现。
analysis.method: 三阶段后训练：混合双模态SFT、混合模态RLVR、自蒸馏数据上的SFT；并构建OmniClean去偏评测集。
contributions: 提出OmniClean，通过视觉探针过滤可视觉解答的查询，保留8,551个查询的干净评测集。
提出OmniBoost三阶段后训练方法，使3B模型性能接近30B模型。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniClean上评估OmniBoost，对比Qwen2.5-Omni-3B和Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Instruct。
limitations: 仅基于Qwen2.5-Omni-3B模型，泛化性待验证。
自蒸馏数据生成可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniClean去偏评测集和OmniBoost三阶段后训练方法，使3B全模态模型性能接近30B模型。

papers.title: Resilient Vision-Tabular Multimodal Learning under Modality Missingness
papers.abstract: Multimodal deep learning has shown strong potential in medical applications by integrating heterogeneous data sources such as medical images and structured clinical variables. However, most existing approaches implicitly assume complete modality availability, an assumption that rarely holds in real-world clinical settings where entire modalities and individual features are frequently missing. In this work, we propose a multimodal transformer framework for joint vision-tabular learning explicitly designed to operate under pervasive modality missingness, without relying on imputation or heuristic model switching. The architecture integrates three components: a vision, a tabular, and a multimodal fusion encoder. Unimodal representations are weighted through learnable modality tokens and fused via intermediate fusion with masked self-attention, which excludes missing tokens and modalities from information aggregation and gradient propagation. To further enhance resilience, we introduce a modality-dropout regularization strategy that stochastically removes available modalities during training, encouraging the model to exploit complementary information under partial data availability. We evaluate our approach on the MIMIC-CXR dataset paired with structured clinical data from MIMIC-IV for multilabel classification of 14 diagnostic findings with incomplete annotations. Two parallel systematic stress-test protocols progressively increase training and inference missingness in each modality separately, spanning fully multimodal to fully unimodal scenarios. Across all missingness regimes, the proposed method consistently outperforms representative baselines, showing smoother performance degradation and improved robustness. Ablation studies further demonstrate that attention-level masking and intermediate fusion with joint fine-tuning are key to resilient multimodal inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需插补或模型切换的多模态Transformer框架，通过可学习模态令牌、掩码自注意力和模态丢弃正则化，在视觉-表格数据缺失场景下实现鲁棒推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态方法假设模态完整可用，但临床中常出现整模态或特征缺失，缺乏专门应对此类缺失的鲁棒框架。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉-表格多模态学习中模态和特征普遍缺失下的鲁棒推理问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多模态Transformer框架，包含视觉、表格和多模态融合编码器；通过可学习模态令牌加权单模态表示，采用掩码自注意力中间融合排除缺失模态；引入模态丢弃正则化随机移除可用模态以增强鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出一种无需插补或模型切换的多模态Transformer框架，专门应对模态缺失场景。
设计可学习模态令牌和掩码自注意力机制实现缺失感知融合。
引入模态丢弃正则化策略提升模型对部分数据可用性的鲁棒性。
在MIMIC-CXR和MIMIC-IV数据集上通过系统性压力测试验证方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR图像与MIMIC-IV结构化临床数据上进行14种诊断发现的多标签分类，采用两种并行压力测试协议逐步增加训练和推理缺失率，方法在所有缺失场景下优于基线，消融实验表明注意力级掩码和中间融合联合微调是关键。
limitations: 仅在单一医学数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
未探讨其他模态（如文本）的缺失场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需插补或模型切换的多模态Transformer框架，通过可学习模态令牌、掩码自注意力和模态丢弃正则化，在视觉-表格数据缺失场景下实现鲁棒推理。

papers.title: Very Efficient Listwise Multimodal Reranking for Long Documents
papers.abstract: Listwise reranking is a key yet computationally expensive component in vision-centric retrieval and multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (M-RAG) over long documents. While recent VLM-based rerankers achieve strong accuracy, their practicality is often limited by long visual-token sequences and multi-step autoregressive decoding. We propose ZipRerank, a highly efficient listwise multimodal reranker that directly addresses both bottlenecks. It reduces input length via a lightweight query-image early interaction mechanism and eliminates autoregressive decoding by scoring all candidates in a single forward pass. To enable effective learning, ZipRerank adopts a two-stage training strategy: (i) listwise pretraining on large-scale text data rendered as images, and (ii) multimodal finetuning with VLM-teacher-distilled soft-ranking supervision. Extensive experiments on the MMDocIR benchmark show that ZipRerank matches or surpasses state-of-the-art multimodal rerankers while reducing LLM inference latency by up to an order of magnitude, making it well-suited for latency-sensitive real-world systems. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: ZipRerank 通过查询-图像早期交互和单次前向评分，大幅降低多模态重排序的计算开销，在长文档检索中匹配 SOTA 且延迟降低一个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 列表式重排序在视觉中心检索和多模态 RAG 中精度高但计算昂贵，长视觉 token 序列和自回归解码是主要瓶颈，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效的多模态列表式重排序器，同时减少输入长度和消除自回归解码，以在保持精度的前提下显著降低推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ZipRerank，包含查询-图像早期交互机制压缩输入长度，以及单次前向评分所有候选；采用两阶段训练：先在大规模文本渲染图像上列表式预训练，再通过 VLM 教师蒸馏的软排序监督进行多模态微调。
contributions: 提出 ZipRerank，一种高效的多模态列表式重排序器，通过早期交互和单次前向评分解决长 token 和自回归解码瓶颈。
设计两阶段训练策略，结合文本渲染图像预训练和 VLM 教师蒸馏，实现有效学习。
在 MMDocIR 基准上匹配或超越 SOTA，同时 LLM 推理延迟降低一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在 MMDocIR 基准上评估，与 SOTA 多模态重排序器对比，ZipRerank 匹配或超越其精度，且 LLM 推理延迟降低一个数量级。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 VLM 教师模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对长文档场景，短文档或不同模态组合的效果未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ZipRerank 通过查询-图像早期交互和单次前向评分，大幅降低多模态重排序的计算开销，在长文档检索中匹配 SOTA 且延迟降低一个数量级。

papers.title: See What Matters: Differentiable Grid Sample Pruning for Generalizable Vision-Language-Action Model
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown remarkable promise in robotics manipulation, yet their high computational cost hinders real-time deployment. Existing token pruning methods suffer from a fundamental trade-off: aggressive compression using pruning inevitably discards critical geometric details like contact points, leading to severe performance degradation. This forces a compromise, limiting the achievable compression rate and thus the potential speedup. We argue that breaking this trade-off requires rethinking compression as a geometry-aware, continuous token resampling in the vision encoder. To this end, we propose the Differentiable Grid Sampler (GridS), a plug-and-play module that performs task-aware, continuous resampling of visual tokens in VLA. By adaptively predicting a minimal set of salient coordinates and extracting features via differentiable interpolation, GridS preserves essential spatial information while achieving drastic compression (with fewer than 10% original visual tokens). Experiments on both LIBERO benchmark and a real robotic platform demonstrate that validating the lowest feasible visual token count reported to date, GridS achieves a 76% reduction in FLOPs with no degradation in the success rate. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出可微分网格采样器GridS，通过几何感知的连续重采样实现VLA模型视觉token压缩，在保持成功率的同时减少76% FLOPs。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型计算成本高，难以实时部署；现有token剪枝方法在压缩时丢弃关键几何细节（如接触点），导致性能严重下降，限制了压缩率和加速潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何在VLA模型中实现高压缩率的同时保留关键空间几何信息，避免性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有token剪枝方法存在根本性权衡：激进压缩会丢弃关键几何细节（如接触点），导致性能严重下降，从而限制了可实现的压缩率和加速。
analysis.method: 提出可微分网格采样器（GridS），一种即插即用模块，在VLA视觉编码器中执行任务感知的连续token重采样，通过自适应预测最小显著坐标集并利用可微分插值提取特征，保留关键空间信息。
contributions: 提出GridS模块，实现几何感知的连续视觉token重采样，突破剪枝方法的性能-压缩权衡。
在LIBERO基准和真实机器人平台上验证，仅用不到10%原始视觉token，实现76% FLOPs减少且成功率无下降。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO基准和真实机器人平台上进行实验，验证了最低可行视觉token数量，实现76% FLOPs减少且成功率无下降。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLA架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及在更复杂任务或多样化环境中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可微分网格采样器GridS，通过几何感知的连续重采样实现VLA模型视觉token压缩，在保持成功率的同时减少76% FLOPs。

papers.title: Stop Marginalizing My Dreams: Model Inversion via Laplace Kernel for Continual Learning
papers.abstract: Data-free continual learning (DFCIL) relies on model inversion to synthesize pseudo-samples and mitigate catastrophic forgetting. However, existing inversion methods are fundamentally limited by a simplifying assumption: they model feature distributions using diagonal covariance, effectively ignoring correlations that define the geometry of learned representations. As a result, synthesized samples often lack fidelity, limiting knowledge retention. In this work, we show that modeling feature dependencies is a key ingredient for effective DFCIL. We introduce REMIX, a structured covariance modeling framework that enables scalable full-covariance modeling without the prohibitive cost of dense matrix inversion and log-determinant computation. By leveraging a Laplace kernel parameterization, REMIX captures structured feature dependencies using memory that scales linearly with the feature dimensionality, while requiring only an additional logarithmic factor in computation. Modeling these correlations produces more coherent synthetic samples and consistently improves performance across standard DFCIL benchmarks. Our results demonstrate that moving beyond diagonal assumptions is essential for effective and scalable data-free continual learning. Our code is available at https://github. com/pkrukowski1/REMIX-Model-Inversion-via-Laplace-Kernel.

analysis.tldr: REMIX 通过拉普拉斯核参数化实现可扩展的全协方差建模，提升无数据持续学习中模型反演的样本保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 无数据持续学习依赖模型反演生成伪样本来缓解灾难性遗忘，但现有方法假设特征分布为对角协方差，忽略特征相关性，导致合成样本保真度低，限制了知识保留。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入密集矩阵求逆和对数行列式计算的高昂成本下，对特征分布进行全协方差建模，以生成更逼真的伪样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，忽略特征相关性的对角协方差假设是现有模型反演方法保真度低的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出 REMIX 框架，利用拉普拉斯核参数化协方差矩阵，实现可扩展的全协方差建模，内存随特征维度线性增长，计算仅增加对数因子。
contributions: 揭示了特征依赖建模对无数据持续学习有效性的关键作用。
提出 REMIX，一种基于拉普拉斯核的结构化协方差建模方法，实现高效的全协方差估计。
在标准 DFCIL 基准上一致提升性能，验证了超越对角假设的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准无数据持续学习基准上进行了实验，结果表明 REMIX 一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特征维度适中的场景，极高维度下对数因子仍可能带来计算压力。
拉普拉斯核参数化可能无法捕捉所有类型的特征相关性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: REMIX 通过拉普拉斯核参数化实现可扩展的全协方差建模，提升无数据持续学习中模型反演的样本保真度。

papers.title: DiffSegLung: Diffusion Radiomic Distillation for Unsupervised Lung Pathology Segmentation
papers.abstract: Unsupervised segmentation of pulmonary pathologies in CT remains an open challenge due to the absence of annotated multi pathology cohorts and the failure of existing diffusion-based methods to exploit the quantitative Hounsfield Unit (HU) signal that physically distinguishes tissue classes. To address this, we propose DiffSegLung,a framework that introduces Diffusion Radiomic Distillation, in which handcrafted radiomic descriptors serve as a physics grounded teacher to shape the bottleneck of a 3D diffusion U-Net via a contrastive objective, transferring pathology discriminative structure into the learned representation without any annotations. At inference, the teacher is discarded and multitimestep bottleneck features are clustered by a Gaussian Mixture Model with HU-guided label assignment, followed by Sobel Diffusion Fusion for boundary refinement. Evaluated on 190 expert annotated axial slices drawn from four heterogeneous CT cohorts, Diff-SegLung improves segmentation across all four pathology classes over unsupervised baselines and improves generation fidelity over prior CT diffusion models.

analysis.tldr: DiffSegLung 通过扩散放射组学蒸馏，在无标注 CT 上实现无监督肺病理分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督肺病理分割因缺乏标注的多病理数据集以及现有扩散方法未能利用 CT 中物理区分组织的 HU 信号而面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 在无标注条件下，利用 CT 的 HU 物理信号进行无监督肺病理分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有扩散方法未能利用 HU 信号，导致分割性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出扩散放射组学蒸馏框架，使用手工放射组学描述符作为教师，通过对比学习塑造 3D 扩散 U-Net 瓶颈；推理时丢弃教师，用高斯混合模型聚类多时间步瓶颈特征，结合 HU 引导标签分配和 Sobel 扩散融合进行边界细化。
contributions: 提出扩散放射组学蒸馏，将物理驱动的放射组学知识蒸馏到扩散模型表征中。
在四个异质 CT 数据集上，无监督分割性能优于基线，且生成保真度优于先前 CT 扩散模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 190 张专家标注的轴向切片（来自四个异质 CT 数据集）上评估，分割性能在所有四个病理类别上优于无监督基线，生成保真度优于先前 CT 扩散模型。
limitations: 仅评估了 190 张切片，规模有限。
依赖手工放射组学特征，可能无法泛化到所有病理类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DiffSegLung 通过扩散放射组学蒸馏，在无标注 CT 上实现无监督肺病理分割。

papers.title: One-Step Generative Modeling via Wasserstein Gradient Flows
papers.abstract: Diffusion models and flow-based methods have shown impressive generative capability, especially for images, but their sampling is expensive because it requires many iterative updates. We introduce W-Flow, a framework for training a generator that transforms samples from a simple reference distribution into samples from a target data distribution in a single step. This is achieved in two steps: we first define an evolution from the reference distribution to the target distribution through a Wasserstein gradient flow that minimizes an energy functional; second, we train a static neural generator to compress this evolution into one-step generation. We instantiate the energy functional with the Sinkhorn divergence, which yields an efficient optimal-transport-based update rule that captures global distributional discrepancy and improves coverage of the target distribution. We further prove that the finite-sample training dynamics converge to the continuous-time distributional dynamics under suitable assumptions. Empirically, W-Flow sets a new state of the art for one-step ImageNet 256$\times$256 generation, achieving 1.29 FID, with improved mode coverage and domain transfer. Compared to multi-step diffusion models with similar FID scores, our method yields approximately 100$\times$ faster sampling. These results show that Wasserstein gradient flows provide a principled and effective foundation for fast and high-fidelity generative modeling.

analysis.tldr: W-Flow 通过 Wasserstein 梯度流将多步扩散压缩为单步生成，在 ImageNet 256×256 上达到 1.29 FID，采样速度提升约 100 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型和流方法生成质量高但采样需要多步迭代，计算成本高，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将多步生成过程压缩为单步，同时保持高保真度和模式覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义从参考分布到目标分布的 Wasserstein 梯度流（最小化能量泛函），然后用静态神经网络将整个演化压缩为单步生成；能量泛函采用 Sinkhorn 散度，基于最优传输更新规则。
contributions: 提出 W-Flow 框架，通过 Wasserstein 梯度流实现单步生成，显著加速采样。
证明有限样本训练动态收敛到连续时间分布动态。
在 ImageNet 256×256 上达到 SOTA 单步生成 FID 1.29，采样速度比多步扩散模型快约 100 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet 256×256 上评估，FID 为 1.29，采样速度提升约 100 倍，并展示了改进的模式覆盖和域迁移。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率或复杂分布生成效果有限。
单步生成可能牺牲部分多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: W-Flow 通过 Wasserstein 梯度流将多步扩散压缩为单步生成，在 ImageNet 256×256 上达到 1.29 FID，采样速度提升约 100 倍。

papers.title: DreamAvoid: Critical-Phase Test-Time Dreaming to Avoid Failures in VLA Policies
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are often brittle in fine-grained manipulation, where minor action errors during the critical phases can rapidly escalate into irrecoverable failures.
