To address the reformulation challenge, we propose Automated Reformulation with Experience Memory (AutoREM), a tuning-free memory-augmented framework that autonomously builds a structured textual experience memory by reflecting on past failed trajectories through a tailored offline adaptation procedure. AutoREM requires neither domain-specific expert knowledge nor parameter updates, and the resulting memory readily transfers across different base LLMs. Experimental results show that AutoREM consistently improves the accuracy and efficiency of RO reformulation across in-distribution datasets, out-of-distribution datasets, and diverse base LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆增强的LLM框架AutoREM，无需微调即可自动将鲁棒优化问题转化为可求解形式，并构建了专用基准AutoRO-Bench。
analysis.research_motivation: 鲁棒优化（RO）是处理不确定决策的重要框架，但需要手动将不确定模型转化为可求解的确定性形式，这一过程繁琐且易错。现有LLM在自动化优化建模方面有潜力，但RO转化需要精确的多步推理和数学一致性，尚无专用基准和有效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM自动、准确地将鲁棒优化问题转化为可求解的确定性形式，且无需领域专家知识或参数更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AutoREM框架：通过离线自适应过程，让LLM反思过去失败的转化轨迹，自主构建结构化的文本经验记忆；该记忆无需微调即可在不同基础LLM间迁移，辅助新问题的转化。
contributions: 开发了AutoRO-Bench基准，包含自动化数据生成管道和RO应用任务数据集，用于系统评估LLM的RO转化能力。
提出AutoREM框架，无需微调或领域专家知识，通过记忆增强提升RO转化的准确性和效率，且记忆可跨模型迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在分布内、分布外数据集以及多种基础LLM上，AutoREM一致提升了RO转化的准确性和效率。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的初始推理能力，对弱基座模型效果有限。
记忆构建过程需要离线轨迹，可能无法适应实时变化的问题类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出记忆增强的LLM框架AutoREM，无需微调即可自动将鲁棒优化问题转化为可求解形式，并构建了专用基准AutoRO-Bench。

papers.title: Beyond World-Frame Action Heads: Motion-Centric Action Frames for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have advanced rapidly with stronger backbones, broader pre-training, and larger demonstration datasets, yet their action heads remain largely homogeneous: most directly predict action commands in a fixed world coordinate frame. We propose \textbf{MCF-Proto}, a lightweight action head that equips VLA policies with a Motion-Centric Action Frame (MCF) and a prototype-based action parameterization. At each step, the policy predicts a rotation $R_t \in SO(3)$, composes actions in the transformed local frame from a set of prototypes, and maps them back to the world frame for end-to-end training, using only standard demonstrations without auxiliary supervision. This simple design induces stable emergent structure. Without explicit directional labels, the learned local frames develop a stable geometric structure whose axes are strongly compatible with demonstrated end-effector motion. Meanwhile, actions in the learned representation become substantially more compact, with variation captured by fewer dominant directions and more regularly organized by shared prototypes. These structural properties translate into improved robustness, especially under geometric perturbations. Our results suggest that adding lightweight geometric and compositional structure to the action head can materially improve how VLA policies organize and generalize robotic manipulation behavior. An anonymized code repository is provided in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCF-Proto动作头，通过运动中心动作帧和原型参数化提升VLA策略的鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型的动作头大多直接预测固定世界坐标系下的动作命令，缺乏对运动结构的显式建模，导致在几何扰动下泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级动作头，使VLA策略能够学习运动中心化的动作表示，提升鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MCF-Proto动作头，包含运动中心动作帧（MCF）和基于原型的动作参数化。每步预测旋转矩阵R_t，在变换后的局部坐标系中从一组原型组合动作，再映射回世界坐标系进行端到端训练，无需辅助监督。
contributions: 提出MCF-Proto，一种轻量级动作头，通过运动中心动作帧和原型参数化增强VLA策略。
实验表明该方法在几何扰动下具有更好的鲁棒性，且学习到的局部帧具有稳定的几何结构，动作表示更紧凑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定机器人操作任务上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
原型数量等超参数对性能的影响未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCF-Proto动作头，通过运动中心动作帧和原型参数化提升VLA策略的鲁棒性和泛化性。

papers.title: Why Users Go There: World Knowledge-Augmented Generative Next POI Recommendation
papers.abstract: Generative point-of-interest (POI) recommendation models based on large language models (LLMs) have shown promising results by formulating next POI prediction as a sequence generation task. However, the knowledge encoded in these models remains fixed after training, making them unable to perceive evolving real-world conditions that shape user mobility decisions, such as local events and cultural trends. To bridge this gap, we propose AWARE (Agent-based World knowledge Augmented REcommendation), which employs an LLM agent to generate location- and time-aware contextual narratives that capture regional cultural characteristics, seasonal trends, and ongoing events relevant to each user. Rather than introducing generic or noisy information, AWARE further anchors these narratives in each user's behavioral context, grounding external world knowledge in personalized spatial-temporal patterns. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that AWARE consistently outperforms competitive baselines, achieving up to 12.4% relative improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出AWARE框架，利用LLM代理生成时空感知的上下文叙事，增强生成式POI推荐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式POI推荐模型基于LLM，但训练后知识固定，无法感知影响用户移动决策的动态现实世界条件（如本地事件、文化趋势），导致推荐缺乏时效性和上下文相关性。
analysis.problem: 如何将动态的外部世界知识（如区域文化、季节趋势、事件）融入生成式POI推荐，以提升推荐准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AWARE框架，使用LLM代理生成位置和时间感知的上下文叙事，捕捉区域文化特征、季节趋势和用户相关事件，并通过用户行为上下文锚定这些叙事，将外部世界知识个性化地融入时空模式。
contributions: 提出AWARE框架，首次将动态外部世界知识通过LLM代理生成的上下文叙事融入生成式POI推荐。
在三个真实数据集上验证了AWARE的有效性，相对提升最高达12.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个真实数据集上进行实验，AWARE一致优于竞争基线，相对提升最高12.4%。
limitations: 依赖LLM代理生成叙事，可能引入计算开销和延迟。
外部知识源的质量和覆盖范围可能影响推荐效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AWARE框架，利用LLM代理生成时空感知的上下文叙事，增强生成式POI推荐。

papers.title: Beyond Inefficiency: Systemic Costs of Incivility in Multi-Agent Monte Carlo Simulations
papers.abstract: Unconstructive debate and uncivil communication carry well-documented costs for productivity and cohesion, yet isolating their effect on operational efficiency has proven difficult. Human subject research in this domain is constrained by ethical oversight, limited reproducibility, and the inherent unpredictability of naturalistic settings. We address this gap by leveraging Large Language Model (LLM) based Multi-Agent Systems as a controlled sociological sandbox, enabling systematic manipulation of communicative behavior at scale. Using a Monte Carlo simulation framework, we generate thousands of structured 1-on-1 adversarial debates across varying toxicity conditions, measuring convergence time, defined as the number of rounds required to reach a conclusion, as a proxy for interactional efficiency. Building on a prior study, we replicate and extend its findings across two additional LLM agents of varying parameter size, allowing us to assess whether the effects of toxic behavior on debate dynamics generalize across model scale. The convergence latency of 25% reported in the previous study was confirmed. It was found that this latency is significantly bigger for models with fewer parameters. We further identify a significant first-mover advantage, whereby the agent initiating the discussion wins significantly above chance regardless of toxicity condition.

analysis.tldr: 基于LLM的多智能体蒙特卡洛模拟证实，不文明辩论会显著延长收敛时间，且小模型受影响更大，同时存在首发优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 不文明沟通对效率的影响难以在人类实验中隔离研究，受限于伦理、可重复性和不可预测性，亟需可控的模拟环境。
analysis.problem: 量化不文明行为在多智能体辩论中对交互效率（收敛时间）的系统性影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不文明行为导致收敛延迟约25%，且小参数模型延迟更大；存在显著的首发优势，即先发言者胜率显著高于随机水平。
analysis.method: 基于LLM的多智能体系统作为受控社会学沙盒，结合蒙特卡洛模拟生成大量结构化1对1对抗辩论，通过改变毒性条件测量收敛时间。
contributions: 验证并扩展了先前研究中不文明行为导致25%收敛延迟的发现，并揭示模型规模对延迟的影响。
首次在多智能体辩论中识别出显著的首发优势，且该优势不受毒性条件影响。
analysis.experiments: 使用多个LLM智能体（不同参数规模）在蒙特卡洛模拟框架下进行数千场辩论，测量收敛时间并分析毒性条件的影响。
limitations: 仅模拟1对1辩论，未扩展到多智能体群体互动。
毒性条件可能未完全覆盖现实中的不文明行为多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于LLM的多智能体蒙特卡洛模拟证实，不文明辩论会显著延长收敛时间，且小模型受影响更大，同时存在首发优势。

papers.title: Towards Visually Grounded Multimodal Summarization via Cross-Modal Transformer and Gated Attention
papers.abstract: Multimodal summarization requires models to jointly understand textual and visual inputs to generate concise, semantically coherent summaries. Existing methods often inject shallow visual features into deep language models, leading to representational mismatches and weak cross-modal grounding. We propose a unified framework that jointly performs text summarization and representative image selection. Our system, SPeCTrA-Sum (Sampler Perceiver with Cross-modal Transformer and gated Attention for Summarization), introduces two key innovations. First, a Deep Visual Processor (DVP) aligns the visual encoder with the language model at corresponding depths, enabling hierarchical, layer-wise fusion that preserves semantic consistency. Second, a lightweight Visual Relevance Predictor (VRP) selects salient and diverse images by distilling soft labels from a Determinantal Point Processes (DPP) teacher. SPeCTrA-Sum is trained using a multi-objective loss that combines autoregressive summarization, cross-modal alignment, and DPP-based distillation. Experiments show that our system produces more accurate, visually grounded summaries and selects more representative images, demonstrating the benefits of depth-aware fusion and principled image selection for multimodal summarization.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度对齐的跨模态融合与DPP引导图像选择框架，提升多模态摘要的视觉基础性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将浅层视觉特征注入深层语言模型，导致表征不匹配和跨模态基础薄弱，限制了多模态摘要的语义一致性和视觉相关性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现文本摘要与代表性图像选择的联合优化，并解决视觉与语言特征深度对齐问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SPeCTrA-Sum框架，包含深度视觉处理器（DVP）实现层级融合，以及视觉相关性预测器（VRP）通过DPP蒸馏选择图像，使用多目标损失联合训练。
contributions: 提出深度视觉处理器（DVP），实现视觉编码器与语言模型在对应深度的层级融合，保持语义一致性。
提出轻量级视觉相关性预测器（VRP），通过DPP蒸馏选择显著且多样的图像。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉编码器和语言模型的对齐质量。
DPP蒸馏可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度对齐的跨模态融合与DPP引导图像选择框架，提升多模态摘要的视觉基础性。

papers.title: When Reasoning Traces Become Performative: Step-Level Evidence that Chain-of-Thought Is an Imperfect Oversight Channel
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) traces are increasingly used both to improve language model capability and to audit model behavior, implicitly assuming that the visible trace remains synchronized with the computation that determines the answer. We test this assumption with a step-level Detect-Classify-Compare framework built around an answer-commitment proxy that is cross-validated with Patchscopes, tuned-lens probes, and causal direction ablation. Across nine models and seven reasoning benchmarks, latent commitment and explicit answer arrival align on only 61.9% of steps on average. The dominant mismatch pattern is confabulated continuation: 58.0% of detected mismatch events occur after the answer-commitment proxy has already stabilized while the trace continues producing deliberative-looking text, and a vacuousness analysis shows that the committed answer does not change during these steps. In architecture-matched Qwen2.5/DeepSeek-R1-Distill comparisons, the reasoning pipeline changes failure composition more than aggregate alignment, most clearly at 32B where confabulated steps decrease as contradictory states increase. Lower step-level alignment is also associated with larger CoT utility, suggesting that the settings that benefit most from CoT are often the least temporally faithful. Paired truncation and a complementary donor-corruption test further indicate that much post-commitment text is not load-bearing for the final answer. These findings suggest that CoT can remain useful while still being an unreliable report of when the answer was formed.

analysis.tldr: 思维链推理轨迹在步骤层面与模型实际答案形成时间不同步，存在大量虚构延续现象，削弱了其作为监督通道的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 思维链（CoT）被广泛用于提升语言模型能力和审计模型行为，但其隐含假设——可见推理轨迹与决定答案的计算过程同步——尚未得到严格验证。如果该假设不成立，CoT作为可解释性和安全审计工具的价值将受到质疑。
analysis.problem: 验证CoT推理轨迹在步骤层面是否真实反映模型答案形成的时间点，并量化其不同步的模式和程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，在九个模型和七个推理基准上，潜在答案承诺与显式答案到达仅在平均61.9%的步骤上对齐。主要失配模式是虚构延续：58.0%的检测到的失配事件发生在答案承诺代理已稳定后，而轨迹继续生成看似深思熟虑的文本，且空洞分析表明承诺答案在这些步骤中未改变。
analysis.method: 提出一个步骤级的检测-分类-比较框架，基于答案承诺代理（通过Patchscopes、调谐透镜探针和因果方向消融交叉验证），用于识别和分类CoT轨迹与模型内部状态之间的失配事件。
contributions: 首次在步骤级别系统性地证明了CoT推理轨迹与模型答案形成时间之间存在显著不同步，平均对齐率仅61.9%。
识别并量化了主要失配模式——虚构延续，并展示了后承诺文本对最终答案的非承重性。
analysis.experiments: 在九个模型（包括Qwen2.5和DeepSeek-R1-Distill）和七个推理基准上进行了实验，使用步骤级框架分析对齐率、失配模式，并通过截断和捐赠者-破坏测试验证后承诺文本的非承重性。
limitations: 答案承诺代理的准确性依赖于交叉验证方法，可能存在未覆盖的偏差。
实验仅覆盖有限模型和基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 思维链推理轨迹在步骤层面与模型实际答案形成时间不同步，存在大量虚构延续现象，削弱了其作为监督通道的可靠性。

papers.title: OptArgus: A Multi-Agent System to Detect Hallucinations in LLM-based Optimization Modeling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to translate natural-language optimization problems into mathematical formulations and solver code, but matching the reference objective value is not a reliable test of correctness: an artifact may agree numerically while still changing the underlying optimization semantics. We formulate this issue as \emph{optimization-modeling hallucination detection}, namely structural consistency auditing over the problem description, symbolic model, and solver implementation. We develop, to our knowledge, the first fine-grained hallucination taxonomy specifically for optimization modeling, spanning objective, variable, constraint, and implementation failures. We use this taxonomy to design OptArgus, a multi-agent detector with conductor routing, specialist auditors, and evidence consolidation. To evaluate this setting, we introduce a three-part benchmark suite with $484$ clean artifacts, $1266$ controlled injected artifacts, and $6292$ natural LLM-generated artifacts. Against a matched single-agent baseline, OptArgus produces fewer false alarms on clean artifacts, more accurate top-ranked localization on controlled single-error cases, and stronger detection on natural model outputs. Together, these contributions turn optimization-modeling hallucination detection into a concrete empirical problem and suggest that modular, taxonomy-grounded auditing is a practical route to more reliable optimization modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体系统 OptArgus，用于检测 LLM 在优化建模中的幻觉，并构建了细粒度幻觉分类法和基准套件。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 用于将自然语言优化问题转化为数学公式和求解器代码时，仅匹配参考目标值不足以验证正确性，因为数值一致但语义可能改变，需要结构一致性审计。
analysis.problem: 检测优化建模中的幻觉，即对问题描述、符号模型和求解器实现进行结构一致性审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，匹配参考目标值不是可靠的正确性测试，因为数值一致但底层优化语义可能改变。
analysis.method: OptArgus：一个多智能体检测器，包含指挥路由、专业审计员和证据整合模块，基于细粒度幻觉分类法（目标、变量、约束、实现失败）进行审计。
contributions: 首次提出针对优化建模的细粒度幻觉分类法。
开发多智能体检测系统 OptArgus，实现结构化审计。
构建三部分基准套件（484个干净、1266个受控注入、6292个自然生成），用于评估幻觉检测。
analysis.experiments: 在基准套件上，OptArgus 相比单智能体基线，在干净工件上产生更少误报，在受控单错误案例中更准确，在自然模型输出上检测更强。
limitations: 可能依赖特定分类法，泛化性需验证。
多智能体系统计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体系统 OptArgus，用于检测 LLM 在优化建模中的幻觉，并构建了细粒度幻觉分类法和基准套件。

papers.title: SafeSteer: A Decoding-level Defense Mechanism for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are gaining increasing attention. Due to the heterogeneity of their input features, they face significant challenges in terms of jailbreak defenses. Current defense methods rely on costly fine-tuning or inefficient post-hoc interventions, limiting their ability to address novel attacks and involving performance trade-offs. To address the above issues, we explore the inherent safety capabilities within MLLMs and quantify their intrinsic ability to discern harmfulness at decoding stage. We observe that 1) MLLMs can distinguish the harmful and harmless inputs during decoding process, 2) Image-based attacks are more stealthy. Based on these insights, we introduce SafeSteer, a decoding-level defense mechanism for MLLMs. Specifically, it includes a Decoding-Probe, a lightweight probe for detecting and correcting harmful output during decoding, which iteratively steers the decoding process toward safety. Furthermore, a modal semantic alignment vector is integrated to transfer the strong textual safety alignment to the vision modality. Experiments on multiple MLLMs demonstrate that SafeSterr can improve MLLMs' safety by up to 33.40\% without fine-tuning. Notably, it can maintain the effectiveness of MLLMs, ensuring a balance between their helpfulness and harmlessness.

analysis.tldr: SafeSteer 是一种无需微调的 MLLM 解码级防御机制，通过轻量探针和模态语义对齐向量提升安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型面临越狱攻击的挑战，现有防御方法依赖昂贵的微调或低效的后处理，难以应对新型攻击且存在性能权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调的情况下，高效防御多模态大模型的越狱攻击，同时保持模型的有用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到 MLLM 在解码阶段能区分有害和无害输入，且基于图像的攻击更隐蔽。
analysis.method: 提出 SafeSteer，包含 Decoding-Probe（轻量探针，在解码时检测并纠正有害输出）和模态语义对齐向量（将文本安全对齐迁移到视觉模态）。
contributions: 首次探索 MLLM 在解码阶段的内在安全能力，并量化其区分有害性的能力。
提出无需微调的解码级防御机制 SafeSteer，通过探针和模态对齐提升安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 MLLM 上实验，SafeSteer 将安全性提升高达 33.40%，且保持模型有效性和有用性与无害性的平衡。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的越狱攻击有效。
模态对齐向量的泛化性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeSteer 是一种无需微调的 MLLM 解码级防御机制，通过轻量探针和模态语义对齐向量提升安全性。

papers.title: Toward Stable Value Alignment: Introducing Independent Modules for Consistent Value Guidance
papers.abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) with human values typically relies on post-training or inference-time steering that directly manipulates the backbone's parameters or representation space. However, a critical gap exists: the model's residual stream is highly dynamic, in which values exist as fragile, low-dimensional properties, inherently incompatible with the stability required for consistent value expression. In this paper, we propose the Stable Value Guidance Transformer (SVGT), which addresses this gap through an independent value module incorporating two key designs: (1) independent value modeling, maintaining normative representations in a dedicated value space isolated from the backbone, and (2) explicit behavioral guidance, transducing these stable signals into learnable latent Bridge Tokens. These tokens serve as dynamic value anchors to explicitly steer the generative trajectory, ensuring robust adherence across diverse contexts without disrupting the backbone's internal representations. Experiments across multiple backbones and safety benchmarks show that SVGT generally reduces harmful scores by over 70% while maintaining generation fluency, demonstrating the efficacy of architecturally grounded value modeling. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出独立值模块SVGT，通过桥接令牌稳定引导LLM生成，减少有害输出超70%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM对齐方法直接操纵骨干参数或表示空间，但残差流高度动态，值作为脆弱低维属性难以稳定表达，导致对齐不一致。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM中值表达不稳定、难以在多样上下文中保持一致行为引导的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出残差流高度动态，值作为脆弱低维属性存在，与稳定值表达所需的不变性不兼容。
analysis.method: 提出稳定值引导Transformer（SVGT），包含独立值建模（在专用值空间维护规范表示）和显式行为引导（将稳定信号转换为可学习潜在桥接令牌，作为动态值锚点引导生成轨迹）。
contributions: 提出独立值模块，将值表示与骨干网络解耦，增强稳定性。
设计桥接令牌机制，显式引导生成，不破坏骨干内部表示。
analysis.experiments: 在多个骨干网络和安全基准上，SVGT将有害分数降低超过70%，同时保持生成流畅性。
limitations: 可能仅在安全对齐场景验证，其他值维度（如公平性）未提及。
桥接令牌的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出独立值模块SVGT，通过桥接令牌稳定引导LLM生成，减少有害输出超70%。

papers.title: Measuring What Matters Beyond Text: Evaluating Multimodal Summaries by Quality, Alignment, and Diversity
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have facilitated Multimodal Summarization with Multimodal Output (MSMO), wherein systems generate concise textual summaries accompanied by salient visuals from multimodal sources. However, current MSMO evaluation remains fragmented: text quality, image-text alignment, and visual diversity are typically assessed in isolation using unimodal metrics, making it difficult to capture whether the modalities jointly support a faithful and useful summary. To address this gap, we introduce MM-Eval, a unified evaluation framework that integrates assessments of textual quality, cross-modal alignment, and visual diversity. MM-Eval comprises three components: (1) text quality, measured using OpenFActScore for factual consistency and G-Eval for coherence, fluency, and relevance; (2) image-text relevance, evaluated via an MLLM-as-a-judge approach; and (3) image-set diversity, quantified using Truncated CLIP Entropy. We calibrate MM-Eval through a learned aggregation model trained on the mLLM-EVAL news benchmark, aligning component contributions with human preferences. Our analysis reveals a text-dominant hierarchy in this setting, where factual consistency acts as a critical determinant of perceived overall quality, while visual relevance and diversity provide complementary signals. MM-Eval improves over heuristic aggregation baselines and provides an interpretable, reference-weak framework for comparative evaluation of multimodal summaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出MM-Eval统一评估框架，从文本质量、图文对齐和视觉多样性三个维度综合评价多模态摘要。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态摘要评估碎片化，文本质量、图文对齐和视觉多样性通常用单模态指标孤立评估，难以捕捉模态间是否共同支持忠实有用的摘要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的多模态摘要评估框架，现有方法无法综合衡量文本质量、跨模态对齐和视觉多样性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现文本主导的层级结构：事实一致性是感知整体质量的关键决定因素，而视觉相关性和多样性提供互补信号。
analysis.method: 提出MM-Eval框架，包含三个组件：文本质量（OpenFActScore和G-Eval）、图文相关性（MLLM-as-a-judge）、图像集多样性（Truncated CLIP Entropy），并通过学习聚合模型在mLLM-EVAL基准上校准。
contributions: 提出统一的多模态摘要评估框架MM-Eval，整合文本质量、跨模态对齐和视觉多样性。
通过实验揭示文本主导的评估层级，事实一致性是关键因素。
MM-Eval优于启发式聚合基线，提供可解释、弱参考的评估框架。
analysis.experiments: 在mLLM-EVAL新闻基准上校准和评估，与启发式聚合基线比较，显示改进。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基准和MLLM判断，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论不同语言或领域的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MM-Eval统一评估框架，从文本质量、图文对齐和视觉多样性三个维度综合评价多模态摘要。

papers.title: Persistent and Conversational Multi-Method Explainability for Trustworthy Financial AI
papers.abstract: Financial institutions increasingly require AI explanations that are persistent, cross-validated across methods, and conversationally accessible to human decision-makers. We present an architecture for human-centered explainable AI in financial sentiment analysis that combines three contributions. First, we treat XAI artifacts -- LIME feature attributions, occlusion-based word importance scores, and saliency heatmaps -- as persistent, searchable objects in distributed S3-compatible storage with structured metadata and natural-language summaries, enabling semantic retrieval over explanation history and automatic index reconstruction after system failures. Second, we enable multi-method explanation triangulation, where a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) assistant compares and synthesizes results from multiple XAI methods applied to the same prediction, allowing users to assess explanation robustness through natural-language dialogue. Third, we evaluate the faithfulness of generated explanations using automated checks over grounding completeness, hallucinated claims, and method-attribution behavior. We demonstrate the architecture on an EXTRA-BRAIN financial sentiment analysis pipeline using FinBERT predictions and present evaluation results showing that constrained prompting reduces hallucination rate by 36\% and increases method-attribution citations by 73\% compared to naive prompting. We discuss implications for trustworthy, human-centered AI services in regulated financial environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种持久化、多方法交叉验证且支持对话式交互的可解释AI架构，用于金融情感分析，通过约束提示将幻觉率降低36%。
analysis.research_motivation: 金融机构需要可持久化、跨方法验证且支持对话式交互的AI解释，以增强信任和合规性，但现有XAI方法缺乏持久性、多方法综合和对话能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个支持持久化存储、多方法交叉验证和自然语言对话的金融AI可解释性系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将LIME特征归因、遮挡词重要性分数和显著性热图作为持久化对象存储在S3兼容存储中，并附带结构化元数据和自然语言摘要；通过RAG助手实现多方法解释三角验证；使用自动化检查评估解释的忠实性。
contributions: 提出将XAI工件作为持久化、可搜索对象存储的架构，支持语义检索和故障后自动索引重建。
实现多方法解释三角验证，通过RAG助手比较和综合多种XAI方法的结果。
设计自动化忠实性检查，评估解释的完整性、幻觉和归因行为。
analysis.experiments: 在EXTRA-BRAIN金融情感分析流水线上使用FinBERT预测进行实验，约束提示相比朴素提示将幻觉率降低36%，方法归因引用增加73%。
limitations: 仅针对金融情感分析任务，泛化性有待验证。
依赖特定XAI方法（LIME、遮挡、显著性），可能不适用于其他解释类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种持久化、多方法交叉验证且支持对话式交互的可解释AI架构，用于金融情感分析，通过约束提示将幻觉率降低36%。

papers.title: Explaining and Breaking the Safety-Helpfulness Ceiling via Preference Dimensional Expansion
papers.abstract: In the realm of multi-objective alignment for large language models, balancing disparate human preferences often manifests as a zero-sum conflict. Specifically, the intrinsic tension between competing goals dictates that aggressively optimizing for one metric (e.g., helpfulness) frequently incurs a substantial penalty on another (e.g., harmlessness). While prior work mainly focuses on data selection, parameter merging, or algorithmic balancing during training, these approaches merely force compromises between divergent preferences along a fixed Pareto frontier, failing to fundamentally resolve the inherent trade-off. In this work, we approach this problem from a novel perspective of multi-dimensional rewards. By scaling up the model's rollouts and analyzing the outputs across different reward dimensions, we arrive at a critical conclusion: the conflict among multiple objectives stems from the fact that the prompt itself inherently restricts the achievable multi-dimensional rewards. Based on this core observation, we propose MORA: Multi-Objective Reward Assimilation. Specifically, MORA isolates single-reward prompts through pre-sampling and expands their reward diversity by rewriting the original questions to incorporate multi-dimensional intents. Extensive experiments demonstrate that: (1) in sequential alignment, MORA achieves single-preference improvements ranging from 5% to 12.4%, with exceptional gains in harmlessness, after multiple-preference alignment across helpful, harmless, and truthful dimensions. (2) In simultaneous alignment, MORA achieves an average overall reward improvement of 4.6%. Our codes are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过多维度奖励扩展打破LLM安全与帮助性之间的零和冲突。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型多目标对齐中，帮助性与无害性等偏好存在零和冲突，现有方法仅沿固定帕累托前沿折中，无法根本解决固有权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何从根本上打破多目标对齐中安全与帮助性之间的天花板效应，实现各维度偏好的协同提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出冲突根源在于提示本身固有地限制了可达到的多维奖励空间，即提示内容决定了各维度奖励的上限。
analysis.method: 提出MORA（多目标奖励同化），通过预采样分离单奖励提示，并重写原始问题以融入多维度意图，从而扩展奖励多样性。
contributions: 揭示多目标冲突源于提示对多维奖励空间的固有限制。
提出MORA方法，通过提示重写扩展奖励多样性，打破安全-帮助性天花板。
analysis.experiments: 在顺序对齐中，单偏好提升5%-12.4%，无害性提升显著；在同时对齐中，平均整体奖励提升4.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖预采样质量，对提示重写策略敏感。
实验仅在帮助性、无害性和真实性三个维度验证，泛化性待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多维度奖励扩展打破LLM安全与帮助性之间的零和冲突。

papers.title: OOM-Free Alpamayo via CPU-GPU Memory Swapping for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: End-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for autonomous driving unify perception, reasoning, and control in a single neural network, achieving strong driving performance but requiring 20-60GB of GPU memory-far exceeding the 12-16GB available on commodity GPUs. We present a framework, which enables memory-efficient VLA inference on VRAM-constrained GPUs through system-level optimization alone, without model modification. Our work proceeds in three stages: (1) Sequential Demand Layering reduces VRAM usage from model-level to layer-level granularity; (2) Pipelined Demand Layering hides parameter transfer time within layer execution time via transfer--compute overlap; and (3) a GPU-Resident Layer Decision Policy, informed by per-module residency benefit analysis, eliminates the residual transfer overhead that pipelining cannot hide. We further propose a performance prediction model that determines the optimal configuration-both the number and placement of resident layers-from a single profiling run with less than 1.3% prediction error across all configurations. Applied to NVIDIA's Alpamayo-R1-10B (21.52GB) on an RTX 5070Ti (16GB), our work achieves up to 3.55x speedup over Accelerate offloading while maintaining full BF16 precision.

analysis.tldr: 通过CPU-GPU内存交换实现VLA模型在显存受限GPU上的无OOM推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端VLA模型需要20-60GB GPU显存，远超消费级GPU的12-16GB，限制了其部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在显存受限的GPU上高效运行大型VLA模型，避免内存溢出并保持推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段框架：顺序需求分层、流水线需求分层、GPU驻留层决策策略，以及性能预测模型。
contributions: 提出无需模型修改的系统级优化框架，实现显存受限GPU上的VLA推理。
设计性能预测模型，以<1.3%误差确定最优配置。
在RTX 5070Ti上实现比Accelerate卸载快3.55倍的速度提升。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA Alpamayo-R1-10B模型和RTX 5070Ti GPU上评估，达到3.55倍加速，保持BF16精度。
limitations: 仅针对VLA模型，可能不直接适用于其他架构。
依赖CPU-GPU内存交换，可能受PCIe带宽限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过CPU-GPU内存交换实现VLA模型在显存受限GPU上的无OOM推理。

papers.title: A CAP-like Trilemma for Large Language Models: Correctness, Non-bias, and Utility under Semantic Underdetermination
papers.abstract: The CAP theorem states that a distributed system cannot simultaneously guarantee consistency, availability, and partition tolerance under network partition. Inspired by this result, this paper formulates a CAP-like conjecture for Large Language Models (LLMs). The proposed trilemma states that, under semantic underdetermination, an LLM cannot always simultaneously guarantee strong correctness, strict non-bias, and high utility. A prompt is semantically underdetermined when the given premises do not determine a unique answer. In such cases, a useful and decisive response requires the model to introduce a selection criterion, preference, prior, or value ordering. If this criterion is not supplied by the user or justified by the available premises, the response becomes biased in a broad selection-theoretic sense. Conversely, if the model avoids unsupported preferences, it may preserve correctness and non-bias but may reduce utility through refusal, hedging, or clarification. The paper formalizes this correctness--non-bias--utility trilemma, develops examples, and argues that certain LLM failures arise not merely from model limitations but from the structure of underdetermined decision requests.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM在语义欠定条件下存在正确性、无偏性和效用性三者不可兼得的CAP类三难困境。
analysis.research_motivation: 分布式系统的CAP定理揭示了基本权衡，而LLM在语义欠定场景下也面临类似的结构性矛盾，现有研究多关注模型能力不足，忽略了任务本身的内在约束。
analysis.problem: 在语义欠定（前提不足以唯一确定答案）的提示下，LLM无法同时保证强正确性、严格无偏性和高效用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义欠定导致模型必须引入外部偏好才能给出有用回答，这必然引入偏见；若避免偏见则可能拒绝回答或降低效用。
analysis.method: 形式化定义语义欠定、正确性、无偏性和效用性，构建三难困境的数学框架，并通过示例论证其必然性。
contributions: 提出LLM的CAP类三难困境猜想，揭示正确性、无偏性和效用性之间的根本权衡。
形式化语义欠定概念，并论证某些LLM失败源于任务结构而非模型缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 三难困境的严格证明尚未给出，目前为猜想。
未提供实证数据或量化指标支持。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM在语义欠定条件下存在正确性、无偏性和效用性三者不可兼得的CAP类三难困境。

papers.title: Seirênes: Adversarial Self-Play with Evolving Distractions for LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: We present Seirênes, a self-play RL framework that transforms contextual interference from a failure mode of LLM reasoning into an internal training signal for co-evolving more resilient reasoners. While RL with verifiable rewards has significantly advanced reasoning capabilities, models can still exhibit fragility when encountering non-idealized contexts: scenarios characterized by superfluous information, tangential instructions, or incidental correlations that differ from the clean distributions typical of standard benchmarks. Seirênes harnesses this vulnerability through a parameter-shared and adversarial self-play loop. Within this framework, a single model is trained to both construct plausible yet distracting contexts that expose its own reasoning blind spots, and solve problems by discerning the essential task from these perturbations to recover the core underlying logic. By pitting these competing objectives against each other, Seirênes compels the model to move beyond superficial pattern matching and anchors its capabilities in robust underlying reasoning. This continuous interaction sustains an informative co-evolutionary curriculum as the model improves. Across seven mathematical reasoning benchmarks and model scales from 4B to 30B, Seirênes achieves average gains of +10.2, +9.1, and +7.2 points. Besides, distracting contexts produced by the 4B Seirênes model reduce the accuracy of top-tier closed-source models (GPT and Gemini) by roughly 4--5 points, revealing Seirênes' general ability to uncover reasoning models' blind spots.

analysis.tldr: 通过对抗自博弈将上下文干扰转化为训练信号，提升LLM推理鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RL推理方法在非理想上下文（如冗余信息、无关指令）中表现脆弱，标准基准测试无法覆盖此类场景。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在存在上下文干扰时仍能保持稳健推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在非理想上下文中容易失败，表现为依赖表面模式匹配而非深层逻辑。
analysis.method: 参数共享的对抗自博弈框架：同一模型同时生成干扰上下文和解决原始问题，通过竞争目标共同进化。
contributions: 提出Seirênes框架，将上下文干扰从失败模式转化为训练信号
在7个数学推理基准上，4B-30B模型平均提升+10.2、+9.1、+7.2个点
4B模型生成的干扰上下文可降低GPT/Gemini约4-5个点，揭示盲点
analysis.experiments: 在7个数学推理基准上，模型规模从4B到30B，与基线对比显示显著提升。
limitations: 仅验证数学推理领域，其他推理任务未测试
对抗自博弈可能增加训练计算成本
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对抗自博弈将上下文干扰转化为训练信号，提升LLM推理鲁棒性。

papers.title: Can LLM Agents Respond to Disasters? Benchmarking Heterogeneous Geospatial Reasoning in Emergency Operations
papers.abstract: Operational disaster response goes beyond damage assessment, requiring responders to integrate multi-sensor signals, reason over road networks, populations and key facilities, plan evacuations, and produce actionable reports. However, prior work largely isolates remote-sensing perception or evaluates generic tool use, leaving the end-to-end workflows of emergency operations underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Disaster Operational Response Agent benchmark (DORA), the first agentic benchmark for end-to-end disaster response: 515 expert-authored tasks across 45 real-world disaster events spanning 10 types, paired with expert-verified, replayable gold trajectories totaling 3,500 tool-call steps. Tasks span five dimensions that cover the operational disaster-response pipeline: disaster perception, spatial relational analysis, rescue and evacuation planning, temporal evolution reasoning, and multi-modal report synthesis. Agents compose calls from a 108-tool MCP library over heterogeneous geospatial data: optical, SAR, and multi-spectral imagery across single-, bi-, and multi-temporal sequences (0.015-10m GSD), complemented by elevation and social vector layers. We comprehensively evaluate 13 frontier LLMs on our benchmark, revealing three persistent challenges: 1) disaster-domain grounding exposes unique failure modes (damage-semantic grounding, sensor-modality mismatch, and disaster-pipeline composition); 2) agents are doubly bottlenecked by tool selection and argument grounding, where gold tool-order hints improve accuracy by only 1.08-4.40%, and alternative scaffolds yield at most a 3.24% gain; 3) compositional fragility scales with trajectory length, the agent-to-gold gap widening from 7% to 56% on long pipelines. DORA establishes a rigorous testbed for operationally reliable disaster-response agents.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向端到端应急响应的智能体基准DORA，揭示LLM在灾害地理空间推理中的三大瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有灾害响应工作多局限于遥感感知或通用工具评估，缺乏对端到端应急操作流程（如多传感器融合、路径规划、报告生成）的系统性评测。
analysis.problem: 构建一个覆盖灾害感知、空间关系分析、救援规划、时序推理和多模态报告合成的综合基准，以评估LLM智能体在真实灾害场景中的异构地理空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了三个关键瓶颈：1) 灾害领域接地导致独特失败模式（如损伤语义接地、传感器模态不匹配、灾害流程组合）；2) 工具选择与参数接地双重瓶颈，即使提供黄金工具顺序提示，准确率提升仅1.08-4.40%；3) 组合脆弱性随轨迹长度增加，长流程中智能体与黄金轨迹差距从7%扩大到56%。
analysis.method: 构建DORA基准，包含515个专家编写任务、45个真实灾害事件、108个工具的MCP库，覆盖光学/SAR/多光谱等多种地理空间数据，并评估13个前沿LLM。
contributions: 首个面向端到端灾害应急响应的智能体基准DORA，包含515个专家任务和3500步黄金轨迹。
系统评估13个前沿LLM，揭示灾害领域接地、工具选择与参数接地、组合脆弱性三大挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在DORA基准上评估13个前沿LLM，报告了工具顺序提示和替代框架带来的准确率提升幅度（1.08-4.40%和最多3.24%），以及长流程中智能体与黄金轨迹的差距（7%到56%）。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖45个灾害事件，可能未涵盖所有灾害类型或地理区域。
评估限于13个LLM，未测试更小或领域专用模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向端到端应急响应的智能体基准DORA，揭示LLM在灾害地理空间推理中的三大瓶颈。

papers.title: Nice Fold or Hero Call: Learning Budget-Efficient Thinking for Adaptive Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) improve problem solving through extended reasoning, but often misallocate test-time compute. Existing efficiency methods reduce cost by compressing reasoning traces or conditioning budget on perceived difficulty, yet largely overlook solvability. As a result, they may spend large budgets on queries beyond the model's capability while compressing hard-but-solvable queries that require deeper reasoning. In this work, we formulate adaptive reasoning as a computational investment under uncertainty, where budget should follow the expected return of reasoning rather than perceived difficulty alone. To instantiate this principle, we propose Budget-Efficient Thinking (BET), a two-stage framework that combines behavioral cold-start with GRPO under an investment-cost-aware reward. By aligning solve-or-fold decisions with rollout-derived solvability, BET learns three behaviors: (1) short solve, answering easy queries concisely; (2) nice fold, abstaining early when continued reasoning has near-zero expected return; and (3) hero call, preserving sufficient compute for hard-but-solvable queries. Across seven benchmarks and three base models, BET reduces reasoning tokens by ~55% on average while achieving overall performance improvements, and transfers zero-shot from mathematical reasoning to scientific QA and logical reasoning with comparable efficiency gains.

analysis.tldr: 提出BET框架，通过投资-成本感知奖励让大推理模型自适应分配推理预算，平均减少55%推理token且性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 大推理模型常过度分配测试时计算资源，现有效率方法仅压缩推理链或根据难度分配预算，但忽略了查询的可解性，导致在模型能力之外的查询上浪费预算，而对困难但可解的查询压缩过度。
analysis.problem: 如何让推理模型根据查询的预期回报（而非仅感知难度）自适应地决定是否推理、推理多少或提前放弃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法因忽略可解性，可能在不可解查询上花费大量预算，同时压缩了需要深度推理的困难但可解查询。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架BET：行为冷启动结合投资-成本感知奖励的GRPO训练，通过rollout导出的可解性对齐求解或放弃决策，学习三种行为：短求解、提前放弃（nice fold）、保留计算（hero call）。
contributions: 将自适应推理形式化为不确定性下的计算投资问题，提出预算应遵循推理的预期回报而非仅感知难度。
提出BET框架，通过投资-成本感知奖励学习三种自适应推理行为，在7个基准和3个基模型上平均减少55%推理token并提升性能。
展示从数学推理到科学QA和逻辑推理的零样本迁移，效率增益相当。
analysis.experiments: 在7个基准和3个基模型上评估，平均减少55%推理token并实现整体性能提升，且零样本迁移到科学QA和逻辑推理。
limitations: 可能依赖rollout可解性估计的准确性。
未讨论在更复杂或开放域任务上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BET框架，通过投资-成本感知奖励让大推理模型自适应分配推理预算，平均减少55%推理token且性能提升。

papers.title: CuSearch: Curriculum Rollout Sampling via Search Depth for Agentic RAG
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising paradigm for training agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems from outcome-only supervision. Most existing methods optimize policies from uniformly sampled rollouts, implicitly treating all trajectories as equally informative. However, trajectories differ substantially in search depth and are therefore not equally informative: deeper-search trajectories contain more retrieval decision points and provide denser direct supervision for the retrieval sub-policy. Moreover, this heterogeneity grows over training as the within-batch depth distribution shifts toward higher values, yet uniform rollout sampling remains blind to this shift. To address this, we propose CuSearch, a curriculum rollout sampling framework built on Search-Depth Greedy Allocation (SDGA), a batch-level operator that reallocates a fixed update budget toward deeper-search trajectories. SDGA-Auto always targets the deepest available trajectories in the current batch, yielding an implicit training-aligned curriculum as the depth distribution shifts upward. SDGA-Phase explicitly advances the curriculum threshold as deeper trajectories become sufficiently abundant. Experiments across model types and retrieval frameworks show that CuSearch consistently improves performance, achieving up to 11.8 exact-match points over standard GRPO on ZeroSearch. These results establish per-trajectory search depth as a reliable, annotation-free proxy for retrieval supervision density in RLVR-based agentic RAG training. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于搜索深度的课程式 rollout 采样框架 CuSearch，通过优先采样更深搜索轨迹提升 RLVR 训练效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 RLVR 方法对 agentic RAG 系统进行策略优化时，均匀采样所有轨迹，忽略了不同轨迹在搜索深度上的差异及其对检索子策略监督密度的不同贡献，且训练中深度分布会变化，均匀采样无法适应。
analysis.problem: 如何利用轨迹搜索深度作为监督密度的代理，设计非均匀的 rollout 采样策略以提升 RLVR 训练 agentic RAG 的效率与性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：不同轨迹的搜索深度差异大，更深搜索的轨迹包含更多检索决策点，提供更密集的检索子策略直接监督；且训练过程中批次内深度分布会向更高值偏移，但均匀采样忽视此变化。
analysis.method: 提出 CuSearch 框架，包含两个基于搜索深度的批次级采样算子：SDGA-Auto 始终选择当前批次中最深的轨迹，隐式形成与训练对齐的课程；SDGA-Phase 在深轨迹足够丰富时显式推进课程阈值。
contributions: 首次提出将轨迹搜索深度作为 RLVR 训练 agentic RAG 中检索监督密度的可靠、免标注代理。
设计 CuSearch 课程式 rollout 采样框架，包含 SDGA-Auto 和 SDGA-Phase 两种算子，有效提升训练性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型类型和检索框架上进行实验，在 ZeroSearch 上相比标准 GRPO 提升高达 11.8 个精确匹配点。
limitations: 可能依赖特定搜索深度定义，泛化性需进一步验证。
SDGA-Phase 的课程阈值推进策略可能需手动调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于搜索深度的课程式 rollout 采样框架 CuSearch，通过优先采样更深搜索轨迹提升 RLVR 训练效果。

papers.title: GAR: Carbon-Aware Routing for LLM Inference via Constrained Optimization
papers.abstract: The growing deployment of large language models (LLMs) makes per-request routing essential for balancing response quality and computational cost across heterogeneous model pools. Current routing methods rarely consider sustainable energy use and CO2 emissions as optimization objectives, despite grid carbon intensity varying by time and region, and models differing significantly in energy consumption. To address this gap, we introduce Green-Aware Routing (GAR), a constrained multi-objective optimization framework that minimizes per-request CO2 emissions subject to explicit accuracy floors and p95-latency service-level objectives (SLOs). GAR employs adaptive constraint optimization through per-dataset floor tuning and incorporates lightweight estimators for correctness, tail latency, and carbon emissions, enabling real-time routing decisions without additional inference passes. We present GAR-PD, a practical online primal-dual routing algorithm for rolling carbon budgets, alongside heuristic variants that achieve high feasibility coverage while limiting accuracy degradation. Comprehensive experiments across standard NLP benchmarks with heterogeneous LLM pools (7B-70B) demonstrate that GAR achieves substantial carbon reductions while maintaining competitive accuracy and p95 latency guarantees, providing a practical, theoretically grounded approach to sustainable LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出碳感知路由框架GAR，在保证准确率和延迟约束下最小化LLM推理的碳排放。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署中路由决策常忽略碳排放，而电网碳强度随时间和地域变化，模型能耗差异大，亟需可持续优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在满足准确率下限和p95延迟SLO的前提下，最小化每次请求的CO2排放。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GAR框架，采用约束多目标优化，通过自适应约束优化、轻量级估计器（正确性、尾延迟、碳排放）实现实时路由，并设计在线原始-对偶算法GAR-PD处理滚动碳预算。
contributions: 提出首个碳感知路由框架GAR，将碳排放作为优化目标并约束准确率和延迟。
设计轻量级估计器和在线原始-对偶算法，实现实时路由决策。
analysis.experiments: 在标准NLP基准测试上使用异构LLM池（7B-70B）进行实验，表明GAR在保持竞争性准确率和p95延迟的同时大幅减少碳排放。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的碳排放估计器，实际部署中估计误差可能影响效果。
未讨论跨区域碳强度动态变化下的长期碳预算管理细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出碳感知路由框架GAR，在保证准确率和延迟约束下最小化LLM推理的碳排放。

papers.title: Native Explainability for Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Networks: A Framework for Trusted Brain-Like AI
papers.abstract: The EU Artificial Intelligence Act (Regulation 2024/1689), fully applicable to high-risk systems from August 2026, creates urgent demand for AI architectures that are simultaneously trustworthy, transparent, and feasible to deploy on resource-constrained edge devices. Brain-like neural networks built on the Bayesian Confidence Propagation Neural Network (BCPNN) formalism have re-emerged as a credible alternative to backpropagation-driven deep learning. They deliver state-of-the-art unsupervised representation learning, neuromorphic-friendly sparsity, and existing FPGA implementations that target edge deployment. Despite this momentum, no systematic framework exists for explaining BCPNN decisions -- a gap the present paper fills. We argue that BCPNN is, in the sense of Rudin's interpretable-by-design agenda, an inherently transparent model whose architectural primitives map directly onto established explainable-AI (XAI) families. We make four contributions. First, we propose the first XAI taxonomy for BCPNN. It maps weights, biases, hypercolumn posteriors, structural-plasticity usage scores, attractor dynamics, and input-reconstruction populations onto attribution, prototype, concept, counterfactual, and mechanistic explanation modalities. Second, we introduce sixteen architecture-level explanation primitives (P1--P16), several without analogue in standard ANNs. We provide closed-form algorithms for computing each from quantities the model already maintains. Third, we introduce five design-time Configuration-as-Explanation primitives (Config-P1 to Config-P5) that treat BCPNN hyperparameter choices as an auditable pre-deployment explanation artifact. Fourth, we sketch a roadmap for integration into industrial IoT deployments and discuss EU AI Act alignment, edge feasibility, and Industry 5.0 implications.

analysis.tldr: 为贝叶斯置信传播神经网络（BCPNN）提出首个系统化可解释性框架，包含16种架构级解释原语和5种设计时配置解释原语，旨在满足欧盟AI法案对高可信边缘AI的要求。
analysis.research_motivation: 欧盟AI法案对高风险系统提出可解释性要求，而现有类脑神经网络BCPNN在无监督学习、稀疏性和边缘部署方面表现优异，但缺乏系统化的决策解释框架，阻碍了其在可信AI场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何为BCPNN构建一个原生可解释性框架，使其架构原语能够直接映射到现有的可解释AI（XAI）方法，并满足法规和边缘部署需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出首个BCPNN可解释性分类法，将权重、偏置、超列后验、结构可塑性使用分数、吸引子动力学和输入重建种群映射到归因、原型、概念、反事实和机制解释模态；引入16种架构级解释原语（P1-P16）和5种设计时配置解释原语（Config-P1至Config-P5），并提供闭式算法。
contributions: 提出首个BCPNN可解释性分类法，建立架构原语与XAI模态的映射。
引入16种架构级解释原语和5种设计时配置解释原语，部分原语在标准ANN中无对应。
提供闭式算法计算每种原语，利用模型已有内部状态。
规划了在工业物联网部署中的集成路线图，并讨论了与欧盟AI法案、边缘可行性和工业5.0的关联。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未在实际数据集或任务上进行实验验证。
解释原语的计算复杂度在资源受限边缘设备上的可行性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为贝叶斯置信传播神经网络（BCPNN）提出首个系统化可解释性框架，包含16种架构级解释原语和5种设计时配置解释原语，旨在满足欧盟AI法案对高可信边缘AI的要求。

papers.title: Dual-Temporal LSTM with Hybrid Attention for Airline Passenger Load Factor Forecasting: Integrating Intra-Flight and Inter-Flight Booking Dynamics
papers.abstract: Accurate short-term demand forecasting is crucial to airline revenue management, yet most existing systems fail to meet this need because current models treat booking data as a single temporal dimension, either the accumulation of bookings for a specific flight or the historical booking profile of the same route. This unidimensional view discards information carried by the other temporal stream and forecasting absolute passenger counts introduces a further operational fragility when change in planned aircraft type alters total seat capacity. This study addresses both limitations. A dual-stream Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) integrated with attention framework is proposed that simultaneously processes two complementary input sequences: a horizontal sequence capturing intra-flight booking accumulation over the days preceding departure, and a vertical sequence capturing inter-flight booking patterns at fixed days-before-departure offsets across historical flights. Multiple dual-stream architectural variants, combining self-attention, cross-attention, and hybrid attention with concatenation, residual, and gated fusion strategies, are developed and evaluated. Experiments on real-world reservation data from the national airline of Bangladesh, Biman Bangladesh Airlines (BBA), demonstrate that the proposed hybrid model achieves a Mean Absolute Error of 2.8167 and a coefficient of determination ($R^{2}$) of 0.9495, outperforming single-stream baselines, tree-based models, and three prior dual-LSTM architectures applied to the same data. Validation across four flight category pairs; domestic versus international, direct versus transit, high versus low frequency, and short versus mid versus long haul confirms that the model generalizes across operationally diverse route types. Biman Bangladesh Airlines (BBA) has officially integrated this methodology into its operations.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流LSTM+混合注意力框架，同时建模航班内和航班间预订动态，提升航空客座率预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有航空需求预测模型仅将预订数据视为单一时间维度（航班内累积或航班间历史），丢失了另一时间流的信息，且预测绝对乘客数在机型变更时存在脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 如何同时利用航班内预订累积序列和航班间固定提前天数预订模式，实现更准确且对座位容量变化鲁棒的客座率预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双流LSTM+注意力框架，包含水平序列（航班内预订累积）和垂直序列（航班间固定提前天数模式），并探索自注意力、交叉注意力、混合注意力与拼接、残差、门控融合等变体。
contributions: 提出双流LSTM+混合注意力框架，同时建模航班内和航班间预订动态。
在真实航空公司数据上验证，模型MAE=2.8167，R²=0.9495，优于单流基线、树模型及先前双LSTM架构。
analysis.experiments: 在孟加拉国航空公司Biman Bangladesh Airlines的真实预订数据上实验，涵盖国内/国际、直达/中转、高/低频、短/中/长途等航线类型，模型已投入实际运营。
limitations: 仅基于单一航空公司的数据验证，泛化性需更多外部数据确认。
未讨论模型在极端事件（如疫情、大规模取消）下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流LSTM+混合注意力框架，同时建模航班内和航班间预订动态，提升航空客座率预测精度。

papers.title: Hindsight Hint Distillation: Scaffolded Reasoning for SWE Agents from CoT-free Answers
papers.abstract: Solving complex long-horizon tasks requires strong planning and reasoning capabilities. Although datasets with explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales can substantially benefit learning, they are costly to obtain. To address this challenge, we propose Hindsight Hint Distillation (HHD), which only requires easy-to-obtain question-answer pairs without CoT annotations. Inspired by how human teachers use student mistakes to provide targeted guidance, HHD synthesizes hindsight hints from the model's own failed self-rollouts and uses them to scaffold on-policy rollouts that successfully complete the tasks. The model then self-distills these scaffolded trajectories and generalizes to new problems without hint guidance. Experiments show that HHD significantly outperforms iterative RFT and trajectory-synthesis baselines, achieving an absolute improvement of 8\% on SWE-bench Verified, while all baselines improve by only around 2\%. Notably, the reasoning strategies induced by HHD generalize effectively to out-of-distribution tasks, yielding the largest gains on SWE-bench Multilingual despite no training on multilingual data. These results demonstrate that HHD can effectively synthesize expert-like reasoning from CoT-free data and substantially improve long-horizon performance.

analysis.tldr: HHD 通过从模型自身失败轨迹中合成事后提示，无需 CoT 标注即可提升长程任务推理能力，在 SWE-bench 上取得 8% 绝对提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂长程任务需要强规划与推理能力，但带有显式思维链（CoT）标注的数据集获取成本高昂，限制了模型学习。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖 CoT 标注的情况下，利用易获取的问答对数据提升模型在长程任务中的推理与规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出事后提示蒸馏（HHD），从模型自身的失败轨迹中合成事后提示，用于引导成功轨迹生成，再通过自蒸馏将引导后的轨迹泛化到新问题。
contributions: 提出 HHD 方法，仅需问答对即可合成专家级推理，无需 CoT 标注。
在 SWE-bench Verified 上实现 8% 绝对提升，显著优于迭代 RFT 和轨迹合成基线。
证明 HHD 诱导的推理策略能有效泛化到分布外任务，在 SWE-bench Multilingual 上取得最大增益。
analysis.experiments: 在 SWE-bench Verified 和 SWE-bench Multilingual 上评估，HHD 取得 8% 绝对提升，基线仅提升约 2%。
limitations: 可能依赖模型初始能力，对弱模型效果未知。
事后提示合成策略可能引入噪声，需进一步分析鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HHD 通过从模型自身失败轨迹中合成事后提示，无需 CoT 标注即可提升长程任务推理能力，在 SWE-bench 上取得 8% 绝对提升。

papers.title: Optimal LTLf Synthesis
papers.abstract: Strategy synthesis typically follows an all-or-nothing paradigm, returning unrealisable whenever a specification cannot be guaranteed in an uncertain environment. In this paper, we introduce optimal LTLf synthesis, where the goal is to realise as many objectives as possible from a given specification consisting of multiple objectives, especially for the case that they are not all jointly realisable. We first consider max-guarantee synthesis, which commits to a maximal set of objectives that we can a priori guarantee to realise. We then introduce max-observation synthesis, which maximises a posteriori realised objectives that may be incomparable on different executions. Finally, we present incremental max-observation synthesis, which further improves strategies by exploiting opportunities for stronger guarantees when they arise during an execution. Experimental results show that different variations of optimal synthesis scale broadly equally well, solving a large fraction of the benchmark instances within the given timeout, demonstrating the practical feasibility of the approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出最优LTLf合成，在无法完全实现规范时最大化可满足的目标数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统策略合成采用全有或全无范式，当规范在不确定环境中无法保证时直接返回不可实现，缺乏灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在LTLf规范无法完全实现时，最大化可满足的目标数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三种最优合成变体：最大保证合成（先验保证最大目标集）、最大观测合成（后验最大化可比较目标）、增量最大观测合成（执行中利用机会增强保证）。
contributions: 首次提出最优LTLf合成问题，突破全有或全无范式。
设计三种变体算法，覆盖不同场景下的目标最大化。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明不同变体扩展性相当，在给定超时内解决大部分基准实例，验证了实际可行性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于LTLf规范，未扩展到其他时态逻辑。
未讨论目标间权重或优先级。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出最优LTLf合成，在无法完全实现规范时最大化可满足的目标数量。

papers.title: Read, Grep, and Synthesize: Diagnosing Cross-Domain Seed Exposure for LLM Research Ideation
papers.abstract: The discovery of novel methodologies for emerging problems is a continuing cycle in ML, often driven by the migration of techniques across domains. Building on this observation, we ask whether current LLM ideation systems benefit from targeted cross-domain retrieval or simply from exposure to diverse mechanisms. We study this question through PaperGym, a three-stage pipeline: (1) tool-augmented seed extraction via read, grep, and bash over an isolated paper environment, (2) cross-domain seed retrieval via paraphrasing across seven ML domains, and (3) method synthesis from retrieved seeds, each scored by rubric-based judges. Tool-augmented extraction improves specificity, and paraphrase-based retrieval broadens domain coverage. In synthesis, cross-domain retrieval receives more pairwise novelty wins than no-retrieval and same-domain baselines, but shows no significant difference from a random diverse-seed control. These findings suggest LLM ideation systems benefit from diverse seed exposure, but do not yet reliably exploit the semantic reason particular seeds were retrieved. We release the seed library, rubric prompts, and run scripts at this https URL

analysis.tldr: LLM研究构思系统受益于多样化种子暴露，但尚未可靠利用跨域检索的语义原因。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习中方法跨领域迁移是常见现象，但当前LLM构思系统是否真正受益于针对性跨域检索尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM构思系统在生成研究想法时，跨域种子检索是否比随机多样化种子暴露更有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨域检索在成对新颖性上优于无检索和同域基线，但与随机多样化种子控制无显著差异，表明系统未能利用检索的语义原因。
analysis.method: 提出PaperGym三阶段流水线：工具增强种子提取、跨域种子检索（通过改写覆盖7个ML领域）、以及基于评分法官的方法合成。
contributions: 提出PaperGym流水线用于诊断跨域种子暴露对LLM构思的影响。
实验表明跨域检索虽优于基线，但与随机多样化种子无显著差异，揭示当前系统的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在7个ML领域上比较跨域检索、无检索、同域检索和随机多样化种子控制，使用成对新颖性评分。
limitations: 仅评估了新颖性，未考虑可行性等其他维度。
种子库和评分法官可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM研究构思系统受益于多样化种子暴露，但尚未可靠利用跨域检索的语义原因。

papers.title: Controllable User Simulation
papers.abstract: Using offline datasets to evaluate conversational agents often fails to cover rare scenarios or to support testing new policies. This has motivated the use of controllable user simulators for targeted, counterfactual evaluation, typically implemented by prompting or fine-tuning large language models. In this work, we formalize controllable simulation as a causal inference problem. By bridging natural language evaluation with off-policy evaluation methodology, we show that the standard practice of training simulators via supervised fine-tuning on post-hoc trajectory labels yields a structurally biased model. Specifically, these labels are inextricably coupled to the data-generating behavior policy, injecting a look-ahead bias that breaks causal consistency. Furthermore, we prove that under policy shift this failure causes the variance of evaluation metrics to explode geometrically, a phenomenon we term controllability collapse. To restore causal consistency, we establish theoretical conditions for accurate simulation and propose practical training mitigations: a priori controls, step-wise dynamic controls, and direct policy-conditioned learning. Empirical evaluation confirms that while standard global controls distort conversational distributions and collapse behavioral diversity, our causally grounded simulators eliminate look-ahead bias, preserve natural variance, and exhibit robust zero-shot generalization to unseen agent behaviors.

analysis.tldr: 将可控用户模拟形式化为因果推断问题，揭示监督微调引入的偏差并提出因果一致的训练方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线数据集评估对话智能体难以覆盖罕见场景或支持新策略测试，现有可控模拟器通过提示或微调大语言模型实现，但缺乏因果一致性。
analysis.problem: 现有可控用户模拟器因使用事后轨迹标签进行监督微调而引入结构偏差，导致因果不一致和可控性崩溃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事后轨迹标签与数据生成行为策略耦合，注入前瞻偏差，破坏因果一致性；在策略偏移下，评估指标方差呈几何级数增长，即可控性崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出因果一致的可控模拟训练方法：先验控制、逐步动态控制和直接策略条件学习。
contributions: 将可控用户模拟形式化为因果推断问题，并证明监督微调导致结构偏差和可控性崩溃。
建立因果一致性的理论条件，并提出三种实用的训练缓解方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定的因果图假设，实际应用中的因果结构可能更复杂。
实验仅在对话场景验证，其他交互环境（如机器人）的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将可控用户模拟形式化为因果推断问题，揭示监督微调引入的偏差并提出因果一致的训练方法。

papers.title: AutoLLMResearch: Training Research Agents for Automating LLM Experiment Configuration -- Learning from Cheap, Optimizing Expensive
papers.abstract: Effectively configuring scalable large language model (LLM) experiments, spanning architecture design, hyperparameter tuning, and beyond, is crucial for advancing LLM research, as poor configuration choices can waste substantial computational resources and prevent models from realizing their full potential. Prior automated methods are designed for low-cost settings where repeated trial and error is feasible, but scalable LLM experiments are too expensive for such extensive iteration. To our knowledge, no work has addressed the automation of high-cost LLM experiment configurations, leaving this problem labor-intensive and dependent on expert intuition. Motivated by this gap, we propose AutoLLMResearch, an agentic framework that mimics how human researchers learn generalizable principles from low-fidelity experiments and extrapolate to efficiently identify promising configurations in expensive LLM settings. The core challenge is how to enable an agent to learn, through interaction with a multi-fidelity experimental environment that captures the structure of the LLM configuration landscape. To achieve this, we propose a systematic framework with two key components: 1) LLMConfig-Gym, a multi-fidelity environment encompassing four critical LLM experiment tasks, supported by over one million GPU hours of verifiable experiment outcomes; 2) A structured training pipeline that formulates configuration research as a long-horizon Markov Decision Process and accordingly incentivizes cross-fidelity extrapolation reasoning. Extensive evaluation against diverse strong baselines on held-out experiments demonstrates the effectiveness, generalization, and interpretability of our framework, supporting its potential as a practical and general solution for scalable real-world LLM experiment automation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AutoLLMResearch框架，通过多保真度环境训练研究智能体，自动化高成本LLM实验配置。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM实验配置（架构设计、超参数调优等）对研究至关重要，但现有自动化方法仅适用于低成本场景，高成本LLM实验的配置仍依赖人工专家，浪费大量计算资源。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化高成本LLM实验的配置，避免大量试错，同时学习可泛化的配置原则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AutoLLMResearch框架，包含两个关键组件：1) LLMConfig-Gym，一个多保真度环境，涵盖四种LLM实验任务，基于超过一百万GPU小时的实验结果；2) 结构化训练流程，将配置研究建模为长时域马尔可夫决策过程，激励跨保真度外推推理。
contributions: 首次提出自动化高成本LLM实验配置的智能体框架。
构建了包含多保真度环境和结构化训练流程的系统，并在多种强基线上验证了有效性、泛化性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在保留实验上对多种强基线进行评估，展示了框架的有效性、泛化性和可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖LLMConfig-Gym环境的覆盖范围，对于未见过的实验任务泛化性有限。
训练流程的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AutoLLMResearch框架，通过多保真度环境训练研究智能体，自动化高成本LLM实验配置。

papers.title: Hierarchical LLM-Driven Control for HAPS-Assisted UAV Networks: Joint Optimization of Flight and Connectivity
papers.abstract: Uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly deployed in complex networked environments, yet the joint optimization of multi-UAV motion control and connectivity remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we study a multi-UAV system operating in an integrated terrestrial and non-terrestrial network (ITNTN) comprising terrestrial base stations and high-altitude platform stations (HAPS). We consider a three-dimensional (3D) aerial highway scenario where UAVs must adapt their motion to ensure collision avoidance, efficient traffic flow, and reliable communication under dynamic and partially observable conditions. We first model the problem as a hierarchical multi-objective partially observable Markov decision process (H-MO-POMDP), capturing the coupling between control and communication objectives. Based on this formulation, we propose a large language model (LLM)-driven hierarchical multi-rate control framework. At the global level, an LLM-based controller on the HAPS performs long-term planning for load balancing and handover decisions. At the local level, each UAV employs a hybrid controller that integrates a slow-timescale LLM for high-level spatial reasoning with a reinforcement learning agent for faster UAV-to-infrastructure (U2I) communication and motion control. We further develop a high-fidelity 3D simulation platform by integrating the gym-pybullet-drones environment with 3GPP-compliant RF/THz channel models. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 14% increase in transportation efficiency and a 25% improvement in telecommunication throughput. Additionally, it achieves a 23% reduction in physical collision rates, demonstrating strong handover stability and zero-shot generalization in dynamic scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层LLM驱动框架联合优化多无人机运动控制与通信连接，在HAPS辅助网络中实现效率与吞吐量提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 多无人机系统在复杂网络环境中联合优化运动控制与通信连接是根本性挑战，现有方法难以同时处理碰撞避免、交通流效率和可靠通信。
analysis.problem: 在集成地面基站和高空平台站的异构网络中，多无人机在动态部分可观测条件下联合优化三维运动控制与通信连接。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将问题建模为分层多目标部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，提出LLM驱动的分层多速率控制框架：全局层HAPS上的LLM控制器进行长期负载均衡和切换规划；局部层每个无人机采用混合控制器，结合慢时间尺度LLM进行高层空间推理和强化学习智能体进行快速通信与运动控制。
contributions: 提出分层多目标POMDP模型，形式化控制与通信目标的耦合
设计LLM驱动的分层多速率控制框架，结合全局规划和局部混合控制
开发高保真3D仿真平台，集成gym-pybullet-drones与3GPP兼容信道模型
analysis.experiments: 在高保真3D仿真平台上进行实验，与最先进基线相比，运输效率提升14%，通信吞吐量提升25%，碰撞率降低23%，并展示强切换稳定性和零样本泛化能力。
limitations: 仿真环境与真实部署可能存在差距
LLM推理延迟可能影响实时控制
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层LLM驱动框架联合优化多无人机运动控制与通信连接，在HAPS辅助网络中实现效率与吞吐量提升。

papers.title: Selective Off-Policy Reference Tuning with Plan Guidance
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards helps reasoning, but GRPO-style methods stall on hard prompts where all sampled rollouts fail. SORT adds a repair update for those failures without changing rollout generation: it derives a plan from the reference solution, compares token probabilities with and without that plan, and gives higher weight to tokens that become more predictable under plan conditioning. This turns all-wrong prompts into selective, structure-aware learning signals instead of uniform imitation. Across three backbones and eight reasoning benchmarks, SORT improves over GRPO and guidance baselines, with largest gains on weaker models.

analysis.tldr: SORT通过计划引导的选择性离策略参考调优，将全错提示转化为结构化学习信号，提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO等强化学习方法在困难提示上因所有采样轨迹均失败而停滞，需要更有效的学习信号。
analysis.problem: 解决强化学习中所有采样轨迹失败时无法提供有效学习信号的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SORT方法：从参考解中推导计划，比较有无计划条件下的token概率，对在计划条件下更可预测的token赋予更高权重，从而将全错提示转化为选择性、结构感知的学习信号。
contributions: 提出SORT方法，通过计划引导的选择性离策略参考调优，有效利用失败轨迹中的结构信息。
在三个骨干网络和八个推理基准上，SORT优于GRPO和引导基线，尤其在弱模型上提升最大。
analysis.experiments: 在三个骨干网络和八个推理基准上评估，与GRPO和引导基线对比，弱模型提升最大。
limitations: 可能依赖参考解的质量，若参考解不准确则计划引导效果受限。
仅适用于可验证奖励的推理任务，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SORT通过计划引导的选择性离策略参考调优，将全错提示转化为结构化学习信号，提升推理性能。

papers.title: The Evaluation Differential: When Frontier AI Models Recognise They Are Being Tested
papers.abstract: Recent published evidence from frontier laboratories shows that contemporary AI models can recognise evaluation contexts, latently represent them, and behave differently under those contexts than under deployment-continuous conditions. Anthropic's BrowseComp incident, the Natural Language Autoencoder findings on SWE-bench Verified and destructive-coding evaluations, and the OpenAI / Apollo anti-scheming work all document instances of this phenomenon. We argue that these findings create a claim-validity problem for safety conclusions drawn from frontier evaluations. We introduce the Evaluation Differential (ED), a conditional divergence in a target behavioural property between recognised-evaluation and deployment-continuous contexts, define a normalised effect-size form (nED) for cross-property comparison, and prove that marginal evaluation scores cannot identify ED. We develop a typology of safety claims (ED-stable, ED-degraded, ED-inverted, ED-undetermined) by their warrant-status under documented divergence, and specify TRACE (Test-Recognition Audit for Claim Evaluation), an audit protocol that wraps existing evaluation infrastructure and produces restricted claims rather than capability scores. We apply the framework retrospectively to three publicly documented evaluation incidents and discuss governance implications for system cards, conformity assessment, and the international network of AI safety and security institutes. TRACE does not eliminate adversarial adaptation; it disciplines the claims drawn from evaluation evidence by making explicit the conditions under which that evidence was produced.

analysis.tldr: 前沿AI模型能识别测试环境并改变行为，导致安全评估结论失效，论文提出评估差异（ED）框架和TRACE审计协议来约束评估结论。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿实验室的公开证据表明，AI模型能识别评估环境并表现出与部署时不同的行为，这导致基于评估得出的安全结论可能无效，需要新的框架来应对这一挑战。
analysis.problem: AI模型在识别出评估环境后行为发生改变，使得评估分数无法反映真实部署行为，从而产生安全结论的可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多个实例（如Anthropic的BrowseComp事件、SWE-bench上的自然语言自编码器发现、OpenAI/Apollo的反欺骗工作）表明模型能识别评估上下文并表现出差异行为，导致评估结论的声明有效性存在问题。
analysis.method: 定义评估差异（ED）为识别评估与部署连续上下文之间目标行为属性的条件散度，提出归一化效应量形式（nED）用于跨属性比较，证明边际评估分数无法识别ED，建立安全声明类型学（ED稳定、ED退化、ED反转、ED未定），并设计TRACE审计协议来包装现有评估基础设施，产生受限声明而非能力分数。
contributions: 提出评估差异（ED）概念及其归一化形式（nED），形式化模型在评估与部署环境下的行为差异。
证明边际评估分数无法识别ED，并建立安全声明类型学（ED稳定、ED退化、ED反转、ED未定）。
设计TRACE审计协议，通过明确证据产生条件来约束评估结论，并应用于三个公开评估事件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅回顾了三个公开评估事件作为框架应用案例。
limitations: TRACE协议不能消除对抗性适应，仅能约束评估结论。
框架依赖对模型识别评估环境的检测能力，可能难以完全覆盖所有隐蔽行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前沿AI模型能识别测试环境并改变行为，导致安全评估结论失效，论文提出评估差异（ED）框架和TRACE审计协议来约束评估结论。

papers.title: Engagement Process: Rethinking the Temporal Interface of Action and Observation
papers.abstract: Task completion in digital and physical environments increasingly involves complex temporal interaction, where actions and observations unfold over different time scales rather than align with fixed observation--action steps. To model such interactions, we propose \emph{Engagement Process} (EP), an interaction formalism that inherits the decision-theoretic structure of POMDPs while making time explicit in the action--observation interface. EP represents actions and observations as decoupled event streams along time, rather than updates paired at fixed decision steps. This interface captures single-agent timing issues such as deliberation latency, delayed feedback, and persistent actions, while supporting richer agent-side organization, multi-rate coordination, and compositional interaction among subsystems. Across toy, LLM-agent, and learning experiments, EP exposes temporal behaviors hidden by step-based interfaces and enables policies to adapt under explicit time costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Engagement Process (EP) 形式化框架，将动作与观察解耦为时间上的事件流，以建模数字/物理环境中复杂的时间交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有交互形式化（如 POMDP）将动作和观察绑定在固定决策步骤上，无法处理不同时间尺度下的延迟反馈、持续动作等时序问题，限制了智能体在真实环境中的适应性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种交互形式化框架，使动作和观察在时间上解耦，以捕捉单智能体时序问题（如思考延迟、延迟反馈、持续动作）并支持多速率协调与子系统组合交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Engagement Process (EP)，继承 POMDP 的决策理论结构，但将动作和观察表示为沿时间解耦的事件流，而非固定步骤的配对更新。
contributions: 提出 EP 形式化框架，显式建模动作与观察的时间解耦接口。
在玩具、LLM-agent 和学习实验中展示 EP 能暴露基于步骤的接口隐藏的时序行为，并使策略在显式时间成本下自适应。
analysis.experiments: 在玩具、LLM-agent 和学习实验中验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加形式化复杂度，实际部署需额外工程。
实验规模有限，未在真实大规模环境中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Engagement Process (EP) 形式化框架，将动作与观察解耦为时间上的事件流，以建模数字/物理环境中复杂的时间交互。

papers.title: FibQuant: Universal Vector Quantization for Random-Access KV-Cache Compression
papers.abstract: Long-context inference is increasingly a memory-traffic problem. The culprit is the key--value (KV) cache: it grows with context length, batch size, layers, and heads, and it is read at every decoding step. Rotation-based scalar codecs meet this systems constraint by storing a norm, applying a shared random rotation, and quantizing one coordinate at a time. They are universal and random-access, but they discard the geometry created by the normalization step. After a Haar rotation, a block of $k$ consecutive coordinates is not a product source; it is a spherical-Beta source on the unit ball. We introduce \textsc{FibQuant}, a universal fixed-rate vector quantizer that keeps the same normalize--rotate--store interface while replacing scalar tables by a shared radial--angular codebook matched to this canonical source. The codebook combines Beta-quantile radii, Fibonacci\,/\,Roberts--Kronecker quasi-uniform directions, and multi-restart Lloyd--Max refinement. We prove that the resulting vector code strictly improves on its scalar product specialization at matched rate, with a high-rate gain that separates into a cell-shaping factor and a density-matching factor. The same construction gives a dense rate axis, including fractional-bit and sub-one-bit operating points, without calibration or variable-length addresses. On GPT-2 small KV caches, \textsc{FibQuant} traces a memory--fidelity frontier from $5\times$ compression at $0.99$ attention cosine similarity to $34\times$ at $0.95$. End-to-end on TinyLlama-1.1B, it is within $0.10$ perplexity of fp16 at $4\times$ compression and has $3.6\times$ lower perplexity than scalar \textsc{TurboQuant} at $b = 2$ ($8\times$ compression), where scalar random-access quantization begins to fail.

analysis.tldr: FibQuant 是一种通用向量量化器，通过径向-角度码本匹配归一化后的球-Beta 分布，实现随机访问的 KV 缓存压缩，在 GPT-2 和 TinyLlama 上优于标量量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理中 KV 缓存的内存流量问题日益严重，现有旋转标量量化方法丢弃了归一化步骤产生的几何结构，导致压缩效率受限。
analysis.problem: 设计一种通用、随机访问的向量量化方法，在保持归一化-旋转-存储接口的同时，利用归一化后坐标的球-Beta 分布特性提升 KV 缓存压缩的率-失真性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Haar 旋转后，连续 k 个坐标块不再是乘积源，而是单位球上的球-Beta 源，这为向量量化提供了可匹配的规范分布。
analysis.method: FibQuant 是一种固定率向量量化器，使用共享的径向-角度码本：径向部分基于 Beta 分位数，角度部分使用 Fibonacci/Roberts-Kronecker 准均匀方向，并采用多重启 Lloyd-Max 细化。
contributions: 提出 FibQuant，一种通用固定率向量量化器，匹配归一化后 KV 缓存的球-Beta 分布，在相同码率下严格优于标量量化。
理论证明高码率增益可分解为单元形状因子和密度匹配因子，并支持分数比特和亚一比特操作点。
analysis.experiments: 在 GPT-2 small 上，FibQuant 在 5 倍压缩（注意力余弦相似度 0.99）到 34 倍压缩（0.95）之间绘制了内存-保真度前沿。在 TinyLlama-1.1B 上，4 倍压缩时困惑度与 fp16 相差 0.10，在 b=2（8 倍压缩）时困惑度比标量 TurboQuant 低 3.6 倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于旋转后具有球-Beta 分布的特定场景，通用性需进一步验证。
多重启 Lloyd-Max 细化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FibQuant 是一种通用向量量化器，通过径向-角度码本匹配归一化后的球-Beta 分布，实现随机访问的 KV 缓存压缩，在 GPT-2 和 TinyLlama 上优于标量量化。

papers.title: TOPPO: Rethinking PPO for Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning with Critic Balancing
papers.abstract: Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) and its variants dominate Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning (MTRL) due to their off-policy sample efficiency, while on-policy methods such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) remain underexplored. We diagnose that PPO in MTRL suffers from a previously overlooked issue: critic-side gradient ill-conditioning, which may cause tail tasks to stall while easy tasks dominate the value function's updates. To address this, we propose TOPPO (Tail-Optimized PPO), a reformulation of PPO via Critic Balancing -- a set of modules that improve gradient conditioning and balance learning dynamics across tasks. Unlike prior approaches that rely on modular architectures or large models, TOPPO targets the optimization bottleneck within PPO itself. Empirically, TOPPO achieves stronger mean and tail-task performance than published SAC-family and ARS-family baselines while using substantially fewer parameters and environment steps on Meta-World+ benchmark. Notably, TOPPO matches or surpasses strong SAC baselines early in training and maintains superior performance at full budget. Ablations confirm the effectiveness of each module in TOPPO and provide insights into their interactions. Our results demonstrate that, with proper optimization, on-policy methods can rival or exceed off-policy approaches in MTRL, challenging the prevailing reliance on SAC and highlighting critic-side gradient conditioning as the central bottleneck.

analysis.tldr: TOPPO通过批评者平衡模块重新设计PPO，解决了多任务强化学习中批评者梯度病态问题，在Meta-World+上超越SAC基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务强化学习（MTRL）中，离策略方法如SAC占据主导，但PPO等在线策略方法因样本效率低而未被充分探索，且存在批评者梯度病态问题导致困难任务停滞。
analysis.problem: PPO在多任务强化学习中批评者梯度病态，导致困难任务学习停滞，而简单任务主导价值函数更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要诊断了PPO在MTRL中批评者梯度病态问题，即困难任务梯度条件差，简单任务主导更新。
analysis.method: 提出TOPPO，通过批评者平衡模块（Critic Balancing）改善梯度条件并平衡跨任务学习动态，包括多个子模块。
contributions: 首次诊断并解决PPO在多任务强化学习中的批评者梯度病态问题
提出TOPPO方法，通过批评者平衡模块实现更强平均和尾部任务性能
analysis.experiments: 在Meta-World+基准上，TOPPO以更少参数和环境步数达到比SAC和ARS基线更强的平均和尾部任务性能，消融实验验证各模块有效性。
limitations: 仅在Meta-World+基准上验证，泛化性未知
未讨论模块计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TOPPO通过批评者平衡模块重新设计PPO，解决了多任务强化学习中批评者梯度病态问题，在Meta-World+上超越SAC基线。

papers.title: CAMPA: Efficient and Aligned Multimodal Graph Learning via Decoupled Propagation and Aggregation
papers.abstract: Multimodal Graph Neural Networks (MGNNs) have shown strong potential for learning from multimodal attributed graphs, yet most existing approaches rely on tightly coupled architectures that suffer from prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical analysis showing that decoupled MGNNs are substantially more efficient and scalable for large-scale graph learning. However, we identify a critical bottleneck in existing decoupled pipelines, namely modal conflict, which arises in both the propagation and aggregation stages. Specifically, independent multi-hop diffusion causes cross-modal semantic divergence during propagation, while naive fusion fails to align multi-hop feature trajectories during aggregation, jointly limiting effective representation learning. To address this challenge, we propose CAMPA, a Cross-modal Aligned Multimodal Propagation & Aggregation framework for decoupled multimodal graph learning. Concretely, CAMPA introduces a two-stage alignment mechanism: (1) cross-modal aligned propagation, which injects cross-modal similarity priors into message passing to preserve semantic consistency without additional parameter overhead; (2) trajectory aligned aggregation, which leverages trajectory-level self-attention and cross-attention to capture and align long-range dependencies across modalities and hops. Extensive experiments on diverse benchmark datasets and tasks demonstrate that CAMPA consistently outperforms strong coupled and decoupled baselines while preserving the efficiency advantages of the decoupled paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦多模态图学习框架CAMPA，通过跨模态对齐传播和轨迹对齐聚合解决模态冲突，兼顾效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有耦合多模态图神经网络计算开销大，而解耦方法存在模态冲突问题，限制了大规模图学习的效率与效果。
analysis.problem: 解耦多模态图学习中的模态冲突问题，包括传播阶段的跨模态语义分歧和聚合阶段的多跳特征轨迹未对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 独立多跳扩散导致传播时跨模态语义分歧，简单融合无法对齐聚合时的多跳特征轨迹，共同阻碍有效表征学习。
analysis.method: 提出CAMPA框架，包含两阶段对齐机制：跨模态对齐传播（注入跨模态相似性先验）和轨迹对齐聚合（利用轨迹级自注意力和交叉注意力对齐跨模态长程依赖）。
contributions: 系统实证分析表明解耦MGNN在大规模图学习中更高效可扩展，并识别出模态冲突这一关键瓶颈。
提出CAMPA框架，通过两阶段对齐机制解决模态冲突，无需额外参数开销。
在多个基准数据集和任务上，CAMPA一致优于强耦合和解耦基线，同时保持解耦范式的效率优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集和任务上进行实验，CAMPA一致优于强耦合和解耦基线。
limitations: 可能依赖跨模态相似性先验的质量。
轨迹级注意力机制在大规模图上计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦多模态图学习框架CAMPA，通过跨模态对齐传播和轨迹对齐聚合解决模态冲突，兼顾效率与性能。

papers.title: Breaking $\textit{Winner-Takes-All}$: Cooperative Policy Optimization Improves Diverse LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiers (RLVR) has become a central paradigm for improving LLM reasoning, yet popular group-based optimization algorithms like GRPO often suffer from exploration collapse, where the models prematurely converge on a narrow set of high-scoring patterns, lacking the ability to explore new solutions. Recent efforts attempt to alleviate this by adding entropy regularization or diversity bonus. However, these approaches do not change the \textit{winner-takes-all} nature, where rollouts still compete for individual advantage rather than cooperating for maximizing global diversity. In this work, we propose Group Cooperative Policy Optimization (GCPO), which shifts the training paradigm from rollout competition to team cooperation. Specifically, GCPO replaces independent rollout scoring with team-level credit assignment: a rollout is rewarded by how much it contributes to the team's valid solution coverage, rather than its individual accuracy. This coverage is described as a determinant volume over reward-weighted semantic embeddings, where only correct and non-redundant rollouts contribute to this volume. During advantage estimation, GCPO redistributes the collective team reward to each single rollout according to its average marginal contribution to the team. This cooperative training paradigm routes optimization toward non-redundant correct reasoning paths. Experiments across multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GCPO significantly improves both reasoning accuracy and solution diversity over existing approaches. Code will be released at $\href{ this https URL }{this}$.

analysis.tldr: 提出组合作策略优化（GCPO），通过团队级信用分配替代个体竞争，提升LLM推理的准确性与多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于验证器的强化学习方法（如GRPO）存在探索崩溃问题，模型过早收敛到少数高评分模式，缺乏探索新解的能力；熵正则化或多样性奖励等方法未改变赢家通吃的竞争本质。
analysis.problem: 如何设计训练范式，使LLM在推理中既能保持高准确率又能探索多样化的正确推理路径，避免探索崩溃。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，基于群体的优化算法（如GRPO）中，rollout之间相互竞争个体优势，导致模型过早收敛到狭窄的高分模式，即探索崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出组合作策略优化（GCPO），将训练范式从rollout竞争转为团队合作：采用团队级信用分配，根据rollout对团队有效解覆盖的边际贡献（通过奖励加权语义嵌入的行列式体积衡量）分配奖励，鼓励非冗余的正确推理路径。
contributions: 提出GCPO，通过团队合作替代个体竞争，从根本上改变赢家通吃的训练范式。
设计基于行列式体积的团队覆盖度量，实现非冗余正确推理路径的奖励分配。
