在多个推理基准上验证了GCPO在准确性和多样性上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上进行了实验，结果表明GCPO在推理准确性和解多样性上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 团队覆盖度量依赖于语义嵌入的质量，可能受嵌入模型影响。
边际贡献计算可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出组合作策略优化（GCPO），通过团队级信用分配替代个体竞争，提升LLM推理的准确性与多样性。

papers.title: Adaptive Teacher Exposure for Self-Distillation in LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation has become a strong recipe for LLM reasoning, where a privileged teacher supervises the student's own rollouts while conditioning on the reference solution. A design choice shared by nearly all such methods, however, has gone unquestioned: the teacher always sees the full reference reasoning. We argue that this default itself is part of the problem and identify a teacher-side exposure mismatch: when the teacher conditions on reasoning far beyond the student's current competence, the resulting token targets become too strong to absorb. A controlled fixed-exposure sweep makes this concrete on two fronts: 1) full exposure is not reliably the best choice, and 2) student-teacher mismatch grows monotonically as the teacher sees more privileged reasoning. This motivates treating teacher exposure not as a fixed hyperparameter but as a learnable training-time control variable. We therefore propose Adaptive Teacher Exposure for Self-Distillation (ATESD). ATESD models the reveal ratio with a lightweight Beta-policy controller conditioned on compact training-state statistics, and uses one sampled exposure for a short hold window of student updates. To make this exposure controller learnable, we optimize it with a discounted learning-progress reward that scores each held decision by its effect on the student's future improvement rather than its immediate loss change, addressing the delayed credit assignment induced by on-policy distillation. Experiments on AIME 24, AIME 25, and HMMT 25 across Qwen3-{1.7B, 4B, 8B} show that ATESD consistently outperforms competitive self-distillation and RL baselines, improving over OPSD by +0.95, +2.05, and +2.33 Average@12 points respectively, and establishing adaptive teacher exposure as an effective new axis for reasoning self-distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应教师曝光机制，让LLM推理自蒸馏中教师动态调整参考推理的可见比例，提升学生吸收效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法中教师总是看到完整参考推理，导致学生因能力不足而难以吸收过强的监督信号，存在教师侧曝光不匹配问题。
analysis.problem: 解决自蒸馏中教师曝光固定为全量参考推理导致的师生能力不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定曝光实验表明：1）全曝光并非总是最优；2）师生不匹配随教师看到更多推理而单调增长。
analysis.method: ATESD：用轻量Beta策略控制器根据训练状态统计建模曝光比例，每段学生更新窗口采样一次曝光，并通过折扣学习进度奖励优化控制器，解决延迟信用分配。
contributions: 识别并形式化了自蒸馏中的教师侧曝光不匹配问题
提出自适应教师曝光方法ATESD，将曝光作为可学习控制变量
在多个模型和基准上验证ATESD优于现有自蒸馏和RL基线
analysis.experiments: 在AIME 24、AIME 25、HMMT 25上使用Qwen3-{1.7B,4B,8B}评估，ATESD相比OPSD在Average@12上分别提升+0.95、+2.05、+2.33。
limitations: 仅适用于on-policy自蒸馏场景
控制器设计可能依赖特定训练统计量
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应教师曝光机制，让LLM推理自蒸馏中教师动态调整参考推理的可见比例，提升学生吸收效果。

papers.title: A Mechanistic Investigation of Supervised Fine Tuning
papers.abstract: The cosine similarity between a large language model's hidden activations before and after Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) remains very high. This, at first glance, suggests that SFT leaves the model's activation geometry largely undisturbed. However, projecting both sets of activations through a Sparse Autoencoder (SAE) pretrained on the base model reveals that the underlying sparse latents diverge significantly. We introduce a novel investigative pipeline which utilizes these pretrained SAEs as a high-resolution diagnostic tool to mechanistically investigate the drivers of this representational divergence. Through our analytical pipeline, we discover task-specific and layer-specific distributions of the precise semantic features that are systematically altered during supervised fine-tuning. We additionally identify a layer-wise update profile specific to safety alignment. All code, experimental scripts, and analysis files associated with this work are publicly available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SFT 虽保持激活余弦相似度，但稀疏潜变量显著变化，SAE 可揭示任务/层/安全对齐的精细特征更新。
analysis.research_motivation: SFT 后模型激活余弦相似度几乎不变，但实际行为变化显著，需要更高分辨率的工具来理解内部机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练 SAE 作为诊断工具，机械性地分析 SFT 引起的表征分歧及其语义特征变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT 前后隐藏激活的余弦相似度很高，但通过 SAE 投影后稀疏潜变量显著分歧，表明激活几何表面稳定而底层特征已改变。
analysis.method: 使用预训练在基座模型上的 SAE 作为高分辨率诊断工具，比较 SFT 前后稀疏潜变量的差异，并分析任务特定、层特定和安全对齐的更新模式。
contributions: 提出一种利用预训练 SAE 机械性研究 SFT 表征分歧的分析流程。
发现 SFT 中语义特征的任务特定和层特定分布，以及安全对齐的层更新特征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅依赖 SAE 的稀疏表示，可能遗漏其他重要表征维度。
分析限于特定模型和 SFT 设置，泛化性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SFT 虽保持激活余弦相似度，但稀疏潜变量显著变化，SAE 可揭示任务/层/安全对齐的精细特征更新。

papers.title: Under the Hood of SKILL.md: Semantic Supply-chain Attacks on AI Agent Skill Registry
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents increasingly extend their capabilities through Agent Skills: modular filesystem packages whose this http URL files describe when and how agents should use them. While this design enables scalable, on-demand capability expansion, it also introduces a semantic supply-chain risk in which natural-language metadata and instructions can affect which skills are admitted, surfaced, selected, and loaded. We study this http URL - only attacks across three registry-facing stages of the Agent Skill lifecycle, using real ClawHub skills and realistic registry mechanisms. In Discovery, short textual triggers can manipulate embedding-based retrieval and improve adversarial skill visibility, achieving up to 86% pairwise win rate and 80% Top-10 placement. In Selection, description-only framing biases agents toward functionally equivalent adversarial variants, which are selected in 77.6% of paired trials on average. In Governance, semantic evasion strategies cause malicious skills to avoid a blocking verdict in 36.5%-100% of cases. Overall, our results show that this http URL is not passive documentation but operational text that shapes which third-party capabilities agents find, trust, and use.

analysis.tldr: AI Agent技能注册表存在语义供应链攻击风险，恶意技能可通过操控README.md文件中的自然语言元数据在发现、选择和治理阶段获得优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI Agent通过Agent Skills模块化扩展能力，但技能注册表依赖自然语言元数据（如README.md）决定技能准入、排序和加载，这种设计引入了语义供应链风险，可能被恶意利用。
analysis.problem: 研究Agent技能生命周期中，仅通过操控README.md中的自然语言文本（无代码修改）即可实现语义层面的供应链攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在发现阶段，短文本触发器可操纵嵌入检索，使恶意技能达到86%的成对胜率和80%的Top-10排名；在选择阶段，仅描述性框架即可使Agent偏向功能等效的对抗变体，平均77.6%的配对试验中选择恶意技能；在治理阶段，语义规避策略使恶意技能在36.5%-100%的情况下逃避阻止裁决。
analysis.method: 提出README-only攻击方法，针对Agent技能生命周期的三个注册阶段（发现、选择、治理），利用自然语言元数据操纵检索、选择和治理机制。
contributions: 首次系统研究AI Agent技能注册表中的语义供应链攻击，覆盖发现、选择、治理三个阶段。
揭示README.md不是被动文档，而是影响Agent发现、信任和使用第三方能力的操作性文本。
analysis.experiments: 使用真实ClawHub技能和现实注册机制进行实验，报告了发现阶段的成对胜率、Top-10排名，选择阶段的配对试验选择率，以及治理阶段的逃避率。
limitations: 实验基于特定注册机制（ClawHub），可能不适用于所有Agent系统。
未探讨防御措施或缓解策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI Agent技能注册表存在语义供应链攻击风险，恶意技能可通过操控README.md文件中的自然语言元数据在发现、选择和治理阶段获得优势。

papers.title: What Do EEG Foundation Models Capture from Human Brain Signals?
papers.abstract: Clinical electroencephalogram (EEG) analysis rests on a hand-crafted feature catalog refined over decades, \emph{e.g.,} band power, connectivity, complexity, and more. Modern EEG foundation models bypass this catalog, learn directly from raw signals via self-supervised pretraining, and match or outperform feature-engineered baselines on most clinical benchmarks. Whether the two representations align is an open question, which we decompose into three sub-questions: \emph{what does the model learn}, \emph{what does the model use}, and \emph{how much can be explained}. We answer them with layer-wise ridge probing, LEACE-style cross-covariance subspace erasure, and a transparent classifier benchmarked against a random-feature baseline. The audit covers three foundation models (CSBrain, CBraMod, LaBraM), five clinical tasks (MDD, Stress, ISRUC-Sleep, TUSL, Siena), and a 6-family 63-feature lexicon. Of the $945$ (model, task, feature) units, $648$ ($68.6\%$) are representation-causal and $199$ ($21.1\%$) are encoded-only. Across tasks, $50$ features qualify as universal candidates with strong support (all three architectures RC) in two or more tasks. Frequency-domain features dominate, but the other five families each contribute substantial causal mass. Confirmed features recover, on average, $79.3\%$ of the foundation model's advantage over the random baseline, with a clean task gradient (MDD $\approx 0.99$ down to Stress $\approx 0.56$): tasks near ceiling are almost fully recovered by the lexicon, while harder tasks leave a non-trivial residual that pinpoints a concrete target for future concept discovery.

analysis.tldr: EEG基础模型学到的表征与手工特征高度对齐，但存在不可解释的残余。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床EEG分析依赖手工特征，而EEG基础模型通过自监督学习直接从原始信号中提取表征，但两者是否对齐尚不清楚，理解这种对齐关系对模型可解释性和临床信任至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究EEG基础模型学到的表征与手工特征之间的关系，具体分解为三个子问题：模型学到了什么、使用了什么、以及多少可以被解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在945个（模型、任务、特征）单元中，68.6%是表征因果的，21.1%是仅编码的；频域特征占主导，但其他五类特征也贡献了可观的因果质量；确认的特征平均恢复了基础模型相对于随机基线优势的79.3%，且任务难度梯度明显（MDD约0.99，Stress约0.56）。
analysis.method: 使用逐层岭探针、LEACE风格交叉协方差子空间擦除和透明分类器，对三个EEG基础模型（CSBrain、CBraMod、LaBraM）在五个临床任务上进行审计，并与随机特征基线对比。
contributions: 系统性地揭示了EEG基础模型表征与手工特征之间的对齐程度，量化了可解释部分和残余部分。
识别出50个跨任务通用候选特征，并展示了不同任务中特征因果贡献的差异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了审计覆盖三个基础模型、五个临床任务和63个特征词表，并给出了统计结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖三个基础模型和五个任务，泛化性有限。
未探讨模型内部机制，仅从表征层面分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EEG基础模型学到的表征与手工特征高度对齐，但存在不可解释的残余。

papers.title: Attributing Emergence in Million-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can simulate human-like reasoning and decision-making in individual agents. LLM-powered multi-agent systems (MAS) combine such agents to simulate population-scale social phenomena such as polarization, information cascades, and market panics. Such studies require attributing macro emergence to individual agents, but existing axiomatic methods scale combinatorially in $N$ and have been confined to $N \lesssim 10^3$, while the phenomena they explain occur at $N \geq 10^6$. We address this gap by adapting Aumann--Shapley path-integral attribution to LLM-powered MAS at million-agent scale; the resulting method satisfies all four axioms, runs four to five orders of magnitude faster than sampled Shapley on the same hardware. We use this method to test the scale gap empirically: across 14 days of public Bluesky data ($1{,}671{,}587$ active users), we compute the attribution at both full scale and the visibility-biased $N = 10^2$ convenience sample used by small-scale studies, and the two disagree structurally. At full scale the long tail and middle tier jointly carry the majority; the biased small panel attributes almost everything to a few high-follower accounts. We then prove that under any nonlinear macro indicator the disagreement cannot be reduced by post-hoc rescaling: an Attribution Scaling Bias theorem shows that no global rescaling factor can reconcile small-scale and full-scale attribution. Full-scale attribution is therefore not a methodological choice but a theoretical requirement for any nonlinear macro indicator.

analysis.tldr: 将Aumann-Shapley路径积分归因扩展到百万智能体规模，证明非线性宏观指标下小规模归因无法通过后处理缩放匹配全规模归因。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有归因方法在N≤10³时有效，但百万级社会现象（如极化、信息级联）需要N≥10⁶的规模，存在规模鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且公理地归因百万级LLM多智能体系统中的涌现现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小规模（N=10²）归因与全规模（N=1.6M）归因在结构上不一致：小规模将大部分归因归于少数高关注账户，而全规模中长尾和中层共同承担多数。
analysis.method: 将Aumann-Shapley路径积分归因适配到LLM驱动的MAS，实现百万级规模，满足所有四条公理，速度比采样Shapley快4-5个数量级。
contributions: 提出可扩展至百万智能体的公理归因方法，满足所有四条公理且计算高效。
通过理论证明（归因缩放偏差定理）表明，对于任何非线性宏观指标，不存在全局缩放因子能调和不同规模下的归因结果。
analysis.experiments: 在14天Bluesky数据（1,671,587活跃用户）上计算全规模归因与可见性偏差小样本（N=10²）归因，并比较结构差异。
limitations: 方法依赖于LLM驱动的智能体，可能不适用于非语言模型的多智能体系统。
实验仅基于单一社交平台数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将Aumann-Shapley路径积分归因扩展到百万智能体规模，证明非线性宏观指标下小规模归因无法通过后处理缩放匹配全规模归因。

papers.title: AcuityBench: Evaluating Clinical Acuity Identification and Uncertainty Alignment
authors: Noémie Elhadad (1 and 2) ((1) Department of Computer Science
papers.abstract: We introduce AcuityBench, a benchmark for evaluating whether language models identify the appropriate urgency of care from user medical presentations. Existing health benchmarks emphasize medical question answering, broad health interactions, or narrow workflow-specific triage tasks, but they do not offer a unified evaluation of acuity identification across these settings. AcuityBench addresses this gap by harmonizing five public datasets spanning user conversations, online forum posts, clinical vignettes, and patient portal messages under a shared four-level acuity framework ranging from home monitoring to immediate emergency care. The benchmark contains 914 cases, including 697 consensus cases for standard accuracy evaluation and 217 physician-confirmed ambiguous cases for uncertainty-aware evaluation. It supports two complementary task formats: explicit four-way classification in a QA setting, and free-form conversational responses evaluated with a rubric-based judge anchored to the same framework. Across 12 frontier proprietary and open-weight models, we find substantial variation in clear-case acuity accuracy and error direction. Comparing task formats reveals a systematic tradeoff: conversational responses reduce over-triage but increase under-triage relative to QA, especially in higher-acuity cases. In ambiguous cases, no model closely matches the distribution of physician judgments, and model predictions are more concentrated than expert clinical uncertainty. We also compare expert and model adjudication on a subset of maximally ambiguous cases, using those cases to examine the role of clinical uncertainty in label disagreement. Together, these results position acuity identification as a distinct safety-critical capability and show that AcuityBench enables systematic comparison and stress-testing of how well models guide users to the right level of care in real-world health use.

analysis.tldr: AcuityBench 是一个评估语言模型识别医疗紧急程度能力的基准，发现模型在模糊病例中与医生判断分布不匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有健康基准侧重于医学问答或狭窄的分诊任务，缺乏统一的紧急程度识别评估，而紧急程度识别是安全关键能力。
analysis.problem: 如何统一评估语言模型在不同医疗场景下识别适当护理紧急程度的能力，并考虑临床不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在清晰病例中紧急程度准确率和错误方向存在显著差异；对话格式相比QA格式减少过度分诊但增加分诊不足；在模糊病例中，模型预测分布比专家临床不确定性更集中。
analysis.method: 整合五个公开数据集，统一为四级紧急程度框架，包含共识病例和医生确认的模糊病例，支持显式分类和自由对话两种任务格式。
contributions: 提出 AcuityBench，首个统一评估语言模型医疗紧急程度识别的基准，包含914个病例和两种任务格式。
通过12个前沿模型实验，揭示模型在紧急程度识别上的系统性差异和与专家判断的分布不匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在12个前沿专有和开源模型上评估，比较了清晰病例准确率、错误方向、任务格式差异以及模糊病例中的不确定性对齐。
limitations: 基准规模有限（914例），可能无法覆盖所有医疗场景。
仅评估了英文医疗文本，未涉及多语言或文化差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AcuityBench 是一个评估语言模型识别医疗紧急程度能力的基准，发现模型在模糊病例中与医生判断分布不匹配。

papers.title: Transformer Interpretability from Perspective of Attention and Gradient
papers.abstract: Although researchers' attention is more focused on the performance of Transformer models, the interpretation of Transformer can never be ignored. Gradient is widely utilized in Transformer interpretation. From the perspective of attention and gradient, we conduct an in-depth study of Transformer interpretation and propose a method to achieve it by guiding the gradient direction, or more precisely, the attention direction. The method enables more comprehensive interpretation of feature regions, offers detail interpretation, and helps to better understand Transformer mechanism. Leveraging the difference in how Vision Transformer (ViT) and humans perceive images, we alter the class of an image in a way that is almost imperceptible to the human eye. This class rewriting phenomenon may potentially pose security risks in certain scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 通过引导梯度方向实现更全面的Transformer可解释性，并揭示类改写安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer模型性能优异但可解释性不足，现有梯度方法解释不全面，且存在类改写安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何从注意力和梯度角度更全面地解释Transformer模型，并揭示其安全漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出Vision Transformer与人类感知存在差异，可通过微小扰动改变图像类别，产生类改写现象，带来安全风险。
analysis.method: 通过引导梯度方向（即注意力方向）实现Transformer解释，提供更全面的特征区域解释和细节解释。
contributions: 提出一种通过引导梯度方向实现Transformer解释的方法，提供更全面的特征区域和细节解释。
发现并分析了Vision Transformer的类改写现象及其潜在安全风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定模型架构（如ViT），泛化性待验证。
类改写安全风险的定量评估和防御策略未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引导梯度方向实现更全面的Transformer可解释性，并揭示类改写安全风险。

papers.title: Revisiting Privacy Preservation in Brain-Computer Interfaces: Conceptual Boundaries, Risk Pathways, and a Protection-Strength Grading Framework
papers.abstract: Brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) are moving rapidly from laboratory research into clinical, edge, and real-world settings. Under ISO/IEC 8663:2025, a BCI is a direct communication link between central nervous system activity and external software or hardware systems. This link expands privacy risk beyond raw neural-signal leakage: neural data, derived representations, model assets, and decoded outputs can be re-associated with individuals across collection, transmission, storage, training, inference, and feedback, or used to infer information beyond what a task requires. Starting from the general BCI paradigm, this review deffnes privacy-protection boundaries, protection objects, and the relationship between user data privacy and model privacy within a shared risk pathway. It then proposes a three-dimensional framework - protection object, lifecycle stage, and dominant protection-strength level - to classify existing work into four levels of protection strength. Finally, mental privacy and neuroethical risks are treated as open issues, emphasizing that BCI privacy protection should not only obscure data but also disentangle task-irrelevant sensitive information while preserving downstream utility. Keywords: Brain-computer interface, Neural data privacy, User data privacy, Model privacy, Disentanglement of task-irrelevant sensitive information, Protection-strength grading, Neuroethical risks

analysis.tldr: 综述脑机接口隐私保护，提出保护对象-生命周期-保护强度三维分级框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑机接口从实验室走向临床和现实场景，隐私风险远超原始神经信号泄露，涉及衍生表征、模型资产和解码输出，现有保护方法缺乏系统性分类和强度分级。
analysis.problem: 如何系统定义脑机接口隐私保护的边界、对象和风险路径，并建立保护强度分级框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出隐私风险贯穿采集、传输、存储、训练、推理和反馈全生命周期，且用户数据隐私与模型隐私共享风险路径。
analysis.method: 提出三维框架：保护对象（用户数据/模型）、生命周期阶段、主导保护强度等级，将现有工作分为四个保护强度级别。
contributions: 定义了脑机接口隐私保护的边界、保护对象及用户数据隐私与模型隐私的关系。
提出了保护对象-生命周期-保护强度的三维分级框架，将现有工作分为四个保护强度级别。
指出心理隐私和神经伦理风险作为开放问题，强调保护应解耦任务无关敏感信息并保持下游效用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能缺乏定量评估标准。
开放问题（心理隐私、神经伦理）未给出具体解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述脑机接口隐私保护，提出保护对象-生命周期-保护强度三维分级框架。

papers.title: LLM-X: A Scalable Negotiation-Oriented Exchange for Communication Among Personal LLM Agents
papers.abstract: We propose a personal-LLM exchange (LLM-X), a scalable negotiation-oriented environment that enables direct, structured communication across populations of personal agents (LLMs), each representing an individual user. Unlike existing tool-centric protocols that focus on agent-API interaction, LLM-X introduces a message bus and routing substrate for LLM-to-LLM coordination with guarantees around schema validity and policy enforcement. We contribute: (1) an architecture for LLM-X comprising federated gateways, topic-based routing, and policy enforcement; (2) a typed message protocol supporting capability negotiation and contract-net-style coordination; and (3) the first empirical evaluation of LLM-based multi-agent negotiation at scale. Experiments span 5, 9, and 12 agents, under distinct negotiation policies (Low, Medium, High), and across both short-run (minutes) and long-run (2h, 12h) load conditions. Results highlight clear policy-performance trade-offs: stricter policies improve robustness and fairness but increase latencies and message volume. Extended runs confirm that LLM-X remains stable under sustained load, with bounded latency drift.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个面向个人LLM Agent的可扩展协商导向通信框架LLM-X，实现结构化多Agent协商。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具中心协议聚焦Agent-API交互，缺乏支持大规模个人LLM Agent间直接、结构化通信的通用环境。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可扩展的协商导向通信环境，支持个人LLM Agent间的直接通信、模式验证和策略执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LLM-X架构，包含联邦网关、基于主题的路由和策略执行；设计类型化消息协议支持能力协商和合同网式协调。
contributions: 提出LLM-X架构，包含联邦网关、主题路由和策略执行
设计类型化消息协议支持能力协商和合同网式协调
首次大规模LLM多Agent协商实证评估
analysis.experiments: 在5、9、12个Agent规模下，采用低、中、高三种协商策略，进行短时（分钟级）和长时（2小时、12小时）负载实验。结果表明更严格的策略提高鲁棒性和公平性但增加延迟和消息量，系统在持续负载下保持稳定。
limitations: 实验规模有限（最多12个Agent），更大规模性能未知
未讨论隐私和安全细节
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个面向个人LLM Agent的可扩展协商导向通信框架LLM-X，实现结构化多Agent协商。

papers.title: Causal Algorithmic Recourse: Foundations and Methods
papers.abstract: The trustworthiness of AI decision-making systems is increasingly important. A key feature of such systems is the ability to provide recommendations for how an individual may reverse a negative decision, a problem known as algorithmic recourse. Existing approaches treat recourse outcomes as counterfactuals of a fixed unit, ignoring that real-world recourse involves repeated decisions on the same individual under possibly different latent conditions. We develop a causal framework that models recourse as a process over pre- and post-intervention outcomes, allowing for partial stability and resampling of latent variables. We introduce post-recourse stability conditions that enable reasoning about recourse from observational data alone, and develop a copula-based algorithm for inferring the effects of recourse under these conditions. For settings where paired observations of the same individual before and after intervention are available (called recourse data), we develop methods for inferring copula parameters and performing goodness-of-fit testing. When the copula model is rejected, we provide a distribution-free algorithm for learning recourse effects directly from recourse data. We demonstrate the value of the proposed methods on real and semi-synthetic datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果算法追索框架，通过后追索稳定性条件从观测数据推断追索效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有算法追索方法将追索结果视为固定个体的反事实，忽略真实世界中同一个体在不同潜在条件下可能经历多次决策，缺乏因果建模。
analysis.problem: 如何建模和推断真实世界中个体在干预前后的重复决策过程，即算法追索的因果效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果框架，引入后追索稳定性条件，基于copula的算法从观测数据推断追索效果；当有配对追索数据时，推断copula参数并进行拟合优度检验；若copula模型被拒绝，则使用无分布算法直接从追索数据学习追索效果。
contributions: 提出因果算法追索框架，将追索建模为干预前后结果的过程，允许部分稳定性和潜在变量重采样。
引入后追索稳定性条件，使得仅从观测数据即可推理追索效果。
开发基于copula的算法和分布自由算法，适用于不同数据场景。
analysis.experiments: 在真实和半合成数据集上验证了所提方法的价值。
limitations: 可能依赖后追索稳定性条件的假设，实际中可能难以验证。
copula模型选择可能影响推断结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果算法追索框架，通过后追索稳定性条件从观测数据推断追索效果。

papers.title: Causal Bias Detection in Generative Artifical Intelligence
papers.abstract: Automated systems built on artificial intelligence (AI) are increasingly deployed across high-stakes domains, raising critical concerns about fairness and the perpetuation of demographic disparities that exist in the world. In this context, causal inference provides a principled framework for reasoning about fairness, as it links observed disparities to underlying mechanisms and aligns naturally with human intuition and legal notions of discrimination. Prior work on causal fairness primarily focuses on the standard machine learning setting, where a decision-maker constructs a single predictive mechanism $f_{\widehat Y}$ for an outcome variable $Y$, while inheriting the causal mechanisms of all other covariates from the real world. The generative AI setting, however, is markedly more complex: generative models can sample from arbitrary conditionals over any set of variables, implicitly constructing their own beliefs about all causal mechanisms rather than learning a single predictive function. This fundamental difference requires new developments in causal fairness methodology. We formalize the problem of causal fairness in generative AI and unify it with the standard ML setting under a common theoretical framework. We then derive new causal decomposition results that enable granular quantification of fairness impacts along both (a) different causal pathways and (b) the replacement of real-world mechanisms by the generative model's mechanisms. We establish identification conditions and introduce efficient estimators for causal quantities of interest, and demonstrate the value of our methodology by analyzing race and gender bias in large language models across different datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式AI中因果公平性的形式化框架与分解方法，用于检测大语言模型中的种族和性别偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI在高风险领域广泛应用，但现有因果公平性方法主要针对标准机器学习，无法处理生成模型可采样任意条件分布、隐式学习所有因果机制的复杂性，需要新方法论。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并量化生成式AI中的因果公平性，区分不同因果路径和模型替换真实机制带来的偏见影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成模型可采样任意条件分布，隐式构建所有因果机制，而非仅学习单一预测函数，这使得标准因果公平性方法失效。
analysis.method: 提出统一理论框架，将生成式AI与标准ML的因果公平性统一；推导新的因果分解结果，沿因果路径和机制替换两个维度量化公平性影响；建立识别条件并引入高效估计量。
contributions: 形式化生成式AI中的因果公平性问题，并与标准ML设置统一在共同理论框架下。
推导新的因果分解方法，实现沿不同因果路径和机制替换的细粒度公平性量化。
建立识别条件并引入高效估计量，通过大语言模型中的种族和性别偏见分析验证方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖强因果假设（如无混淆），实际数据中难以完全满足。
估计量效率可能受限于高维变量和复杂生成模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式AI中因果公平性的形式化框架与分解方法，用于检测大语言模型中的种族和性别偏见。

papers.title: CVEvolve: Autonomous Algorithm Discovery for Unstructured Scientific Data Processing
papers.abstract: Scientific data processing often requires task-specific algorithms or AI models, creating a barrier for domain scientists who need to analyze their data but may not have extensive computing or image-processing expertise. This barrier is especially pronounced when data are noisy, have a high dynamic range, are sparsely labeled, or are only loosely specified. We introduce CVEvolve, an autonomous agentic harness with a zero-code interface for scientific data-processing algorithm discovery. CVEvolve combines a multi-round search strategy with tools for code execution, evaluation implementation, history management, holdout testing, and optional inspection of scientific data and visual outputs. The search alternates between discovery and improvement actions, and uses lineage-aware stochastic candidate sampling to balance exploration and exploitation. We demonstrate CVEvolve on x-ray fluorescence microscopy image registration, Bragg peak detection, and high-energy diffraction microscopy image segmentation. Across these tasks, CVEvolve discovers algorithms that improve over baseline methods, while holdout test tracking helps identify candidates that generalize better than later over-optimized alternatives. These results show that zero-code, autonomous LLM-powered algorithm development can help domain scientists turn unstructured scientific image data into practical algorithms and downstream scientific discoveries.

analysis.tldr: CVEvolve 是一个零代码自主算法发现框架，帮助领域科学家处理非结构化科学数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学数据处理常需特定算法或AI模型，但领域科学家可能缺乏计算或图像处理专业知识，尤其是数据噪声大、动态范围高、标签稀疏或规格模糊时。
analysis.problem: 如何让非专家用户无需编程即可自主发现适用于非结构化科学数据的处理算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CVEvolve 是一个自主智能体框架，包含零代码接口、多轮搜索策略、代码执行、评估实现、历史管理、保留测试以及科学数据与视觉输出检查工具；搜索交替进行发现和改进动作，并使用谱系感知随机候选采样平衡探索与利用。
contributions: 提出零代码自主算法发现框架 CVEvolve，降低领域科学家使用门槛。
在 X 射线荧光显微镜图像配准、Bragg 峰检测和高能衍射显微镜图像分割三个任务上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 X 射线荧光显微镜图像配准、Bragg 峰检测和高能衍射显微镜图像分割任务上，CVEvolve 发现的算法优于基线方法，保留测试有助于识别泛化更好的候选。
limitations: 可能依赖底层 LLM 的能力和稳定性。
仅验证了图像处理任务，其他科学数据类型未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CVEvolve 是一个零代码自主算法发现框架，帮助领域科学家处理非结构化科学数据。

papers.title: CPEMH: An Agentic Framework for Prompt-Driven Behavior Evaluation and Assurance in Foundation-Model Systems for Mental Health Screening
papers.abstract: This paper presents CPEMH, an agentic framework designed to evaluate prompt-driven behavior in foundation-model systems operating on transcript-based datasets for mental-health screening. CPEMH serves as an engineering methodology for behavioral assurance in large-scale language systems, introducing an orchestrated architecture that autonomously performs the design, evaluation, and selection of prompt strategies, enabling systematic control of behavioral variability across contexts. Its modular agentic design, combining orchestrator, inference, and evaluation agents, ensures traceability, reproducibility, and robustness throughout the prompting lifecycle. A case study on automated depression screening from interview transcripts demonstrates the framework's capacity to stabilize and audit foundation-model behavior in conversational and clinically sensitive domains. Lessons learned emphasize the role of modular orchestration in behavioral assurance, the prioritization of stability over architectural complexity, and the integration of F1, bias, and robustness as core acceptance criteria.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个用于心理健康筛查中基础模型行为评估与保证的智能体框架CPEMH。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型在心理健康筛查等敏感领域的行为存在不可控的变异性，缺乏系统性的行为评估与保证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个工程框架来自动化地评估和保证基础模型在提示驱动下的行为稳定性、可追溯性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CPEMH框架，采用模块化智能体设计，包含编排器、推理和评估智能体，自主执行提示策略的设计、评估和选择。
contributions: 提出一个用于基础模型行为评估与保证的智能体框架CPEMH。
通过抑郁症筛查案例展示了框架在稳定和审计模型行为方面的能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于转录数据集进行案例研究，可能未涵盖其他模态。
框架的通用性可能受限于特定领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个用于心理健康筛查中基础模型行为评估与保证的智能体框架CPEMH。

papers.title: Rethinking Evaluation for LLM Hallucination Detection: A Desiderata, A New RAG-based Benchmark, New Insights
papers.abstract: Hallucination, broadly referring to unfaithful, fabricated, or inconsistent content generated by LLMs, has wide-ranging implications. Therefore, a large body of effort has been devoted to detecting LLM hallucinations, as well as designing benchmark datasets for evaluating these detectors. In this work, we first establish a desiderata of properties for hallucination detection benchmarks (HDBs) to exhibit for effective evaluation. A critical look at existing HDBs through the lens of our desiderata reveals that none of them exhibits all the properties. We identify two largest gaps: (1) RAG-based grounded benchmarks with long context are severely lacking (partly because length impedes human annotation); and (2) Existing benchmarks do not make available realistic label noise for stress-testing detectors although real-world use-cases often grapple with label noise due to human or automated/weak annotation. To close these gaps, we build and open-source a new RAG-based HDB called T RIVIA+ that underwent a rigorous human annotation process. Notably, our benchmark exhibits all desirable properties including (1) T RIVIA+ contains samples with the longest context in the literature; and (2) we design and share four sets of noisy labels with different, both sample-dependent and sampleindependent, noise schemes. Finally, we perform experiments on RAG-based HDBs, including our T RIVIA+, using popular SOTA detectors that reveal new insights: (i) ample room remains for current detectors to reach the performance ceiling on RAG-based HDBs, (ii) the basic LLM-as-a-Judge baseline performs competitively, and (iii) label noise hinders detection performance. We expect that our findings, along with our proposed benchmark 1 , will motivate and foster needed research on hallucination detection for RAG-based tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出幻觉检测基准应具备的性质，构建RAG长上下文基准TRIVIA+并揭示现有检测器性能不足、标签噪声影响大等新发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM幻觉检测基准缺乏长上下文RAG场景和真实标签噪声，导致评估不全面，阻碍检测器在实际应用中的鲁棒性提升。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个满足理想性质（长上下文、含标签噪声）的RAG幻觉检测基准，并系统评估现有检测器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准均不满足所有理想性质，主要缺失长上下文RAG样本和真实标签噪声；实验发现当前SOTA检测器在RAG基准上远未达到性能上限，LLM-as-a-Judge基线表现有竞争力，标签噪声显著降低检测性能。
analysis.method: 建立幻觉检测基准应具备的性质清单，基于此构建RAG基准TRIVIA+，通过严格人工标注确保质量，并设计四种不同噪声模式的标签集。
contributions: 提出幻觉检测基准应满足的全面性质清单，并系统评估现有基准的不足。
构建并开源RAG长上下文基准TRIVIA+，包含最长上下文样本和四种标签噪声方案。
通过实验揭示当前检测器在RAG基准上性能不足、LLM-as-a-Judge基线竞争力强、标签噪声影响大等新见解。
analysis.experiments: 在RAG基准（包括TRIVIA+）上使用流行SOTA检测器进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖RAG场景，可能不适用于其他幻觉类型。
人工标注成本高，可能限制基准规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出幻觉检测基准应具备的性质，构建RAG长上下文基准TRIVIA+并揭示现有检测器性能不足、标签噪声影响大等新发现。

papers.title: Constraint-Data-Value-Maximization: Utilizing Data Attribution for Effective Data Pruning in Low-Data Environments
papers.abstract: Attributing model behavior to training data is an evolving research field. A common benchmark is data removal, which involves eliminating data instances with either low or high values, then assessing a model's performance trained on the modified dataset. Many existing studies leverage Shapley-based data values for this task. In this paper, we demonstrate that these data values are not optimally suited for pruning low-value data when only a limited amount of data remains. To address this limitation, we introduce the Constraint-Data-Value-Maximization (CDVM) approach, which effectively utilizes data attributions for pruning in low-data scenarios. By casting pruning as a constrained optimization that both maximizes total influence and penalizes excessive per-test contributions, CDVM delivers robust performance when only a small fraction of the data is retained. On the OpenDataVal benchmark, CDVM shows strong performance and competitive runtime.

analysis.tldr: 提出CDVM方法，通过约束优化最大化数据影响力，在低数据环境下实现有效数据剪枝。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Shapley的数据价值方法在低数据环境下剪枝效果不佳，需要更鲁棒的数据归因剪枝策略。
analysis.problem: 解决低数据环境下利用数据归因进行有效数据剪枝的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当仅保留少量数据时，基于Shapley的数据价值不适合剪枝低价值数据。
analysis.method: 将剪枝建模为约束优化问题，同时最大化总影响并惩罚过度的每测试样本贡献。
contributions: 揭示了现有Shapley数据价值在低数据剪枝中的局限性
提出了CDVM方法，在低数据场景下实现鲁棒的数据剪枝
analysis.experiments: 在OpenDataVal基准上，CDVM表现出强性能和竞争性运行时间。
limitations: 可能仅适用于低数据环境，高数据量下效果未知
约束优化的计算开销可能随数据规模增加
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CDVM方法，通过约束优化最大化数据影响力，在低数据环境下实现有效数据剪枝。

papers.title: Template-as-Ontology: Configurable Synthetic Data Infrastructure for Cross-Domain Manufacturing AI Validation
papers.abstract: LLarge language model (LLM)-based AI agents deployed in manufacturing environments require populated, schema-correct data for validation, yet production MES data is proprietary, privacy-encumbered, and vendor-specific. This paper introduces the Template-as-Ontology principle: a single Python configuration module (700-770 lines, 45 validated exports) serves simultaneously as the specification for a time-stepped manufacturing simulator and as the runtime domain schema for AI analytics tools, producing alignment by construction rather than integration. We formally define the domain template as a typed relational configuration schema and prove that structural alignment between simulation and tool layers is guaranteed by single-source consumption. A five-layer pipeline--simulation, PostgreSQL, CDC/Iceberg lakehouse, star schema, and 12 parameterized AI tools--generates causally coherent, MES-shaped data spanning 66 entity types across four operational domains mapped to ISA-95/IEC 62264. We validate the architecture with six industry templates (aerospace, pharma, automotive, electronics, beverages, warehousing) running on identical framework code. Calibration experiments (60 runs, 10 seeds per template) confirm parametric controllability: observed KPIs fall within configured ranges across all templates. A controlled hallucination experiment (72 tool invocations, Qwen3-32B) demonstrates that ontology-constrained parameters eliminate tool-parameter fabrication (0% constrained vs. 43% unconstrained hallucination rate for the evaluated model, Fisher's exact test p < 10^-12); the 0% constrained rate is an architectural guarantee that holds for any model. The framework provides a reusable data layer for discrete manufacturing AI validation.

analysis.tldr: 提出模板即本体原则，用单一Python配置模块同时驱动制造模拟器和AI工具，实现零幻觉数据生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 制造业AI验证需要符合模式的生产数据，但实际MES数据专有、涉及隐私且供应商特定，现有方法难以获取可复用的验证数据。
analysis.problem: 如何为跨领域制造业AI验证生成结构对齐、因果一致且无幻觉的合成数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Template-as-Ontology原则，通过单一Python配置模块同时作为时间步进制造模拟器的规范和AI分析工具的运行时域模式，保证结构对齐；构建五层流水线（模拟、PostgreSQL、CDC/Iceberg湖仓、星型模式、12个参数化AI工具），生成覆盖66种实体类型、映射到ISA-95/IEC 62264的MES形状数据。
contributions: 提出Template-as-Ontology原则，用单一配置模块同时驱动模拟和AI工具，保证结构对齐。
构建可复用的五层数据生成流水线，支持跨领域制造AI验证。
通过受控幻觉实验证明本体约束参数可消除工具参数捏造（0% vs 43%幻觉率）。
analysis.experiments: 在6个行业模板（航空航天、制药、汽车、电子、饮料、仓储）上运行相同框架代码；校准实验60次运行，每模板10个种子，确认KPI在配置范围内；受控幻觉实验72次工具调用，Qwen3-32B模型，约束参数幻觉率0% vs 无约束43%（Fisher精确检验p<10^-12）。
limitations: 仅验证了离散制造场景，连续流程制造可能需调整。
框架依赖Python配置模块，对非Python环境兼容性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模板即本体原则，用单一Python配置模块同时驱动制造模拟器和AI工具，实现零幻觉数据生成。

papers.title: Unlocking LLM Creativity in Science through Analogical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Autonomous science promises to augment scientific discovery, particularly in complex fields like biomedicine. However, this requires AI systems that can consistently generate novel and diverse solutions to open-ended problems. We evaluate LLMs on the task of open-ended solution generation and quantify their tendency to mode collapse into low-diversity generations. To mitigate this mode collapse, we introduce analogical reasoning (AR) as a new approach to solution generation. AR generates analogies to cross-domain problems based on shared relational structure, then uses those analogies to search for novel solutions. Compared to baselines, AR discovers significantly more diverse generations (improving solution diversity metrics by 90-173%), generates novel solutions over 50% of the time (compared to as little as 1.6% for baselines), and produces high-quality analogies. To validate the real-world feasibility of AR, we implement AR-generated solutions across four biomedical problems, yielding consistent quantitative gains. AR-generated approaches achieve a nearly 13-fold improvement on distributional metrics for perturbation effect prediction, outperform all baselines on AUPRC when predicting cell-cell communication, infer brain region interactions with a high Spearman correlation ($\rho$=0.729) to published methods, and establish state-of-the-art performance on 2 datasets for oligonucleotide property prediction. The novel and diverse solutions produced by AR can be used to augment the search space of existing solution generation methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过类比推理提升LLM在科学问题中的生成多样性与新颖性，缓解模式坍缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主科学需要AI系统能持续生成新颖多样的解决方案，但现有LLM在开放性问题中易发生模式坍缩，生成结果多样性低。
analysis.problem: LLM在开放科学问题中生成解决方案时存在模式坍缩，导致多样性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在开放问题生成中倾向于低多样性输出，模式坍缩严重，基线方法的新颖解比例低至1.6%。
analysis.method: 引入类比推理（AR），通过跨领域问题的共享关系结构生成类比，并利用类比搜索新颖解决方案。
contributions: 提出类比推理方法，显著提升LLM生成解决方案的多样性（提升90-173%）和新颖性（超50%）。
在四个生物医学问题上验证AR的可行性，取得定量提升，包括扰动效应预测、细胞间通信、脑区交互推断和寡核苷酸性质预测。
analysis.experiments: 在四个生物医学问题上验证：扰动效应预测分布指标提升近13倍；细胞间通信AUPRC优于所有基线；脑区交互推断与已发表方法Spearman相关系数ρ=0.729；寡核苷酸性质预测在两个数据集上达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量类比源，跨领域类比构建成本高。
实验仅在生物医学领域，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过类比推理提升LLM在科学问题中的生成多样性与新颖性，缓解模式坍缩。

papers.title: The Semantic Training Gap: Ontology-Grounded Tool Architectures for Industrial AI Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based AI agents are increasingly deployed in manufacturing environments for analytics, quality management, and decision support. These agents demonstrate statistical fluency with domain terminology but lack grounded understanding of operational semantics -- the relational structure that connects equipment identifiers, process parameters, failure codes, and regulatory constraints within a specific production context. This paper identifies and formalizes the semantic training gap: a structural disconnect between how AI systems acquire domain vocabulary through training and how manufacturing operations define meaning through ontological relationships. We demonstrate that this gap causes operationally incorrect outputs even when model responses are linguistically precise, and that in multi-agent configurations it produces a compounding failure mode we term semantic drift. To close this gap, we present an architecture that embeds manufacturing ontology directly into the AI tool layer as a typed relational configuration, enforcing semantic constraints at runtime rather than relying on model training. The architecture is formalized as a three-operation interface contract -- resolve, contextualize, annotate -- with invariants enforced by an AIOps orchestration layer. In a controlled experiment across six industry configurations (72 tool invocations using Qwen3-32B), unconstrained tool parameters produced a 43% hallucination rate for domain identifiers; ontology-grounded parameters reduced this to 0%. We validate the approach through a digital twin analytics platform demonstrating that a single codebase with domain-specific ontology configurations eliminates tool-call hallucination and achieves cross-domain configurability without application code changes.

analysis.tldr: 通过本体论约束工具参数，消除工业AI Agent中的工具调用幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在工业环境中虽能流利使用领域术语，但缺乏对操作语义的深层理解，导致输出在语言上精确但在操作上错误，尤其在多Agent系统中出现语义漂移。
analysis.problem: 解决AI Agent在工业制造中因缺乏本体论关系理解而产生的语义训练鸿沟，即模型训练获取的领域词汇与制造运营中通过本体定义的意义之间的结构性脱节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：模型在语言上精确但操作上错误的输出；多Agent配置下产生语义漂移的复合失败模式；未约束工具参数导致43%的领域标识符幻觉率。
analysis.method: 提出一种将制造本体直接嵌入AI工具层的架构，通过类型化关系配置在运行时强制语义约束，形式化为resolve、contextualize、annotate三操作接口契约，并由AIOps编排层保证不变量。
contributions: 形式化定义了语义训练鸿沟和语义漂移概念
提出本体约束的工具架构，将工具调用幻觉率从43%降至0%
通过数字孪生分析平台验证跨领域可配置性，无需修改应用代码
analysis.experiments: 在6种工业配置、72次工具调用（使用Qwen3-32B）的受控实验中，未约束参数产生43%的幻觉率，本体约束参数降至0%。
limitations: 实验仅基于单一模型（Qwen3-32B），泛化性待验证
本体构建和维护需要领域专家参与，可能增加初始成本
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过本体论约束工具参数，消除工业AI Agent中的工具调用幻觉。

papers.title: Rethinking LLMOps for Fraud and AML: Building a Compliance-Grade LLM Serving Stack
papers.abstract: Fraud detection and anti-money-laundering (AML) compliance are high-value domains for large language models (LLMs), but their serving requirements differ sharply from generic chat workloads. Compliance prompts are often prefix-heavy, schema-constrained, and evidence-rich, combining reusable policy instructions, risk taxonomies, transaction or document context, and short structured outputs such as JSON labels or risk factors. These properties make prefix reuse, KV-cache efficiency, runtime tuning, model orchestration, and output validation first-order systems concerns. This paper introduces a workload-aware LLMOps stack for fraud and AML workloads using self-hosted open-weight models such as Meta Llama and Alibaba Qwen. The stack combines vLLM-style runtime tuning, PagedAttention, Automatic Prefix Caching, multi-adapter serving, adapter and prompt-length-aware batching, sleep/wake lifecycle management, speculative decoding, and optional prefill/decode disaggregation. To avoid exposing institution-specific data, the reproducibility track converts public synthetic AML datasets, including IBM AML and SAML-D, into prefix-heavy compliance prompts with reusable policy text, transaction evidence, typology definitions, and schema-constrained outputs. We also incorporate an LLM-as-judge quality gate using deterministic compliance checks, reference metrics, expert-adjudicated calibration data where available, and multi-judge rubric scoring. Across public-synthetic AML workloads and controlled serving benchmarks, workload-aware tuning improved throughput from 612-650 to 3,600 requests/hour, reduced P99 latency from 31-38 seconds to 6.4-8.7 seconds, and increased GPU utilization from 12% to 78%. These results show that regulated LLM performance is a workload-design, serving-optimization, and quality-gating problem, not only a model-selection problem.

analysis.tldr: 针对欺诈检测和反洗钱合规场景，提出一套工作负载感知的LLMOps服务栈，通过前缀缓存、运行时调优等优化，显著提升吞吐量、降低延迟并提高GPU利用率。
analysis.research_motivation: 欺诈检测和反洗钱（AML）合规是LLM的高价值应用领域，但其服务需求与通用聊天工作负载差异显著，现有服务栈未针对此类前缀密集、模式约束、证据丰富的合规提示进行优化，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一套面向欺诈和AML合规工作负载的LLM服务栈，以解决前缀重用、KV缓存效率、运行时调优、模型编排和输出验证等系统级问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合规提示通常具有前缀密集、模式约束、证据丰富的特点，包含可重用的策略指令、风险分类、交易或文档上下文以及短结构化输出（如JSON标签或风险因素），这些特性使得前缀重用、KV缓存效率等成为首要系统问题。
analysis.method: 提出工作负载感知的LLMOps栈，结合vLLM风格的运行时调优、PagedAttention、自动前缀缓存、多适配器服务、适配器和提示长度感知的批处理、休眠/唤醒生命周期管理、推测解码以及可选的预填充/解码分离；同时引入LLM-as-judge质量门控，使用确定性合规检查、参考指标、专家裁决校准数据和多裁判评分。
contributions: 识别并形式化了欺诈和AML合规场景下LLM服务的独特工作负载特征（前缀密集、模式约束、证据丰富）。
设计并实现了一套工作负载感知的LLMOps服务栈，包含多项系统优化技术。
通过公开合成AML数据集构建了可复现的基准测试，并展示了显著的性能提升：吞吐量从612-650提升至3600请求/小时，P99延迟从31-38秒降至6.4-8.7秒，GPU利用率从12%提升至78%。
analysis.experiments: 在公开合成AML工作负载和受控服务基准上，工作负载感知调优将吞吐量从612-650提升至3600请求/小时，P99延迟从31-38秒降至6.4-8.7秒，GPU利用率从12%提升至78%。
limitations: 实验基于公开合成数据集，真实机构数据可能带来额外挑战。
未讨论不同模型规模下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对欺诈检测和反洗钱合规场景，提出一套工作负载感知的LLMOps服务栈，通过前缀缓存、运行时调优等优化，显著提升吞吐量、降低延迟并提高GPU利用率。

papers.title: PIVOT: Bridging Planning and Execution in LLM Agents via Trajectory Refinement
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents frequently generate seemingly coherent plans that fail upon execution due to infeasible actions, constraint violations, and compounding errors over extended horizons. PIVOT (Plan-Inspect-eVOlve Trajectories) addresses this plan-execution misalignment through a self-supervised framework that treats trajectories as optimizable objects iteratively refined via environment interaction. The framework comprises four stages: PLAN generates candidate trajectories; INSPECT executes them and computes structured losses with textual gradients encoding plan-execution discrepancies; EVOLVE applies these signals to produce improved trajectories; and VERIFY performs a final global check against task constraints. A monotonic acceptance process ensures a non-decreasing solution quality. Empirical evaluations on DeepPlanning and GAIA demonstrate state-of-the-art performance: with human-in-the-loop (HITL) feedback, PIVOT establishes a strong upper bound up to 94% relative improvement in constraint satisfaction, while its fully autonomous variant retains substantial gains, showing that the core trajectory-refinement mechanism remains effective without external supervision. At the same time, PIVOT remains computationally efficient, requiring up to 3x to 5x fewer tokens than competing refinement methods. These findings establish that (self- or human-supervised) feedback-based trajectory optimization is a principled methodology for mitigating plan-execution gaps in autonomous agent systems.

analysis.tldr: PIVOT通过将轨迹视为可优化对象并迭代精炼，弥合LLM Agent规划与执行之间的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的Agent生成的计划常因不可行动作、约束违反和长程累积错误而执行失败，现有方法缺乏系统性的规划-执行对齐机制。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM Agent中规划与执行之间的不一致问题，即计划看似合理但执行时失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出计划执行失败源于不可行动作、约束违反和长程累积错误，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PIVOT框架，包含PLAN（生成候选轨迹）、INSPECT（执行并计算结构化损失与文本梯度）、EVOLVE（应用信号改进轨迹）、VERIFY（全局检查约束）四个阶段，并通过单调接受过程保证解质量非递减。
contributions: 提出将轨迹作为可优化对象进行迭代精炼的自我监督框架PIVOT，有效弥合规划-执行差距。
在DeepPlanning和GAIA上实现SOTA性能，HITL反馈下约束满足度提升高达94%，全自主变体仍保持显著增益，且token消耗减少3-5倍。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepPlanning和GAIA基准上评估，显示SOTA性能，HITL反馈下约束满足度相对提升94%，全自主变体保留显著增益，且token消耗比竞争方法少3-5倍。
limitations: 可能依赖环境交互的代价，在模拟器或真实世界中执行成本高。
单调接受过程可能限制探索，错过非单调但更优的解。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PIVOT通过将轨迹视为可优化对象并迭代精炼，弥合LLM Agent规划与执行之间的差距。

papers.title: Do Vision-Language-Models show human-like logical problem-solving capability in point and click puzzle games?
papers.abstract: Vision-Language(-Action) Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to interactive environments, yet existing benchmarks often overlook the complex physical reasoning required for point-and-click puzzle games. This paper introduces Vision-Language Against The Incredible Machine (VLATIM), a benchmark designed to evaluate human-like logical problem-solving capabilities within the classic physics puzzle game The Incredible Machine 2 (TIM). Unlike existing benchmarks, VLATIM specifically targets the critical gap between high-level logical reasoning and continuous action spaces requiring precise mouse interactions. This benchmark is structured into five progressive parts, assessing capabilities that range from basic visual grounding and domain understanding to multi-step manipulation and full puzzle solving. Our results reveal a significant disparity between reasoning and execution. While large proprietary models demonstrate superior planning abilities, they struggle with precise visual grounding. Consequently, they do not yet show human-like problem-solving capabilities.

analysis.tldr: VLMs在点击解谜游戏中缺乏类人逻辑推理能力，尤其在精确视觉定位与连续动作执行上存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准测试忽略了点击解谜游戏所需的复杂物理推理能力，而VLMs在交互环境中的应用日益广泛，亟需评估其类人逻辑问题解决能力。
analysis.problem: 评估VLMs在需要精确鼠标交互的连续动作空间中，从视觉定位到多步操作再到完整解谜的类人逻辑推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大型专有模型在规划能力上表现优越，但在精确视觉定位上存在困难，导致推理与执行之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 提出VLATIM基准，包含五个渐进部分，从基础视觉定位、领域理解到多步操作和完整解谜，系统评估VLMs的逻辑问题解决能力。
contributions: 提出了VLATIM基准，专门评估VLMs在点击解谜游戏中的类人逻辑推理能力。
揭示了大型专有模型在推理与执行之间的显著差距，即规划能力强但视觉定位弱。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅基于单一游戏（The Incredible Machine 2），泛化性有限。
未详细说明模型类型和规模，可能影响结论的普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在点击解谜游戏中缺乏类人逻辑推理能力，尤其在精确视觉定位与连续动作执行上存在显著差距。

papers.title: Don't Look at the Numbers: Visual Anchoring Bias and Layer-wise Representation in VLMs
papers.abstract: Embedded numeric anchors on images systematically bias Vision-Language Model quality judgments across six VLMs from five architectural families (ANOVA eta^2 = 0.18-0.77, all p < 0.001). Anchor effects are 2.5x larger than severe image quality degradation, confirming bias is not reducible to visual changes. Layer-wise probing reveals consistent dissociation: layers where anchor classification saturates (L12-L34) are suboptimal for quality prediction, with optimal layers deeper (R^2 = 0.69-0.91). Fusion analysis identifies architecture-dependent integration -- instant fusion at L1-L2 in two models versus partial or no fusion in three others. These results establish a causal account of visual anchoring bias, linking behavioral susceptibility to representation dynamics.

analysis.tldr: VLM对图像中的数字锚点存在系统性视觉锚定偏差，且偏差与表征层次分离相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在质量判断等任务中可能受到图像中嵌入数字锚点的影响，这种偏差的机制尚不明确，理解其来源有助于提升模型可靠性和公平性。
analysis.problem: 研究VLM中视觉锚定偏差的存在性、强度及其与模型表征层次的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数字锚点对VLM质量判断产生系统性偏差，效应量比严重图像质量退化大2.5倍，表明偏差不可归因于视觉变化；层次探针显示锚点分类饱和的层（L12-L34）对质量预测次优，最优层更深；融合分析揭示架构依赖的集成模式。
analysis.method: 通过嵌入数字锚点进行行为实验，结合层次探针和融合分析，探究锚定偏差与表征动态的因果关系。
contributions: 首次系统证明VLM中存在视觉锚定偏差，且偏差强度超过图像质量退化。
揭示锚定偏差与表征层次的分离现象，并识别架构依赖的融合模式。
analysis.experiments: 在6个VLM（来自5个架构家族）上进行实验，使用ANOVA检验（eta^2=0.18-0.77，p<0.001），并报告层次探针的R^2（0.69-0.91）。
limitations: 仅针对质量判断任务，其他任务中锚定偏差可能不同。
未探讨锚定偏差的缓解方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM对图像中的数字锚点存在系统性视觉锚定偏差，且偏差与表征层次分离相关。

papers.title: The Many Faces of On-Policy Distillation: Pitfalls, Mechanisms, and Fixes
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) and on-policy self-distillation (OPSD) have emerged as promising post-training methods for large language models, offering dense token-level supervision on trajectories sampled from the model's own policy. However, existing results on their effectiveness remain mixed: while OP(S)D has shown promise in system prompt and knowledge internalization, recent studies also report instability and degradation. In this work, we present a comprehensive empirical study of when OPD and OPSD work, when they fail, and why. We find that OPD on mathematical reasoning is highly sensitive to teacher choice and loss formulation, whereas OPSD fails in our tested settings due to test-time absence of instance-specific privileged information (PI). In contrast, OPSD is effective when PI represents a shared latent rule, such as a system prompt or alignment preference. We identify three failure mechanisms: (1) distribution mismatch between teacher and student caused by conditioning on student-generated prefixes, (2) optimization instability from biased TopK reverse-KL gradients, and (3) an OPSD-specific limitation where the student learns a PI-free policy that aggregates PI-conditioned teachers, which is insufficient when PI is instance-specific. We further show that stop-gradient TopK objectives, RLVR-adapted teachers, and SFT-stabilized students mitigate these failures.

analysis.tldr: 全面研究在线策略蒸馏（OPD）和在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）在LLM后训练中的失效机制与修复方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）和在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）作为LLM后训练方法，提供密集的token级监督，但现有结果好坏参半，存在不稳定和性能退化问题，需要系统理解其工作原理和失败原因。
analysis.problem: 揭示OPD和OPSD何时有效、何时失败及其根本原因，并提出修复策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OPD在数学推理中对教师选择和损失函数高度敏感；OPSD在测试时缺乏实例特定的特权信息（PI）时失败，但当PI代表共享潜在规则（如系统提示或对齐偏好）时有效。识别出三种失败机制：分布不匹配、优化不稳定和OPSD特有的PI聚合问题。
analysis.method: 通过全面的实证研究，分析OPD和OPSD的失败机制，并提出stop-gradient TopK目标、RLVR自适应教师和SFT稳定学生等修复方法。
contributions: 系统识别了OPD和OPSD的三种失败机制：分布不匹配、优化不稳定和OPSD特有的PI聚合问题。
提出了有效的修复策略：stop-gradient TopK目标、RLVR自适应教师和SFT稳定学生。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 修复策略可能仅在特定设置下有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
研究主要针对数学推理和系统提示场景，其他任务可能有所不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 全面研究在线策略蒸馏（OPD）和在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）在LLM后训练中的失效机制与修复方法。

papers.title: OLIVIA: Online Learning via Inference-time Action Adaptation for Decision Making in LLM ReAct Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model agents interleave reasoning, action selection, and observation to solve sequential decision-making tasks. In deployed settings where agents repeatedly handle related multi-step tasks, small action-selection errors can accumulate into wasted tool calls, latency, and reduced reliability. Despite this need for deployment-time improvement, existing inference-time adaptation methods for LLM agents mainly rely on prompting or retrieval, which influence behavior indirectly through context manipulation. For ReAct-style agents, such approaches do not expose an explicit decision layer that can score candidate actions, represent uncertainty, or be updated online from action-level feedback. As a result, they provide limited support for trackable, fine-grained, and uncertainty-aware adaptation during deployment. We propose OLIVIA, an inference-time action adaptation framework for ReAct-style agents. OLIVIA models the LLM's final action-selection layer as a contextual linear bandit over candidate actions, with frozen hidden states as decision contexts. This choice is particularly suitable for deployment because it adapts behavior directly at the action-selection interface, preserves the underlying reasoning process, and provides explicit uncertainty estimates and lightweight online updates from action-level feedback. With upper-confidence-bound exploration, OLIVIA improves the policy sample-efficiently with minimal computational overhead. We instantiate OLIVIA on four benchmarks and show that it consistently improves task performance over static ReAct and prompt-based inference-time baselines. Our results suggest that explicit online decision layers provide an effective alternative to purely prompt- or retrieval-based adaptation for LLM agents during deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出OLIVIA框架，将LLM ReAct智能体的动作选择层建模为上下文线性赌博机，实现轻量级在线适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 部署场景中LLM智能体反复处理多步任务时，小动作选择错误会累积导致工具调用浪费、延迟和可靠性下降，现有推理时适应方法依赖提示或检索，缺乏显式决策层来评分候选动作、表示不确定性或在线更新。
analysis.problem: 如何为ReAct风格智能体提供可追踪、细粒度、不确定性感知的部署时动作适应方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将LLM最终动作选择层建模为上下文线性赌博机，冻结隐藏状态作为决策上下文，使用上置信界探索，通过动作级反馈进行轻量级在线更新。
contributions: 提出OLIVIA，首个将ReAct智能体动作选择层显式建模为上下文线性赌博机的推理时适应框架。
在四个基准上验证OLIVIA一致优于静态ReAct和基于提示的推理时基线，且计算开销极小。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准上评估，OLIVIA一致提升任务性能，优于静态ReAct和基于提示的推理时基线。
limitations: 依赖冻结隐藏状态，可能无法适应需要深层推理更新的场景。
线性赌博机假设可能不适用于高度非线性的动作选择空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OLIVIA框架，将LLM ReAct智能体的动作选择层建模为上下文线性赌博机，实现轻量级在线适应。

papers.title: RankQ: Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning via Self-Supervised Action Ranking
papers.abstract: Offline-to-online reinforcement learning (RL) improves sample efficiency by leveraging pre-collected datasets prior to online interaction. A key challenge, however, is learning an accurate critic in large state--action spaces with limited dataset coverage. To mitigate harmful updates from value overestimation, prior methods impose pessimism by down-weighting out-of-distribution (OOD) actions relative to dataset actions. While effective, this essentially acts as a behavior cloning anchor and can hinder downstream online policy improvement when dataset actions are suboptimal. We propose RankQ, an offline-to-online Q-learning objective that augments temporal-difference learning with a self-supervised multi-term ranking loss to enforce structured action ordering. By learning relative action preferences rather than uniformly penalizing unseen actions, RankQ shapes the Q-function such that action gradients are directed toward higher-quality behaviors. Across sparse reward D4RL benchmarks, RankQ achieves performance competitive with or superior to seven prior methods. In vision-based robot learning, RankQ enables effective offline-to-online fine-tuning of a pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) model in a low-data regime, achieving on average a 42.7% higher simulation success rate than the next best method. In a high-data setting, RankQ improves simulation performance by 13.7% over the next best method and achieves strong sim-to-real transfer, increasing real-world cube stacking success from 43.1% to 84.7% relative to the VLA's initial performance.

analysis.tldr: RankQ 通过自监督动作排序损失改进离线到在线强化学习，在 D4RL 和 VLA 微调中取得显著性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线到在线强化学习面临值函数过估计问题，现有方法通过悲观惩罚 OOD 动作，但会限制策略改进，尤其当数据集动作次优时。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖行为克隆的情况下，有效约束 Q 函数以避免过估计，同时支持在线策略改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RankQ，在时序差分学习中引入自监督多术语排序损失，学习动作的相对偏好而非统一惩罚，从而引导 Q 函数梯度朝向更优行为。
contributions: 提出 RankQ 目标函数，通过动作排序损失实现结构化动作顺序学习。
在 D4RL 稀疏奖励基准上达到与七种先前方法竞争或更优的性能。
在视觉机器人学习中，RankQ 有效微调预训练 VLA 模型，低数据场景下成功率提升 42.7%，高数据场景下提升 13.7%，并实现 sim-to-real 迁移，真实堆叠成功率从 43.1% 提升至 84.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在 D4RL 稀疏奖励基准和视觉机器人学习（VLA 微调）上评估，包括低数据和高数据场景，以及 sim-to-real 迁移实验。
limitations: 可能对排序损失的超参数敏感。
未在更广泛的任务或连续控制基准上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RankQ 通过自监督动作排序损失改进离线到在线强化学习，在 D4RL 和 VLA 微调中取得显著性能提升。

papers.title: EVOCHAMBER: Test-Time Co-evolution of Multi-Agent System at Individual, Team, and Population Scales
papers.abstract: We argue that multi-agent test-time evolution is not single-agent evolution replicated N times. A single-agent learner can only evolve its own context and memory. A multi-agent system additionally evolves who collaborates, how they collaborate, and how knowledge flows across the population. These components have no single-agent counterpart and can produce phenomena such as emergent specialization. Yet prior test-time methods either confine experiences to individual agents, forfeiting cross-agent learning, or broadcast symmetrically to all agents, erasing the specialization that makes collaboration valuable. We present EVOCHAMBER, a training-free framework that instantiates test-time evolution at three levels over a coevolving agent pool. At its core is CODREAM (Collaborative Dreaming), a post-task protocol triggered on team failure or disagreement, in which agents collaboratively reflect, distill insights, and route them asymmetrically from strong to weak agents on the failed niche, preserving specialization while filling knowledge gaps. Team-level operators assemble niche-conditioned teams and select collaboration structures online. Population-level lifecycle operators fork, merge, prune, and seed agents under performance pressure. On three heterogeneous task streams with Qwen3-8B, EVOCHAMBER reaches 63.9% on competition math, 75.7% on code, and 87.1% on multi-domain reasoning, outperforming the best baseline by 32% relative on math and confirming asymmetric cross-agent transfer as the primary driver in ablation. Starting from several identically initialized agents, four to five stable niche specialists spontaneously emerge, a structural signature of multi-agent evolution that no single-agent learner can express. See our code at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出EVOCHAMBER框架，在个体、团队和群体三个尺度上实现多智能体系统的测试时协同进化，无需训练即可提升异构任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时方法要么将经验限制在单个智能体，丧失跨智能体学习能力；要么对称广播给所有智能体，抹除专业化分工带来的协作价值。多智能体系统需要独特的进化机制来管理协作、知识流动和专业化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，在测试时实现多智能体系统的协同进化，包括个体学习、团队协作和群体知识流动，同时保持专业化分工。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从相同初始化的智能体出发，经过协同进化后自发涌现出4-5个稳定的专业角色，这是多智能体进化的结构特征，单智能体学习无法表达。
analysis.method: EVOCHAMBER框架包含三个层次：个体层通过CODREAM协议在团队失败或分歧后异步传递知识（从强到弱智能体）；团队层在线组建基于专业角色的团队并选择协作结构；群体层通过分叉、合并、剪枝和播种操作动态调整智能体池。
contributions: 提出多智能体测试时协同进化的三层次框架EVOCHAMBER，区分于单智能体进化的简单复制。
设计CODREAM协议实现非对称跨智能体知识转移，在保持专业化的同时填补知识空白。
在竞赛数学、代码和多领域推理三个异构任务流上达到63.9%、75.7%和87.1%的准确率，相对最优基线提升32%。
analysis.experiments: 使用Qwen3-8B模型在三个异构任务流（竞赛数学、代码、多领域推理）上评估，EVOCHAMBER分别达到63.9%、75.7%和87.1%，在数学任务上相对最优基线提升32%。消融实验确认非对称跨智能体转移是主要驱动因素。
limitations: 仅基于Qwen3-8B模型验证，泛化性需更多模型支持。
框架依赖团队失败或分歧触发CODREAM，可能在高成功率任务中触发频率低。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EVOCHAMBER框架，在个体、团队和群体三个尺度上实现多智能体系统的测试时协同进化，无需训练即可提升异构任务性能。

papers.title: A Cascaded Generative Approach for e-Commerce Recommendations
papers.abstract: Personalized storefronts in large e-commerce marketplaces are often assembled from many independent components: static themes per page section ("placement"), retrieval systems to fetch eligible products per placement, and pointwise rankers to order content. While effective in optimizing for aggregate preferences, this paradigm is rigid and can limit personalization and semantic cohesion across the page. This makes it poorly suited to support dynamic objectives and merchandising requirements over time. To address this, we introduce a cascaded merchandising framework that decomposes storefront construction into two generative tasks: (i) placement-level theme generation and (ii) constrained keyword generation per placement to power product retrieval. Teacher-student fine-tuning is leveraged to improve scalability of this framework under production latency and cost constraints. Fine-tuned model ablations are shown to approach closed-weight LLM performance. We further contribute frameworks for AI-driven content evaluation and quality filtering, enabling safe and automated deployment of dynamic content at scale. Generative output is fused with traditional ranking models to preserve hybrid infrastructure. In online experiments, this framework yields an estimated +2.7% lift in cart adds per page view over a strong baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出级联生成框架，将电商店铺构建分解为布局主题生成和约束关键词生成，提升个性化与语义连贯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统电商店铺由独立组件（静态主题、检索系统、排序器）组装，缺乏灵活性和个性化，难以适应动态目标和营销需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现动态、个性化且语义连贯的电商店铺页面构建，同时满足生产环境的延迟和成本约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 级联生成框架：先进行布局级主题生成，再为每个布局生成约束关键词以驱动产品检索；采用教师-学生微调提升可扩展性，并与传统排序模型融合。
contributions: 提出级联生成框架，将店铺构建分解为两个生成任务。
利用教师-学生微调在延迟和成本约束下接近闭源LLM性能。
贡献AI驱动的内容评估和质量过滤框架，实现安全自动化部署。
analysis.experiments: 在线实验显示，与强基线相比，每次页面浏览的购物车添加量提升约2.7%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量教师模型。
生成内容质量过滤可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出级联生成框架，将电商店铺构建分解为布局主题生成和约束关键词生成，提升个性化与语义连贯性。

papers.title: Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM parameters can cheaply and rapidly adapt to task-specific requirements (e.g., prompt optimization), but cannot by itself typically match the performance gains available through updating LLM parameters. There is no good reason for restricting learning to being in-context or in-weights. Moreover, humans also likely learn at different time scales (e.g., System 1 vs 2). To this end, we introduce a fast-slow learning framework for LLMs, with model parameters as "slow" weights and optimized context as "fast" weights. These fast "weights" can learn from textual feedback to absorb the task-specific information, while allowing slow weights to stay closer to the base model and persist general reasoning behaviors. Fast-Slow Training (FST) is up to 3x more sample-efficient than only slow learning (RL) across reasoning tasks, while consistently reaching a higher performance asymptote. Moreover, FST-trained models remain closer to the base LLM (up to 70% less KL divergence), resulting in less catastrophic forgetting than RL-training. This reduced drift also preserves plasticity: after training on one task, FST trained models adapt more effectively to a subsequent task than parameter-only trained models. In continual learning scenarios, where task domains change on the fly, FST continues to acquire each new task while parameter-only RL stalls.

analysis.tldr: 提出快慢学习框架，结合上下文优化（快权重）与参数更新（慢权重），提升LLM持续学习能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM通过参数更新（如RL）学习下游任务会导致灾难性遗忘和可塑性丧失，而仅靠上下文学习性能不足。人类学习具有不同时间尺度，启发结合两者优势。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在持续学习场景中既高效适应新任务，又避免灾难性遗忘和可塑性丧失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参数更新导致遗忘和可塑性丧失，上下文学习性能有限，但两者互补。
analysis.method: 提出Fast-Slow Training (FST)框架：模型参数作为慢权重，优化的上下文作为快权重，快权重从文本反馈中学习任务特定信息，慢权重保持通用推理能力。
contributions: 提出快慢学习框架，结合上下文优化与参数更新，实现高效持续学习。
实验表明FST在推理任务上样本效率提升3倍，性能渐近线更高，且遗忘更少（KL散度降低70%），可塑性保持更好。
analysis.experiments: 在推理任务上比较FST与RL，FST样本效率提升3倍，性能更高；KL散度降低70%；持续学习场景中FST持续学习新任务，RL停滞。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务反馈格式。
快权重的优化开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出快慢学习框架，结合上下文优化（快权重）与参数更新（慢权重），提升LLM持续学习能力。

papers.title: Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
papers.abstract: In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often an inefficient allocation because it overlooks a reward-density principle: sparse sequence-level reward should train models where exploration is productive, while dense token-level teacher reward should be used where the aim is to compress behavior into a smaller model. In this view, GRPO-style sparse RL and OPD-style dense teacher supervision are not separate recipes; they are different reward-density regimes. The allocation rule is simple: use scarce labeled training data upstream on the strongest model that can turn it into reward-shaped behavior, then transfer that behavior downstream as dense supervision. We evaluate this rule on verifiable math with Qwen3 and Llama models. At fixed Qwen3-1.7B deployment-student size, an RL-improved 8B teacher distilled through the dense bridge outperforms direct GRPO on the same student, while transfer from the same teacher before RL underperforms. The bridge is important: a forward-KL warmup on teacher rollouts followed by OPD on student rollouts is consistently strongest on MATH before any post-bridge student-side sparse RL, and also gives the best pre-Stage~3 AIME endpoints for the canonical 8B/14B teachers. The bridge also makes later student-side sparse RL effective: GRPO that is weak on a cold student lifts MATH from $75.4\%$ to $78.5\%$ after the bridge and outperforms a matched replay control by $2.8$ points. The operational principal is to avoid using scarce labeled data on the least prepared policy: use sparse reward for teacher-side discovery, dense transfer for student compression, and student-side sparse reward only after the bridge.

analysis.tldr: 提出稀疏到密集奖励分配原则：用稀疏奖励训练强教师模型探索，再用密集奖励蒸馏到学生模型，比直接在学生上使用GRPO更高效。
analysis.research_motivation: 在标注可验证训练数据稀缺时，如何高效分配每个检查过的样本以最大化模型性能提升，现有方法（如直接在部署学生上运行GRPO）可能效率低下。
analysis.problem: 解决稀缺标注数据在语言模型后训练中的最优分配问题，即如何结合稀疏序列级奖励和密集token级教师监督来提升学生模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在固定学生模型大小时，使用RL改进的教师通过密集桥蒸馏优于直接对学生进行GRPO；桥（前向KL预热+OPD）是关键，能提升后续学生侧稀疏RL的效果。
analysis.method: 提出稀疏到密集奖励原则：先用稀疏奖励（如GRPO）在强教师模型上进行探索和奖励塑造，再通过密集监督（如OPD）将行为转移到学生模型，最后可选地在学生上使用稀疏奖励。
contributions: 提出稀疏到密集奖励分配原则，统一了GRPO和OPD两种范式。
通过数学验证任务上的实验证明了该原则的有效性，包括桥蒸馏和后续学生侧RL的增益。
analysis.experiments: 在可验证数学任务上使用Qwen3和Llama模型进行评估，固定Qwen3-1.7B为学生，比较不同教师和学生训练策略。摘要未提供完整实验细节。
limitations: 实验仅在数学验证任务上进行，可能不适用于其他领域。
原则依赖于强教师模型的存在，若教师能力不足可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出稀疏到密集奖励分配原则：用稀疏奖励训练强教师模型探索，再用密集奖励蒸馏到学生模型，比直接在学生上使用GRPO更高效。

papers.title: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
papers.abstract: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values, and passes the enlarged cache forward; the same one-step update is applied repeatedly, analogous to foldl in functional programming. Building on the KV cache concatenation primitive introduced for latent multi-agent communication, we repurpose it as a chunk-to-chunk recurrence for long-context inference. When processing chunk t, the model attends to the KV cache carried from earlier chunks as a prefix, reusing its internal state across segments without modifying or retraining the model. Despite its simplicity, the induced recurrence is stable: per-step drift rises briefly and then saturates into a flat plateau that persists across deep chains. This plateau is insensitive to a 10,000x change in numerical precision, robust across chunk sizes, and consistent across model families. At the task level, KV-Fold preserves exact information over long distances. On a needle-in-a-haystack benchmark, it achieves 100% exact-match retrieval across 152 trials spanning contexts from 16K to 128K tokens and chain depths up to 511 on Llama-3.1-8B, while remaining within the memory limits of a single 40GB GPU. Compared to streaming methods, which trade fidelity for bounded memory, KV-Fold maintains long-range retrieval while operating as a sequence of tractable forward passes. Overall, our results show that frozen pretrained transformers already support a stable form of KV-cache recurrence, providing a practical route to long-context inference without architectural changes or training.

analysis.tldr: KV-Fold 通过将 KV 缓存视为序列块上的左折叠累加器，实现无需训练的长上下文推理，在 needle-in-a-haystack 任务中达到 100% 精确检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理是大型语言模型的关键能力，但现有方法通常需要修改架构或额外训练，且流式方法在有限内存下牺牲了检索保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型或训练的情况下，利用预训练 Transformer 的 KV 缓存实现稳定、高效的长上下文推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到 KV-Fold 的递归过程是稳定的：每步漂移短暂上升后饱和为平坦平台，该平台对数值精度（10000倍变化）、块大小和模型族不敏感。
analysis.method: KV-Fold 将 KV 缓存作为序列块上的左折叠累加器，每步处理当前块时，模型关注之前块累积的 KV 缓存作为前缀，然后追加新生成的键值并传递到下一步，重复此过程。
contributions: 提出 KV-Fold，一种无需训练的长上下文推理协议，利用 KV 缓存递归实现稳定推理。
在 needle-in-a-haystack 基准上，使用 Llama-3.1-8B 在 152 次试验中达到 100% 精确检索，上下文长度从 16K 到 128K 令牌，链深度达 511，且内存限制在单张 40GB GPU 内。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型架构（如 Llama 系列），泛化性需进一步验证。
递归过程虽稳定，但长链下的计算开销可能随深度线性增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KV-Fold 通过将 KV 缓存视为序列块上的左折叠累加器，实现无需训练的长上下文推理，在 needle-in-a-haystack 任务中达到 100% 精确检索。

papers.title: Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
papers.abstract: Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurrence depths. We introduce Attractor Models, in which a backbone module first proposes output embeddings, then an attractor module refines them by solving for the fixed point, with gradients obtained through implicit differentiation. Thus, training memory remains constant in effective depth, and iterations are chosen adaptively by convergence. Empirically, Attractor Models outperform existing models across two regimes, large-scale language-model pretraining and reasoning with tiny models. In language modeling, Attractor Models deliver a Pareto improvement over standard Transformers and stable looped models across sizes, improving perplexity by up to 46.6% and downstream accuracy by up to 19.7% while reducing training cost. Notably, a 770M Attractor Model outperforms a 1.3B Transformer trained on twice as many tokens. On challenging reasoning tasks, we show that our model with only 27M parameters and approximately 1000 examples achieves 91.4% accuracy on Sudoku-Extreme and 93.1% on Maze-Hard, scaling favorably where frontier models like Claude and GPT o3, fail completely, and specialized recursive reasoners collapse at larger sizes. Lastly, we show that Attractor Models exhibit a novel phenomenon, which we call equilibrium internalization: fixed-point training places the model's initial output embedding near equilibrium, allowing the solver to be removed at inference time with little degradation. Together, these results suggest that Attractor Models make iterative refinement scalable by turning recurrence into a computation the model can learn to internalize.

analysis.tldr: 提出吸引子模型，通过隐式微分求解不动点实现高效迭代精炼，在语言建模和推理任务上超越现有模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环Transformer虽能迭代精炼表征，但训练不稳定、成本高、受限于固定深度，亟需可扩展的迭代精炼方法。
analysis.problem: 如何使循环架构的迭代精炼过程稳定、高效且自适应深度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现平衡内化现象：不动点训练使模型初始输出嵌入接近平衡，推理时可移除求解器而性能几乎不降。
analysis.method: 吸引子模型：骨干模块提出输出嵌入，吸引子模块通过求解不动点精炼嵌入，梯度由隐式微分获得，训练内存与有效深度无关，迭代次数由收敛自适应决定。
contributions: 提出吸引子模型，将循环转化为可内化的计算，实现稳定训练和自适应深度。
在语言建模中实现帕累托改进，770M模型超越1.3B Transformer；在推理任务中以极小模型达到高准确率，前沿模型失败。
发现平衡内化现象，允许推理时移除求解器。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模语言模型预训练和推理任务上评估：语言建模中困惑度降低高达46.6%，下游准确率提升19.7%；推理任务中27M参数模型在Sudoku-Extreme和Maze-Hard上分别达91.4%和93.1%准确率。
limitations: 隐式微分可能增加实现复杂度。
平衡内化现象的理论分析尚不深入。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出吸引子模型，通过隐式微分求解不动点实现高效迭代精炼，在语言建模和推理任务上超越现有模型。

papers.title: Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
papers.abstract: To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most often simulated for various scenarios and do not accurately reflect real deployment behavior or user traffic patterns. Therefore, there is an utmost need for realistic datasets under various conditions. This work presents a dataset collected from a commercially deployed network across various modes of mobility (pedestrian, bike, car, bus, and train) and at multiple speeds to depict real time UE mobility. When collecting the dataset, we focused primarily on handover (HO) scenarios, with the aim of reducing the HO interruption time and maintaining continuous throughput during and immediately after HO execution. To support this research, the dataset includes timing advance (TA) measurements at various signaling events such as RACH trigger, MAC CE, and PDCCH grant which are typically missing in existing works. We cover a detailed description of the creation of the dataset; experimental setup, data acquisition, and extraction. We also cover an exploratory analysis of the data, with a primary focus on mobility, beam management, and TA. We discuss multiple use cases in which the proposed dataset can facilitate understanding of the inference of the AI/ML model. One such use case is to train and evaluate various AI/ML models for TA prediction.

analysis.tldr: 首个真实5G/6G移动性数据集，覆盖多种移动模式与信令事件，用于AI原生移动性研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI/ML移动性管理技术依赖仿真数据，无法反映真实部署行为或用户流量模式，亟需真实场景数据集。
analysis.problem: 缺乏真实、多场景的5G/6G移动性数据集，尤其是包含定时提前（TA）等关键信令事件的数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从商用部署网络中收集多模式（步行、自行车、汽车、公交、火车）和多速度下的实时UE移动数据，重点覆盖切换场景，并包含RACH触发、MAC CE、PDCCH授权等信令事件的TA测量。
contributions: 首个从真实商用网络收集的多模式移动性数据集，覆盖多种速度和切换场景。
数据集包含现有工作缺失的定时提前（TA）测量及多种信令事件。
提供了数据集的详细创建过程、实验设置、数据采集与提取方法，以及探索性分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能仅来自单一运营商或地区，泛化性需验证。
未提及数据标注或预处理细节，可能影响直接使用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个真实5G/6G移动性数据集，覆盖多种移动模式与信令事件，用于AI原生移动性研究。

papers.title: The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weaken as generative systems improve. We instead adopt a Computational Social Science perspective and ask whether synthetic political discourse behaves like an observed online population. We construct a paired corpus of 1,789,406 posts across nine crisis events: COVID-19, the Jan. 6 Capitol attack, the 2020 and 2024 U.S. elections, Dobbs/Roe v. Wade, the 2020 BLM protests, U.S. midterms, the Utah shooting, and the U.S.-Iran war. For each event, we compare observed discourse from social platforms with synthetic discourse generated for the same context. We evaluate four dimensions: emotional intensity, structural regularity, lexical-ideological framing, and cross-event dependency, using mean gaps and dispersion evidence. Across events, synthetic discourse is fluent but population-level unrealistic. It is generally more negative and less dispersed in sentiment, structurally more regular, and lexically more abstract than observed discourse. Observed discourse instead shows broader emotional variation, longer-tailed structural distributions, and more context-specific, colloquial lexical markers. These differences are event-dependent: larger for fast-moving, decentralized crises and smaller for formal or institutionally mediated events. We summarize them with a simple event-level measure, the Caricature Gap.
