Our findings suggest that the main limitation of synthetic political discourse is not grammar or fluency, but reduced population realism. Population-level auditing complements traditional text-detection and provides a CSS framework for evaluating the social realism of generated discourse.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的政治话语在群体层面缺乏真实感，表现为情绪更负面、结构更规则、词汇更抽象，且差异随事件类型变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI文本检测多关注句子级线索（如困惑度、突发性），但随着生成系统改进，这些信号可能减弱；需要从计算社会科学视角评估合成话语的群体真实性。
analysis.problem: 如何从群体层面审计LLM生成的政治话语是否像真实在线人群的讨论？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成话语在情绪上更负面且离散度更低，结构更规则，词汇更抽象；真实话语情绪变化更广、结构分布尾更长、词汇更具体和口语化；差异在快速演变的分散危机中更大，在正式或制度中介的事件中较小。
analysis.method: 构建包含9个危机事件的配对语料库（178万条帖子），比较真实社交媒体话语与LLM生成话语在情绪强度、结构规律性、词汇-意识形态框架和跨事件依赖性四个维度的均值差距和离散度，并定义Caricature Gap指标。
contributions: 提出从群体真实性角度审计合成政治话语的计算社会科学框架
构建多事件配对语料库并揭示合成话语的系统性失真模式
定义Caricature Gap作为事件级度量，总结合成话语的群体级偏差
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于特定LLM和提示策略，可能不泛化到其他模型或生成方式
事件选择有限，可能遗漏其他类型危机中的模式差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的政治话语在群体层面缺乏真实感，表现为情绪更负面、结构更规则、词汇更抽象，且差异随事件类型变化。

papers.title: A Causal Language Modeling Detour Improves Encoder Continued Pretraining
papers.abstract: When adapting an encoder to a new domain, the standard approach is to continue training with Masked Language Modeling (MLM). We show that temporarily switching to Causal Language Modeling (CLM) followed by a short MLM decay improves downstream performance. On biomedical texts with ModernBERT, this CLM detour outperforms MLM baselines trained on identical data and compute across 8 French and 11 English biomedical tasks, by +1.2-2.8pp and +0.3-0.8pp respectively, depending on model size. We investigate the reasons for these gains. We find that CLM's dense supervision impacts low transformer layers (0-7) far more than MLM does. Freezing low layers during CLM eliminates the downstream benefit; freezing mid layers preserves it. The representational changes persist through the MLM decay phase, even when it matches the CLM phase in length, and they scale with model capacity. We release ModernCamemBERT-bio and ModernBERT-bio as state-of-the-art biomedical encoders in Base and Large sizes.

analysis.tldr: 在编码器领域自适应中，临时切换为因果语言模型（CLM）再回归掩码语言模型（MLM）可显著提升下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 将编码器适配到新领域时，标准做法是继续使用MLM预训练，但MLM可能不是最优的领域自适应策略，需要探索更有效的预训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何改进编码器在领域自适应中的预训练策略，以提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CLM的密集监督对低层Transformer层（0-7层）影响远大于MLM；冻结低层会消除CLM带来的下游收益，而冻结中层则保留收益；表征变化在后续MLM阶段持续存在，且随模型容量增加而扩大。
analysis.method: 提出CLM Detour策略：在领域自适应预训练中，先临时切换到因果语言模型（CLM）训练，再经过短期的掩码语言模型（MLM）衰减阶段，最终恢复标准MLM。
contributions: 发现CLM Detour策略在生物医学文本上显著优于纯MLM基线，在8个法语和11个英语生物医学任务上分别提升+1.2-2.8pp和+0.3-0.8pp。
揭示了CLM密集监督对低层Transformer层的特殊影响，并分析了表征变化的持久性和规模依赖性。
发布了ModernCamemBERT-bio和ModernBERT-bio作为Base和Large尺寸的最先进生物医学编码器。
analysis.experiments: 在生物医学文本上使用ModernBERT，在8个法语和11个英语生物医学任务上评估，与相同数据和计算量的MLM基线对比。
limitations: 实验仅在生物医学领域和ModernBERT架构上进行，泛化性有待验证。
CLM Detour的最佳切换时机和衰减长度未深入探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在编码器领域自适应中，临时切换为因果语言模型（CLM）再回归掩码语言模型（MLM）可显著提升下游任务性能。

papers.title: Stories in Space: In-Context Learning Trajectories in Conceptual Belief Space
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) update their behavior in context, which can be viewed as a form of Bayesian inference. However, the structure of the latent hypothesis space over which this inference operates remains unclear. In this work, we propose that LLMs assign beliefs over a low-dimensional geometric space - a conceptual belief space - and that in-context learning corresponds to a trajectory through this space as beliefs are updated over time. Using story understanding as a natural setting for dynamic belief updating, we combine behavioral and representational analyses to study these trajectories. We find that (1) belief updates are well-described as trajectories on low-dimensional, structured manifolds; (2) this structure is reflected consistently in both model behavior and internal representations and can be decoded with simple linear probes to predict behavior; and (3) interventions on these representations causally steer belief trajectories, with effects that can be predicted from the geometry of the conceptual space. Together, our results provide a geometric account of belief dynamics in LLMs, grounding Bayesian interpretations of in-context learning in structured conceptual representations.

analysis.tldr: LLM的上下文学习可视为概念信念空间中的几何轨迹，信念更新在低维流形上结构化进行。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将LLM的上下文学习视为贝叶斯推断，但潜在假设空间的结构尚不明确，缺乏对信念动态几何表征的理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM在上下文学习中信念更新的潜在空间结构及其几何表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信念更新可描述为低维结构化流形上的轨迹，且该结构在行为与内部表征中一致反映，可通过线性探针解码预测行为。
analysis.method: 结合行为分析与表征分析，利用故事理解任务研究信念轨迹，并通过表征干预因果地引导信念更新。
contributions: 提出概念信念空间框架，将上下文学习建模为低维几何空间中的轨迹。
通过行为与表征分析验证信念更新的结构化流形性质，并展示线性探针可解码预测行为。
通过表征干预实现信念轨迹的因果引导，且效果可从几何空间预测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于故事理解任务，可能不适用于其他类型上下文学习。
低维流形假设的普适性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM的上下文学习可视为概念信念空间中的几何轨迹，信念更新在低维流形上结构化进行。

papers.title: Predicting Decisions of AI Agents from Limited Interaction through Text-Tabular Modeling
papers.abstract: AI agents negotiate and transact in natural language with unfamiliar counterparts: a buyer bot facing an unknown seller, or a procurement assistant negotiating with a supplier. In such interactions, the counterpart's LLM, prompts, control logic, and rule-based fallbacks are hidden, while each decision can have monetary consequences. We ask whether an agent can predict an unfamiliar counterpart's next decision from a few interactions. To avoid real-world logging confounds, we study this problem in controlled bargaining and negotiation games, formulating it as target-adaptive text-tabular prediction: each decision point is a table row combining structured game state, offer history, and dialogue, while $K$ previous games of the same target agent, i.e., the counterpart being modeled, are provided in the prompt as labeled adaptation examples. Our model is built on a tabular foundation model that represents rows using game-state features and LLM-based text representations, and adds LLM-as-Observer as an additional representation: a small frozen LLM reads the decision-time state and dialogue; its answer is discarded, and its hidden state becomes a decision-oriented feature, making the LLM an encoder rather than a direct few-shot predictor. Training on 13 frontier-LLM agents and testing on 91 held-out scaffolded agents, the full model outperforms direct LLM-as-Predictor prompting and game+text features baselines. Within this tabular model, Observer features contribute beyond the other feature schemes: at $K=16$, they improve response-prediction AUC by about 4 points across both tasks and reduce bargaining offer-prediction error by 14%. These results show that formulating counterpart prediction as a target-adaptive text-tabular task enables effective adaptation, and that hidden LLM representations expose decision-relevant signals that direct prompting does not surface.

analysis.tldr: 将AI对手决策预测建模为文本-表格预测任务，利用LLM隐藏状态作为特征，在有限交互中有效预测对手行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 在AI代理与未知对手的自然语言交互中，对手的LLM、提示、控制逻辑等是隐藏的，而每个决策都有金钱后果，因此需要从少量交互中预测对手的下一步决策。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限交互中预测不熟悉的AI对手的下一步决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用LLM作为预测器（LLM-as-Predictor）效果有限，而将LLM作为观察者（LLM-as-Observer）提取隐藏状态作为特征，能提供决策相关信号，提升预测性能。
analysis.method: 提出目标自适应文本-表格预测模型：每个决策点作为表格行，结合结构化游戏状态、报价历史和对话；使用表格基础模型，并引入LLM-as-Observer：冻结的小LLM读取决策时刻状态和对话，丢弃其答案，将其隐藏状态作为决策导向特征。
contributions: 将对手决策预测形式化为目标自适应文本-表格预测任务。
提出LLM-as-Observer方法，利用LLM隐藏状态作为特征，优于直接LLM预测。
在13个前沿LLM代理上训练，在91个保留代理上测试，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在受控的讨价还价和谈判游戏中进行实验，训练于13个前沿LLM代理，测试于91个保留的脚手架代理。完整模型优于直接LLM预测和基线。在K=16时，Observer特征在两项任务上使响应预测AUC提升约4点，讨价还价报价预测误差降低14%。
limitations: 实验限于受控游戏环境，真实世界交互可能更复杂。
依赖少量标注的适应样本，样本数量增加时效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将AI对手决策预测建模为文本-表格预测任务，利用LLM隐藏状态作为特征，在有限交互中有效预测对手行为。

papers.title: OGLS-SD: On-Policy Self-Distillation with Outcome-Guided Logit Steering for LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: We study {on-policy self-distillation} (OPSD), where a language model improves its reasoning ability by distilling privileged teacher distributions along its own on-policy trajectories. Despite the performance gains of OPSD, we identify a common but often overlooked mismatch between teacher and student responses: self-reflected teacher responses can be shifted by reflection-induced bias and response templates, leading to miscalibrated token-level supervision. To mitigate this issue, we propose \methodname, an outcome-guided logit-steering framework that leverages verifiable outcome rewards to contrast successful and failed on-policy trajectories and calibrate teacher logits. By combining outcome-level correctness with dense token-level guidance through logit steering, \methodname stabilizes self-distillation and improves reasoning performance over standard OPSD and other variants across diverse benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出OGLS-SD框架，通过结果引导的logit校准解决自蒸馏中教师-学生响应不匹配问题，提升LLM推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自蒸馏（OPSD）能提升LLM推理能力，但存在教师与学生响应不匹配的问题：自我反思导致的偏差和响应模板使教师logits校准不良，影响token级监督质量。
analysis.problem: 解决自蒸馏中教师-学生响应不匹配导致的token级监督校准问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出OPSD中教师响应因自我反思偏差和响应模板而偏移，导致token级监督校准不良。
analysis.method: 提出OGLS-SD，一种结果引导的logit-steering框架，利用可验证的结果奖励对比成功与失败的on-policy轨迹，校准教师logits，结合结果级正确性与密集token级指导。
contributions: 识别并分析了自蒸馏中教师-学生响应不匹配的问题
提出OGLS-SD框架，通过结果引导的logit-steering校准教师logits，稳定自蒸馏并提升推理性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖可验证的结果奖励，适用范围有限
logit-steering的额外计算开销未提及
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OGLS-SD框架，通过结果引导的logit校准解决自蒸馏中教师-学生响应不匹配问题，提升LLM推理性能。

papers.title: Detecting overfitting in Neural Networks during long-horizon grokking using Random Matrix Theory
papers.abstract: Training Neural Networks (NNs) without overfitting is difficult; detecting that overfitting is difficult as well. We present a novel Random Matrix Theory method that detects the onset of overfitting in deep learning models without access to train or test data. For each model layer, we randomize each weight matrix element-wise, $\mathbf{W} \to \mathbf{W}_{\mathrm{rand}}$, fit the randomized empirical spectral distribution with a Marchenko-Pastur distribution, and identify large outliers that violate self-averaging. We call these outliers Correlation Traps. During the onset of overfitting, which we call the "anti-grokking" phase in long-horizon grokking, Correlation Traps form and grow in number and scale as test accuracy decreases while train accuracy remains high. Traps may be benign or may harm generalization; we provide an empirical approach to distinguish between them by passing random data through the trained model and evaluating the JS divergence of output logits. Our findings show that anti-grokking is an additional grokking phase with high train accuracy and decreasing test accuracy, structurally distinct from pre-grokking through its Correlation Traps. More broadly, we find that some foundation-scale LLMs exhibit the same Correlation Traps, indicating potentially harmful overfitting.

analysis.tldr: 利用随机矩阵理论检测神经网络在长时程grokking中的过拟合，发现“反grokking”阶段与相关陷阱的形成有关。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练神经网络时避免过拟合很困难，且检测过拟合同样困难；现有方法通常需要访问训练或测试数据，缺乏无数据依赖的检测手段。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问训练或测试数据的情况下，检测深度神经网络在长时程训练（如grokking）中的过拟合现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在长时程grokking中，存在一个“反grokking”阶段，此时训练准确率保持高位但测试准确率下降，该阶段与相关陷阱（Correlation Traps）的形成和增长相关；相关陷阱是权重矩阵随机化后经验谱分布中的异常大离群值，违反自平均性。
analysis.method: 对每层权重矩阵进行元素级随机化，拟合随机化后的经验谱分布与Marchenko-Pastur分布，识别出违反自平均性的大离群值（相关陷阱）；通过向模型输入随机数据并计算输出logits的JS散度来区分良性陷阱和有害陷阱。
contributions: 提出一种基于随机矩阵理论的新方法，无需训练或测试数据即可检测神经网络过拟合的起始点。
发现并定义了长时程grokking中的“反grokking”阶段，该阶段通过相关陷阱与预grokking阶段结构上区分。
在基础规模LLM中观察到类似的相关陷阱，表明可能存在有害过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能对网络架构或训练设置敏感，需要进一步验证泛化性。
区分良性陷阱和有害陷阱的JS散度阈值可能需要手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用随机矩阵理论检测神经网络在长时程grokking中的过拟合，发现“反grokking”阶段与相关陷阱的形成有关。

papers.title: Scalable Token-Level Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but they still frequently produce hallucinations. These hallucinations are difficult to detect in reasoning-intensive tasks, where the content appears coherent but contains errors like logical flaws and unreliable intermediate results. While step-level analysis is commonly used to detect internal hallucinations, it suffers from limited granularity and poor scalability due to its reliance on step segmentation. To address these limitations, we propose TokenHD, a holistic pipeline for training token-level hallucination detectors. Specifically, TokenHD consists of a scalable data engine for synthesizing large-scale hallucination annotations along with a training recipe featuring an importance-weighted strategy for robust model training. To systematically assess the detection performance, we also provide a rigorous evaluation protocol. Through training within TokenHD, our detector operates directly on free-form text to identify hallucinations, eliminating the need for predefined step segmentation or additional text reformatting. Our experiments show that even a small detector (0.6B) achieves substantial performance gains after training, surpassing much larger reasoning models (e.g., QwQ-32B), and detection performance scales consistently with model size from 0.6B to 8B. Finally, we show that our detector can generalize well across diverse practical scenarios and explore strategies to further enhance its cross-domain generalization capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出TokenHD，一种可扩展的token级幻觉检测方法，无需步骤分割即可在自由文本中识别幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有步骤级幻觉检测方法粒度有限且依赖步骤分割，可扩展性差，难以应对推理密集型任务中的连贯但错误内容。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需步骤分割、可扩展且粒度更细的token级幻觉检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TokenHD包含可扩展的数据引擎用于合成大规模幻觉标注，以及带重要性加权策略的训练方案，直接对自由文本进行token级检测。
contributions: 提出TokenHD，一个完整的token级幻觉检测训练流程，包括数据引擎和训练策略。
提供严格的评估协议，并实验证明小模型（0.6B）经训练后超越大推理模型（QwQ-32B），且性能随模型规模一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个场景下评估，检测器从0.6B到8B规模性能一致提升，并展示了跨领域泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据质量，真实场景泛化需进一步验证。
未讨论对超长文本或极端复杂推理的检测效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TokenHD，一种可扩展的token级幻觉检测方法，无需步骤分割即可在自由文本中识别幻觉。

papers.title: Trust the Batch, On- or Off-Policy: Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning is structurally harder than supervised learning because the policy changes the data distribution it learns from. The resulting fragility is especially visible in large-model training, where the training and rollout systems differ in numerical precision, sampling, and other implementation details. Existing methods manage this fragility by adding hyper-parameters to the training objective, which makes the algorithm more sensitive to its configuration and requires retuning whenever the task, model scale, or distribution mismatch changes. This fragility traces to two concerns that current objectives entangle through hyper-parameters set before training begins: a trust-region concern, that updates should not move the policy too far from its current value, and an off-policy concern, that data from older or different behavior policies should influence the update only to the extent that it remains reliable. Neither concern is a constant to set in advance, and their severity is reflected in the policy-ratio distribution of the current batch. We present a simple yet effective batch-adaptive objective that replaces fixed clipping with the normalized effective sample size of the policy ratios. The same statistic caps the score-function weight and sets the strength of an off-policy regularizer, so the update stays close to the usual on-policy score-function update when ratios are nearly uniform, and tightens automatically when stale or mismatched data cause ratio concentration, while retaining a nonzero learning signal on high-ratio tokens. Experiments across a wide range of settings show that our method matches or exceeds tuned baselines, introducing no new objective hyper-parameters and removing several existing ones. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种批自适应策略优化方法，通过归一化有效样本量替代固定裁剪，消除RL后训练中的超参数调优需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习因策略改变数据分布而比监督学习更脆弱，尤其在大型模型训练中，训练与 rollout 系统的数值精度、采样等差异加剧了不稳定性。现有方法通过添加超参数管理这种脆弱性，但导致算法对配置敏感，且任务、模型规模或分布不匹配变化时需要重新调参。
analysis.problem: 现有RL后训练目标函数通过预置超参数纠缠了信任区域和离策略两个关注点，而这两个关注点的严重程度随批次动态变化，固定超参数无法适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 策略比率分布反映了信任区域和离策略问题的严重程度：比率接近均匀时更新应接近在策略，比率集中时（因陈旧或不匹配数据）应自动收紧。
analysis.method: 提出批自适应目标函数，用策略比率的归一化有效样本量（normalized effective sample size）替代固定裁剪，该统计量同时限制得分函数权重并设置离策略正则化强度，实现自动调整。
contributions: 提出一种无新超参数的批自适应策略优化目标，自动平衡信任区域和离策略约束。
在多种设置下实验表明，该方法匹配或超越调优后的基线，同时消除了多个现有超参数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对批次大小敏感，极端小批次下有效样本量估计不稳定。
未在超大规模模型（如千亿参数）上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种批自适应策略优化方法，通过归一化有效样本量替代固定裁剪，消除RL后训练中的超参数调优需求。

papers.title: Discrete Flow Matching for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Many reinforcement learning (RL) tasks have discrete action spaces, but most generative policy methods based on diffusion and flow matching are designed for continuous control. Meanwhile, generative policies usually rely heavily on offline datasets and offline-to-online RL is itself challenging, as the policy must improve from new interaction without losing useful behavior learned from static data. To address those challenges, we introduce DRIFT, an online fine-tuning method that updates an offline pretrained continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) policy with an advantage-weighted discrete flow matching loss. To preserve useful pretrained knowledge, we add a path-space penalty that regularizes the full CTMC trajectory distribution, rather than only the final action distribution. For large discrete action spaces, we introduce a candidate-set approximation that updates the actor over a small subset of actions sampled from reference-policy rollouts and uniform exploration. Our theoretical analysis shows that the candidate-set error is controlled by missing target probability mass, and the induced CTMC generator error decreases as the candidate set covers more high-probability actions. Experiments on prevailing discrete action RL task show that our method provides stable offline-to-online improvement across all tasks, achieving the highest average score on Jericho with a simple GRU encoder while outperforming methods that use pretrained language models. Controlled experiments further confirm that the path-space penalty remains bounded during fine-tuning and that the CTMC generator adapts to shifted rewards faster than deterministic baselines. The candidate-set mechanism is supported by a stability analysis showing that the generator error decreases exponentially with candidate coverage.

analysis.tldr: 提出DRIFT方法，用优势加权离散流匹配损失和路径空间惩罚实现离线到在线强化学习的稳定微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习任务常具有离散动作空间，但现有基于扩散和流匹配的生成策略方法主要针对连续控制设计；同时，生成策略通常严重依赖离线数据集，而离线到在线强化学习本身具有挑战性，策略需要从新交互中改进而不丢失从静态数据中学到的有用行为。
analysis.problem: 如何为离散动作空间的强化学习设计一种离线到在线的微调方法，使得策略能够从新交互中提升性能，同时保留离线预训练的有用知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DRIFT方法，使用优势加权离散流匹配损失更新离线预训练的连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）策略；通过路径空间惩罚正则化整个CTMC轨迹分布而非仅最终动作分布；针对大离散动作空间引入候选集近似，从参考策略 rollout 和均匀探索中采样小动作子集进行更新。
contributions: 提出DRIFT，一种用于离散动作空间离线到在线强化学习的在线微调方法，结合优势加权离散流匹配损失和路径空间惩罚。
引入候选集近似机制，使方法可扩展到大型离散动作空间，并提供理论分析控制候选集误差。
在Jericho等离散动作任务上取得最高平均分数，且路径空间惩罚在微调中保持有界，CTMC生成器比确定性基线更快适应奖励变化。
analysis.experiments: 在离散动作强化学习任务上进行实验，方法在所有任务上提供稳定的离线到在线改进，在Jericho上使用简单GRU编码器取得最高平均分数，优于使用预训练语言模型的方法。控制实验证实路径空间惩罚在微调中保持有界，CTMC生成器比确定性基线更快适应奖励变化。候选集机制通过稳定性分析支持，生成器误差随候选覆盖度指数下降。
limitations: 候选集近似可能在高维动作空间中仍存在覆盖不足问题。
方法依赖于离线预训练的CTMC策略，预训练质量可能影响最终性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DRIFT方法，用优势加权离散流匹配损失和路径空间惩罚实现离线到在线强化学习的稳定微调。

papers.title: Agent-Based Post-Hoc Correction of Agricultural Yield Forecasts
papers.abstract: Accurate crop yield forecasting in commercial soft fruit production is constrained by the data available in typical commercial farm records, which lack the sensor networks, satellite imagery, and high-resolution meteorological inputs that most state-of-the-art approaches assume. We propose a structured LLM agent framework that performs post-hoc correction of existing model predictions, encoding agricultural domain knowledge across tools for phase detection, bias learning, and range validation. Evaluated on a proprietary strawberry yield dataset and a public USDA corn harvest dataset, agent refinement of XGBoost reduced MAE by 20% and MASE by 56% on strawberry, with consistent improvements across Moirai2 (MAE 24%, MASE 22%) and Random Forest (MAE 28%, MASE 66%) baselines. Using Llama 3.1 8B as the agent produced the strongest corrections across all configurations; LLaVA 13B showed inconsistent gains, highlighting sensitivity to the choice of refinement model.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM智能体框架对农业产量预测进行事后修正，在草莓和玉米数据集上显著降低误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 商业软果生产中缺乏传感器网络、卫星图像和高分辨率气象数据，导致现有预测方法精度受限，亟需一种能利用领域知识进行后处理修正的方法。
analysis.problem: 在数据有限的商业农场记录条件下，如何利用LLM智能体对已有产量预测模型进行事后修正以提升精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化LLM智能体框架，包含阶段检测、偏差学习和范围验证等工具，对现有模型预测进行事后修正。
contributions: 提出一种基于LLM智能体的事后修正框架，可编码农业领域知识。
在私有草莓和公开玉米数据集上验证了有效性，多种基线模型误差显著降低。
analysis.experiments: 在私有草莓产量数据集和公开USDA玉米收获数据集上评估，使用XGBoost、Moirai2、Random Forest作为基线，以Llama 3.1 8B为智能体时修正效果最强。
limitations: 智能体性能对模型选择敏感（如LLaVA 13B效果不稳定）。
仅针对产量预测任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM智能体框架对农业产量预测进行事后修正，在草莓和玉米数据集上显著降低误差。

papers.title: QAP-Router: Tackling Qubit Routing as Dynamic Quadratic Assignment with Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Qubit routing is a fundamental problem in quantum compilation, known to be NP-hard. Its dynamic nature makes local routing decisions propagate and compound over time, making global efficient solutions challenging. Existing heuristic methods rely on local rules with limited lookahead, while recent learning-based approaches often treat routing as a generic sequential decision problem without fully exploiting its underlying structure. In this paper, we introduce QAP-Router, framing qubit routing based on a dynamic Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP) formulation. By modeling logical interactions, or quantum gates, as flow matrices and hardware topology as a distance matrix, our approach captures the interaction-distance coupling in a unified objective, which defines the reward in the reinforcement learning environment. To further exploit this structure, the policy network employs a solution-aware Transformer backbone that encodes the interaction between the flow matrix and the distance matrix into the attention mechanism. We also integrate a lookahead mechanism that blends naturally into the QAP framework, preventing myopic decisions. Extensive experiments on 1,831 real-world quantum circuits from the MQTBench, AgentQ and QUEKO datasets show that our method substantially reduces the CNOT gate count of routed circuits by 15.7%, 30.4% and 12.1%, respectively, relative to existing industry compilers.

analysis.tldr: 将量子比特路由建模为动态二次分配问题，用强化学习求解，在真实量子电路上显著减少CNOT门数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子比特路由是量子编译中的NP难问题，现有启发式方法缺乏全局视野，学习型方法未充分利用问题结构。
analysis.problem: 如何利用量子比特路由中逻辑交互与硬件拓扑的耦合结构，实现全局高效的动态路由决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 路由决策的局部性会导致误差传播和累积，使得全局最优解难以获得。
analysis.method: 将路由建模为动态二次分配问题，用流矩阵和距离矩阵统一目标，设计基于Transformer的策略网络编码交互，并集成前瞻机制。
contributions: 提出QAP-Router，将量子比特路由形式化为动态二次分配问题，并构建强化学习环境。
设计解决方案感知的Transformer骨干网络，利用注意力机制编码流矩阵与距离矩阵的交互。
集成自然融入QAP框架的前瞻机制，避免短视决策。
analysis.experiments: 在MQTBench、AgentQ和QUEKO三个数据集共1831个真实量子电路上，CNOT门计数分别减少15.7%、30.4%和12.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件拓扑结构，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习训练成本较高，可能不适用于超大规模电路。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将量子比特路由建模为动态二次分配问题，用强化学习求解，在真实量子电路上显著减少CNOT门数量。

papers.title: A Family of Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution Algorithms for Numerical Function Optimization
papers.abstract: The numerical optimization of continuous functions is a fundamental task in many scientific and engineering domains, ranging from mechanical design to training of artificial intelligence models. Among the most effective and widely used algorithms for this purpose is Differential Evolution (DE), known for its simplicity and strong performance. Recent research has shown that adapting AI models to operate over alternative number systems-such as complex numbers, quaternions, and geometric algebras-can improve model compactness and accuracy. However, such extensions remain underexplored in bio-inspired optimization algorithms. In particular, the use of quaternion algebra represents an emerging area in computational intelligence. This paper introduces a family of novel Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution (QDE) algorithms that operate directly in the quaternion space. We propose several mutation strategies specifically designed to exploit the algebraic and geometric properties of quaternions. Results show that our QDE variants achieve faster convergence and superior performance on several function classes in the BBOB benchmark compared to the traditional real-valued DE algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 提出四元数差分进化算法族，利用四元数代数特性提升数值函数优化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分进化算法在连续函数优化中广泛应用，但传统方法局限于实数域；四元数等替代数系在AI模型中已展现优势，但在生物启发优化中尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计直接操作于四元数空间的差分进化算法以提升数值函数优化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出四元数值差分进化（QDE）算法族，设计利用四元数代数与几何特性的多种变异策略。
contributions: 首次将四元数代数引入差分进化算法，提出QDE算法族。
设计多种利用四元数特性的变异策略，在BBOB基准上实现更快收敛和更优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在BBOB基准的多个函数类上测试，QDE变体相比传统实数DE收敛更快、性能更优。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的函数优化问题。
四元数运算的计算开销可能高于实数运算。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出四元数差分进化算法族，利用四元数代数特性提升数值函数优化性能。

papers.title: MedHopQA: A Disease-Centered Multi-Hop Reasoning Benchmark and Evaluation Framework for LLM-Based Biomedical Question Answering
papers.abstract: Evaluating large language models (LLMs) in the biomedical domain requires benchmarks that can distinguish reasoning from pattern matching and remain discriminative as model capabilities improve. Existing biomedical question answering (QA) benchmarks are limited in this respect. Multiple-choice formats can allow models to succeed through answer elimination rather than inference, while widely circulated exam-style datasets are increasingly vulnerable to performance saturation and training data contamination. Multi-hop reasoning, defined as the ability to integrate information across multiple sources to derive an answer, is central to clinically meaningful tasks such as diagnostic support, literature-based discovery, and hypothesis generation, yet remains underrepresented in current biomedical QA benchmarks. MedHopQA is a disease-centered multi-hop reasoning benchmark consisting of 1,000 expert-curated question-answer pairs introduced as a shared task at BioCreative IX. Each question requires synthesis of information across two distinct Wikipedia articles, and answers are provided in an open-ended free-text format. Gold annotations are augmented with ontology-grounded synonym sets from MONDO, NCBI Gene, and NCBI Taxonomy to support both lexical and concept-level evaluation. MedHopQA was constructed through a structured process combining human annotation, triage, iterative verification, and LLM-as-a-judge validation. To reduce leaderboard gaming and contamination risk, the 1,000 scored questions are embedded within a publicly downloadable set of 10,000 questions, with answers withheld, on a CodaBench leaderboard. MedHopQA provides both a benchmark and a reusable framework for constructing future biomedical QA datasets that prioritize compositional reasoning, saturation resistance, and contamination resistance as core design constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个疾病中心的多跳推理基准MedHopQA，用于评估LLM在生物医学问答中的推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生物医学问答基准存在模式匹配而非推理、性能饱和、数据污染等问题，缺乏对多跳推理的评估。
analysis.problem: 需要设计一个能区分推理与模式匹配、抗饱和和抗污染的基准，以评估LLM在生物医学多跳推理中的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多项选择格式允许模型通过排除法而非推理成功，且考试风格数据集易受性能饱和和训练数据污染。
analysis.method: 构建包含1,000个专家策划的问答对的基准，每个问题需综合两篇维基百科文章信息，答案采用开放文本格式，并附有本体论同义词集支持词法和概念级评估。通过人类注释、分诊、迭代验证和LLM-as-a-judge验证构建，将评分问题嵌入10,000个问题中以降低排行榜作弊和污染风险。
contributions: 提出了MedHopQA，一个疾病中心的多跳推理基准，包含1,000个专家策划的问答对。
提供了可复用的框架，用于构建未来生物医学问答数据集，强调组合推理、抗饱和和抗污染。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅基于维基百科文章，可能无法覆盖所有生物医学知识源。
开放文本格式评估可能面临自动评估的挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个疾病中心的多跳推理基准MedHopQA，用于评估LLM在生物医学问答中的推理能力。

papers.title: A New Technique for AI Explainability using Feature Association Map
papers.abstract: Lack of transparency in AI systems poses challenges in critical real-life applications. It is important to be able to explain the decisions of an AI system to ensure trust on the system. Explainable AI (XAI) algorithms play a vital role in achieving this objective. In this paper, we are proposing a new algorithm for Explaining AI systems, FAMeX (Feature Association Map based eXplainability). The proposed algorithm is based on a graph-theoretic formulation of the feature set termed as Feature Association Map (FAM). The foundation of the modelling is based on association between features. The proposed FAMeX algorithm has been found to be better than the competing XAI algorithms - Permutation Feature Importance (PFI) and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). Experiments conducted with eight benchmark algorithms show that FAMeX is able to gauge feature importance in the context of classification better than the competing algorithms. This definitely shows that FAMeX is a promising algorithm in explaining the predictions from an AI system

analysis.tldr: 提出基于特征关联图（FAM）的XAI算法FAMeX，在分类任务中优于PFI和SHAP。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统缺乏透明度，在关键应用中难以建立信任，需要可解释性算法。
analysis.problem: 现有XAI算法（如PFI、SHAP）在衡量特征重要性方面不够准确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于图论构建特征关联图（FAM），利用特征间关联性计算特征重要性。
contributions: 提出FAMeX算法，基于特征关联图进行可解释性分析。
在8个基准算法上实验证明FAMeX优于PFI和SHAP。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基准算法上进行分类实验，FAMeX在衡量特征重要性方面优于PFI和SHAP。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务。
未讨论计算复杂度或大规模数据适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于特征关联图（FAM）的XAI算法FAMeX，在分类任务中优于PFI和SHAP。

papers.title: BSO: Safety Alignment Is Density Ratio Matching
papers.abstract: Aligning language models for both helpfulness and safety typically requires complex pipelines-separate reward and cost models, online reinforcement learning, and primal-dual updates. Recent direct preference optimization approaches simplify training but incorporate safety through ad-hoc modifications such as multi-stage procedures or heuristic margin terms, lacking a principled derivation. We show that the likelihood ratio of the optimal safe policy admits a closed-form decomposition that reduces safety alignment to a density ratio matching problem. Minimizing Bregman divergences between the data and model ratios yields Bregman Safety Optimization (BSO), a family of single-stage loss functions, each induced by a convex generator, that provably recover the optimal safe policy. BSO is both general and simple: it requires no auxiliary models, introduces only one hyperparameter beyond standard preference optimization, and recovers existing safety-aware methods as special cases. Experiments across safety alignment benchmarks show that BSO consistently improves the safety-helpfulness trade-off.

analysis.tldr: BSO将安全对齐简化为密度比匹配问题，提出单阶段损失函数族，无需辅助模型，仅需一个额外超参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型安全对齐方法需要复杂管线（如分离奖励/成本模型、在线强化学习、原始-对偶更新），或依赖临时修改（如多阶段流程、启发式边界项），缺乏原则性推导，导致训练复杂且难以平衡安全性与有用性。
analysis.problem: 如何以原则性、简洁的方式实现语言模型的安全对齐，同时保持有用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 推导最优安全策略的似然比闭式分解，将安全对齐转化为密度比匹配问题；通过最小化数据与模型比值的Bregman散度，得到Bregman Safety Optimization (BSO)损失函数族，每个损失由凸生成元诱导，可证明恢复最优安全策略。
contributions: 理论证明最优安全策略的似然比可分解为密度比匹配问题，为安全对齐提供原则性框架。
提出BSO损失函数族，单阶段训练，无需辅助模型，仅需一个额外超参数，且统一了现有安全对齐方法。
analysis.experiments: 在安全对齐基准上，BSO持续改善了安全性与有用性的权衡。
limitations: 可能对超参数选择敏感，需要进一步分析。
理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，实际部署中需验证鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BSO将安全对齐简化为密度比匹配问题，提出单阶段损失函数族，无需辅助模型，仅需一个额外超参数。

papers.title: Manifold Sampling via Entropy Maximization
papers.abstract: Sampling from constrained distributions has a wide range of applications, including in Bayesian optimization and robotics. Prior work establishes convergence and feasibility guarantees for constrained sampling, but assumes that the feasible set is connected. However, in practice, the feasible set often decomposes into multiple disconnected components, which makes efficient sampling under constraints challenging. In this paper, we propose MAnifold Sampling via Entropy Maximization (MASEM) for sampling on a manifold with an unknown number of disconnected components, implicitly defined by smooth equality and inequality constraints. The presented method uses a resampling scheme to maximize the entropy of the empirical distribution based on k-nearest neighbor density estimation. We show that, in the mean field, MASEM decreases the KL-divergence between the empirical distribution and the maximum-entropy target exponentially in the number of resampling steps. We instantiate MASEM with multiple local samplers and demonstrate its versatility and efficiency on synthetic and robotics-based benchmarks. MASEM enables fast and scalable mixing across a range of constrained sampling problems, improving over alternatives by an order of magnitude in Sinkhorn distance with competitive runtime.

analysis.tldr: 提出MASEM方法，通过熵最大化实现多连通分量约束流形上的高效采样。
analysis.research_motivation: 约束采样在贝叶斯优化和机器人等领域有广泛应用，但现有方法假设可行集是连通的，而实际中可行集常分解为多个不连通分量，导致采样效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何从具有未知数量不连通分量的约束流形上高效采样。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MASEM，利用重采样方案最大化基于k近邻密度估计的经验分布熵，在平均场下证明KL散度指数衰减，并结合多个局部采样器实现。
contributions: 提出MASEM方法，解决多连通分量约束流形上的采样问题。
理论证明平均场下KL散度指数衰减。
在合成和机器人基准上验证，Sinkhorn距离提升一个数量级，运行时间有竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和机器人基准上测试，与替代方法相比，Sinkhorn距离提升一个数量级，运行时间有竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖k近邻密度估计的准确性。
理论分析基于平均场假设，实际有限样本行为需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MASEM方法，通过熵最大化实现多连通分量约束流形上的高效采样。

papers.title: EHR-RAGp: Retrieval-Augmented Prototype-Guided Foundation Model for Electronic Health Records
papers.abstract: Electronic Health Records (EHR) contain rich longitudinal patient information and are widely used in predictive modeling applications. However, effectively leveraging historical data remains challenging due to long trajectories, heterogeneous events, temporal irregularity, and the varying relevance of past clinical context. Existing approaches often rely on fixed windows or uniform aggregation, which can obscure clinically important signals. In this work, we introduce EHR-RAGp, a retrieval-augmented foundation model that dynamically integrates the most relevant patient history across diverse clinical event types. We propose a prototype-guided retrieval module that acts as an alignment mechanism and estimates the relevance of retrieved historical chunks with respect to a given prediction task, guiding the model towards the most informative context. Across multiple clinical prediction tasks, EHR-RAGp consistently outperforms state-of-the-art EHR foundation models and transformer-based baselines. Furthermore, integrating EHR-RAGp with existing clinical foundation models yields substantial performance gains. Overall, EHR-RAGp provides a scalable and efficient framework for leveraging long-range clinical context to improve downstream performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索增强原型引导的EHR基础模型，通过动态检索最相关的患者历史信息提升临床预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子健康记录（EHR）包含丰富的纵向患者信息，但现有方法因固定窗口或统一聚合而难以有效利用长序列、异质事件和时间不规则的历史数据，导致临床重要信号被掩盖。
analysis.problem: 如何动态整合患者历史中与预测任务最相关的临床事件，以提升EHR基础模型的预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EHR-RAGp，包含原型引导的检索模块，该模块作为对齐机制估计检索到的历史片段与预测任务的相关性，引导模型关注最信息量的上下文。
contributions: 提出原型引导的检索模块，动态整合最相关的患者历史信息。
在多个临床预测任务上持续超越现有EHR基础模型和Transformer基线。
与现有临床基础模型集成可带来显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个临床预测任务上评估，与最先进的EHR基础模型和基于Transformer的基线进行比较，并展示了与现有临床基础模型集成的性能增益。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史数据检索。
原型引导机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索增强原型引导的EHR基础模型，通过动态检索最相关的患者历史信息提升临床预测性能。

papers.title: Transferable Delay-Aware Reinforcement Learning via Implicit Causal Graph Modeling
papers.abstract: Random delays weaken the temporal correspondence between actions and subsequent state feedback, making it difficult for agents to identify the true propagation process of action effects. In cross-task scenarios, changes in task objectives and reward formulations further reduce the reusability of previously acquired task knowledge. To address this problem, this paper proposes a transferable delay-aware reinforcement learning method based on implicit causal graph modeling. The proposed method uses a field-node encoder to represent high-dimensional observations as latent states with node-level semantics, and employs a message-passing mechanism to characterize dynamic causal dependencies among nodes, thereby learning transferable structured representations and environment dynamics knowledge. On this basis, imagination-driven behavior learning and planning are incorporated to optimize policies in the latent space, enabling cross-task knowledge transfer and rapid adaptation. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms baseline methods on DMC continuous control tasks with random delays. Cross-task transfer experiments further demonstrate that the learned structured representations and dynamics knowledge can be effectively transferred to new tasks and significantly accelerate policy adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于隐式因果图建模的可迁移延迟感知强化学习方法，在随机延迟DMC任务中优于基线，并实现跨任务迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机延迟削弱了动作与状态反馈的时间对应性，使智能体难以识别动作效应的真实传播过程；跨任务场景中任务目标和奖励公式的变化进一步降低了已有任务知识的可重用性。
analysis.problem: 在随机延迟环境下实现强化学习的跨任务知识迁移与快速适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机延迟导致动作与后续状态反馈之间的时间对应关系减弱，阻碍智能体学习动作效应的真实传播过程；跨任务时目标与奖励变化使已有知识难以复用。
analysis.method: 基于隐式因果图建模：使用场节点编码器将高维观测表示为具有节点级语义的潜在状态，通过消息传递机制刻画节点间的动态因果依赖，学习可迁移的结构化表示和环境动力学知识；在此基础上结合想象驱动的行为学习与规划，在潜在空间中优化策略。
contributions: 提出一种基于隐式因果图建模的可迁移延迟感知强化学习方法，有效处理随机延迟并实现跨任务知识迁移。
在DMC连续控制任务上验证了方法优于基线，且跨任务迁移实验表明结构化表示和动力学知识可有效加速新任务策略适应。
analysis.experiments: 在DMC连续控制任务上进行了随机延迟实验和跨任务迁移实验，结果显示所提方法优于基线方法，且迁移实验表明结构化表示和动力学知识可有效迁移并加速策略适应。
limitations: 摘要未提及方法在更复杂或高维观测任务上的表现。
可能依赖任务间共享的因果结构，若任务间因果差异过大则迁移效果可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于隐式因果图建模的可迁移延迟感知强化学习方法，在随机延迟DMC任务中优于基线，并实现跨任务迁移。

papers.title: PriorZero: Bridging Language Priors and World Models for Decision Making
papers.abstract: Leveraging the rich world knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents offers a promising path toward general intelligence. However, a fundamental prior-dynamics mismatch hinders existing approaches: static LLM knowledge cannot directly adapt to the complex transition dynamics of long-horizon tasks. Using LLM priors as fixed policies limits exploration diversity, as the prior is blind to environment-specific dynamics; while end-to-end fine-tuning suffers from optimization instability and credit assignment issues. To bridge this gap, we propose PriorZero, a unified framework that integrates LLM-derived conceptual priors into world-model-based planning through a decoupled rollout-training design. During rollout, a novel root-prior injection mechanism incorporates LLM priors exclusively at the root node of Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS), focusing search on semantically promising actions while preserving the world model's deep lookahead capability. During training, PriorZero decouples world-model learning from LLM adaptation: the world model is continuously refined on interaction data to jointly improve its dynamics, policy, and value predictions, its value estimates are then leveraged to provide fine-grained credit assignment signals for stable LLM fine-tuning via alternating optimization. Experiments across diverse benchmarks, including text-based adventure games in Jericho and instruction-following gridworld tasks in BabyAI, demonstrate that PriorZero consistently improves both exploration efficiency and asymptotic performance, establishing a promising framework for LLM-empowered decision-making. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: PriorZero通过解耦的根节点先验注入和交替优化，将LLM先验融入基于世界模型的规划，提升探索效率和最终性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将LLM先验用于决策时存在先验-动态不匹配：静态LLM知识无法适应复杂环境动态，固定策略限制探索多样性，端到端微调则面临优化不稳定和信用分配问题。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合LLM的先验知识与世界模型的深度规划能力，以提升强化学习智能体在长时域任务中的探索效率和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态LLM先验作为固定策略会限制探索多样性，而端到端微调存在优化不稳定和信用分配问题。
analysis.method: PriorZero提出解耦的rollout-训练设计：rollout时仅在MCTS根节点注入LLM先验（根先验注入），训练时交替优化世界模型和LLM，利用世界模型的价值估计为LLM微调提供细粒度信用分配信号。
contributions: 提出PriorZero框架，通过根先验注入和解耦训练有效融合LLM先验与世界模型。
在Jericho和BabyAI等基准上验证了方法在探索效率和渐近性能上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在文本冒险游戏（Jericho）和指令跟随网格世界任务（BabyAI）上进行实验，结果表明PriorZero一致提升了探索效率和渐近性能。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM先验的质量，若先验不准确可能误导搜索。
交替优化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PriorZero通过解耦的根节点先验注入和交替优化，将LLM先验融入基于世界模型的规划，提升探索效率和最终性能。

papers.title: TokenRatio: Principled Token-Level Preference Optimization via Ratio Matching
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a widely used RL-free method for aligning language models from pairwise preferences, but it models preferences over full sequences even though generation is driven by per-token decisions. Existing token-level extensions typically decompose a sequence-level Bradley-Terry objective across timesteps, leaving per-prefix (state-wise) optimality implicit. We study how to recover token-level preference optimality using only standard sequence-level pairwise comparisons. We introduce Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO), which posits a token-level Bradley-Terry preference model over next-token actions conditioned on the prefix, and derive a Bregman-divergence density-ratio matching objective that generalizes the logistic/DPO loss while preserving the optimal policy induced by the token-level model and maintaining DPO-like simplicity. We introduce two instantiations: TBPO-Q, which explicitly learns a lightweight state baseline, and TBPO-A, which removes the baseline through advantage normalization. Across instruction following, helpfulness/harmlessness, and summarization benchmarks, TBPO improves alignment quality and training stability and increases output diversity relative to strong sequence-level and token-level baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出TBPO方法，通过token级偏好优化实现更优的对齐质量与输出多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: DPO在序列级建模偏好，但生成是逐token决策，现有token级方法未显式保证前缀级最优性，导致对齐不充分。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用序列级成对偏好数据恢复token级偏好最优性，提升对齐质量与训练稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO)，基于token级Bradley-Terry模型和Bregman散度密度比匹配目标，扩展DPO损失；包含TBPO-Q（学习轻量状态基线）和TBPO-A（通过优势归一化移除基线）两种实例。
contributions: 提出TBPO框架，从序列级偏好中恢复token级最优策略，保持DPO的简洁性。
引入TBPO-Q和TBPO-A两种实例，在指令遵循、有用性/无害性和摘要任务上提升对齐质量、训练稳定性和输出多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在指令遵循、有用性/无害性和摘要基准上，TBPO相对于强序列级和token级基线提升了对齐质量和训练稳定性，并增加了输出多样性。
limitations: 可能依赖偏好数据的质量，对噪声偏好敏感。
TBPO-Q需要额外学习基线，增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TBPO方法，通过token级偏好优化实现更优的对齐质量与输出多样性。

papers.title: Set-Aggregated Genome Embeddings for Microbiome Abundance Prediction
papers.abstract: Microbiome functions are encoded within the genes of the community-wide metagenome. A natural question is whether properties of a microbial community can be predicted just from knowing the raw DNA sequences of its members. In this work, we employ set-aggregated genome embeddings (SAGE) to predict community-level abundance profiles, exploiting the few-shot learning capabilities of genomic language models (GLMs). We benchmark this approach to show improved generalization on novel genomes compared to classical bioinformatics approaches. Model ablation shows that community-level latent representations directly result in improved performance. Lastly, we demonstrate the benefits of intermediate transformations between latent representations and demonstrate the differences between GLM embedding choices.

analysis.tldr: 利用基因组语言模型的集合聚合嵌入预测微生物群落丰度，相比传统方法泛化性更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 微生物组功能由群落宏基因组中的基因编码，传统方法依赖复杂生物信息学流程，泛化性有限。
analysis.problem: 仅从原始DNA序列预测微生物群落的丰度分布。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用基因组语言模型（GLM）生成基因组嵌入，通过集合聚合（Set-Aggregated）得到群落级表示，再预测丰度。
contributions: 提出SAGE方法，利用GLM的少样本学习能力预测微生物群落丰度。
在新型基因组上展示了比经典生物信息学方法更好的泛化性能。
通过消融实验证明群落级潜在表示和中间变换的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在微生物组数据集上进行了基准测试和消融实验，比较了不同GLM嵌入选择。
limitations: 可能依赖特定GLM预训练数据，对极端新基因组泛化性未知。
集合聚合策略可能忽略基因组间相互作用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用基因组语言模型的集合聚合嵌入预测微生物群落丰度，相比传统方法泛化性更好。

papers.title: Iterative Audit Convergence in LLM-Managed Multi-Agent Systems: A Case Study in Prompt Engineering Quality Assurance
papers.abstract: Prompt specifications for multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems carry data contracts and integration logic across many interdependent files but are rarely subjected to structured-inspection rigor. This paper reports a single-system empirical case study of iterative, agent-driven auditing applied to AEGIS (Autonomous Engineering Governance and Intelligence System), a production seven-lane orchestration pipeline whose prompt-specification surface comprises approximately 7150 lines: 6907 across seven lane this http URL files and a 245-line shared Ticket Contract. Nine sequential audit rounds, executed by Claude sub-agents using a checklist-driven walkthrough adapted from Weinberg and Freedman, surfaced 51 prompt-specification consistency defects, distinct from the 51 STRIDE-categorized adversarial code findings reported in the companion preprint. Per-round counts were 15, 8, 12, 2, 8, 1, 4, 1, and 0. We report a seven-category post-hoc defect taxonomy with explicit coding rules, observed non-monotonic convergence consistent with cascading edits and audit-scope expansion, and an audit protocol distilled from the study, with the final locked checklist released as a reproducibility appendix. Single-file review missed defect classes that were surfaced only by later expanded-scope rounds in this system. The same LLM family authored and audited the specifications; replication with dissimilar models and human reviewers is required before generalization.

analysis.tldr: 对LLM管理的多智能体系统进行迭代审计，发现提示规范缺陷呈非单调收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的提示规范涉及大量跨文件的数据合约和集成逻辑，但缺乏结构化审查，导致质量风险。
analysis.problem: 如何通过迭代审计有效检测LLM管理多智能体系统中的提示规范一致性缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 审计缺陷数量非单调收敛，与级联编辑和审计范围扩展一致；单文件审查无法发现仅通过扩展范围审计才能暴露的缺陷类别。
analysis.method: 采用基于检查表的代理驱动审计流程，由Claude子代理对AEGIS系统的提示规范进行九轮迭代审计。
contributions: 报告了51个提示规范一致性缺陷的实证案例，并建立了七类别事后缺陷分类法。
提出了可复现的审计协议和最终锁定检查表。
analysis.experiments: 在AEGIS生产系统上进行九轮审计，缺陷计数分别为15, 8, 12, 2, 8, 1, 4, 1, 0。
limitations: 仅针对单一系统，且审计和规范由同一LLM家族生成，泛化性有限。
需要不同模型和人类评审者进行复制研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对LLM管理的多智能体系统进行迭代审计，发现提示规范缺陷呈非单调收敛。

papers.title: Reconnecting Fragmented Citation Networks with Semantic Augmentation
papers.abstract: Citation graphs are fundamental tools for modeling scientific structure, but are often fragmented due to missing citations of scientifically connected articles. To address this issue, we propose a computationally efficient hybrid framework integrating citation topology with large language model (LLM)-based text similarity. Using 662,369 Web of Science publications in Mathematics and Operations Research & Management Science, we augment the original graph by adding semantic edges from small, disconnected components and weighting existing citations according to textual similarity. Semantic augmentation substantially reduces fragmentation while preserving disciplinary homogeneity. Compared to embedding-only clustering, cluster detection on augmented graphs using the Leiden algorithm retains structural interpretability while offering multi-scale organization. The method scales efficiently to large datasets and offers a practical strategy for strengthening citation-based indicators without collapsing disciplinary boundaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义增强方法，通过LLM文本相似度连接碎片化引文网络，提升结构完整性。
analysis.research_motivation: 引文网络因缺失引用而碎片化，影响科学结构建模的准确性，现有方法难以兼顾计算效率和语义一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效修复碎片化引文网络，增强连通性同时保持学科同质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合框架：结合引文拓扑与LLM文本相似度，为小连通分量添加语义边，并按文本相似度加权现有引用。
contributions: 提出语义增强的引文网络修复方法，减少碎片化并保持学科同质性。
在大型数据集上验证了方法的可扩展性和聚类效果。
analysis.experiments: 使用662,369篇Web of Science出版物（数学与运筹学/管理科学）进行实验，对比嵌入聚类，Leiden算法在增强图上保持结构可解释性并提供多尺度组织。
limitations: 依赖LLM文本相似度，可能受领域术语差异影响。
仅针对两个学科领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义增强方法，通过LLM文本相似度连接碎片化引文网络，提升结构完整性。

papers.title: Mind the Pause: Disfluency-Aware Objective Tuning for Multilingual Speech Correction with LLMs
papers.abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) transcripts often contain disfluencies, such as fillers, repetitions, and false starts, which reduce readability and hinder downstream applications like chatbots and voice assistants. If left unaddressed, such disfluencies can significantly degrade the reliability of downstream systems. Most existing approaches rely on classical models that focus on identifying disfluent tokens for removal. While this strategy is effective to some extent, it often disrupts grammatical structure and semantic coherence, leading to incomplete or unnatural sentences. Recent literature explored the use of large language models (LLMs); however, these efforts have primarily focused on disfluency detection or data augmentation, rather than performing comprehensive correction. We propose a multilingual correction pipeline where a sequence tagger first marks disfluent tokens, and these signals guide instruction fine-tuning of an LLM to rewrite transcripts into fluent text. To further improve reliability, we add a contrastive learning objective that penalizes the reproduction of disfluent tokens, encouraging the model to preserve grammar and meaning while removing disfluent artifacts. Our experiments across three Indian languages, namely Hindi, Bengali, and Marathi show consistent improvements over strong baselines, including multilingual sequence-to-sequence models. These results highlight that detection-only strategies are insufficient. Combining token-level cues with instruction tuning and contrastive learning provides a practical and scalable solution for multilingual disfluency correction in speech-driven NLP systems. We make the codes publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出结合序列标注、指令微调与对比学习的多语言语音转录修正方法，有效去除ASR中的不流畅现象。
analysis.research_motivation: ASR转录中的不流畅现象（如填充词、重复、错误起始）会降低可读性并影响下游系统可靠性，现有方法主要依赖检测后删除，但常破坏语法和语义连贯性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏语法和语义的前提下，对多语言ASR转录进行全面的不流畅修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅检测并删除不流畅词会破坏语法结构和语义连贯性，导致句子不完整或不自然。
analysis.method: 先使用序列标注器标记不流畅词，然后利用这些信号指导LLM进行指令微调以重写为流畅文本，并加入对比学习目标惩罚生成不流畅词。
contributions: 提出一个多语言不流畅修正流水线，结合序列标注、指令微调和对比学习。
在三种印度语言上验证了方法优于强基线，表明仅检测策略不足。
analysis.experiments: 在印地语、孟加拉语和马拉地语三种印度语言上进行实验，与多语言序列到序列模型等强基线相比，取得一致改进。
limitations: 仅针对三种印度语言，泛化到其他语言族需验证。
依赖序列标注器的准确性，错误传播可能影响最终修正效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合序列标注、指令微调与对比学习的多语言语音转录修正方法，有效去除ASR中的不流畅现象。

papers.title: Pretraining Strategies and Scaling for ECG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study
papers.abstract: Specialized foundation models are beginning to emerge in various medical subdomains, but pretraining methodologies and parametric scaling with the size of the pretraining dataset are rarely assessed systematically and in a like-for-like manner. This work focuses on foundation models for electrocardiography (ECG) data, one of the most widely captured physiological time series world-wide. We present a comprehensive assessment of pretraining methodologies, covering five different contrastive and non-contrastive self-supervised learning objectives for ECG foundation models, and investigate their scaling behavior with pretraining dataset sizes up to 11M input samples, exclusively from publicly available sources. Pretraining strategy has a meaningful and consistent impact on downstream performance, with contrastive predictive coding (slightly ahead of JEPA) yielding the most transferable representations across diverse clinical tasks. Scaling pretraining data continues to yield meaningful improvements up to 11M samples for most objectives. We also compare model architectures across all pretraining methodologies and find evidence for a clear superiority of structured state space models compared to transformers and CNN models. We hypothesize that the strong inductive biases of structured state space models, rather than pretraining scale alone, are the primary driver of effective ECG representation learning, with important implications for future foundation model development in this and potentially other physiological signal domains.

analysis.tldr: 系统对比了五种自监督学习策略和模型架构在ECG基础模型上的预训练效果，发现结构化状态空间模型优于Transformer和CNN，且对比预测编码（CPC）表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: ECG数据是广泛采集的生理时间序列，但预训练方法和参数缩放行为缺乏系统、公平的评估，阻碍了ECG基础模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 系统评估不同预训练策略和模型架构在ECG基础模型上的效果，并研究预训练数据规模对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练策略对下游性能有显著影响，其中对比预测编码（CPC）略优于JEPA；结构化状态空间模型在所有预训练方法中均优于Transformer和CNN；预训练数据规模在高达1100万样本时仍能带来改进。
analysis.method: 在公开ECG数据集上，系统比较五种自监督学习目标（对比和非对比），并评估不同模型架构（结构化状态空间模型、Transformer、CNN）的缩放行为。
contributions: 首次系统、公平地评估了ECG基础模型的多种预训练策略和模型架构。
发现结构化状态空间模型是ECG表示学习的关键驱动因素，而非仅靠预训练规模。
analysis.experiments: 使用多达1100万样本的公开ECG数据，在多种临床下游任务上评估预训练策略和模型架构的迁移性能。
limitations: 仅使用公开数据集，未涉及私有或更大规模数据。
未探索混合预训练目标或更复杂的架构组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统对比了五种自监督学习策略和模型架构在ECG基础模型上的预训练效果，发现结构化状态空间模型优于Transformer和CNN，且对比预测编码（CPC）表现最佳。

papers.title: Harness Engineering as Categorical Architecture
papers.abstract: The agent harness, the system layer comprising prompts, tools, memory, and orchestration logic that surrounds the model, has emerged as the central engineering abstraction for LLMbased agents. Yet harness design remains ad hoc, with no formal theory governing composition, preservation of properties under compilation, or systematic comparison across frameworks. We show that the categorical Architecture triple (G, Know, Phi) from the ArchAgents framework provides exactly this formalization. The four pillars of agent externalization (Memory, Skills, Protocols, Harness Engineering) map onto the triple's components: Memory as coalgebraic state, Skills as operad-composed objects, Protocols as syntactic wiring G, and the full Harness as the Architecture itself. Structural guarantees-integrity gates, quality-based escalation, supported convergence checks-are Know-level certificates whose preservation is structural replay: our compiler checks identity and verifier replay, not output-layer correctness or model behavior. We validate this correspondence with a reference implementation featuring compiler functors targeting Swarms, DeerFlow, Ralph, Scion, and LangGraph: the four configuration compilers preserve three named certificate types by identity or replay, and LangGraph preserves the same certificates through its shared per-stage execution path. The LangGraph compiler creates one node per stage using the same per-stage method as the native runtime, providing LangGraph-native observability without reimplementing harness logic. An end-to-end escalation experiment with real LLM agents confirms that the quality-based escalation control path is model-parametric in this two-model, one-task experiment. The result positions categorical architecture as the formal theory behind harness engineering.

analysis.tldr: 用范畴论形式化LLM Agent的Harness工程，提出编译器保证结构性质。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM Agent的Harness设计缺乏形式化理论，导致组合、编译性质保持和跨框架比较缺乏系统性。
analysis.problem: 如何为Agent Harness工程建立形式化理论，并验证其编译性质保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于ArchAgents框架的范畴论Architecture三元组(G, Know, Phi)，将Harness四大支柱映射到三元组组件，并设计编译器functor保持结构证书。
contributions: 提出Harness Engineering的范畴论形式化框架
实现参考编译器functor，验证多个框架中证书的保持性
analysis.experiments: 端到端升级实验使用真实LLM Agent，验证质量驱动的升级控制路径是模型参数的。
limitations: 仅验证了结构证书保持，未涉及输出层正确性或模型行为
实验规模较小（两模型、单任务）
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用范畴论形式化LLM Agent的Harness工程，提出编译器保证结构性质。

papers.title: TMRL: Diffusion Timestep-Modulated Pretraining Enables Exploration for Efficient Policy Finetuning
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning pre-trained robot policies with reinforcement learning (RL) often inherits the bottlenecks introduced by pre-training with behavioral cloning (BC), which produces narrow action distributions that lack the coverage necessary for downstream exploration. We present a unified framework that enables the exploration necessary to enable efficient robot policy finetuning by bridging BC pre-training and RL fine-tuning. Our pre-training method, Context-Smoothed Pre-training (CSP), injects forward-diffusion noise into policy inputs, creating a continuum between precise imitation and broad action coverage. We then fine-tune pre-trained policies via Timestep-Modulated Reinforcement Learning (TMRL), which trains the agent to dynamically adjust this conditioning during fine-tuning by modulating the diffusion timestep, granting explicit control over exploration. Integrating seamlessly with arbitrary policy inputs, e.g., states, 3D point clouds, or image-based VLA policies, we show that TMRL improves RL fine-tuning sample efficiency. Notably, TMRL enables successful real-world fine-tuning on complex manipulation tasks in under one hour. Videos and code available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散时间步调制预训练框架TMRL，通过桥接行为克隆预训练与强化学习微调，实现高效机器人策略微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人策略预训练常用行为克隆（BC），但BC产生狭窄的动作分布，缺乏下游探索所需的覆盖范围，导致强化学习微调效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何桥接BC预训练与RL微调，使预训练策略具备探索能力，从而提升RL微调的样本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: BC预训练产生狭窄动作分布，限制下游探索；扩散噪声注入可创建从精确模仿到广泛动作覆盖的连续体。
analysis.method: 提出Context-Smoothed Pre-training (CSP) 预训练方法，向策略输入注入前向扩散噪声；再通过Timestep-Modulated Reinforcement Learning (TMRL) 微调，动态调整扩散时间步以控制探索。
contributions: 提出统一框架CSP+TMRL，桥接BC预训练与RL微调，实现高效探索。
TMRL可无缝集成任意策略输入（状态、3D点云、图像VLA），提升RL微调样本效率。
在真实世界复杂操作任务中，TMRL实现一小时内的成功微调。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在真实世界复杂操作任务上实现一小时内的成功微调，但未提供具体实验细节或基准对比。
limitations: 摘要未提供与现有方法的定量对比结果。
方法在更广泛任务上的泛化能力尚待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散时间步调制预训练框架TMRL，通过桥接行为克隆预训练与强化学习微调，实现高效机器人策略微调。

papers.title: No More, No Less: Task Alignment in Terminal Agents
papers.abstract: Terminal agents are increasingly capable of executing complex, long-horizon tasks autonomously from a single user prompt. To do so, they must interpret instructions encountered in the environment (e.g., README files, code comments, stack traces) and determine their relevance to the task. This creates a fundamental challenge: relevant cues must be followed to complete a task, whereas irrelevant or misleading ones must be ignored. Existing benchmarks do not capture this ability. An agent may appear capable by blindly following all instructions, or appear robust by ignoring them altogether. We introduce TAB (Task Alignment Benchmark), a suite of 89 terminal tasks derived from Terminal-Bench 2.1. Each task is intentionally underspecified, with missing information provided as a necessary cue embedded in a natural environmental artifact, alongside a plausible but irrelevant distractor. Solving these tasks requires selectively using the cue while ignoring the distractor. Applying TAB to ten frontier agents reveals a systematic gap between task capability and task alignment. The strongest Terminal-Bench agent achieves high task completion but low task alignment on TAB. Evaluating six prompt-injection defenses further shows that suppressing distractor execution also suppresses the cues required for task completion. These results demonstrate that task-aligned agents require selective use of environmental instructions rather than blanket acceptance or rejection.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务对齐基准TAB，揭示终端智能体在选择性遵循环境指令方面的系统性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 终端智能体需从环境指令中区分任务相关与无关信息，但现有基准无法评估这一能力，导致智能体可能盲目遵循或忽略所有指令。
analysis.problem: 如何评估终端智能体在复杂任务中选择性遵循相关环境指令、忽略无关干扰的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最强终端智能体在标准基准上任务完成度高，但在TAB上任务对齐度低；提示注入防御方法在抑制干扰的同时也抑制了必要线索。
analysis.method: 构建TAB基准，包含89个终端任务，每个任务故意信息不足，缺失信息嵌入自然环境产物中作为必要线索，并附带合理但无关的干扰项。
contributions: 提出任务对齐概念并设计TAB基准，用于评估智能体选择性遵循环境指令的能力。
通过实验揭示前沿智能体在任务能力与任务对齐之间的系统性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在10个前沿智能体上应用TAB，并评估6种提示注入防御方法。
limitations: 基准规模有限（89个任务），可能无法覆盖所有终端场景。
未探讨智能体内部机制如何实现选择性遵循。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务对齐基准TAB，揭示终端智能体在选择性遵循环境指令方面的系统性缺陷。

papers.title: Heterogeneous SoC Integrating an Open-Source Recurrent SNN Accelerator for Neuromorphic Edge Computing on FPGA
papers.abstract: The growing popularity of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) and their applications has led to a significant fast-paced increase of neuromorphic architectures capable of mimicking the spike-based data processing typical of biological neurons. The efficient power consumption and parallel computing capabilities of the SNNs lead researchers towards the development of digital accelerators, which exploit such features to bring fast and low-power computation on edge devices. The spread of digital neuromorphic hardware however is slowed down by the prohibitive costs that the silicon tape out of circuits brings, that's why targeting Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) could represent a viable alternative, offering a flexible and cost-effective platform for implementing digital neuromorphic systems and helping the spread of open-source hardware designs. In this work we present an heterogeneous System-on-Chip (SoC) where the operations of ReckOn, a Recurrent SNN accelerator, are managed through the integration with traditional processors. These include the RISC-V-based, open-source microcontroller X-HEEP and the ARM processor featured in Zynq Ultrascale systems. We validate our design by reproducing the classification results through the implementation on FPGA of the taped-out version of ReckOn in order to check the equivalence of the accuracy and the characteristics in terms of physical implementation. In a second set of experiments, we evaluate the online learning capability of the solution in classifying a subset of the Braille digit dataset recently used to compare neuromorphic frameworks and platforms.

analysis.tldr: 在FPGA上实现了一个集成开源递归SNN加速器的异构SoC，用于神经形态边缘计算。
analysis.research_motivation: SNN在边缘设备上具有高效能和并行计算优势，但数字神经形态硬件因流片成本高昂而发展缓慢，FPGA提供了一种灵活、低成本的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并验证一个在FPGA上集成了开源递归SNN加速器（ReckOn）的异构SoC，使其能够管理SNN加速器与RISC-V或ARM处理器的协同工作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计了一个异构SoC，将递归SNN加速器ReckOn与RISC-V微控制器X-HEEP或ARM处理器集成，并在FPGA上实现。通过复现流片版本的分类结果验证硬件等价性，并评估在线学习能力。
contributions: 提出并实现了在FPGA上集成开源递归SNN加速器的异构SoC架构。
验证了FPGA实现与流片版本在精度和物理实现特性上的等价性。
展示了该方案在Braille数字数据集上的在线学习能力。
analysis.experiments: 在FPGA上实现了ReckOn的流片版本，复现分类结果以验证等价性；并在Braille数字数据集子集上评估在线学习能力。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定SNN加速器（ReckOn）和FPGA平台。
在线学习实验仅使用了Braille数字数据集的子集，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在FPGA上实现了一个集成开源递归SNN加速器的异构SoC，用于神经形态边缘计算。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Laplace Approximation for Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification
papers.abstract: Approximate Bayesian inference typically revolves around computing the posterior parameter distribution. In practice, however, the main object of interest is often a model's predictions rather than its parameters. In this work, we propose to bypass the parameter posterior and focus directly on approximating the posterior predictive distribution. We achieve this by drawing inspiration from self-training within self-supervised and semi-supervised learning. Essentially, we quantify a Bayesian model's predictive uncertainty by refitting on self-predicted data. The idea is strikingly simple: If a model assigns high likelihood to self-predicted data, these predictions are of low uncertainty, and vice versa. This yields a deterministic, sampling-free approximation of the posterior predictive. The modular structure of our Self-Supervised Laplace Approximation (SSLA) further allows us to plug in different prior specifications, enabling classical Bayesian sensitivity (w.r.t. prior choice) analysis. In order to bypass expensive refitting, we further introduce an approximate version of SSLA, called ASSLA. We study (A)SSLA both theoretically and empirically in regression models ranging from Bayesian linear models to Bayesian neural networks. Across a wide array of regression tasks with simulated and real-world datasets, our methods outperform classical Laplace approximations in predictive calibration while remaining computationally efficient.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督拉普拉斯近似（SSLA），通过重拟合自预测数据直接近似后验预测分布，实现高效贝叶斯不确定性量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统贝叶斯推断通常关注参数后验，但实际应用中更关心模型预测的不确定性。现有方法如拉普拉斯近似在预测校准上表现不足，且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何直接近似后验预测分布，避免参数后验计算，同时提高预测校准性和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自监督拉普拉斯近似（SSLA），通过重拟合模型在自预测数据上的似然来量化不确定性，并引入近似版本ASSLA以降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出SSLA，一种确定性、无采样的后验预测近似方法，可直接量化预测不确定性。
引入ASSLA，近似版本以降低重拟合成本，并支持先验敏感性分析。
analysis.experiments: 在贝叶斯线性模型到贝叶斯神经网络的回归任务上，使用模拟和真实数据集，SSLA在预测校准上优于经典拉普拉斯近似，且计算高效。
limitations: 可能仅适用于回归任务，分类任务未验证。
近似版本ASSLA的精度损失未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督拉普拉斯近似（SSLA），通过重拟合自预测数据直接近似后验预测分布，实现高效贝叶斯不确定性量化。

papers.title: Not How Many, But Which: Parameter Placement in Low-Rank Adaptation
papers.abstract: We study the \textit{parameter placement problem}: given a fixed budget of $k$ trainable entries within the B matrix of a LoRA adapter (A frozen), does the choice of which $k$ matter? Under supervised fine-tuning, random and informed subsets achieve comparable performance. Under GRPO on base models, random placement fails to improve over the base model, while gradient-informed placement recovers standard LoRA accuracy. This regime dependence traces to gradient structure: SFT gradients are low-rank and directionally stable, so any subset accumulates coherent updates; GRPO gradients are high-rank and near-orthogonal across steps, so only elements with consistently signed gradients retain the learning signal. Our scoring procedure identifies these critical parameters in under 10 seconds at less than 0.5% of training cost. Selected parameters concentrate on residual-stream-writing projections (V, O, Down), stable across model families and scales (1.5B - 8B).

analysis.tldr: LoRA微调中参数放置位置对性能的影响取决于训练范式：SFT下随机与知情子集效果相当，GRPO下仅梯度知情子集有效。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA微调中，在固定可训练参数预算下，参数放置位置的选择是否重要尚不清楚，现有研究多关注参数数量而非位置。
analysis.problem: 研究LoRA适配器中B矩阵的k个可训练条目放置位置对微调性能的影响，特别是在不同训练范式（SFT vs GRPO）下的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SFT梯度低秩且方向稳定，任何子集都能积累一致更新；GRPO梯度高秩且跨步骤近正交，只有梯度符号一致的参数才能保留学习信号。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于梯度信息的评分方法，在不到10秒内（训练成本的0.5%以下）识别关键参数，这些参数集中在残差流写入投影（V, O, Down）上。
contributions: 揭示了LoRA参数放置位置在不同训练范式下的重要性差异：SFT下随机与知情子集性能相当，GRPO下仅梯度知情子集有效。
提出高效的梯度知情参数选择方法，能在极低开销下识别关键参数，且所选参数跨模型家族和规模（1.5B-8B）稳定。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅研究了LoRA中B矩阵可训练的情况，未考虑A矩阵或全参数微调。
评分方法依赖梯度信息，可能不适用于无法获取梯度的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoRA微调中参数放置位置对性能的影响取决于训练范式：SFT下随机与知情子集效果相当，GRPO下仅梯度知情子集有效。

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification for LLM-based Code Generation
papers.abstract: Prediction sets provide a theoretically grounded framework for quantifying uncertainty in machine learning models. Adapting them to structured generation tasks, in particular, large language model (LLM) based code generation, remains a challenging problem. An existing attempt proposes PAC prediction sets but is limited by its strong monotonicity assumption on risk and single-label classification framework, which severely limits the space of candidate programs and cannot accommodate the multiple valid outputs inherent to code generation. To address these limitations, we propose an approach RisCoSet that leverages multiple hypothesis testing to construct risk-controlling predictions for LLM-based code generation. Given a trained code generation model, we produce a prediction set represented by a partial program, which is guaranteed to contain a correct solution with high confidence. Extensive experiments on three LLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art, our method can significantly reduce the code removal by up to 24.5%, at the same level of risk.

analysis.tldr: 提出RisCoSet方法，利用多重假设检验为LLM代码生成构建风险可控的预测集，显著减少代码移除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法（如PAC预测集）在结构化生成任务中受限于强单调性假设和单标签分类框架，无法处理代码生成中多个有效输出的情况，亟需更灵活的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM代码生成构建保证包含正确解且风险可控的预测集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: RisCoSet：基于多重假设检验，为LLM代码生成构建由部分程序表示的预测集，保证以高置信度包含正确解。
contributions: 提出RisCoSet方法，克服了现有PAC预测集的强单调性假设和单标签分类限制。
在三个LLM上的实验表明，与最先进方法相比，在相同风险水平下代码移除减少高达24.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在三个LLM上进行了实验，与最先进方法比较，代码移除减少高达24.5%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定假设（如多重假设检验的适用性）。
未讨论对长代码或复杂任务的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RisCoSet方法，利用多重假设检验为LLM代码生成构建风险可控的预测集，显著减少代码移除。

papers.title: Overtrained, Not Misaligned
papers.abstract: Emergent misalignment (EM), where fine-tuning on a narrow task (like insecure code) causes broad misalignment across unrelated domains, was first demonstrated by Betley et al. (2025). We conduct the most comprehensive EM study to date, reproducing the original GPT-4o finding and expanding to 12 open-source models across 4 families (Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, GPT-OSS) ranging from 8B to 671B parameters, evaluating over one million model responses with multiple random seeds. We find that EM replicates in GPT-4o but is far from universal: only 2 of 12 open-source models (17%) exhibit consistent EM across seeds, with a significant correlation between model size and EM susceptibility. Through checkpoint-level analysis during fine-tuning, we demonstrate that EM emerges late in training, distinct from and subsequent to near convergence of the primary task, suggesting EM emerges from continued training past task convergence. This yields practical mitigations: early stopping eliminates EM while retaining an average of 93% of task performance, and careful learning rate selection further minimizes risk. Cross-domain validation on medical fine-tuning confirms these patterns generalize: the size-EM correlation strengthens (r = 0.90), and overgeneralization to untruthfulness remains avoidable via early stopping in 67% of cases, though semantically proximate training domains produce less separable misalignment. As LLMs become increasingly integrated into real-world systems, fine-tuning and reinforcement learning remain the primary methods for adapting model behavior. Our findings demonstrate that with proper training practices, EM can be avoided, reframing it from an unforeseen fine-tuning risk to an avoidable training artifact.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现，大模型微调中的“涌现性失调”并非普遍现象，而是过度训练导致的伪影，可通过早停和合理学习率避免。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型微调中涌现性失调（EM）现象首次被提出，但其普遍性、机制和缓解方法尚不清楚，阻碍了安全微调实践。
analysis.problem: 探究涌现性失调是否普遍存在、其产生机制以及如何有效缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EM仅在少数模型（2/12开源模型）中一致出现，且与模型规模正相关；EM在训练后期、主任务收敛后出现，表明是过度训练的结果。
analysis.method: 对12个开源模型（8B-671B）进行系统EM评估，通过检查点分析揭示EM出现时机，并验证早停和低学习率的缓解效果。
contributions: 首次大规模跨模型家族EM研究，发现EM并非普遍现象，仅17%开源模型一致表现。
揭示EM源于主任务收敛后的过度训练，提出早停可消除EM并保留93%任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-4o和12个开源模型上评估超过百万次响应，使用多个随机种子，并在医疗微调任务上验证泛化性。
limitations: 仅覆盖有限模型家族和任务类型。
语义相近的训练领域可能导致EM不易分离。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现，大模型微调中的“涌现性失调”并非普遍现象，而是过度训练导致的伪影，可通过早停和合理学习率避免。

papers.title: Mitigating Context-Memory Conflicts in LLMs through Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding
papers.abstract: Large language models accumulate extensive parametric knowledge through pre-training. However, knowledge conflicts occur when outdated or incorrect parametric knowledge conflicts with external knowledge in the context. Existing methods address knowledge conflicts through contrastive decoding, but in conflict-free scenarios, static approaches disrupt output distribution. Other dynamic decoding methods attempt to measure the degree of conflict but still struggle with complex real-world situations. In this paper, we propose a two-stage decoding method called Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding (DCRD), to predict and mitigate context-memory conflicts. DCRD first analyzes the attention map to assess context fidelity and predict potential conflicts. Based on this prediction, the input is directed to one of two decoding paths: (1) greedy decoding, or (2) context fidelity-based dynamic decoding. This design enables DCRD to handle conflicts efficiently while maintaining high accuracy and decoding efficiency in conflict-free cases. Additionally, to simulate scenarios with frequent knowledge updates, we constructed ConflictKG, a knowledge conflict QA benchmark. Experiments on four LLMs across six QA datasets show that DCRD outperforms all baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态认知调和解码（DCRD）方法，通过两阶段解码预测并缓解LLM中的上下文-记忆冲突，在冲突和无冲突场景下均表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在预训练中积累了大量参数化知识，但当这些知识过时或错误时，会与上下文中的外部知识发生冲突。现有对比解码方法在无冲突场景下会破坏输出分布，而动态方法虽能衡量冲突程度，但在复杂真实场景中仍存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效预测并缓解LLM中上下文知识与参数化记忆之间的冲突，同时保持无冲突场景下的准确性和解码效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段解码方法DCRD：首先分析注意力图评估上下文忠实度并预测潜在冲突；然后根据预测结果选择贪婪解码或基于上下文忠实度的动态解码路径。
contributions: 提出DCRD方法，通过两阶段解码动态处理知识冲突，兼顾冲突和无冲突场景的性能。
构建ConflictKG基准，用于模拟知识频繁更新的场景。
在四个LLM和六个QA数据集上取得SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在四个LLM和六个QA数据集上进行实验，DCRD优于所有基线，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖注意力图的质量，在注意力分布不准确时效果受限。
ConflictKG基准的覆盖范围有限，可能无法完全代表真实世界的知识冲突场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态认知调和解码（DCRD）方法，通过两阶段解码预测并缓解LLM中的上下文-记忆冲突，在冲突和无冲突场景下均表现优异。

papers.title: DriftXpress: Faster Drifting Models via Projected RKHS Fields
papers.abstract: Drifting Models have emerged as a new paradigm for one-step generative modeling, achieving strong image quality without iterative inference. The premise is to replace the iterative denoising process in diffusion models with a single evaluation of a generator. However, this creates a different trade-off: drifting reduces inference cost by moving much of the computation into training. We introduce DriftXpress, an accelerated formulation of drifting models based on projected RKHS fields. DriftXpress approximates the drifting kernel in a low-rank feature space. This preserves the attraction-repulsion structure of the original drifting field while reducing the cost of field evaluation. Across image-generation benchmarks, DriftXpress achieves comparable FID to standard drifting while reducing wall-clock training cost. These results show that the training-inference trade-off of drifting models can be pushed further without giving up their one-step inference advantage.

analysis.tldr: DriftXpress通过投影RKHS场加速漂移模型训练，保持单步生成优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 漂移模型作为单步生成新范式，虽减少推理成本但将计算负担转移至训练阶段，训练效率成为瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲单步推理优势的前提下，降低漂移模型的训练成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DriftXpress，利用投影RKHS场在低秩特征空间中近似漂移核，保留吸引-排斥结构的同时降低场评估成本。
contributions: 提出DriftXpress加速漂移模型训练的方法
在图像生成基准上实现与标准漂移相当的FID，同时减少训练时间
analysis.experiments: 在图像生成基准上评估，DriftXpress达到与标准漂移相当的FID，并减少了实际训练时间。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的漂移模型或图像生成任务
低秩近似可能在高维复杂数据上精度有限
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DriftXpress通过投影RKHS场加速漂移模型训练，保持单步生成优势。

papers.title: A Deep Learning-based Receiver for Asynchronous Grant-Free Random Access in Control-to-Control Networks
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study grant-free, asynchronous control-to-control (C2C) communications in an indoor scenario with a shared wireless channel. Each communication node transmits command units, each consisting of a variable-length low-density parity-check (LDPC)--coded payload preceded by a start sequence and followed by a tail sequence. Due to the asynchronous nature of the access, transmissions from different nodes are not aligned over time. As a result, each receiving controller observes the superposition of multiple command units transmitted by different nodes over a receiver-defined superframe interval. Each node transmits one or more replicas of the same command unit. We propose a receiver architecture in which the detection of command unit boundaries (start/tail sequences) is carried out by a single convolutional neural network (CNN) operating directly on the received signal. We show that, while start-sequence detection must rely only on the received waveform, tail-sequence detection can additionally exploit the soft information produced by the LDPC decoder, together with channel estimates. Finally, once commands units are successfully decoded, successive interference cancellation (SIC) can be applied. Simulation results demonstrate that the receiver we propose achieves reliable packet-boundary identification and a low end-to-end packet loss rate, even under uncoordinated and high-traffic operating conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于CNN的异步免授权随机接入接收机，实现可靠包边界检测与低丢包率。
analysis.research_motivation: 控制到控制（C2C）通信中，异步免授权随机接入导致传输不对齐，传统接收机难以处理高流量下的包边界检测与干扰，亟需高效接收架构。
analysis.problem: 在异步免授权C2C网络中，如何从叠加信号中可靠检测命令单元边界并解码，同时降低端到端丢包率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于CNN的接收机：CNN直接检测信号中的起始/尾部序列；尾部检测额外利用LDPC解码器软信息和信道估计；解码后采用连续干扰消除（SIC）。
contributions: 提出一种基于CNN的异步免授权随机接入接收机架构。
利用LDPC解码器软信息辅助尾部序列检测，提升边界识别可靠性。
仿真验证了在高流量非协调条件下仍能实现低丢包率。
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验表明，所提接收机在非协调高流量条件下实现可靠包边界识别和低端到端丢包率。
limitations: 仅针对室内C2C场景，未验证室外或移动场景。
未讨论CNN模型复杂度与实时性要求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
