analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于CNN的异步免授权随机接入接收机，实现可靠包边界检测与低丢包率。

papers.title: Premover: Fast Vision-Language-Action Control by Acting Before Instructions Are Complete
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically evaluated as if the user had finished typing or speaking before the robot begins acting. In real deployment, however, users take several seconds to enter a request, leaving the policy idle for a substantial fraction of the interaction. We introduce Premover, a lightweight module that converts this idle window into useful precomputation. Premover keeps the VLA backbone frozen and attaches two small projection heads, one for image patches, one for language tokens, that map an intermediate layer of the backbone into a shared space. The resulting focus map is supervised by simulator-rendered target-object segmentation masks and applied as a per-patch reweighting of the next step's image tokens. A single scalar readiness threshold, trained jointly from streaming prefixes, decides when the policy should begin acting. On the LIBERO benchmark suite, Premover reduces mean wall-clock time from 34.0 to 29.4 seconds, a 13.6% reduction, while matching the full-prompt baseline's success rate (95.1% vs. 95.0%); naive premoving, by contrast, collapses to 66.4%.

analysis.tldr: Premover 通过预计算用户未说完指令时的视觉特征，在不降低成功率的前提下将 VLA 策略的交互时间缩短 13.6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 策略假设用户说完指令后才开始执行，但实际中用户输入需要数秒，导致策略空闲等待，交互效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用用户输入指令的等待时间进行预计算，减少机器人实际执行时的等待开销，同时不损害任务成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Premover 保持 VLA 主干冻结，附加两个小型投影头（图像块和语言 token），将中间层特征映射到共享空间，通过模拟器渲染的目标分割掩码监督生成焦点图，用于重加权下一时刻的图像 token；同时训练一个标量 readiness 阈值，从流式前缀中决定何时开始执行。
contributions: 提出 Premover 模块，利用用户指令输入的空闲窗口进行预计算，减少 VLA 策略的端到端延迟。
在 LIBERO 基准上实现 13.6% 的耗时降低，同时保持与完整指令基线相当的成功率（95.1% vs 95.0%）。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIBERO 基准套件上评估，平均墙钟时间从 34.0 秒降至 29.4 秒（降低 13.6%），成功率 95.1% 对比基线 95.0%；朴素预移动方法成功率降至 66.4%。
limitations: 依赖模拟器渲染的目标分割掩码进行监督，可能限制在真实场景中的泛化。
仅针对单步预计算，未考虑多步或更复杂的指令流。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Premover 通过预计算用户未说完指令时的视觉特征，在不降低成功率的前提下将 VLA 策略的交互时间缩短 13.6%。

papers.title: CIDR: A Large-Scale Industrial Source Code Dataset for Software Engineering Research
papers.abstract: We present Curated Industrial Developer Repository (CIDR), a large-scale dataset of real-world software repositories collected through direct collaboration with 12 industrial partner organizations. The dataset comprises 2,440 repositories spanning 138 programming languages and totalling 373 million lines of code, accompanied by structured per-repository metadata. Unlike existing code corpora derived from public open-source platforms, CIDR consists exclusively of proprietary production codebases contributed under formal data sharing agreements, covering application domains including enterprise web and mobile development, fintech, and custom software consultancy. All repositories were processed through a multi-stage pipeline encompassing structured partner onboarding, two-stage quality selection combining automated metadata filtering with manual code review, and a deterministic anonymization pipeline covering the full version control history. The dataset is intended to support research in code intelligence, software quality analysis, pre-training and fine-tuning of code language models, developer behaviour studies, and construction of agent evaluation benchmarks. Access is provided under a restricted commercial license; details are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: CIDR 是一个大规模工业源代码数据集，包含 2440 个私有仓库，支持代码智能和软件工程研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码数据集多来自公开开源平台，缺乏真实工业级私有代码数据，限制了代码智能、软件质量分析和代码语言模型预训练等研究。
analysis.problem: 构建一个大规模、高质量、包含丰富元数据的工业源代码数据集，以支持软件工程研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过与 12 家工业合作伙伴合作收集 2440 个私有仓库，经过结构化伙伴接入、两阶段质量筛选（自动元数据过滤+人工代码审查）和确定性匿名化管道处理，覆盖 138 种编程语言和 3.73 亿行代码。
contributions: 提供了首个大规模工业源代码数据集 CIDR，包含 2440 个私有仓库和结构化元数据。
设计了多阶段数据处理管道，包括质量筛选和匿名化，确保数据可用性和隐私保护。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集访问受限于商业许可，可能限制广泛使用。
仅包含 12 家合作伙伴的代码，可能无法完全代表所有工业领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CIDR 是一个大规模工业源代码数据集，包含 2440 个私有仓库，支持代码智能和软件工程研究。

papers.title: It's Not the Size: Harness Design Determines Operational Stability in Small Language Models
papers.abstract: This paper experimentally analyzes how the level of harness engineering affects the operational performance of small language models (SLMs, 2-3B parameters). Three harness conditions - model-only (raw prompt), minimal-shell (wrapper tags), and a 4-stage pipeline (plan->execute->verify->recover) - are applied to three models (Gemma4 E2B, Qwen3.5:2B, LLaMA 3.2 3B) across 24 tasks, comparing Task Success Rate (TSR) and Valid TSR (VTSR). The pipeline harness achieves TSR=0.952 and VTSR=1.000 on Gemma4 E2B (T1-T5, 21 tasks). A non-monotonic phenomenon - minimal-shell TSR < model-only TSR - is observed in two models. In LLaMA 3.2 3B model-only, seven format violations yield TSR=0.429, revealing scaffold collapse: the model abandons JSON structure under complex format requirements without harness support. Ablation shows planning and recovery each contribute approximately 24.7% of total gain. VCR (Verification Catch Rate)=0.625 across all pipeline runs.

analysis.tldr: 小语言模型的操作稳定性更多取决于工程化设计而非模型大小，4阶段流水线框架显著提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 小语言模型（SLM）在资源受限场景中应用广泛，但其操作稳定性常受限于工程化不足，现有研究多关注模型规模，缺乏对工程化设计影响的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 探究不同工程化程度（harness engineering）对小语言模型操作性能的影响，并分析其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到非单调现象：最小外壳（minimal-shell）的任务成功率反而低于纯模型（model-only）；在LLaMA 3.2 3B纯模型条件下，7次格式违规导致TSR=0.429，揭示了“支架崩溃”（scaffold collapse）现象——模型在无支架支持时放弃JSON结构。
analysis.method: 设计三种工程化条件：纯模型（仅原始提示）、最小外壳（包装标签）、4阶段流水线（计划→执行→验证→恢复），在24个任务上对比三个2-3B参数模型。
contributions: 首次系统实验分析工程化程度对SLM操作稳定性的影响，发现非单调现象和支架崩溃模式。
提出4阶段流水线框架，在Gemma4 E2B上达到TSR=0.952和VTSR=1.000，消融实验显示规划和恢复各贡献约24.7%的增益。
analysis.experiments: 在24个任务上对Gemma4 E2B、Qwen3.5:2B、LLaMA 3.2 3B三个模型进行实验，比较任务成功率（TSR）和有效TSR（VTSR），并进行了消融实验和验证捕获率（VCR）分析。
limitations: 仅针对2-3B参数的小模型，结论是否适用于更大模型尚不明确。
任务集为24个，可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小语言模型的操作稳定性更多取决于工程化设计而非模型大小，4阶段流水线框架显著提升任务成功率。

papers.title: Learning What Matters: Adaptive Information-Theoretic Objectives for Robot Exploration
papers.abstract: Designing learnable information-theoretic objectives for robot exploration remains challenging. Such objectives aim to guide exploration toward data that reduces uncertainty in model parameters, yet it is often unclear what information the collected data can actually reveal. Although reinforcement learning (RL) can optimize a given objective, constructing objectives that reflect parametric learnability is difficult in high-dimensional robotic systems. Many parameter directions are weakly observable or unidentifiable, and even when identifiable directions are selected, omitted directions can still influence exploration and distort information measures. To address this challenge, we propose Quasi-Optimal Experimental Design (Q{\footnotesize OED}), an adaptive information objective grounded in optimal experimental design. Q{\footnotesize OED} (i) performs eigenspace analysis of the Fisher information matrix to identify an observable subspace and select identifiable parameter directions, and (ii) modifies the exploration objective to emphasize these directions while suppressing nuisance effects from non-critical parameters. Under bounded nuisance influence and limited coupling between critical and nuisance directions, Q{\footnotesize OED} provides a constant-factor approximation to the ideal information objective that explores all parameters. We evaluate Q{\footnotesize OED} on simulated and real-world navigation and manipulation tasks, where identifiable-direction selection and nuisance suppression yield performance improvements of \SI{35.23}{\percent} and \SI{21.98}{\percent}, respectively. When integrated as an exploration objective in model-based policy optimization, Q{\footnotesize OED} further improves policy performance over established RL baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应信息论目标QOED，通过Fisher信息矩阵特征空间分析选择可识别参数方向并抑制干扰，提升机器人探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人探索中设计可学习的信息论目标具有挑战性，因为收集的数据能揭示什么信息往往不明确；高维机器人系统中许多参数方向弱可观测或不可识别，即使选择可识别方向，忽略的方向仍会影响探索并扭曲信息度量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个自适应信息论目标，使其能够选择可识别的参数方向并抑制非关键参数的干扰，从而引导探索有效减少模型参数不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出许多参数方向弱可观测或不可识别，且即使选择可识别方向，被忽略的方向仍会影响探索并扭曲信息度量。
analysis.method: 提出Quasi-Optimal Experimental Design (QOED)，该方法通过Fisher信息矩阵的特征空间分析识别可观测子空间并选择可识别参数方向，同时修改探索目标以强调这些方向并抑制非关键参数的干扰效应。
contributions: 提出QOED方法，结合特征空间分析和目标修改，实现自适应信息论探索目标。
在模拟和真实世界的导航与操作任务中，可识别方向选择与干扰抑制分别带来35.23%和21.98%的性能提升。
将QOED集成到基于模型的策略优化中，在多个RL基线上进一步提升了策略性能。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实世界的导航与操作任务上评估，可识别方向选择与干扰抑制分别带来35.23%和21.98%的性能提升；集成到模型策略优化中，性能优于已有RL基线。
limitations: 方法假设有界干扰影响和关键与干扰方向之间的有限耦合，实际中可能不严格满足。
特征空间分析的计算开销在高维系统中可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应信息论目标QOED，通过Fisher信息矩阵特征空间分析选择可识别参数方向并抑制干扰，提升机器人探索效率。

papers.title: Property-Level Reconstructability of Agent Decisions: An Anchor-Level Pilot Across Vendor SDK Adapter Regimes
papers.abstract: Agentic AI failures need post-hoc reconstruction: what the agent did, on whose authority, against which policy, and from what reasoning. Cross-regime feasibility remains unmeasured under one property-level schema. We apply the Decision Trace Reconstructor unmodified to pinned worked-example anchors from six public vendor SDK regimes spanning cloud-agent, observability, tool-use, telemetry, and protocol traces, plus two comparator columns. Each Decision Event Schema (DES) property is classified as fully fillable, partially fillable, structurally unfillable, or opaque. Per-property reconstructability of an agent decision already varies between regimes at this anchor scale. Strict-governance-completeness separates into three tiers ranging from 42.9% to 85.7%, yielding one regime-independent gap (reasoning trace), four regime-dependent gaps, and one Mixed property; the pilot is single-annotator, one anchor per cell, descriptive, with outputs checksum-verifiable from a deposited reproducibility package.

analysis.tldr: 提出决策追踪重构器，跨六种商用SDK评估智能体决策的属性级可重构性，发现严格治理完备性在42.9%-85.7%之间。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体AI失败后需要事后重构其行为、依据、违反策略及推理过程，但跨不同SDK体系的可重构性缺乏统一度量。
analysis.problem: 如何在不同智能体SDK体系下统一评估决策事件属性的可重构性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用未修改的决策追踪重构器，对六种商用SDK（云智能体、可观测性、工具使用、遥测、协议追踪）及两个对照列的固定工作示例锚点进行属性级分类（完全可填充、部分可填充、结构不可填充、不透明）。
contributions: 提出属性级决策可重构性评估框架
跨六种商用SDK体系的实证比较，揭示严格治理完备性在42.9%-85.7%之间
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 单标注者、每个单元格一个锚点、描述性分析
仅覆盖有限SDK体系，可能不具广泛代表性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出决策追踪重构器，跨六种商用SDK评估智能体决策的属性级可重构性，发现严格治理完备性在42.9%-85.7%之间。

papers.title: The Deepfakes We Missed: We Built Detectors for a Threat That Didn't Arrive
papers.abstract: Nearly a decade of Machine Learning (ML) research on deepfake detection has been organized around a threat model inherited from 2017--2019, revolving around face-swap and talking-head manipulation of public figures, motivated by concerns about large-scale misinformation and video-evidence fraud. This position paper argues that the threat the field prepared for did not arrive, and the threats that did arrive are substantially different. An accounting of deepfake incidents in 2022--2026 shows that the dominant observed harms are peer-generated Non-Consensual Intimate Imagery (NCII), voice-clone scam calls targeting families and finance workers, and emotional-manipulation fraud. The predicted large-scale public-figure deepfake catastrophe did not materialize during the 2024 global information environment despite extensive preparation. Meanwhile, research effort, benchmarks, and detection methods remain concentrated on the inherited threat model. The central claim of this paper is that this misalignment is now the dominant bottleneck on real-world deepfake defense, not model capability. We argue the ML research community should substantially rebalance its research agenda toward the harm categories that are actually growing. We support this position with empirical accounting of research effort and harm distribution, identify the structural reasons the misalignment persists, and outline three concrete technical research agendas for the under-defended harm categories.

analysis.tldr: 深度伪造检测研究基于过时的威胁模型，实际危害已转向非自愿亲密图像、语音克隆诈骗等，呼吁重新调整研究重点。
analysis.research_motivation: 过去近十年深度伪造检测研究围绕2017-2019年的威胁模型展开，但实际发生的危害类型已发生显著变化，导致研究投入与真实威胁错位，成为现实防御的主要瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 深度伪造检测研究领域存在威胁模型与真实危害分布之间的严重错配，需要重新校准研究议程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过2022-2026年深度伪造事件统计发现，主要危害是同行生成的非自愿亲密图像、针对家庭和金融从业者的语音克隆诈骗电话以及情感操纵欺诈，而预测的大规模公众人物深度伪造灾难并未在2024年全球信息环境中出现。
analysis.method: 本文为立场论文，通过实证统计研究投入与危害分布，分析错位持续的结构性原因，并针对未被充分防御的危害类别提出三项具体技术研究议程。
contributions: 揭示了深度伪造检测领域威胁模型与真实危害之间的系统性错位，并指出这是当前现实防御的主要瓶颈。
提供了2022-2026年深度伪造事件的实证统计，量化了研究投入与危害分布的不匹配。
提出了三项针对实际危害类别的具体技术研究议程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但包含对研究投入和危害分布的实证统计。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏对提出研究议程的实证验证。
可能未涵盖所有地区或类型的深度伪造事件。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度伪造检测研究基于过时的威胁模型，实际危害已转向非自愿亲密图像、语音克隆诈骗等，呼吁重新调整研究重点。

papers.title: Clausal Deletion Backdoors for QBF: a Parameterized Complexity Approach
papers.abstract: Determining the validity of a quantified Boolean formula (QBF) is a PSPACE-complete problem with rich expressive power. Despite interest in efficient solvers, there is, compared to problems in NP, a lack of positive theoretical results, and in the parameterized complexity setting one often has to restrict the quantifier prefix (e.g., bounding alternations) to obtain fixed parameter tractability (FPT). We propose a new parameter: the number of variables in clauses that has to be removed before reaching a tractable class (a clause covering (CC) backdoor). We are then interested in solving QBF in FPT time given a CC-backdoor of size $k$. We consider the three classical, tractable cases of QBF as base classes: Horn, 2-CNF, and linear equations. We establish W[1]-hardness for Horn but prove FPT for the others, and prove that in a precise, algebraic sense, we are only missing one important case for a full dichotomy. Our algorithms are non-trivial and depend on propagation, and Gaussian elimination, respectively, and are comparably unexplored for QBF.

analysis.tldr: 提出子句覆盖后门参数，研究QBF在固定参数可解性下的复杂度分类。
analysis.research_motivation: QBF是PSPACE完全问题，表达能力丰富但缺乏正面理论结果，参数化复杂度下常需限制量词前缀才能获得FPT。
analysis.problem: 以子句覆盖后门大小为参数，研究QBF在FPT时间内可解性，针对Horn、2-CNF和线性方程三类基类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义子句覆盖后门参数，基于传播和高斯消元设计算法，并证明Horn基类为W[1]-难，其他两类为FPT。
contributions: 提出子句覆盖后门作为QBF的新参数
给出Horn、2-CNF和线性方程基类的复杂度二分结果
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑三类基类，未覆盖所有可能情况
算法可能依赖特定结构，实际效率待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出子句覆盖后门参数，研究QBF在固定参数可解性下的复杂度分类。

papers.title: Missing Old Logits in Asynchronous Agentic RL: Semantic Mismatch and Repair Methods for Off-Policy Correction
papers.abstract: Asynchronous reinforcement learning improves rollout throughput for large language model agents by decoupling sample generation from policy optimization, but it also introduces a critical failure mode for PPO-style off-policy correction. In heterogeneous training systems, the total importance ratio should ideally be decomposed into two semantically distinct factors: a \emph{training--inference discrepancy term} that aligns inference-side and training-side distributions at the same behavior-policy version, and a \emph{policy-staleness term} that constrains the update from the historical policy to the current policy. We show that practical asynchronous pipelines with delayed updates and partial rollouts often lose the required historical training-side logits, or old logits. This missing-old-logit problem entangles discrepancy repair with staleness correction, breaks the intended semantics of decoupled correction, and makes clipping and masking thresholds interact undesirably. To address this issue, we study both exact and approximate correction routes. We propose three exact old-logit acquisition strategies: snapshot-based version tracking, a dedicated old-logit model, and synchronization via partial rollout interruption, and compare their system trade-offs. From the perspective of approximate correction, we focus on preserving the benefits of decoupled correction through a more appropriate approximate policy when exact old logits cannot be recovered at low cost, without incurring extra system overhead. Following this analysis, we adopt a revised PPO-EWMA method, which achieves significant gains in both training speed and optimization performance. Code at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 异步强化学习中缺失旧logits导致语义失配，提出精确与近似修复方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 异步强化学习通过解耦样本生成与策略优化提升LLM Agent的吞吐量，但引入PPO风格离策略修正的关键失败模式，现有方法未妥善处理旧logits缺失问题。
analysis.problem: 异步流水线中因延迟更新和部分轨迹导致历史训练侧logits（旧logits）缺失，使得训练-推理差异修正与策略过时修正纠缠，破坏解耦修正的语义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出缺失旧logits会导致裁剪和掩码阈值产生不良交互，且实际异步流水线中常丢失所需的历史训练侧logits。
analysis.method: 提出三种精确旧logits获取策略（基于快照的版本追踪、专用旧logits模型、部分轨迹中断同步）和一种近似修正方法（修正的PPO-EWMA）。
contributions: 识别并形式化异步Agent RL中的缺失旧logits问题及其语义失配
提出精确和近似两类修复方法，并分析系统权衡
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 精确策略可能引入额外系统开销
近似方法在极端延迟场景下可能仍有偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 异步强化学习中缺失旧logits导致语义失配，提出精确与近似修复方法。

papers.title: Hölder Policy Optimisation
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) enhances large language models by estimating advantages across a group of sampled trajectories. However, mapping these trajectory-level advantages to policy updates requires aggregating token-level probabilities within each sequence. Relying on a fixed aggregation mechanism for this step fundamentally limits the algorithm's adaptability. Empirically, we observe a critical trade-off: certain fixed aggregations frequently suffer from training collapse, while others fail to yield satisfactory performance. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{HölderPO}, a generalised policy optimisation framework unifying token-level probability aggregation via the Hölder mean. By explicitly modulating the parameter $p$, our framework provides continuous control over the trade-off between gradient concentration and variance bounds. Theoretically, we prove that a larger $p$ concentrates the gradient to amplify sparse learning signals, whereas a smaller $p$ strictly bounds gradient variance. Because no static configuration can universally resolve this concentration-stability trade-off, we instantiate the framework with a dynamic annealing algorithm that progressively schedules $p$ across the training lifecycle. Extensive evaluations demonstrate superior stability and convergence over existing baselines. Specifically, our approach achieves a state-of-the-art average accuracy of $54.9\%$ across multiple mathematical benchmarks, yielding a substantial $7.2\%$ relative gain over standard GRPO and secures an exceptional $93.8\%$ success rate on ALFWorld.

analysis.tldr: HölderPO 通过 Hölder 均值统一 token 级概率聚合，并用动态退火调度 p 参数，解决了 GRPO 中固定聚合机制导致的训练崩溃与性能不足的权衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO 使用固定聚合机制将轨迹级优势映射到策略更新，但该机制缺乏适应性，导致训练崩溃或性能不佳，亟需一种可调节的聚合方法。
analysis.problem: GRPO 中固定 token 级概率聚合机制无法自适应地平衡梯度集中与方差约束，导致训练不稳定或性能次优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到固定聚合机制存在关键权衡：某些聚合常导致训练崩溃，而另一些则无法获得满意性能。
analysis.method: 提出 HölderPO 框架，使用 Hölder 均值统一 token 级概率聚合，通过参数 p 连续控制梯度集中与方差约束的权衡，并设计动态退火算法在训练过程中逐步调度 p。
contributions: 提出 HölderPO 框架，统一 token 级概率聚合，并通过 p 参数提供连续控制。
理论证明 p 越大梯度越集中，p 越小方差越有界。
设计动态退火算法，自适应调度 p，提升训练稳定性与收敛性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数学基准上平均准确率 54.9%，相对 GRPO 提升 7.2%，在 ALFWorld 上成功率 93.8%。
limitations: 动态退火调度策略可能需针对不同任务调整。
理论分析仅针对梯度集中与方差，未涉及其他优化特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HölderPO 通过 Hölder 均值统一 token 级概率聚合，并用动态退火调度 p 参数，解决了 GRPO 中固定聚合机制导致的训练崩溃与性能不足的权衡问题。

papers.title: Scaling Laws and Tradeoffs in Recurrent Networks of Expressive Neurons
papers.abstract: Cortical neurons are complex, multi-timescale processors wired into recurrent circuits, shaped by long evolutionary pressure under stringent biological constraints. Mainstream machine learning, by contrast, predominantly builds models from extremely simple units, a default inherited from early neural-network theory. We treat this as a normative architectural question. How should one split a fixed parameter budget $P$ between the number of units $N$, per-unit effective complexity $k_e$, and per-unit connectivity $k_c$? What controls the optimal allocation? This calls for a model in which per-unit complexity can be tuned independently of width and connectivity. Accordingly, we introduce the ELM Network, whose recurrent layer is built from Expressive Leaky Memory (ELM) neurons, chosen to mirror functional components of cortical neurons. The architecture allows for individually adjusting $N$, $k_e$, and $k_c$ and trains stably across orders of magnitude in scale. We evaluate the model on two qualitatively different sequence benchmarks: the neuromorphic SHD-Adding task and Enwik8 character-level language modeling. Performance improves monotonically along each of the three axes individually. Under a fixed budget, a clear non-trivial optimum emerges in their tradeoff, and larger budgets favor both more and more complex neurons. A closed-form information-theoretic model captures these tradeoffs and attributes the diminishing returns at two ends to: per-neuron signal-to-noise saturation and across-neuron redundancy. A hyperparameter sweep spanning three orders of magnitude in trainable parameters traces a near-Pareto-frontier scaling law consistent with the framework. This suggests that the simple-unit default in ML is not obviously optimal once this tradeoff surface is probed, and offers a normative lens on cortex's reliance on complex spatio-temporal integrators.

analysis.tldr: 通过引入可独立调节神经元复杂度、宽度和连接度的ELM网络，发现固定参数预算下存在最优分配，且更大预算倾向于更多且更复杂的神经元。
analysis.research_motivation: 主流机器学习默认使用简单神经元单元，但皮层神经元是复杂多时间尺度处理器，受生物约束进化而来。这种简单单元默认是否最优尚不清楚，需要从架构角度研究参数预算在神经元数量、复杂度和连接度之间的最优分配。
analysis.problem: 在固定参数预算下，如何最优分配神经元数量、每个神经元的有效复杂度和每个神经元的连接度，以最大化序列建模性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：沿三个轴单独增加参数均能提升性能；固定预算下存在非平凡最优权衡；更大预算倾向于更多且更复杂的神经元；收益递减源于每神经元信噪比饱和与跨神经元冗余。
analysis.method: 提出ELM网络，其循环层由可表达漏记忆（ELM）神经元构成，允许独立调整神经元数量N、每神经元有效复杂度k_e和每神经元连接度k_c，并能在多个数量级尺度上稳定训练。
contributions: 引入ELM网络架构，支持独立调节神经元复杂度、宽度和连接度，为研究参数预算权衡提供可控实验平台。
通过实验和封闭形式信息论模型，揭示了固定参数预算下神经元数量、复杂度和连接度之间的最优权衡规律，并发现更大预算倾向于更多且更复杂的神经元。
analysis.experiments: 在SHD-Adding任务和Enwik8字符级语言建模两个序列基准上评估，超参数扫描覆盖三个数量级的可训练参数，追踪到接近帕累托前沿的缩放定律。
limitations: 仅评估了两个序列任务，泛化到其他模态（如图像、视频）尚未验证。
信息论模型可能未完全捕捉实际训练动态中的非线性交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引入可独立调节神经元复杂度、宽度和连接度的ELM网络，发现固定参数预算下存在最优分配，且更大预算倾向于更多且更复杂的神经元。

papers.title: Rethink the Role of Neural Decoders in Quantum Error Correction
papers.abstract: Quantum error correction (QEC) is essential for enabling quantum advantages, with decoding as a central algorithmic primitive. Owing to its importance and intrinsic difficulty, substantial effort has been made to QEC decoder design, among which neural decoders have recently emerged as a promising data-driven paradigm. Despite this progress, practical deployment remains hindered by a fundamental accuracy-latency tradeoff, often on the microsecond timescale. To address this challenge, here we revisit neural decoders for surface-code decoding under explicit accuracy-latency constraints, considering code distances up to d=9 (161 physical qubits). We unify and redesign representative neural decoders into five architectural paradigms and develop an end-to-end compression pipeline to evaluate their deployability and performance on FPGA hardware. Through systematic experiments, we reveal several previously underexplored insights: (i) near-term decoding performance is driven more by data scale than architectural complexity; (ii) appropriate inductive bias is essential for achieving high decoding accuracy; and (iii) INT4 quantization is a prerequisite for meeting microsecond-scale latency requirements on FPGAs. Together, these findings provide concrete guidance toward scalable and real-time neural QEC decoding.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视神经解码器在量子纠错中的角色，揭示数据规模、归纳偏置和INT4量化对实时解码的关键作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子纠错是实现量子优势的关键，而解码是核心算法原语，但现有神经解码器在实际部署中面临精度-延迟权衡的挑战，尤其是在微秒级时间尺度上。
analysis.problem: 解决表面码解码中神经解码器在显式精度-延迟约束下的可部署性问题，特别是代码距离高达d=9（161个物理量子比特）的场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但揭示了三个关键洞察：数据规模比架构复杂性更驱动近期解码性能；适当的归纳偏置对高解码精度至关重要；INT4量化是满足FPGA微秒级延迟的先决条件。
analysis.method: 统一并重新设计代表性神经解码器为五种架构范式，并开发端到端压缩流水线，在FPGA硬件上评估其可部署性和性能。
contributions: 统一并重新设计了五种神经解码器架构范式，用于表面码解码。
开发了端到端压缩流水线，评估了神经解码器在FPGA上的可部署性。
揭示了数据规模、归纳偏置和INT4量化对实时神经QEC解码的关键作用。
analysis.experiments: 在代码距离d=9（161个物理量子比特）的表面码上进行了系统实验，评估了五种架构范式在FPGA上的性能，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅限于表面码和特定代码距离，可能不适用于其他QEC码。
未讨论训练数据生成和模型训练的计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 重新审视神经解码器在量子纠错中的角色，揭示数据规模、归纳偏置和INT4量化对实时解码的关键作用。

papers.title: Efficient and Adaptive Human Activity Recognition via LLM Backbones
papers.abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) is a core task in pervasive computing systems, where models must operate under strict computational constraints while remaining robust to heterogeneous and evolving deployment conditions. Recent advances based on Transformer architectures have significantly improved recognition performance, but typically rely on task-specific models trained from scratch, resulting in high training cost, large data requirements, and limited adaptability to domain shifts. In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift that reuses large pretrained language models (LLMs) as generic temporal backbones for sensor-based HAR, instead of designing domain-specific Transformers. To bridge the modality gap between inertial time series and language models, we introduce a structured convolutional projection that maps multivariate accelerometer and gyroscope signals into the latent space of the LLM. The pretrained backbone is kept frozen and adapted using parameter-efficient Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), drastically reducing the number of trainable parameters and the overall training cost. Through extensive experiments on standard HAR benchmarks, we show that this approach enables rapid convergence, strong data efficiency, and robust cross-dataset transfer, particularly in low-data and few-shot settings. At the same time, our results highlight the complementary roles of convolutional frontends and LLMs, where local invariances are handled at the signal level while long-range temporal dependencies are captured by the pretrained backbone. Overall, this work demonstrates that LLMs can serve as a practical, frugal, and scalable foundation for adaptive HAR systems, opening new directions for reusing foundation models beyond their original language domain.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练LLM作为通用时序骨干，通过卷积投影和LoRA微调实现高效、自适应的传感器人体活动识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HAR模型基于Transformer从头训练，成本高、数据需求大、领域适应性差，亟需一种高效且可迁移的范式。
analysis.problem: 如何将预训练LLM高效应用于传感器时序数据的人体活动识别，并实现低资源、跨域适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 卷积前端处理局部不变性，LLM骨干捕获长程时序依赖，两者互补。
analysis.method: 提出结构化卷积投影将多轴惯性信号映射到LLM隐空间，冻结LLM骨干并采用LoRA进行参数高效微调。
contributions: 首次提出将预训练LLM作为通用时序骨干用于传感器HAR，替代领域特定Transformer。
设计结构化卷积投影桥接模态差异，结合LoRA实现极低训练成本和强数据效率。
在标准基准上验证了快速收敛、小样本学习和跨数据集迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准HAR基准上进行了大量实验，包括低数据和少样本设置下的跨数据集迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM预训练数据的质量，对极端噪声或非典型传感器配置的鲁棒性未充分探讨。
卷积投影的设计可能针对特定传感器类型，泛化到其他模态需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练LLM作为通用时序骨干，通过卷积投影和LoRA微调实现高效、自适应的传感器人体活动识别。

papers.title: SkillSafetyBench: Evaluating Agent Safety under Skill-Facing Attack Surfaces
papers.abstract: Reusable skills are becoming a common interface for extending large language model agents, packaging procedural guidance with access to files, tools, memory, and execution environments. However, this modularity introduces attack surfaces that are largely missed by existing safety evaluations: even when the user request is benign, task-relevant skill materials or local artifacts can steer an agent toward unsafe actions. We present SkillSafetyBench, a runnable benchmark for evaluating such skill-mediated safety failures. SkillSafetyBench includes 155 adversarial cases across 47 tasks, 6 risk domains, and 30 safety categories, each evaluated with a case-specific rule-based verifier. Experiments with multiple CLI agents and model backends show that localized non-user attacks can consistently induce unsafe behavior, with distinct failure patterns across domains, attack methods, and scaffold-model pairings. Our findings suggest that agent safety depends not only on model-level alignment, but also on how agents interpret skills, trust workflow context, and act through executable environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出SkillSafetyBench基准，评估可复用技能引入的智能体安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 可复用技能作为LLM智能体的扩展接口，引入了被现有安全评估忽视的攻击面，即使请求无害，技能材料或本地工件也可能引导智能体执行不安全行为。
analysis.problem: 现有安全评估未覆盖技能中介的安全失败模式，缺乏系统性的基准来评估此类风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，局部非用户攻击能持续诱导不安全行为，且失败模式在不同领域、攻击方法和模型-脚手架组合中呈现差异。
analysis.method: 构建包含155个对抗案例、47个任务、6个风险域和30个安全类别的可运行基准，每个案例使用基于规则的验证器评估。
contributions: 提出SkillSafetyBench基准，系统评估技能中介的安全失败。
揭示智能体安全不仅依赖模型对齐，还取决于技能解释、工作流信任和可执行环境行为。
analysis.experiments: 在多个CLI智能体和模型后端上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖CLI智能体，可能不适用于其他类型智能体。
规则验证器可能无法捕捉所有安全失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SkillSafetyBench基准，评估可复用技能引入的智能体安全风险。

papers.title: CR^2: Cost-Aware Risk-Controlled Routing for Wireless Device-Edge LLM Inference
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) move from centralized clouds to mobile edge environments, efficient serving must balance latency, energy consumption, and accuracy under constrained device-edge resources. Query-level routing between lightweight on-device models and stronger edge models provides a flexible mechanism to navigate this trade-off. However, existing routers are designed for centralized cloud settings and optimize token-level costs, failing to capture the dynamic latency and energy overheads in wireless edge deployments. In this paper, we formulate mobile edge LLM routing as a deployment-constrained, cost-aware decision problem, and propose CR^2, a two-stage device-edge routing framework. CR^2 decouples a lightweight on-device margin gate from an edge-side utility selector for deferred queries. The margin gate operates on frozen query embeddings and a user-specified cost weight to predict whether local execution is utility-optimal relative to the best edge alternative under the target operating point. We further introduce a conformal risk control (CRC) calibration procedure that maps each operating point to an acceptance threshold, enabling explicit control of the marginal false-acceptance risk under the full-information utility reference. Experiments on the routing task show that CR^2 closely matches a full-information reference router using only device-side signals before deferral. Compared with strong query-level baselines, CR^2 consistently improves the deployable accuracy-cost Pareto frontier and reduces normalized deployment cost by up to 16.9% at matched accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种成本感知的风险可控路由框架CR²，用于无线设备-边缘LLM推理，在匹配精度下降低部署成本达16.9%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM从云端迁移到移动边缘环境时，需在延迟、能耗和精度间权衡，现有路由器针对云端设计，未考虑无线边缘的动态开销。
analysis.problem: 在设备-边缘资源受限下，如何实现成本感知的查询级路由，以优化精度-成本帕累托前沿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有路由器优化token级成本，无法捕捉无线边缘部署中的动态延迟和能量开销。
analysis.method: 两阶段设备-边缘路由框架CR²：轻量设备端边界门（margin gate）基于冻结查询嵌入和用户指定成本权重预测本地执行是否最优，边缘端效用选择器处理延迟查询；引入共形风险控制（CRC）校准过程映射操作点到接受阈值，控制误接受风险。
contributions: 提出CR²，首个针对无线设备-边缘LLM推理的成本感知路由框架。
引入共形风险控制校准，显式控制误接受风险。
实验表明CR²在匹配精度下降低部署成本达16.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在路由任务上，CR²接近全信息参考路由器，相比强基线持续改进可部署精度-成本帕累托前沿。
limitations: 可能依赖用户指定的成本权重，实际应用需合理设置。
CRC校准可能增加离线计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种成本感知的风险可控路由框架CR²，用于无线设备-边缘LLM推理，在匹配精度下降低部署成本达16.9%。

papers.title: The Illusion of Power Capping in LLM Decode: A Phase-Aware Energy Characterisation Across Attention Architectures
papers.abstract: Power capping is the standard GPU energy lever in LLM serving, and it appears to work: throughput drops, power readings fall, and energy budgets are met. We show the appearance is illusory for the phase that dominates production serving: autoregressive decode. Across four attention paradigms -- GQA, MLA, Gated DeltaNet, and Mamba2 -- on NVIDIA H200, decode draws only 137--300\,W on a 700\,W GPU; no cap ever triggers, because memory-bound decode saturates HBM bandwidth rather than compute and leaves power headroom untouched. Firmware-initiated clock throttling compounds the illusion: these deviations can corrupt any throughput measurement that attributes them to the cap. SM clock locking dissolves both confounds. By targeting the lever that is actually on the critical path, clock locking Pareto-dominates power capping universally, recovering up to 32\% of decode energy at minimal throughput loss. We identify three architecture-dependent DVFS behavioural classes and characterise a common energy pattern across novel attention replacements: a heavy prefill cost recouped by efficient decode, eventually halving total request energy relative to GQA at production batch sizes.

analysis.tldr: LLM解码阶段功耗上限控制是假象，实际瓶颈在内存带宽而非计算，锁定SM时钟可更优节能。
analysis.research_motivation: 在LLM服务中，功耗上限控制被广泛用作GPU节能手段，但其在自回归解码阶段的实际效果缺乏深入分析，可能导致能耗优化策略误判。
analysis.problem: 揭示功耗上限控制在LLM解码阶段的无效性，并寻找更有效的节能方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在NVIDIA H200上，四种注意力架构（GQA、MLA、Gated DeltaNet、Mamba2）的解码阶段功耗仅137-300W（GPU额定700W），功耗上限从未触发；固件时钟节流会干扰吞吐量测量，造成虚假的功耗控制效果。
analysis.method: 通过锁定SM时钟替代功耗上限控制，并分析三种架构相关的DVFS行为类别，对比不同注意力机制下的能耗模式。
contributions: 发现功耗上限控制在LLM解码阶段是假象，实际瓶颈在内存带宽。
提出锁定SM时钟作为更优的节能策略，可恢复高达32%的解码能耗且吞吐损失极小。
识别三种架构相关的DVFS行为类别，并揭示新型注意力机制中预填充与解码的能耗权衡模式。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA H200上对GQA、MLA、Gated DeltaNet、Mamba2四种注意力架构进行实验，测量功耗、吞吐量和能耗。
limitations: 实验仅基于NVIDIA H200 GPU，其他硬件可能表现不同。
未讨论功耗上限控制在预填充阶段的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM解码阶段功耗上限控制是假象，实际瓶颈在内存带宽而非计算，锁定SM时钟可更优节能。

papers.title: High-lift Wing Separation Control via Bayesian Optimization and Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: This study investigates active flow control (AFC) of a 30P30N high-lift wing at a Reynolds number Re$_c$ = 450,000 and angle of attack $\alpha$ = 23$^\circ$ using wallresolved large-eddy simulations (LES). Two optimization strategies are explored: open-loop Bayesian optimization (BO) and closed-loop deep reinforcement learning (DRL), both targeting the mitigation of stall and the improvement of aerodynamic efficiency via synthetic jets on the slat, main, and flap elements. The uncontrolled configuration was validated against literature data, confirming the reliability of the LES setup. The BO framework successfully identified steady jet velocities that increased efficiency by +10.9% through a -9.7% drag reduction while maintaining lift. In contrast, the DRL agent, despite leveraging instantaneous flow information from distributed sensors, achieved only minor improvements in lift and drag, with negligible efficiency gain. Training analysis indicated that the penalty-dominated reward constrained exploration. These results highlight the need for carefully designed rewards and computational acceleration strategies in DRL-based flow control at high Reynolds numbers.

analysis.tldr: 贝叶斯优化和深度强化学习用于高升力翼型分离控制，贝叶斯优化效果显著，强化学习因奖励设计限制效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 高升力翼型在起降阶段易发生流动分离导致失速，主动流动控制（AFC）可提升气动效率，但现有方法在优化策略上存在不足，需要探索高效的控制方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过主动流动控制（合成射流）有效缓解高升力翼型的失速并提升气动效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分别采用开环贝叶斯优化（BO）和闭环深度强化学习（DRL）两种策略，通过合成射流对缝翼、主翼和襟翼进行控制，基于高保真大涡模拟（LES）评估性能。
contributions: 首次在高雷诺数高升力翼型上对比贝叶斯优化和深度强化学习两种主动流动控制策略。
贝叶斯优化成功实现效率提升+10.9%（阻力降低-9.7%，升力保持），而强化学习仅获得微小改进。
揭示了强化学习在流动控制中因惩罚主导奖励而限制探索的问题。
analysis.experiments: 基于30P3N高升力翼型，雷诺数Re_c=450,000，攻角α=23°，采用壁面解析大涡模拟（LES），并与文献数据验证。
limitations: 强化学习奖励设计不佳导致探索受限，未实现显著效率提升。
计算成本高，大涡模拟可能限制实际应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 贝叶斯优化和深度强化学习用于高升力翼型分离控制，贝叶斯优化效果显著，强化学习因奖励设计限制效果有限。

papers.title: Cooperative Robotics Reinforced by Collective Perception for Traffic Moderation
papers.abstract: Collisions at non-line-of-sight (NLOS) intersections remain a major safety concern because drivers have limited visibility of approaching traffic. V2X based warnings can reduce these risks, yet many vehicles are not equipped with V2X and drivers may ignore in vehicle alerts. Collective perception (CP) can compensate for low V2X penetration by extending the awareness of connected vehicles, but it cannot influence unconnected vehicles. To fill this gap, our work introduces a complementary concept that adds a cooperative humanoid robot as an active traffic moderator capable of physically stopping a vehicle that attempts to merge into an unseen traffic stream. The system operates on two parallel perception pathways. A dual camera infrastructure unit detects the position, speed and motion of approaching vehicles and transmits this information to the robot as a collective perception message (CPM). The robot also receives cooperative awareness messages (CAM) from connected vehicles through its onboard V2X unit and can act as a relay for decentralized environmental notification messages (DENM) when safety events originate elsewhere along the road. A fusion module combines these streams to maintain a robust real time view of the main road. A Zone of Danger (ZoD) is defined and used to predict whether an approaching vehicle creates a collision risk for a merging road user. When such a risk is detected, the robot issues a human-like STOP gesture and blocks the merging path until the hazard disappears. The full system was deployed at the Future Mobility Park (FMP) in Rotterdam. Experiments show that the combined vision and V2X perception allows the robot to detect approaching vehicles early, predict hazards reliably and prevent unsafe merges in real world NLOS conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合集体感知与类人机器人的协作系统，用于在非视距交叉口主动拦截车辆以防止碰撞。
analysis.research_motivation: 非视距交叉口因驾驶员视野受限导致碰撞事故频发，现有V2X警告受限于低渗透率和驾驶员忽视，集体感知虽能扩展联网车辆感知但无法影响非联网车辆。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖完全V2X覆盖的情况下，主动阻止非联网车辆在非视距交叉口进行危险并道。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建双摄像头基础设施单元检测车辆运动，通过集体感知消息传输给类人机器人；机器人同时接收联网车辆的CAM并可作为DENM中继；融合模块维护实时路况，定义危险区域预测碰撞风险，机器人执行类人停止手势并物理阻挡。
contributions: 提出一种结合集体感知与物理机器人干预的互补概念，弥补V2X低渗透率缺陷。
在真实场景（鹿特丹未来移动公园）部署并验证了系统有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在鹿特丹未来移动公园进行真实世界实验，结果表明组合视觉与V2X感知使机器人能够早期检测、可靠预测危险并防止不安全并道。
limitations: 机器人物理拦截可能对车辆造成损坏或引发二次事故。
系统依赖基础设施摄像头覆盖范围，存在感知盲区。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合集体感知与类人机器人的协作系统，用于在非视距交叉口主动拦截车辆以防止碰撞。

papers.title: AccLock: Unlocking Identity with Heartbeat Using In-Ear Accelerometers
papers.abstract: The widespread use of earphones has enabled various sensing applications, including activity recognition, health monitoring, and context-aware computing. Among these, earphone-based user authentication has become a key technique by leveraging unique biometric features. However, existing earphone-based authentication systems face key limitations: they either require explicit user interaction or active speaker output, or suffer from poor accessibility and vulnerability to environmental noise, which hinders large-scale deployment. In this paper, we propose a passive authentication system, called AccLock, which leverages distinctive features extracted from in-ear BCG signals to enable secure and unobtrusive user verification. Our system offers several advantages over previous systems, including zero-involvement for both the device and the user, ubiquitous, and resilient to environmental noise. To realize this, we first design a two-stage denoising scheme to suppress both inherent and sporadic interference. To extract user-specific features, we then propose a disentanglement-based deep learning model, HIDNet, which explicitly separates user-specific features from shared nuisance components. Lastly, we develop a scalable authentication framework based on a Siamese network that eliminates the need for per-user classifier training. We conduct extensive experiments with 33 participants, achieving an average FAR of 3.13% and FRR of 2.99%, which demonstrates the practical feasibility of AccLock.

analysis.tldr: 利用耳内加速度计提取心跳BCG信号，实现无需用户参与的被动身份认证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有耳塞式身份认证系统要么需要用户主动交互或扬声器输出，要么易受环境噪声影响，难以大规模部署。
analysis.problem: 如何利用耳内加速度计采集的心跳BCG信号实现被动、鲁棒且无需用户参与的认证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计两阶段去噪方案抑制干扰，提出解耦深度学习模型HIDNet分离用户特定特征与共享干扰，基于Siamese网络构建可扩展认证框架。
contributions: 提出AccLock被动认证系统，利用耳内BCG信号实现零用户参与的身份验证。
设计HIDNet解耦模型和两阶段去噪方案，提升特征提取的鲁棒性。
基于Siamese网络的可扩展框架，无需为每个用户单独训练分类器。
analysis.experiments: 在33名参与者上实验，平均FAR为3.13%，FRR为2.99%。
limitations: 实验规模较小（33人），可能未覆盖多样人群。
未提及对剧烈运动或极端噪声场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用耳内加速度计提取心跳BCG信号，实现无需用户参与的被动身份认证。

papers.title: Proteus: A Self-Evolving Red Team for Agent Skill Ecosystems
papers.abstract: Agent skills extend LLM agents with reusable instructions, tool interfaces, and executable code, and users increasingly install third-party skills from marketplaces, repositories, and community channels. Because a skill exposes both executable behavior and context-setting documentation, its deployment risk cannot be measured by single-shot audits or prompt-level red teams alone: a realistic attacker can use audit and runtime feedback to repeatedly rewrite the skill. We frame this risk as \emph{adaptive leakage} -- whether a budgeted attacker can iteratively revise a skill until it passes audit and produces verified runtime harm -- and present \ours{}, a grey-box self-evolving red-team framework for measuring it. Proteus searches a formalized five-axis skill-attack space. Each candidate is evaluated through a unified audit-sandbox-oracle pipeline that returns structured audit findings and runtime evidence to guide cross-round mutation. Beyond initial evasion, Proteus performs path expansion, which finds alternative implementations of successful attacks, and surface expansion, which transfers learned implementation patterns to new attack objectives beyond the original seed catalogue. Across eight phase-1 cells, Proteus reaches 40--90\% Attack Success Rate at $5$ rounds (ASR@5) with positive learning-curve slopes on both evaluated auditors. Phase-2 path/surface expansion produces 438 jointly bypassing and lethal variants, with SkillVetter bypassed at $\geq 93\%$ in every cell and AI-Infra-Guard, the strongest public auditor we evaluate, still admitting up to 41.3\% joint-success. These results show that current skill vetting substantially underestimates residual risk when evaluated against adaptive, feedback-driven attackers.

analysis.tldr: 提出Proteus框架，通过自进化红队测试评估Agent技能生态中的自适应泄露风险。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent技能市场存在第三方技能部署风险，单次审计或提示级红队测试无法衡量攻击者利用审计和运行时反馈反复改写技能的威胁。
analysis.problem: 如何量化评估攻击者通过迭代修改技能绕过审计并产生运行时危害的自适应泄露风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Proteus，一个灰盒自进化红队框架，搜索五轴技能攻击空间，通过统一审计-沙箱-预言机流水线评估候选攻击，并执行路径扩展和表面扩展以生成变体。
contributions: 形式化定义了Agent技能的自适应泄露风险。
提出Proteus框架，实现自进化红队测试。
实验证明当前技能审核在自适应攻击下严重低估残余风险。
analysis.experiments: 在8个phase-1单元中，Proteus在5轮内达到40-90%攻击成功率，学习曲线斜率为正；phase-2路径/表面扩展产生438个联合绕过和致命变体，SkillVetter绕过率≥93%，AI-Infra-Guard联合成功率最高达41.3%。
limitations: 框架依赖灰盒访问，可能不适用于完全黑盒场景。
实验仅评估了两种审计器，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Proteus框架，通过自进化红队测试评估Agent技能生态中的自适应泄露风险。

papers.title: Incentivizing Truthfulness and Collaborative Fairness in Bayesian Learning
papers.abstract: Collaborative machine learning involves training high-quality models using datasets from a number of sources. To incentivize sources to share data, existing data valuation methods fairly reward each source based on its data submitted as is. However, as these methods do not verify nor incentivize data truthfulness, the sources can manipulate their data (e.g., by submitting duplicated or noisy data) to artificially increase their valuations and rewards or prevent others from benefiting. This paper presents the first mechanism that provably ensures (F) collaborative fairness and incentivizes (T) truthfulness at equilibrium for Bayesian models. Our mechanism combines semivalues (e.g., Shapley value), which ensure fairness, and a truthful data valuation function (DVF) based on a validation set that is unknown to the sources. As semivalues are influenced by others' data, we introduce an additional condition to prove that a source can maximize its expected data values in coalitions and semivalues by submitting a dataset that captures its true knowledge. Additionally, we discuss the implications and suitable relaxations of (F) and (T) when the mediator has a limited budget for rewards or lacks a validation set. Our theoretical findings are validated on synthetic and real-world datasets.

analysis.tldr: 首个在贝叶斯学习中同时保证协作公平性和激励数据真实性的机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据估值方法虽能公平奖励数据贡献，但无法验证或激励数据真实性，参与者可能通过提交重复或噪声数据操纵估值，损害协作学习效果。
analysis.problem: 设计一种机制，在贝叶斯学习场景下同时实现协作公平性（公平分配奖励）和激励数据真实性（参与者提交真实数据）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合半值（如Shapley值）保证公平性，并基于参与者未知的验证集设计真实数据估值函数（DVF），通过额外条件证明参与者可通过提交真实数据最大化其期望数据值和半值。
contributions: 首个在贝叶斯学习中同时保证协作公平性和激励数据真实性的机制。
引入额外条件证明参与者可通过提交真实数据最大化其期望数据值和半值。
讨论了在有限预算或缺乏验证集时公平性和真实性的松弛条件。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了理论结果。
limitations: 机制依赖于验证集，若验证集不可用则需松弛条件。
可能仅适用于贝叶斯学习框架，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个在贝叶斯学习中同时保证协作公平性和激励数据真实性的机制。

papers.title: Modulation Consistency-based Contrastive Learning for Self-Supervised Automatic Modulation Classification
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based AMC methods have achieved remarkable performance, but their practical deployment remains constrained by the high cost of labeled data. Although self-supervised learning (SSL) reduces the reliance on labels, existing SSL-based AMC methods often rely on task-agnostic pretext objectives misaligned with modulation classification, leading to representations entangled with nuisance factors such as symbol, channel, and noise. In this paper, we identify intra-instance modulation consistency as a task-aware structural prior, whereby different temporal segments of the same signal may differ in waveform while preserving the same modulation type, thus providing a principled cue for task-aligned self-supervision. Based on this prior, we propose Mod-CL, a Modulation consistency-based Contrastive Learning framework that constructs positive pairs from different temporal segments of the same signal instance, to encourage the model to learn shared modulation information while suppressing nuisance variations. We further develop a contrastive objective tailored to Mod-CL, which jointly exploits temporal segmentation and data augmentation to pull together views sharing the same modulation semantics while avoiding supervisory conflicts within each signal instance. Extensive experiments on RadioML datasets show that Mod-CL consistently outperforms strong baselines, especially in low-label regimes, achieving substantial improvements in linear probing accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于调制一致性的对比学习框架Mod-CL，利用同一信号不同时间片段共享调制类型作为自监督信号，提升自动调制分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习AMC方法依赖大量标注数据，成本高；现有自监督方法使用任务无关的预训练目标，导致表征与调制分类不对齐，受符号、信道、噪声等干扰因素影响。
analysis.problem: 如何设计任务对齐的自监督学习目标，使模型学习到与调制类型相关的共享信息，同时抑制无关变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一信号的不同时间片段波形不同但调制类型相同，即存在实例内调制一致性，可作为任务感知的结构先验。
analysis.method: 提出Mod-CL框架，从同一信号实例的不同时间片段构建正样本对，结合时间分割和数据增强设计对比学习目标，拉近共享调制语义的视图，避免实例内监督冲突。
contributions: 识别并利用实例内调制一致性作为任务对齐的自监督先验
提出Mod-CL对比学习框架，通过时间分割构建正样本对，并设计专用对比目标
在RadioML数据集上验证，尤其在低标注率下显著优于强基线
analysis.experiments: 在RadioML数据集上进行线性探测实验，Mod-CL在低标注率下持续优于强基线，取得显著提升。
limitations: 仅针对调制分类任务，泛化性未验证
依赖时间分割策略，可能不适用于所有信号类型
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于调制一致性的对比学习框架Mod-CL，利用同一信号不同时间片段共享调制类型作为自监督信号，提升自动调制分类性能。

papers.title: IPI-proxy: An Intercepting Proxy for Red-Teaming Web-Browsing AI Agents Against Indirect Prompt Injection
papers.abstract: Web-browsing AI agents are increasingly deployed in enterprise settings under strict whitelists of approved domains, yet adversaries can still influence them by embedding hidden instructions in the HTML pages those domains serve. Existing red-teaming resources fall short of this scenario: prompt-injection benchmarks ship pre-built adversarial pages that whitelisted agents cannot reach, and generic LLM scanners probe the model API rather than its retrieved content. We present IPI-proxy, an open-source toolkit for red-teaming web-browsing agents against indirect prompt injection (IPI). At its core is an intercepting proxy that rewrites real HTTP responses from whitelisted domains in flight, embedding payloads drawn from a unified library of 820 deduplicated attack strings extracted from six published benchmarks (BIPIA, InjecAgent, AgentDojo, Tensor Trust, WASP, and LLMail-Inject). A YAML-driven test harness independently parameterizes the payload set, the embedding technique (HTML comment, invisible CSS, or LLM-generated semantic prose), and the HTML insertion point (6 locations from \icode{head\_meta} to \icode{script\_comment}), enabling parameter-sweep evaluation without mock pages or sandboxed environments. A companion exfiltration tracker logs successful callbacks. This paper describes the threat model, situates IPI-proxy among contemporary IPI benchmarks and red-teaming tools, and details its architecture, design decisions, and configuration interface. By bridging static benchmarks and live deployment, IPI-proxy gives AI security teams a reproducible substrate for measuring and hardening web-browsing agents against indirect prompt injection on the same retrieval surface attackers exploit in production.

analysis.tldr: 提出IPI-proxy，一个用于红队测试浏览网页AI代理对抗间接提示注入的开源拦截代理工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红队资源无法模拟攻击者通过白名单域名的HTML页面嵌入隐藏指令的场景，静态基准测试和通用LLM扫描器均不适用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可复现的工具，用于在真实部署环境中测试和加固浏览网页AI代理对抗间接提示注入（IPI）的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发一个拦截代理，实时重写来自白名单域名的HTTP响应，嵌入从六个公开基准中提取的820条去重攻击字符串，并通过YAML驱动的测试框架参数化负载、嵌入技术和插入点。
contributions: 提出IPI-proxy，一个开源的红队测试工具，专门针对浏览网页AI代理的间接提示注入。
提供统一的攻击字符串库（820条去重），支持多种嵌入技术和插入点的参数化扫描。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于HTTP的网页浏览代理，对其他协议或离线场景支持有限。
攻击字符串库可能无法覆盖所有新型注入变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IPI-proxy，一个用于红队测试浏览网页AI代理对抗间接提示注入的开源拦截代理工具。

papers.title: EvoNav: Evolutionary Reward Function Design for Robot Navigation with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Robot navigation is a crucial task with applications to social robots in dynamic human environments. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) has shown great promise for this problem, the policy quality is highly sensitive to the specification of reward functions. Hand-crafted rewards require substantial domain expertise and embed inductive biases that are difficult to audit or adapt, limiting their effectiveness and leading to suboptimal performance. In this paper, we propose EvoNav, an evolutionary framework that automates the design of robot navigation reward functions via large language models (LLMs). To overcome prohibitively costly policy training, EvoNav evaluates each candidate proposal from the LLM via a progressive three-stage warm-up-boost procedure. EvoNav advances from analytical proxies with low-cost surrogates, such as small datasets and analytic rules, to lightweight rollouts and, finally, to full policy training, enabling computationally efficient exploration under effective feedback. Experiment results show that EvoNav produces more effective navigation policies than manually designed RL rewards and state-of-the-art reward design methods.

analysis.tldr: EvoNav 利用大语言模型进化式自动设计机器人导航奖励函数，通过渐进式评估提升效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人导航中强化学习策略质量高度依赖奖励函数设计，手工设计需要大量领域知识且难以适应，导致性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何自动设计高效且适应性的机器人导航奖励函数，避免手工设计的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EvoNav 框架，利用 LLM 生成候选奖励函数，并通过渐进式三阶段（热身-提升）评估流程（从低成本代理到完整策略训练）进行高效筛选。
contributions: 提出基于 LLM 的进化式奖励函数自动设计框架 EvoNav。
设计渐进式三阶段评估流程，降低策略训练成本，实现高效探索。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明 EvoNav 生成的导航策略优于手工设计的 RL 奖励和现有奖励设计方法。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的生成质量，对复杂场景泛化性未知。
渐进式评估的阈值设定可能影响最终性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoNav 利用大语言模型进化式自动设计机器人导航奖励函数，通过渐进式评估提升效率与性能。

papers.title: Improving the Performance and Learning Stability of Parallelizable RNNs Designed for Ultra-Low Power Applications
papers.abstract: Sequence learning is dominated by Transformers and parallelizable recurrent neural networks (RNNs) such as state-space models, yet learning long-term dependencies remains challenging, and state-of-the-art designs trade power consumption for performance. The Bistable Memory Recurrent Unit (BMRU) was introduced to enable hardware-software co-design of ultra-low power RNNs: quantized states with hysteresis provide persistent memory while mapping directly to analog primitives. However, BMRU performance lags behind parallelizable RNNs on complex sequential tasks. In this paper, we identify gradient blocking during state updates as a key limitation and propose a cumulative update formulation that restores gradient flow while preserving persistent memory, creating skip-connections through time. This leads to the Cumulative Memory Recurrent Unit (CMRU) and its relaxed variant, the $\alpha$CMRU. Experiments show that the cumulative formulation dramatically improves convergence stability and reduces initialization sensitivity. The CMRU and $\alpha$CMRU match or outperform Linear Recurrent Units (LRUs) and minimal Gated Recurrent Units (minGRUs) across diverse benchmarks at small model sizes, with particular advantages on tasks requiring discrete long-range retention, while the CMRU retains quantized states, persistent memory, and noise-resilient dynamics essential for analog implementation.

analysis.tldr: 提出累积更新公式解决BMRU梯度阻塞问题，提升超低功耗并行RNN的性能与训练稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有并行RNN（如状态空间模型）在超低功耗场景下性能与功耗难以兼得，BMRU虽支持硬件-软件协同设计但性能落后，亟需改进。
analysis.problem: BMRU在状态更新时存在梯度阻塞，导致长序列任务性能差且训练不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出BMRU的梯度阻塞是性能瓶颈，累积更新公式可恢复梯度流并创建跨时间跳跃连接，显著提升收敛稳定性和降低初始化敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出累积更新公式（Cumulative Update Formulation），形成Cumulative Memory Recurrent Unit (CMRU)及其松弛变体αCMRU，通过累积更新恢复梯度流并保留持久记忆。
contributions: 识别BMRU中梯度阻塞的关键限制并提出累积更新公式解决。
提出CMRU和αCMRU，在超低功耗场景下匹配或超越LRU和minGRU性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上测试小模型尺寸，CMRU和αCMRU匹配或超越LRU和minGRU，尤其在离散长程保留任务上表现优势。
limitations: 可能仅在超低功耗小模型场景下验证，大规模模型效果未知。
αCMRU的松弛变体可能牺牲部分硬件友好特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出累积更新公式解决BMRU梯度阻塞问题，提升超低功耗并行RNN的性能与训练稳定性。

papers.title: GEAR: Granularity-Adaptive Advantage Reweighting for LLM Agents via Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a widely used post-training approach for LLM agents, where training commonly relies on outcome-level rewards that provide only coarse supervision. While finer-grained credit assignment is promising for effective policy updates, obtaining reliable local credit and assigning it to the right parts of the long-horizon trajectory remains an open challenge. In this paper, we propose Granularity-adaptivE Advantage Reweighting (GEAR), an adaptive-granularity credit assignment framework that reshapes the trajectory-level GRPO advantage using token- and segment-level signals derived from self-distillation. GEAR compares an on-policy student with a ground-truth-conditioned teacher to obtain a reference-guided divergence signal for identifying adaptive segment boundaries and modulating local advantage weights. This divergence often spikes at the onset of a semantic deviation, while later tokens in the same autoregressive continuation may return to low divergence. GEAR therefore treats such spikes as anchors for adaptive credit regions: where the student remains aligned with the teacher, token-level resolution is preserved; where it departs, GEAR groups the corresponding continuation into an adaptive segment and uses the divergence at the departure point to modulate the segment' s advantage. Experiments across eight mathematical reasoning and agentic tool-use benchmarks with Qwen3 4B and 8B models show that GEAR consistently outperforms standard GRPO, self-distillation-only baselines, and token- or turn-level credit-assignment methods. The gains are especially strong on benchmarks with lower GRPO baseline accuracy, reaching up to around 20\% over GRPO, suggesting that the proposed adaptive reweighting scheme is especially useful in more challenging long-horizon settings.

analysis.tldr: GEAR 通过自蒸馏自适应粒度优势重加权，提升 LLM Agent 在长程任务中的强化学习效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 强化学习常用粗粒度的结果级奖励，缺乏细粒度信用分配，难以有效更新策略。
analysis.problem: 如何为长程轨迹中的不同部分自适应地分配可靠的局部信用，实现细粒度策略更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自蒸馏的散度信号在语义偏离起始处出现尖峰，后续自回归 token 可能恢复低散度，因此可将尖峰作为自适应信用区域锚点。
analysis.method: 提出 GEAR 框架，通过自蒸馏比较在线学生与真实条件教师，获取参考引导散度信号，用于识别自适应段边界并调节局部优势权重。
contributions: 提出自适应粒度信用分配框架 GEAR，结合 token 级和段级信号重塑轨迹级优势。
在数学推理和工具使用基准上，GEAR 一致优于 GRPO 等基线，尤其在困难长程任务中提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在 8 个数学推理和 agentic 工具使用基准上，使用 Qwen3 4B 和 8B 模型，GEAR 一致优于标准 GRPO、自蒸馏基线及 token/轮级信用分配方法，在 GRPO 基线准确率较低的基准上提升达约 20%。
limitations: 依赖自蒸馏的散度信号质量，可能受教师模型能力影响。
自适应段边界识别可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GEAR 通过自蒸馏自适应粒度优势重加权，提升 LLM Agent 在长程任务中的强化学习效果。

papers.title: Martingale-Consistent Self-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is often deployed under changing information, such as shorter histories, missing features, or partially observed images. In these settings, predictions from coarse and refined views should be coherent: before refinement, the coarse-view prediction should match the average prediction expected after refinement. Martingales formalize this coherence principle, but standard SSL objectives do not enforce it. Unlike invariance objectives that pull views together, martingale consistency constrains only the expected refined prediction, allowing predictions to update as information is revealed while preventing systematic drift. We introduce a martingale-consistent SSL framework that closes this gap, with practical prediction- and latent-space variants and an unbiased two-sample Monte Carlo estimator based on stochastic refinement. We evaluate the approach on synthetic and real time-series, tabular, and image benchmarks under partial-observation regimes, in both semi-self-supervised and fully label-free settings. Across these experiments, our framework improves robustness and calibration under partial observation, yielding more stable representations as information is revealed.

analysis.tldr: 提出鞅一致性自监督学习框架，确保粗粒度与细粒度预测在信息逐步揭示时保持无偏一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督学习常部署于信息变化场景（如缺失特征、部分观测），但标准SSL目标不保证粗粒度预测与细粒度预测的期望一致，导致系统性漂移。
analysis.problem: 如何设计SSL目标，使粗视图预测等于细视图预测的期望，实现信息逐步揭示时的无偏更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出鞅一致性SSL框架，包含预测空间和隐空间变体，以及基于随机细化的无偏两样本蒙特卡洛估计器。
contributions: 形式化鞅一致性原则并引入SSL，弥补标准不变性目标的不足
提出实用变体与无偏估计器，适用于部分观测下的半自监督和全无标签场景
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实时间序列、表格、图像基准上评估部分观测场景，包括半自监督和全无标签设置，显示鲁棒性和校准性提升。
limitations: 可能依赖细化过程的随机性假设
估计器方差在高维空间可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出鞅一致性自监督学习框架，确保粗粒度与细粒度预测在信息逐步揭示时保持无偏一致性。

papers.title: Minimax Rates and Spectral Distillation for Tree Ensembles
papers.abstract: Tree ensembles such as random forests (RFs) and gradient boosting machines (GBMs) are among the most widely used supervised learners, yet their theoretical properties remain incompletely understood. We adopt a spectral perspective on these algorithms, with two main contributions. First, we derive minimax-optimal convergence for RF regression, showing that, under mild regularity conditions on tree growth, the eigenvalue decay of the induced kernel operator governs the statistical rate. Second, we exploit this spectral viewpoint to develop compression schemes for tree ensembles. For RFs, leading eigenfunctions of the kernel operator capture the dominant predictive directions; for GBMs, leading singular vectors of the smoother matrix play an analogous role. Learning nonlinear maps for these spectral representations yields distilled models that are orders of magnitude smaller than the originals while maintaining competitive predictive performance. Our methods compare favorably to state of the art algorithms for forest pruning and rule extraction, with applications to resource constrained computing.

analysis.tldr: 从谱视角推导随机森林的极小化最优收敛率，并利用谱分解实现树集成模型的极致压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 树集成模型（如随机森林、GBM）应用广泛，但其理论性质（如收敛速率）尚不清晰，且模型规模庞大，在资源受限场景下难以部署。
analysis.problem: 如何从谱角度理解树集成的统计性质，并据此设计高效的模型压缩方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过谱分析，将树集成模型与核方法关联，利用核算子的特征分解提取主导预测方向（RF）或平滑矩阵的奇异向量（GBM），并学习非线性映射得到蒸馏模型。
contributions: 推导了随机森林回归在温和正则条件下的极小化最优收敛率，揭示了核算子特征值衰减与统计速率的关系。
提出了基于谱分解的树集成压缩方法，蒸馏模型体积比原始模型小数个数量级，且保持竞争性预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于特定的树生长条件，实际中难以完全满足。
谱分解的计算开销可能较大，尤其对于大规模集成模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从谱视角推导随机森林的极小化最优收敛率，并利用谱分解实现树集成模型的极致压缩。

papers.title: Trade-offs in Decentralized Agentic AI Discovery Across the Compute Continuum
papers.abstract: Agentic systems deployed across the compute continuum need discovery mechanisms that remain effective across cloud, edge, and intermittently connected domains. In some emerging agentic architectures, decentralized discovery is already an active design direction, placing DHT-based lookup on the path toward agent directories. This paper studies the trade-offs among major structured-overlay families for agent discovery, comparing Chord, Pastry, and Kademlia as candidate indexing substrates within a shared control-plane framework. Using a benchmark subset centered on a 4096-node stationary comparison and a representative 4096-node churn benchmark, the paper characterizes how discovery reliability, startup behavior, and control-plane overhead vary across these overlays. The goal is to clarify the operating points they expose for agent discovery across edge-to-cloud environments.

analysis.tldr: 研究去中心化智能体发现机制在计算连续体中的权衡，比较Chord、Pastry和Kademlia三种结构化覆盖网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着智能体系统部署在云、边缘和间歇连接域，需要有效的发现机制，而现有架构中基于DHT的发现已成为活跃设计方向，但不同覆盖网络在可靠性、启动行为和开销方面存在权衡，需要系统比较。
analysis.problem: 在计算连续体（云-边缘-间歇连接域）中，如何选择最优的结构化覆盖网络（Chord、Pastry、Kademlia）以实现高效的去中心化智能体发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在共享控制平面框架下，使用4096节点静态比较和4096节点动态churn基准测试，比较Chord、Pastry和Kademlia三种覆盖网络在发现可靠性、启动行为和控制平面开销方面的性能。
contributions: 系统比较了三种主要结构化覆盖网络（Chord、Pastry、Kademlia）在智能体发现任务中的权衡。
揭示了不同覆盖网络在边缘到云环境中的操作点，为去中心化智能体架构设计提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于4096节点规模的基准测试，可能无法完全代表更大规模或更复杂网络环境。
未考虑实际应用中的异构性和动态性对发现机制的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究去中心化智能体发现机制在计算连续体中的权衡，比较Chord、Pastry和Kademlia三种结构化覆盖网络。

papers.title: Multi-Timescale Conductance Spiking Networks: A Sparse, Gradient-Trainable Framework with Rich Firing Dynamics for Enhanced Temporal Processing
papers.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) promise low-power event-driven computation for temporally rich tasks, but commonly used neuron models often trade off gradient-based trainability, dynamical richness, and high activity sparsity. These limitations are acute in regression, where approximation error, noise and spike discretization can severely degrade continuous-valued outputs. Indeed, many state-of-the-art (SOTA) SNNs rely on simple phenomenological dynamics trained with surrogate gradients and offer limited control over spiking diversity and sparsity. To overcome such limitations, we introduce multi-timescale conductance spiking networks, a gradient-trainable framework in which neural dynamics emerge from shaping the current-voltage (I-V) curve by tuning fast, slow and ultra-slow conductances. This parametrization allows systematic control over excitability, can be implemented efficiently in analog circuits, and yields rich firing regimes including tonic, phasic and bursting responses within a single model. We derive a discrete-time formulation of these differentiable dynamics, enabling direct backpropagation through time without surrogate-gradient approximations. To probe both trainability and accuracy, we evaluate feedforward networks of these neurons at the predictability limit of Mackey-Glass time-series regression and compare them to baseline LIF and SOTA AdLIF networks. Our model outperforms LIF and AdLIF networks, while exhibiting substantially sparser activity from both communication and computational perspectives. These results highlight multi-timescale conductance spiking neurons as a promising building block for energy-aware temporal processing and neuromorphic implementation.

analysis.tldr: 提出多时间尺度电导脉冲网络，通过I-V曲线参数化实现丰富放电动力学与梯度可训练性，在时间序列回归中优于LIF和AdLIF且更稀疏。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SNN神经元模型在梯度可训练性、动力学丰富性和活动稀疏性之间存在权衡，尤其在回归任务中近似误差和脉冲离散化会严重降低连续值输出性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种同时具备梯度可训练性、丰富放电动力学和高活动稀疏性的SNN框架，以提升时间序列处理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入多时间尺度电导脉冲网络，通过调节快、慢和超慢电导来塑造I-V曲线，实现兴奋性系统控制，并推导离散时间可微动力学，支持直接时间反向传播。
contributions: 提出多时间尺度电导脉冲网络，实现梯度可训练、动力学丰富且活动稀疏的SNN框架。
在Mackey-Glass时间序列回归任务中，模型优于LIF和AdLIF基线，同时通信和计算稀疏性显著更高。
analysis.experiments: 在Mackey-Glass时间序列回归的可预测性极限上评估前馈网络，与LIF和AdLIF网络对比。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在单一时间序列回归任务上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论大规模网络或复杂任务上的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多时间尺度电导脉冲网络，通过I-V曲线参数化实现丰富放电动力学与梯度可训练性，在时间序列回归中优于LIF和AdLIF且更稀疏。

papers.title: Crash Assessment via Mesh-Based Graph Neural Networks and Physics-Aware Attention
papers.abstract: Full-vehicle crash simulations are computationally expensive, limiting their use in iterative design exploration. This work investigates learned hybrid surrogate models (MeshTransolver, MeshGeoTransolver, and MeshGeoFLARE) for predicting time-resolved structural deformation fields in an industrial lateral pole-impact benchmark. We evaluate whether neural surrogates can reproduce full-field crash kinematics with sufficient accuracy, spatial regularity, and structural plausibility for engineering interpretation. The proposed architectures combine local mesh message passing, geometry-aware global attention, and sparse contact-aware correction for autoregressive crash rollout. We compare mesh-based graph neural networks, attention-based geometric models, and hybrid architectures under a common training and hyperparameter configuration. The hybrid models capture both short-range structural interactions and long-range deformation patterns, while a sparse contact-aware variant assesses the effect of dynamic proximity interactions during rollout. On a 25-sample full-vehicle test set, the best hybrid model achieves a temporal mean root-mean-square error of 3.20 mm. While geometry-aware attention baselines are quantitatively competitive, qualitative side-view inspection shows they can introduce local spatial noise and deformation irregularities that complicate structural interpretation. In contrast, hybrid mesh-attention models provide the best balance between scalar accuracy, survival-space consistency, and physically interpretable displacement fields. These results suggest that crash surrogate assessment should combine global error metrics with downstream safety-relevant quantities and qualitative field inspection. The proposed methodology enables fast full-field predictions while preserving essential structural information for industrial crash-engineering analysis.

analysis.tldr: 混合网格-注意力图神经网络在车辆碰撞仿真中实现高精度结构变形预测，兼顾全局误差与物理可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 全车碰撞仿真计算成本高，限制了其在迭代设计中的应用，亟需高效的代理模型。
analysis.problem: 如何构建能够准确、空间平滑且结构合理地预测全车碰撞过程中时变结构变形场的神经代理模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯几何注意力基线在定量上具有竞争力，但会引入局部空间噪声和变形不规则性，影响结构解释；混合网格-注意力模型在标量精度、生存空间一致性和物理可解释位移场之间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.method: 提出混合代理模型（MeshTransolver, MeshGeoTransolver, MeshGeoFLARE），结合局部网格消息传递、几何感知全局注意力和稀疏接触感知校正，用于自回归碰撞展开预测。
contributions: 系统比较了基于网格的图神经网络、基于注意力的几何模型和混合架构在工业侧柱碰撞基准上的性能。
提出稀疏接触感知变体，评估动态邻近交互在展开过程中的影响。
强调碰撞代理评估应结合全局误差指标、下游安全相关量和定性场检查。
analysis.experiments: 在25个样本的全车测试集上，最佳混合模型达到时间均方根误差3.20 mm。
limitations: 仅针对单一工业侧柱碰撞基准，泛化性未验证。
稀疏接触感知变体的效果可能依赖于碰撞场景的接触模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 混合网格-注意力图神经网络在车辆碰撞仿真中实现高精度结构变形预测，兼顾全局误差与物理可解释性。

papers.title: Is Monotonic Sampling Necessary in Diffusion Models?
papers.abstract: Diffusion models generate samples by iteratively denoising a Gaussian prior, traversing a sequence of noise levels that, in every published sampler, decreases monotonically. Six years of intensive work has refined nearly every aspect of this recipe, including the corruption operator, the training objective, the schedule shape, the architecture, and the ODE solver. Yet the assumption of monotonicity itself has never been systematically tested. Here we ask whether monotonic sampling is load-bearing or merely conventional. We design four families of structured nonmonotonic schedules and apply them to three architecturally distinct generative models, DDPM, EDM, and Flow Matching, across NFE budgets ranging from 10 to 200 function evaluations, plus a 42-cell hyperparameter ablation, on CIFAR-10. Across all 90 tested configurations, no tested nonmonotonic schedule improves on the monotonic baseline. The magnitude of the penalty, however, spans nearly three orders of magnitude: persistent and substantial in DDPM, intermediate in Flow Matching, and indistinguishable from zero in EDM. We show that this variation is not noise but a structural property of each trained denoiser, and we formalize it as the Schedule Sensitivity Coefficient, a cheap, architecture-agnostic diagnostic that provides evidence of non-convergence to the Bayes-optimal denoiser at the critical noise level. Our findings justify the field's tacit reliance on monotonic schedules and supply a new probe of diffusion model quality complementary to sample-quality metrics such as Frechet Inception Distance.

analysis.tldr: 扩散模型中单调采样并非必要，但非单调调度在所有测试配置中均未超越单调基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型采样中噪声水平单调递减的假设从未被系统检验，本文旨在探究单调性是否必要。
analysis.problem: 验证扩散模型中单调采样是否必要，以及非单调调度对生成质量的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非单调调度在DDPM中惩罚显著，在Flow Matching中中等，在EDM中几乎为零，且该差异是去噪器的结构属性，可用调度敏感系数量化。
analysis.method: 设计四类结构化非单调调度，应用于DDPM、EDM和Flow Matching，在CIFAR-10上评估，并引入调度敏感系数诊断。
contributions: 系统测试了扩散模型中单调采样的必要性，发现非单调调度无法超越单调基线。
提出调度敏感系数，一种廉价、架构无关的诊断工具，用于检测去噪器在关键噪声水平是否收敛到贝叶斯最优。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上，对DDPM、EDM和Flow Matching进行90种配置测试，包括10到200次函数评估和42组超参数消融。
limitations: 仅在CIFAR-10上实验，未在更大规模数据集或更高分辨率图像上验证。
非单调调度设计可能未穷尽所有可能性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散模型中单调采样并非必要，但非单调调度在所有测试配置中均未超越单调基线。

papers.title: Behavioral Integrity Verification for AI Agent Skills
papers.abstract: Agent skills extend LLM agents with privileged third-party capabilities such as filesystem access, credentials, network calls, and shell execution. Existing safety work catches malicious prompts and risky runtime actions, but the skill artifact itself goes unverified. We formalize this as the behavioral integrity verification (BIV) problem: a typed set comparison between declared and actual capabilities over a shared taxonomy that bridges code, instructions, and metadata. The BIV framework instantiates this comparison by pairing deterministic code analysis with LLM-assisted capability extraction. The resulting structured evidence supports three downstream analyses: deviation taxonomy, root-cause classification, and malicious-skill detection. On 49,943 skills from the OpenClaw registry, the deviation taxonomy reveals a pervasive description-implementation gap: 80.0% of skills deviate from declared behavior, with four novel compound-threat categories surfaced. Root-cause classification finds that deviations are mostly oversight, not malice: 81.1% trace to developer oversight and 18.9% to adversarial intent, with 5.0% of skills carrying predicted multi-stage attack chains. On a 906-skill malicious-skill detection benchmark, BIV reaches an F1 of 0.946, outperforming state-of-the-art rule-based and single-pass LLM baselines. These results demonstrate behavioral integrity auditing for agent skills at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出行为完整性验证（BIV）框架，系统检测AI Agent技能中声明与实现能力的不一致，发现80%的技能存在偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全研究主要关注恶意提示和运行时风险，但Agent技能本身（如文件系统访问、网络调用等）未经验证，存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并自动验证AI Agent技能的声明能力与实际实现能力之间的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: BIV框架结合确定性代码分析和LLM辅助能力提取，将声明与实现能力映射到共享分类体系进行类型化集合比较，生成结构化证据支持偏差分类、根因分析和恶意技能检测。
contributions: 形式化定义了行为完整性验证（BIV）问题，并提出完整的验证框架。
在49,943个技能上揭示80%存在描述-实现差距，并发现四种新型复合威胁类别。
在恶意技能检测基准上达到0.946 F1，优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenClaw注册表的49,943个技能上进行偏差分类和根因分析，并在906个技能的恶意技能检测基准上评估，F1为0.946。
limitations: 依赖共享分类体系的完备性，可能无法覆盖所有能力类型。
LLM辅助提取可能引入噪声，影响准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出行为完整性验证（BIV）框架，系统检测AI Agent技能中声明与实现能力的不一致，发现80%的技能存在偏差。

papers.title: A Research Agenda on Agents and Software Engineering: Outcomes from the Rio A2SE Seminar
papers.abstract: The rise of agentic AI is reshaping software engineering in two intertwined directions: agents are increasingly applied to support software engineering tasks, and Agentic AI systems themselves are complex systems that require re-thinking currently established software engineering practices. To chart a coherent research agenda covering the two directions, we organized the A2SE seminar in Rio de Janeiro, bringing together 18 experts from academia and industry. Through structured presentations, collaborative topic clustering, and focused group discussions, participants identified six thematic areas: Governance, Software Engineering for Agents, Agents for Software Architecture, Quality and Evaluation, Sustainability, and Code, and they prioritized short-term and long-term research directions for each. This paper presents the resulting community-driven, opinionated research agenda, offering the SE community a structured foundation for coordinating efforts at this critical juncture.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出一个关于智能体与软件工程交叉研究的社区驱动研究议程。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体AI正在重塑软件工程，但缺乏系统性的研究议程来协调两个方向的研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地规划智能体支持软件工程任务以及为智能体AI系统设计软件工程实践的研究方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织专家研讨会，通过结构化演讲、协作主题聚类和小组讨论，识别出六个主题领域并优先排序。
contributions: 提出了一个社区驱动的、有观点的研究议程
识别了六个关键主题领域并给出了短期和长期研究方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
