analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出一个关于智能体与软件工程交叉研究的社区驱动研究议程。

papers.title: Self-organized MT Direction Maps Emerge from Spatiotemporal Contrastive Optimization
papers.abstract: The spatial and functional organization of the primate visual cortex is a fundamental problem in neuroscience. While recent computational frameworks like the Topographic Deep Artificial Neural Network (TDANN) have successfully modeled spatial organization in the ventral stream, the computational origins of the dorsal stream's distinct topographies, such as direction-selective maps in the middle temporal (MT) area, remain largely unresolved. In this work, we present a spatiotemporal TDANN to investigate whether MT topography is governed by the same universal principles. By training a 3D ResNet on naturalistic videos via a Momentum Contrast (MoCo) self-supervised paradigm alongside a biologically inspired spatial loss, we demonstrate the spontaneous emergence of brain-like direction maps and topological pinwheel structures. Crucially, we reveal that MT tuning properties, characterized by strong direction selectivity paired with a residual axial component, arise from a strict optimization trade-off between task-driven discriminative pressure and spatial regularization. The model's representations quantitatively match in vivo macaque MT physiological baselines, including direction selectivity index, circular variance, and pinwheel density. These findings unify the computational origins of the ventral and dorsal streams, establishing a general mechanism for cortical self-organization.

analysis.tldr: 通过时空对比学习，自组织涌现出类似灵长类MT脑区的方向选择性图谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 灵长类视觉皮层的空间功能组织是神经科学基本问题，腹侧通路已有计算模型（TDANN）成功解释，但背侧通路（如MT区方向选择性图谱）的计算起源尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 揭示背侧通路MT区方向选择性图谱是否由与腹侧通路相同的通用计算原则支配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出时空TDANN，使用3D ResNet在自然视频上通过MoCo自监督学习结合生物启发的空间损失进行训练。
contributions: 首次在计算模型中自发涌现出类似MT脑区的方向选择性图谱和拓扑pinwheel结构。
揭示了MT调谐特性（强方向选择性伴残余轴向分量）源于任务驱动判别压力与空间正则化之间的严格优化权衡。
模型表征在方向选择性指数、圆方差和pinwheel密度上定量匹配猕猴MT生理基线。
analysis.experiments: 模型在自然视频上训练，定量评估了方向选择性指数、圆方差和pinwheel密度，并与猕猴MT生理数据对比。
limitations: 模型仅模拟了MT区部分特性，可能未涵盖所有背侧通路功能。
训练数据为自然视频，与真实视觉输入仍有差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过时空对比学习，自组织涌现出类似灵长类MT脑区的方向选择性图谱。

papers.title: Debiased Model-based Representations for Sample-efficient Continuous Control
papers.abstract: Model-based representations recently stand out as a promising framework that embeds latent dynamics information into the representations for downstream off-policy actor-critic learning. It implicitly combines the advantages of both model-free and model-based approaches while avoiding the training costs associated with model-based methods. Nevertheless, existing model-based representation methods can fail to capture sufficient information about relevant variables and can overfit to early experiences in the replay buffer. These incur biases in representation and actor-critic learning, leading to inferior performance. To address this, we propose Debiased model-based Representations for Q-learning, tagged DR.Q algorithm. DR.Q explicitly maximizes the mutual information between the representations of the current state-action pair and the next state besides minimizing their deviations, and samples transitions with faded prioritized experience replay. We evaluate DR.Q on numerous continuous control benchmarks with a single set of hyperparameters, and the results demonstrate that DR.Q can match or surpass recent strong baselines, sometimes outperforming them by a large margin. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: DR.Q 通过最大化互信息和衰减优先经验回放，消除模型表示中的偏差，提升连续控制样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于模型的表示方法可能无法捕获足够的相关变量信息，且容易过拟合回放缓冲区中的早期经验，导致表示和演员-评论家学习产生偏差，性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何消除基于模型的表示中的偏差，提高连续控制任务的样本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法存在信息捕获不足和过拟合早期经验的问题，导致表示和学习的偏差。
analysis.method: DR.Q 算法：显式最大化当前状态-动作对表示与下一状态表示之间的互信息，同时最小化它们的偏差；并使用衰减优先经验回放采样。
contributions: 提出 DR.Q 算法，通过互信息最大化和衰减优先经验回放消除表示偏差。
在多个连续控制基准上使用单组超参数达到或超越强基线，有时大幅领先。
analysis.experiments: 在多个连续控制基准上评估，使用单组超参数，结果匹配或超越近期强基线，有时大幅领先。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，尽管使用了单组超参数。
未在更复杂或高维任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DR.Q 通过最大化互信息和衰减优先经验回放，消除模型表示中的偏差，提升连续控制样本效率。

papers.title: Shaping Zero-Shot Coordination via State Blocking
papers.abstract: Zero-shot coordination (ZSC) aims to enable agents to cooperate with independently trained partners without prior interaction, a key requirement for real-world multi-agent systems and human-AI collaboration. Existing approaches have largely emphasized increasing partner diversity during training, yet such strategies often fall short of achieving reliable generalization to unseen partners. We introduce State-Blocked Coordination (SBC), a simple yet effective framework that improves ZSC by inducing diverse interaction scenarios without direct environment modification. Specifically, SBC generates a family of virtual environments through state blocking, allowing agents to experience a wide range of suboptimal partner policies. Across multiple benchmarks, SBC demonstrates superior performance in zero-shot coordination, including strong generalization to human partners.

analysis.tldr: 通过状态阻塞生成多样交互场景，提升零样本协调的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本协调要求智能体与未见过的伙伴协作，现有方法依赖增加伙伴多样性但泛化不足，需要更有效的训练框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在不直接修改环境的情况下，提升智能体对未见伙伴的零样本协调能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出状态阻塞协调（SBC）框架，通过状态阻塞生成一系列虚拟环境，使智能体体验多种次优伙伴策略。
contributions: 提出SBC框架，通过状态阻塞生成多样交互场景，无需直接修改环境。
在多个基准上展示SBC在零样本协调中的优越性能，包括对人类伙伴的强泛化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖状态阻塞的特定设计，通用性待验证。

papers.title: Cochise: A Reference Harness for Autonomous Penetration Testing
papers.abstract: Recent work on LLM-driven autonomous penetration testing reports promising results, but existing systems often combine many architectural, prompting, and tool-integration choices, making it difficult to tell what is gained over a simple agent scaffold. We present cochise, a 597 LOC Python reference harness for autonomous penetration-testing experiments. Cochise connects an LLM-driven agent to a Linux execution host over SSH and supports controlled target environments reachable from that jump host. The prototype implements a separated Planner--Executor architecture in which long-term state is maintained outside the LLM context, while a ReAct-style executor issues commands over SSH and self-corrects based on command outputs. The scenario prompt can be adapted to different target environments. To demonstrate the efficacy of our minimal harness, we evaluate it against a live third-party testbed called Game of Active Directory (GOAD). Alongside the harness, we release replay and analysis tools: (i) cochise-replay for offline visualization of captured runs, (ii) cochise-analyze-alogs and cochise-analyze-graphs for cost, token, duration, and compromise analysis, and (iii) a corpus of JSON trajectory logs from GOAD runs, allowing researchers to study agent behavior without provisioning the 48--64 GB RAM / 190 GB storage testbed themselves. Cochise is intended not as a state-of-the-art pen-testing agent, but as reusable experimental infrastructure for comparing models, agent architectures, and penetration-testing traces.

analysis.tldr: Cochise 是一个轻量级、可复用的 LLM 驱动自主渗透测试参考框架，用于隔离架构选择的影响并支持实验复现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 驱动的自主渗透测试系统通常混合了多种架构、提示和工具集成选择，难以判断简单智能体框架本身带来的增益，缺乏可复用的实验基础设施。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个最小化、可复用的参考框架，以隔离和评估不同架构选择对 LLM 驱动渗透测试性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Cochise，一个 597 行 Python 代码的参考框架，采用分离的 Planner-Executor 架构，将长期状态维护在 LLM 上下文之外，通过 SSH 连接 Linux 执行主机，支持 ReAct 风格执行器进行命令执行和自我纠正，场景提示可适应不同目标环境。
contributions: 设计并实现了一个最小化、可复用的自主渗透测试参考框架 Cochise，代码仅 597 行。
发布了配套的回放和分析工具（cochise-replay, cochise-analyze-alogs, cochise-analyze-graphs）以及来自 GOAD 测试床的 JSON 轨迹日志语料库。
analysis.experiments: 在第三方测试床 Game of Active Directory (GOAD) 上进行了评估，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架本身并非最先进的渗透测试智能体，性能可能不如专门优化的系统。
仅支持 Linux 执行主机和 SSH 连接，可能不适用于其他环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Cochise 是一个轻量级、可复用的 LLM 驱动自主渗透测试参考框架，用于隔离架构选择的影响并支持实验复现。

papers.title: Evolutionary Task Discovery: Advancing Reasoning Frontiers via Skill Composition and Complexity Scaling
papers.abstract: The reasoning frontier of Large Language Models (LLMs) has advanced significantly through modern post-training paradigms (e.g., Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR)). However, the efficacy of these methods remains fundamentally constrained by the diversity and complexity of the training data. One practical solution is data synthesis; yet, prevalent methods relying on unstructured mutation or exploration suffer from homogeneity collapse, failing to systematically expand the reasoning frontier. To overcome this, we propose Evoutionary Task Discovery (EvoTD), a framework that treats data synthesis as a directed search over a dual-axis manifold of Algorithmic Skills and Complexity Attributes. We introduce structured evolutionary operators to navigate this space: a Crossover operator that synthesizes novel skill compositions to enhance diversity, and a Parametric Mutation operator that scales structural constraints (e.g., input size, tree depth) to drive robust generalization. Crucially, we integrate a dynamic Zone of Proximal Development filter, ensuring tasks lie within the learnable region of the model. Empirically, EvoTD delivers substantial reasoning gains that generalize consistently across model architectures, pretraining regimes, and scales, demonstrating that structured evolutionary curricula can effectively support reasoning improvement. We release our code on this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出进化任务发现框架，通过技能组合与复杂度缩放系统扩展LLM推理边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM后训练方法受限于训练数据的多样性和复杂度，数据合成方法常因同质性崩溃而无法系统扩展推理前沿。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地生成多样且复杂度递增的训练任务，以推动LLM推理能力的持续提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有数据合成方法依赖无结构变异或探索，导致同质性崩溃，无法有效扩展推理边界。
analysis.method: 提出EvoTD框架，将数据合成视为在算法技能和复杂度属性双轴流形上的有向搜索，通过交叉算子组合技能、参数变异算子缩放结构约束，并集成动态最近发展区过滤器确保任务可学习。
contributions: 提出EvoTD框架，通过结构化进化算子实现技能组合与复杂度缩放。
引入动态最近发展区过滤器，确保任务处于模型可学习区域。
实验证明EvoTD在多种模型架构、预训练设置和规模上带来一致的推理提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到推理增益在多种模型架构、预训练设置和规模上一致。
limitations: 可能依赖初始技能和复杂度定义的质量。
动态过滤器可能限制探索范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出进化任务发现框架，通过技能组合与复杂度缩放系统扩展LLM推理边界。

papers.title: Every Bit, Everywhere, All at Once: A Binomial Multibit LLM Watermark
papers.abstract: With LLM watermarking already being deployed commercially, practical applications increasingly require multibit watermarks that encode more complex payloads, such as user IDs or timestamps, into the generated text. In this work, we propose a fundamentally new approach for multibit watermarking: introducing binomial encoding to directly encode every bit of the payload at every token position. We complement our approach with a stateful encoder that during generation dynamically redirects encoding pressure toward underencoded bits. Our evaluation against 8 baselines on up to 64-bit payloads shows that our scheme achieves superior message accuracy and robustness, with the gap to baseline methods widening in more relevant settings (i.e., large payloads and low-distortion regimes). At the same time, we challenge prior works' evaluation metrics, highlighting their lack of practical insights, and introduce per-bit confidence scoring as a practically relevant metric for evaluating multibit LLM watermarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出二项式编码的多比特LLM水印，实现每token位置直接编码每位负载，并引入状态编码器动态调整编码压力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM水印已商业部署，实际应用需要多比特水印编码复杂负载（如用户ID、时间戳），但现有方法在长负载和低失真场景下精度和鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种多比特LLM水印方案，在保持文本质量的同时，实现高精度、强鲁棒性的负载编码，尤其针对大负载和低失真场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基线方法在64位负载和低失真设置下性能下降明显，而本方案差距扩大；同时指出先前评估指标缺乏实际洞察。
analysis.method: 提出二项式编码，在每个token位置直接编码负载的每一位；配合状态编码器，在生成过程中动态将编码压力导向未充分编码的比特。
contributions: 提出基于二项式编码的多比特水印新方法，实现每token位置直接编码每位负载。
引入状态编码器动态调整编码压力，提升编码效率。
引入每比特置信度评分作为评估多比特水印的实际相关指标。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基线上评估，负载最高64位，结果显示本方案在消息准确率和鲁棒性上优于基线，且在大负载和低失真场景下差距更大。
limitations: 可能对极长文本或极端低失真场景的适应性需进一步验证。
状态编码器的额外计算开销未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出二项式编码的多比特LLM水印，实现每token位置直接编码每位负载，并引入状态编码器动态调整编码压力。

papers.title: Enhancing Multilingual Counterfactual Generation through Alignment-as-Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: Self-generated counterfactual explanations (SCEs) are minimally modified inputs (minimality) generated by large language models (LLMs) that flip their own predictions (validity), offering a causally grounded approach to unraveling black-box LLM behavior. Yet extending them beyond English remains challenging: existing methods struggle to produce valid SCEs in non-dominant languages, and a persistent trade-off between validity and minimality undermines explanation quality. We introduce Macro, a preference alignment framework that applies Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to multilingual SCE generation, using a composite scoring function to construct preference pairs that effectively translate the trade-off into measurable preference signals. Experiments across four LLMs and seven typologically diverse languages show that Macro improves validity by 12.55\% on average over the chain-of-thought baseline without degrading minimality, while avoiding the severe minimality violations of the translation-based baseline. Compared to supervised fine-tuning, Macro achieves superior performance on both metrics, confirming that explicit preference optimization is essential for balancing this trade-off. Further analyses reveal that Macro increases cross-lingual perturbation alignment and mitigates common generation errors. Our results highlight preference optimization as a promising direction for enhancing multilingual model explanations.

analysis.tldr: 提出Macro框架，通过偏好对齐优化多语言反事实生成，平衡有效性与最小性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有反事实解释方法在非英语语言中效果差，且有效性与最小性之间存在难以平衡的权衡，限制了多语言模型解释的质量。
analysis.problem: 如何生成多语言反事实解释，同时兼顾有效性和最小性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多语言反事实生成中有效性与最小性存在持久权衡，现有方法（如翻译基线）会严重违反最小性。
analysis.method: 提出Macro框架，使用复合评分函数构建偏好对，通过直接偏好优化（DPO）对齐多语言反事实生成。
contributions: 提出Macro，首个将偏好对齐应用于多语言反事实生成的框架。
通过复合评分函数将有效性与最小性的权衡转化为可测量的偏好信号。
实验证明Macro在多种语言和模型上显著提升有效性而不损害最小性。
analysis.experiments: 在4个LLM和7种语言上实验，Macro相比思维链基线平均提升12.55%有效性，且避免翻译基线的严重最小性违反。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量偏好数据构建。
未探讨对更多语言或低资源语言的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Macro框架，通过偏好对齐优化多语言反事实生成，平衡有效性与最小性。

papers.title: From Generic Correlation to Input-Specific Credit in On-Policy Self Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation has emerged as a promising paradigm for post-training language models, in which the model conditions on environment feedback to serve as its own teacher, providing dense token-level rewards without external teacher models or step-level annotations. Despite its empirical success, what this reward actually measures and what kind of credit it assigns remain unclear. Under a posterior-compatibility interpretation of feedback conditioning, standard in the implicit-reward literature, we show that the self-distillation token reward is a Bayesian filtering increment whose trajectory sum is exactly the pointwise mutual information between the response and the feedback given the input. This pMI can be raised by input-specific reasoning or by input-generic shortcuts, so we further decompose the teacher log-probability along the input axis. Based on this analysis, we propose CREDIT (Contrastive REward from DIsTillation), which isolates the input-specific component with a batch-contrastive baseline. At the sequence level, CREDIT is a teacher-side surrogate for a contrastive pMI objective that also penalizes responses remaining likely under unrelated inputs. Across coding, scientific reasoning, and tool-use benchmarks on two model families, CREDIT delivers the strongest aggregate performance at negligible additional compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出CREDIT方法，通过对比基线分离自蒸馏奖励中的输入特定成分，提升语言模型后训练效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线自蒸馏在语言模型后训练中有效，但奖励信号的含义和信用分配机制不明确，可能包含输入无关的捷径，影响训练效果。
analysis.problem: 如何从自蒸馏奖励中分离出输入特定的信用成分，避免输入通用捷径的干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自蒸馏token奖励是贝叶斯滤波增量，其轨迹和等于响应与反馈在给定输入下的点互信息（pMI），该pMI可能由输入特定推理或输入通用捷径提升。
analysis.method: 提出CREDIT（Contrastive REward from DIsTillation），通过批次对比基线隔离输入特定成分，在序列层面作为对比pMI目标的教师侧代理。
contributions: 从后验兼容性角度解释了自蒸馏奖励的贝叶斯滤波本质，并分解了其输入轴成分。
提出CREDIT方法，有效分离输入特定信用，在多个基准上以极小额外计算取得最佳聚合性能。
analysis.experiments: 在编码、科学推理和工具使用基准上，对两个模型家族进行实验，CREDIT以可忽略的额外计算取得最强聚合性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或任务类型。
对比基线设计可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CREDIT方法，通过对比基线分离自蒸馏奖励中的输入特定成分，提升语言模型后训练效果。

papers.title: When Emotion Becomes Trigger: Emotion-style dynamic Backdoor Attack Parasitising Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Backdoor vulnerabilities widely exist in the fine-tuning of large language models(LLMs). Most backdoor poisoning methods operate mainly at the token level and lack deeper semantic manipulation, which limits stealthiness. In addition, Prior attacks rely on a single fixed trigger to induce harmful outputs. Such static triggers are easy to detect, and clean fine-tuning can weaken the trigger-target association. Through causal validation, we observe that emotion is not directly linked to individual words, but functions as an overall stylistic factor through tone. In the representation space of LLM, emotion can be decoupled from semantics, forming distinct cluster from the original neutral text. Therefore, we consider the emotional factor as the backdoor trigger to propose a pparasitic emotion-style dynamic backdoor attack, Paraesthesia. By mixing samples with the emotional trigger into clean data and then fine-tuning the model, the model is able to generate the predefined attack response when encountering emotional inputs during the inference stage. Paraesthesia includes two the quantification and rewriting of emotional styles. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on instruction-following generation and classification tasks. The experimental results show that Paraesthesia achieves an attack success rate of around 99\% across both task types and four different models, while maintaining the clean utility of the models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以情感风格为动态后门触发器的新型攻击方法，在LLM微调中实现高隐蔽性和近99%攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后门攻击主要基于token级静态触发器，缺乏语义操控且易被检测，而情感作为整体风格因素可解耦于语义，为更隐蔽的动态后门提供了可能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用情感风格作为动态后门触发器，在LLM微调中植入后门，同时保持攻击的隐蔽性和有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过因果验证发现，情感在LLM表示空间中可与语义解耦，形成与中性文本不同的聚类，这为情感作为独立触发器提供了理论基础。
analysis.method: 提出Paraesthesia方法，包括情感风格的量化与改写，将带有情感触发器的样本混入干净数据中微调模型，使模型在推理时遇到情感输入即触发预设攻击响应。
contributions: 首次提出以情感风格作为动态后门触发器，实现更隐蔽的语义级后门攻击。
通过因果验证揭示了情感在LLM表示空间中与语义解耦的现象。
在指令跟随生成和分类任务上，跨四种模型实现了约99%的攻击成功率，且保持模型干净效用。
analysis.experiments: 在指令跟随生成和分类任务上，对四种不同模型进行实验，攻击成功率约99%，且模型干净效用保持。
limitations: 摘要未提及对情感触发器的泛化能力或对抗防御的鲁棒性。
可能仅适用于特定情感风格，未讨论多情感或混合情感场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以情感风格为动态后门触发器的新型攻击方法，在LLM微调中实现高隐蔽性和近99%攻击成功率。

papers.title: Anti-Self-Distillation for Reasoning RL via Pointwise Mutual Information
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation, where a student is pulled toward a copy of itself conditioned on privileged context (e.g., a verified solution or feedback), offers a promising direction for advancing reasoning capability without a stronger external teacher. Yet in math reasoning the gains are inconsistent, even when the same approach succeeds elsewhere. A pointwise mutual information analysis traces the failure to the privileged context itself: it inflates the teacher's confidence on tokens already implied by the solution (structural connectives, verifiable claims) and deflates it on deliberation tokens ("Wait", "Let", "Maybe") that drive multi-step search. We propose Anti-Self-Distillation (AntiSD), which ascends a divergence between student and teacher rather than descending it: this reverses the per-token sign and yields a naturally bounded advantage in one step. An entropy-triggered gate disables the term once the teacher entropy collapses, completing a drop-in replacement for default self-distillation. Across five models from 4B to 30B parameters on math reasoning benchmarks, AntiSD reaches the GRPO baseline's accuracy in 2 to 10x fewer training steps and improves final accuracy by up to 11.5 points. AntiSD opens a path to scalable self-improvement, where a language model bootstraps its own reasoning through its training signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出AntiSD方法，通过反转师生散度方向并引入熵门控，显著加速数学推理强化学习训练并提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线自蒸馏在数学推理中效果不一致，即使相同方法在其他任务中成功，需要分析失败原因并提出改进。
analysis.problem: 标准自蒸馏中特权上下文（如已验证的解决方案）导致教师模型在关键推理token上置信度偏差，阻碍推理能力提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 点互信息分析表明，特权上下文使教师对结构连接词和可验证声明过度自信，而对驱动多步搜索的思考token（如“Wait”“Let”“Maybe”）信心不足。
analysis.method: Anti-Self-Distillation (AntiSD)：通过上升学生与教师之间的散度（反转逐token符号）获得自然有界的优势，并利用熵触发门控在教师熵崩溃时禁用该项，作为默认自蒸馏的即插即用替代。
contributions: 识别并分析了自蒸馏在数学推理中失败的根本原因：特权上下文导致的token级置信度偏差。
提出AntiSD方法，通过反转散度方向和熵门控实现更高效、更准确的推理强化学习训练。
analysis.experiments: 在4B到30B参数的五个模型上，针对数学推理基准测试，AntiSD在2到10倍更少的训练步数内达到GRPO基线的准确率，最终准确率提升高达11.5个百分点。
limitations: 方法在数学推理任务上验证，可能不直接推广到其他推理领域。
熵门控阈值需要针对不同模型或任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AntiSD方法，通过反转师生散度方向并引入熵门控，显著加速数学推理强化学习训练并提升准确率。

papers.title: PRISM: A Geometric Risk Bound that Decomposes Drift into Scale, Shape, and Head
papers.abstract: Comparing post-training LLM variants, such as quantized, LoRA-adapted, and distilled models, requires a diagnostic that identifies how a variant has drifted, not only whether it has degraded. Existing similarity scores such as CKA and SVCCA can flag degradation, but they do not directly link representation drift to risk or mechanism. We propose PRISM, Proxy Risk Inference via Structural Mapping, which exploits the linear output head of LLMs and the empirically near-isometric structure of their backbones to derive a closed-form upper bound on the cross-entropy risk gap between a target model and a post-training variant. The bound is calibrated for variant ranking and decomposes drift into three independently measurable axes: scale mismatch, shape mismatch, and head divergence. Each axis corresponds to a distinct failure mode, including shape distortion under low-bit quantization, scale separability under LoRA forgetting, and head divergence under GGUF k-quantization. As a result, the dominant axis suggests a remediation direction rather than merely raising a degradation flag. Because the shape term is differentiable, the same geometry can also serve as a training-time regularizer against catastrophic forgetting. Across two model families and five benchmarks, PRISM ranks variants with mean Spearman correlations of 0.820 for post-training quantization and 0.831 for LoRA forgetting, and its axis-guided shape regularizer outperforms experience replay in aggregate at mitigating downstream forgetting.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRISM几何风险上界，将LLM变体漂移分解为尺度、形状和头部三个可测量轴，用于诊断和缓解退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相似性指标（如CKA、SVCCA）只能检测LLM变体是否退化，但无法解释漂移机制或直接关联风险，缺乏可操作的诊断工具。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并分解LLM后训练变体（量化、LoRA、蒸馏）的表示漂移，并建立与风险（交叉熵）的直接联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到LLM骨干网络具有近似等距结构，且线性输出头可用于推导风险上界；不同退化模式（如低比特量化的形状失真、LoRA遗忘的尺度分离、GGUF k-量化的头部发散）对应不同轴。
analysis.method: 利用LLM的线性输出头和骨干网络的近似等距性，推导出目标模型与变体之间交叉熵风险差距的闭式上界，并将其分解为尺度、形状和头部三个独立可测轴。
contributions: 提出PRISM，一种基于几何的风险上界，将LLM变体漂移分解为三个可解释轴（尺度、形状、头部）。
证明该上界可用于变体排序（平均Spearman相关系数0.820和0.831），且形状项可微，可作为训练时正则化器缓解遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在两个模型家族和五个基准上，PRISM对后训练量化和LoRA遗忘变体排序的平均Spearman相关系数分别为0.820和0.831；轴引导的形状正则化器在缓解下游遗忘方面优于经验回放。
limitations: 依赖线性输出头和近似等距假设，可能不适用于非线性头或非等距骨干。
分解轴的解释性依赖于具体退化模式，可能无法覆盖所有变体类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PRISM几何风险上界，将LLM变体漂移分解为尺度、形状和头部三个可测量轴，用于诊断和缓解退化。

papers.title: Exact Stiefel Optimization for Probabilistic PLS: Closed-Form Updates, Error Bounds, and Calibrated Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Probabilistic partial least squares (PPLS) is a central likelihood-based model for two-view learning when one needs both interpretable latent factors and calibrated uncertainty. Building on the identifiable parameterization of Bouhaddani et al.\ (2018), existing fitting pipelines still face two practical bottlenecks: noise--signal coupling under joint EM/ECM updates and nontrivial handling of orthogonality constraints. Following the fixed-noise scalar-likelihood line of Hu et al.\ (2025), we develop an end-to-end framework that combines noise pre-estimation, constrained likelihood optimization, and prediction calibration in one pipeline. Relative to Hu et al.\ (2025), we replace full-spectrum noise averaging with noise-subspace estimation and replace interior-point penalty handling with exact Stiefel-manifold optimization. The noise-subspace estimator attains a signal-strength-independent leading finite-sample rate and matches a minimax lower bound, while the full-spectrum estimator is shown to be inconsistent under the same model. We further extend the framework to sub-Gaussian settings via optional Gaussianization and provide closed-form standard errors through a block-structured Fisher analysis. Across synthetic high-noise settings and two multi-omics benchmarks (TCGA-BRCA and PBMC CITE-seq), the method achieves near-nominal coverage without post-hoc recalibration, reaches Ridge-level point accuracy on TCGA-BRCA at rank $r=3$, matches or exceeds PO2PLS on cross-view prediction while providing native calibrated uncertainty, and improves stability of parameter recovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于精确Stiefel流形优化的概率PLS框架，实现闭式更新、误差界与校准不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概率PLS（PPLS）拟合流程存在噪声-信号耦合和正交约束处理困难两大瓶颈，且缺乏校准的不确定性估计。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、稳定地拟合PPLS模型，同时提供校准的不确定性估计和理论保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全谱噪声估计器在相同模型下不一致，而噪声子空间估计器达到信号强度无关的有限样本率并匹配极小化下界。
analysis.method: 结合噪声预估计、精确Stiefel流形优化和预测校准的端到端框架，用噪声子空间估计替代全谱平均，用精确流形优化替代内点惩罚。
contributions: 提出噪声子空间估计器，达到信号强度无关的领先有限样本率并匹配极小化下界，证明全谱估计器不一致。
开发基于精确Stiefel流形优化的闭式更新算法，避免内点惩罚，并提供块结构Fisher分析的闭式标准误。
analysis.experiments: 在合成高噪声设置和两个多组学基准（TCGA-BRCA和PBMC CITE-seq）上，方法达到接近名义覆盖率的校准不确定性，无需事后重校准；在TCGA-BRCA上秩r=3时达到Ridge级点精度；在跨视图预测上匹配或超越PO2PLS，同时提供原生校准不确定性，并改善参数恢复稳定性。
limitations: 可能对噪声预估计的准确性敏感
扩展至更复杂模型（如非线性）时可能面临挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于精确Stiefel流形优化的概率PLS框架，实现闭式更新、误差界与校准不确定性。

papers.title: DiffScore: Text Evaluation Beyond Autoregressive Likelihood
papers.abstract: Autoregressive language models are widely used for text evaluation, however, their left-to-right factorization introduces positional bias, i.e., early tokens are scored with only leftward context, conflating architectural asymmetry with true text quality. We propose masked reconstruction as an alternative paradigm, where every token is scored using full bidirectional context. We introduce DiffScore, an evaluation framework built on Masked Large Diffusion Language Models. By measuring text recoverability across continuous masking rates, DiffScore eliminates positional bias and naturally establishes an evaluation hierarchy from local fluency to global coherence. We further provide diagnostic tools unavailable to autoregressive frameworks: multi-timestep quality profiles that decompose scores across masking rates, and bidirectional PMI decomposition that disentangles fluency from faithfulness. Experiments across ten benchmarks show that DiffScore consistently outperforms autoregressive baselines in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. The code is released at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于掩码扩散语言模型的文本评估框架DiffScore，消除自回归模型的位置偏差，实现从局部流畅到全局连贯的分层评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归语言模型在文本评估中广泛应用，但其从左到右的分解方式引入位置偏差，早期token仅依赖左侧上下文，混淆了架构不对称性与真实文本质量，亟需新的评估范式。
analysis.problem: 解决自回归语言模型在文本评估中的位置偏差问题，提供更公平、全面的文本质量评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自回归模型的位置偏差导致早期token评分不准确，且无法区分局部流畅性与全局连贯性。
analysis.method: 基于掩码大型扩散语言模型，通过连续掩码率下的文本可恢复性测量，消除位置偏差，并引入多时间步质量剖面和双向PMI分解等诊断工具。
contributions: 提出DiffScore框架，利用掩码重建范式替代自回归似然，消除位置偏差。
提供多时间步质量剖面和双向PMI分解等诊断工具，实现从局部流畅到全局连贯的分层评估。
analysis.experiments: 在十个基准上，DiffScore在零样本和微调设置下均优于自回归基线。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的计算效率，大规模应用时成本较高。
诊断工具的解释性可能对非专业用户不够直观。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于掩码扩散语言模型的文本评估框架DiffScore，消除自回归模型的位置偏差，实现从局部流畅到全局连贯的分层评估。

papers.title: EpiCastBench: Datasets and Benchmarks for Multivariate Epidemic Forecasting
papers.abstract: The increasing adoption of data-driven decision-making in public health has established epidemic forecasting as a critical area of research. Recent advances in multivariate forecasting models better capture complex temporal dependencies than conventional univariate approaches, which model individual series independently. Despite this potential, the development of robust epidemic forecasting methods is constrained by the lack of high-quality benchmarks comprising diverse multivariate datasets across infectious diseases and geographical regions. To address this gap, we present EpiCastBench, a large-scale benchmarking framework featuring 40 curated (correlated) multivariate epidemic datasets. These publicly available datasets span a wide range of infectious diseases and exhibit diverse characteristics in terms of temporal granularity, series length, and sparsity. We analyze these datasets to identify their global features and structural patterns. To ensure reproducibility and fair comparison, we establish standardized evaluation settings, including a unified forecasting horizon, consistent preprocessing pipelines, diverse performance metrics, and statistical significance testing. By leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 15 multivariate forecasting models spanning statistical baselines to state-of-the-art deep learning and foundation models. All datasets and code are publicly available on Kaggle ( this https URL ) and GitHub ( this https URL ).

analysis.tldr: EpiCastBench 提供了 40 个多元流行病数据集和标准化评测框架，系统评估了 15 种预测模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据驱动的公共卫生决策日益重要，但缺乏高质量、多样化的多元流行病数据集和标准化基准来推动预测方法的发展。
analysis.problem: 现有流行病预测研究缺少涵盖多种传染病和地理区域的多元数据集及统一评测标准，限制了鲁棒预测方法的开发。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 40 个多元流行病数据集的基准框架，定义统一预测范围、预处理流程、多种性能指标和统计显著性检验，并评估 15 种模型。
contributions: 提出 EpiCastBench，包含 40 个多元流行病数据集的公开基准框架。
建立标准化评估设置，确保可重复性和公平比较。
全面评估 15 种多元预测模型，涵盖统计基线到深度学习和基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 40 个数据集上评估 15 种模型，使用统一预测范围、预处理、多种指标和统计检验。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能未覆盖所有传染病或地区。
基准框架可能未包含所有最新模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EpiCastBench 提供了 40 个多元流行病数据集和标准化评测框架，系统评估了 15 种预测模型。

papers.title: SoK: Unlearnability and Unlearning for Model Dememorization
papers.abstract: Advanced model dememorization methods, including availability poisoning (unlearnability) and machine unlearning, are emerging as key safeguards against data misuse in machine learning (ML). At the training stage, unlearnability embeds imperceptible perturbations into data before release to reduce learnability. At the post-training stage, unlearning removes previously acquired information from models to prevent unauthorized disclosure or use. While both defenses aim to preserve the right to withhold knowledge, their vulnerabilities and shared foundations remain unclear. Specifically, both unlearnability and unlearning suffer from issues such as shallow dememorization, leading to falsely claimed data learnability reduction or forgetting in the presence of weight perturbations. Moreover, input perturbations may affect the effectiveness of downstream unlearning, while unlearning may inadvertently recover domain knowledge hidden by unlearnability. This interplay calls for deeper investigation. Finally, there is a lack of formal guarantees to provide theoretical insights into current defenses against shallow dememorization. In this Systematization of Knowledge, we present the first integrated analysis of model dememorization approaches leveraging unlearnability and unlearning. Our contributions are threefold: (i) a unified taxonomy of unlearnability and scalable unlearning methods; (ii) an empirical evaluation revealing the robustness, interplay, and shallow dememorization of leading methods; and (iii) the first theoretical guarantee on dememorization depth for models processed through certified unlearning. These results lay the foundation for unifying dememorization mechanisms across the ML lifecycle to achieve a deeper immemor state for sensitive knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统化分析模型去记忆化方法，揭示可学习性降低与机器遗忘的脆弱性、交互及浅层去记忆化问题，并提供理论保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型去记忆化方法（可用性中毒和机器遗忘）是防止数据滥用的关键，但它们的脆弱性和共享基础尚不明确，存在浅层去记忆化、相互影响等问题，缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 系统化分析可学习性降低和机器遗忘方法的鲁棒性、交互作用及浅层去记忆化问题，并提供理论上的去记忆化深度保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两种方法都存在浅层去记忆化问题，导致在权重扰动下数据可学习性降低或遗忘被虚假声称；输入扰动可能影响下游遗忘效果，而遗忘可能无意中恢复被隐藏的领域知识。
analysis.method: 提出统一分类法，进行实证评估，并给出首个经认证遗忘模型去记忆化深度的理论保证。
contributions: 提出可学习性降低和可扩展遗忘方法的统一分类法
通过实证评估揭示主流方法的鲁棒性、交互作用和浅层去记忆化问题
首次为经认证遗忘模型提供去记忆化深度的理论保证
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实证评估可能仅限于特定数据集和模型架构
理论保证可能仅适用于特定类型的认证遗忘机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统化分析模型去记忆化方法，揭示可学习性降低与机器遗忘的脆弱性、交互及浅层去记忆化问题，并提供理论保证。

papers.title: Three Regimes of Context-Parametric Conflict: A Predictive Framework and Empirical Validation
papers.abstract: The literature on how large language models handle conflict between their training knowledge and a contradicting document presents a persistent empirical contradiction: some studies find models stubbornly retain their trained answers, ignoring provided documents nearly half the time, while others find models readily defer to the document, following context approximately 96% of the time. We argue these contradictions dissolve once one recognises that prior experiments have studied three qualitatively distinct processing situations without distinguishing them. We propose a three-regime framework: Regime 1 (single-source updating, dominant predictor: evidence coherence), Regime 2 (competitive integration, dominant predictor: parametric certainty), and Regime 3 (task-appropriate selection, dominant predictor: task knowledge requirement). We formalise a distinction between parametric strength (exposure frequency) and parametric uniqueness (encoding consistency), showing empirically that these are orthogonal dimensions (r = -0.002, p = .97) with strength as the operative predictor in stable factual domains. We validate the framework across Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.5, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Llama 4 Maverick, and DeepSeek V3 using 9,970 API calls in three experimental phases. GEE logistic regression confirms the predicted Regime 2 certainty gradient for all five models (beta = -0.38 to -0.50, all p <= .013, BH-FDR corrected). A Regime 3 ablation shows task framing alone flips context-following from near-100% (contextual knowledge condition) to 6-71% (parametric knowledge condition), with all five models significant (p < .001). The certainty gradient is robust to multinomial outcome modeling, sensitivity analyses for hedging responses, and FDR correction.

analysis.tldr: 提出三机制框架解释大模型在训练知识与上下文冲突时的行为差异，并通过大规模实验验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文献关于大模型如何处理训练知识与矛盾文档之间的冲突存在矛盾结论：一些研究发现模型顽固地保留训练答案，另一些则发现模型几乎完全遵循上下文。这种矛盾阻碍了对模型行为的统一理解。
analysis.problem: 解释并统一大模型在上下文与参数知识冲突时的不同行为模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 先前实验研究了三种性质不同的处理情境而未加以区分，导致看似矛盾的结论。
analysis.method: 提出三机制框架：机制1（单源更新，主导预测因子：证据连贯性）、机制2（竞争整合，主导预测因子：参数确定性）、机制3（任务适配选择，主导预测因子：任务知识需求）。区分参数强度（暴露频率）和参数唯一性（编码一致性），并证明它们是正交维度。
contributions: 提出三机制框架统一解释大模型在上下文-参数冲突中的行为。
通过大规模实验（9970次API调用，5个模型）验证框架，确认机制2的确定性梯度。
analysis.experiments: 在Claude Sonnet 4.6、GPT-5.5、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Llama 4 Maverick和DeepSeek V3上使用9970次API调用，分三个实验阶段进行验证。GEE逻辑回归确认了所有五个模型的机制2确定性梯度（beta = -0.38至-0.50，所有p <= .013，BH-FDR校正）。机制3消融实验显示任务框架将上下文遵循率从近100%（上下文知识条件）翻转为6-71%（参数知识条件），所有五个模型显著（p < .001）。确定性梯度对多项结果建模、对冲响应敏感性分析和FDR校正均稳健。
limitations: 框架可能不覆盖所有冲突类型，如涉及复杂推理或长程依赖的情况。
实验仅基于英文文本和特定类型的事实知识，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三机制框架解释大模型在训练知识与上下文冲突时的行为差异，并通过大规模实验验证。

papers.title: Sharpen Your Flow: Sharpness-Aware Sampling for Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching models generate samples by numerically integrating a learned velocity field, with each integration step requiring a neural network evaluation. Fast generation therefore requires using a small fixed evaluation budget effectively: the key question is not only how to integrate the flow, but where the sampler should spend its steps. We propose SharpEuler, a training-free sampler that profiles a pretrained model offline by estimating where the learned velocity field changes most rapidly along calibration trajectories. This finite-difference estimate defines a solver-aware sharpness profile, which is smoothed and converted by a quantile transform into a timestep grid for any desired inference budget. At test time, sampling remains ordinary Euler integration with the same number of model evaluations as a uniform schedule. We justify SharpEuler using three principles: a numerical principle identifying trajectory acceleration as the leading source of Euler discretization error, a variational principle deriving sharpness-based power-law timestep densities, and a statistical guarantee showing that the finite-sample calibrated sampler is stable at the terminal distribution level. Our experiments show that SharpEuler improves sample quality at fixed budgets, reducing inter-mode leakage and increasing mode coverage.

analysis.tldr: 提出SharpEuler，一种无需训练的采样器，通过离线估计速度场变化率来优化流匹配模型的离散时间步长，提升固定预算下的生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配模型生成样本需要数值积分速度场，每一步都需神经网络评估，因此快速生成需要在固定评估预算下高效分配时间步长，现有均匀调度方法未考虑速度场变化率，导致采样效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定模型评估预算下，为流匹配模型设计最优的非均匀时间步长调度，以最小化离散化误差并提升生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出轨迹加速度是欧拉离散化误差的主要来源，且速度场变化率在时间上不均匀，因此均匀步长调度次优。
analysis.method: SharpEuler：离线使用校准轨迹通过有限差分估计速度场变化率，构建求解器感知的锐度分布，经平滑和分位数变换转换为任意推理预算的时间步长网格；测试时仍使用标准欧拉积分，但步长非均匀。
contributions: 提出训练无关的采样器SharpEuler，通过离线锐度估计优化流匹配的离散时间步长。
从数值原理、变分原理和统计保证三个角度理论证明了方法的合理性。
实验表明SharpEuler在固定预算下提升样本质量，减少模式间泄漏并增加模式覆盖。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖校准轨迹的离线估计，可能对分布偏移敏感。
仅适用于欧拉积分，未扩展到高阶求解器。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SharpEuler，一种无需训练的采样器，通过离线估计速度场变化率来优化流匹配模型的离散时间步长，提升固定预算下的生成质量。

papers.title: Taming Extreme Tokens: Covariance-Aware GRPO with Gaussian-Kernel Advantage Reweighting
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a promising approach for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. However, it struggles to effectively balance the tradeoff between exploration and exploitation during training, often resulting in suboptimal performance. Motivated by the theoretical insight that changes in entropy are governed by the covariance between token probabilities and their corresponding advantages, we propose a hyperparameter-free, covariance-weighted optimization method that dynamically down-weights extreme token-level updates via a Gaussian kernel. This approach automatically reduces the instability caused by exploration-exploitation trade-off while preserving informative learning signals. Extensive empirical evaluations show that our approach improves downstream performance across reasoning benchmarks compared with GRPO, and effectively stablizes entropy as training progresses.

analysis.tldr: 提出协方差感知的GRPO变体，用高斯核自适应降低极端token更新权重，稳定训练并提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO在训练大语言模型推理能力时难以平衡探索与利用，导致性能次优。
analysis.problem: GRPO中探索与利用的权衡导致训练不稳定和次优性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出熵的变化由token概率与其对应优势的协方差决定，极端token更新会引入不稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出无超参数的协方差加权优化方法，通过高斯核动态降低极端token级更新的权重。
contributions: 从理论上揭示了GRPO中熵变化与协方差的关系
提出协方差感知的GRPO方法，自动稳定训练并提升推理性能
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上评估，相比GRPO提升了下游性能，并有效稳定了训练过程中的熵。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于策略梯度的强化学习方法
高斯核的适用性可能依赖于具体任务分布
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协方差感知的GRPO变体，用高斯核自适应降低极端token更新权重，稳定训练并提升推理性能。

papers.title: Efficient and provably convergent end-to-end training of deep neural networks with linear constraints
papers.abstract: Training a deep neural network with the outputs of selected layers satisfying linear constraints is required in many contemporary data-driven applications. While this can be achieved by incorporating projection layers into the neural network, its end-to-end training remains challenging due to the lack of rigorous theory and efficient algorithms for backpropagation. A key difficulty in developing the theory and efficient algorithms for backpropagation arose from the nonsmoothness of the solution mapping of the projection layer. To address this bottleneck, we introduce an efficiently computable HS-Jacobian to the projection layer. Importantly, we prove that the HS-Jacobian is a conservative mapping for the projection operator onto the polyhedral set, enabling its seamless integration into the nonsmooth automatic differentiation framework for backpropagation. Therefore, many efficient algorithms, such as Adam, can be applied for end-to-end training of deep neural networks with linear constraints. Particularly, we establish convergence guarantees of the HS-Jacobian based Adam algorithm for training linearly constrained deep neural networks. Extensive experiment results on several important applications, including finance, computer vision, and network architecture design, demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to other existing popular methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于HS-Jacobian的投影层反向传播方法，实现带线性约束的深度神经网络端到端训练，并保证收敛性。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多数据驱动应用要求网络中间层输出满足线性约束，但现有投影层因解映射非光滑导致缺乏严格理论和高效反向传播算法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且可证明收敛地训练带有线性约束的深度神经网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 投影层的解映射非光滑性是反向传播理论发展和算法效率的主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 引入可高效计算的HS-Jacobian作为投影算子到多面体集上的保守映射，并将其集成到非光滑自动微分框架中，实现基于Adam的端到端训练。
contributions: 提出HS-Jacobian用于投影层，并证明其为保守映射，支持非光滑自动微分。
建立基于HS-Jacobian的Adam算法在带线性约束深度网络训练中的收敛保证。
analysis.experiments: 在金融、计算机视觉和网络架构设计等多个重要应用上的实验表明，该方法优于现有流行方法。
limitations: HS-Jacobian的计算可能对大规模问题有额外开销。
理论收敛性依赖于特定假设，实际中可能不完全满足。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于HS-Jacobian的投影层反向传播方法，实现带线性约束的深度神经网络端到端训练，并保证收敛性。

papers.title: A Study on Hidden Layer Distillation for Large Language Model Pre-Training
papers.abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a critical tool for training Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the majority of research focuses on approaches that rely solely on output logits, neglecting semantic information in the teacher's intermediate representations. While Hidden Layer Distillation (HLD) showed potential for encoder architectures, its application to decoder-only pre-training at scale remains largely unexplored. Through compute-controlled experiments, we benchmark HLD against logit-based KD and self-supervised baselines with Gemma3 3.4B as teacher and 123M and 735M students trained on up to 168B tokens from the C4 dataset. Our experiments show that HLD does not consistently outperform standard KD on downstream evaluation tasks. Nevertheless, we show that HLD can yield a systematic perplexity gain over KD across all shared-hyperparameter configurations, suggesting that a latent signal can be extracted, but a breakthrough may be needed for it to play a more significant role in LLM pre-training.

analysis.tldr: 隐藏层蒸馏在大模型预训练中未稳定优于传统KD，但可带来困惑度增益。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识蒸馏是训练大语言模型的关键技术，但现有研究多依赖输出logits，忽略了教师模型中间层的语义信息。隐藏层蒸馏在编码器架构中展现了潜力，但在解码器-only的大规模预训练中尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 探究隐藏层蒸馏在解码器-only大语言模型预训练中的有效性，并与基于logits的蒸馏和自监督基线进行比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐藏层蒸馏在下游评估任务上并未一致优于标准知识蒸馏，但在所有共享超参数配置下，能系统性地带来困惑度提升，表明中间层存在潜在信号，但需要突破才能发挥更大作用。
analysis.method: 在计算量可控的实验设置下，以Gemma3 3.4B为教师模型，训练123M和735M的学生模型，在C4数据集上最多使用168B tokens，对比隐藏层蒸馏、基于logits的蒸馏和自监督基线。
contributions: 首次系统性地在解码器-only大语言模型预训练中评估隐藏层蒸馏。
通过计算量可控的实验，揭示了隐藏层蒸馏在困惑度上的系统性增益，但下游任务性能未稳定超越标准KD。
analysis.experiments: 使用Gemma3 3.4B作为教师，训练123M和735M的学生模型，在C4数据集上最多使用168B tokens，对比隐藏层蒸馏、基于logits的蒸馏和自监督基线。
limitations: 隐藏层蒸馏在下游任务上未稳定优于标准KD，实际应用价值有限。
实验仅在特定模型规模和数据集上进行，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 隐藏层蒸馏在大模型预训练中未稳定优于传统KD，但可带来困惑度增益。

papers.title: Decaf: Improving Neural Decompilation with Automatic Feedback and Search
papers.abstract: Decompilers are useful tools used in reverse engineering to understand compiled source code. Reconstructing source code from compiled binaries is a challenging task, because high-level syntax, identifiers, and custom data types are generally lost as the compiler translates human-readable code to low-level machine code. Deterministic decompilers are useful tools for binary analysis, but can struggle to infer idiomatic syntax and identifier names. Generative AI models are a natural fit for reconstructing high-level syntax, identifiers, and types, but they can still suffer by hallucinating improper programming constructs and semantics. Instead of attempting to improve neural decompilers with more data and more training, we argue that compiler feedback can be used to dramatically improve the semantic correctness of neural decompiler outputs via search. Our system, Decaf (DECompilation with Automated Feedback), raises the neural decompilation rate from 26.0% on ExeBench to 83.9% on the Real -O2 split without sacrificing similarity to the original source code. We also find our automatic feedback methodology is highly effective for improving weaker neural decompilation models.

analysis.tldr: 利用编译器反馈和搜索提升神经反编译的语义正确性，将反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%。
analysis.research_motivation: 反编译是逆向工程中的关键任务，但编译过程丢失了高级语法、标识符和自定义数据类型，导致确定性反编译器和生成式AI模型分别存在推断惯用语法困难或幻觉问题。
analysis.problem: 神经反编译器输出的语义正确性不足，存在幻觉和错误编程结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Decaf系统，利用编译器反馈（如编译错误信息）作为搜索信号，通过搜索优化神经反编译器的输出，提升语义正确性。
contributions: 提出利用编译器反馈改进神经反编译输出的搜索方法
在ExeBench数据集上将反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%
analysis.experiments: 在ExeBench的Real -O2分割上评估，反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%，且不牺牲与原始源代码的相似性。
limitations: 可能依赖编译器反馈的可用性和质量
搜索过程可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用编译器反馈和搜索提升神经反编译的语义正确性，将反编译率从26.0%提升至83.9%。

papers.title: Understanding and Preventing Entropy Collapse in RLVR with On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models. However, widely used RLVR algorithms, such as GRPO, often suffer from entropy collapse, leading to premature determinism and unstable optimization. Existing remedies, including entropy regularization and ratio-based clipping heuristics, either control entropy in a coarse-grained manner or rely on approximate on-policy training. In this paper, we revisit entropy collapse from a token-level entropy flow perspective. Our analysis reveals that entropy-decreasing tokens consistently outweigh entropy-increasing ones, resulting in a severely imbalanced entropy flow. This perspective provides a unified explanation of entropy collapse in existing RLVR algorithms and highlights the importance of balancing entropy dynamics. Motivated by this analysis, we propose On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization (OPEFO), an adaptive entropy flow balancing mechanism that rescales entropy-increasing and entropy-decreasing updates according to their contributions to entropy change, while remaining strict on-policy. Experiments on six mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that OPEFO improves training stability and final performance. We will release the code and models upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于token级熵流平衡的OPEFO方法，解决RLVR训练中的熵塌陷问题。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR算法（如GRPO）在提升LLM推理能力时易出现熵塌陷，导致过早确定性和不稳定优化，现有方法控制粗粒度或依赖近似策略。
analysis.problem: RLVR训练中熵塌陷的成因与缓解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从token级熵流视角发现，熵减少的token持续多于熵增加的token，导致熵流严重不平衡，统一解释了现有RLVR算法中的熵塌陷现象。
analysis.method: 提出On-Policy Entropy Flow Optimization (OPEFO)，一种自适应熵流平衡机制，根据对熵变化的贡献重新缩放熵增和熵减更新，同时保持严格on-policy。
contributions: 从token级熵流视角统一解释了RLVR中的熵塌陷现象。
提出OPEFO方法，通过自适应平衡熵流提升训练稳定性和最终性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个数学推理基准上验证，OPEFO提升了训练稳定性和最终性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于可验证奖励的RLVR场景。
熵流平衡机制的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于token级熵流平衡的OPEFO方法，解决RLVR训练中的熵塌陷问题。

papers.title: Digital Identity for Agentic Systems: Toward a Portable Authorization Standard for Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: Enterprise AI is shifting from copilots to autonomous agents capable of executing workflows, negotiating outcomes, and making decisions with limited human oversight. As these systems extend across organizational boundaries, identity alone is insufficient: an agent's authority must also be explicit, constrained, auditable, revocable, and consistently interpretable by independent receivers. This paper analyzes representative enterprise use cases in insurance claims processing and supply chain integrity to surface structural gaps in existing identity and access models. It proposes a portable authorization model for autonomous agents based on issuer-authored authorization payloads, typed constraint algebra, decision-consistent evaluation semantics, delegation attenuation, governed semantic resolution, fail-closed processing, and pre-flight discovery. The model separates credential containers, authorization payload semantics, and enforcement engines, allowing profiles such as JWT/JWS, Verifiable Credentials, OAuth Rich Authorization Requests, or policy-engine bindings to preserve a common authorization meaning across trust boundaries.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向自主Agent系统的可移植授权标准，解决跨组织边界的身份与权限管理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业AI正从副驾驶转向自主Agent，这些系统需要跨组织边界执行工作流、协商结果并做出决策，但现有身份与访问模型存在结构性缺陷，仅靠身份不足以约束Agent的权限。
analysis.problem: 如何为自主Agent设计一种可移植、可审计、可撤销且能被独立接收方一致解释的授权模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于发行者授权载荷、类型化约束代数、决策一致评估语义、委托衰减、治理语义解析、失败关闭处理和预发现的可移植授权模型，分离凭证容器、授权载荷语义和执行引擎。
contributions: 提出一种面向自主Agent的可移植授权标准，覆盖跨信任边界的授权需求。
通过分离凭证、语义和执行引擎，支持多种现有协议（如JWT/JWS、可验证凭证、OAuth RAR）保持一致的授权含义。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实际部署验证。
与现有企业系统的集成复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向自主Agent系统的可移植授权标准，解决跨组织边界的身份与权限管理问题。

papers.title: Offline Policy Evaluation for Manipulation Policies via Discounted Liveness Formulation
papers.abstract: Policy evaluation is a fundamental component of the development and deployment pipeline for robotic policies. In modern manipulation systems, this problem is particularly challenging: rewards are often sparse, task progression of evaluation rollouts are often non-monotonic as the policies exhibit recovery behaviors, and evaluation rollouts are necessarily of finite length. This finite length introduces truncation bias, breaking the infinite-horizon assumptions underlying standard methods relying on Bellman equations/principle of optimality. In this work, we propose a framework for offline policy evaluation from sparse rewards based on a liveness-based Bellman operator. Our formulation interprets policy evaluation as a task-completion problem and yields a conservative fixed-point value function that is robust to finite-horizon truncation. We analyze the theoretical properties of the proposed operator, including contraction guarantees, and show how it encodes task progression while mitigating truncation bias. We evaluate our method on two simulated manipulation tasks using both a Vision-Language-Action model and a diffusion policy, and a cloth folding task using human demonstrations. Empirical results demonstrate that our approach more accurately reflects task progress and substantially reduces truncation bias, outperforming classical baselines such as TD(0) and Monte Carlo policy evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于活性的折扣公式，用于机器人操作策略的离线评估，有效缓解截断偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人操作策略评估中，奖励稀疏、任务进展非单调且评估轨迹有限长，导致标准方法（如Bellman方程）的无限时域假设失效，产生截断偏差。
analysis.problem: 解决有限时域下稀疏奖励操作策略的离线评估问题，消除截断偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准方法（如TD(0)和蒙特卡洛）在有限时域评估中因截断偏差而表现不佳，而所提方法能更准确反映任务进展并减少偏差。
analysis.method: 提出基于活性的Bellman算子，将策略评估建模为任务完成问题，得到保守的不动点值函数，对有限时域截断具有鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出一种基于活性公式的离线策略评估框架，适用于稀疏奖励操作任务。
理论分析了所提算子的收缩保证和截断偏差缓解特性。
在模拟和真实操作任务上验证了方法优于TD(0)和蒙特卡洛基线。
analysis.experiments: 在两项模拟操作任务（使用VLA模型和扩散策略）以及一项布料折叠任务（使用人类演示）上评估，结果显示方法更准确反映任务进展并显著减少截断偏差。
limitations: 仅适用于任务完成型问题，可能不适用于连续奖励场景。
保守估计可能低估策略的真实性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于活性的折扣公式，用于机器人操作策略的离线评估，有效缓解截断偏差。

papers.title: Drop the Act: Probe-Filtered RL for Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reasoning models post-hoc rationalize answers they have already committed to internally, producing chains of *reasoning theater*: deliberative-looking steps that contribute nothing to correctness. This wastes inference tokens, pollutes interpretability, and obscures what the model actually computed. We introduce **ProFIL** (**Pro**be-**Fil**tered Reinforcement Learning) to *reduce theater, increase chain-of-thought faithfulness, and shrink chain length* in a single, drop-in extension to Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). A multi-head attention probe is trained *once* on the *frozen* base model to detect post-commitment steps from internal activations alone; during GRPO, rollouts whose probe score exceeds a threshold have their advantage zeroed. *Our central finding is that a probe trained on a frozen base, with verifier-derived labels and no human annotation, provides a stable signal that suppresses theater while resisting the RL-obfuscation failure mode predicted by prior work.* Across four reasoning domains (GSM8K, LiveCodeBench, ToolUse, MMLU-Redux) and two model architectures (Llama-8B, Qwen-7B), ProFIL reduces post-commitment theater by **11--100%**, raises faithful-fraction (e.g., +24pp on LiveCodeBench under an independent Claude 3.7 Sonnet judge), and shortens chains by 4--19%, all while preserving or improving task accuracy. ProFIL also beats a matched length-penalty GRPO baseline, isolating the gain as semantic commitment-detection rather than chain compression. Probe weights, training configurations, and rollouts are released across all four domains.

analysis.tldr: ProFIL通过探针过滤强化学习减少推理剧场，提升思维链忠实度并缩短链长。
analysis.research_motivation: 推理模型常产生后验合理化（推理剧场），浪费计算资源、损害可解释性，且现有方法难以在不牺牲准确率的情况下有效抑制。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注且不降低任务准确率的前提下，减少思维链中的后验合理化步骤，提升忠实度并缩短链长。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出推理剧场是模型内部已确定答案后生成的无关步骤，且强化学习可能加剧此现象（RL-obfuscation failure mode）。
analysis.method: ProFIL：在冻结基模型上训练一个多头注意力探针，从内部激活检测后验承诺步骤；在GRPO训练中，对探针得分超过阈值的轨迹将优势置零，从而抑制剧场。
contributions: 提出ProFIL方法，通过探针过滤强化学习同时减少推理剧场、提升忠实度并缩短链长。
在四个推理领域和两种模型架构上验证有效性，后验剧场减少11-100%，忠实度提升（如LiveCodeBench +24pp），链长缩短4-19%，且准确率保持或提升。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K、LiveCodeBench、ToolUse、MMLU-Redux四个领域，使用Llama-8B和Qwen-7B模型，与长度惩罚GRPO基线对比，并采用独立Claude 3.7 Sonnet评估忠实度。
limitations: 探针训练依赖冻结基模型，可能无法适应模型微调后的分布变化。
阈值选择可能影响性能，需进一步研究自适应阈值。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProFIL通过探针过滤强化学习减少推理剧场，提升思维链忠实度并缩短链长。

papers.title: Predictive Maps of Multi-Agent Reasoning: A Successor-Representation Spectrum for LLM Communication Topologies
papers.abstract: Practitioners deploying multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems must currently choose between communication topologies such as chain, star, mesh, and richer variants without any pre-inference diagnostic for which topology will amplify drift, converge to consensus, or remain robust under perturbation. Existing evaluation answers these questions only post hoc and only for the task measured. We introduce a structural diagnostic for multi-agent LLM communication graphs based on the successor representation $M = (I - \gamma P)^{-1}$ of the row-stochastic communication operator, and we connect three of its spectral quantities, the spectral radius $\rho(M)$, the spectral gap $\Delta(M)$, and the condition number $\kappa(M)$, to three distinct failure modes. We derive closed-form spectra for the chain, star, and mesh under row-stochastic normalization, and validate the predictions on a 12-step structured state-tracking task with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct over 100 independent trials. The condition number is a perfect rank-order predictor of empirical perturbation robustness ($r_s = 1.0$); the spectral gap partially predicts consensus dynamics ($r_s = 0.5$); and the spectral radius is perfectly \emph{inverted} with respect to cumulative error ($r_s = -1.0$). We trace this inversion to a regime in which linear spectra are blind to non-contracting bias drift, and we propose an affine-noise extension of the predictive map that recovers the empirical ordering. We read this as a first step toward representational, drift-aware structural diagnostics for multi-agent LLM systems, sitting alongside classical spectral and consensus theory.

analysis.tldr: 用后继表示谱理论预测多智能体LLM通信拓扑的失败模式，并在状态追踪任务上验证了谱量对鲁棒性和共识的预测能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM系统部署时需选择通信拓扑（如链式、星型、网状），但缺乏预推理诊断工具来预测哪种拓扑会放大漂移、收敛到共识或保持鲁棒，现有评估仅能事后且针对特定任务回答这些问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行推理的情况下，通过结构诊断预测多智能体LLM通信拓扑的失败模式（漂移、共识、鲁棒性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现谱半径与累积误差呈完美负相关（r_s=-1.0），归因于线性谱对非收缩性偏差漂移的盲区，并提出了仿射噪声扩展来恢复经验排序。
analysis.method: 基于通信算子的后继表示M=(I-γP)^{-1}，提取三个谱量（谱半径ρ(M)、谱隙Δ(M)、条件数κ(M)）分别对应三种失败模式，并推导了链式、星型、网状拓扑在行随机归一化下的闭式谱。
contributions: 提出基于后继表示的多智能体LLM通信图结构诊断框架，连接三个谱量与三种失败模式。
推导了常见拓扑的闭式谱，并在状态追踪任务上验证了谱量对鲁棒性和共识的预测能力，条件数完美预测扰动鲁棒性（r_s=1.0）。
analysis.experiments: 在12步结构化状态追踪任务上使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct进行100次独立试验，验证了谱量预测能力。
limitations: 线性谱对非收缩性偏差漂移存在盲区，需要仿射噪声扩展。
仅在一个任务和一种模型上验证，泛化性待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用后继表示谱理论预测多智能体LLM通信拓扑的失败模式，并在状态追踪任务上验证了谱量对鲁棒性和共识的预测能力。

papers.title: Deep Minds and Shallow Probes
papers.abstract: Neural representations are not unique objects. Even when two systems realize the same downstream computation, their hidden coordinates may differ by reparameterization. A probe family intended to reveal structure already present in a representation should therefore be stable under the relevant representation symmetries rather than be tied to a particular basis. We study this group action in the tractable exact setting of the final readout layer, where equivalent realizations induce affine changes of hidden coordinates. The resulting symmetry principle singles out a unique hierarchy of shallow coordinate-stable probes, with linear probes as its degree-1 member. We also show that a natural object for cross-model probe transfer is a shared probe-visible quotient--the representation modulo directions invisible to the probe family--rather than the full hidden state. Experiments on synthetic and real-world tasks support both predictions, showing where degree-2 probes help beyond linear ones and how quotient-based transfer enables coverage-aware monitor portability across model families. These results point toward a broader geometric representation theory of neural probing, with coverage-aware monitor transfer as a concrete operational consequence.

analysis.tldr: 提出坐标稳定的探针族层次结构，并证明跨模型探针迁移应基于商空间而非完整隐状态。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经表征并非唯一对象，不同系统可能通过重参数化实现相同计算，现有探针方法对表征对称性不稳定，导致跨模型迁移困难。
analysis.problem: 如何设计对表征重参数化保持稳定的探针族，并实现跨模型探针迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从最终读出层的精确等价实现出发，研究重参数化群作用，导出坐标稳定探针的层次结构（线性探针为度1成员），并定义探针可见商空间用于跨模型迁移。
contributions: 提出坐标稳定探针的层次结构，线性探针为其特例。
证明跨模型探针迁移应基于探针可见商空间而非完整隐状态。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实任务上验证了度2探针优于线性探针的场景，以及基于商空间的迁移实现覆盖感知的监控器跨模型可移植性。
limitations: 理论分析限于最终读出层，中间层探针的稳定性未涉及。
实验规模可能有限，未在大型模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出坐标稳定的探针族层次结构，并证明跨模型探针迁移应基于商空间而非完整隐状态。

papers.title: Conditional Memory Enhanced Item Representation for Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract: Generative recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm that predicts target items by autoregressively generating their semantic identifiers (SID). Most GR methods follow a quantization-representation-generation pipeline, first assigning each item a SID, then constructing input representations from SID-token embeddings, and finally predicting the target SID through autoregressive generation. Existing item-level representation constructions mainly take two forms: directly merging SID-token embeddings into a compact vector, or enriching item-level representations with external inputs through additional networks. However, these item-level constructors still expose two practical challenges: direct merging may amplify the information loss caused by quantization and ID collision while obscuring SID code relations, whereas external-input-based methods can strengthen item semantics but cannot reliably preserve the SID-structured evidence required for token-level generation. These limitations make representation construction an underexplored bottleneck, leading to two severe problems, \ie{} the Identity-Structure Preservation Conflict and Input-Output Granularity Mismatch. To this end, we propose ComeIR, a Conditional Memory enhanced Item Representation framework that reconstructs SID-token embeddings into item-aware inputs and restores the token granularity during SID decoding. Specifically, MM-guided token scoring adaptively estimates the contribution of each code within the SID, dual-level Engram memory captures intra-item code composition and inter-item transition patterns, and a memory-restoring prediction head reuses the memories during SID decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of ComeIR, and further reveal scalable gains from enlarging conditional memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出条件记忆增强的项目表示框架ComeIR，解决生成式推荐中标识-结构冲突与粒度不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式推荐（GR）通过自回归生成语义标识（SID）预测目标项目，但现有项目级表示构建方法存在信息丢失、SID码关系模糊以及无法可靠保留SID结构证据等问题，成为未充分探索的瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 解决生成式推荐中项目表示构建的两个关键问题：身份-结构保持冲突（Identity-Structure Preservation Conflict）和输入-输出粒度不匹配（Input-Output Granularity Mismatch）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接合并SID令牌嵌入会放大量化与ID碰撞导致的信息损失并模糊SID码关系；基于外部输入的方法虽能增强语义但无法可靠保留SID结构证据。
analysis.method: 提出ComeIR框架，包含MM引导的令牌评分（自适应估计每个码的贡献）、双层Engram记忆（捕获项目内码组合与项目间转换模式）以及记忆恢复预测头（在SID解码时重用记忆）。
contributions: 提出条件记忆增强的项目表示框架ComeIR，有效解决生成式推荐中的身份-结构保持冲突和粒度不匹配问题。
设计MM引导的令牌评分、双层Engram记忆和记忆恢复预测头三个关键组件。
通过大量实验验证ComeIR的有效性和灵活性，并揭示扩大条件记忆带来的可扩展增益。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的条件记忆初始化。
扩展条件记忆可能带来计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出条件记忆增强的项目表示框架ComeIR，解决生成式推荐中标识-结构冲突与粒度不匹配问题。

papers.title: Can a Single Message Paralyze the AI Infrastructure? The Rise of AbO-DDoS Attacks through Targeted Mobius Injection
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have emerged as key intermediaries, orchestrating complex interactions between human users and a wide range of digital services and LLM infrastructures. While prior research has extensively examined the security of LLMs and agents in isolation, the systemic risk of the agent acting as a disruptive hub within the user-agent-service chain remains largely overlooked. In this work, we expose a novel threat paradigm by introducing Mobius Injection, a sophisticated attack that weaponizes autonomous agents into zombie nodes to launch what we define as gent-based and -Oriented DDoS (AbO-DDoS) attacks. By exploiting a structural vulnerability in agentic logic named Semantic Closure, an adversary can induce sustained recursive execution of agent components through a single textual injection. We demonstrate that this attack is exceptionally lightweight, stealthy against both traditional DDoS monitors and contemporary AI safety filters, and highly configurable, allowing for surgical targeting of specific environments or model providers. To evaluate the real-world impact, we conduct extensive experiments across three representative claw-style agents and three mainstream coding agents, integrated with 12 frontier proprietary or open-weight LLMs. Our results demonstrate that Mobius Injection achieves substantial attack success across diverse tasks, driving single-node call amplification up to 51.0x and multi-node p95 latency inflation up to 229.1x. The attack performance exhibits a superlinear increase with the number of poisoning nodes. To mitigate Mobius Injection, we propose a proactive defense mechanism using Agent Component Energy (ACE) Analysis, which detects malicious recursive triggers by measuring anomalous energy in the agent's component graph.

analysis.tldr: 单条文本注入即可瘫痪AI基础设施，提出Mobius Injection攻击与ACE防御机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究孤立地考察LLM和Agent的安全性，忽略了Agent作为用户-服务链中破坏性枢纽的系统性风险。
analysis.problem: 如何利用Agent逻辑中的结构漏洞，通过单次文本注入实现高效、隐蔽的分布式拒绝服务攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Mobius Injection攻击，利用Agent逻辑中的Semantic Closure漏洞诱导递归执行；并提出基于Agent Component Energy (ACE) Analysis的主动防御机制。
contributions: 首次提出AbO-DDoS攻击范式，揭示Agent作为僵尸节点的系统性风险。
设计Mobius Injection攻击，实现单节点调用放大51.0倍、多节点延迟膨胀229.1倍。
提出ACE Analysis防御机制，通过测量组件图异常能量检测恶意递归触发。
analysis.experiments: 在3种claw-style Agent和3种主流编码Agent上，集成12个前沿专有或开源LLM进行实验，攻击成功率显著，单节点调用放大51.0x，多节点p95延迟膨胀229.1x，且性能随中毒节点数超线性增长。
limitations: 防御机制ACE Analysis的假阳性率未在摘要中提及。
攻击仅针对特定Agent架构（claw-style和编码Agent），泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单条文本注入即可瘫痪AI基础设施，提出Mobius Injection攻击与ACE防御机制。

papers.title: Agent-BRACE: Decoupling Beliefs from Actions in Long-Horizon Tasks via Verbalized State Uncertainty
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed on long-horizon tasks in partially observable environments, where they must act while inferring and tracking a complex environment state over many steps. This leads to two challenges: partial observability requires maintaining uncertainty over unobserved world attributes, and long interaction history causes context to grow without bound, diluting task-relevant information. A principled solution to both challenges is a belief state: a posterior distribution over environment states given past observations and actions, which compactly encodes history for decision making regardless of episode length. In LLM agents, however, the open-ended nature of text makes it unclear how to represent such a distribution. Therefore, we introduce Agent-BRACE: Agent Belief state Representation via Abstraction and Confidence Estimation, a method that decouples an LLM agent into a belief state model and a policy model, jointly optimized via reinforcement learning. The belief state model produces a structured approximation of the belief distribution: a set of atomic natural language claims about the environment, each annotated with an ordinal verbalized certainty label ranging from certain to unknown. The policy model conditions on this compact, structured approximate belief rather than the full history, learning to select actions under explicit uncertainty. Across long-horizon, partially observable embodied language environments, Agent-BRACE achieves an average absolute improvement of +14.5% (Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct) and +5.3% (Qwen3-4B-Instruct), outperforming strong RL baselines while maintaining a near-constant context window independent of episode length. Further analysis shows that the learned belief becomes increasingly calibrated over the course of an episode as evidence accumulates.

analysis.tldr: Agent-BRACE 通过将 LLM agent 解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，用结构化自然语言声明表示不确定性，在长时域部分可观测任务中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在部分可观测的长时域任务中面临两个挑战：部分可观测性要求维护对未观测世界属性的不确定性，而长交互历史导致上下文无限增长，稀释任务相关信息。现有方法缺乏对信念状态的有效表示。
analysis.problem: 如何在 LLM agent 中表示和利用信念状态（环境状态的后验分布），以紧凑编码历史并处理不确定性，从而在长时域部分可观测任务中做出决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Agent-BRACE 将 LLM agent 解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，通过强化学习联合优化。信念状态模型生成结构化近似信念分布：一组关于环境的原子自然语言声明，每个声明带有从确定到未知的序数口头化置信标签。策略模型基于该紧凑结构化近似信念而非完整历史进行决策。
contributions: 提出 Agent-BRACE 方法，将 LLM agent 解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，通过强化学习联合优化。
引入结构化近似信念表示：一组带口头化置信标签的原子自然语言声明，紧凑编码历史并显式表示不确定性。
在长时域部分可观测的具身语言环境中，Agent-BRACE 平均绝对提升 +14.5%（Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct）和 +5.3%（Qwen3-4B-Instruct），优于强 RL 基线，且上下文窗口几乎恒定。
analysis.experiments: 在长时域部分可观测的具身语言环境中进行实验，使用 Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct 和 Qwen3-4B-Instruct 作为基础模型，与强 RL 基线对比，报告了平均绝对提升。
limitations: 方法依赖于自然语言声明的生成和置信标签的序数表示，可能受限于 LLM 的生成质量。
实验仅在具身语言环境中进行，泛化到其他领域（如视觉或物理环境）尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agent-BRACE 通过将 LLM agent 解耦为信念状态模型和策略模型，用结构化自然语言声明表示不确定性，在长时域部分可观测任务中显著提升性能。

papers.title: Generative Diffusion Prior Distillation for Long-Context Knowledge Transfer
papers.abstract: While traditional time-series classifiers assume full sequences at inference, practical constraints (latency and cost) often limit inputs to partial prefixes. The absence of class-discriminative patterns in partial data can significantly hinder a classifier's ability to generalize. This work uses knowledge distillation (KD) to equip partial time series classifiers with the generalization ability of their full-sequence counterparts. In KD, high-capacity teacher transfers supervision to aid student learning on the target task. Matching with teacher features has shown promise in closing the generalization gap due to limited parameter capacity. However, when the generalization gap arises from training-data differences (full versus partial), the teacher's full-context features can be an overwhelming target signal for the student's short-context features. To provide progressive, diverse, and collective teacher supervision, we propose Generative Diffusion Prior Distillation (GDPD), a novel KD framework that treats short-context student features as degraded observations of the target full-context features. Inspired by the iterative restoration capability of diffusion models, we learn a diffusion-based generative prior over teacher features. Leveraging this prior, we posterior-sample target teacher representations that could best explain the missing long-range information in the student features and optimize the student features to be minimally degraded relative to these targets. GDPD provides each student feature with a distribution of task-relevant long-context knowledge, which benefits learning on the partial classification task. Extensive experiments across earliness settings, datasets, and architectures demonstrate GDPD's effectiveness for full-to-partial distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式扩散先验蒸馏（GDPD），将完整序列分类器的知识迁移到部分序列分类器，解决因上下文缺失导致的泛化差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际应用中，时间序列分类器常因延迟和成本限制只能使用部分前缀，导致分类性能下降。现有知识蒸馏方法在教师特征（完整上下文）与学生特征（短上下文）存在数据差异时，教师特征作为目标信号过于强烈，难以有效迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何将完整序列分类器的泛化能力有效蒸馏到部分序列分类器，克服因训练数据差异（完整 vs 部分）导致的泛化差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当泛化差距源于训练数据差异（完整 vs 部分）时，教师的完整上下文特征对学生短上下文特征而言是过强的目标信号，直接匹配效果不佳。
analysis.method: 提出生成式扩散先验蒸馏（GDPD），将学生短上下文特征视为教师完整上下文特征的退化观测，学习基于扩散模型的生成先验，然后后验采样最能解释学生特征中缺失长程信息的教师表示，并优化学生特征使其相对于这些目标退化最小。
contributions: 提出GDPD框架，利用扩散模型生成先验实现从完整序列到部分序列的知识蒸馏。
通过后验采样为每个学生特征提供任务相关的长上下文知识分布，提升部分分类任务的学习效果。
analysis.experiments: 在多种提前性设置、数据集和架构上进行实验，验证了GDPD在完整到部分蒸馏中的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的采样效率，计算开销较大。
仅针对时间序列分类任务，未验证在其他模态或任务上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式扩散先验蒸馏（GDPD），将完整序列分类器的知识迁移到部分序列分类器，解决因上下文缺失导致的泛化差距。

papers.title: MaskTab: Scalable Masked Tabular Pretraining with Scaling Laws and Distillation for Industrial Classification
papers.abstract: Tabular data forms the backbone of high-stakes decision systems in finance, healthcare, and beyond. Yet industrial tabular datasets are inherently difficult: high-dimensional, riddled with missing entries, and rarely labeled at scale. While foundation models have revolutionized vision and language, tabular learning still leans on handcrafted features and lacks a general self-supervised framework. We present MaskTab, a unified pre-training framework designed specifically for industrial-scale tabular data. MaskTab encodes missing values via dedicated learnable tokens, enabling the model to distinguish structural absence from random dropout. It jointly optimizes a hybrid supervised pre-training scheme--utilizing a twin-path architecture to reconcile masked reconstruction with task-specific supervision--and an MoE-augmented loss that adaptively routes features through specialized subnetworks. On industrial-scale benchmarks, it achieves +5.04% AUC and +8.28% KS over prior art under rigorous scaling. Moreover, its representations distill effectively into lightweight models, yielding +2.55% AUC and +4.85% KS under strict latency and interpretability constraints, while improving robustness to distribution shifts. Our work demonstrates that tabular data admits a foundation-model treatment--when its structural idiosyncrasies are respected.

analysis.tldr: MaskTab 提出面向工业表格数据的可扩展掩码预训练框架，通过专用缺失标记、混合监督预训练和 MoE 损失实现 SOTA 性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业表格数据高维、缺失多、标注少，现有方法依赖手工特征，缺乏通用的自监督框架。
analysis.problem: 如何为工业级表格数据设计一个可扩展的预训练框架，有效处理缺失值并提升下游分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MaskTab 使用可学习标记编码缺失值，采用双路径架构联合优化掩码重建与任务监督，并引入 MoE 增强损失自适应路由特征。
contributions: 提出 MaskTab，首个面向工业表格数据的统一预训练框架，支持缺失值编码和混合监督。
在工业级基准上实现 AUC +5.04%、KS +8.28% 的提升，且知识蒸馏后仍保持优势。
analysis.experiments: 在工业级基准上评估，MaskTab 在 AUC 和 KS 指标上超越先前方法，并验证了蒸馏效率和分布偏移鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对超大规模表格数据的计算开销较高。
MoE 路由机制可能引入额外复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MaskTab 提出面向工业表格数据的可扩展掩码预训练框架，通过专用缺失标记、混合监督预训练和 MoE 损失实现 SOTA 性能。

papers.title: fg-expo: Frontier-guided exploration-prioritized policy optimization via adaptive kl and gaussian curriculum
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the standard paradigm for LLM mathematical reasoning, with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) serving as the dominant algorithm. We identify two overlooked inefficiencies inherent in GRPO. First, a fixed KL coefficient overly restricts policy exploration at moments when the model needs to diverge significantly from the reference policy. Second, uniform question sampling overlooks that moderately difficult problems produce the most informative gradient signals. We propose FG-ExPO, short for Frontier-Guided Exploration-Prioritized Policy Optimization, which integrates two lightweight components. Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL) adjusts the KL penalty strength through a smooth nonlinear function of batch average accuracy, loosening the constraint when the model performs poorly and strengthening it when the model achieves satisfactory results. Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS) assigns sampling weights to questions following a Gaussian distribution centered at a moderate accuracy level around 0.5, focusing model training on its learning frontier. We conduct evaluations on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B and Qwen3-8B-Base across six mainstream mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Experimental results demonstrate that FG-ExPO consistently outperforms vanilla GRPO. It delivers an absolute improvement of 13.34 on the AIME 2025 pass@32 metric, rising from 63.33 percent to 76.67 percent, and obtains an average pass@32 gain of 2.66 on the 8B model. The substantially larger performance gains observed on pass@32 compared to pass@1 verify that FG-ExPO enlarges the model's effective exploration space under a fixed inference budget.

analysis.tldr: FG-ExPO通过自适应KL缩放和高斯课程采样改进GRPO，显著提升LLM数学推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GRPO算法在LLM数学推理中存在两个效率问题：固定KL系数限制模型探索，均匀问题采样忽略中等难度问题的信息价值。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO中KL系数固定和问题采样均匀导致的探索效率低下问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定KL系数在模型需要大幅偏离参考策略时过度约束；均匀采样使模型难以聚焦于信息量最大的中等难度问题。
analysis.method: 提出FG-ExPO，包含两个轻量组件：Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL)根据批次平均准确率动态调整KL惩罚强度；Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS)以中等准确率（约0.5）为中心的高斯分布分配问题采样权重。
contributions: 识别并形式化了GRPO中KL系数固定和问题采样均匀两个效率瓶颈
提出FG-ExPO算法，集成AKL和GCS两个轻量组件，无需额外计算开销
在多个数学推理基准上验证了FG-ExPO优于GRPO，尤其在pass@32指标上提升显著
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B和Qwen3-8B-Base上，使用六个主流数学推理基准进行评估。FG-ExPO在AIME 2025 pass@32上绝对提升13.34%（从63.33%到76.67%），8B模型平均pass@32提升2.66。
limitations: 仅验证了数学推理任务，未在更广泛的RLVR场景中测试
GCS的分布参数（均值0.5）可能需针对不同任务调整
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FG-ExPO通过自适应KL缩放和高斯课程采样改进GRPO，显著提升LLM数学推理性能。

papers.title: Spatial Adapter: Structured Spatial Decomposition and Closed-Form Covariance for Frozen Predictors
papers.abstract: We present the Spatial Adapter, a parameter-efficient post-hoc layer that equips any frozen first-stage predictor with a structured spatial representation of its residual field and an induced closed-form spatial covariance. The adapter operates as a cascade second stage on residuals, jointly learning a spatially regularized orthonormal basis and per-sample scores via a tractable mini-batch ADMM procedure, without modifying any first-stage parameter. Because the first-stage parameters are frozen, the adapter does not retrain the backbone; its role is to supply a compressed distributional summary of the residual field. Smoothness, sparsity, and orthogonality together turn a generic low-rank factorization into an identifiable spatial representation whose induced residual covariance admits a closed-form low-rank-plus-noise estimator; the effective rank is determined data-adaptively by spectral thresholding, while the nominal rank K is an optimization-side upper bound only. This covariance enables kriging-style spatial prediction at unobserved locations, with plug-in uncertainty quantification as a secondary downstream use. Across synthetic data, Weather2K for spatial-holdout prediction, and GWHD patch grids as a basis-transferability diagnostic, the adapter recovers residual spatial structure when paired with frozen first stages from linear models to deep spatiotemporal and vision backbones; the added representation uses fewer than K(N+T) parameters alongside a compact residual-trend network.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种即插即用的空间适配器，为冻结的预测器提供结构化空间表示和闭式协方差，实现高效空间预测与不确定性量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有冻结预测器缺乏对残差场空间结构的显式建模，无法进行空间预测和不确定性量化，而重新训练骨干网络成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改冻结预测器参数的前提下，为其残差场学习一个可解释、可泛化的结构化空间表示，并实现闭式协方差估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Spatial Adapter，作为级联第二阶段，通过可微的 mini-batch ADMM 过程联合学习空间正则化的正交基和每个样本的得分，残差协方差具有闭式低秩加噪声形式，有效秩由谱阈值自适应确定。
contributions: 提出一种参数高效的即插即用适配器，为冻结预测器提供结构化空间表示和闭式协方差。
通过可微 ADMM 实现正交基和样本得分的联合学习，并利用谱阈值自适应确定有效秩。
在合成数据、Weather2K 和 GWHD 上验证了适配器恢复残差空间结构的能力，且参数开销小。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据、Weather2K 空间留出预测和 GWHD 补丁网格上进行实验，与线性模型到深度时空和视觉骨干等冻结第一阶段配对，验证了适配器恢复残差空间结构的能力。
limitations: 可能依赖残差场具有低秩结构假设。
ADMM 过程的收敛性可能受超参数影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
