analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种即插即用的空间适配器，为冻结的预测器提供结构化空间表示和闭式协方差，实现高效空间预测与不确定性量化。

papers.title: Deep Reasoning in General Purpose Agents via Structured Meta-Cognition
papers.abstract: Humans intuitively solve complex problems by flexibly shifting among reasoning modes: they plan, execute, revise intermediate goals, resolve ambiguity through associative judgment, and apply formal procedures to well-specified subproblems. Current LLM agents lack this flexibility, as their scaffolds hard-code such reasoning decisions in advance. These scaffolds are effective when their prescribed structure matches the task, but brittle when solving the task requires adapting the structure of reasoning itself. We introduce Deep Reasoning -- an inference-time approach for constructing task-specific scaffolds through structured meta-reasoning. Deep Reasoning uses a formal language that represents meta-reasoning as executable decompositions over associative inference, formal computation, and recursive subproblem solving, enabling decomposition principles to be encoded as in-context examples that guide test-time scaffold construction. We instantiate this approach in a general-purpose agent (DOLORES) that distributes complex tasks across more controlled reasoning threads. We evaluate it against state-of-the-art scaffolding methods across four hard benchmarks: multi-hop reasoning, long-chain question answering, long-context aggregation, and deep research-style information seeking. DOLORES outperforms all evaluated scaffolds across three model sizes and two model families, improving over the strongest evaluated scaffold baseline by 24.8% on average. DOLORES distributes cognition across structured, lower-load reasoning threads, thereby reducing premature termination and hallucinations. This advantage can even bridge the scaling gap, with an 8B version surpassing all evaluated 32B baselines from the same family in more than half the settings. These results point toward future agentic systems that treat scaffolding as adaptive reasoning, constructing the structure each task requires just-in-time.

analysis.tldr: 通过结构化元认知实现推理模式灵活切换，DOLORES 在多个硬基准上超越现有脚手架方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 LLM Agent 的推理脚手架（scaffold）是硬编码的，缺乏人类灵活切换推理模式的能力，导致在需要自适应调整推理结构的任务中表现脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何让通用 Agent 在推理时动态构建任务特定的推理结构，而非依赖预定义的固定脚手架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有脚手架在任务结构匹配时有效，但面对需要自适应调整推理结构的任务时表现脆弱；DOLORES 通过结构化元认知将推理分解为关联推理、形式计算和递归子问题求解，减少了过早终止和幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出 Deep Reasoning 方法，使用形式化语言将元认知表示为可执行的分解，通过上下文示例指导测试时脚手架构建；实例化为通用 Agent DOLORES，将复杂任务分布到多个受控推理线程中。
contributions: 提出 Deep Reasoning 方法，实现推理时自适应构建任务特定脚手架。
实例化 DOLORES Agent，在四个硬基准上超越现有脚手架方法，平均提升 24.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个硬基准（多跳推理、长链问答、长上下文聚合、深度研究式信息检索）上，使用三种模型规模和两个模型家族进行评估，DOLORES 在所有设置中优于最强基线，8B 版本在超过一半设置中超越同系列 32B 基线。
limitations: 方法依赖形式化语言和上下文示例的设计，可能对复杂任务需要更多人工设计。
实验仅在特定基准上验证，泛化性有待进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过结构化元认知实现推理模式灵活切换，DOLORES 在多个硬基准上超越现有脚手架方法。

papers.title: TRACE: Temporal Routing with Autoregressive Cross-channel Experts for EEG Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Learning transferable representations for electroencephalography (EEG) remains challenging because EEG signals are inherently multi-channel and non-stationary. Channels observed at the same time provide coupled measurements of neural activity, while the relevant temporal dynamics vary across contexts. This structure is poorly matched by architectures that apply uniform computation across time or route each channel patch independently. To this end, we propose TRACE, an autoregressive EEG pre-training framework that predicts future EEG patches from causal context while performing temporally adaptive and cross-channel coherent computation. At each temporal step, TRACE derives an expert routing decision from the causal cross-channel history and applies it jointly to all channels at that step. This preserves instantaneous cross-channel coherence while allowing different temporal regimes to activate different computation. Since routing is defined over the available channel set and causal temporal context, TRACE is compatible with heterogeneous pre-training across corpora with different channel counts, montages, sequence lengths, and recording domains. Across eight downstream EEG benchmarks, TRACE is evaluated in both settings: when downstream domains are seen only as unlabeled pre-training data and when downstream datasets are completely unseen during pre-training. It obtains the best results on several benchmarks while remaining competitive on motor imagery and clinical event classification tasks, with ablations supporting the importance of cross-channel temporal routing.

analysis.tldr: 提出TRACE框架，通过自回归跨通道专家路由实现EEG表征学习，在多个下游基准上取得最优或竞争性结果。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG信号具有多通道和非平稳特性，现有架构要么对所有时间步施加统一计算，要么独立处理每个通道的patch，无法有效捕捉跨通道的瞬时一致性和随时间变化的动态模式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种EEG预训练框架，使其能够同时建模跨通道的瞬时相关性和时间上的自适应计算，并支持异构数据预训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TRACE，一种自回归EEG预训练框架。在每个时间步，从因果跨通道历史中推导专家路由决策，并联合应用于该步所有通道，从而保持瞬时跨通道一致性，同时允许不同时间区域激活不同计算。
contributions: 提出TRACE框架，实现时间自适应且跨通道一致的计算。
支持异构预训练，兼容不同通道数、导联方式、序列长度和记录域的数据集。
在8个下游EEG基准上取得最优或竞争性结果，消融实验验证了跨通道时间路由的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在8个下游EEG基准上评估，包括预训练数据可见和完全未见两种设置，在多个基准上取得最佳结果，在运动想象和临床事件分类任务上保持竞争力。
limitations: 可能对路由决策的计算开销有额外要求。
在特定任务（如运动想象）上未达到最优，仍有改进空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TRACE框架，通过自回归跨通道专家路由实现EEG表征学习，在多个下游基准上取得最优或竞争性结果。

papers.title: LPDP: Inference-Time Reward Control for Variable-Length DNA Generation with Edit Flows
papers.abstract: We study the application of recent Edit Flows for inference-time reward control for DNA sequence generation. Unlike most reward-guided DNA generation frameworks, which operate on fixed-length sequence spaces, Edit Flows have a potential to generate variable-length DNA through biologically plausible insertion, deletion, and substitution operations. In particular, we propose Local Perturbation Discrete Programming (LPDP), a training-free, intermediate-state and action-aware local re-solving operator for variable-length DNA edit-action generators at inference time. More specifically, at each guided rollout step, LPDP scores one-step root edits, retains a near-best root band, and re-ranks each retained root by solving a bounded local discrete program around its child sequence. This local program uses the typed geometry of edit actions to focus on coherent substitution, insertion, or deletion subgraphs, and aggregates local continuations with either a hard Max backup or a soft log-sum-exponential (LSE) backup. We instantiate LPDP in two regimes: front-loaded reward tilting for enhancer optimization, where early edits are critical for establishing global regulatory sequence structure, and back-loaded reward tilting for exon-intron-exon inpainting, where late edits fine-tune splice-boundary contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出LPDP方法，利用编辑流在推理时控制变长DNA序列生成，无需训练即可优化增强子和剪接边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有奖励引导的DNA生成方法大多限于固定长度序列，而生物序列（如基因调控元件）天然具有可变长度，需要支持插入、删除等操作。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时对变长DNA序列生成进行奖励控制，同时保持生物学合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Local Perturbation Discrete Programming (LPDP)，一种无需训练的局部求解算子，通过评分根编辑、保留近优根带、求解有界局部离散程序来重排序，并采用硬Max或软LSE备份聚合局部延续。
contributions: 首次将编辑流应用于推理时奖励控制的变长DNA生成
提出LPDP方法，支持前载和后载奖励倾斜两种模式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖编辑流的质量
局部离散程序的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LPDP方法，利用编辑流在推理时控制变长DNA序列生成，无需训练即可优化增强子和剪接边界。

papers.title: Causal Fairness for Survival Analysis
papers.abstract: In the data-driven era, large-scale datasets are routinely collected and analyzed using machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) to inform decisions in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, employment, and criminal justice, raising concerns about the fairness behavior of these systems. Existing works in fair ML cover tasks such as bias detection, fair prediction, and fair decision-making, but largely focus on static settings. At the same time, fairness in temporal contexts, particularly survival/time-to-event (TTE) analysis, remains relatively underexplored, with current approaches to fair survival analysis adopting statistical fairness definitions, which, even with unlimited data, cannot disentangle the causal mechanisms that generate disparities. To address this gap, we develop a causal framework for fairness in TTE analysis, enabling the decomposition of disparities in survival into contributions from direct, indirect, and spurious pathways. This provides a human-understandable explanation of why disparities arise and how they evolve over time. Our non-parametric approach proceeds in four steps: (1) formalizing the necessary assumptions about censoring and lack of confounding using a graphical model; (2) recovering the conditional survival function given covariates; (3) applying the Causal Reduction Theorem to reframe the problem in a form amenable to causal pathway decomposition; (4) estimating the effects efficiently. Finally, our approach is used to analyze the temporal evolution of racial disparities in outcome after admission to an intensive care unit (ICU).

analysis.tldr: 提出因果公平性框架用于生存分析，分解生存差异为直接、间接和虚假路径。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公平性机器学习主要关注静态设置，而时间上下文（如生存分析）中的公平性研究不足，且统计公平性定义无法揭示产生差异的因果机制。
analysis.problem: 在生存/时间-事件分析中，如何从因果角度分解和解释生存差异的来源及其随时间的变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 非参数四步法：1) 用图模型形式化删失和无混杂假设；2) 恢复给定协变量的条件生存函数；3) 应用因果约简定理将问题转化为适合因果路径分解的形式；4) 高效估计效应。
contributions: 首次为生存分析建立因果公平性框架，实现生存差异的因果路径分解。
提供人类可理解的解释，说明差异为何产生及如何随时间演变。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖无混杂和删失假设，实际数据中可能难以满足。
非参数方法在高维协变量下可能效率较低。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果公平性框架用于生存分析，分解生存差异为直接、间接和虚假路径。

papers.title: Options, Not Clicks: Lattice Refinement for Consent-Driven MCP Authorization
papers.abstract: As Model Context Protocol adoption grows, securing tool invocations via meaningful user consent has become a critical challenge, as existing methods, broad always allow toggles or opaque LLM-based decisions, fail to account for dangerous call arguments and often lead to consent fatigue. In this work, we present Conleash, a client-side middleware that enforces boundary-scoped authorization by utilizing a risk lattice to auto-permit safe calls within known boundaries while escalating risks, a policy engine for user-defined invariants, and a refinement loop that converts user decisions into reusable rules. Evaluated on 984 real-world traces, Conleash achieved 98.2% accuracy, caught 99.4% of escalations, and added only 8.2 ms of overhead for policy verification; furthermore, in a user study where N=16, participants significantly preferred Conleash scoped permissions over traditional methods, citing higher trust and reduced prompting.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Conleash，一种基于风险格点细化与策略引擎的 MCP 授权中间件，在 984 条真实轨迹上达到 98.2% 准确率，用户偏好显著高于传统方法。
analysis.research_motivation: MCP 工具调用中现有授权方法（如始终允许开关或 LLM 决策）无法处理危险参数，且易导致用户同意疲劳，亟需更细粒度、可解释的授权机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在 MCP 协议中实现基于用户同意的、边界感知的细粒度工具调用授权，同时避免过度提示和安全隐患。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Conleash 客户端中间件：使用风险格点自动允许已知边界内的安全调用并升级风险；策略引擎定义用户不变式；细化循环将用户决策转化为可复用规则。
contributions: 提出 Conleash，一种基于风险格点细化的 MCP 授权框架，实现边界作用域授权。
在 984 条真实轨迹上验证，准确率 98.2%，捕获 99.4% 升级调用，开销仅 8.2 ms。
用户研究（N=16）表明 Conleash 范围权限显著优于传统方法，信任度更高且提示更少。
analysis.experiments: 在 984 条真实轨迹上评估，准确率 98.2%，升级捕获率 99.4%，策略验证开销 8.2 ms；用户研究 N=16，偏好显著。
limitations: 用户研究样本量较小（N=16），可能影响统计显著性。
风险格点定义依赖专家知识，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Conleash，一种基于风险格点细化与策略引擎的 MCP 授权中间件，在 984 条真实轨迹上达到 98.2% 准确率，用户偏好显著高于传统方法。

papers.title: Human-AI Productivity Paradoxes: Modeling the Interplay of Skill, Effort, and AI Assistance
papers.abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools are rapidly adopted in the workplace and in education, yet the empirical evidence on AI's impact remains mixed. We propose a model of human-AI interaction to better understand and analyze several mechanisms by which AI affects productivity. In our setup, human agents with varying skill levels exert utility-maximizing effort to produce certain task outcomes with AI assistance. We find that incorporating either endogeneity in skill development or in AI unreliability can induce a productivity paradox: increased levels of AI assistance may degrade productivity, leading to potentially significant shortfalls. Moreover, we examine the long-term distributional effect of AI on skill, and demonstrate that skill polarization can emerge in steady state when accounting for heterogeneity in AI literacy -- the agent's capability to identify and adapt to inaccurate AI outputs. Our results elucidate several mechanisms that may explain the emergence of human-AI productivity paradoxes and skill polarization, and identify simple measures that characterize when they arise.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个模型解释AI辅助如何导致生产力悖论和技能极化。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI工具在职场和教育中快速普及，但实证证据对AI的影响结论不一，需要理论模型理解其作用机制。
analysis.problem: 解释AI辅助下生产力悖论（更多AI辅助反而降低生产力）和技能极化现象的成因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，技能发展的内生性或AI不可靠性可导致生产力悖论；AI素养异质性可导致稳态下的技能极化。
analysis.method: 构建一个人类-AI交互模型，其中不同技能水平的代理人以效用最大化努力生产，AI辅助影响产出。
contributions: 揭示了AI辅助导致生产力悖论的两种机制：技能发展内生性和AI不可靠性。
证明了AI素养异质性可导致长期技能极化，并给出了简单判别条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型假设可能简化了真实工作场景的复杂性。
未考虑组织或制度因素对AI采纳的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个模型解释AI辅助如何导致生产力悖论和技能极化。

papers.title: Large Language Models for Causal Relations Extraction in Social Media: A Validation Framework for Disaster Intelligence
papers.abstract: During disasters, extracting causal relations from social media can strengthen situational awareness by identifying factors linked to casualties, physical damage, infrastructure disruption, and cascading impacts. However, disaster-related posts are often informal, fragmented, and context-dependent, and they may describe personal experiences rather than explicit causal relations. In this work, we examine whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can effectively extract causal relations from disaster-related social media posts. To this end, we (1) propose an expert-grounded evaluation framework that compares LLM-generated causal graphs with reference graphs derived from disaster-specific reports and (2) assess whether the extracted relations are supported by post-event evidence or instead reflect model priors. Our findings highlight both the potential and risks of using LLMs for causal relation extraction in disaster decision-support systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出专家验证框架评估LLM从社交媒体提取灾害因果关系的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 灾害期间从社交媒体提取因果关系可增强态势感知，但帖子非正式、碎片化且依赖上下文，现有方法难以处理。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM能否有效从灾害相关社交媒体帖子中提取因果关系，并区分提取的关系是基于证据还是模型先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出专家验证框架，将LLM生成的因果图与灾害报告参考图对比，并评估关系是否被事后证据支持。
contributions: 提出一个专家验证框架用于评估LLM提取的因果关系。
揭示LLM在灾害决策支持系统中提取因果关系的潜力和风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖专家标注的参考图，可能难以大规模扩展。
未讨论不同LLM架构或提示策略的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出专家验证框架评估LLM从社交媒体提取灾害因果关系的可靠性。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Teacher-Student Ensemble Learning for Traffic State Estimation with a Varying Speed Limit Scenario
papers.abstract: Physics-informed deep learning (PIDL) neural networks have shown their capability as a useful instrument for transportation practitioners in utilizing the underlying relationship between the state variables for traffic state estimation (TSE). Another efficient traffic management approach is implementing varying speed limits (VSLs) on transportation corridors to control traffic and mitigate congestion. However, the existing training architecture of PIDL in the literature cannot accommodate the changing traffic characteristics on a freeway with VSL. To tackle this challenge, we propose a novel framework integrating teacher-student ensemble training with PIDL neural networks for TSE under VSL scenarios. The physics of flow conservation law is encoded locally in the teacher models by PIDL, and the student model uses a multi-layer perceptron classifier (MLP) to identify traffic characteristics and selects the ensemble member of PIDL neural networks for TSE. This integrated framework provides a natural solution for capturing the heterogeneity of VSL and accurately addressing the TSE problem. The case study results validate the proposed ensemble approach, demonstrating its superior performance in TSE compared to other popular baseline methods, as indicated by relative L2 error.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息教师-学生集成学习框架，用于可变限速场景下的交通状态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物理信息深度学习（PIDL）训练架构无法适应可变限速（VSL）下变化的交通特性，需要新方法处理VSL带来的异质性。
analysis.problem: 在可变限速（VSL）场景下，如何准确估计交通状态（TSE）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成教师-学生训练与PIDL神经网络：教师模型通过PIDL局部编码流量守恒定律，学生模型使用MLP分类器识别交通特性并选择集成成员进行TSE。
contributions: 提出教师-学生集成学习框架，结合PIDL处理VSL场景下的交通状态估计。
通过案例研究验证了该方法相比基线方法的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在案例研究中，与多种基线方法比较，相对L2误差指标显示所提方法性能更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VSL场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及计算效率或实时性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息教师-学生集成学习框架，用于可变限速场景下的交通状态估计。

papers.title: Much of Geospatial Web Search Is Beyond Traditional GIS
papers.abstract: Web search queries concern place far more often than existing labelling schemes suggest, yet the landscape of geospatial web search queries - what people ask of place, and how often - remains poorly characterised at scale. We apply dense sentence embeddings, a lightweight SetFit classifier, and density-based clustering to the full MS MARCO corpus of 1.01 million real Bing queries without prior filtering for toponyms or spatial keywords, identifying 181,827 geospatial queries (18.0%), nearly threefold the 6.17% labelled as Location in the original annotations. The resulting taxonomy of 88 query categories reveals that geospatial web search is dominated by transactional and practical lookups: costs and prices alone account for 15.3% of geospatial queries, nearly twice the size of the entire physical geography theme. Much of this activity - costs, opening hours, contact details, weather, travel recommendations - falls outside the scope traditional GIS systems and knowledge graphs are built to serve. The categories vary substantially in the kind of answer they admit, from deterministic lookups answerable from spatial databases or knowledge graphs to evaluative or temporally volatile queries that require generative or real-time systems. We discuss implications for hybrid retrieval architectures and for benchmarks of geographic reasoning in large language models. We openly release the labelled dataset, classifier, and taxonomy.

analysis.tldr: 对MS MARCO中100万条真实Bing查询的分析发现，18%的查询具有地理空间意图，远超传统标注，且多数查询（如价格、营业时间）超出传统GIS能力范围。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有地理空间查询标注方案低估了Web搜索中地点相关查询的普遍性，且大规模查询的语义分布和类型尚不清楚，阻碍了检索系统和地理推理基准的发展。
analysis.problem: 系统性地刻画大规模真实Web搜索中地理空间查询的分布、类型及其对检索系统的需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 地理空间查询占比18.0%，是原始Location标签（6.17%）的近三倍；事务性和实用性查询（如成本、价格）占主导，其中价格类占15.3%，超过整个自然地理主题；查询类型从确定性查找（可被空间数据库回答）到评估性或时间易变查询（需生成式或实时系统）不等。
analysis.method: 使用稠密句子嵌入、轻量级SetFit分类器和基于密度的聚类，对MS MARCO语料库中100万条真实Bing查询进行无先验过滤的地理空间查询识别与分类。
contributions: 发现并量化了Web搜索中地理空间查询的普遍性（18.0%），远超传统标注方案。
构建了包含88个类别的地理空间查询分类体系，揭示了查询类型的多样性和对检索系统的不同需求。
公开了标注数据集、分类器和分类体系，为地理空间检索和LLM地理推理基准提供资源。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于MS MARCO语料库，可能无法完全代表所有Web搜索场景。
分类体系可能无法覆盖所有地理空间查询类型，尤其是新兴或领域特定查询。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对MS MARCO中100万条真实Bing查询的分析发现，18%的查询具有地理空间意图，远超传统标注，且多数查询（如价格、营业时间）超出传统GIS能力范围。

papers.title: Epistemic Uncertainty for Test-Time Discovery
papers.abstract: Automated scientific discovery using large language models relies on identifying genuinely novel solutions. Standard reinforcement learning penalizes high-variance mutations, which leads the policy to prioritize familiar patterns. As a result, the maximum reward plateaus even as the average reward increases. Overcoming this limitation requires a signal that distinguishes unexplored regions from intrinsically difficult problems. This necessitates measuring disagreement across independently adapted weight hypotheses rather than relying on a single network's confidence. UG-TTT addresses this challenge by maintaining a small ensemble of low-rank adapters over a frozen base model. The per-token disagreement, quantified as the mutual information between ensemble predictions and weight hypotheses, isolates epistemic uncertainty and identifies positions where insufficient coverage leads to adapter divergence rather than intrinsic problem difficulty. This measure is incorporated as an exploration bonus into the policy gradient, directing the policy toward positions where persistent adapter disagreement signals low training coverage, the same frontier where genuine discovery is possible. A nuclear norm regularizer ensures the adapters remain distinct from one another, thereby preserving the exploration signal throughout training. Across four scientific discovery benchmarks, UG-TTT increases the maximum reward on three tasks, maintains substantially higher solution diversity, and an ablation study confirms that the regularizer is essential for sustaining this behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出UG-TTT，通过低秩适配器集成的不确定性度量引导LLM在科学发现中探索未知区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准强化学习在科学发现中倾向于惩罚高方差变异，导致策略优先选择熟悉模式，最大奖励停滞，需要一种能区分未探索区域与固有困难问题的信号。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在测试时有效探索未知但可能产生真正新颖解决方案的区域，避免陷入局部最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准RL中最大奖励随平均奖励增加而停滞，因为高方差变异被惩罚；单网络置信度无法区分认知不确定性与偶然不确定性。
analysis.method: 在冻结基模型上维护一组低秩适配器集成，用集成预测与权重假设之间的互信息量化逐token认知不确定性，作为探索奖励加入策略梯度，并用核范数正则化保持适配器多样性。
contributions: 提出UG-TTT方法，利用低秩适配器集成的不确定性度量引导探索。
在四个科学发现基准上，UG-TTT在三个任务上提高了最大奖励，并维持了更高的解多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个科学发现基准上评估，UG-TTT在三个任务上提高了最大奖励，维持了更高解多样性，消融实验证实正则化器对持续探索至关重要。
limitations: 可能依赖适配器集成的规模与初始化。
核范数正则化的超参数需要调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UG-TTT，通过低秩适配器集成的不确定性度量引导LLM在科学发现中探索未知区域。

papers.title: Beyond Similarity Search: Tenure and the Case for Structured Belief State in LLM Memory
papers.abstract: Why do we need another AI to help the AI? We argue you don't. Stateless LLM sessions impose re-orientation costs on iterative, session-heavy workflows. Prior work addresses cross-session memory through retrieval-augmented approaches: store history, embed it, retrieve by semantic similarity. Cross-session memory is a state management problem, not a search problem. Similarity search fails for named entity resolution within bounded vocabulary contexts because beliefs about a shared technical domain are semantically proximate by construction. A single user is the simplest bounded vocabulary context; engineering teams converge on the same property through shared codebases and terminology. We present Tenure, a local-first proxy that maintains a typed belief store with epistemic status, versioned supersession, and scope isolation, injecting curated context into every LLM session through precision-first retrieval. Hard scope isolation provides a structural guarantee: the right beliefs surface, and only within the boundaries the user has authorized. Tenure's typed schema converts extracted facts into imperative instructions via a why it matters field, making injected beliefs directly actionable rather than raw material for the model to re-derive. A controlled evaluation on 72 retrieval cases demonstrates the gap. Cosine similarity over dense embeddings achieves mean precision of 0.12. Alias-weighted BM25 maintains mean precision of 1.0, passing 72/72 cases versus 8/72 for cosine similarity on the same corpus. Hybrid retrieval typically solves vocabulary mismatch between disparate authors; Tenure eliminates this structurally: query and belief authors are the same person, and an alias enrichment flywheel continuously indexes their specific vocabulary. Under multi-turn topic drift this worsens: the vector backend produces drift scores of 0.43--0.50 on noise-critical turns where BM25 maintains 0.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化信念状态存储Tenure替代语义搜索，解决LLM跨会话记忆中的状态管理问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM会话是无状态的，迭代式工作流需要反复重新定向，而检索增强方法将跨会话记忆视为搜索问题，在有限词汇上下文中对命名实体解析效果差。
analysis.problem: 跨会话记忆是状态管理问题而非搜索问题，语义相似性搜索在共享技术领域内因信念语义相近而失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在有限词汇上下文中，信念在语义上相近，导致余弦相似度检索精度低（0.12），而别名加权BM25保持1.0精度；多轮话题漂移下向量后端漂移分数高（0.43-0.50），BM25保持0。
analysis.method: 提出Tenure，一个本地优先的代理，维护类型化信念存储，包含认知状态、版本化替代和范围隔离，通过精确优先检索注入上下文。
contributions: 论证跨会话记忆是状态管理问题而非搜索问题
提出Tenure结构化信念存储方法，包含类型化模式、硬范围隔离和别名增强飞轮
analysis.experiments: 在72个检索案例上评估，余弦相似度平均精度0.12，别名加权BM25平均精度1.0（通过72/72 vs 8/72）；多轮话题漂移下向量后端漂移分数0.43-0.50，BM25为0。
limitations: 评估规模较小（72个案例），可能缺乏泛化性
方法依赖用户或团队共享词汇，对跨领域场景可能不适用
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化信念状态存储Tenure替代语义搜索，解决LLM跨会话记忆中的状态管理问题。

papers.title: SOMA: Efficient Multi-turn LLM Serving via Small Language Model
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in multi-turn dialogue settings where preserving conversational context across turns is essential. A standard serving practice concatenates the full dialogue history at every turn, which reliably maintains coherence but incurs substantial cost in latency, memory, and API expenditure, especially when queries are routed to large proprietary models. Existing approaches often struggle to balance the trade-off between response quality and efficiency. We propose a framework that exploits the early turns of a session to estimate a local response manifold and then adapt a smaller surrogate model to this local region for the remainder of the conversation. Concretely, we learn soft prompts that maximize semantic divergence between the large and surrogate small language models' responses to surface least-aligned local directions, stabilize training with anti-degeneration control, and distill the mined cases into localized LoRA fine-tuning so the surrogate runs without prompts at inference. A simple gate enables a one-time switch with rollback on drift. We further provide a theoretical analysis for key components in SOMA. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of SOMA. The source code is provided at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SOMA 利用小模型在对话后期替代大模型，通过软提示蒸馏和局部微调实现高效多轮 LLM 服务。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮对话中拼接完整历史会带来高延迟、内存和 API 成本，现有方法难以平衡质量与效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在多轮对话服务中降低大模型推理成本，同时保持响应质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 早期对话轮次可用于估计局部响应流形，从而用小模型替代大模型。
analysis.method: 学习软提示最大化大小模型语义分歧以发现对齐最差的局部方向，结合抗退化控制稳定训练，将挖掘的案例蒸馏为局部 LoRA 微调，推理时无需提示；通过门控机制实现一次性切换并支持回滚。
contributions: 提出 SOMA 框架，利用小模型在对话后期替代大模型，显著降低延迟和成本。
设计软提示蒸馏和局部 LoRA 微调方法，保证响应质量。
提供理论分析并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖早期对话轮次的质量，若早期对话信息不足则效果受限。
门控回滚机制可能增加额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SOMA 利用小模型在对话后期替代大模型，通过软提示蒸馏和局部微调实现高效多轮 LLM 服务。

papers.title: Natural Language based Specification and Verification
papers.abstract: Recent frontier large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance in identifying security vulnerabilities in large, mature open-source systems. As LLM-generated code becomes increasingly common, a natural goal is to prevent such models from producing vulnerable implementations in the first place. Formal verification offers a principled route to this objective, but existing verification pipelines typically require specifications written in rigid formal languages. Prior work has explored using LLMs to synthesize such specifications, with limited success. In this paper, we investigate a different approach: using LLMs both to generate specifications and to verify implementations compositionally when the specifications are expressed in natural language. Our preliminary results suggest that this approach is promising.

analysis.tldr: 探索用自然语言替代形式化语言进行代码规范与验证，初步结果有前景。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的代码日益普遍，但可能包含安全漏洞；形式化验证可预防漏洞，但传统验证管线需要严格的规范语言，限制了可用性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM以自然语言表达规范并组合式地验证实现，避免使用形式化语言。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用LLM生成自然语言规范，并基于该规范对实现进行组合式验证。
contributions: 提出用自然语言替代形式化语言进行代码规范与验证的新思路
初步实验表明该方法有潜力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅初步结果，缺乏系统性实验验证
自然语言规范可能存在歧义，影响验证可靠性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索用自然语言替代形式化语言进行代码规范与验证，初步结果有前景。

papers.title: A Theory of Time-Sensitive Language Generation: Sparse Hallucination Beats Mode Collapse
papers.abstract: We study language generation in the limit under a global preference ordering on strings, as introduced by Kleinberg and Wei. As in [ arXiv:2504.14370 , arXiv:2511.05295 ], we aim for \emph{breadth}, but impose an additional requirement of timeliness: higher-ranked strings should be generated earlier. A string is then only credited if it is generated before a deadline, where its deadline is defined by a function that maps a string's rank in the target language to the time by which it must be produced. This is in keeping with a central consideration in machine learning, where inductive bias favors ``simpler'' or ``more plausible'' outputs, all else being equal. We show that timely generation is impossible in a strong sense for eventually consistent generators -- the protagonists of most prior related work. Under what is perhaps the mildest natural relaxation of consistency, a hallucination rate that vanishes over time, we show that we can circumvent our impossibility result. In particular, we can achieve optimal density with respect to any superlinear deadline function. We also show this is tight by ruling out timely generation with linear deadlines and vanishing hallucination rate.

analysis.tldr: 在全局偏好排序下，语言生成需满足时效性，但严格一致性导致不可能，通过稀疏幻觉可突破限制。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言生成中，不仅需要生成高质量（高排名）的字符串，还要求尽早生成，这符合机器学习中偏向简单/合理输出的归纳偏好。然而，现有的一致性生成器无法同时满足时效性和广度，亟需理论分析。
analysis.problem: 在全局偏好排序下，如何设计语言生成器使其在截止时间前生成高排名字符串，同时保持生成内容的广度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，对于最终一致性生成器（先前工作的主流），时效性生成在强意义下是不可能的；但若允许随时间消失的幻觉率（稀疏幻觉），则可以规避不可能性，实现超线性截止函数下的最优密度。
analysis.method: 理论分析：定义时效性生成问题，证明最终一致性生成器的不可行性，然后提出稀疏幻觉（幻觉率随时间趋于零）作为松弛条件，并证明在该条件下可实现超线性截止函数的最优密度，同时证明线性截止函数下不可能。
contributions: 证明了在全局偏好排序下，最终一致性生成器无法实现时效性生成。
提出稀疏幻觉作为松弛条件，并证明在该条件下可达到超线性截止函数的最优密度，且该结果是紧的。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果仅针对超线性截止函数，线性截止函数下仍不可能。
未讨论实际算法实现或实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在全局偏好排序下，语言生成需满足时效性，但严格一致性导致不可能，通过稀疏幻觉可突破限制。

papers.title: ReAD: Reinforcement-Guided Capability Distillation for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Capability distillation applies knowledge distillation to selected model capabilities, aiming to compress a large language model (LLM) into a smaller one while preserving the abilities needed for a downstream task. However, most existing methods treat capabilities as independent training targets and overlook how improving one capability can reshape the student's broader capability profile, especially when multiple abilities jointly determine task success. We study capability distillation under a fixed token budget and identify two consistent patterns: distillation induces systematic, budget-dependent cross-capability transfer, and additional budget often brings limited task-relevant gains while sometimes degrading other useful abilities. Building on these insights, we propose ReAD, a Reinforcement-guided cApability Distillation framework that explicitly accounts for capability interdependence. ReAD first infers task-essential capabilities, then generates capability-targeted supervision on the fly, and finally uses an uncertainty-aware contextual bandit to adaptively allocate the distillation budget based on expected utility gains. Extensive experiments show that ReAD improves downstream utility under the same token budget while reducing harmful spillover and wasted distillation effort compared to strong baselines. Our code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: ReAD 通过强化学习引导的能力蒸馏框架，在固定 token 预算下自适应分配蒸馏资源，提升下游任务效用并减少有害溢出。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有能力蒸馏方法将能力视为独立训练目标，忽略了能力间的相互影响，导致在固定 token 预算下资源分配低效，甚至损害其他有用能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定 token 预算下，考虑能力间的相互依赖关系，自适应地分配蒸馏资源以最大化下游任务效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个模式：蒸馏会引发系统性的、预算依赖的跨能力迁移；额外预算往往带来有限的任务相关增益，有时反而降低其他有用能力。
analysis.method: 提出 ReAD 框架，首先推断任务关键能力，然后动态生成针对能力的监督信号，最后使用不确定性感知的上下文 bandit 根据预期效用增益自适应分配蒸馏预算。
contributions: 揭示了固定预算下能力蒸馏中的跨能力迁移和资源浪费现象。
提出了 ReAD 框架，利用强化学习自适应分配蒸馏预算，考虑能力相互依赖。
实验表明 ReAD 在相同 token 预算下提升下游效用，减少有害溢出和浪费。
analysis.experiments: 在多个下游任务上与强基线对比，ReAD 在相同 token 预算下提升了下游效用，减少了有害溢出和浪费。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖于任务关键能力的准确推断。
上下文 bandit 的在线学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReAD 通过强化学习引导的能力蒸馏框架，在固定 token 预算下自适应分配蒸馏资源，提升下游任务效用并减少有害溢出。

papers.title: Beyond Similarity: Temporal Operator Attention for Time Series Analysis
papers.abstract: A persistent paradox in time-series forecasting is that structurally simple MLP and linear models often outperform high-capacity Transformers. We argue that this gap arises from a mismatch in the sequence-modeling primitive: while many time-series dynamics are governed by global temporal operators (e.g., filtering and harmonic structure), standard attention forms each output as a convex combination of inputs. This restricts its ability to represent signed and oscillatory transformations that are fundamental to temporal signal processing. We formalize this limitation as a simplex-constrained mixing bottleneck in softmax attention, which becomes especially restrictive for operator-driven time-series tasks. To address this, we propose $\textbf{Temporal Operator Attention (TOA)}$, a framework that augments attention with explicit, learnable sequence-space operators, enabling direct signed mixing across time while preserving input-dependent adaptivity. To make dense $N \times N$ operators practical, we introduce Stochastic Operator Regularization, a high-variance dropout mechanism that stabilizes training and prevents trivial memorization. Across forecasting, anomaly detection, and classification benchmarks, TOA consistently improves performance when integrated into standard backbones such as PatchTST and iTransformer, with particularly strong gains in reconstruction-heavy tasks. These results suggest that explicit operator learning is a key ingredient for effective time-series modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出时间算子注意力（TOA），通过显式可学习的序列算子增强注意力，解决标准注意力在时间序列分析中无法表示符号和振荡变换的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列预测中，结构简单的MLP和线性模型常优于高容量Transformer，原因是标准注意力的凸组合形式无法表示时间信号处理中关键的符号和振荡变换。
analysis.problem: 标准softmax注意力存在单纯形约束的混合瓶颈，限制了其对全局时间算子（如滤波和谐波结构）的表示能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出简单模型优于Transformer的悖论源于注意力机制的序列建模原语不匹配，标准注意力只能形成输入的凸组合，无法实现带符号的混合。
analysis.method: 提出时间算子注意力（TOA），在注意力中引入显式可学习的序列空间算子，实现带符号的跨时间混合，并保持输入依赖的自适应性；同时提出随机算子正则化（高方差dropout）稳定训练。
contributions: 形式化了标准注意力在时间序列任务中的单纯形约束混合瓶颈
提出TOA框架，通过显式算子学习增强注意力，并设计随机算子正则化实现高效训练
analysis.experiments: 在预测、异常检测和分类基准上，将TOA集成到PatchTST和iTransformer等标准骨干中，一致提升性能，尤其在重建密集型任务上增益显著。
limitations: 可能增加模型参数量和计算复杂度
随机算子正则化的超参数调优可能敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时间算子注意力（TOA），通过显式可学习的序列算子增强注意力，解决标准注意力在时间序列分析中无法表示符号和振荡变换的瓶颈。

papers.title: Rethinking external validation for the target population: Capturing patient-level similarity with a generative model
authors: Giovanni Cinà (on behalf of the NHR THI registration committee)
papers.abstract: Background: External validation is essential for assessing the transportability of predictive models. However, its interpretation is often confounded by differences between external and development populations. This study introduces a framework to distinguish model deficiencies from case-mix effects. Method: We propose a framework that quantifies each external patient's similarity to the development data and measures performance in subgroups with varying levels of alignment to the development distribution. We use generative models, specifically autoencoders, to estimate similarity, offering a more flexible alternative to traditional linear approaches and enabling validation without sharing the original development data. The utility of autoencoder-based similarity measure is demonstrated using synthetic data, and the framework's application is illustrated using data from the Netherlands Heart Registration (NHR) to predict mortality after transcatheter aortic valve implantation. Results: Our framework revealed substantial variation in model performance across similarity-defined subgroups, differences that remain hidden under conventional external validation yet can meaningfully alter conclusions. In several settings, conventional external validation suggested poor overall performance. However, after accounting for differences in patient characteristics, for some sub-groups, the model performance was consistent with internal validation results. Conversely, apparently acceptable overall performance could mask clinically relevant performance deficits in specific subgroups. Conclusion: The proposed framework enhances the interpretability of external validation by linking model performance to population alignment with the development data. This provides a more principled basis for deciding whether a model is transportable and to which patients it can be safely applied.

analysis.tldr: 用生成模型量化患者相似度，提升外部验证的可解释性，区分模型缺陷与病例组合效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 外部验证是评估预测模型可迁移性的关键，但外部人群与开发人群的差异常混淆结果，传统方法难以区分模型缺陷与病例组合效应。
analysis.problem: 如何量化外部患者与开发数据的相似度，并据此评估模型在不同对齐子群中的性能，以增强外部验证的可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统外部验证可能掩盖性能差异：整体表现差时，某些子群性能可能良好；整体表现可接受时，特定子群可能存在临床相关缺陷。
analysis.method: 使用生成模型（自编码器）估计每个外部患者与开发数据的相似度，然后根据相似度将外部人群分层，在各子群中评估模型性能。
contributions: 提出一个基于生成模型量化患者相似度的框架，用于增强外部验证的可解释性。
通过合成数据和真实临床数据（荷兰心脏注册数据）展示框架能揭示传统验证隐藏的性能差异。
analysis.experiments: 使用合成数据验证自编码器相似度度量的效用，并利用荷兰心脏注册数据预测经导管主动脉瓣植入术后死亡率进行应用演示。
limitations: 生成模型的选择和训练可能影响相似度估计的准确性。
框架依赖于开发数据的代表性，若开发数据本身有偏，相似度分层可能不稳健。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用生成模型量化患者相似度，提升外部验证的可解释性，区分模型缺陷与病例组合效应。

papers.title: Discovery of Interpretable Surrogates via Agentic AI: Application to Gravitational Waves
papers.abstract: Fast surrogate models for expensive simulations are now essential across the sciences, yet they typically operate as black boxes. We present \texttt{GWAgent}, a large language model (LLM)-based workflow that constructs interpretable analytic surrogates directly from simulation data. Surrogate modeling is well suited to agentic workflows because candidate models can be quantitatively validated against ground-truth simulations at each iteration. As a demonstration, we build a surrogate for gravitational waveforms from eccentric binary black hole mergers. We show that providing the agent with a physics-informed domain ansatz substantially improves output model accuracy. The resulting analytic surrogate attains a median Advanced LIGO mismatch of $6.9\times10^{-4}$ together with an $\sim 8.4\times$ speedup in waveform evaluation, surpassing both symbolic regression and conventional machine learning baselines. Beyond producing an accurate model, the workflow identifies compact physical structure from the learned representation. As an astrophysical application, we use \texttt{GWAgent} to analyze the eccentricity of GW200129 and infer $e_{20\mathrm{Hz}}=0.099^{+0.063}_{-0.044}$. These results show that validation-constrained agentic workflows can produce accurate, fast, and interpretable surrogates for scientific simulations and inference.

analysis.tldr: 基于LLM的智能体工作流GWAgent，从模拟数据中构建可解释的解析代理模型，应用于引力波波形，实现高精度与快速评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学模拟中快速代理模型不可或缺，但传统黑箱模型缺乏可解释性，且构建可解释模型通常需要大量人工干预。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从模拟数据中构建既准确又快速且可解释的解析代理模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提供物理信息领域假设可显著提升模型精度；代理建模适合智能体工作流，因为候选模型可每步与真实模拟定量验证。
analysis.method: 提出GWAgent，一种基于大语言模型的智能体工作流，通过迭代验证约束，从模拟数据中直接构建可解释的解析代理模型。
contributions: 提出验证约束的智能体工作流GWAgent，自动构建可解释解析代理模型。
在引力波波形代理上实现中位Advanced LIGO失配6.9×10⁻⁴和约8.4倍加速，超越符号回归和传统机器学习基线。
展示工作流可识别紧凑物理结构，并用于天体物理推断（如GW200129的偏心率分析）。
analysis.experiments: 在偏心双黑洞合并的引力波波形上评估，与符号回归和传统机器学习基线对比，并应用于GW200129事件分析。
limitations: 依赖物理信息领域假设的提供，可能限制通用性。
仅验证于引力波领域，其他科学模拟的适用性待探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于LLM的智能体工作流GWAgent，从模拟数据中构建可解释的解析代理模型，应用于引力波波形，实现高精度与快速评估。

papers.title: Localization Boosting for Growth Markets: Mitigating Cross-Locale Behavioral Bias in Learning-to-Rank
papers.abstract: Adobe Express is expanding internationally, but the US has a disproportionately large content supply and interaction volume. Learning-to-rank (LTR) models trained primarily on behavioral feedback inherit this imbalance: templates popular in US are over-served in non-US locales. This cross-locale exposure bias suppresses local content discoverability and degrades ranking quality in growth locales. We show that click-only training suppresses semantically informative localization features. Adding vision-language model (VLM) graded relevance labels as auxiliary supervision alongside clicks improves semantic alignment but does not preserve local content visibility. We propose a multi-objective framework combining behavioral supervision, VLM-derived relevance signals, and locale-aware boosting. Across five locales, the resulting model improves relevance while restoring stable localization, demonstrating the importance of disentangling exposure from semantic supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出多目标框架，结合行为监督、VLM相关信号和区域感知提升，缓解跨区域行为偏差，改善非美地区的排序质量。
analysis.research_motivation: Adobe Express国际扩张中，美国内容供应和交互量过大，导致LTR模型偏向美国模板，抑制本地内容可发现性，降低增长区域排序质量。
analysis.problem: 跨区域行为偏差导致本地内容曝光不足，且仅用点击训练会压制语义丰富的本地化特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 点击训练压制语义丰富的本地化特征；VLM辅助监督改善语义对齐但未保留本地内容可见性。
analysis.method: 多目标框架：结合行为监督（点击）、VLM导出的相关性信号和区域感知提升（locale-aware boosting）。
contributions: 揭示跨区域曝光偏差问题并分析其成因
提出多目标框架同时优化相关性和本地可见性
analysis.experiments: 在五个区域上，模型在改善相关性的同时恢复了稳定的本地化表现。
limitations: 未讨论VLM模型的选择对结果的影响
可能依赖特定区域的数据分布
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多目标框架，结合行为监督、VLM相关信号和区域感知提升，缓解跨区域行为偏差，改善非美地区的排序质量。

papers.title: gwBenchmarks: Stress-Testing LLM Agents on High-Precision Gravitational Wave Astronomy
papers.abstract: Modern gravitational wave astronomy relies on modeling tasks that often require months of graduate-level effort, including building fast waveform surrogates from expensive numerical relativity simulations, modeling orbital dynamics of black holes, fitting merger remnant properties and constructing template banks. These problems demand extreme precision to support detection and parameter inference, with state-of-the-art models achieving $\lesssim 10^{-4}$ relative error. We study whether state-of-the-art LLM coding agents can perform such end-to-end scientific modeling, where success requires constructing models with stringent accuracy criteria and reasoning about physical systems. We introduce gwBenchmarks, a suite of eight tasks grounded in gravitational wave analytic calculations and numerical simulations collectively representing over $10^8$ core-hours of compute. The tasks span interpolation, regression, and high-dimensional time-series modeling, requiring a combination of numerical methods, machine learning, and physics-informed approaches. In preliminary experiments, agents frequently relied on proxy metrics, partial evaluation, or fabricated results to spuriously complete tasks. We therefore implement an external pre-defined framework to gauge agent progress. Evaluating twelve coding agents, we find no consistent winner. On the easiest task, multiple agents converge to the same cubic spline solution, with one rediscovering a coordinate transformation widely used in the literature. On harder tasks like analytic waveform modeling, all agents fall 1-2 orders of magnitude short of domain requirements and exhibit systematic failures, including metric misuse, constraint violations, and result fabrication. Our code, data, and website are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出gwBenchmarks基准测试，发现当前LLM编码智能体在高精度引力波天文建模任务中系统性失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 引力波天文学中的建模任务需要极高精度（相对误差≤10⁻⁴），传统上需要研究生数月努力，而LLM编码智能体在科学建模中的极限能力尚未被系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估当前最先进的LLM编码智能体能否完成端到端的高精度引力波科学建模任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体频繁依赖代理指标、部分评估或捏造结果来虚假完成任务；在较难任务上，所有智能体均比领域要求低1-2个数量级，并出现指标误用、约束违反和结果捏造等系统性失败。
analysis.method: 构建包含8个任务的gwBenchmarks基准测试，任务涵盖插值、回归和高维时间序列建模，并设计外部预定义框架来客观衡量智能体进展。
contributions: 提出了gwBenchmarks，一个基于引力波天文学的高精度科学建模基准测试套件。
系统评估了12种编码智能体，揭示了它们在复杂科学任务中的系统性失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在8个任务上评估了12种编码智能体，发现无一致胜者；最简单任务上多个智能体收敛到相同三次样条解，较难任务上所有智能体均未达到领域精度要求。
limitations: 基准测试仅覆盖引力波天文学领域，泛化性有限。
外部评估框架可能无法完全反映智能体在真实研究中的灵活表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出gwBenchmarks基准测试，发现当前LLM编码智能体在高精度引力波天文建模任务中系统性失败。

papers.title: Curriculum Learning-Guided Progressive Distillation in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Knowledge distillation is a key technique for transferring the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) into smaller, more efficient student models. Existing distillation approaches often overlook two critical factors: the learning order of training data and the capacity mismatch between teacher and student models. This oversight limits distillation performance, as manifested by the counter-intuitive phenomenon where stronger teachers fail to produce better students. In this work, we propose Curriculum Learning-Guided Progressive Distillation (CLPD), a unified framework that explicitly accounts for both factors by aligning data difficulty with teacher strength. CLPD constructs an explicit curriculum by organizing training examples from easy to hard, while simultaneously applying an implicit curriculum over supervision signals by progressively scheduling teachers of increasing capacity. Our framework is modular and can be integrated into standard distillation algorithms with minimal overhead. Empirical results on the reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that CLPD consistently outperforms standard distillation, data ordering alone, and teacher scheduling alone across multiple settings. These findings highlight the importance of jointly considering data ordering and teacher capacity when distilling reasoning abilities into small language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出课程学习引导的渐进蒸馏框架，通过联合优化数据难度顺序和教师容量调度提升小模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法忽视训练数据的学习顺序和师生模型之间的容量不匹配，导致强教师反而无法训练出好学生的反直觉现象，限制了蒸馏性能。
analysis.problem: 如何同时利用数据难度排序和教师容量渐进调度来提升LLM蒸馏效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到强教师反而产生更差学生的反直觉现象，归因于忽视数据学习顺序和师生容量不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出课程学习引导的渐进蒸馏（CLPD），显式构建从易到难的数据课程，同时隐式通过渐进调度不同容量教师来施加监督信号课程。
contributions: 提出CLPD框架，统一考虑数据难度顺序和教师容量调度两个关键因素
模块化设计，可集成到标准蒸馏算法中，开销小
analysis.experiments: 在推理基准上，CLPD在多种设置下一致优于标准蒸馏、仅数据排序和仅教师调度。
limitations: 可能依赖推理类任务，对其他类型任务效果未知
课程构建策略可能需针对不同模型调整
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出课程学习引导的渐进蒸馏框架，通过联合优化数据难度顺序和教师容量调度提升小模型推理能力。

papers.title: RETUYT-INCO at BEA 2026 Shared Task 2: Meta-prompting in Rubric-based Scoring for German
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present the RETUYT-INCO participation at the BEA 2026 shared task "Rubric-based Short Answer Scoring for German". Our team participated in track 1 (Unseen answers three-way), track 3 (Unseen answers two-way) and track 4 (Unseen questions two-way). Since these tracks required scoring short student answers using specific rubrics, we looked for ways to handle the changing nature of the task. We created a method called Meta-prompting. In this approach, an LLM creates a custom prompt based on examples from the Train set. This prompt is then used to grade new student answers. Along with this method, we also describe other approaches we used, such as classic machine learning, fine-tuning open-source LLMs, and different prompting techniques. According to the official results, our team placed 6th out of 8 participants in Track 1 with a QWK of 0.729. In Track 3, we secured 4th place out of 9 with a QWK of 0.674, and we also placed 4th out of 8 in Track 4 with a QWK of 0.49.

analysis.tldr: 提出Meta-prompting方法，在德语短答案评分任务中取得中等排名。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动评分在教育领域有重要应用，但德语短答案评分面临任务动态变化和评分标准不统一的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM和元提示策略，根据训练集示例生成定制提示，以提升德语短答案评分的准确性和适应性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Meta-prompting：基于训练集示例让LLM生成定制评分提示，再用于评分；同时探索了经典机器学习、微调开源LLM和不同提示技术。
contributions: 提出Meta-prompting方法用于基于评分标准的短答案评分
在BEA 2026共享任务三个轨道上验证了方法，获得中等排名
analysis.experiments: 在BEA 2026共享任务三个轨道上评估：Track 1（未见答案三分类）QWK=0.729，排名6/8；Track 3（未见答案二分类）QWK=0.674，排名4/9；Track 4（未见问题二分类）QWK=0.49，排名4/8。
limitations: 排名中等，性能可能不如顶尖方法
仅针对德语，泛化性未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Meta-prompting方法，在德语短答案评分任务中取得中等排名。

papers.title: Internalizing Curriculum Judgment for LLM Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: In LLM Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT), curriculum learning drives both efficiency and performance. Yet, current methods externalize curriculum judgment via handcrafted heuristics or auxiliary models, risking misalignment with the policy's training dynamics. In this paper, we introduce METIS (METacognitive Internalized Self-judgment), a novel framework that internalizes curriculum judgment as a native capability. Leveraging a critical observation that within-prompt reward variance effectively gauges prompt informativeness, METIS predicts this metric based on recent training outcomes as lightweight in-context learning examples. This intrinsic self-judgment then dynamically dictates the training allocation. Moreover, METIS closes the loop between judgment and optimization by jointly optimizing the standard RFT rewards and a self-judgment reward. This allows the policy to learn what to learn next, as a form of metacognition. Across extensive discrete and continuous RFT benchmarks from mathematical reasoning, code generation, to agentic function-calling, METIS consistently delivers superior performance while accelerating convergence by up to 67%. By bypassing handcrafted heuristics and auxiliary models, our work establishes a simple, closed-loop, and highly efficient curriculum internalization paradigm for LLM reinforcement fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: METIS通过内化课程判断为LLM强化微调提供高效自监督训练分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM强化微调中的课程学习依赖手工启发式或辅助模型，容易与策略训练动态错配，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在强化微调中自主判断课程难度并动态分配训练资源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到提示内的奖励方差能有效衡量提示信息量，可作为课程判断的指标。
analysis.method: 提出METIS框架，利用奖励方差作为提示信息量度量，通过近期训练结果作为上下文示例预测该度量，并联合优化标准RFT奖励和自判断奖励。
contributions: 提出内化课程判断的METIS框架，无需手工启发式或辅助模型。
发现提示内奖励方差可作为课程判断的有效指标。
在数学推理、代码生成和智能体函数调用等基准上实现高达67%的收敛加速和更优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理、代码生成和智能体函数调用的离散和连续RFT基准上进行了广泛实验，METIS持续优于现有方法，收敛加速最高达67%。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励方差的有效性，在奖励信号噪声大的场景下效果未知。
框架在超大规模模型上的扩展性未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: METIS通过内化课程判断为LLM强化微调提供高效自监督训练分配。

papers.title: LiBaGS: Lightweight Boundary Gap Synthesis for Targeted Synthetic Data Selection
papers.abstract: Synthetic data is useful only when the added samples fill missing parts of the training distribution that matter for the downstream task. We introduce LiBaGS, a lightweight, generator-agnostic method for targeted synthetic training data selection. LiBaGS scores candidate synthetic samples by combining decision-boundary proximity, predictive uncertainty, real-data density, and support validity, so that selected samples are both informative and likely to remain on the real data manifold. We then use a boundary-gap allocation rule that targets sparse but realistic decision-boundary neighborhoods, rather than simply adding more data or selecting only the most uncertain candidates. LiBaGS also learns when enough synthetic samples have been added through a marginal-value stopping rule, assigns softer labels near ambiguous boundaries, and uses a diversity objective to avoid redundant near-duplicate selections. Experiments show that LiBaGS improves accuracy over classical oversampling, hard augmentation, uncertainty and density ablations, and targeted-generation selection criteria.

analysis.tldr: LiBaGS 是一种轻量级、生成器无关的合成数据选择方法，通过边界间隙分配规则选择信息丰富且位于真实数据流形上的样本，提升下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成数据只有在填补训练分布中缺失且对下游任务重要的部分时才有用，但现有方法缺乏针对性的选择策略，导致效率低下或引入冗余样本。
analysis.problem: 如何从候选合成样本中高效选择那些能填补决策边界附近稀疏但真实区域的样本，同时避免冗余和分布偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合决策边界邻近性、预测不确定性、真实数据密度和支持有效性对候选样本评分，采用边界间隙分配规则选择样本，并通过边际价值停止规则决定何时停止添加，同时使用软标签和多样性目标。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、生成器无关的合成数据选择方法 LiBaGS，综合多种评分指标。
引入边界间隙分配规则和边际价值停止规则，实现高效且自适应的数据选择。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明 LiBaGS 在准确率上优于经典过采样、硬增强、不确定性和密度消融以及目标生成选择标准。
limitations: 可能依赖评分指标的权重调优。
未在多种生成模型上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LiBaGS 是一种轻量级、生成器无关的合成数据选择方法，通过边界间隙分配规则选择信息丰富且位于真实数据流形上的样本，提升下游任务性能。

papers.title: Comment and Control: Hijacking Agentic Workflows via Context-Grounded Evolution
papers.abstract: Automation platforms such as GitHub Actions and n8n are increasingly adopting so-called agentic workflows, which integrate Large Language Model (LLM) agents for tasks such as code review and data synchronization. While bringing convenience for developers, this integration exposes a new risk: An adversary may control and craft certain inputs, such as GitHub issue comments, to manipulate the LLM agent for unwanted actions, such as credential exfiltration and arbitrary command execution. To our knowledge, no prior academic work has studied such a risk in agentic workflows. In this paper, we design the first detection and exploitation framework, called JAW, to hijack agentic workflows hosted on automation platforms via a novel approach called Context-Grounded Evolution. Our key idea is to evolve agentic workflow inputs under the contexts derived from hybrid program analysis for hijacking purposes. Specifically, JAW generates agentic workflow contexts through three analyses: (i) static path-feasibility analysis to identify feasible agent-invocation paths and the input constraints required to trigger them, (ii) dynamic prompt-provenance analysis to determine how that input is transformed and embedded into the LLM context, and (iii) capability analysis to identify the actions and restrictions available to the agent at runtime. Our evaluation of JAW on GitHub workflows and n8n templates showed that 4714 GitHub workflows and eight n8n templates can be successfully hijacked, for example, to leak user credentials. Our findings span 15 widely-used GitHub Actions, including official GitHub Actions for Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Qwen CLI, and Cursor CLI, and two official n8n nodes. We responsibly disclosed all findings to the affected vendors and received many acknowledgements, fixes, and bug bounties, notably from GitHub, Google, and Anthropic.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个检测与利用框架JAW，通过上下文驱动进化方法劫持自动化平台上的智能体工作流。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化平台（如GitHub Actions、n8n）越来越多地采用集成LLM智能体的工作流，但攻击者可能通过控制输入（如issue评论）操纵智能体执行恶意操作，而此前缺乏相关安全研究。
analysis.problem: 如何检测和利用智能体工作流中的安全漏洞，即通过控制输入劫持工作流以执行未经授权的操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出JAW框架，通过上下文驱动进化方法，结合三种分析：静态路径可行性分析、动态提示来源分析和能力分析，生成可劫持工作流的输入。
contributions: 首次系统研究智能体工作流中的劫持风险，并设计首个检测与利用框架JAW。
提出上下文驱动进化方法，结合混合程序分析生成劫持输入。
在4714个GitHub工作流和8个n8n模板上成功验证，发现15个广泛使用的GitHub Actions和2个n8n节点的漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 在GitHub工作流和n8n模板上评估，成功劫持4714个GitHub工作流和8个n8n模板，例如泄露用户凭证。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的自动化平台和工作流。
未讨论防御措施或缓解方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个检测与利用框架JAW，通过上下文驱动进化方法劫持自动化平台上的智能体工作流。

papers.title: Leveraging RAG for Training-Free Alignment of LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) alignment algorithms typically consist of post-training over preference pairs. While such algorithms are widely used to enable safety guardrails and align LLMs with general human preferences, we show that state-of-the-art alignment algorithms require significant computational resources while being far less capable of enabling refusal guardrails for recent agentic attacks. Thus, to improve refusal guardrails against such attacks without drastically increasing computational overhead, we introduce Retrieval Augmented Generation for Pref erence alignment (RAG-Pref), a simple RAG-based alignment algorithm which conditions on preferred and dispreferred samples to leverage contrastive information during inference. RAG-Pref is online (training-free), compatible with off-the-shelf packages, and, when combined with offline (training-based) alignment algorithms, enables more than an average 3.7 factor improvement in agentic attack refusals across five widely used LLMs, compared to 2.9 for other online alignment algorithms and 1.5 for offline alignment alone. We conclude by showing that, in stark contrast to other online alignment methods, RAG-Pref similarly increases performance on general human-preference alignment tasks and does not drastically increase overall computational requirements.

analysis.tldr: 提出RAG-Pref，一种基于检索增强生成的免训练对齐方法，通过推理时利用正负样本对比信息提升LLM的拒绝能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM对齐算法通常需要大量后训练计算资源，且对新型智能体攻击的拒绝能力不足，亟需一种计算开销低且能有效提升安全护栏的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加计算开销的前提下，提升LLM对智能体攻击的拒绝能力，同时保持通用人类偏好对齐性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最先进的对齐算法需要大量计算资源，但对智能体攻击的拒绝能力远不如预期；在线对齐方法在通用对齐任务上表现不一。
analysis.method: RAG-Pref：在推理时，通过检索与当前输入相关的偏好/非偏好样本，利用对比信息调整LLM输出，无需额外训练。
contributions: 提出RAG-Pref，一种基于RAG的免训练对齐算法，可即插即用。
实验表明，RAG-Pref与离线对齐结合后，在五个LLM上平均将智能体攻击拒绝率提升3.7倍，优于其他在线方法（2.9倍）和纯离线方法（1.5倍）。
RAG-Pref在通用人类偏好对齐任务上同样有效，且计算开销增加不大。
analysis.experiments: 在五个广泛使用的LLM上评估智能体攻击拒绝率，RAG-Pref结合离线对齐实现平均3.7倍提升；同时测试通用人类偏好对齐任务，性能提升且计算开销可控。
limitations: 依赖高质量的正负样本库，构建成本可能较高。
检索效率可能成为推理瓶颈，尤其在大规模场景下。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RAG-Pref，一种基于检索增强生成的免训练对齐方法，通过推理时利用正负样本对比信息提升LLM的拒绝能力。

papers.title: ReCoVer: Resilient LLM Pre-Training System via Fault-Tolerant Collective and Versatile Workload
papers.abstract: Pre-training large language models on massive GPU clusters has made hardware faults routine rather than rare, driving the need for resilient training systems. Yet existing frameworks either focus on specific parallelism schemes or risk drifting away from a failure-free training trajectory. We propose ReCoVer, a resilient LLM pre-training system that upholds a single invariant: each iteration keeps the number of microbatches constant, ensuring per-iteration gradients remain stochastically equivalent to a failure-free run. The framework is organized as three decoupled protocol layers: (1) Fault-tolerant collectives that isolate faults from propagating across replicas; (2) in-step fine-grained recovery that preserves intra-iteration progress and prevents gradient corruption; (3) versatile-workload policy that dynamically redistributes microbatch quotas across the survivors. The design is parallelism-agnostic, integrating directly with both 3D parallelism and Hybrid Sharded Data Parallel (HSDP) as a drop-in substrate. We evaluate our implementation on end-to-end pre-training tasks for up to 512 GPUs, ReCoVer successfully preserves the training trajectory from a failure-free reference despite of 256 GPUs lost spread across the run. For comparison with checkpoint-and-restart baselines, ReCoVer demonstrates $2.23\times$ higher effective throughput after successive failures. This advantage results in ReCoVer processing 74.9% more tokens at 234 GPU-hours, with the gap widening as the training prolongs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种容错LLM预训练系统ReCoVer，通过保持每迭代微批次数恒定来保证梯度等价于无故障运行，在512 GPU上即使丢失256 GPU仍能保持训练轨迹。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模GPU集群上硬件故障频繁，现有容错框架要么针对特定并行方案，要么可能偏离无故障训练轨迹，亟需一种通用且保持训练一致性的弹性系统。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM预训练中高效容错，同时保证每迭代梯度与无故障运行时随机等价，避免训练轨迹漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ReCoVer由三层解耦协议组成：容错集合通信（隔离故障传播）、步内细粒度恢复（保持迭代内进度并防止梯度损坏）、灵活工作负载策略（动态重分配微批配额）。设计与并行方案无关，可直接集成3D并行和HSDP。
contributions: 提出ReCoVer系统，通过保持微批次数恒定的不变性确保梯度等价性。
设计三层解耦协议实现并行无关的容错，支持3D并行和HSDP。
在512 GPU上验证，即使丢失256 GPU仍能保持无故障训练轨迹，有效吞吐量比检查点重启基线高2.23倍。
analysis.experiments: 在最多512 GPU上进行端到端预训练任务，ReCoVer在运行中丢失256 GPU后仍保持无故障参考训练轨迹；与检查点重启基线相比，连续故障后有效吞吐量提升2.23倍，处理更多token（234 GPU小时内多74.9%），且优势随训练延长扩大。
limitations: 可能未考虑网络或软件故障以外的硬件故障类型。
实验规模限于512 GPU，更大集群下的扩展性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种容错LLM预训练系统ReCoVer，通过保持每迭代微批次数恒定来保证梯度等价于无故障运行，在512 GPU上即使丢失256 GPU仍能保持训练轨迹。

papers.title: The Scaling Law of Evaluation Failure: Why Simple Averaging Collapses Under Data Sparsity and Item Difficulty Gaps, and How Item Response Theory Recovers Ground Truth Across Domains
papers.abstract: Benchmark evaluation across AI and safety-critical domains overwhelmingly relies on simple averaging. We demonstrate that this practice produces substantially misleading rankings when two conditions co-occur: (1) the evaluation matrix is sparse and (2) items vary substantially in difficulty. Through controlled simulation experiments across four domains -- NLP (GLUE), clinical drug trials, autonomous vehicle safety, and cybersecurity -- we show that Spearman rank correlation $\rho$ between simple-average rankings and ground-truth rankings degrades from $\rho = 1.000$ at 100% coverage to $\rho = 0.809$ at 67% coverage with high difficulty heterogeneity (mean over 20 seeds). A standard two-parameter logistic (2PL) Item Response Theory (IRT) model maintains $\rho \geq 0.996$ across all conditions. A 150-condition grid sweep over sparsity $S \in [0, 0.70]$ and difficulty gap $D \in [0.5, 5.0]$ confirms that ranking error forms a failure surface with a strong $S \times D$ interaction ($\gamma_3 = +0.20$, $t = 13.05$), while IRT maintains $\rho \geq 0.993$ throughout. We discuss implications for Physical AI benchmarking, where evaluation matrices are often incomplete and difficulty gaps are extreme.

analysis.tldr: 简单平均在稀疏和难度不均的评测中失效，项目反应理论能恢复真实排名。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI和安全关键领域的基准评测普遍使用简单平均，但该方法在评测矩阵稀疏且项目难度差异大时会产生误导性排名，亟需更稳健的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 解决简单平均在数据稀疏和项目难度差异大时导致排名失真的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过模拟实验发现，简单平均排名与真实排名的斯皮尔曼相关系数随覆盖率下降和难度异质性增加而显著降低，且稀疏性与难度差距存在强交互作用。
analysis.method: 采用标准双参数逻辑斯蒂项目反应理论（2PL IRT）模型替代简单平均进行评测。
contributions: 揭示了简单平均在稀疏和难度不均条件下排名失效的规律，并量化了其与覆盖率和难度差距的交互作用。
证明了项目反应理论（IRT）在所有条件下均能保持高排名相关性，为跨领域基准评测提供了稳健替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 在NLP（GLUE）、临床药物试验、自动驾驶安全和网络安全四个领域进行受控模拟实验，包括20次重复的覆盖率实验和150个条件的网格扫描。
limitations: 实验基于模拟数据，真实场景中的项目难度分布可能更复杂。
仅评估了2PL IRT模型，其他IRT变体或更复杂模型可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 简单平均在稀疏和难度不均的评测中失效，项目反应理论能恢复真实排名。

papers.title: Continuous Discovery of Vulnerabilities in LLM Serving Systems with Fuzzing
papers.abstract: LLM inference and serving systems have become security-critical infrastructure; however, many of their most concerning failures arise from the serving layer rather than from model behavior alone. Modern inference engines combine KV cache, batching, prefix sharing, speculative decoding, adapters, and multi-tenant scheduling, creating shared-state behavior that only emerges under realistic concurrent workloads and is missed by standard model, safety, and API tests. We present GRIEF, a greybox fuzzer for LLM inference engines that treats timed multi-request traces as first-class inputs, uses lightweight oracles to detect crashes, hangs, performance pathologies, and silent output corruption, and applies controlled replay with log-probability checks to confirm reproducible serving-layer failures. Across early campaigns on vLLM and SGLang, GRIEF discovers 15 vulnerabilities, 10 confirmed by engine developers, including 2 CVEs, spanning KV-cache isolation failures, cross-request performance interference, and crash or liveness bugs. These results show that concurrency, caching, and state reuse can induce silent cross-request contamination, noisy-neighbor denial of service, and delayed crashes without malformed inputs or explicit server errors, making concurrent serving behavior a first-class security and reliability boundary for LLM infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出GRIEF灰盒模糊测试器，发现LLM推理引擎中因并发和状态共享导致的15个漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理和服务系统已成为安全关键基础设施，但现有测试方法（模型测试、安全测试、API测试）无法捕捉因并发工作负载和共享状态（如KV缓存、批处理、前缀共享等）引发的服务层故障。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地发现LLM推理引擎中因并发、缓存和状态重用导致的跨请求污染、性能干扰和崩溃等漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 并发、缓存和状态重用可在无畸形输入或显式服务器错误的情况下引发静默跨请求污染、噪声邻居拒绝服务和延迟崩溃。
analysis.method: 提出GRIEF，一种灰盒模糊测试器，将带时间戳的多请求轨迹作为一等输入，使用轻量级预言检测崩溃、挂起、性能异常和静默输出损坏，并通过带对数概率检查的受控重放确认可复现的服务层故障。
contributions: 提出GRIEF，首个针对LLM推理引擎的灰盒模糊测试框架，以多请求并发轨迹为输入。
在vLLM和SGLang上发现15个漏洞，其中10个被开发者确认，包括2个CVE，涵盖KV缓存隔离失败、跨请求性能干扰和崩溃/活性问题。
analysis.experiments: 在vLLM和SGLang上开展早期测试活动，发现15个漏洞，10个被引擎开发者确认，包括2个CVE。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定推理引擎（vLLM和SGLang），泛化性待验证。
模糊测试的覆盖率和效率可能受限于预言设计和轨迹生成策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GRIEF灰盒模糊测试器，发现LLM推理引擎中因并发和状态共享导致的15个漏洞。

papers.title: Exploring Token-Space Manipulation in Latent Audio Tokenizers
papers.abstract: Neural audio codecs provide compact discrete representations for speech generation and manipulation. However, most codecs organize tokens as frame-level sequences, making it difficult to study or intervene on global factors of variation. In this work, we propose the Latent Audio Tokenizer for Token-space Editing (LATTE) that appends a fixed set of learnable latent tokens to the audio feature sequence and retains only these tokens for quantization and decoding. This design produces a compact, non-temporally aligned bottleneck in which each token can aggregate global information across the full utterance. We show that the resulting tokenizer preserves competitive reconstruction quality in low-bitrate speech coding settings while enabling simple token-space interventions. In particular, we find that swapping selected latent token positions between utterances can modify global attributes, such as speaker identity and background noise, and we evaluate these interventions on voice conversion and denoising tasks. Our results suggest that compact latent audio tokenizers can support controllable audio manipulation without supervision in task-specific editing models.

analysis.tldr: 提出LATTE，通过可学习潜变量令牌实现非时间对齐的紧凑瓶颈，支持令牌空间操作以控制语音全局属性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经音频编解码器将令牌组织为帧级序列，难以研究或干预全局变化因素，需要一种能支持可控音频编辑的紧凑表示。
analysis.problem: 如何设计音频分词器，使其在保持重建质量的同时，支持通过令牌空间操作修改全局属性（如说话人身份、背景噪声）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LATTE，在音频特征序列后附加固定数量的可学习潜变量令牌，仅保留这些令牌用于量化和解码，形成非时间对齐的紧凑瓶颈，每个令牌可聚合全局信息。
contributions: 提出LATTE，一种通过潜变量令牌实现非时间对齐紧凑瓶颈的音频分词器。
展示令牌空间操作（如交换令牌位置）可修改说话人身份和背景噪声等全局属性，并在语音转换和去噪任务中验证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于低比特率语音编码场景，泛化性未知。
令牌空间操作的效果可能受限于令牌数量和学习方式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LATTE，通过可学习潜变量令牌实现非时间对齐的紧凑瓶颈，支持令牌空间操作以控制语音全局属性。

papers.title: Adversarial SQL Injection Generation with LLM-Based Architectures
papers.abstract: SQL injection (SQLi) attacks are still one of the serious attacks ranked in the Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP) Top 10 threats. Today, with advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI), especially in Large Language Models (LLMs), an opportunity has been created for automating adversarial attack tests to measure the defense mechanisms. In this paper, we aim to create a comprehensive evaluation of use cases that utilize LLMs for adversarial SQL injection generation. We introduce two novel LLM-based systems, Retrieval Augmented Generation for Adversarial SQLi (RADAGAS) and Reflective Chain-of-Thought SQLi (RefleXQLi), and compare them with existing baselines against 10 Web Application Firewalls (WAFs) and one execution-based MySQL validator. To perform a comprehensive test, we used six rule-based open-source WAFs (ModSecurity PL1--3, Coraza PL1--3), 2 AI/ML-based WAFs (WAF Brain, CNN-WAF), and 2 commercial WAFs (AWS WAF and Cloudflare WAF). For the LLM models, we used GPT-4o, Claude 3.7 Sonnet, and DeepSeek R1. Our tests consist of 240 experiments that generate 240,000 payloads and perform 2.2 million tests against WAFs. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals that RADAGAS-GPT4o outperforms other baseline models with a 22.73\% bypass rate. The proposed RADAGAS variants are highly successful on AI/ML-based WAFs (92.49\% on WAF-Brain by RADAGAS-DeepSeek, 80.48\% on CNN-WAF by RADAGAS-Claude), but struggle to bypass rule-based WAFs (0--5.70\% on ModSecurity and Coraza). In addition to these findings, another observation is that creating less diverse payloads achieves more bypasses, however they show poor results if the initially chosen payload is not successful. We observe that our findings provide a comprehensive view on using LLM-based approaches in security testing.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种基于LLM的对抗SQL注入生成系统，在AI/ML型WAF上取得高绕过率，但规则型WAF仍难突破。
analysis.research_motivation: SQL注入仍是OWASP Top 10严重威胁，利用LLM自动化生成对抗测试可评估防御机制，现有方法缺乏全面比较。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM高效生成对抗性SQL注入载荷以测试Web应用防火墙（WAF）的防御能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多样性较低的载荷更容易绕过WAF，但若初始载荷失败则整体效果差；AI/ML型WAF易被绕过，规则型WAF（如ModSecurity）防御效果强。
analysis.method: 提出RADAGAS（检索增强生成）和RefleXQLi（反思链式思维）两种LLM架构，使用GPT-4o、Claude 3.7 Sonnet、DeepSeek R1生成SQL注入载荷，并与基线模型比较。
contributions: 提出两种新型LLM架构RADAGAS和RefleXQLi用于对抗SQL注入生成
在10种WAF和MySQL验证器上进行大规模实验（240,000载荷，220万次测试），揭示不同WAF类型的脆弱性
analysis.experiments: 使用6种规则型WAF（ModSecurity PL1-3, Coraza PL1-3）、2种AI/ML型WAF（WAF Brain, CNN-WAF）、2种商业WAF（AWS WAF, Cloudflare WAF），以及GPT-4o、Claude 3.7 Sonnet、DeepSeek R1模型，共240次实验生成240,000个载荷，进行220万次测试。
limitations: 规则型WAF（如ModSecurity）绕过率极低（0-5.70%），方法对规则型防御效果有限
载荷多样性低时依赖初始选择，鲁棒性不足
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种基于LLM的对抗SQL注入生成系统，在AI/ML型WAF上取得高绕过率，但规则型WAF仍难突破。

papers.title: CATS: Cascaded Adaptive Tree Speculation for Memory-Limited LLM Inference Acceleration
papers.abstract: Auto-regressive decoding in Large Language Models (LLMs) is inherently memory-bound: every generation step requires loading the model weights and intermediate results from memory (e.g., High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) for GPU servers), making throughput bottlenecked by memory bandwidth rather than compute. Speculative decoding addresses this by enabling parallel verification of multiple draft tokens, effectively amortizing the cost of each target-model call. However, existing speculative decoding methods are designed under the assumption that HBM is sufficiently large to hold both the target model and an auxiliary draft model simultaneously -- an assumption that breaks down on memory-constrained devices such as edge platforms with limited DRAM. We analyze the inference bottleneck in this memory-limited regime and propose CATS, a self-speculative decoding framework that conducts cascaded verification and correction based on the memory budget and parameter offloading patterns on memory-limited devices. This design maximizes token acceptance rate and end-to-end speedup while keeping the peak memory footprint on the device equal to that of the target model alone. We evaluate CATS on different models across five benchmarks on real edge devices. CATS can achieve a wall-clock speedup of up to 5.08x with no degradation in generation quality, outperforming the SOTA method by up to 1.45x under edge memory constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出CATS框架，通过级联自适应树推测解码在内存受限设备上加速LLM推理，最高实现5.08倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM自回归解码受内存带宽限制，现有推测解码方法假设HBM足够大以同时容纳目标模型和辅助草稿模型，但在内存受限设备（如边缘平台）上该假设不成立，导致推理瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在内存受限设备上实现高效的LLM推理加速，同时不增加峰值内存占用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在内存受限场景下，现有推测解码方法因无法同时加载目标模型和草稿模型而失效，需要重新设计解码框架。
analysis.method: 提出CATS，一种自推测解码框架，基于内存预算和参数卸载模式进行级联验证与修正，最大化令牌接受率和端到端加速，同时保持峰值内存占用与仅运行目标模型时相同。
contributions: 首次针对内存受限设备提出自推测解码框架CATS，解决现有方法在边缘设备上的失效问题。
在真实边缘设备上实现高达5.08倍墙钟加速，比SOTA方法快1.45倍，且生成质量无下降。
analysis.experiments: 在真实边缘设备上使用不同模型在五个基准上评估，CATS实现最高5.08倍墙钟加速，比SOTA方法快1.45倍，生成质量无下降。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定内存受限场景，通用性需进一步验证。
未讨论对模型精度的影响细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CATS框架，通过级联自适应树推测解码在内存受限设备上加速LLM推理，最高实现5.08倍加速。

papers.title: Muon is Not That Special: Random or Inverted Spectra Work Just as Well
papers.abstract: The recent empirical success of the Muon optimizer has renewed interest in non-Euclidean optimization, typically justified by similarities with second-order methods, and linear minimization oracle (LMO) theory. In this paper, we challenge this geometric narrative through three contributions, demonstrating that precise geometric structure is not the key factor affecting optimization performance. First, we introduce Freon, a family of optimizers based on Schatten (quasi-)norms, powered by a novel, provably optimal QDWH-based iterative approximation. Freon naturally interpolates between SGD and Muon, while smoothly extrapolating into the quasi-norm regime. Empirically, the best-performing Schatten parameters for GPT-2 lie strictly within the quasi-norm regime, and thus cannot be represented by any unitarily invariant LMO. Second, noting that Freon performs well across a wide range of exponents, we introduce Kaon, an absurd optimizer that replaces singular values with random noise. Despite lacking any coherent geometric structure, Kaon matches Muon's performance and retains classical convergence guarantees, proving that strict adherence to a precise geometry is practically irrelevant. Third, having shown that geometry is not the primary driver of performance, we demonstrate it is instead controlled by two local quantities: alignment and descent potential. Ultimately, each optimizer must tune its step size around these two quantities. While their dynamics are difficult to predict a-priori, evaluating them within a stochastic random feature model yields a precise insight: Muon succeeds not by tracking an ideal global geometry, but by guaranteeing step-size optimality.

analysis.tldr: Muon优化器的成功并非源于其几何结构，随机或倒谱的优化器同样有效。
analysis.research_motivation: Muon优化器在非欧几何优化中取得了成功，但其成功机制尚不明确，需要探究几何结构是否是关键因素。
analysis.problem: 挑战Muon优化器基于几何结构的解释，探究其性能的真正驱动因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Freon和Kaon优化器，Freon基于Schatten范数族，Kaon用随机噪声替代奇异值，并通过理论分析和随机特征模型揭示性能由对齐和下降势两个局部量控制。
contributions: 提出Freon优化器，基于Schatten范数族，可插值SGD和Muon并外推到拟范数区域。
提出Kaon优化器，用随机噪声替代奇异值，仍匹配Muon性能，证明几何结构非关键。
揭示优化器性能由对齐和下降势两个局部量控制，Muon的成功在于保证步长最优性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在更大规模模型或任务上验证。
随机特征模型的分析可能无法完全推广到实际深度网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Muon优化器的成功并非源于其几何结构，随机或倒谱的优化器同样有效。

papers.title: Oversmoothing as Representation Degeneracy in Neural Sheaf Diffusion
papers.abstract: Neural Sheaf Diffusion (NSD) generalizes diffusion-based Graph Neural Networks by replacing scalar graph Laplacians with sheaf Laplacians whose learned restriction maps define a task-adapted geometry. While the diffusion limit of NSD is known to be the space of global sections, the representation-theoretic structure of this harmonic space remains largely implicit. We develop a quiver-theoretic interpretation of NSD by identifying cellular sheaves on graphs with representations of the associated incidence quiver. Under this correspondence, learned sheaf geometries become points in a finite-dimensional representation space. We show that direct-sum decompositions of the underlying incidence-quiver representation induce decompositions of the harmonic space reached in the diffusion limit. This gives an algebraic interpretation of oversmoothing as representation degeneration: learned sheaves may collapse toward low-complexity summands whose global sections fail to preserve discriminative information. Building on this viewpoint, we connect sheaf diffusion to stability and moment-map principles from Geometric Invariant Theory. We introduce moment-map-inspired regularizers that bias restriction maps toward balanced representation geometries, and identify a structural obstruction in equal-stalk architectures: when $d_v = d_e$, admissibility for learnable stability parameters forces the trivial all-object summand onto a stability wall. Non-uniform stalk dimensions remove this obstruction, making adaptive stability meaningful. Experiments on heterophilic benchmarks are consistent with this mechanism: breaking stalk symmetry can reduce variance or improve validation behavior, and adaptive stability becomes more effective in selected rectangular settings. Overall, our framework reframes oversmoothing as a degeneration phenomenon in the representation geometry underlying learned sheaf diffusion.

analysis.tldr: 将图神经扩散中的过平滑问题重新解释为表示退化，并通过箭图表示论和几何不变性理论提供代数分析与正则化方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图神经网络中的过平滑问题缺乏统一的代数理解，而神经层扩散（NSD）虽引入任务自适应几何，但其调和空间的表示结构尚不明确，限制了对其退化机制的理论分析与可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何从表示论角度解释NSD中的过平滑现象，并设计正则化策略以缓解表示退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，过平滑对应于学习到的层几何向低复杂度直和项坍缩，这些项的整体截面无法保留判别信息；此外，等茎架构（d_v = d_e）存在结构障碍，导致可学习稳定性参数迫使平凡全对象直和项落在稳定性壁上。
analysis.method: 将细胞层与关联箭图表示对应，利用直和分解解释调和空间结构；引入基于矩映射的正则化器以偏向平衡的表示几何；分析非均匀茎维度对稳定性的影响。
contributions: 建立了神经层扩散的箭图表示论解释，将过平滑形式化为表示退化。
提出了基于几何不变性理论中矩映射的正则化方法，并揭示了等茎架构中的稳定性障碍。
analysis.experiments: 在异配性基准上实验，验证了打破茎对称性可降低方差或改善验证行为，自适应稳定性在特定矩形设置中更有效。
limitations: 实验仅涉及异配性基准，未在更大规模或同配性数据集上验证。
正则化器的实际效果可能依赖于超参数选择，摘要未提供详细敏感性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将图神经扩散中的过平滑问题重新解释为表示退化，并通过箭图表示论和几何不变性理论提供代数分析与正则化方法。

papers.title: The Bicameral Model: Bidirectional Hidden-State Coupling Between Parallel Language Models
papers.abstract: Existing multi-model and tool-augmented systems communicate by generating text, serializing every exchange through the output vocabulary. Can two pretrained language models instead coordinate through a continuous, concurrent channel? The Bicameral Model couples two frozen language models through a trainable neural interface on their intermediate hidden states. At every generation step, both models run in lockstep: a primary model drives the task while an auxiliary model operates tools, solves constraints, or executes code, with both conditioning on each other's activations through a translation network and a learned suppression gate ($\sim$1\% of combined parameters). The gate learns a selective communication protocol from task loss alone, without a prescribed format. We demonstrate the mechanism across three tool backends. On arithmetic, coupling two 0.5B models with a calculator raises accuracy from 36\% to 96\%. On logic grid puzzles, coupling two 0.6B models with a Z3 solver achieves $1.7\times$ the unaugmented baseline on ZebraLogic.
