analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将潜在状态建模为超球面上的方向，噪声定义在当前估计的切平面上，从而推导出一个精度加权的方向推断过程：注意力用于聚合证据，残差连接实现增量状态更新，归一化将更新后的状态拉回超球面。
contributions: 首次从单一几何估计问题出发，统一推导出Transformer块的核心组件（注意力、残差连接、归一化）。
揭示了这些组件并非独立架构选择，而是由估计问题的几何结构自然产生。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论推导可能依赖于特定的几何假设（如超球面状态空间），实际Transformer变体可能不完全符合。
缺乏实验验证，尚不清楚该几何解释能否带来性能提升或新架构设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer块的核心组件（注意力、残差连接、归一化）可统一解释为球面状态估计问题的几何推导结果。

papers.title: An Execution-Verified Multi-Language Benchmark for Code Semantic Reasoning
papers.abstract: Evaluating whether large language models (LLMs) can recover execution-relevant program structure, rather than only produce code that passes tests, remains an open problem. Existing code benchmarks emphasize test-passing outputs, from standalone programming tasks (HumanEval, MBPP, LiveCodeBench) to repository repair (SWE-Bench); this is useful, but offers limited diagnostic signal about which program semantics a model can recover from source. We introduce TraceEval, to our knowledge the first execution-verified, multi-language benchmark for code semantic reasoning: recovering a program's runtime call structure from source code. Unlike prior call-graph benchmarks that rely on static-tool output or hand-annotated ground truth, every positive edge in TraceEval is mechanically witnessed by validation execution, eliminating annotator disagreement and label noise for observed behavior. TraceEval consists of (i) 10,583 real-world programs (2,129 test, 8,454 train) extracted from 1,600+ open-source repositories across Python, JavaScript, and Java via an LLM-assisted harness-generation pipeline with tracer validation; and (ii) a reproducible pipeline that converts any open-source repository into new verified benchmark instances. We evaluate 10 LLMs at zero-shot on the held-out test split. The strongest model, Claude-Opus-4.6, reaches an average F1 of 72.9% across the three languages. To demonstrate the train split's utility as a supervision substrate, we fine-tune the Qwen2.5-Coder family on it: lifts of up to +55.6 F1 bring tuned Qwen2.5-Coder-32B to 71.2%, within 1.7 F1 of zero-shot Claude-Opus-4.6. We release the benchmark, pipeline, baselines, and a datasheet at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出首个执行验证的多语言代码语义推理基准 TraceEval，用于评估 LLM 从源码恢复运行时调用结构的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码基准主要关注测试通过率，无法诊断模型对程序语义（如运行时调用结构）的理解能力，且依赖静态工具或人工标注的调用图存在标注噪声。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个执行验证的、多语言的基准，以可靠评估 LLM 从源代码中恢复程序运行时调用结构（代码语义推理）的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 TraceEval 基准，包含从 1600+ 开源仓库提取的 10583 个真实程序（Python/JavaScript/Java），通过 LLM 辅助的测试生成管道和追踪验证确保每个正边被执行验证；同时提供可复现的管道用于扩展新仓库。
contributions: 首个执行验证的多语言代码语义推理基准 TraceEval，消除标注噪声。
包含 10583 个程序（训练/测试划分）和可复现的管道。
评估 10 个 LLM 的零样本性能，并展示微调 Qwen2.5-Coder 可提升 F1 达 55.6 分。
analysis.experiments: 在测试集上评估 10 个 LLM 的零样本性能，最佳模型 Claude-Opus-4.6 平均 F1 为 72.9%；微调 Qwen2.5-Coder-32B 后 F1 达 71.2%，接近零样本 Claude-Opus-4.6。
limitations: 仅覆盖三种编程语言，扩展性待验证。
依赖 LLM 辅助生成测试，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个执行验证的多语言代码语义推理基准 TraceEval，用于评估 LLM 从源码恢复运行时调用结构的能力。

papers.title: DisagMoE: Computation-Communication overlapped MoE Training via Disaggregated AF-Pipe Parallelism
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures enable trillion-parameter LLMs with sparsely activated experts. Expert parallelism (EP) is a widely adopted MoE training strategy, but it suffers from severe all-to-all communication bottlenecks, which is exaggerated by the limited inter-node network bandwidth as the growing model size requires distributing experts across GPU nodes. Prior work focused on overlapping these all-to-all communications with feed-forward network (FFN) and self-attention computations, which often leaves residual network-bound stalls due to inherent imbalance in attention and FFN layers' computation-communication ratios. We present DisagMoE, a disaggregated MoE training system that jointly optimizes model placement and scheduling for maximal efficiency. DisagMoE separates attention and FFN layers into disjoint GPU groups, introduces a multi-stage pipeline with uni-directional, many-to-many communications, and employs a computation-communication roofline model to balance GPU and network bandwidth allocation among the attention and FFN groups. DisagMoE is implemented on Megatron-LM, and evaluation shows that DisagMoE improves training efficiency across multiple MoE models with up to 1.8x speedup on 16-node 8xH800 clusters.

analysis.tldr: DisagMoE通过分离注意力与FFN层并设计多阶段流水线，实现MoE训练中计算与通信的重叠，最高加速1.8倍。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE架构支持万亿参数LLM，但专家并行（EP）中的全到全通信成为瓶颈，且现有重叠方法因注意力与FFN层计算-通信比不平衡而残留网络阻塞。
analysis.problem: 如何通过模型放置和调度优化，消除MoE训练中全到全通信与计算之间的不平衡，实现高效重叠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力层和FFN层的计算-通信比固有差异导致现有重叠方法无法完全消除网络阻塞。
analysis.method: 将注意力层和FFN层分配到不同GPU组，设计单向多对多通信的多阶段流水线，并利用计算-通信roofline模型平衡两组间的GPU和网络带宽分配。
contributions: 提出DisagMoE，一种解耦的MoE训练系统，通过分离注意力与FFN层并设计多阶段流水线实现计算-通信重叠。
引入计算-通信roofline模型以平衡注意力组和FFN组的资源分配。
在Megatron-LM上实现，并在16节点8xH800集群上取得最高1.8倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在16节点8xH800集群上评估多个MoE模型，训练效率提升最高1.8倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确注意力与FFN层分离的Transformer架构。
多阶段流水线可能引入额外的调度复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DisagMoE通过分离注意力与FFN层并设计多阶段流水线，实现MoE训练中计算与通信的重叠，最高加速1.8倍。

papers.title: The Authorization-Execution Gap Is a Major Safety and Security Problem in Open-World Agents
papers.abstract: This position paper argues that the Authorization-Execution Gap (AEG) is a major safety and security problem in open-world agents. The AEG is the divergence between what a principal intends to authorize and what an open-world agent ultimately executes. Because such agents act autonomously across tools, persistent state, and multi-agent handoffs, even small instances of authorization divergence can cause harm that is difficult or impossible to undo. We argue that many observed agent failures can be traced to three structural sources of AEG: delegation-level incompleteness, channel-level corruption, and composition-level fragmentation. The same observed failure may arise from any of these sources. Without identifying the source, a defense targeting the symptom alone cannot address the underlying cause. Agent safety and security should therefore emphasize source-oriented diagnosis and defense. Because the structural sources of AEG arise dynamically during execution, this approach necessarily requires authorization integrity checks applied during execution, rather than relying solely on one-shot upfront filtering or post-hoc audit. For NeurIPS, the implication is that papers on open-world agents should report not only outcome-level metrics such as task success or attack resistance, but also process-level evidence showing where AEG was detected, constrained, and attributed to a structural source during execution.

analysis.tldr: 提出开放世界智能体中“授权-执行鸿沟”是核心安全漏洞，需在运行时检测和归因。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放世界智能体自主执行任务时，授权意图与实际执行之间存在偏差，导致安全风险，现有方法依赖一次性过滤或事后审计，无法应对动态执行中的结构性问题。
analysis.problem: 开放世界智能体中的授权-执行鸿沟（AEG）及其结构性来源（委托不完整、通道污染、组合碎片化）导致安全漏洞，且缺乏运行时诊断和防御方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到许多智能体失败可归因于AEG的三个结构性来源：委托级不完整、通道级污染、组合级碎片化；同一失败可能源于不同来源，仅针对症状的防御无法解决根本原因。
analysis.method: 提出源导向的诊断与防御框架，强调在智能体执行过程中进行授权完整性检查，而非仅依赖一次性前置过滤或事后审计。
contributions: 定义并形式化开放世界智能体中的授权-执行鸿沟（AEG）问题。
识别AEG的三个结构性来源：委托级不完整、通道级污染、组合级碎片化。
倡导在NeurIPS等会议论文中报告过程级证据，而非仅任务成功率等结果级指标。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证或定量分析。
源导向防御的具体实现细节未给出。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出开放世界智能体中“授权-执行鸿沟”是核心安全漏洞，需在运行时检测和归因。

papers.title: MT-JailBench: A Modular Benchmark for Understanding Multi-Turn Jailbreak Attacks
papers.abstract: Multi-turn jailbreaks exploit the ability of large language models to accumulate and act on conversational context. Instead of stating a harmful request directly, an attacker can gradually steer the conversation toward an unsafe answer. Recent methods demonstrate this risk, but they are usually evaluated as black-box pipelines with different budgets, judges, retry rules, and strategy generation procedures. As a result, it is often unclear whether reported gains reflect stronger attack mechanisms or different experimental conditions. We introduce MT-JailBench, a modular evaluation framework for benchmarking multi-turn jailbreaks under fixed conditions. MT-JailBench implements each attack as five interacting modules: evaluation function, attack strategy, prompt generation, prompt refinement, and flow control. This design enables fair comparison across attack methods and component-wise analysis of what drives attack success. Using MT-JailBench, we find that resource budgets and evaluation functions are major confounders: controlling turns, retries, interactions, sampled strategies, and judges substantially change the ranking of attacks. At the component level, prompt generation accounts for most performance variation, while refinement and flow control provide moderate gains. We also find that explicit dynamic strategy generation is not always necessary; stochastic sampling from a fixed strategy can rival more elaborate diversification mechanisms. Finally, recomposing the best components yields a strong attack configuration that outperforms its source attacks and generalizes across diverse target LLMs. MT-JailBench therefore provides a modular framework for comparing multi-turn jailbreaks, understanding the impact of components, and guiding stronger red-teaming evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化基准MT-JailBench，解耦多轮越狱攻击组件，揭示资源预算和评估函数是主要混淆因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮越狱攻击评估常因不同实验条件（如预算、评判器、重试规则）而难以比较，导致报告的性能提升可能来自实验设置差异而非攻击机制本身。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一、模块化的基准来公平比较多轮越狱攻击方法，并分析各组件对攻击成功率的贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 资源预算（轮次、重试次数、交互次数、采样策略数）和评估函数是主要混淆因素，改变它们会显著改变攻击排名；提示生成组件贡献最大性能变化，而优化和流程控制提供中等增益；显式动态策略生成并非总是必要，固定策略的随机采样可媲美更复杂的多样化机制。
analysis.method: MT-JailBench将每个攻击实现为五个可交互模块：评估函数、攻击策略、提示生成、提示优化和流程控制，支持公平比较和组件级分析。
contributions: 提出模块化基准MT-JailBench，实现多轮越狱攻击的公平比较和组件级分析。
发现资源预算和评估函数是主要混淆因素，提示生成是性能变化的主要来源。
通过重组最佳组件得到强攻击配置，超越原始攻击并泛化到多种目标LLM。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有攻击变体或最新方法。
组件级分析可能依赖特定模型和设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化基准MT-JailBench，解耦多轮越狱攻击组件，揭示资源预算和评估函数是主要混淆因素。

papers.title: SkillGen: Verified Inference-Time Agent Skill Synthesis
papers.abstract: Skills are a promising way to improve LLM agent capabilities without retraining, while keeping the added procedure reusable and controllable. However, high-quality skills are still largely written by hand. We introduce SkillGen, a multi-agent framework that synthesizes a single auditable skill from trajectories generated by a base agent. The output is a human-readable artifact that can be inspected before use. Rather than merely summarizing trajectories, SkillGen leverages contrastive induction over both successful and failed trajectories to identify reusable success patterns, recurring failure modes, and behaviors that appear in nearby successes but are missing from failures. SkillGen then generates candidate skills and iteratively refines the skill. A key novelty in SkillGen is that we model agent skills as interventions to empirically verify the net effect of skills on the overall performance. Specifically, we compare outcomes on the same instances with and without the skill, so that we account for both repairs (cases where the skill fixes a baseline failure) and regressions (cases where the skill breaks a baseline success). Across a broad range of agents and datasets, SkillGen consistently improves held-out performance, outperforms existing skill-generation baselines, and produces skills that transfer across models.

analysis.tldr: SkillGen 是一个多智能体框架，通过对比归纳成功与失败轨迹来合成可审计的技能，并建模为干预以验证其净效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 技能是提升 LLM 智能体能力的有效手段，但高质量技能仍需手工编写，缺乏自动化合成与验证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从智能体轨迹中合成可复用、可审计且效果可验证的技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SkillGen 是一个多智能体框架，通过对比归纳成功与失败轨迹来识别可复用模式、失败模式及关键行为，生成候选技能并迭代优化；将技能建模为干预，通过比较同一实例上有无技能的结果来估计净效果。
contributions: 提出 SkillGen 框架，自动从轨迹中合成可审计的技能。
将技能建模为干预，通过对比实验验证其净效果，同时考虑修复和回归。
analysis.experiments: 在多种智能体和数据集上，SkillGen 一致提升了保留集性能，优于现有技能生成基线，且技能可跨模型迁移。
limitations: 可能依赖基础智能体的轨迹质量。
干预验证的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillGen 是一个多智能体框架，通过对比归纳成功与失败轨迹来合成可审计的技能，并建模为干预以验证其净效果。

papers.title: Few-Shot Truly Benign DPO Attack for Jailbreaking LLMs
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning APIs make frontier LLMs easy to customize, but they can also weaken safety alignment during fine-tuning. While prior work shows that benign supervised fine-tuning (SFT) can reduce refusal behavior, deployed fine-tuning pipelines increasingly support preference-based objectives, whose safety risks remain less understood. We show that Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) introduces a stronger and harder-to-audit failure mode. We propose a truly benign DPO attack using only 10 harmless preference pairs, the minimum data scale accepted by OpenAI's fine-tuning service. Each pair contains a benign prompt, a normal helpful answer as the preferred response, and a refusal as the dispreferred response. Unlike prior benign fine-tuning attacks, our data exhibits no suspicious behavior: it is practically indistinguishable from the fine-tuning request of a legitimate user seeking to reduce over-refusal, making harmful intent almost impossible to infer from the request alone. Nevertheless, because DPO directly optimizes the model to prefer helpful answers over refusals, this seemingly benign objective broadly suppresses refusal behavior and transfers to harmful prompts outside the fine-tuning data. Across OpenAI models supporting DPO fine-tuning, our attack achieves attack success rates of 59.13% on GPT-4o, 70.20% on GPT-4.1, 54.80% on GPT-4.1-mini, and 81.73% on GPT-4.1-nano, at costs of only \$1.7, \$1.7, \$0.3, and \$0.1. Moreover, on open-weight models that do not impose minimum data requirements, we find that this effect can emerge from even a single benign preference pair.

analysis.tldr: 仅用10个无害偏好对即可通过DPO微调高效越狱LLM，且数据在请求层面无法与合法用户区分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有微调API（如OpenAI）支持基于偏好的优化目标（如DPO），但其安全风险尚未被充分研究；已有的良性SFT攻击虽然能降低拒绝率，但DPO可能引入更强且更难审计的失败模式。
analysis.problem: 探究DPO微调是否会在使用看似无害的偏好数据时，意外地削弱LLM的安全对齐，并设计一种难以被检测的越狱攻击方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DPO直接优化模型偏好有帮助回答而非拒绝，导致即使使用无害偏好对，模型也会广泛抑制拒绝行为，并泛化到微调数据之外的恶意提示。
analysis.method: 提出一种真正良性的DPO攻击：仅使用10个无害偏好对（每个对包含一个良性提示、一个正常有帮助回答作为首选、一个拒绝回答作为非首选），数据在请求层面与合法用户减少过度拒绝的请求无法区分。
contributions: 首次揭示DPO微调在无害数据下存在更强的安全风险，并提出一种极低成本的越狱攻击方法。
在多个OpenAI模型上实现高攻击成功率（GPT-4o 59.13%，GPT-4.1 70.20%等），且成本极低。
发现即使单个无害偏好对也能在开放权重模型上产生越狱效果。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenAI支持DPO微调的模型（GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1-mini, GPT-4.1-nano）上评估攻击成功率，成本分别为$1.7, $1.7, $0.3, $0.1；并在开放权重模型上验证了单个偏好对的效果。
limitations: 攻击仅针对DPO微调，其他偏好优化方法（如RLHF）可能不受影响。
攻击效果依赖于模型对DPO的敏感性，不同模型变体可能存在差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用10个无害偏好对即可通过DPO微调高效越狱LLM，且数据在请求层面无法与合法用户区分。

papers.title: Towards Scalable Persistence-Based Topological Optimization
papers.abstract: Persistence-based topological optimization deforms a point cloud $X \subset \mathbb{R}^d$ by minimizing objectives of the form $L(X) = \ell(\mathrm{Dgm}(X))$, where $\mathrm{Dgm}(X)$ is a persistence diagram. In practice, optimization is limited by two coupled issues: persistent homology is typically computed on subsamples, and the resulting topological gradients are highly sparse, with only a few anchor points receiving nonzero updates. Motivated by diffeomorphic interpolation, which extends sparse gradients to smooth ambient vector fields via Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) interpolation, we propose a more scalable pipeline that improves both subsampling and gradient extension. We introduce subsampling via random slicing, a lightweight scheme that promotes iteration-wise geometric coverage and mitigates density bias. We further replace the costly kernel solve with a fast Nadaraya-Watson (NW) Gaussian convolution, producing a globally defined smooth update field at a fraction of the computational cost, while being more suited for topological optimization tasks. We provide theoretical guarantees for NW smoothing, including anchor approximation bounds and global Lipschitz estimates. Experiments in $2$D and $3$D show that combining random slicing with NW smoothing yields consistent speedups and improved objective values over other baselines on common persistence losses.

analysis.tldr: 通过随机切片和Nadaraya-Watson平滑加速持久性拓扑优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 持久性拓扑优化在实践中受限于子采样和梯度稀疏问题，导致计算效率低且优化效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何提高持久性拓扑优化的可扩展性，解决子采样偏差和梯度稀疏导致的更新局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 持久性同调通常在子样本上计算，导致拓扑梯度高度稀疏，只有少数锚点获得非零更新。
analysis.method: 提出随机切片子采样和Nadaraya-Watson高斯卷积平滑梯度，替代昂贵的核求解，生成全局光滑更新场。
contributions: 引入随机切片子采样，促进迭代几何覆盖并减轻密度偏差。
用Nadaraya-Watson平滑替代RKHS插值，大幅降低计算成本并提供理论保证。
analysis.experiments: 在2D和3D实验中，随机切片与NW平滑结合在常见持久性损失上取得一致加速和改进的目标值。
limitations: 实验仅在2D和3D点云上验证，高维效果未知。
NW平滑的理论保证可能依赖于特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过随机切片和Nadaraya-Watson平滑加速持久性拓扑优化。

papers.title: Test-Time Personalization: A Diagnostic Framework and Probabilistic Fix for Scaling Failures
papers.abstract: Existing approaches to LLM personalization focus on constructing better personalized models or inputs, while treating inference as a single-shot process. In this work, we study Test-Time Personalization (TTP) along an unexplored axis: scaling inference-time computation by sampling N candidates from a personalized policy model and selecting the best with a personalized reward model. We prove that oracle selection yields expected utility growing logarithmically with the number of sampled candidates, establishing a theoretical ceiling for test-time scaling. However, standard reward models fail to realize this potential. To diagnose why, we derive a unified scaling law that decomposes any reward model's Best-of-N curve into four measurable quantities and reveals two failure modes, user-level collapse (near-constant prediction for some users) and query-level reward hacking (negative correlation with true quality for some queries). Guided by this law, we propose a probabilistic personalized reward model whose learned variance effectively mitigates both failure modes. Experiments confirm both elements of our framework: TTP delivers consistent scaling across multiple policy models and personalized text generation tasks, and our scaling law closely matches observed scaling curves across reward-model variants.

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时个性化框架，通过概率奖励模型解决扩展失败问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM个性化方法将推理视为单次过程，忽略了测试时计算扩展的潜力，且标准奖励模型在扩展时存在失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何通过测试时采样扩展实现个性化，并解决标准奖励模型在扩展中的失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准奖励模型在Best-of-N扩展中表现出用户级崩溃和查询级奖励黑客两种失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出概率个性化奖励模型，通过学习方差来缓解两种失败模式。
contributions: 建立了测试时个性化的理论上限，证明oracle选择的对数增长效用。
推导了统一扩展定律，将奖励模型的Best-of-N曲线分解为四个可测量量，并识别两种失败模式。
提出概率个性化奖励模型，有效缓解失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 实验验证了测试时个性化在多个策略模型和个性化文本生成任务上的一致扩展，且扩展定律与观测曲线匹配。
limitations: 可能依赖特定奖励模型架构。
未讨论计算成本与收益的权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测试时个性化框架，通过概率奖励模型解决扩展失败问题。

papers.title: Skill Drift Is Contract Violation: Proactive Maintenance for LLM Agent Skill Libraries
papers.abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on reusable skill libraries, but these skills silently decay as the external services, packages, APIs, and configurations they reference evolve. Existing monitors detect such changes at the wrong granularity: they observe values, not the role those values play in a skill. A version string in a comment is noise; the same string in a pinned dependency is an operational obligation. We formulate skill drift as contract violation and introduce \sgname{}, which extracts executable environment contracts from skill documents and validates only those role-bearing assumptions against known or live conditions. This distinction turns noisy monitoring into a precision-first maintenance signal. Contract-free CI probes produce 40\% false positives, while \sgname{} raises zero false alarms over 599 no-drift and hard-negative cases (Wilson 95\% CI $[0,0.6]\%$). In known-drift verification, \sgname{} achieves 100\% precision and 76\% recall with the strongest backbone; in a pre-registered study over 49 real skills, it discovers live drift with 86\% conservative precision. Violated contracts also make repair actionable, improving one-round success from 10\% without localization to 78\%. We release \dbname{}, an 880-pair benchmark for skill degradation.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM Agent技能漂移建模为契约违反，通过提取环境契约实现零误报的主动维护。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent依赖的可复用技能库会因外部服务、包、API和配置的演化而无声退化，现有监控粒度错误（观察值而非角色），导致大量误报。
analysis.problem: 如何精确检测LLM Agent技能库中的技能漂移，避免因外部环境变化导致的技能失效，同时最小化误报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有监控在错误粒度上检测变化：观察值而非值在技能中扮演的角色；版本字符串在注释中是噪声，在固定依赖中却是操作义务。
analysis.method: 提出SkillGuard，从技能文档中提取可执行环境契约，仅验证那些承担角色的假设是否与已知或实时条件一致，将技能漂移建模为契约违反。
contributions: 将技能漂移形式化为契约违反，实现精确的主动维护信号
提出SkillGuard方法，提取环境契约并验证角色承载假设，零误报检测漂移
构建880对技能退化基准SkillDegradeBench
analysis.experiments: 在599个无漂移和硬负例上零误报（Wilson 95% CI [0,0.6]%）；已知漂移验证中最佳骨干达100%精确率和76%召回率；49个真实技能预注册研究中保守精确率86%；修复成功率从10%提升至78%。
limitations: 召回率在最强骨干下仅76%，仍有提升空间
依赖技能文档中契约的可提取性，可能不适用于文档不完善的技能
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将LLM Agent技能漂移建模为契约违反，通过提取环境契约实现零误报的主动维护。

papers.title: SURGE: Surrogate Gradient Adaptation in Binary Neural Networks
papers.abstract: The training of Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) is fundamentally based on gradient approximation for non-differentiable binarization operations (e.g., sign function). However, prevailing methods including the Straight-Through Estimator (STE) and its improved variants, rely on hand-crafted designs that suffer from gradient mismatch problem and information loss induced by fixed-range gradient clipping. To address this, we propose SURrogate GradiEnt Adaptation (SURGE), a novel learnable gradient compensation framework with theoretical grounding. SURGE mitigates gradient mismatch through auxiliary backpropagation. Specifically, we design a Dual-Path Gradient Compensator (DPGC) that constructs a parallel full-precision auxiliary branch for each binarized layer, decoupling gradient flow via output decomposition during backpropagation. DPGC enables bias-reduced gradient estimation by leveraging the full-precision branch to estimate components beyond STE's first-order approximation. To further enhance training stability, we introduce an Adaptive Gradient Scaler (AGS) based on an optimal scale factor to dynamically balance inter-branch gradient contributions via norm-based scaling. Experiments on image classification, object detection, and language understanding tasks demonstrate that SURGE performs best over state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习的梯度补偿框架SURGE，通过双路径梯度补偿器和自适应梯度缩放器解决二值神经网络训练中的梯度失配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 二值神经网络训练依赖梯度近似，但现有方法如STE及其变体存在梯度失配和固定范围梯度裁剪导致的信息损失问题，限制了BNN的性能。
analysis.problem: 解决BNN训练中因非可微二值化操作导致的梯度失配和梯度裁剪信息损失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SURGE框架，包含双路径梯度补偿器（DPGC）和自适应梯度缩放器（AGS）。DPGC为每个二值化层构建并行全精度辅助分支，通过输出分解解耦反向传播中的梯度流，实现偏差减小的梯度估计；AGS基于最优缩放因子动态平衡分支间的梯度贡献。
contributions: 提出可学习的梯度补偿框架SURGE，理论上有依据地缓解梯度失配问题。
设计双路径梯度补偿器（DPGC）和自适应梯度缩放器（AGS），分别实现偏差减小的梯度估计和动态梯度平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在图像分类、目标检测和语言理解任务上，SURGE优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销和内存占用。
理论分析可能未覆盖所有情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习的梯度补偿框架SURGE，通过双路径梯度补偿器和自适应梯度缩放器解决二值神经网络训练中的梯度失配问题。

papers.title: Seeing the Needle in the Haystack: Towards Weakly-Supervised Log Instance Anomaly Localization via Counterfactual Perturbation
papers.abstract: Log anomaly detection is a critical task for system operations and security assurance. However, in networked systems at scale, log data are generated at massive scale while instance-level annotations are prohibitively expensive, posing great difficulties to fine-grained anomaly localization. To address this challenge, we propose LogMILP (Log anomaly localization based on Multi-Instance Learning enhanced by prototypes and Perturbation), a weakly supervised framework that enables both bag-level anomaly detection and instance-level anomaly localization using only bag-level labels. Our method guides the model to pinpoint the critical log entries using prototype-guided structural modeling with counterfactual perturbation consistency regularization, thereby improving localization reliability and interpretability under coarse-grained supervision. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that LogMILP achieves competitive detection performance while yielding significantly more reliable instance-level localization. Our code is open-sourced at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督日志异常定位框架LogMILP，利用原型引导和反事实扰动实现仅用包标签的实例级定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模网络系统中日志数据量巨大，实例级标注成本极高，导致细粒度异常定位困难。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅有包级标签的弱监督条件下，实现日志实例级别的异常定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多实例学习，结合原型引导的结构建模和反事实扰动一致性正则化，增强定位可靠性和可解释性。
contributions: 提出LogMILP弱监督框架，仅用包级标签实现实例级异常定位。
引入原型引导和反事实扰动一致性正则化，提升定位可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集上，LogMILP在保持竞争性检测性能的同时，实现了更可靠的实例级定位。
limitations: 可能依赖数据集特性，泛化性需进一步验证。
反事实扰动生成的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督日志异常定位框架LogMILP，利用原型引导和反事实扰动实现仅用包标签的实例级定位。

papers.title: AESOP: Adversarial Execution-path Selection to Overload Deep Learning Pipelines
papers.abstract: Modern machine learning deployments increasingly compose specialized models into dynamic inference pipelines, where upstream components produce intermediate predictions that determine the workload and inputs of downstream components. The cost of processing an input is therefore not determined by any single model, but by two coupled factors: the per-inference cost of each invoked component and its workload volume. Because these pipelines run under hard real-time constraints, efficiency is a fundamental requirement for system availability. We show that this structure creates an efficiency-attack surface that existing methods targeting single models cannot exploit: on identical inputs and budgets, path-aware targeting inflates FLOPs by $2,407\times$ while the strongest single-model baseline achieves $117\times$ -- a $20\times$ gap attributable entirely to where the attack is directed. We formalize this as the adversarial path-selection problem and present AESOP, a framework combining vulnerability-guided path ranking with adaptive loss weighting. We evaluate AESOP on five pipelines plus a production-realistic deployment variant with batching, bounded buffering, and confidence-threshold defenses. AESOP achieves up to $2,407\times$ FLOPs and $419\times$ latency inflation in white-box setting and 58$\times$ FLOPs / 17$\times$ latency in gray-box settings. Under system-level defenses, the attack is not neutralized but redirected: pipelines are forced to choose between throughput collapse ($0.578 \to 0.006$ input/s) and $96.7\%$ data loss to sustain throughput.

analysis.tldr: 针对深度学习推理管道的路径感知对抗攻击，可放大FLOPs达2407倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代ML系统常将多个模型组合成动态推理管道，其效率受组件推理成本和调用次数双重影响，但现有对抗攻击仅针对单模型，无法利用管道结构中的效率攻击面。
analysis.problem: 如何利用管道中上游输出决定下游负载的结构特性，设计路径感知的对抗攻击以最大化计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 路径感知攻击在相同输入和预算下，FLOPs膨胀比单模型基线高20倍（2407× vs 117×），且系统级防御无法消除攻击，只能迫使管道在吞吐量崩溃和数据丢失之间选择。
analysis.method: 提出AESOP框架，结合漏洞引导的路径排序和自适应损失加权，选择最优执行路径生成对抗样本。
contributions: 首次揭示深度学习推理管道的效率攻击面，形式化为对抗路径选择问题。
提出AESOP框架，实现白盒下2407× FLOPs和419×延迟膨胀，灰盒下58× FLOPs和17×延迟膨胀。
analysis.experiments: 在五个管道及生产级部署变体（含批处理、有界缓冲、置信阈值防御）上评估，摘要未提供具体数据集。
limitations: 仅针对特定管道结构，泛化性未知。
灰盒攻击效果显著低于白盒。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对深度学习推理管道的路径感知对抗攻击，可放大FLOPs达2407倍。

papers.title: Structural Interpretations of Protein Language Model Representations via Differentiable Graph Partitioning
papers.abstract: Protein language models such as ESM-2 learn rich residue representations that achieve strong performance on protein function prediction, but their features remain difficult to interpret as structural $\&$ evolutionary signals are encoded in dense latent spaces. We propose a plug-$\&$-play framework that projects ESM-2 representations onto protein contact graphs $\&$ applies $\textbf{SoftBlobGIN}$, a lightweight Graph Isomorphism Network with differentiable Gumbel-softmax substructure pooling, to perform structure-aware message passing $\&$ learn coarse functional substructures for downstream prediction tasks. Across enzyme classification, SoftBlobGIN achieves 92.8\% accuracy $\&$ 0.898 macro-F1. Unlike post hoc analysis of protein language models alone, our method produces directly auditable structural explanations: GNNExplainer recovers biologically meaningful active-site residues, spatially localized functional clusters, $\&$ catalytic contact patterns. On binding-site detection, SoftBlobGIN improves residue AUROC from $0.885$ using an ESM-2 linear probe to $0.983$, indicating that these structural explanations are not recoverable from language-model features alone. Learned blob partitions provide an additional layer of interpretability by automatically grouping residues into functional substructures, with blobs containing annotated active-site residues showing $1.85\times$ higher importance than other blobs ($\rho{=}0.339$, $p{=}0.009$), without any active-site supervision. Our framework requires no retraining of the language model, adds only $\sim$1.1M parameters, $\&$ generalises across ProteinShake tasks, achieving $F_{\max}$ of $0.733$ on Gene Ontology prediction $\&$ AUROC of $0.969$ on binding-site detection. We position this as an interpretable structural companion to protein language models that makes their predictions more transparent $\&$ auditable.

analysis.tldr: 提出SoftBlobGIN框架，将蛋白质语言模型表示投影到接触图上，通过可微图分区实现可解释的结构预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 蛋白质语言模型（如ESM-2）学习到的残基表示难以解释，因为结构和进化信号编码在密集的潜在空间中，需要一种方法使预测更透明和可审计。
analysis.problem: 如何从蛋白质语言模型的表示中提取可解释的结构信息，并用于下游预测任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SoftBlobGIN，一种轻量级图同构网络，结合可微Gumbel-softmax子结构池化，将ESM-2表示投影到蛋白质接触图上，进行结构感知的消息传递并学习粗粒度的功能子结构。
contributions: 提出一个即插即用的框架，将蛋白质语言模型表示与图神经网络结合，实现结构感知的预测。
通过可微图分区提供直接可审计的结构解释，自动识别功能子结构，无需主动位点监督。
analysis.experiments: 在酶分类任务上达到92.8%准确率和0.898 macro-F1；结合位点检测上残基AUROC从0.885提升至0.983；Gene Ontology预测F_max为0.733；结合位点检测AUROC为0.969。
limitations: 可能依赖于蛋白质接触图的准确性。
仅适用于具有已知结构的蛋白质。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SoftBlobGIN框架，将蛋白质语言模型表示投影到接触图上，通过可微图分区实现可解释的结构预测。

papers.title: $ξ$-DPO: Direct Preference Optimization via Ratio Reward Margin
papers.abstract: Reference-free preference optimization has emerged as an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning from human feedback, with Simple Preference Optimization(SimPO) demonstrating strong performance by eliminating the explicit reference model through a simple objective. However, the joint tuning of the hyperparameters $\beta$ and $\gamma$ in SimPO remains a central challenge. We argue that this difficulty arises because the margin formulation in SimPO is not easily interpretable across datasets with different reward gap structures. To better understand this issue, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of SimPO and find that $\beta$ implicitly controls sample filtering, while the effect of $\gamma$ depends on the reward gap structure of the dataset. Motivated by these observations, we propose $\xi$-DPO: Direct preference optimization via ratio reward margin. We first reformulate the preference objective through an equivalent transformation, changing the optimization target from maximizing the likelihood of reward gaps to minimizing the distance between reward gaps and optimal margins. Then, we redefine the reward in a ratio form between the chosen and rejected, which effectively cancels the effect of $\beta$ and yields a bounded and interpretable margin. This margin is called the ratio reward margin and is denoted by $\xi$. Unlike the margin $\gamma$ in SimPO, $\xi$ explicitly represents the desired relative separation between chosen and rejected responses and can be determined from the initial reward gap distribution, avoiding repeated trial-and-error tuning. ....

analysis.tldr: 提出ξ-DPO，通过比率奖励边际替代SimPO中的超参数联合调优，实现可解释且免调参的偏好优化。
analysis.research_motivation: SimPO虽消除了参考模型，但其超参数β和γ的联合调优困难且缺乏可解释性，不同数据集上奖励差距结构不同导致调参成本高。
analysis.problem: 解决SimPO中超参数β和γ难以联合调优且边际公式不可解释的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析发现SimPO中β隐式控制样本过滤，γ的效果依赖于数据集的奖励差距结构。
analysis.method: 通过等价变换将偏好目标从最大化奖励差距似然转为最小化奖励差距与最优边际的距离，并重新定义奖励为选择与拒绝响应的比率形式，得到有界且可解释的比率奖励边际ξ。
contributions: 揭示了SimPO中β和γ的作用机制及调优困难根源。
提出ξ-DPO，通过比率奖励边际实现免调参且可解释的偏好优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定奖励差距结构的数据集上有效。
比率奖励边际的确定仍需初始奖励差距分布信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ξ-DPO，通过比率奖励边际替代SimPO中的超参数联合调优，实现可解释且免调参的偏好优化。

papers.title: LEAP: Unlocking dLLM Parallelism via Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection
papers.abstract: Diffusion Language Models (dLLMs) have garnered significant attention for their potential in highly parallel processing. The parallel capabilities of existing dLLMs stem from the assumption of conditional independence at high confidence levels, which ensures negligible discrepancy between the marginal and joint distributions. However, the stringent confidence thresholds required to preserve accuracy severely constrain the scalability of parallelism. Through systematic token-level statistical analysis, we reveal that a substantial proportion of tokens converge to their correct predictions early in the denoising process yet fail to reach standard confidence thresholds, confirming that current confidence-based criteria are overly conservative. In response, we introduce LEAP (Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection for Accelerated Parallel Decoding). LEAP is a training-free, plug-and-play method that leverages future context filtering and multi-sequence superposition to detect early-converging tokens. By validating the alignment between early convergence and correctness, we enable reliable early decoding of these tokens. Benchmarking across diverse domains demonstrates that LEAP significantly lowers inference latency and decoding steps. Compared to confidence-based decoding, the average number of denoising steps is reduced by about 30%. On the GSM8K dataset, combining LEAP with dParallel accelerates decoding to 7.2 tokens per step while preserving model precision. LEAP effectively breaks the reliance on high-confidence priors, offering a novel paradigm for parallel decoding.

analysis.tldr: LEAP通过检测早期收敛令牌，无需训练即可加速扩散语言模型的并行解码，降低约30%的推理步数。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLM）的并行能力受限于高置信度阈值，导致可扩展性受限，现有方法过于保守。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖高置信度先验的情况下，可靠地检测早期收敛令牌以加速并行解码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大量令牌在去噪早期已收敛到正确预测，但未达到标准置信度阈值，表明当前置信度标准过于保守。
analysis.method: LEAP：一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，利用未来上下文过滤和多序列叠加检测早期收敛令牌，并通过验证早期收敛与正确性的一致性实现可靠早期解码。
contributions: 揭示了扩散语言模型中令牌早期收敛但置信度不足的现象，证明现有置信度标准过于保守。
提出LEAP方法，无需训练即可加速并行解码，平均减少约30%的去噪步数。
analysis.experiments: 在多个领域进行基准测试，GSM8K数据集上结合dParallel实现每步7.2个令牌的加速，同时保持模型精度。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定模型架构或任务特性。
未来上下文过滤和多序列叠加可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LEAP通过检测早期收敛令牌，无需训练即可加速扩散语言模型的并行解码，降低约30%的推理步数。

papers.title: PASA: A Principled Embedding-Space Watermarking Approach for LLM-Generated Text under Semantic-Invariant Attacks
papers.abstract: Watermarking for large language models (LLMs) is a promising approach for detecting LLM-generated text and enabling responsible deployment. However, existing watermarking methods are often vulnerable to semantic-invariant attacks, such as paraphrasing. We propose PASA, a principled, robust, and distortion-free watermarking algorithm that embeds and detects a watermark at the semantic level. PASA operates on semantic clusters in a latent embedding space and constructs a distributional dependency between token and auxiliary sequences via shared randomness synchronized by a secret key and semantic history. This design is grounded in our theoretical framework that characterizes a jointly optimal embedding-detection pair, achieving the fundamental trade-offs among detection accuracy, robustness, and distortion. Evaluations across multiple LLMs and semantic-invariant attacks demonstrate that PASA remains robust even under strong paraphrasing attacks while preserving high text quality, outperforming standard vocabulary-space baselines. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of our hyperparameter choices. Webpage: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于语义嵌入空间的鲁棒水印方法PASA，在语义不变攻击下保持高检测精度和文本质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM文本水印方法易受语义不变攻击（如释义）影响，需要更鲁棒的方案以支持负责任部署。
analysis.problem: 设计一种在语义层面嵌入和检测水印的算法，使其对释义等攻击具有鲁棒性，同时保持文本质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在潜在嵌入空间中对语义簇操作，通过共享随机性（由密钥和语义历史同步）构建令牌与辅助序列之间的分布依赖，实现最优嵌入-检测对的理论框架。
contributions: 提出PASA，一种基于语义嵌入空间的鲁棒无失真水印算法。
建立理论框架，刻画检测精度、鲁棒性和失真之间的基本权衡。
实验证明在强释义攻击下仍保持鲁棒性，且文本质量高。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和语义不变攻击下评估，与词汇空间基线对比，消融研究验证超参数选择。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义嵌入空间。
理论框架的实用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于语义嵌入空间的鲁棒水印方法PASA，在语义不变攻击下保持高检测精度和文本质量。

papers.title: Hierarchical Multi-Scale Graph Neural Networks: Scalable Heterophilous Learning with Oversmoothing and Oversquashing Mitigation
papers.abstract: Graphs with heterophily, where adjacent nodes carry different labels, are prevalent in real-world applications, from social networks to molecular interactions. However, existing spectral Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches tailored for heterophilous graph classification suffer from hub-dominated (node with large degree) aggregation and oversmoothing, as their suboptimal polynomial filters introduce approximation errors and blend distant signals. To address the degree-biased aggregation and suboptimal polynomial filtering, we introduce a Hierarchical Multi-view HAAR (HMH), a novel spectral graph-learning framework that scales in near-linear time . HMH first learns feature- and structure-aware signed affinities via a heterophily-aware encoder, then constructs a soft graph hierarchy guided by these embeddings. At each hierarchical level, HMH constructs a sparse, orthonormal, and locality-aware Haar basis to apply learnable spectral filters in the frequency domain. Finally, skip-connection unpooling layers combine outputs from all hierarchical levels back into the original graph, effectively preventing hub domination and long-range signal bottleneck (over-squashing). Experimentation shows that HMH outperforms state-of-the-art spectral baselines, achieving up to a 3% improvement on node classification and 7% points on graph classification datasets, all while maintaining linear scalability.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层多尺度Haar图神经网络框架，通过软图层次和正交Haar基缓解异配图中的过平滑与过挤压问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 异配图（相邻节点标签不同）在社交网络、分子相互作用等真实场景中普遍存在，但现有谱图神经网络方法因次优多项式滤波器引入近似误差并混合远距离信号，导致中心节点主导聚合和过平滑问题，限制了模型在异配图分类上的性能。
analysis.problem: 解决异配图分类中谱GNN的度偏置聚合、过平滑和过挤压问题，同时保持近线性可扩展性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有谱GNN方法因次优多项式滤波器导致近似误差和信号混合，引发中心节点主导聚合和过平滑；此外，长距离信号传播存在瓶颈（过挤压）。
analysis.method: 提出分层多视图Haar框架（HMH），首先通过异配感知编码器学习特征和结构感知的有符号亲和度，然后构建软图层次；在每个层次上构造稀疏、正交、局部感知的Haar基，在频域应用可学习谱滤波器；最后通过跳跃连接反池化层融合所有层次输出回原始图。
contributions: 提出HMH框架，利用分层Haar基实现异配图上的可学习谱滤波，同时缓解过平滑和过挤压。
设计异配感知编码器学习有符号亲和度，指导软图层次构建。
实验表明HMH在节点分类和图表征任务上分别提升高达3%和7%，且保持线性可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在节点分类和图表征数据集上评估，HMH优于现有谱基线方法，节点分类提升高达3%，图表征提升7个百分点。
limitations: 摘要未讨论对大规模异配图的泛化能力。
可能依赖层次结构的质量，对噪声图敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层多尺度Haar图神经网络框架，通过软图层次和正交Haar基缓解异配图中的过平滑与过挤压问题。

papers.title: Vertex-Softmax: Tight Transformer Verification via Exact Softmax Optimization
papers.abstract: Certified verification of transformer attention requires bounding the softmax function over interval constraints on the pre-softmax scores. Existing verifiers relax softmax ndependently of the downstream objective, leaving avoidable slack. We prove that the exact optimum of this score-box problem is attained at a vertex of the constraint box, and establish a threshold structure theorem showing that, after sorting the objective coefficients, the optimum lies among only linearly many candidates, yielding the Vertex-Softmax primitive with log-linear complexity in the sequence length. We further prove a formal optimality result showing that Vertex-Softmax is the tightest sound bound obtainable from score intervals alone, characterizing precisely what additional structure (score correlations, score-value coupling) is needed for further improvement. Integrated into a CROWN Convex Relaxation based Optimization for Worst-case Neurons)-style verifier with a formal soundness guarantee, Vertex-Softmax significantly improves certified rates and substantially tightens lower bounds across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10 attention models, while consistently matching or outperforming alpha-CROWN and branch-and-bound baselines at a fraction of their cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出Vertex-Softmax，通过精确优化softmax顶点实现更紧的Transformer验证边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Transformer验证器对softmax的松弛独立于下游目标，导致松弛不紧，影响验证精度。
analysis.problem: 在区间约束下精确优化softmax函数，以得到最紧的可证边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: softmax在区间约束下的精确最优解位于约束盒子的顶点，且通过排序目标系数后，最优解仅在线性多个候选点中。
analysis.method: Vertex-Softmax：利用阈值结构定理，将softmax优化转化为对数线性复杂度的顶点搜索，并集成到CROWN风格验证器中。
contributions: 证明softmax在区间约束下的精确最优解位于顶点，并给出阈值结构定理。
提出Vertex-Softmax原语，具有对数线性复杂度，并证明其是仅从分数区间可得到的最紧边界。
集成到形式验证器中，在多个数据集上显著提升认证率和下界紧度，且成本远低于alpha-CROWN等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10的注意力模型上评估，Vertex-Softmax显著提升认证率并收紧下界，一致匹配或优于alpha-CROWN和分支定界基线，且成本更低。
limitations: 仅适用于softmax的区间约束场景，未考虑分数相关性或分数-值耦合。
需要排序目标系数，可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Vertex-Softmax，通过精确优化softmax顶点实现更紧的Transformer验证边界。

papers.title: Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) improves in-domain performance but can degrade out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. Prior work suggests that this degradation is related to changes in dominant singular subspaces of pretrained weight matrices. However, directly identifying loss-sensitive directions with Hessian or Fisher information is computationally expensive at LLM scale. In this work, we propose preserving projected rotations in pretrained singular subspaces as an efficient proxy for Fisher-sensitive directions, which we call Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT). RPSFT penalizes changes in the projected top-$k$ singular-vector block of each pretrained weight matrix, limiting unnecessary rotation while preserving task adaptation. Across model families and sizes trained on math reasoning data, RPSFT improves the in-domain/OOD trade-off over standard SFT and strong SFT baselines, better preserves pretrained representations, and provides stronger initializations for downstream RL fine-tuning. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

analysis.tldr: 提出旋转保持微调（RPSFT），通过惩罚预训练权重矩阵的奇异子空间旋转来缓解SFT的OOD泛化下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 监督微调（SFT）会损害大语言模型的域外（OOD）泛化能力，而现有方法（如Hessian或Fisher信息）计算成本过高，难以在LLM规模下应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持SFT任务适应能力的同时，高效地抑制预训练权重矩阵中敏感方向的过度旋转，以改善OOD泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出SFT导致的OOD泛化下降与预训练权重矩阵主导奇异子空间的变化有关。
analysis.method: RPSFT：在SFT过程中，对每个预训练权重矩阵的top-k奇异向量块施加投影旋转惩罚，限制不必要的旋转，同时保留任务适应能力。
contributions: 提出RPSFT方法，以低计算代价近似Fisher敏感方向，通过惩罚奇异子空间旋转改善OOD泛化。
在多种模型族和规模上，基于数学推理数据验证了RPSFT在域内/OOD权衡、预训练表示保持和下游RL微调初始化方面的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型族和规模上，基于数学推理数据训练，与标准SFT和强SFT基线比较，RPSFT改善了域内/OOD权衡，更好地保持了预训练表示，并为下游RL微调提供了更强的初始化。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理数据进行了验证，其他领域效果未知。
top-k的选择可能依赖经验调参，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出旋转保持微调（RPSFT），通过惩罚预训练权重矩阵的奇异子空间旋转来缓解SFT的OOD泛化下降。

papers.title: Steering Without Breaking: Mechanistically Informed Interventions for Discrete Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Discrete diffusion language models (DLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising all positions in parallel, offering an alternative to autoregressive models. Controlled generation methods for DLMs, imported from autoregressive models, apply uniform intervention at every denoising steps. We show this uniform schedule degrades quality, and the damage compounds when multiple attributes are steered jointly. To diagnose the failure, we train sparse autoencoders on four DLMs (124M-8B parameters) and find that different attributes commit on distinct schedules, varying in timing, sharpness, and magnitude. For instance, topic commits within the first 2\% of denoising, whereas sentiment emerges gradually over 20\% of the process. Consequently, uniform intervention wastes steering capacity on steps where the target attribute has already solidified or has yet to emerge. We propose a novel adaptive scheduler that concentrates interventions on the steps where an attribute is actively forming and leaves the rest of generation untouched. The cost-control trade-off admits a closed-form characterization: the advantage of adaptive over uniform scheduling is governed by a single dispersion statistic of the commitment distribution. Across four DLMs and seven steering tasks, our method achieves precise control without the degradation typical of uniform interventions. Especially on challenging simultaneous three-attribute control, it reaches up to 93\% steering strength, beating the strongest baseline by up to 15\% points while preserving generation quality.

analysis.tldr: 离散扩散语言模型在不同属性上具有不同的承诺时间表，自适应干预调度器通过仅在属性活跃形成步骤施加干预，实现精确控制且不降低生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散扩散语言模型（DLMs）作为自回归模型的替代方案，其受控生成方法从自回归模型引入，但统一干预调度会降低生成质量，尤其在多属性联合控制时损伤加剧，亟需针对DLM特性的干预策略。
analysis.problem: 现有统一干预调度在DLM中导致生成质量下降，且多属性联合控制时损伤累积，需要理解属性承诺的时间动态并设计自适应调度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过稀疏自编码器分析发现，不同属性（如主题、情感）在去噪过程中具有不同的承诺时间表，包括时机、锐度和幅度差异：主题在前2%步骤内承诺，情感在20%过程中逐渐出现。统一干预在属性已固化或未出现的步骤浪费控制能力。
analysis.method: 提出自适应调度器，基于属性承诺分布的离散统计量，集中干预在属性活跃形成的步骤，其余步骤不干预，并给出成本-控制权衡的闭式解。
contributions: 揭示离散扩散语言模型中不同属性具有不同的承诺时间表，并量化其差异。
提出自适应干预调度器，通过集中干预在属性形成步骤实现精确控制，避免统一干预的质量退化。
在四个DLM和七个控制任务上验证，尤其在三维属性联合控制中达到93%控制强度，比最强基线高15个百分点，同时保持生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在四个DLM（124M-8B参数）和七个控制任务上进行实验，包括单属性和多属性联合控制，报告了控制强度和生成质量指标。
limitations: 方法依赖于稀疏自编码器训练，可能对模型规模或架构有额外计算开销。
承诺时间表的估计可能受任务或属性定义影响，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 离散扩散语言模型在不同属性上具有不同的承诺时间表，自适应干预调度器通过仅在属性活跃形成步骤施加干预，实现精确控制且不降低生成质量。

papers.title: Context-Gated Associative Retrieval: From Theory to Transformers
papers.abstract: Hopfield networks and their generalizations have established deep connections among biological associative memories, statistical physics, and transformers. Yet most models treat retrieval as a fixed query-to-memory mapping, ignoring the role of external context in recall. In this work, we propose a two-stage associative memory architecture, wherein a context-gate subcircuit reshapes the retrieval energy landscape before and during recall. We show theoretically that context gating increases inter-memory separation while inducing sparsity, translating into exponential improvements in retrieval. Crucially, we prove that the system admits a unique self-consistent fixed point, revealing that the resulting retrieval state is driven by both a direct contextual bias and a second-order retrieval-gate feedback loop. We then bridge this theory to transformers; specifically, we evaluate a first-order approximation on Llama-3, confirming that in-context learning acts as context-gated retrieval. Native dynamics mirror our theory: context localizes a memory subspace, enabling the zero-shot query to cleanly discriminate. Ultimately, this framework provides a mechanistic link between associative memory theory and LLM phenomenology.

analysis.tldr: 提出上下文门控联想记忆架构，理论证明其指数级提升检索性能，并揭示Transformer中的上下文学习本质上是上下文门控检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联想记忆模型将检索视为固定的查询到记忆映射，忽略了外部上下文在回忆中的作用，限制了检索的灵活性和准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何将外部上下文融入联想记忆的检索过程，并理论分析其效果及与Transformer的联系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明上下文门控增加了记忆间分离度并诱导稀疏性，带来指数级检索改进；在Llama-3上验证了上下文学习作为上下文门控检索的一阶近似。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段联想记忆架构：上下文门控子电路在回忆前和回忆中重塑检索能量景观；理论证明系统存在唯一自洽不动点，检索状态由直接上下文偏置和二阶检索-门控反馈环共同驱动；将理论桥接到Transformer，评估Llama-3上的一阶近似。
contributions: 提出上下文门控联想记忆架构，理论证明其指数级提升检索性能。
揭示Transformer中的上下文学习本质上是上下文门控检索，提供联想记忆理论与LLM现象之间的机制联系。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于特定假设，可能不适用于所有联想记忆模型。
在Transformer上的验证仅为一阶近似，高阶效应未充分探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出上下文门控联想记忆架构，理论证明其指数级提升检索性能，并揭示Transformer中的上下文学习本质上是上下文门控检索。

papers.title: MMTB: Evaluating Terminal Agents on Multimedia-File Tasks
papers.abstract: Terminals provide a powerful interface for AI agents by exposing diverse tools for automating complex workflows, yet existing terminal-agent benchmarks largely focus on tasks grounded in text, code, and structured files. However, many real-world workflows require practitioners to work directly with audio and video files. Working with such multimedia files calls for terminal agents not only to understand multimedia content, but also to convert auditory and visual evidence across related files into appropriate actions. To evaluate terminal agents on multimedia-file tasks, we introduce MultiMedia-TerminalBench (MMTB), a benchmark of 105 tasks across 5 meta-categories where terminal agents directly operate with audio and video files. Alongside MMTB, we propose Terminus-MM, a multimedia harness that extends Terminus-KIRA with audio and video perception for terminal agents. Together, MMTB and Terminus-MM support a controlled study of multimedia terminal agents, revealing how different forms of multimedia access shape task outcomes and determine which evidence agents rely on to construct executable terminal workflows. MMTB media and metadata are released at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出MMTB基准测试，评估终端代理在多媒体文件任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有终端代理基准主要关注文本、代码和结构化文件，但真实工作流常涉及音频和视频文件，需要代理理解多媒体内容并转换证据为行动。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估终端代理在多媒体文件任务上能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建MMTB基准（105个任务，5个元类别）和Terminus-MM工具（扩展Terminus-KIRA以支持音视频感知）。
contributions: 提出MMTB基准，覆盖多媒体文件任务的评估。
开发Terminus-MM工具，增强终端代理的音视频感知能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（105个），可能无法覆盖所有多媒体场景。
未提供代理性能的定量结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMTB基准测试，评估终端代理在多媒体文件任务上的表现。

papers.title: Two Hebrew folk meteorological proverbs tested: rainfall on Rosh Chodesh and Shabbat Mevarechim as predictors of monthly precipitation (Israel, 1950-2024)
papers.abstract: Folk meteorological proverbs encode centuries of empirical observation by agricultural communities. Two Hebrew proverbs link lunar calendar anchor days to monthly winter rainfall: (i) "If Rosh Chodesh is rainy, the whole month is rainy" and (ii) "If it rains on Shabbat Mevarechim, the whole month is rainy." Shabbat Mevarechim is the last Saturday before each new Hebrew month, preceding Rosh Chodesh by one to seven days. The first proverb is widely known; the second circulates in Hasidic oral tradition with no identified written source. Both have never been formally tested. We analyse 75 years (1950-2024) of daily precipitation data from seven Israeli cities across three climatic regions, comprising 191,758 station-days and 2,422 Hebrew-month observations during the winter rainy season (Marcheshvan-Adar). A rainy Rosh Chodesh increases the probability of a rainy month from 22.2% to 38.6% (lift +16.4 percentage points; chi-square = 57.8, p = 2.9e-14; Bayes factor 1.81). A rainy Shabbat Mevarechim produces a similar effect (lift +16.5 percentage points, p = 8.0e-13), despite preceding Rosh Chodesh by up to seven days. The effect decays with lag and mirrors daily rainfall autocorrelation (r = 0.35-0.44 at lag 1; ~0 at lag 7), consistent with Mediterranean cyclone persistence. A bootstrap permutation test (p < 1e-4) and a 15-year rolling analysis show declining predictive power (-0.20 percentage points per year, p < 0.001), consistent with shortening precipitation events under warming climate conditions. Both proverbs encode real but probabilistic meteorological signals whose reliability is decreasing over time.

analysis.tldr: 两项希伯来民间气象谚语（Rosh Chodesh和Shabbat Mevarechim降雨预测月降水）在以色列75年数据中得到统计验证，但预测力随时间下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 民间气象谚语蕴含农业社区数百年经验观察，但缺乏科学验证；两项希伯来谚语从未被正式检验，研究旨在评估其预测准确性及气候变化影响。
analysis.problem: 验证两项希伯来民间气象谚语（Rosh Chodesh和Shabbat Mevarechim降雨预测月降水）的统计显著性，并分析其预测力随时间的变化趋势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于以色列7个城市1950-2024年日降水数据（191,758站日，2,422希伯来月观测），使用卡方检验、贝叶斯因子、自相关分析、bootstrap置换检验和15年滚动分析评估谚语预测能力及其时间衰减。
contributions: 首次对两项希伯来民间气象谚语进行大规模统计验证
发现预测力随时间下降，与气候变暖导致的降水事件缩短一致
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于以色列数据，可能不适用于其他气候区域
预测力随时间下降，谚语实用性减弱
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 两项希伯来民间气象谚语（Rosh Chodesh和Shabbat Mevarechim降雨预测月降水）在以色列75年数据中得到统计验证，但预测力随时间下降。

papers.title: QuIDE: Mastering the Quantized Intelligence Trade-off via Active Optimization
papers.abstract: There is currently no unified metric for evaluating the efficiency of quantized neural networks. We propose QuIDE, built around the Intelligence Index I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1), which collapses the compression-accuracy-latency trade-off into a single score. Experiments across six settings -- SimpleCNN (MNIST, CIFAR), ResNet-18 (ImageNet-1K), and Llama-3-8B -- show a task-dependent Pareto Knee. 4-bit quantization is optimal for MNIST and large LLMs, while 8-bit is the sweet spot for complex CNN tasks (ResNet-18 on ImageNet), where 4-bit PTQ collapses accuracy catastrophically. The accuracy-gated variant I' correctly flags these non-viable configurations that the raw I would reward. QuIDE provides a reproducible evaluation protocol and a ready-to-use fitness function for mixed-precision search.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一指标 QuIDE 评估量化神经网络效率，发现任务依赖的 Pareto 最优精度位宽。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前缺乏统一指标来评估量化神经网络的效率，压缩-精度-延迟三者之间的权衡难以量化比较。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个单一指标，能够公平、可重复地评估不同量化配置下的神经网络效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同任务存在不同的 Pareto 最优位宽：4-bit 量化在简单任务（MNIST）和大语言模型（Llama-3-8B）上最优，而 8-bit 在复杂 CNN 任务（ResNet-18 on ImageNet）上最优，4-bit PTQ 会导致精度灾难性下降。
analysis.method: 提出 Intelligence Index I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1)，将压缩率、精度和延迟合并为单一分数，并引入精度门控变体 I' 以排除不可行配置。
contributions: 提出统一量化效率指标 QuIDE，可公平比较不同量化方案。
通过实验揭示任务依赖的 Pareto 最优位宽，并验证指标有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 SimpleCNN（MNIST、CIFAR）、ResNet-18（ImageNet-1K）和 Llama-3-8B 六个设置上验证，发现任务依赖的 Pareto Knee。
limitations: 指标可能对特定任务或架构的适应性有限。
未考虑硬件部署的额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一指标 QuIDE 评估量化神经网络效率，发现任务依赖的 Pareto 最优精度位宽。

papers.title: Multi-Fidelity Emulation of Atmospheric Correction Coefficients with Physics-Guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.abstract: Atmospheric correction is a critical preprocessing step in optical remote sensing, but repeated high-fidelity radiative transfer simulations remain computationally expensive for dense look-up-table generation, sensitivity analysis, retrieval support, and operational preprocessing. This study presents a physics-aware multi-fidelity surrogate framework for emulating atmospheric correction coefficients using paired 6S and libRadtran simulations. Atmospheric and geometric states are sampled using Latin Hypercube Sampling, and both radiative transfer models are evaluated under matched conditions for Sentinel-2 bands using spectral-response-function-aware coefficient generation. The high-fidelity targets are path reflectance, total transmittance, and spherical albedo. A physics-guided Kolmogorov-Arnold Network, termed pKANrtm, receives the atmospheric state and low-fidelity 6S coefficients, predicts the residual relative to libRadtran, and reconstructs the high-fidelity coefficients. The pKANrtm model uses an Efficient-KAN architecture and is trained with a physics-consistency penalty applied in the original coefficient space. The proposed model is evaluated against state-of-the-art regression-based RTM surrogates. Across both standard and out-of-distribution evaluation settings, pKANrtm achieves the strongest overall predictive performance among the compared models. Runtime benchmarking demonstrates substantial acceleration relative to libRadtran, with GPU inference providing approximately four orders of magnitude single-sample speedup and batched inference reaching tens of thousands of samples per second. These results indicate that physics-aware multi-fidelity pKANrtm emulation provides an accurate, physically structured, and computationally efficient strategy for atmospheric correction coefficient generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的多保真KAN网络pKANrtm，高效高精度模拟大气校正系数。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学遥感中大气校正依赖高保真辐射传输模拟，但计算成本极高，难以支持密集查找表生成、敏感性分析等任务。
analysis.problem: 如何以低计算成本准确模拟高保真大气校正系数（路径反射率、总透过率、球面反照率）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建物理引导的多保真KAN网络pKANrtm，输入大气状态和低保真6S系数，预测与高保真libRadtran的残差，使用Efficient-KAN架构和物理一致性惩罚训练。
contributions: 提出物理引导的多保真KAN框架pKANrtm，用于大气校正系数仿真。
在标准与分布外评估中均取得最优预测性能，GPU推理实现约四个数量级加速。
analysis.experiments: 在Sentinel-2波段上使用6S和libRadtran配对数据评估，对比多种回归代理模型，pKANrtm在标准与分布外设置中均表现最佳，GPU推理单样本加速约10^4倍，批处理达数万样本/秒。
limitations: 仅针对特定辐射传输模型（6S和libRadtran）验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
未讨论模型对噪声或输入不确定性的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的多保真KAN网络pKANrtm，高效高精度模拟大气校正系数。

papers.title: Controlled Steering-Based State Preparation for Adversarial-Robust Quantum Machine Learning
papers.abstract: Quantum machine learning (QML) provides a promising framework for leveraging quantum-mechanical effects in learning tasks. However, its vulnerability to adversarial perturbations remains a major challenge for practical deployment. In QML systems, small perturbations applied to classical inputs can propagate through the quantum encoding stage and distort the resulting quantum state, thereby degrading model performance. In this work, we propose a defense mechanism that replaces the conventional quantum encoding stage of a QML model with passive steering-based controlled state preparation, which guides the encoded state toward a controlled intermediate state. By tuning the steering strength and the number of steering iterations, the proposed method suppresses the influence of adversarial perturbations while maintaining high clean accuracy and improving adversarial accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that the passive steering-based defense consistently improves adversarial accuracy across different QML models and datasets under gradient-based adversarial attacks, achieving adversarial accuracy improvements of up to 40.19%.

analysis.tldr: 通过被动引导的受控状态制备提升量子机器学习模型的对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子机器学习（QML）易受对抗性扰动影响，实际部署面临安全挑战。
analysis.problem: QML模型在对抗性攻击下性能下降，需要有效的防御机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 用被动引导的受控状态制备替换传统量子编码阶段，通过调节引导强度和迭代次数抑制对抗扰动。
contributions: 提出基于被动引导的受控状态制备作为QML对抗防御机制
实验证明该方法在不同模型和数据集上提升对抗准确率高达40.19%
analysis.experiments: 在多个QML模型和数据集上测试，对抗准确率提升最高达40.19%。

papers.title: Continuous Flood Nowcasting in South Asia: A Multi-Sensor Ensemble Remote Sensing Framework for Flood Extent
papers.abstract: Pakistan experienced an unusually severe flood season between June and December 2025, with cascading impacts on population, infrastructure, and agriculture. Existing operational flood products (e.g., UNOSAT) provide valuable episode-level snapshots but rarely deliver spatially and temporally continuous inundation maps at near-real-time latency within the country. We present a multi-sensor, ensemble-based remote-sensing framework for continuous flood nowcasting in Pakistan that integrates Sentinel-1 SAR, Harmonized Landsat-Sentinel (HLS L30 and S30), MODIS, and VIIRS observations on a harmonized grid in Google Earth Engine. The framework employs a tiered nowcasting ensemble that prioritizes higher-resolution sensors (Sentinel-1 and HLS) and falls back to MODIS and VIIRS when necessary, preserving daily continuity of flood extent at each sensor's native resolution. Applied to the 2025 monsoon period, the system generates near-real-time, spatially consistent inundation maps across Pakistan. As a nowcasting case study, we track the super-flood of 26 August-7 September 2025 day by day, demonstrating the framework's ability to capture the evolving flood footprint in near real time and extend beyond the temporal limits of episodic mapping products. Validation against GloFAS discharge anomalies and precipitation datasets (CHIRPS v3.0, MSWEP) shows strong agreement with observed hydrometeorological conditions. By integrating nowcast outputs with exposure layers (WorldPop, ESA WorldCover, Giga-HOTOSM), the framework enables rapid estimation of affected populations, cropland, and critical infrastructure, supporting timely disaster response and resilience planning in South Asia.

analysis.tldr: 提出多传感器集成遥感框架，实现南亚洪水近实时连续预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有洪水产品（如UNOSAT）提供有价值的片段级快照，但很少能在国内以近实时延迟提供空间和时间连续的淹没图，难以满足灾害响应需求。
analysis.problem: 如何生成空间和时间连续的近实时洪水淹没图，以支持南亚地区的灾害响应和韧性规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多传感器集成遥感框架，在Google Earth Engine上整合Sentinel-1 SAR、HLS、MODIS和VIIRS数据，采用分层预报集成，优先使用高分辨率传感器，必要时回退到MODIS和VIIRS，以保持每日连续性。
contributions: 提出多传感器集成框架实现连续洪水近实时预报。
在2025年巴基斯坦洪水案例中验证框架有效性，并与水文气象数据一致。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。

papers.title: Breaking QAOA's Fixed Target Hamiltonian Barrier: A Fully Connected Quantum Boltzmann Machine via Bilevel Optimization
papers.abstract: To overcome the limitations of classical partially connected Boltzmann machines and mainstream quantum Boltzmann machines (QBMs), this work extends the conventional circuit of the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) to a bilevel optimization architecture and proposes a fully connected QBM. The inner-loop training simulates positive phase energy minimization based on the computational process of the conventional QAOA circuit, whereas the outer-loop training simulates negative phase contrastive divergence learning by optimizing the structural parameters of the target Hamiltonian. It is found that, first, the model exhibits superior performance using only a single layer (p=1) in the QAOA circuit, with an average probability of 0.9559 in measuring the target quantum state under noiseless conditions. Second, the model exhibits notable noise robustness. Under the typical noise level of current mainstream commercial quantum computing devices, the average probability of measuring the target quantum state reaches 0.6047; when the noise rises to a more stringent level with doubled intensity, this probability remains at 0.3859. In both scenarios, the target quantum state maintains the highest measurement probability among all detected states, with a value several times higher than that of the second-ranked state. This indicates that the model retains strong robustness even when noise meets or exceeds the upper limit of current mainstream commercial quantum computing devices. Third, under a block-by-block learning strategy with p=1 and only 10 measurement shots, the model consistently generates the target "qubit" grid image regardless of noise interference, demonstrating strong robustness in image generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于双层优化的全连接量子玻尔兹曼机，突破QAOA固定目标哈密顿量限制，在单层电路下实现高概率目标态测量并展现强噪声鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典部分连接玻尔兹曼机和主流量子玻尔兹曼机（QBM）存在连接性限制和训练效率问题，需要一种全连接且鲁棒的量子生成模型。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种全连接量子玻尔兹曼机，克服QAOA固定目标哈密顿量的局限，并提升噪声环境下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将QAOA电路扩展为双层优化架构：内层模拟正相能量最小化（基于QAOA计算过程），外层通过优化目标哈密顿量结构参数模拟负相对比散度学习。
contributions: 提出一种全连接量子玻尔兹曼机，突破QAOA固定目标哈密顿量限制。
在单层QAOA电路（p=1）下实现高目标态测量概率（无噪声0.9559，典型噪声0.6047）。
展示模型在噪声干扰下的强鲁棒性，包括图像生成任务。
analysis.experiments: 在无噪声和不同噪声水平下测量目标量子态概率，并在块学习策略下进行图像生成实验。摘要未提供具体数据集或对比基线。
limitations: 实验仅在单层电路（p=1）下进行，多层电路性能未知。
图像生成任务仅涉及简单“qubit”网格图像，复杂任务泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: MultiSoc-4D: A Benchmark for Diagnosing Instruction-Induced Label Collapse in Closed-Set LLM Annotation of Bengali Social Media
papers.abstract: Annotation automation via Large Language Models (LLMs) is the core approach for scaling NLP datasets; however, LLM behavior with respect to closed-set instructions in low-resource languages has not been well studied. We present MultiSoc-4D, a Bengali social media dataset benchmark, which contains 58K+ social media comments from six sources annotated along four dimensions: category, sentiment, hate speech, and sarcasm. By employing a structured pipeline where ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Grok individually annotate separate partitions, while sharing a common validation set of 20%, we diagnose LLM behavior systematically. We discover a prevalent phenomenon called "instruction-induced label collapse", wherein LLMs show a systematic preference towards fallback labels (Other, Neutral, No), leading to high agreement rates but under-detection of minority categories. For example, we find that LLMs failed to detect 79% and 75% of instances with hateful and sarcastic content compared to a human-calibrated reference. Furthermore, we prove that it represents a "label agreement illusion", statistically validated via almost null Fleiss' Kappa ($\kappa \approx -0.001$) on sarcasm detection. Across 40+ LLMs, we benchmark this annotation bias propagation within the training pipeline, regardless of architectural differences. We release MultiSoc-4D as a diagnostic benchmark for annotation biases in Bengali NLP.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MultiSoc-4D 基准，诊断 LLM 在孟加拉语社交媒体标注中的指令诱导标签坍缩现象。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 自动化标注是扩展 NLP 数据集的核心方法，但 LLM 在低资源语言中遵循封闭指令的行为尚未被充分研究，存在标注偏差风险。
analysis.problem: LLM 在孟加拉语社交媒体封闭集标注中表现出系统性的标签偏好（如回退标签），导致少数类别被低估，形成“标签坍缩”现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现 LLM 存在“指令诱导标签坍缩”，即对回退标签（Other, Neutral, No）的系统性偏好，导致高一致性但低检测率；例如，与人类校准参考相比，LLM 未能检测到 79% 的仇恨言论和 75% 的讽刺内容。讽刺检测的 Fleiss' Kappa 接近零（κ ≈ -0.001），表明存在“标签一致性幻觉”。
analysis.method: 构建包含 58K+ 条孟加拉语社交媒体评论的 MultiSoc-4D 基准，覆盖六个来源和四个标注维度；使用 ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude、Grok 分别标注不同分区，共享 20% 验证集，系统诊断 LLM 行为。
contributions: 提出 MultiSoc-4D 基准，用于诊断孟加拉语 NLP 中的标注偏差。
发现并验证“指令诱导标签坍缩”现象，揭示 LLM 在低资源语言标注中的系统性偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在 40+ 个 LLM 上基准测试了标注偏差在训练流程中的传播，验证了架构无关性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对孟加拉语社交媒体，可能不直接推广到其他低资源语言或领域。
未深入探讨缓解标签坍缩的方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 MultiSoc-4D 基准，诊断 LLM 在孟加拉语社交媒体标注中的指令诱导标签坍缩现象。

papers.title: Measuring Accuracy and Energy-to-Solution of Quantum Fine-Tuning of Foundational AI Models
papers.abstract: We present an experimental study of energy-to-solution (ETS) of hybrid quantum-classical applications, enabled by direct instrumentation of power consumption of a Forte Enterprise trapped-ion quantum processor. We apply this methodology to a hybrid quantum-classical pipeline for quantum fine-tuning of foundational AI models, and validate the approach end-to-end on quantum hardware. Despite noise and limited qubit counts, the resulting models achieve accuracy competitive with and exceeding classical baselines such as logistic regression and support vector classifiers. Our results show that QPU energy consumption scales approximately linearly with qubit number for shallow circuits, while classical simulation exhibits exponential scaling, indicating a break-even for ETS around 34 qubits. The classification error improvement of the best quantum fine-tuned model over the best classical fine-tuned model considered in this study is around 24%. We further contextualize these findings with comparisons to tensor network methods. This work establishes energy-to-solution as a measurable and scalable metric for evaluating quantum applications and provides experimental evidence of favorable energy-accuracy trade-offs.

analysis.tldr: 量子微调基础AI模型在精度和能耗上均优于经典基线，34量子比特时能耗达到平衡点。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子计算在AI微调中的实际能耗和精度权衡缺乏实验验证，现有研究多基于经典模拟，无法反映真实量子硬件的能耗特性。
analysis.problem: 量化混合量子-经典微调管线的能量-精度权衡，并验证其在真实量子硬件上的可行性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子处理器能耗随量子比特数近似线性增长，而经典模拟呈指数增长；34量子比特时能耗达到平衡点；量子微调模型分类误差比最佳经典模型低约24%。
analysis.method: 直接测量离子阱量子处理器的功耗，构建混合量子-经典微调管线，并在真实量子硬件上端到端验证。
contributions: 首次实验测量量子微调基础AI模型的能量-解决方案（ETS）指标
证明量子微调模型在精度上超越逻辑回归和支持向量机等经典基线，误差降低约24%
揭示量子处理器能耗随量子比特数线性缩放，而经典模拟指数缩放，34量子比特时ETS达到平衡点
analysis.experiments: 在Forte Enterprise离子阱量子处理器上实验，对比量子微调模型与逻辑回归、支持向量机等经典基线，并比较张量网络方法。
limitations: 量子比特数有限且存在噪声，可能限制更大规模验证
仅针对特定基础AI模型和分类任务，泛化性需进一步验证

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 量子微调基础AI模型在精度和能耗上均优于经典基线，34量子比特时能耗达到平衡点。

papers.title: Stargazer: A Scalable Model-Fitting Benchmark Environment for AI Agents under Astrophysical Constraints
papers.abstract: The rise of autonomous AI agents suggests that dynamic benchmark environments with built-in feedback on scientifically grounded tasks are needed to evaluate the capabilities of these agents in research work. We introduce Stargazer, a scalable environment for evaluating AI agents on dynamic, iterative physics-grounded model-fitting tasks using inference on radial-velocity (RV) time series data. Stargazer comprises 120 tasks across three difficulty tiers, including 20 real archival cases, covering diverse scenarios ranging from high-SNR single-planet systems to complex multi-planetary configurations requiring involved low-SNR analysis. Our evaluation of eight frontier agents reveals a gap between numerical optimization and adherence to physical constraints: although agents often achieve a good statistical fit, they frequently fail to recover correct physical system parameters, a limitation that persists even when agents are equipped with vanilla skills. Furthermore, increasing test-time compute yields only marginal gains, with excessive token usage often reflecting recursive failure loops rather than meaningful exploration. Stargazer presents an opportunity to train, evaluate, scaffold, and scale strategies on a model-fitting problem of practical research relevance today. Our methodology to design a simulation-driven environment for AI agents presumably generalizes to many other model-fitting problems across scientific domains. Source code and the project website are available at this https URL and this https URL , respectively.

analysis.tldr: Stargazer 是一个用于评估 AI Agent 在物理约束下进行模型拟合的可扩展基准环境。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主 AI Agent 的兴起需要动态、有内置反馈的基准环境来评估其在科学研究中的能力，但现有环境缺乏对物理约束的考量。
analysis.problem: 现有 AI Agent 在径向速度时间序列数据的模型拟合任务中，虽然能实现良好的统计拟合，但常违反物理约束，无法恢复正确的物理系统参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：Agent 在数值优化上表现良好，但常违反物理约束；增加测试时计算量仅带来边际收益，过多的 token 使用往往反映递归失败循环而非有意义的探索。
analysis.method: Stargazer 是一个可扩展的基准环境，包含 120 个任务（三个难度等级，含 20 个真实档案案例），基于径向速度时间序列数据，用于评估 AI Agent 在动态、迭代的物理约束模型拟合任务中的表现。
contributions: 提出了 Stargazer，一个用于评估 AI Agent 在物理约束下模型拟合能力的可扩展基准环境。
揭示了当前前沿 Agent 在物理约束遵循方面的不足，以及增加测试时计算量的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要对 8 个前沿 Agent 进行了评估，发现其数值优化与物理约束遵循之间存在差距，且增加测试时计算量仅带来边际收益。
limitations: 基准仅针对径向速度时间序列数据，可能不直接推广到其他科学领域。
未提供 Agent 在物理约束遵循上的具体改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Stargazer 是一个用于评估 AI Agent 在物理约束下进行模型拟合的可扩展基准环境。
